H1417.def: or גְּדֻדָה; (feminine) from H1413 (גָּדַד); a furrow (as cut).

H1418.def: feminine participle passive of H1413 (גָּדַד); an incision.

H1419.def: or גָּדֹל; (shortened) from H1431 (גָּדַל); great (in any sense); hence, older; also insolent.
H1419.kjv: aloud, elder(-est), exceeding(-ly), far, (man of) great (man, matter, thing,-er,-ness), high, long, loud, mighty, more, much, noble, proud thing, sore, ([idiom]) very

H1420.def: or גְּדֻלָּה; (shortened) or (less accurately) גְּדוּלָּה; feminine of H1419 (גָּדוֹל); greatness; (concretely) mighty acts.

H1421.def: or (shortened) גִּדֻּף; and (feminine) גִּדּוּפָהxlit giddûphâh corrected to giddûwphâh; or גִּדֻּפָה; from H1422 (גְּדוּפָה); vilification.

H1422.def: feminine passive participle of H1442 (גָּדַף); a revilement.

H1423.def: from the same as H1415 (גָּדָה); a young goat (from browsing).

H1424.def: from H1409 (גָּד); fortunate; Gadi, an Israelite.

H1425.gloss: a Gadite (collectively) or descendants of Gad
H1425.def: patronymically from H1410 (גָּד); a Gadite (collectively) or descendants of Gad.

H1426.def: intensive for H1424 (גָּדִי); Gaddi, an Israelite.

H1427.def: from H1409 (גָּד) and H410 (אֵל); fortune of God; Gaddiel, an Israelite.

H1428.def: or גַּדיָה; the same as H1415 (גָּדָה); a river brink.

H1429.def: feminine of H1423 (גְּדִי); a young female goat.

H1430.def: from an unused root (meaning to heap up); a stack of sheaves; by analogy, a tomb.

H1431.gloss: to be (causatively make) large (in various senses
H1431.def: a primitive root; properly, to twist (compare H1434 (גְּדִל)), i.e.; to be (causatively make) large (in various senses, as in body, mind, estate or honor, also in pride).
H1431.kjv: advance, boast, bring up, exceed, excellent, be(-come, do, give, make, wax), great(-er, come to... estate, things), grow(up), increase, lift up, magnify(-ifical), be much set by, nourish (up), pass, promote, proudly (spoken), tower

H1434.gloss: thread, i.e. a tassel or festoon
H1434.def: from H1431 (גָּדַל) (in the sense of twisting); thread, i.e. a tassel or festoon.

H1435.def: from H1431 (גָּדַל); stout; Giddel, the name of one of the Nethinim, also of one of 'Solomon's servants'.

H1436.gloss: Gedaljah, the name of five Israelites
H1436.def: or (prolonged) גְּדַלְיָהוּ; from H1431 (גָּדַל) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has become great; Gedaljah, the name of five Israelites.

H1437.def: from H1431 (גָּדַל); I have made great; Giddalti, an Israelite.

H1438.def: a primitive root; to fell a tree; generally, to destroy anything.
H1438.kjv: cut (asunder, in sunder, down, off), hew down

H1439.def: from H1438 (גָּדַע); feller (i.e. warrior); Gidon, an Israelite.

H1440.def: from H1438 (גָּדַע); a cutting (i.e. desolation); Gidom, a place in Palestine.

H1441.def: from H1438 (גָּדַע); warlike (compare H1439 (גִּדְעוֹן)); Gidoni, an Israelite.

H1442.def: a primitive root; to hack (with words), i.e. revile.

H1443.def: a primitive root; to wall in or around.
H1443.kjv: close up, fence up, hedge, inclose, make up (a wall), mason, repairer

H1445.def: ; the same as H1444 (גֶּדֶר); Geder, a place in Palestine.

H1446.def: or (fully) גְּדוֹר; from H1443 (גָּדַר); inclosure; Gedor, a place in Palestine; also the name of three Israelites.

H1447.def: from H1443 (גָּדַר); a circumvallation; by implication, an inclosure.

H1448.def: feminine of H1447 (גָּדֵר); enclosure (especially for flocks).

H1449.gloss: (with the article) Gederah, a place in Palestine
H1449.def: the same as H1448 (גְּדֵרָה); (with the article) Gederah, a place in Palestine.

H1450.def: plural of H1448 (גְּדֵרָה); walls; Gederoth, a place in Palestine.

H1451.gloss: a Gederite, or inhabitant of Geder
H1451.def: patrial from H1445 (גֶּדֶר); a Gederite, or inhabitant of Geder.

H1452.gloss: a Gederathite, or inhabitant of Gederah
H1452.def: patrial from H1449 (גְּדֵרָה); a Gederathite, or inhabitant of Gederah.

H1453.def: dual of H1448 (גְּדֵרָה); double wall; Gederothajim, a place in Palestine.

H1454.def: probably a clerical error for H2088 (זֶה); this.

H1455.gloss: to remove (a bandage from a wound, i.e. heal it)
H1455.def: a primitive root; to remove (a bandage from a wound, i.e. heal it).

H1457.def: a primitive root; to prostrate oneself.

H1458.def: another form for H1460 (גֵּו); the back.

H1460.def: from H1342 (גָּאָה) (corresponding to H1354 (גַב)); the back; by analogy, the middle.

H1462.gloss: the locust (from its grubbing as a larvae)
H1462.def: from H1461 (גּוּב); the locust (from its grubbing as a larvae).

H1463.gloss: Gog, the name of an Israelite, also of some nothern nation
H1463.def: of uncertain derivation; Gog, the name of an Israelite, also of some nothern nation.

H1464.def: a primitive root (akin to H1413 (גָּדַד)); to crowd upon, i.e. attack.

H1465.gloss: the back, i.e. (by extensive) the person
H1465.def: feminine of H1460 (גֵּו); the back, i.e. (by extensive) the person.

H1466.def: the same as H1465 (גֵּוָה); exaltation; (figuratively) arrogance.

H1468.def: a primitive root (compare H1494 (גַּזָז)); properly, to shear off; but used only in the (figuratively) sense of passing rapidly.

H1469.gloss: a nestling (as being comparatively nude of feathers)
H1469.def: or (shortened) גֹזָלlemma גזָל missing vowel, corrected to גֹזָל; from H1497 (גָּזַל); a nestling (as being comparatively nude of feathers).

H1470.def: probably from H1468 (גּוּז); a quarry (as a place of cutting stones); Gozan, a province of Assyria.

H1471.def: rarely (shortened) גֹּי; apparently from the same root as H1465 (גֵּוָה) (in the sense of massing); a foreign nation; hence, a Gentile; also (figuratively) a troop of animals, or a flight of locusts.

H1472.gloss: a body, whether alive or dead
H1472.def: prolonged for H1465 (גֵּוָה); a body, whether alive or dead.

H1473.def: or (shortened) גֹּלָה; active participle feminine of H1540 (גָּלָה); exile; concretely and collectively exiles.

H1474.gloss: Golan, a place east of the Jordan
H1474.def: from H1473 (גּוֹלָה); captive; Golan, a place east of the Jordan.

H1476.gloss: Guni, the name of two Israelites
H1476.def: probably from H1598 (גָּנַן); protected; Guni, the name of two Israelites.

H1477.gloss: a Gunite (collectively with article prefix) or descendant
H1477.def: patronymically from H1476 (גּוּנִי); a Gunite (collectively with article prefix) or descendants of Guni.

H1478.gloss: to breathe out, i.e. (by implication) expire
H1478.def: a primitive root; to breathe out, i.e. (by implication) expire.
H1478.kjv: die, be dead, give up the ghost, perish

H1479.gloss: to hollow or arch, i.e. (figuratively) close
H1479.def: a primitive root; properly, to hollow or arch, i.e. (figuratively) close; to shut.

H1480.def: from H1479 (גּוּף); a corpse (as closed to sense).

H1481.gloss: to turn aside from the road (for a lodging or any other p
H1481.def: a primitive root; properly, to turn aside from the road (for a lodging or any other purpose), i.e. sojourn (as a guest); also to shrink, fear (as in a strange place); also to gather forhostility (as afraid).
H1481.kjv: abide, assemble, be afraid, dwell, fear, gather (together), inhabitant, remain, sojourn, stand in awe, (be) stranger, surely

H1482.gloss: a cub (as still abiding in the lair), especially of the lion
H1482.def: or (shortened) גֻּר; perhaps from H1481 (גּוּר); a cub (as still abiding in the lair), especially of the lion.

H1483.def: the same as H1482 (גּוּר); Gur, a place in Palestine.

H1484.gloss: a cub (as still abiding in the lair), especially of the lion
H1484.def: or (feminine) גֹּרָה; a variation of H1482 (גּוּר); a cub (as still abiding in the lair), especially of the lion.

H1485.def: from H1481 (גּוּר) and H1168 (בַּעַל); dwelling of Baal; Gur-Baal, a place in Arabia.

H1486.def: or (shortened) גֹּרָל; from an unused root meaning to be rough (as stone); properly, a pebble, i.e. a lot (small stones being used for that purpose); figuratively, a portion or destiny (as if determined by lot).

H1487.def: or rather (by permutation) גִּישׁ; of uncertain derivation; a mass of earth.

H1488.def: from H1494 (גַּזָז); a fleece (as shorn); also mown grass.

H1491.gloss: to cut off, i.e. portion out
H1491.def: a primitive root (akin to H1468 (גּוּז)); to cut off, i.e. portion out.

H1493.gloss: a Gizonite or inhabitant of Gizoh
H1493.def: patrial from the unused name of a place apparently in Palestine; a Gizonite or inhabitant of Gizoh.

H1494.def: a primitive root (akin to H1468 (גּוּז)); to cut off; specifically to shear aflock or shave the hair; figuratively to destroy an enemy.

H1495.gloss: Gazez, the name of two Israelites
H1495.def: from H1494 (גַּזָז); shearer; Gazez, the name of two Israelites.

H1496.def: from H1491 (גָּזָה); something cut, i.e. dressed stone.

H1497.def: a primitive root; to pluck off; specifically to flay, strip or rob.
H1497.kjv: catch, consume, exercise (robbery), pluck (off), rob, spoil, take away (by force, violence), tear

H1498.kjv: robbery, thing taken away by violence

H1499.kjv: violence, violent perverting.. gozal. See H1469 (גּוֹזָל)

H1500.def: feminine of H1498 (גָּזֵל) and mean the same; robbery, or (concretely) plunder.
H1500.kjv: that (he had robbed) (which he took violently away), spoil, violence

H1501.def: from an unused root meaning to devour; a kind of locust.

H1502.def: from the same as H1501 (גָּזָם); devourer; Gazzam, one of the Nethinim.

H1503.gloss: the trunk or stump of atree (as felled or as planted)
H1503.def: from an unused root meaning to cut down (trees); the trunk or stump of atree (as felled or as planted).

H1504.def: a primitive root; to cut down or off; (figuratively) to destroy, divide, exclude, or decide.

H1505.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H1504 (גָּזַר); to quarry; determine.

H1506.def: from H1504 (גָּזַר); something cut off; a portion.

H1507.def: the same as H1506 (גֶּזֶר); Gezer, a place in Palestine.

H1508.gloss: the figure or person (as if cut out)
H1508.def: feminine of H1506 (גֶּזֶר); the figure or person (as if cut out); also an inclosure (as separated).

H1511.gloss: a Grizite (collectively) or member of a native tribe in P
H1511.def: (in the m patrial from H1507 (גֶּזֶר); a Gezerite (collectively) or inhabitants of Gezer; but better (as in the text) bytransposition גִּזְרִיxlit Girzîy corrected to Gizrîy; patrial of H1630 (גְּרִזִים); a Grizite (collectively) or member of a native tribe in Palestine.

H1512.gloss: the external abdomen, belly (as the source of the faetus )
H1512.def: probably from H1518 (גִּיחַ)lemma גּיחַ missing vowel, corrected to גִּיחַ; (compare H1521 (גִּיחוֹן)); the external abdomen, belly (as the source of the faetus ).

H1513.def: or (feminine) גַּחֶלֶת; from an unused root meaning to glow or kindle; an ember.

H1514.def: from an unused root meaning to burn; flame; Gacham, a son of Nahor.

H1515.def: from an unused root meaning to hide; lurker; Gachar, one of the Nethinim.

H1516.def: or (shortened) גַּי; probably (by transmutation) from the same root as H1466 (גֵּוָה) (abbreviated); a gorge (from its lofty sides; hence, narrow, but not a gully or winter-torrent).

H1517.def: probably from H1464 (גּוּד); a thong (as compressing); by analogy, a tendon.

H1518.gloss: to gush forth (as water), generally to issue
H1518.def: or (shortened) גֹּחַ; a primitive root; to gush forth (as water), generally to issue.
H1518.kjv: break forth, labor to bring forth, come forth, draw up, take out

H1519.def: (Aramaic) or (shortened) גּוּחַ; (Aramaic), corresponding to H1518 (גִּיחַ)lemma גּיחַ missing vowel, corrected to גִּיחַ; to rush forth.

H1520.def: from H1518 (גִּיחַ)lemma גּיחַ missing vowel, corrected to גִּיחַ; a fountain; Giach, a place in Palestine.

H1521.def: or (shortened) גִּחוֹן; from H1518 (גִּיחַ)lemma גּיחַ missing vowel, corrected to גִּיחַ; stream; Gichon, a river of Paradise; also a valley (or pool) near Jerusalem.

H1522.def: or גֵּחֲזִי; apparently from H1516 (גַּיְא) and H2372 (חָזָה); valley of a visionary; Gechazi, the servant of Elisha.

H1523.gloss: to spin round (under the influence of any violent emotion)
H1523.def: or (by permutation) גּוּל; a primitive root; properly, to spin round (under the influence of any violent emotion), i.e. usually rejoice, or (as cringing) fear.
H1523.kjv: be glad, joy, be joyful, rejoice

H1524.gloss: a revolution (of time, i.e. an age)
H1524.def: from H1523 (גִּיל); a revolution (of time, i.e. an age); also joy.
H1524.kjv: exceedingly, gladness, greatly, joy, rejoice(-ing), sort

H1525.def: or גִּילַת; feminine of H1524 (גִּיל); joy.

H1526.gloss: a Gilonite or inhabitant of Giloh
H1526.def: patrial from H1542 (גִּלֹה); a Gilonite or inhabitant of Giloh.

H1527.def: of uncertain derivation; Ginath, an Israelite.

H1529.def: from the same as H1487 (גּוּשׁ); lumpish; Geshan, an Israelite.

H1530.def: from H1556 (גָּלַל); something rolled, i.e. a heap of stone or dung (plural ruins), by analogy, a spring of water (plural waves).

H1531.def: from H1556 (גָּלַל); a cup for oil (as round).

H1532.def: from an unused root meaning to shave; a barber.

H1533.def: from H1530 (גַּל) and H1158 (בָּעָה); fountain of ebullition; Gilboa, a mountain of Palestine.

H1534.def: by reduplication from H1556 (גָּלַל); a wheel; by analogy, a whirlwind; also dust (as whirled).

H1536.def: a variation of H1534 (גַּלְגַּל); a wheel; by analogy, a whirlwind; also dust (as whirled).

H1537.gloss: Gilgal, the name of three places in Palestine
H1537.def: the same as H1536 (גִּלְגָּל) (with the article as a properly, noun); Gilgal, the name of three places in Palestine.

H1538.def: by reduplication from H1556 (גָּלַל); a skull (as round); by implication, a head (in enumeration of persons).

H1539.def: from an unused root probably meaning to polish; the (human) skin (as smooth).

H1540.gloss: to denude (especially in a disgraceful sense)
H1540.def: a primitive root; to denude (especially in a disgraceful sense); by implication, to exile (captives being usually stripped); figuratively, to reveal.
H1540.kjv: advertise, appear, bewray, bring, (carry, lead, go) captive (into captivity), depart, disclose, discover, exile, be gone, open, plainly, publish, remove, reveal, shamelessly, shew, surely, tell, uncover

H1541.gloss: to denude (especially in a disgraceful sense)
H1541.def: (Aramaic) or גְּלָא; (Aramaic), corresponding to H1540 (גָּלָה); to denude (especially in a disgraceful sense); by implication, to exile (captives being usually stripped); figuratively, to reveal.

H1542.def: or (fully) גִּילֹה; from H1540 (גָּלָה); open; Giloh, a place in Palestine.

H1543.gloss: a fountain, bowl or globe (all as round)
H1543.def: feminine from H1556 (גָּלַל); a fountain, bowl or globe (all as round).

H1544.def: or (shortened) גִּלֻּל; from H1556 (גָּלַל); properly, a log (as round); by implication, an idol.

H1546.def: feminine from H1540 (גָּלָה); captivity; concretely, exiles (collectively).

H1547.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H1546 (גָּלוּת); captivity; concretely, exiles (collectively).

H1548.gloss: to be bald, i.e. (causatively) to shave
H1548.def: a primitive root; properly, to be bald, i.e. (causatively) to shave; figuratively to lay waste.

H1549.def: or גִּלְיוֹן; from H1540 (גָּלָה); a tablet for writing (as bare); by analogy, a mirror (as a plate).

H1550.gloss: a valve of a folding door (as turning)
H1550.def: from H1556 (גָּלַל); a valve of a folding door (as turning); also a ring (as round).

H1551.gloss: Galil (as a special circuit) in the North of Palestine
H1551.def: or (prolonged) גָּלִילָה; the same as H1550 (גָּלִיל); a circle (with the article); Galil (as a special circuit) in the North of Palestine.

H1552.def: feminine of H1550 (גָּלִיל); a circuit or region.

H1553.def: plural of H1552 (גְלִילָה); circles; Geliloth, a place in Palestine.

H1554.def: plural of H1530 (גַּל); springs; Gallim, a place in Palestine.

H1555.def: perhaps from H1540 (גָּלָה); exile; Goljath, a Philistine.

H1556.def: a primitive root; to roll (literally or figuratively).
H1556.kjv: commit, remove, roll (away, down, together), run down, seek occasion, trust, wallow

H1558.def: from H1556 (גָּלַל); a circumstance (as rolled around); only used adverbially, on account of.

H1559.gloss: Galal, the name of two Israelites
H1559.def: from H1556 (גָּלַל), in the sense of H1560 (גְּלָל); great; Galal, the name of two Israelites.

H1560.def: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to H1556 (גָּלַל); weight or size (as if rolled).

H1561.def: a variation of H1557 (גָּלָל); dung (plural balls of dung).

H1562.def: from H1561 (גֵּלֶל); dungy; Gilalai, an Israelite.

H1564.gloss: a wrapped (and unformed mass, i.e. as the embryo)
H1564.def: from H1563 (גָּלַם); a wrapped (and unformed mass, i.e. as the embryo).

H1565.def: probably by prolonged from H1563 (גָּלַם); sterile (as wrapped up too hard); figuratively, desolate.

H1566.def: a primitive root; to be obstinate.

H1567.gloss: Galed, a memorial cairn East of the Jordan
H1567.def: from H1530 (גַּל) and H5707 (עֵד); heap of testimony; Galed, a memorial cairn East of the Jordan.

H1568.gloss: Gilad, a region East of the Jordan
H1568.def: probably from H1567 (גַּלְעֵד); Gilad, a region East of the Jordan; also the name of three Israelites.

H1569.gloss: a Giladite or descendant of Gilad
H1569.def: patronymically from H1568 (גִּלְעָד); a Giladite or descendant of Gilad.

H1570.def: a primitive root; probably to caper (as a goat).

H1571.def: by contraction from an unused root meaning to gather; properly, assemblage; used only adverbially also, even, yea, though; often repeated as correl. both...and.
H1571.kjv: again, alike, also, (so much) as (soon), both (so)...and, but, either...or, even, for all, (in) likewise (manner), moreover, nay...neither, one, then(-refore), though, what, with, yea

H1572.def: a primitive root (literally or figuratively) to absorb; to absorb.

H1573.gloss: an absorbent, i.e. the bulrush (from its porosity)
H1573.def: from H1572 (גָּמָא); properly, an absorbent, i.e. the bulrush (from its porosity); specifically the papyrus.

H1574.def: from an unused root apparently meaning to grasp; properly, a span.

H1575.def: from the same as H1574 (גֹּמֶד); a warrior (as grasping weapons).

H1576.gloss: treatment, i.e. an act (of good or ill)
H1576.def: from H1580 (גָּמַל); treatment, i.e. an act (of good or ill); by implication, service or requital.
H1576.kjv: as hast served, benefit, desert, deserving, that which he hath given, recompense, reward

H1577.def: passive participle of H1580 (גָּמַל); rewarded; Gamul, an Israelite.

H1578.def: feminine of H1576 (גְּמוּל); meaning the same.

H1579.def: of uncertain derivation; Gimzo, a place in Palestine.

H1580.gloss: to treat a person (well or ill), i.e. benefit or requite
H1580.def: a primitive root; to treat a person (well or ill), i.e. benefit or requite; by implication (of toil), to ripen, i.e. (specifically) to wean.
H1580.kjv: bestow on, deal bountifully, do (good), recompense, requite, reward, ripen, serve, mean, yield

H1581.def: apparently from H1580 (גָּמַל) (in the sense of labor or burden-bearing); a camel.

H1582.def: probably from H1581 (גָּמָל); cameldriver; Gemalli, an Israelite.

H1583.def: from H1580 (גָּמַל) and H410 (אֵל); reward of God; Gamliel, an Israelite.

H1584.gloss: to end (in the sense of completion or failure)
H1584.def: a primitive root; to end (in the sense of completion or failure).
H1584.kjv: cease, come to an end, fail, perfect, perform

H1585.gloss: to end (in the sense of completion or failure)
H1585.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H1584 (גָּמַר); to end (in the sense of completion or failure).

H1586.gloss: Gomer, the name of a son of Japheth and of his descendants
H1586.def: from H1584 (גָּמַר); completion; Gomer, the name of a son of Japheth and of his descendants; also of a Hebrewess.

H1587.gloss: Gemarjah, the name of two Israelites
H1587.def: or גְּמַרְיָהוּ; from H1584 (גָּמַר) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has perfected; Gemarjah, the name of two Israelites.

H1589.def: a primitive root; to thieve (literally or figuratively); by implication, to deceive.
H1589.kjv: carry away, indeed, secretly bring, steal (away), get by stealth

H1591.def: from H1589 (גָּנַב); stealing, i.e. (concretely) something stolen.

H1592.def: from H1589 (גָּנַב); theft; Genubath, an Edomitish prince.

H1594.def: another form for H1593 (גַּנָּה); a garden.

H1595.def: from an unused root meaning to store; treasure; by implication, a coffer.

H1598.def: a primitive root; to hedge about, i.e. (generally) protect.

H1599.def: or גִּנְּתוֹ; from H1598 (גָּנַן); gardener; Ginnethon or Ginnetho, an Israelite.

H1600.def: a primitive root; to bellow (as cattle).

H1601.def: feminine active participle of H1600 (גָּעָה); lowing; Goah, a place near Jerusalem.

H1602.def: a primitive root; to detest; by implication, to reject.
H1602.kjv: abhor, fail, lothe, vilely cast away

H1603.def: from H1602 (גָּעַל); loathing; Gaal, an Israelite.

H1607.def: a primitive root; to agitate violently.

H1608.def: from H1607 (גָּעַשׁ); a quaking; Gaash, a hill in Palestine.

H1609.def: of uncertain derivation; Gatam, an Edomite.

H1610.def: from an unused root meaning to arch; the back; by extension the body or self.

H1612.gloss: a vine (as twining), especially the grape
H1612.def: from an unused root meaning to bend; a vine (as twining), especially the grape.

H1613.gloss: a kind of tree or wood (as used for building)
H1613.def: from an unused root, probably meaning to house in; a kind of tree or wood (as used for building), apparently the cypress.

H1614.def: probably feminine of H1613 (גֹּפֶר); properly, cypress-resin; by analogy, sulphur (as equally inflammable).

H1615.gloss: lime (from being burned in a kiln)
H1615.def: perhaps from H3564 (כּוּר); lime (from being burned in a kiln).

H1616.def: or (fully) geyr (gare); from H1481 (גּוּר); properly, a guest; by implication, a foreigner.

H1617.gloss: Gera, the name of six Israelites
H1617.def: perhaps from H1626 (גֵּרָה); a grain; Gera, the name of six Israelites.

H1618.def: from an unused root meaning to scratch; scurf (from itching).

H1619.def: from the same as H1618 (גָּרָב); scabby; Gareb, the name of an Israelite, also of a hill near Jerusalem.

H1620.gloss: a berry (as if a pellet of rumination)
H1620.def: by reduplication from H1641 (גָּרַר); a berry (as if a pellet of rumination).

H1621.def: feminine plural from H1641 (גָּרַר); the throat (as used in rumination).

H1622.gloss: a Girgashite, one of the native tribes of Canaan
H1622.def: patrial from an unused name (of uncertain derivation); a Girgashite, one of the native tribes of Canaan.

H1624.def: a primitive root; properly, to grate, i.e. (figuratively) to anger.

H1625.def: from H1641 (גָּרַר); the cud (as scraping the throat).

H1626.gloss: a gerah or small weight (and coin)
H1626.def: from H1641 (גָּרַר) (as in H1625 (גֵּרָה)); properly, (like H1620 (גַּרְגַּר)) a kernel (round as if scraped), i.e.; a gerah or small weight (and coin).

H1627.def: or (shortened) גָּרֹן; from H1641 (גָּרַר); (compare H1621 (גַּרְגְּרוֹת)); the throat (as roughened by swallowing).

H1629.def: a primitive root; to cut off.

H1630.def: plural of an unused noun from H1629 (גָּרַז) (compare H1511 (גִּזְרִי)), cut up (i.e. rocky); Gerizim, a mountain of Palestine.

H1632.def: from the same as H1486 (גּוֹרָל); harsh.
H1632.kjv: man of great (as in the margin which reads H1419 (גָּדוֹל))

H1633.def: a primitive root; to be spare or skeleton-like; used only as a denominative from H1634 (גֶּרֶם); (causative) to bone, i.e. denude (by extensive, craunch) the bones.

H1634.gloss: a bone (as the skeleton of the body)
H1634.def: from H1633 (גָּרַם); a bone (as the skeleton of the body); hence, self, i.e. (figuratively) very.

H1637.def: from an unused root meaning to smooth; a threshing-floor (as made even); by analogy, any open area.

H1638.def: a primitive root; to crush; also (intransitively and figuratively) to dissolve.

H1639.def: a primitive root; to scrape off; by implication, to shave, remove, lessen, withhold.
H1639.kjv: abate, clip, (di-) minish, do (take) away, keep back, restrain, make small, withdraw

H1640.def: a primitive root; to bear off violently.

H1641.def: a primitive root; to drag off roughly; by implication, to bring up the cud (i.e. ruminate); by analogy, to saw.

H1642.def: probably from H1641 (גָּרַר); a rolling country; Gerar, a Philistine city.

H1643.def: from an unused root meaning to husk; a kernel (collectively), i.e. grain.

H1644.gloss: to drive out from a possession
H1644.def: a primitive root; to drive out from a possession; especially to expatriate or divorce.
H1644.kjv: cast up (out), divorced (woman), drive away (forth, out), expel, surely put away, trouble, thrust out

H1646.def: feminine passive participle of H1644 (גָּרַשׁ); (abstractly) dispossession.

H1647.gloss: Gereshom, the name of four Israelites
H1647.def: for H1648 (גֵּרְשׁוֹן); Gereshom, the name of four Israelites.

H1648.def: or גֵּרְשׁוֹם; from H1644 (גָּרַשׁ); a refugee; Gereshon or Gereshom, an Israelite.

H1649.gloss: a Gereshonite or descendant of Gereshon
H1649.def: patronymically from H1648 (גֵּרְשׁוֹן); a Gereshonite or descendant of Gereshon.

H1650.def: from an unused root (meaning to join); bridge; Geshur, a district of Syria.

H1651.gloss: a Geshurite (also collectively) or inhabitants of Geshur
H1651.def: patrial from H1650 (גְּשׁוּר); a Geshurite (also collectively) or inhabitants of Geshur.

H1652.def: a primitive root; to shower violently.

H1654.def: or (prolonged) גַּשְׁמוּ; the same as H1653 (גֶּשֶׁם); Geshem or Gashmu, an Arabian.

H1655.def: (Aramaic) apparently the same as H1653 (גֶּשֶׁם); used in a peculiar sense, the body (probably for the (figuratively) idea of a hard rain).

H1656.def: from H1652 (גָּשַׁם); equivalent to H1653 (גֶּשֶׁם); a shower.

H1657.gloss: Goshen, the residence of the Israelites in Egypt
H1657.def: probably of Egyptian origin; Goshen, the residence of the Israelites in Egypt; also a place in Palestine.

H1658.def: of uncertain derivation; Gishpa, an Israelite.

H1659.def: a primitive root; apparently; to feel about.

H1660.gloss: a wine-press (or vat for holding the grapes in pressing t
H1660.def: probably from H5059 (נָגַן) (in the sense of treading out grapes); a wine-press (or vat for holding the grapes in pressing them).

H1661.def: the same as H1660 (גַּת); Gath, a Philistine city.

H1662.def: or (abridged) גִּתָּה־חֵפֶר; from H1660 (גַּת) and H2658 (חָפַר) with the article inserted; wine-press of (the) well; Gath-Chepher, a place in Palestine.

H1663.gloss: a Gittite or inhabitant of Gath
H1663.def: patrial from H1661 (גַּת); a Gittite or inhabitant of Gath.

H1664.def: dual of H1660 (גַּת); double winepress; Gittajim, a place in Palestine.

H1665.def: feminine of H1663 (גִּתִּי); a Gittite harp.

H1666.gloss: Gether, a son of Aram, and the region settled by him
H1666.def: of uncertain derivation; Gether, a son of Aram, and the region settled by him.

H1667.def: from H1660 (גַּת) and H7416 (רִמּוֹן); wine-press of (the) pomegranate; Gath-Rimmon, a place in Palestine.

H1670.def: from H1669 (דָּאַב); properly, pining; by analogy, fear.

H1672.kjv: be afraid (careful, sorry), sorrow, take thought

H1673.def: or (fully) דּוֹאֵג; active participle of H1672 (דָּאַג); anxious; Doeg, an Edomite.

H1675.def: a primitive root; to dart, i.e. fly rapidly.

H1676.def: from H1675 (דָּאָה); the kite (from its rapid flight).

H1677.def: or (fully) דּוֹב; from H1680 (דָּבַב); the bear (as slow).

H1678.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H1677 (דֹּב); the bear (as slow).

H1679.def: from an unused root (compare H1680 (דָּבַב)) (probably meaning to be sluggish, i.e. restful); quiet.

H1680.def: a primitive root (compare H1679 (דֹּבֶא)); to move slowly, i.e. glide.

H1681.def: from H1680 (דָּבַב) (in the sense of furtive motion); slander.

H1682.def: or (shortened) דְּבֹרָה; from H1696 (דָבַר) (in the sense of orderly motion); the bee (from its systematic instincts).

H1683.gloss: Deborah, the name of two Hebrewesses
H1683.def: or (shortened) דְּבֹרָה; the same as H1682 (דְּבוֹרָה); Deborah, the name of two Hebrewesses.

H1684.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H2076 (זָבַח); to sacrifice (an animal).

H1686.gloss: probably some cheap vegetable, perhaps a bulbous root
H1686.def: in the margin for the textual reading, חֶרְיוֹן; both, (in the plural only and) of uncertain derivation,; probably some cheap vegetable, perhaps a bulbous root.

H1687.gloss: the shrine or innermost part of the sanctuary
H1687.def: or (shortened) דְּבִר; from H1696 (דָבַר) (apparently in the sense of oracle); the shrine or innermost part of the sanctuary.

H1688.def: or (shortened) דְּבִר; (Joshua 13:26 (but see H3810 (לֹא דְבַר))), the same as H1687 (דְּבִיר); Debir, the name of an Amoritish king and of two places in Palestine.

H1689.def: probably an orthographical error for H7247 (רִבְלָה); Diblah, a place in Syria.

H1690.def: from an unused root (akin to H2082 (זָבַל)) probably meaning to press together; a cake of pressed figs.

H1691.def: dual from the masculine of H1690 (דְּבֵלָה); two cakes; Diblajim, a symbolic name.

H1692.gloss: to impinge, i.e. cling or adhere
H1692.def: a primitive root; properly, to impinge, i.e. cling or adhere; figuratively, to catch by pursuit.
H1692.kjv: abide fast, cleave (fast together), follow close (hard after), be joined (together), keep (fast), overtake, pursue hard, stick, take

H1693.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H1692 (דָּבַק); to stick to.

H1694.def: from H1692 (דָּבַק); a joint; by implication, solder.

H1696.def: a primitive root; perhaps properly, to arrange; but used figuratively (of words), to speak; rarely (in a destructive sense) to subdue.
H1696.kjv: answer, appoint, bid, command, commune, declare, destroy, give, name, promise, pronounce, rehearse, say, speak, be spokesman, subdue, talk, teach, tell, think, use (entreaties), utter, well, work

H1697.def: from H1696; a word; by implication, a matter (as spoken of) or thing; adverbially, a cause.

H1698.def: from H1696 (דָבַר) (in the sense of destroying); a pestilence.

H1699.gloss: a pasture (from its arrangement of the flock)
H1699.def: from H1696 (דָבַר) (in its original sense); a pasture (from its arrangement of the flock).

H1700.def: feminine of H1697 (דָּבָר); a reason, suit or style.

H1701.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H1700 (דִּבְרָה); a reason, suit or style.

H1702.def: feminine active participle of H1696 (דָבַר) in the sense of driving (compare H1699 (דֹּבֶר)); a raft.

H1704.def: from H1697 (דָּבָר); wordy; Dibri, an Israelite.

H1705.def: from H1697 (דָּבָר) (perhaps in the sense of H1699 (דֹּבֶר)); Daberath, a place in Palestine.

H1706.def: from an unused root meaning to be gummy; honey (from its stickiness); by analogy, syrup.

H1707.gloss: a sticky mass, i.e. the hump of acamel
H1707.def: intensive from the same as H1706 (דְּבַשׁ); a sticky mass, i.e. the hump of acamel.

H1708.def: the same as H1707 (דַּבֶּשֶׁת); Dabbesheth, a place in Palestine.

H1709.def: or (fully) דָּאג; (Nehemiah 13:16), from H1711 (דָּגָה); a fish (as prolific); or perhaps rather from H1672 (דָּאַג) (as timid); but still better from H1672 (דָּאַג) (in the sense of squirming, i.e. moving by the vibratory action of the tail); a fish (often used collectively).

H1710.def: feminine of H1709 (דָּג), and meaning the same; a fish (often used collectively).

H1711.def: a primitive root; to move rapidly; used only as a denominative from H1709 (דָּג); to spawn, i.e. become numerous.

H1712.def: from H1709 (דָּג); the fish-god; Dagon, a Philistine deity.

H1713.gloss: to flaunt, i.e. raise a flag
H1713.def: a primitive root; to flaunt, i.e. raise a flag; figuratively, to be conspicuous.

H1715.def: from H1711 (דָּגָה); properly, increase, i.e. grain.

H1716.gloss: to brood over eggs or young
H1716.def: a primitive root,; to brood over eggs or young.

H1717.gloss: the breast (as the seat of love, or from its shape)
H1717.def: apparently from the same as H1730 (דּוֹד); the breast (as the seat of love, or from its shape).

H1718.def: a doubtful root; to walk gently.

H1719.gloss: Dedan, the name of two Cushites and of their territory
H1719.def: or (prolonged) דְּדָנֶה; (Ezekiel 25:13), of uncertain derivation; Dedan, the name of two Cushites and of their territory.

H1720.gloss: Dedanites, the descendants or inhabitants of Dedan
H1720.def: plural of H1719 (דְּדָן) (as patrial); Dedanites, the descendants or inhabitants of Dedan.

H1721.gloss: Dodanites, or descendants of a son of Javan
H1721.def: or (by orthographical error) רֹדָנִים (1 Chronicles 1:7); a plural of uncertain derivation; Dodanites, or descendants of a son of Javan.

H1723.gloss: Dahava, a people colonized in Samaria
H1723.def: (Aramaic) of uncertain derivation; Dahava, a people colonized in Samaria.

H1724.def: a primitive root (compare H1740 (דּוּחַ)); to be dumb, i.e. (figuratively) dumbfounded.

H1725.def: a primitive root; to curvet or move irregularly.

H1726.def: by reduplication from H1725 (דָּהַר); a gallop.

H1727.def: a primitive root; to mope, i.e. (figuratively) pine.

H1728.def: an orthographical variation of H1709 (דָּג) as a denominative (H1771 (דַּיָּג)); a fisherman.

H1729.def: feminine from the same as H1728 (דַּוָּג); properly, fishery, i.e. a hook forfishing.

H1730.def: or (shortened) דֹּד; from an unused root meaning properly, to boil, i.e.; (figuratively) to love; by implication, a love-token, lover, friend; specifically an uncle.

H1731.def: from the same as H1730 (דּוֹד); a pot (for boiling); also (by resemblance of shape) a basket.

H1732.def: from the same as H1730; loving; David, the youngest son of Jesse.

H1734.gloss: Dodo, the name of three Israelites
H1734.def: from H1730 (דּוֹד); loving; Dodo, the name of three Israelites.

H1735.def: from H1730 (דּוֹד) and H3050 (יָהּ); love of Jah; Dodavah, an Israelite.

H1736.def: from H1731 (דּוּד); a boiler or basket; also the mandrake (as an aphrodisiac).

H1737.def: formed like H1736 (דּוּדַי); amatory; Dodai, an Israelite.

H1738.gloss: to be sick (as if in menstruation)
H1738.def: a primitive root; to be sick (as if in menstruation).

H1739.kjv: faint, menstruous cloth, she that is sick, having sickness

H1740.def: a primitive root; to thrust away; figuratively, to cleanse.

H1743.def: a primitive root; to bruise in a mortar.

H1744.gloss: the hoopoe or else the grouse
H1744.def: of uncertain derivation; the hoopoe or else the grouse.

H1745.def: from an unused root meaning to be dumb (compare H1820 (דָּמָה)); silence; figuratively, death.

H1746.gloss: Dumah, a tribe and region of Arabia
H1746.def: the same as H1745 (דּוּמָה); Dumah, a tribe and region of Arabia.

H1747.def: from H1820 (דָּמָה); stillness; adverbially, silently; abstractly quiet, trust.

H1752.gloss: to gyrate (or move in a circle), i.e. to remain
H1752.def: a primitive root; properly, to gyrate (or move in a circle), i.e. to remain.

H1754.def: from H1752 (דּוּר); a circle, ball or pile.

H1755.gloss: a revolution of time, i.e. an age or generation
H1755.def: or (shortened) דֹּר; from H1752 (דּוּר); properly, a revolution of time, i.e. an age or generation; also a dwelling.

H1756.def: or (by permutation) דֹּאר; (Joshua 17:11; 1 Kings 4:11), from H1755 (דּוֹר); dwelling; Dor, a place in Palestine.

H1757.def: (Aramaic) probably from H1753 (דּוּר); circle or dwelling; Dura, a place in Babylonia.

H1758.def: or דּוֹשׁ; or דִּישׁ; a primitive root; to trample or thresh.
H1758.kjv: break, tear, thresh, tread out (down), at grass (Jeremiah 50:11, by mistake for H1877 (דֶּשֶׁא))

H1760.def: or דָּחַח; (Jeremiah 23:12), a primitive root; to push down.
H1760.kjv: chase, drive away (on), overthrow, outcast, sore, thrust, totter

H1761.gloss: probably a musical instrument (as being struck)
H1761.def: (Aramaic) from the equivalent of H1760 (דָּחָה); probably a musical instrument (as being struck).

H1762.gloss: a push, i.e. (by implication) a fall
H1762.def: from H1760 (דָּחָה); a push, i.e. (by implication) a fall.

H1763.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H2119 (זָחַל); to slink, i.e. (by implication) to fear, or (causatively) be formidable.

H1765.def: a primitive root; to urge, i.e. hasten.

H1766.def: a primitive root; to press, i.e. oppress.

H1767.def: of uncertain derivation; enough (as noun or adverb), used chiefly with preposition in phrases.
H1767.kjv: able, according to, after (ability), among, as (oft as), (more than) enough, from, in, since, (much as is) sufficient(-ly), too much, very, when

H1768.def: (Aramaic) apparently for H1668 (דָּא); that, used as relative conjunction, and especially (with a preposition) in adverbial phrases; also as preposition of.
H1768.kjv: as, but, for(-asmuch [phrase]), now, of, seeing, than, that, therefore, until, what (-soever), when, which, whom, whose

H1769.gloss: Dibon, the name of three places in Palestine
H1769.def: or (shortened) דִּיבֹן; from H1727 (דּוּב); pining; Dibon, the name of three places in Palestine.

H1772.def: intensive from H1675 (דָּאָה); a falcon (from its rapid flight).

H1774.gloss: Dizahab, a place in the Desert
H1774.def: as if from H1768 (דִּי) and H2091 (זָהָב); of gold; Dizahab, a place in the Desert.

H1775.def: perhaps for H1769 (דִּיבוֹן); Dimon, a place in Palestine.

H1776.def: feminine of H1775 (דִּימוֹן); Dimonah, a place in Palestine.

H1777.gloss: a straight course, i.e. sail direct
H1777.def: or (Genesis 6:3) דּוּן; a primitive root; a straight course, i.e. sail direct.

H1779.gloss: judgement (the suit, justice, sentence or tribunal)
H1779.def: or (Job 19:29) דּוּן; from H1777 (דִּין); judgement (the suit, justice, sentence or tribunal); by implication also strife.

H1780.gloss: judgement (the suit, justice, sentence or tribunal)
H1780.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H1779 (דִּין); judgement (the suit, justice, sentence or tribunal); by implication also strife.

H1781.def: from H1777 (דִּין); a judge or advocate.

H1782.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H1781 (דַּיָּן); a judge or advocate.

H1783.def: feminine of H1779 (דִּין); justice; Dinah, the daughter of Jacob.

H1784.gloss: a Dinaite or inhabitant of some unknown Assyria province
H1784.def: (Aramaic) partial from uncertain primitive; a Dinaite or inhabitant of some unknown Assyria province.

H1785.def: from a root corresp. to H1751 (דּוּק); a battering-tower.

H1787.gloss: Dishon, the name of two Edomites
H1787.def: (Diyshon, the same as H1788 (דִּישֹׁן); Dishon, the name of two Edomites.

H1788.def: from H1758 (דּוּשׁ); the leaper, i.e. an antelope.

H1789.def: another form of H1787 (דִּישׁוֹן); Dishan, an Edomite.

H1790.def: from an unused root (compare H1794 (דָּכָה)); crushed, i.e. (figuratively) injured.

H1791.def: (Aramaic) or דָּךְ; (Aramaic), prolonged from H1668 (דָּא); this.

H1792.def: a primitive root (compare H1794 (דָּכָה)); to crumble; transitively, to bruise (literally or figuratively).
H1792.kjv: beat to pieces, break (in pieces), bruise, contrite, crush, destroy, humble, oppress, smite

H1793.def: from H1792 (דָּכָא); crushed (literally powder, or figuratively, contrite).

H1794.def: a primitive root (compare H1790 (דַּךְ), H1792 (דָּכָא)); to collapse (phys. or mentally).

H1796.def: from H1794 (דָּכָה); a dashing of surf.

H1798.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H2145 (זָכָר); properly, a male, i.e. of sheep.

H1799.def: (Aramaic) or דׇּכְרָן (Aramaic); corresponding to H2146 (זִכְרוֹן); a register.

H1800.gloss: dangling, i.e. (by implication) weak or thin
H1800.def: from H1809 (דָּלַל); properly, dangling, i.e. (by implication) weak or thin.

H1802.gloss: to dangle, i.e. to let down abucket (for drawing out water)
H1802.def: a primitive root (compare H1809 (דָּלַל)); properly, to dangle, i.e. to let down abucket (for drawing out water); figuratively, to deliver.

H1803.gloss: something dangling, i.e. a loose thread or hair
H1803.def: from H1802 (דָּלָה); properly, something dangling, i.e. a loose thread or hair; figuratively, indigent.

H1804.def: a primitive root; to roil water.

H1805.gloss: a pail or jar (for drawing water)
H1805.def: or דֳּלִי; from H1802 (דָּלָה); a pail or jar (for drawing water).

H1806.gloss: Delajah, the name of five Israelites
H1806.def: or (prolonged) דְּלָיָהוּxlit Dᵉlâyâhhûw corrected to Dᵉlâyâhûw; from H1802 (דָּלָה) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has delivered; Delajah, the name of five Israelites.

H1807.def: from H1809 (דָּלַל); languishing; Delilah, a Philistine woman.

H1808.def: from H1802 (דָּלָה); something dangling, i.e. a bough.

H1809.def: a primitive root (compare H1802 (דָּלָה)); to slacken or be feeble; figuratively, to be oppressed.
H1809.kjv: bring low, dry up, be emptied, be not equal, fail, be impoverished, be made thin

H1810.def: of uncertain derivation; Dilan, a place in Palestine.

H1811.def: a primitive root; to drip; by implication, to weep.

H1813.def: from H1811 (דָּלַף); dripping; Dalphon, a son of Haman.

H1814.def: a primitive root; to flame (literally or figuratively).
H1814.kjv: burning, chase, inflame, kindle, persecute(-or), pursue hotly

H1815.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H1814 (דָּלַק); to flame (literally or figuratively).

H1817.gloss: something swinging, i.e. the valve of adoor
H1817.def: from H1802 (דָּלָה); something swinging, i.e. the valve of adoor.

H1818.gloss: blood (as that which when shed causes death) of man or an
H1818.def: from H1826 (דָּמַם) (compare H119 (אָדַם)); blood (as that which when shed causes death) of man or an animal; by analogy, the juice of the grape; figuratively (especially in the plural) bloodshed (i.e. drops of blood).

H1819.def: a primitive root; to compare; by implication, to resemble, liken, consider.
H1819.kjv: compare, devise, (be) like(-n), mean, think, use similitudes

H1820.def: a primitive root; to be dumb or silent; hence, to fail or perish; trans. to destroy.
H1820.kjv: cease, be cut down (off), destroy, be brought to silence, be undone, utterly

H1823.def: from H1819 (דָּמָה); resemblance; concretely, model, shape; adverbially, like.

H1826.def: a primitive root (compare H1724 (דָּהַם), H1820 (דָּמָה)); to be dumb; by implication, to be astonished, to stop; also to perish.
H1826.kjv: cease, be cut down (off), forbear, hold peace, quiet self, rest, be silent, keep (put to) silence, be (stand) still, tarry, wait

H1829.def: feminine from the same as H1828 (דֹּמֶן); a dung-heap; Dimnah, a place in Palestine.

H1831.def: from H1830 (דָּמַע); a tear; figuratively, juice.

H1833.def: by orthographical variation from H1834 (דַּמֶּשֶׂק); damask (as a fabric of Damascus).

H1834.def: or דּוּמֶשֶׂק; or דַּרְמֶשֶׂק; of foreign origin; Damascus, a city of Syria.

H1835.gloss: Dan, one of the sons of Jacob
H1835.def: from H1777 (דִּין); judge; Dan, one of the sons of Jacob; also the tribe descended from him, and its territory; likewise a place in Palestine colonized by them.

H1836.def: (Aramaic) an orthographical variation of H1791 (דֵּךְ); this.
H1836.kjv: (afore-) time, after this manner, here (-after), one...another, such, there(-fore), these, this (matter), thus, where(-fore), which

H1837.def: of uncertain derivation; Dannah, a place in Palestine.

H1838.def: of uncertain derivation; Dinhabah, an Edomitish town.

H1839.gloss: a Danite (often collectively) or descendants (or inhabita
H1839.def: patronymically from H1835 (דָּן); a Danite (often collectively) or descendants (or inhabitants) of Dan.

H1840.gloss: Daniel or Danijel, the name of two Israelites
H1840.def: in Ezekiel it is; דָּנִאֵל; from H1835 (דָּן) and H410 (אֵל); judge of God; Daniel or Danijel, the name of two Israelites.

H1841.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H1840 (דָנִיֵּאל); Danijel, the Hebrew prophet.

H1842.def: from H1835 (דָּן) and (apparently) H3282 (יַעַן); judge of purpose; Dan-Jaan, a place in Palestine.

H1845.def: from H3045 (יָדַע) and H410 (אֵל); known of God; Deuel, an Israelite.

H1846.def: a primitive root; to be extinguished; figuratively, to expire or be dried up.
H1846.kjv: be extinct, consumed, put out, quenched

H1848.def: from an unused root (meaning to push over); a stumbling-block.

H1849.def: a primitive root; to knock; by analogy, to press severely.

H1850.gloss: Dophkah, a place in the Desert
H1850.def: from H1849 (דָּפַק); a knock; Dophkah, a place in the Desert.

H1851.gloss: crushed, i.e. (by implication) small or thin
H1851.def: from H1854 (דָּקַק); crushed, i.e. (by implication) small or thin.
H1851.kjv: dwarf, lean(-fleshed), very little thing, small, thin

H1852.gloss: something crumbling, i.e. fine (as a thin cloth)
H1852.def: from H1854 (דָּקַק); something crumbling, i.e. fine (as a thin cloth).

H1853.def: of foreign origin; Diklah, a region of Arabia.

H1854.def: a primitive root (compare H1915 (הָדַךְ)lemma הָדךְ missing vowel, corrected to הָדַךְ); to crush (or intransitively) crumble.
H1854.kjv: beat in pieces (small), bruise, make dust, (into) powder, (be, very) small, stamp (small)

H1855.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H1854 (דָּקַק); to crumble or (trans.) crush.

H1856.def: a primitive root; to stab; by analogy, to starve; figuratively, to revile.

H1857.def: from H1856 (דָּקַר); a stab; Deker, an Israelite.

H1858.gloss: a pearl (from its sheen as rapidly turned)
H1858.def: apparently from the same as H1865 (דְּרוֹר); properly, a pearl (from its sheen as rapidly turned); by analogy, pearl-stone, i.e. mother-of-pearl or alabaster.

H1860.def: or דֵּרָאוֹן; from an unused root (meaning to repulse); an object of aversion.

H1861.def: (also dor-bawn'); of uncertain derivation; a goad.

H1862.def: apparently from H1858 (דַּר) and H1843 (דֵּעַ); pearl of knowledge; Darda, an Israelite.

H1864.def: of uncertain derivation; the south; poet. the south wind.

H1865.def: from an unused root (meaning to move rapidly); freedom; hence, spontaneity of outflow, and so clear.

H1866.gloss: the swift, a kind of swallow
H1866.def: the same as H1865 (דְּרוֹר), applied to a bird; the swift, a kind of swallow.

H1867.def: of Persian origin; Darejavesh, a title (rather than name) of several Persian kings.

H1868.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H1867 (דָּֽרְיָוֵשׁ); Darejavesh, a title (rather than name) of several Persian kings.

H1869.def: a primitive root; to tread; by implication, to walk; also to string abow (by treading on it in bending).
H1869.kjv: archer, bend, come, draw, go (over), guide, lead (forth), thresh, tread (down), walk

H1870.def: from H1869 (דָּרַךְ); a road (as trodden); figuratively, a course of life or mode of action, often adverb.
H1870.kjv: along, away, because of, by, conversation, custom, (east-) ward, journey, manner, passenger, through, toward, (high-) (path-) way(-side), whither(-soever)

H1871.def: of Persian origin; a 'drachma', or coin.

H1873.def: probably a contraction from H1862 (דַּרְדַּע); Dara, an Israelite.

H1874.def: of uncertain derivation; Darkon, one of 'Solomon's servants'.

H1875.def: a primitive root; properly, to tread or frequent; usually to follow (for pursuit or search); by implication, to seek or ask; specifically to worship.
H1875.kjv: ask, at all, care for, diligently, inquire, make inquisition, (necro-) mancer, question, require, search, seek (for, out), surely

H1877.def: from H1876 (דָּשָׁא); a sprout; by analogy, grass.

H1878.def: a primitive root; also denominatively (from H1880 (דֶּשֶׁן)); to be fat; transitively, to fatten (or regard as fat); specifically to anoint; figuratively, to satisfy;  to remove (fat) ashes (of sacrifices).
H1878.kjv: accept, anoint, take away the (receive) ashes (from), make (wax) fat

H1879.def: from H1878 (דָּשֵׁן); fat; figuratively, rich, fertile.

H1880.def: from H1878 (דָּשֵׁן); the fat; abstractly fatness, i.e. (figuratively) abundance; specifically the (fatty) ashes of sacrifices.

H1881.def: of uncertain (perhaps foreign) derivation; a royal edict or statute.

H1882.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H1881 (דָּת); a royal edict or statute.

H1883.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H1877 (דֶּשֶׁא); a sprout; by analogy, grass.

H1884.def: (Aramaic) of Persian origin; meaning one skilled in law; a judge.

H1885.def: of uncertain derivation; Dathan, an Israelite.

H1886.def: or (Aramaic dual) דֹּתַיִן; (Genesis 37:17), of uncertain derivation; Dothan, a place in Palestine.

H1888.def: (Aramaic) or הָא; (Aramaic), corresponding to H1887 (הֵא); lo!.

H1890.def: by reduplication from H3051 (יָהַב); gift (in sacrifice), i.e. holocaust.

H1891.gloss: to be vain in act, word, or expectation
H1891.def: a primitive root; to be vain in act, word, or expectation; specifically to lead astray.

H1892.def: or (rarely in the abs.) הֲבֵל; from H1891 (הָבַל); emptiness or vanity; figuratively, something transitory and unsatisfactory; often used as an adverb.

H1893.def: the same as H1892 (הֶבֶל); Hebel, the son of Adam.

H1894.def: only in plural, from an unused root meaning to be hard; ebony.

H1895.def: a primitive root of uncertain (perhaps foreign) derivation; to be a horoscopist.

H1896.gloss: Hege or Hegai, a eunuch of Xerxes
H1896.def: or (by permutation) הֵגַי; probably of Persian origin; Hege or Hegai, a eunuch of Xerxes.

H1897.def: a primitive root (compare H1901 (הָגִיג)); to murmur (in pleasure or anger); by implication, to ponder.
H1897.kjv: imagine, meditate, mourn, mutter, roar, sore, speak, study, talk, utter

H1899.gloss: a muttering (in sighing, thought, or as thunder)
H1899.def: from H1897 (הָגָה); a muttering (in sighing, thought, or as thunder).

H1901.def: from an unused root akin to H1897 (הָגָה); properly, a murmur, i.e. complaint.

H1902.def: intensive from H1897 (הָגָה); a murmuring sound, i.e. a musical notation (probably similar to the modern affettuoso to indicate solemnity of movement); by implication, a machination.

H1903.def: of uncertain derivation; perhaps suitable or turning.

H1904.def: of uncertain (perhaps foreign) derivation; Hagar, the mother of Ishmael.

H1905.gloss: a Hagrite or member of a certain Arabian clan
H1905.def: or (prolonged) הַגְרִיאxlit Hagrîʼ corrected to Hagrîyʼ; perhaps patronymically from H1904 (הָגָר); a Hagrite or member of a certain Arabian clan.

H1907.def: (Aramaic) probably of foreign origin; a vizier.

H1908.gloss: Hadad, the name of an idol, and of several kings of Edom
H1908.def: probably of foreign origin (compare H111 (אֲדַד)); Hadad, the name of an idol, and of several kings of Edom.

H1909.def: from H1908 (הֲדַד) and H5828 (עֵזֶר); Hadad (is his) help; Hadadezer, a Syrian king.

H1910.def: from H1908 (הֲדַד) and H7417 (רִמּוֹן); Hadad-Rimmon, a place in Palestine.

H1911.def: a primitive root (compare H3034 (יָדָה)); to stretch forth the hand.

H1913.gloss: Hadoram, a son of Joktan, and the tribe descended from him
H1913.def: or הֲדֹרָם; probably of foreign derivation; Hadoram, a son of Joktan, and the tribe descended from him.

H1914.def: of uncertain derivation; Hiddai, an Israelite.

H1915.def: a primitive root (compare H1854 (דָּקַק)); to crush with the foot.

H1916.def: from an unused root meaning to stamp upon; a foot stool.

H1917.gloss: something stamped to pieces, i.e. a bit
H1917.def: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to that of H1916 (הֲדֹם); something stamped to pieces, i.e. a bit.

H1920.def: a primitive root; to push away or down.

H1921.gloss: to swell up (literally or figuratively, active or passive)
H1921.def: a primitive root; to swell up (literally or figuratively, active or passive); by implication, to favor or honour, be high or proud.
H1921.kjv: countenance, crooked place, glorious, honour, put forth

H1923.def: (Aramaic) from H1922 (הֲדַר)lemma הֲדַּר extra dagesh, corrected to הֲדַר; magnificence.

H1924.def: the same as H1926 (הָדָר); Hadar, an Edomite.

H1925.def: from H1921 (הָדַר); honour; used (figuratively) for the capital city (Jerusalem).

H1926.def: from H1921 (הָדַר); magnificence, i.e. ornament or splendor.
H1926.kjv: beauty, comeliness, excellency, glorious, glory, goodly, honour, majesty

H1928.def: from H1924 (הֲדַר) and H5828 (עֵזֶר); Hadar (i.e. Hadad, H1908 (הֲדַד)) is his help; (i.e. Hadadezer, H1909 (הֲדַדְעֶזֶר)); Hadarezer,  a Syrian king.

H1929.def: a shortened form of H162 (אֲהָהּ); ah! expressing grief.

H1931.def: of which the feminine (beyond the Pentateuch) is הִיא; a primitive word, the third person pronoun singular; he (she or it); only expressed when emphatic or without a verb; also (intensively) self, or (especially with the article) the same; sometimes (as demonstrative) this or that; occasionally (instead of copula) as or are.
H1931.kjv: he, as for her, him(-self), it, the same, she (herself), such, that (...it), these, they, this, those, which (is), who

H1932.def: (Aramaic) or (feminine) הִיא; (Aramaic), corresponding to H1931 (הוּא); he (she or it); self, or (especially with the article) the same; sometimes (as demonstrative) this or that; occasionally (instead of copula) as or are.

H1933.gloss: to be (in the sense of existence)
H1933.def: or הָוָה; a primitive root (compare H183 (אָוָה), H1961 (הָיָה)) supposed to mean properly, to breathe; to be (in the sense of existence).

H1934.def: (Aramaic) or הָוָה; (Aramaic), corresponding to H1933 (הָוָא); to exist; used in a great variety of applications (especially in connection with other words).
H1934.kjv: be, become, behold, came (to pass), cease, cleave, consider, do, give, have, judge, keep, labour, mingle (self), put, see, seek, set, slay, take heed, tremble, walk, would

H1935.gloss: grandeur (i.e. an imposing form and appearance)
H1935.def: from an unused root; grandeur (i.e. an imposing form and appearance).
H1935.kjv: beauty, comeliness, excellency, glorious, glory, goodly, honour, majesty

H1936.def: the same as H1935 (הוֹד); Hod, an Israelite.

H1937.def: a form of H1938 (הוֹדַוְיָה); Hodevah (or Hodevjah), an Israelite.

H1938.gloss: Hodavjah, the name of three Israelites
H1938.def: from H1935 (הוֹד) and H3050 (יָהּ); majesty of Jah; Hodavjah, the name of three Israelites.

H1939.def: a form of H1938 (הוֹדַוְיָה); Hodajvah, an Israelite.

H1940.def: a form for the feminine of H3064 (יְהוּדִי); a Jewess.

H1941.gloss: Hodijah, the name of three Israelites
H1941.def: a form of H1938 (הוֹדַוְיָה); Hodijah, the name of three Israelites.

H1942.def: from H1933 (הָוָא) (in the sense of eagerly coveting and rushing upon; by implication, of falling); desire; also ruin.
H1942.kjv: calamity, iniquity, mischief, mischievous (thing), naughtiness, naughty, noisome, perverse thing, substance, very wickedness

H1944.def: of uncertain derivation; Hoham, a Canaanitish king.

H1945.def: a prolonged form of H1930 (הוֹ) (akin to H188 (אוֹי)); oh!.

H1946.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H1981 (הֲלַךְ); to go; causatively, to bring.

H1947.def: feminine active participle of H1984 (הָלַל); folly.

H1948.def: from active participle of H1984 (הָלַל); folly.

H1949.gloss: to make an uproar, or agitate greatly
H1949.def: a primitive root (compare H2000 (הָמַם)); to make an uproar, or agitate greatly.
H1949.kjv: destroy, move, make a noise, put, ring again

H1950.def: from H2000 (הָמַם); raging; Homam, an Edomitish chieftain.

H1951.def: a primitive root; properly, to be naught, i.e. (figuratively) to be (causatively, act) light.

H1952.def: from the same as H1951 (הוּן) in the sense of H202 (אוֹן); wealth; by implication, enough.
H1952.kjv: enough, for nought, riches, substance, wealth

H1953.def: from H3068 (יְהֹוָה) and H8085 (שָׁמַע); Jehovah has heard; Hoshama, an Israelite.

H1954.gloss: Hoshea, the name of five Israelites
H1954.def: from H3467 (יָשַׁע); deliverer; Hoshea, the name of five Israelites.

H1955.gloss: Hoshajah, the name of two Israelites
H1955.def: from H3467 (יָשַׁע) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has saved; Hoshajah, the name of two Israelites.

H1956.def: from H3498 (יָתַר); he has caused to remain; Hothir, an Israelite.

H1957.def: a primitive root (compare H2372 (חָזָה)); to dream.

H1959.def: from an unused root (meaning to shout); acclamation.

H1960.gloss: an acclaim, i.e. a choir of singers
H1960.def: from the same as H1959 (הֵידָד); properly, an acclaim, i.e. a choir of singers.

H1961.def: a primitive root (compare H1933 (הָוָא)); to exist, i.e. be or become, come to pass (always emphatic, and not a mere copula or auxiliary).
H1961.kjv: beacon, altogether, be(-come), accomplished, committed, like), break, cause, come (to pass), do, faint, fall, follow, happen, have, last, pertain, quit (one-) self, require, use

H1964.gloss: a large public building, such as a palace or temple
H1964.def: probably from H3201 (יָכֹל) (in the sense of capacity); a large public building, such as a palace or temple.

H1965.gloss: a large public building, such as a palace or temple
H1965.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H1964 (הֵיכָל); a large public building, such as a palace or temple.

H1966.def: from H1984 (הָלַל) (in the sense of brightness); the morning-star.

H1967.def: another form for H1950 (הוֹמָם); Hemam, an Idumaean.

H1968.gloss: Heman, the name of at least two Israelites
H1968.def: probably from H539 (אָמַן); faithful; Heman, the name of at least two Israelites.

H1969.def: probably of Egyptian origin; a hin or liquid measure.

H1970.def: a primitive root; apparently; to injure.

H1972.def: probably denominatively from H1973 (הָלְאָה)xlit hâlᵉâh corrected to hâlᵉʼâh; to remove or be remote.

H1973.gloss: to the distance, i.e. far away
H1973.def: from the primitive form of the article (hal); to the distance, i.e. far away; also (of time) thus far.
H1973.kjv: back, beyond, (hence,-) forward, hitherto, thence, forth, yonder

H1974.gloss: a celebration of thanksgiving for harvest
H1974.def: from H1984 (הָלַל) (in the sense of rejoicing); a celebration of thanksgiving for harvest.

H1976.def: from the article (see H1973 (הָלְאָה)xlit hâlᵉâh corrected to hâlᵉʼâh) and H2088 (זֶה); this very.

H1978.gloss: a walk, i.e. (by implication) a step
H1978.def: from H1980 (הָלַךְ); a walk, i.e. (by implication) a step.

H1979.def: feminine of H1978 (הָלִיךְ); a walking; by implication, a procession or march, a caravan.

H1980.gloss: to walk (in a great variety of applications
H1980.def: akin to H3212 (יָלַךְ); a primitive root; to walk (in a great variety of applications, literally and figuratively).
H1980.kjv: (all) along, apace, behave (self), come, (on) continually, be conversant, depart, be eased, enter, exercise (self), follow, forth, forward, get, go (about, abroad, along, away, forward, on, out, up and down), greater, grow, be wont to haunt, lead, march, more and more, move (self), needs, on, pass (away), be at the point, quite, run (along), send, speedily, spread, still, surely, tale-bearer, travel(-ler), walk (abroad, on, to and fro, up and down, to places), wander, wax, (way-) faring man, be weak, whirl

H1981.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H1980 (הָלַךְ) (compare H1946 (הוּךְ)); to walk.

H1982.gloss: a journey, i.e. (by implication) a wayfarer
H1982.def: from H1980 (הָלַךְ); properly, a journey, i.e. (by implication) a wayfarer; also a flowing.

H1983.gloss: a journey, i.e. (by implication) toll on goods at aroad
H1983.def: (Aramaic) from H1981 (הֲלַךְ); properly, a journey, i.e. (by implication) toll on goods at aroad.

H1984.gloss: to be clear (orig. of sound, but usually of color)
H1984.def: a primitive root; to be clear (orig. of sound, but usually of color); to shine; hence, to make ashow, to boast; and thus to be (clamorously) foolish; to rave; causatively, to celebrate; also to stultify.
H1984.kjv: (make) boast (self), celebrate, commend, (deal, make), fool(-ish, -ly), glory, give (light), be (make, feign self) mad (against), give in marriage, (sing, be worthy of) praise, rage, renowned, shine

H1985.def: from H1984 (הָלַל); praising (namely God); Hillel, an Israelite.

H1986.def: a primitive root; to strike down; by implication, to hammer, stamp, conquer, disband.
H1986.kjv: beat (down), break (down), overcome, smite (with the hammer)

H1987.gloss: Helem, the name of two Israelites
H1987.def: from H1986 (הָלַם); smiter; Helem, the name of two Israelites.

H1988.def: from the article (see H1973 (הָלְאָה)xlit hâlᵉâh corrected to hâlᵉʼâh); hither.

H1990.def: of uncertain derivation; Ham, a region of Palestine.

H1992.def: or (prolonged) הֵמָּה; masculine plural from H1981 (הֲלַךְ); they (only used when emphatic).
H1992.kjv: it, like, (how, so) many (soever, more as) they (be), (the) same, so, such, their, them, these, they, those, which, who, whom, withal, ye

H1993.gloss: to make a loud sound (like English 'hum')
H1993.def: a primitive root (compare H1949 (הוּם)); to make a loud sound (like English 'hum'); by implication, to be in great commotion or tumult, to rage, war, moan, clamor.
H1993.kjv: clamorous, concourse, cry aloud, be disquieted, loud, mourn, be moved, make a noise, rage, roar, sound, be troubled, make in tumult, tumultuous, be in an uproar

H1994.def: (Aramaic) or (prolonged) הִמּוֹן; (Aramaic), corresponding to H1992 (הֵם); they.

H1995.def: or הָמֹן; (Ezekiel 5:7), from H1993 (הָמָה); a noise, tumult, crowd; also disquietude, wealth.
H1995.kjv: abundance, company, many, multitude, multiply, noise, riches, rumbling, sounding, store, tumult

H1996.def: from H1995 (הָמוֹן) and H1463 (גּוֹג); the multitude of Gog; the fanciful name of an emblematic place in Palestine.

H1997.def: feminine of H1995 (הָמוֹן); multitude; , the same as H1996 (הֲמוֹן גּוֹג); Hamonah.

H1999.def: or (too fully) הֲמוּלָּה; (Jeremiah 11:16), feminine passive participle of an unused root meaning to rush (as rain with a windy roar); a sound.

H2000.def: a primitive root (compare H1949 (הוּם), H1993 (הָמָה)); properly, to put in commotion; by implication, to disturb, drive, destroy.
H2000.kjv: break, consume, crush, destroy, discomfit, trouble, vex

H2001.def: of foreign derivation; Haman, a Persian vizier.

H2002.def: (Aramaic) but the text is הֲמוּנֵךְ; of foreign origin; a necklace.

H2003.def: from an unused root apparently meaning to crackle; a dry twig or brushwood.

H2004.def: feminine plural from H1931 (הוּא); they (only used when emphatic).
H2004.kjv: in, such like, (with) them, thereby, therein, (more than) they, wherein, in which, whom, withal

H2005.def: a primitive particle; lo!; also (as expressing surprise) if.

H2006.gloss: lo! also there(-fore), (un-) less, whether, but, if
H2006.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H2005 (הֵן); lo! also there(-fore), (un-) less, whether, but, if.

H2007.gloss: themselves (often used emphatic for the copula
H2007.def: prolongation for H2004 (הֵן); themselves (often used emphatic for the copula, also in indirect relation).
H2007.kjv: in, such (and such things), their, (into) them, thence, therein, these, they (had), on this side, whose, wherein

H2008.gloss: hither or thither (but used both of place and time)
H2008.def: from H2004 (הֵן); hither or thither (but used both of place and time).
H2008.kjv: here, hither(-to), now, on this (that) side, since, this (that) way, thitherward, thus far, to...fro, yet

H2010.def: from H5117 (נוּחַ); permission of rest, i.e. quiet.

H2011.def: probably of foreign origin; Hinnom, apparently a Jebusite.

H2012.gloss: Hena, a place apparently in Mesopotamia
H2012.def: probably of foreign derivation; Hena, a place apparently in Mesopotamia.

H2013.kjv: hold peace (tongue), (keep) silence, be silent, still

H2015.def: a primitive root; to turn about or over; by implication, to change, overturn, return, pervert.
H2015.kjv: become, change, come, be converted, give, make (a bed), overthrow (-turn), perverse, retire, tumble, turn (again, aside, back, to the contrary, every way)

H2016.def: ; or הֵפֶךְ; from H2015 (הָפַךְ); a turn, i.e. the reverse.

H2017.def: from H2015 (הָפַךְ); an upset, i.e. (abstract) perversity.

H2019.def: by reduplication from H2015 (הָפַךְ); very perverse.

H2021.def: from an unused root meaning apparently to be sharp or strong; a weapon of war.

H2022.gloss: a mountain or range of hills (sometimes used figuratively)
H2022.def: a shortened form of H2042 (הָרָר); a mountain or range of hills (sometimes used figuratively).

H2023.gloss: Hor, the name of a peak in Idumaea and of one in Syria
H2023.def: another form of H2022 (הַר); mountain; Hor, the name of a peak in Idumaea and of one in Syria.

H2024.def: perhaps from H2022 (הַר); mountainousness; Hara, a region of Media.

H2025.def: from H2022 (הַר) and H410 (אֵל); mount of God; figuratively, the altar of burnt-offering.

H2026.def: a primitive root; to smite with deadly intent.
H2026.kjv: destroy, out of hand, kill, murder(-er), put to (death), make (slaughter), slay(-er), surely

H2029.def: a primitive root; to be (or become) pregnant, conceive (literally or figuratively).
H2029.kjv: been, be with child, conceive, progenitor

H2031.def: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to H2029 (הָרָה); a mental conception.

H2033.def: another form for H2043 (הֲרָרִי); a Harorite or mountaineer.

H2036.def: from an unused root (meaning to tower up); high; Horam, a Canaanitish king.

H2037.def: passive participle of the same as H2036 (הֹרָם); high; Harum, an Israelite.

H2038.def: from the same as H2036 (הֹרָם); a castle (from its height).

H2039.gloss: Haran, the name of two men
H2039.def: perhaps from H2022 (הַר); mountaineer; Haran, the name of two men.

H2040.gloss: to pull down or in pieces, break, destroy
H2040.def: a primitive root; to pull down or in pieces, break, destroy.
H2040.kjv: beat down, break (down, through), destroy, overthrow, pluck down, pull down, ruin, throw down, utterly

H2042.def: from an unused root meaning to loom up; a mountain.

H2043.def: or הָרָרִי; (2 Samuel 23:11), or הָארָרִי; (2 Samuel 23:34, last clause [), apparently from H2042 (הָרָר); a mountaineer; Hararite.

H2044.def: perhaps from the same as H2828 (חָשֻׁם); wealthy; Hashem, an Israelite.

H2047.def: probably of foreign origin; Hathak, a Persian eunuch.

H2048.def: a primitive root; to deride; by implication, to cheat.

H2049.def: from H2048 (הָתַל) (only in plural collectively); a derision.

H2050.gloss: to break in upon, i.e. to assail
H2050.def: a primitive root; properly, to break in upon, i.e. to assail.

H2051.gloss: Vedan (or Aden), a place in Arabia
H2051.def: perhaps for H5730 (עֵדֶן); Vedan (or Aden), a place in Arabia.

H2052.def: of uncertain derivation; Vaheb, a place in Moab.

H2053.gloss: a hook (the name of the sixth Hebrew letter)
H2053.def: probably; a hook (the name of the sixth Hebrew letter).

H2054.def: presumed to be from an unused root meaning to bear guilt; crime.

H2055.def: of foreign origin; Vajezatha, a son of Haman.

H2057.def: perhaps for H6043 (עֲנָיָה); Vanjah, an Israelite.

H2058.def: probably from H3254 (יָסַף); additional; Vophsi, an Israelite.

H2059.def: probably from H3461 (יִשְׁמְרַי); weak; Vashni, an Israelite.

H2060.def: of Persian origin; Vashti, the queen of Xerxes.

H2061.def: from an unused root meaning to be yellow; a wolf.

H2062.def: the same as H2061 (זְאֵב); Zeeb, a Midianitish prince.

H2063.def: irregular feminine of H2089 (זֶה); this (often used adverb).
H2063.kjv: hereby (-in, -with), it, likewise, the one (other, same), she, so (much), such (deed), that, therefore, these, this (thing), thus

H2066.gloss: Zabad, the name of seven Israelites
H2066.def: from H2064 (זָבַד); giver; Zabad, the name of seven Israelites.

H2067.gloss: Zabdi, the name of four Israelites
H2067.def: from H2065 (זֶבֶד); giving; Zabdi, the name of four Israelites.

H2068.def: from H2065 (זֶבֶד) and H410 (אֵל); gift of God; zabdiel, the name of two Israelites.

H2069.gloss: Zebadjah, the name of nine Israelites
H2069.def: or זְבַדְיָהוּ; from H2064 (זָבַד) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has given; Zebadjah, the name of nine Israelites.

H2070.gloss: a fly (especially one of a stinging nature)
H2070.def: from an unused root (meaning to flit); a fly (especially one of a stinging nature).

H2071.def: from H2064 (זָבַד); given, Zabud, an Israelite.

H2072.def: a form of H2071 (זָבוּד); given; Zabbud, an Israelite.

H2073.def: or זְבֻל; from H2082 (זָבַל); a residence.

H2074.def: or זְבֻלוּן; or זְבוּלֻן; from H2082 (זָבַל); habitation; Zebulon, a son of Jacob; also his territory and tribe.

H2075.gloss: a Zebulonite or descendant of Zebulun
H2075.def: patronymically from H2074 (זְבוּלוּן); a Zebulonite or descendant of Zebulun.

H2076.gloss: to slaughter an animal (usually in sacrifice)
H2076.def: a primitive root; to slaughter an animal (usually in sacrifice).

H2077.gloss: a slaughter, i.e. the flesh of an animal
H2077.def: from H2076 (זָבַח); properly, a slaughter, i.e. the flesh of an animal; by implication, a sacrifice (the victim or the act).

H2078.def: the same as H2077 (זֶבַח); sacrifice; Zebach, a Midianitish prince.

H2079.def: probably by orthographical error for H2140 (זַכַּי); Zabbai (or Zaccai), an Israelite.

H2080.def: feminine from H2064 (זָבַד); giving; Zebidah, an Israelitess.

H2081.def: from an unused root (meaning to purchase); gainfulness; Zebina, an Israelite.

H2082.def: a primitive root; apparently properly, to inclose, i.e.; to reside.

H2083.def: the same as H2073 (זְבוּל); dwelling; Zebul, an Israelite.

H2084.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to the root of H2081 (זְבִינָא); to acquire by purchase.

H2085.def: from an unused root probably meaning to inclose; the skin of a grape.

H2088.gloss: the masculine demonstrative pronoun, this or that
H2088.def: a primitive word; the masculine demonstrative pronoun, this or that.
H2088.kjv: he, hence, here, it(-self), now, of him, the one...the other, than the other, (out of) the (self) same, such (a one) that, these, this (hath, man), on this side...on that side, thus, very, which. Compare H2063 (זֹאת), H2090 (זֹה), H2097 (זוֹ), H2098 (זוּ)

H2089.def: (1 Samuel by permutation for H7716 (שֶׂה); a sheep.

H2090.kjv: as well as another, it, this, that, thus and thus

H2091.def: from an unused root meaning to shimmer; gold, figuratively, something gold-colored (i.e. yellow), as oil, a clear sky.

H2092.gloss: to be rancid, i.e. (transitively) to loathe
H2092.def: a primitive root; to be rancid, i.e. (transitively) to loathe.

H2093.def: from H2092 (זָהַם); loathing; Zaham, an Israelite.

H2094.def: a primitive root; to gleam; figuratively, to enlighten (by caution).

H2099.def: probably from an unused root meaning to be prominent; properly, brightness (compare H2122 (זִיו)), i.e. (figuratively) the month of flowers; Ziv (corresponding to Ijar or May).

H2100.def: a primitive root; to flow freely (as water), i.e. (specifically) to have a (sexual) flux; figuratively, to waste away; also to overflow.
H2100.kjv: flow, gush out, have a (running) issue, pine away, run

H2101.def: from H2100 (זוּב); a seminal or menstrual flux.

H2102.def: or (by permutation) זִיד; a primitive root; to seethe; figuratively, to be insolent.
H2102.kjv: be proud, deal proudly, presume, (come) presumptuously, sod

H2103.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H2102 (זוּד); to be proud.

H2104.gloss: Zuzites, an aboriginal tribe of Palestine
H2104.def: plural probably from the same as H2123 (זִיז); prominent; Zuzites, an aboriginal tribe of Palestine.

H2105.def: of uncertain origin; Zocheth, an Israelite.

H2106.def: apparently from the same root as H2099 (זִו) (in the sense of prominence); an angle (as projecting), i.e. (by implication) a corner-column (or anta).

H2107.def: a primitive root (compare H2151 (זָלַל)); probably to shake out, i.e. (by implication) to scatter profusely; figuratively, to treat lightly.

H2108.def: from H2107 (זוּל); probably scattering, i.e. removal; used adverbially, except.

H2109.def: a primitive root; perhaps properly, to be plump, i.e. (transitively) to nourish.

H2110.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H2109 (זוּן); perhaps properly, to be plump, i.e. (transitively) to nourish.

H2111.gloss: to shake off, i.e. (figuratively) to agitate (as with fear)
H2111.def: a primitive root; properly, to shake off, i.e. (figuratively) to agitate (as with fear).

H2112.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H2111 (זוּעַ); to shake (with fear).

H2113.kjv: be removed, trouble, vexation. Compare H2189 (זַעֲוָה)

H2114.def: a primitive root; to turn aside (especially for lodging); hence to be aforeigner, strange, profane; specifically (active participle) to commit adultery.
H2114.kjv: (come from) another (man, place), fanner, go away, (e-) strange(-r, thing, woman)

H2115.def: a primitive root (compare H6695 (צוֹק)); to press together, tighten.

H2117.def: probably from the root of H2123 (זִיז); prominent; Zaza, an Israelite.

H2118.def: a primitive root; to shove or displace.

H2119.def: a primitive root; to crawl; by implication, to fear.

H2120.gloss: Zocheleth, a boundary stone in. Palestine
H2120.def: feminine active participle of H2119 (זָחַל); crawling (i.e. serpent); Zocheleth, a boundary stone in. Palestine.

H2121.def: from H2102 (זוּד); boiling of water, i.e. wave.

H2123.def: from an unused root apparently meaning to be conspicuous; fulness of the breast; also a moving creature.

H2124.gloss: Ziza, the name of two Israelites
H2124.def: apparently from the same as H2123 (זִיז); prominence; Ziza, the name of two Israelites.

H2125.def: another form for H2124 (זִיזָא); Zizah, an Israelite.

H2126.def: from H2109 (זוּן); well-fed; or perhaps an orthographical error for H2124 (זִיזָא); Zina, an Israelite.

H2127.def: from H2111 (זוּעַ); agitation; Zia, an Israelite.

H2128.gloss: Ziph, the name of a place in Palestine
H2128.def: from the same as H2203 (זֶפֶת); flowing; Ziph, the name of a place in Palestine; also of an Israelite.

H2129.def: feminine of H2128 (זִיף); a flowing; Ziphah, an Israelite.

H2130.gloss: a Ziphite or inhabitant of Ziph
H2130.def: patrial from H2128 (זִיף); a Ziphite or inhabitant of Ziph.

H2131.gloss: what leaps forth, i.e. flash of fire, or a burning arrow
H2131.def: (Isaiah 50: (feminine); and זִק; or זֵק; from H2187 (זָנַק); properly, what leaps forth, i.e. flash of fire, or a burning arrow; also (from the original sense of the root) a bond.

H2132.def: probably from an unused root (akin to H2099 (זִו)); an olive (as yielding illuminating oil), the tree, the branch or the berry.

H2133.def: from H2132 (זַיִת); olive grove; Zethan, an Israelite.

H2135.def: a primitive root (compare H2141 (זָכַךְ)); to be translucent; figuratively, to be innocent.
H2135.kjv: be (make) clean, cleanse, be clear, count pure

H2136.def: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to H2135 (זָכָה); purity.

H2137.def: from H2135 (זָכָה); properly, transparency, i.e. glass.

H2138.def: properly, passive participle of H2142 (זָכַר), but used for H2145 (זָכָר); a male (of man or animals).

H2139.gloss: Zakkur, the name of seven Israelites
H2139.def: from H2142 (זָכַר); mindful; Zakkur, the name of seven Israelites.

H2140.def: from H2141 (זָכַךְ); pure; Zakkai, an Israelite.

H2141.gloss: to be transparent or clean (phys. or morally)
H2141.def: a primitive root (compare H2135 (זָכָה)); to be transparent or clean (phys. or morally).

H2142.gloss: to mark (so as to be recognized), i.e. to remember
H2142.def: a primitive root; also as denominative from H2145 (זָכָר); properly, to mark (so as to be recognized), i.e. to remember; by implication, to mention;  to be male.
H2142.kjv: burn (incense), earnestly, be male, (make) mention (of), be mindful, recount, record(-er), remember, make to be remembered, bring (call, come, keep, put) to (in) remembrance, still, think on, well

H2143.gloss: a memento, abstractly recollection (rarely if ever)
H2143.def: or זֶכֶר; from H2142 (זָכַר); a memento, abstractly recollection (rarely if ever); by implication, commemoration.

H2144.def: the same as H2143 (זֵכֶר); Zeker, an Israelite.

H2145.def: from H2142 (זָכַר); properly, remembered, i.e. a male (of man or animals, as being the most noteworthy sex).

H2146.gloss: a memento (or memorable thing, day or writing)
H2146.def: from H2142 (זָכַר); a memento (or memorable thing, day or writing).

H2147.gloss: Zicri, the name of twelve Israelites
H2147.def: from H2142 (זָכַר); memorable; Zicri, the name of twelve Israelites.

H2148.gloss: Zecarjah, the name of twenty-nine Israelites
H2148.def: or זְכַרְיָהוּ; from H2142 (זָכַר) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has remembered; Zecarjah, the name of twenty-nine Israelites.

H2149.gloss: a shaking, i.e. perhaps a tempest
H2149.def: from H2151 (זָלַל); properly, a shaking, i.e. perhaps a tempest.

H2150.def: by reduplication from H2151 (זָלַל); tremulous, i.e. a twig.

H2151.gloss: to shake (as in the wind), i.e. to quake
H2151.def: a primitive root (compare H2107 (זוּל)); to shake (as in the wind), i.e. to quake; figuratively, to be loose morally, worthless or prodigal.

H2152.def: or זִלְעָפָהxlit zilʻâphâph corrected to zilʻâphâh; from H2196 (זָעַף); a glow (of wind or anger); also a famine (as consuming).

H2153.def: ; from an unused root apparently meaning to trickle, as myrrh; fragrant dropping; Zilpah, Leah's maid.

H2154.gloss: a plan, especially a bad one
H2154.def: or זַמָּה; from H2161 (זָמַם); a plan, especially a bad one.
H2154.kjv: heinous crime, lewd(-ly, -ness), mischief, purpose, thought, wicked (device, mind, -ness)

H2155.gloss: Zimmah, the name of two Israelites
H2155.def: the same as H2154 (זִמָּה); Zimmah, the name of two Israelites.

H2156.def: or זְמֹרָה (feminine); and זְמֹר (masculine); from H2168 (זָמַר); a twig (as pruned).

H2157.gloss: a Zamzumite, or native tribe of Palestine
H2157.def: from H2161 (זָמַם); intriguing; a Zamzumite, or native tribe of Palestine.

H2158.gloss: a song to be accompanied with instrumental music
H2158.def: or זָמִר; and (feminine) זְמִרָה; from H2167 (זָמַר); a song to be accompanied with instrumental music.

H2160.def: feminine of H2158 (זָמִיר); song; Zemirah, an Israelite.

H2161.gloss: to plan, usually in a bad sense
H2161.def: a primitive root; to plan, usually in a bad sense.
H2161.kjv: consider, devise, imagine, plot, purpose, think (evil)

H2163.def: a primitive root; to fix (a time).

H2164.gloss: to agree (on a time and place)
H2164.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H2163 (זָמַן); to agree (on a time and place).

H2166.def: (Aramaic) from H2165 (זְמָן); the same as H2165 (זְמָן); an appointed occasion.

H2167.def: a primitive root (perhaps identical with H2168 (זָמַר) through the idea of striking with the fingers); properly, to touch the strings or parts of a musical instrument, i.e.; play upon it; to make music, accompanied by the voice; hence to celebrate in song and music.
H2167.kjv: give praise, sing forth praises, psalms

H2168.def: a primitive root (compare H2167 (זָמַר), H5568 (סָמַר), H6785 (צֶמֶר)); to trim (a vine).

H2169.gloss: a gazelle (from its lightly touching the ground)
H2169.def: apparently from H2167 (זָמַר) or H2168 (זָמַר); a gazelle (from its lightly touching the ground).

H2170.def: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to H2167 (זָמַר); instrumental music.

H2171.def: (Aramaic) from the same as H2170 (זְמָר); an instrumental musician.

H2172.gloss: a musical piece or song to be accompanied by an instrument
H2172.def: from H2167 (זָמַר); a musical piece or song to be accompanied by an instrument.

H2174.gloss: Zimri, the name of five Israelites, and of an Arabian tribe
H2174.def: from H2167 (זָמַר); musical; Zimri, the name of five Israelites, and of an Arabian tribe.

H2175.gloss: Zimran, a son of Abraham by Keturah
H2175.def: from H2167 (זָמַר); musical; Zimran, a son of Abraham by Keturah.

H2176.def: from H2167 (זָמַר); instrumental music; by implication, praise.

H2177.gloss: nourished (or fully developed), i.e. a form or sort
H2177.def: from H2109 (זוּן); properly, nourished (or fully developed), i.e. a form or sort.
H2177.kjv: divers kinds, all manner of store

H2179.gloss: to curtail, i.e. cut off the rear
H2179.def: a primitive root meaning to wag; used only as a denominative from H2180 (זָנָב); to curtail, i.e. cut off the rear.
