H2180.def: from H2179 (זָנַב) (in the original sense of flapping); the tail (literally or figuratively).

H2181.gloss: to commit adultery (usually of the female
H2181.def: a primitive root (highly-fed and therefore wanton); to commit adultery (usually of the female, and less often of simple fornication, rarely of involuntary ravishment); figuratively, to commit idolatry (the Jewish people being regarded as the spouse of Jehovah).
H2181.kjv: (cause to) commit fornication, continually, great, (be an, play the) harlot, (cause to be, play the) whore, (commit, fall to) whoredom, (cause to) go a-whoring, whorish

H2182.gloss: Zanoach, the name of two places in Palestine
H2182.def: from H2186 (זָנַח); rejected; Zanoach, the name of two places in Palestine.

H2184.def: from H2181 (זָנָה); adultery, i.e. (figuratively) infidelity, idolatry.

H2185.def: regarded by some as if from H2109 (זוּן) or an unused root, and applied to military equipments; but evidently the feminine plural active participle of H2181 (זָנָה); harlots.

H2186.def: a primitive root meaning to push aside, i.e.; reject, forsake, fail.

H2187.gloss: to draw together the feet (as an animal about to dart upo
H2187.def: a primitive root; properly, to draw together the feet (as an animal about to dart upon its prey), i.e. to spring forward.

H2188.def: from H2111 (זוּעַ) (in the sense of H3154 (יֶזַע)); perspiration.

H2189.def: by transposition for H2113 (זְוָעָה); agitation, maltreatment.

H2190.def: from H2111 (זוּעַ); disquiet; Zaavan, an Idumaean.

H2191.def: from an unused root (akin (by permutation) to H6819 (צָעַר)), meaning to dwindle; small.

H2192.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H2191 (זְעֵיר)xlit zeʻêyr corrected to zᵉʻêyr; small.

H2194.gloss: to foam at the mouth, i.e. to be enraged
H2194.def: a primitive root; properly, to foam at the mouth, i.e. to be enraged.

H2195.def: from H2194 (זָעַם); strictly froth at the mouth, i.e. (figuratively) fury (especially of God's displeasure with sin).

H2196.gloss: to boil up, i.e. (figuratively) to be peevish or angry
H2196.def: a primitive root; properly, to boil up, i.e. (figuratively) to be peevish or angry.
H2196.kjv: fret, sad, worse liking, be wroth

H2199.def: a primitive root; to shriek (from anguish or danger); by analogy, (as a herald) to announce or convene publicly.
H2199.kjv: assemble, call (together), (make a) cry (out), come with such a company, gather (together), cause to be proclaimed

H2200.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H2199 (זָעַק); to make an outcry.

H2201.def: and (feminine) זְעָקָהxlit zᵉâqâh corrected to zᵉʻâqâh; from H2199 (זָעַק); a shriek or outcry.

H2202.def: from an unused root (meaning to be fragrant); Ziphron, a place in Palestine.

H2203.gloss: asphalt (from its tendency to soften in the sun)
H2203.def: from an unused root (meaning to liquify); asphalt (from its tendency to soften in the sun).

H2204.def: a primitive root; to be old.

H2205.kjv: aged, ancient (man), elder(-est), old (man, men and...women), senator

H2206.def: from H2204 (זָקֵן); the beard (as indicating age).

H2208.def: properly, passive participle of H2204 (זָקֵן) (used only in the plural as a noun); old age.

H2210.def: a primitive root; to life, i.e. (figuratively) comfort.

H2211.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H2210 (זָקַף); to hang, i.e. impale.

H2212.def: a primitive root; to strain, (figuratively) extract, clarify.
H2212.kjv: fine, pour down, purge, purify, refine

H2213.gloss: a chaplet (as spread around the top)
H2213.def: from H2237 (זָרַר) (in the sense of scattering); a chaplet (as spread around the top), i.e. (specifically) a border moulding.

H2214.def: from H2114 (זוּר) (in the sense of estrangement) (compare H2219 (זָרָה)); disgust.

H2215.def: a primitive root; to flow away.

H2216.def: from H2215 (זָרַב) and H894 (בָּבֶל); descended of (i.e. from) Babylon, i.e. born there; Zerubbabel, an Israelite.

H2217.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H2216 (זְרֻבָּבֶל); Zerubbabel, an Israelite.

H2218.gloss: Zered, a brook East of the Dead Sea
H2218.def: from an unused root meaning to be exuberant in growth; lined with shrubbery; Zered, a brook East of the Dead Sea.

H2219.def: a primitive root (compare H2114 (זוּר)); to toss about; by implication, to diffuse, winnow.
H2219.kjv: cast away, compass, disperse, fan, scatter (away), spread, strew, winnow

H2220.gloss: the arm (as stretched out), or (of animals) the foreleg
H2220.def: or (shortened) זְרֹעַ; and (feminine) זְרוֹעָה; or זְרֹעָה; from H2232 (זָרַע); the arm (as stretched out), or (of animals) the foreleg; figuratively, force.
H2220.kjv: arm, help, mighty, power, shoulder, strength

H2221.def: from H2232 (זָרַע); something sown, i.e. a plant.

H2222.def: by reduplication from an unused root meaning to flow; a pouring rain.

H2223.def: by reduplication from H2115 (זוּר); properly, tightly girt, i.e. probably a racer, or some fleet animal (as being slender in the waist).

H2224.def: a primitive root; properly, to irradiate (or shoot forth beams), i.e. to rise (as the sun); specifically, to appear (as a symptom of leprosy).
H2224.kjv: arise, rise (up), as soon as it is up

H2225.def: from H2224 (זָרַח); a rising of light.

H2226.def: the same as H2225 (זֶרַח); Zerach, the name of three Israelites, also of an Idumaean and an Ethiopian prince.

H2227.gloss: a Zarchite or descendant of Zerach
H2227.def: patronymically from H2226 (זֶרַח); a Zarchite or descendant of Zerach.

H2228.gloss: Zerachjah, the name of two Israelites
H2228.def: from H2225 (זֶרַח) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has risen; Zerachjah, the name of two Israelites.

H2229.def: a primitive root; to gush (as water).
H2229.kjv: carry away as with a flood, pour out

H2230.def: from H2229 (זָרַם); a gush of water.

H2231.def: feminine of H2230 (זֶרֶם); a gushing of fluid (semen).

H2232.def: a primitive root; to sow; figuratively, to disseminate, plant, fructify.
H2232.kjv: bear, conceive seed, set with sow(-er), yield

H2233.def: from H2232 (זָרַע); seed; figuratively, fruit, plant, sowing-time, posterity.

H2235.def: or זֵרָעֹן; from H2232 (זָרַע); something sown (only in the plural), i.e. a vegetable (as food).

H2236.def: a primitive root; to sprinkle (fluid or solid particles).
H2236.kjv: be here and there, scatter, sprinkle, strew

H2237.gloss: perhaps to diffuse, i.e. (specifically) to sneeze
H2237.def: a primitive root (compare H2114 (זוּר)); perhaps to diffuse, i.e. (specifically) to sneeze.

H2238.def: of Persian origin; Zeresh, Haman's wife.

H2239.gloss: the spread of the fingers, i.e. a span
H2239.def: from H2219 (זָרָה); the spread of the fingers, i.e. a span.

H2240.def: of uncertain derivation; Zattu, an Israelite.

H2241.def: apparently a variation for H2133 (זֵיתָן); Zetham, an Israelite.

H2242.def: of Persian origin; Zethar, a eunuch of Xerxes.

H2243.def: by contraction from H2245 (חָבַב); properly, a cherisher, i.e. the bosom.

H2244.def: a primitive root (compare H2245 (חָבַב)); to secrete.

H2245.gloss: to hide (as in the bosom), i.e. to cherish (with affection)
H2245.def: a primitive root (compare H2244 (חָבָא), H2247 (חָבָה)); properly, to hide (as in the bosom), i.e. to cherish (with affection).

H2246.def: from H2245 (חָבַב); cherished; Chobab, father-in-law of Moses.

H2247.def: a primitive root (compare H2245 (חָבַב)); to secrete.

H2248.def: (Aramaic) from H2255 (חֲבַל); properly, overthrown, i.e. (morally) crime.

H2249.def: from H2266 (חָבַר); united; Chabor, a river of Assyria.

H2250.def: or חַבֻּרָה; or חֲבֻרָה; from H2266 (חָבַר); properly, bound (with stripes), i.e. a weal (or black-and-blue mark itself).

H2251.def: a primitive root; to knock out or off.

H2252.def: or חֲבָיָהlemma חֲבָיה missing vowel, corrected to חֲבָיָה; from H2247 (חָבָה) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has hidden; Chabajah, an Israelite.

H2254.gloss: to wind tightly (as a rope), i.e. to bind
H2254.def: a primitive root; to wind tightly (as a rope), i.e. to bind; specifically, by a pledge; figuratively, to pervert, destroy; also to writhe in pain (especially of parturition).
H2254.kjv: at all, band, bring forth, (deal) corrupt(-ly), destroy, offend, lay to (take a) pledge, spoil, travail, very, withhold

H2256.gloss: a rope (as twisted), especially a measuring line
H2256.def: or חֵבֶל; from H2254 (חָבַל); a rope (as twisted), especially a measuring line; by implication, a district or inheritance (as measured); or a noose (as of cords); figuratively, a company (as if tied together); also a throe (especially of parturition); also ruin.
H2256.kjv: band, coast, company, cord, country, destruction, line, lot, pain, pang, portion, region, rope, snare, sorrow, tackling

H2258.def: or (feminine) חֲבֹלָה; from H2254 (חָבַל); a pawn (as security for debt).

H2259.def: active participle from H2254 (חָבַל) (in the sense of handling ropes); a sailor.

H2260.def: from H2254 (חָבַל) (in the sense of furnished with ropes); a mast.

H2262.def: of uncertain derivation; Chabatstsanjah, a Rechabite.

H2263.gloss: to clasp (the hands or in embrace)
H2263.def: a primitive root; to clasp (the hands or in embrace).

H2264.gloss: a clasping of the hands (in idleness)
H2264.def: from H2263 (חָבַק); a clasping of the hands (in idleness).

H2265.def: by reduplication from H2263 (חָבַק); embrace; Chabakkuk, the prophet.

H2266.def: a primitive root; to join (literally or figuratively); specifically (by means of spells) to fascinate.
H2266.kjv: charm(-er), be compact, couple (together), have fellowship with, heap up, join (self, together), league

H2267.def: from H2266 (חָבַר); a society; also a spell.

H2268.gloss: Cheber, the name of a Kenite and of three Israelites
H2268.def: the same as H2267 (חֶבֶר); community; Cheber, the name of a Kenite and of three Israelites.

H2269.def: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to H2266 (חָבַר); an associate.

H2272.gloss: a streak (like a line), as on the tiger
H2272.def: by reduplication from H2266 (חָבַר); a streak (like a line), as on the tiger.

H2275.def: from H2267 (חֶבֶר); seat of association; Chebron, a place in Palestine, also the name of two Israelites.

H2276.def: or חֶבְרֹנִי; patronymically from H2275 (חֶבְרוֹן); Chebronite (collectively), an inhabitant of Chebron.

H2277.gloss: a Chebrite (collectively) or descendants of Cheber
H2277.def: patronymically from H2268 (חֶבֶר); a Chebrite (collectively) or descendants of Cheber.

H2279.def: feminine active participle of H2266 (חָבַר); a joint.

H2280.gloss: to wrap firmly (especially a turban, compress, or saddle)
H2280.def: a primitive root; to wrap firmly (especially a turban, compress, or saddle); figuratively, to stop, to rule.
H2280.kjv: bind (up), gird about, govern, healer, put, saddle, wrap about

H2281.def: from an unused root probably meaning to cook (compare H4227 (מַחֲבַת)); something fried, probably a griddle-cake.

H2282.gloss: a festival, or a victim therefor
H2282.def: or חָג; from H2287 (חָגַג); a festival, or a victim therefor.

H2283.def: from an unused root meaning to revolve (compare H2287 (חָגַג)); properly, vertigo, i.e. (figuratively) fear.

H2285.def: the same as H2284 (חָגָב); locust; Chagab, one of the Nethinim.

H2286.gloss: Chagaba or Chagabah, one of the Nethinim
H2286.def: or חֲגָבָה; feminine of H2285 (חָגָב); locust; Chagaba or Chagabah, one of the Nethinim.

H2287.def: a primitive root (compare H2283 (חָגָא), H2328 (חוּג)); properly, to move in acircle, i.e. (specifically) to march in asacred procession, to observe afestival; by implication, to be giddy.
H2287.kjv: celebrate, dance, (keep, hold) a (solemn) feast (holiday), reel to and fro

H2288.def: from an unused root meaning to take refuge; a rift in rocks.

H2290.def: or חֲגֹר; and (feminine) חֲגוֹרָה; or חֲגֹרָה; from H2296 (חָגַר); a belt (for the waist).

H2291.def: from H2287 (חָגַג); festive; Chaggi, an Israelite; also (patronymically) a Chaggite, or descendant of the same.

H2292.def: from H2282 (חַג); festive; Chaggai, a Hebrew prophet.

H2293.def: from H2282 (חַג) and H3050 (יָהּ); festival of Jah; Chaggijah, an Israelite.

H2294.def: feminine of H2291 (חַגִּי); festive; Chaggith, a wife of David.

H2295.def: of uncertain derivation; probably a partridge; Choglah, an Israelitess.

H2296.gloss: to gird on (as a belt, armor, etc.)
H2296.def: a primitive root; to gird on (as a belt, armor, etc.).
H2296.kjv: be able to put on, be afraid, appointed, gird, restrain, on every side

H2298.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H2297 (חַד); as card. one; as article single; as an ordinal, first; adverbially, at once.

H2300.gloss: to be (causatively, make) sharp or (figuratively) severe
H2300.def: a primitive root; to be (causatively, make) sharp or (figuratively) severe.

H2301.def: from H2300 (חָדַד); fierce; Chadad, an Ishmaelite.

H2307.def: from H2300 (חָדַד); a peak; Chadid, a place in Palestine.

H2308.gloss: to be flabby, i.e. (by implication) desist
H2308.def: a primitive root; properly, to be flabby, i.e. (by implication) desist; (figuratively) be lacking or idle.
H2308.kjv: cease, end, fall, forbear, forsake, leave (off), let alone, rest, be unoccupied, want

H2309.gloss: rest, i.e. the state of the dead
H2309.def: from H2308 (חָדַל); rest, i.e. the state of the dead.

H2310.def: from H2308 (חָדַל); vacant, i.e. ceasing or destitute.

H2311.def: from H2309 (חֶדֶל); idle; Chadlai, an Israelite.

H2312.def: from an unused root meaning to sting; a prickly plant.

H2313.def: probably of foreign origin; the Chiddekel (or Tigris) river.

H2314.def: a primitive root; properly, to inclose (as a room), i.e. (by analogy,) to beset (as in a siege).

H2315.kjv: ((bed) inner) chamber, innermost(-ward) part, parlour, south, within

H2316.def: another form for H2315 (חֶדֶר); chamber; Chadar, an Ishmaelite.

H2317.def: of uncertain derivation; Chadrak, a Syrian deity.

H2318.def: a primitive root; to be new; causatively, to rebuild.

H2320.def: from H2318 (חָדַשׁ); the new moon; by implication, a month.

H2321.def: the same as H2320 (חֹדֶשׁ); Chodesh, an Israelitess.

H2322.def: feminine of H2319 (חָדָשׁ); new; Chadashah, a place in Palestine.

H2325.def: also חָיַב; a primitive root; properly, perhaps to tie, i.e. (figuratively and reflexively) to owe, or (by implication) to forfeit.

H2327.def: feminine active participle of H2247 (חָבָה); hiding place; Chobah, a place in Syria.

H2328.def: a primitive root (compare H2287 (חָגַג)); to describe a circle.

H2330.gloss: to tie a knot, i.e. (figuratively) to propound a riddle
H2330.def: a primitive root; properly, to tie a knot, i.e. (figuratively) to propound a riddle.

H2331.def: a primitive root; (compare H2324 (חֲוָא), H2421 (חָיָה)); properly, to live; by implication (intensively) to declare or show.

H2332.def: causatively from H2331 (חָוָה); life-giver; Chavvah (or Eve), the first woman.

H2333.gloss: by implication, an encampment or village
H2333.def: properly, the same as H2332 (חַוָּה) (lifegiving, i.e. living-place); by implication, an encampment or village.

H2334.gloss: hamlets of Jair, a region of Palestine
H2334.def: from the plural of H2333 (חַוָּה) and a modification of H3265 (יָעוּר); hamlets of Jair, a region of Palestine.

H2335.def: from H2374 (חֹזֶה); visionary; Chozai, an Israelite.

H2336.def: from an unused root apparently meaning to pierce; a thorn; by analogy, a ring forthe nose.

H2337.gloss: a dell or crevice (as if pierced in the earth)
H2337.def: perhaps the same as H2336 (חוֹחַ); a dell or crevice (as if pierced in the earth).

H2338.gloss: to string together, i.e. (figuratively) to repair
H2338.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to the root of H2339 (חוּט), perhaps as a denominative; to string together, i.e. (figuratively) to repair.

H2339.def: from an unused root probably meaning to sew; a string; by implication, a measuring tape.

H2340.gloss: a Chivvite, one of the aboriginal tribes of Palestine
H2340.def: perhaps from H2333 (חַוָּה); a villager; a Chivvite, one of the aboriginal tribes of Palestine.

H2341.gloss: Chavilah, the name of two or three eastern regions
H2341.def: probably from H2342 (חוּל); circular; Chavilah, the name of two or three eastern regions; also perhaps of two men.

H2342.gloss: to twist or whirl (in a circular or spiral manner)
H2342.def: or חִיל; a primitive root; properly, to twist or whirl (in a circular or spiral manner), i.e. (specifically) to dance, to writhe in pain (especially of parturition) or fear; figuratively, to wait, to pervert.
H2342.kjv: bear, (make to) bring forth, (make to) calve, dance, drive away, fall grievously (with pain), fear, form, great, grieve, (be) grievous, hope, look, make, be in pain, be much (sore) pained, rest, shake, shapen, (be) sorrow(-ful), stay, tarry, travail (with pain), tremble, trust, wait carefully (patiently), be wounded

H2343.def: from H2342 (חוּל); a circle; Chul, a son of Aram; also the region settled by him.

H2344.def: from H2342 (חוּל); sand (as round or whirling particles).

H2345.def: from an unused root meaning to be warm, i.e. (by implication); sunburnt or swarthy (blackish).

H2346.def: feminine active participle of an unused root apparently meaning to join; a wall of protection.

H2347.def: a primitive root; properly, to cover, i.e. (figuratively) to compassionate.

H2348.def: from an unused root meaning to cover; a cove (as a sheltered bay).
H2348.kjv: coast (of the sea), haven, shore, (sea-) side

H2349.def: from the same as H2348 (חוֹף); protection; Chupham, an Israelite.

H2350.gloss: a Chuphamite or descendant of Chupham
H2350.def: patronymically from H2349 (חוּפָם); a Chuphamite or descendant of Chupham.

H2351.gloss: separate by awall, i.e. outside, outdoors
H2351.def: or (shortened) חֻץ; (both forms feminine in the plural) from an unused root meaning to sever; properly, separate by awall, i.e. outside, outdoors.
H2351.kjv: abroad, field, forth, highway, more, out(-side, -ward), street, without

H2352.def: or (shortened) חֻר; from an unused root probably meaning to bore; the crevice of a serpent; the cell of aprison.

H2354.gloss: Chur, the name of four Israelites and one Midianite
H2354.def: the same as H2353 (חוּר) or H2352 (חוּר); Chur, the name of four Israelites and one Midianite.

H2355.def: the same as H2353 (חוּר); white linen.

H2356.def: or (shortened) חֹר; the same as H2352 (חוּר); a cavity, socket, den.

H2357.def: a primitive root; to blanch (as with shame).

H2358.def: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to H2357 (חָוַר); white.

H2359.def: probably from H2353 (חוּר); linen-worker; Churi, an Israelite.

H2360.def: probably an orthographical variation for H2359 (חוּרִי); Churai, an Israelite.

H2361.gloss: Churam, the name of an Israelite and two Syrians
H2361.def: probably from H2353 (חוּר); whiteness, i.e. noble; Churam, the name of an Israelite and two Syrians.

H2362.gloss: Chavran, a region East of the Jordan
H2362.def: apparently from H2357 (חָוַר) (in the sense of H2352 (חוּר)); cavernous; Chavran, a region East of the Jordan.

H2363.def: a primitive root; to hurry; figuratively, to be eager with excitement or enjoyment.

H2364.def: from H2363 (חוּשׁ); haste; Chushah, an Israelite.

H2365.def: from H2363 (חוּשׁ); hasty; Chushai, an Israelite.

H2366.gloss: Chushim, the name of three Israelites
H2366.def: or חֻשִׁים; or חֻשִׁם; plural from H2363 (חוּשׁ); hasters; Chushim, the name of three Israelites.

H2367.def: or חֻשָׁם; from H2363 (חוּשׁ); hastily; Chusham, an Idumaean.

H2368.def: or חֹתָם; from H2856 (חָתַם); a signature-ring.

H2369.gloss: Chotham, the name of two Israelites
H2369.def: the same as H2368 (חוֹתָם); seal; Chotham, the name of two Israelites.

H2370.def: (Aramaic) or חֲזָה; (Aramaic), corresponding to H2372 (חָזָה); to gaze upon; mentally to dream, be usual (i.e. seem).
H2370.kjv: behold, have (a dream), see, be wont

H2371.def: or חֲזָהאֵל; from H2372 (חָזָה) and H410 (אֵל); God has seen; Chazael, a king of Syria.

H2372.def: a primitive root; to gaze at; mentally to perceive, contemplate (with pleasure); specifically, to have avision of.

H2373.gloss: the breast (as most seen in front)
H2373.def: from H2372 (חָזָה); the breast (as most seen in front).

H2374.def: active participle of H2372 (חָזָה); a beholder in vision; also a compact (as looked upon with approval).
H2374.kjv: agreement, prophet, see that, seer, (star-) gazer

H2375.def: from H2372 (חָזָה); seer; Chazo, a nephew of Abraham.

H2377.gloss: a sight (mentally), i.e. a dream, revelation, or oracle
H2377.def: from H2372 (חָזָה); a sight (mentally), i.e. a dream, revelation, or oracle.

H2380.def: from H2372 (חָזָה); a look; hence (figuratively) striking appearance, revelation, or (by implication) compact.

H2381.def: from H2372 (חָזָה) and H410 (אֵל); seen of God; Chaziel, a Levite.

H2382.def: from H2372 (חָזָה) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has seen; Chazajah, an Israelite.

H2383.def: from H2372 (חָזָה); vision; Chezjon, a Syrian.

H2384.def: from H2372 (חָזָה); a revelation, expectation by dream.

H2385.def: from an unused root meaning to glare; a flash of lightning.

H2386.def: from an unused root probably meaning to enclose; a hog (perhaps as penned).

H2387.gloss: Chezir, the name of two Israelites
H2387.def: from the same as H2386 (חֲזִיר); perhaps protected; Chezir, the name of two Israelites.

H2388.def: a primitive root; to fasten upon; hence, to seize, be strong (figuratively, courageous, causatively strengthen, cure, help, repair, fortify), obstinate; to bind, restrain, conquer.
H2388.kjv: aid, amend, calker, catch, cleave, confirm, be constant, constrain, continue, be of good (take) courage(-ous, -ly), encourage (self), be established, fasten, force, fortify, make hard, harden, help, (lay) hold (fast), lean, maintain, play the man, mend, become (wax) mighty, prevail, be recovered, repair, retain, seize, be (wax) sore, strengthen (self), be stout, be (make, shew, wax) strong(-er), be sure, take (hold), be urgent, behave self valiantly, withstand

H2389.gloss: strong (usu. in a bad sense, hard, bold, violent)
H2389.def: from H2388 (חָזַק); strong (usu. in a bad sense, hard, bold, violent).
H2389.kjv: harder, hottest, impudent, loud, mighty, sore, stiff(-hearted), strong(-er)

H2394.def: feminine of H2392 (חֹזֶק); vehemence (usually in a bad sense).

H2395.def: from H2388 (חָזַק); strong; Chizki, an Israelite.

H2396.def: or חִזְקִיָּהוּ; also יְחִזְקִיָּה; or יְחִזְקִיָּהוּ; from H2388 (חָזַק) and H3050 (יָהּ); strengthened of Jah; Chizkijah, a king of Judah, also the name of two other Israelites.

H2397.gloss: a ring for the nose (or lips)
H2397.def: once (Ezekiel 29:4) חָחִי; from the same as H2336 (חוֹחַ); a ring for the nose (or lips).

H2398.def: a primitive root; properly, to miss; hence (figuratively and generally) to sin; by inference, to forfeit, lack, expiate, repent, (causatively) lead astray, condemn.
H2398.kjv: bear the blame, cleanse, commit (sin), by fault, harm he hath done, loss, miss, (make) offend(-er), offer for sin, purge, purify (self), make reconciliation, (cause, make) sin(-ful, -ness), trespass

H2399.def: from H2398 (חָטָא); a crime or its penalty.

H2400.gloss: a criminal, or one accounted guilty
H2400.def: intensively from H2398 (חָטָא); a criminal, or one accounted guilty.

H2401.gloss: an offence, or a sacrifice forit
H2401.def: feminine of H2399 (חֵטְא); an offence, or a sacrifice forit.

H2402.gloss: an offence, and the penalty or sacrifice forit
H2402.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H2401 (חֲטָאָה); an offence, and the penalty or sacrifice forit.

H2403.def: from H2398; an offence (sometimes habitual sinfulness), and its penalty, occasion, sacrifice, or expiation.

H2404.def: a primitive root; to chop or carve wood.

H2405.def: feminine passive participle of H2404 (חָטַב); properly, a carving; hence, a tapestry (as figured).

H2406.gloss: wheat, whether the grain or the plant
H2406.def: of uncertain derivation; wheat, whether the grain or the plant.

H2407.gloss: Chattush, the name of four or five Israelites
H2407.def: from an unused root of uncertain signification; Chattush, the name of four or five Israelites.

H2408.def: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to H2398 (חָטָא); an offence.

H2409.def: (Aramaic) from the same as H2408 (חֲטִי); an expiation.

H2410.def: from an unused root apparently meaning to dig out; explorer; Chatita, a temple porter.

H2411.def: from an unused root apparently meaning to wave; fluctuating; Chattil, one of 'Solomon's servants'.

H2412.def: from H2414 (חָטַף); robber; Chatipha, one of the Nethinim.

H2414.def: a primitive root; to clutch; hence, to seize as aprisoner.

H2415.def: from an unused root of uncertain signification; a twig.

H2416.def: from H2421 (חָיָה); alive; hence, raw (flesh); fresh (plant, water, year), strong; also (as noun, especially in the feminine singular and masculine plural) life (or living thing), whether literally or figuratively.
H2416.kjv: age, alive, appetite, (wild) beast, company, congregation, life(-time), live(-ly), living (creature, thing), maintenance, merry, multitude, (be) old, quick, raw, running, springing, troop

H2417.def: (Aramaic) from H2418 (חֲיָא); alive; also (as noun in plural) life.

H2418.def: (Aramaic) or חֲיָה; (Aramaic), corresponding to H2421 (חָיָה); to live.

H2419.def: from H2416 (חַי) and H410 (אֵל); living of God; Chiel, an Israelite.

H2420.gloss: a puzzle, hence, a trick, conundrum, sententious maxim
H2420.def: from H2330 (חוּד); a puzzle, hence, a trick, conundrum, sententious maxim.
H2420.kjv: dark saying (sentence, speech), hard question, proverb, riddle

H2421.gloss: to live, whether literally or figuratively
H2421.def: a primitive root (compare H2331 (חָוָה), H2421 (חָיָה)); to live, whether literally or figuratively; causatively, to revive.
H2421.kjv: keep (leave, make) alive, certainly, give (promise) life, (let, suffer to) live, nourish up, preserve (alive), quicken, recover, repair, restore (to life), revive, (God) save (alive, life, lives), surely, be whole

H2425.def: a primitive root (compare H2421 (חָיָה)); to live; causatively to revive.

H2426.def: or (shortened) חֵל; a collateral form of H2428 (חַיִל); an army; also (by analogy,) an intrenchment.
H2426.kjv: army, bulwark, host, poor, rampart, trench, wall

H2427.def: and (feminine) חִילָה; from H2342 (חוּל); a throe (expectant of childbirth).

H2428.gloss: probably a force, whether of men, means or other resources
H2428.def: from H2342 (חוּל); probably a force, whether of men, means or other resources; an army, wealth, virtue, valor, strength.
H2428.kjv: able, activity, ([phrase]) army, band of men (soldiers), company, (great) forces, goods, host, might, power, riches, strength, strong, substance, train, ([phrase]) valiant(-ly), valour, virtuous(-ly), war, worthy(-ily)

H2429.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H2428 (חַיִל); an army, or strength.

H2431.gloss: Chelam, a place East of Palestine
H2431.def: or חֵלָאםxlit Chêlʼâm corrected to Chêlâʼm; from H2428 (חַיִל); fortress; Chelam, a place East of Palestine.

H2432.def: from H2428 (חַיִל); fortress; Chilen, a place in Palestine.

H2434.def: another form for H2351 (חוּץ); a wall.

H2435.def: from H2434 (חַיִץ); properly, the (outer) wall side; hence, exterior; figuratively, secular (as opposed to sacred).

H2436.def: or חֵק; and חוֹק; from an unused root, apparently meaning to inclose; the bosom (literally or figuratively).

H2437.def: from H2357 (חָוַר) in the sense of splendor; Chirah, an Adullamite.

H2438.gloss: Chiram or Chirom, the name of two Tyrians
H2438.def: or חִירוֹםlemma חִירֹם missing vav, corrected to חִירוֹם; another form of H2361 (חוּרָם); Chiram or Chirom, the name of two Tyrians.

H2439.def: another form of H2363 (חוּשׁ); to hurry.

H2440.def: from H2439 (חִישׁ); properly, a hurry; hence (adverb) quickly.

H2441.gloss: the palate or inside of the mouth
H2441.def: probably from H2596 (חָנַךְ) in the sense of tasting; properly, the palate or inside of the mouth; hence, the mouth itself (as the organ of speech, taste and kissing).

H2442.def: a primitive root (apparently akin to H2707 (חָקָה) through the idea of piercing); properly, to adhere to; hence, to await.

H2443.def: probably from H2442 (חָכָה); a hook (as adhering).

H2444.def: from the same as H2447 (חַכְלִיל); dark; Chakilah, a hill in Palestine.

H2445.def: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to H2449 (חָכַם); wise, i.e. a Magian.

H2446.def: from the base of H2447 (חַכְלִיל) and H3050 (יָהּ); darkness of Jah; Chakaljah, an Israelite.

H2447.def: by reduplication from an unused root apparently meaning to be dark; darkly flashing (only of the eyes); in a good sense, brilliant (as stimulated by wine).

H2448.def: from H2447 (חַכְלִיל); flash (of the eyes); in a bad sense, blearedness.

H2449.gloss: to be wise (in mind, word or act)
H2449.def: a primitive root,; to be wise (in mind, word or act).
H2449.kjv: exceeding, teach wisdom, be (make self, shew self) wise, deal (never so) wisely, make wiser

H2450.def: from H2449 (חָכַם); wise, (i.e. intelligent, skilful or artful).

H2451.def: from H2449; wisdom (in a good sense).

H2453.def: from H2449 (חָכַם); skilful; Chakmoni, an Israelite.

H2454.def: or חַכְמוֹת; collateral forms of H2451 (חׇכְמָה); wisdom.

H2455.def: from H2490 (חָלַל); properly, exposed; hence, profane.

H2456.def: a primitive root (compare H2470 (חָלָה)); to be sick.

H2457.def: from H2456 (חָלָא); properly, disease; hence, rust.

H2458.def: the same as H2457 (חֶלְאָה); Chelah, an Israelitess.

H2459.def: or חֵלֶב; from an unused root meaning to be fat; fat, whether literally or figuratively; hence, the richest or choice part.

H2460.def: the same as H2459 (חֶלֶב); fatness; Cheleb, an Israelite.

H2461.def: from the same as H2459 (חֶלֶב); milk (as the richness of kine).

H2462.def: feminine of H2459 (חֶלֶב); fertility; Chelbah, a place in Palestine.

H2463.def: from H2459 (חֶלֶב); fruitful; Chelbon, a place in Syria.

H2464.gloss: galbanam, an odorous gum (as if fatty)
H2464.def: from H2459 (חֶלֶב); galbanam, an odorous gum (as if fatty).

H2465.gloss: life (as a fleeting portion of time)
H2465.def: from an unused root apparently meaning to glide swiftly; life (as a fleeting portion of time); hence, the world (as transient).

H2466.def: the same as H2465 (חֶלֶד); Cheled, an Israelite.

H2467.def: from the same as H2465 (חֶלֶד); a weasel (from its gliding motion).

H2468.def: feminine of H2467 (חֹלֶד); Chuldah, an Israelitess.

H2469.gloss: Cheldai, the name of two Israelites
H2469.def: from H2466 (חֵלֶד); worldliness; Cheldai, the name of two Israelites.

H2470.def: a primitive root (compare H2342 (חוּל), H2470 (חָלָה), H2490 (חָלַל)); properly, to be rubbed or worn; hence (figuratively) to be weak, sick, afflicted; or (causatively) to grieve, make sick; also to stroke (in flattering), entreat.
H2470.kjv: beseech, (be) diseased, (put to) grief, be grieved, (be) grievous, infirmity, intreat, lay to, put to pain, pray, make prayer, be (fall, make) sick, sore, be sorry, make suit (supplication), woman in travail, be (become) weak, be wounded

H2471.def: from H2490 (חָלַל); a cake (as usually punctured).

H2472.def: or (shortened) חֲלֹם; from H2492 (חָלַם); a dream.

H2473.gloss: Cholon, the name of two places in Palestine
H2473.def: or (shortened) חֹלֹן; probably from H2344 (חוֹל); sandy; Cholon, the name of two places in Palestine.

H2475.def: from H2498 (חָלַף); properly, surviving; by implication (collectively) orphans.

H2476.def: feminine passive participle of H2522 (חָלַשׁ); defeat.

H2477.def: probably of foreign origin; Chalach, a region of Assyria.

H2478.def: by reduplication from H2342 (חוּל); contorted; Chalchul, a place in Palestine.

H2479.def: feminine from the same as H2478 (חַלְחוּל); writhing (in childbirth); by implication, terror.

H2480.def: a primitive root; to snatch at.

H2482.def: the same as H2481 (חֲלִי); Chali, a place in Palestine.

H2486.def: or חָלִלָה; a directive from H2490 (חָלַל); literal fora profaned thing; used (interj.) far be it!.

H2489.def: or חֵלְכָה; apparently from an unused root probably meaning to be dark or (figuratively) unhappy; a wretch, i.e. unfortunate.

H2490.gloss: to bore, i.e. (by implication) to wound, to dissolve
H2490.def: a primitive root (compare H2470 (חָלָה)); also  denominative (from H2485 (חָלִיל)); properly, to bore, i.e. (by implication) to wound, to dissolve; figuratively, to profane (a person, place or thing), to break (one's word), to begin (as if by an 'opening wedge'); to play (the flute).
H2490.kjv: begin (men began), defile, break, defile, eat (as common things), first, gather the grape thereof, take inheritance, pipe, player on instruments, pollute, (cast as) profane (self), prostitute, slay (slain), sorrow, stain, wound

H2491.def: from H2490 (חָלַל); pierced (especially to death); figuratively, polluted.

H2492.def: a primitive root; properly, to bind firmly, i.e. (by implication) to be (causatively to make) plump; also (through the figurative sense of dumbness) to dream.
H2492.kjv: (cause to) dream(-er), be in good liking, recover

H2493.def: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to H2492 (חָלַם); a dream.

H2494.def: from H2492 (חָלַם); a dream; Chelem, an Israelite.

H2495.def: from H2492 (חָלַם) (in the sense of insipidity); probably purslain.

H2496.def: probably from H2492 (חָלַם) (in the sense of hardness); flint.

H2497.def: from H2428 (חַיִל); strong; Chelon, an Israelite.

H2498.def: a primitive root; properly, to slide by, i.e. (by implication) to hasten away, pass on, spring up, pierce or change.
H2498.kjv: abolish, alter, change, cut off, go on forward, grow up, be over, pass (away, on, through), renew, sprout, strike through

H2499.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H2498 (חָלַף); to pass on (of time).

H2500.def: from H2498 (חָלַף); properly, exchange; hence (as preposition) instead of.

H2501.def: the same as H2500 (חֵלֶף); change; Cheleph, a place in Palestine.

H2502.def: a primitive root; to pull off; hence (intensively) to strip, (reflex.) to depart; by implication, to deliver, equip (for fight); present, strengthen.
H2502.kjv: arm (self), (go, ready) armed (man, soldier), deliver, draw out, make fat, loose, (ready) prepared, put off, take away, withdraw self

H2503.gloss: Chelets, the name of two Israelites
H2503.def: or חֵלֶץ; from H2502 (חָלַץ); perhaps, strength; Chelets, the name of two Israelites.

H2504.gloss: the loins (as the seat of vigor)
H2504.def: from H2502 (חָלַץ) (in the sense of strength); only in the dual; the loins (as the seat of vigor).

H2505.def: a primitive root; to be smooth (figuratively); by implication (as smooth stones were used for lots) to apportion or separate.
H2505.kjv: deal, distribute, divide, flatter, give, (have, im-) part(-ner), take away a portion, receive, separate self, (be) smooth(-er)

H2506.def: from H2505 (חָלַק); properly, smoothness (of the tongue); also an allotment.

H2507.def: the same as H2506 (חֵלֶק); portion; Chelek, an Israelite.

H2508.def: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to H2505 (חָלַק); a part.

H2510.def: the same as H2509 (חָלָק); bare; Chalak, a mountain of Idumaea.

H2513.def: feminine of H2506 (חֵלֶק); properly, smoothness; figuratively, flattery; also an allotment.
H2513.kjv: field, flattering(-ry), ground, parcel, part, piece of land (ground), plat, portion, slippery place, smooth (thing)

H2516.gloss: a Chelkite or descendant of Chelek
H2516.def: patronymically from H2507 (חֵלֶק); a Chelkite or descendant of Chelek.

H2517.def: from H2505 (חָלַק); apportioned; Chelkai, an Israelite.

H2518.gloss: Chilhijah, the name of eight Israelites
H2518.def: or חִלְקִיָּהוּ; from H2506 (חֵלֶק) and H3050 (יָהּ); portion of Jah; Chilhijah, the name of eight Israelites.

H2519.def: by reduplication from H2505 (חָלַק); properly, something very smooth; i.e. a treacherous spot; figuratively, blandishment.

H2520.def: a form of H2513 (חֶלְקָה); smoothness; Chelkath, a place in Palestine.

H2521.gloss: Chelkath Hats-tsurim, a place in Palestine
H2521.def: from H2520 (חֶלְקַת) and the plural of H6697 (צוּר), with the article inserted; smoothness of the rocks; Chelkath Hats-tsurim, a place in Palestine.

H2522.def: a primitive root; to prostrate; by implication, to overthrow, decay.

H2524.def: from the same as H2346 (חוֹמָה); a father-in-law (as in affinity).

H2526.def: the same as H2525 (חָם); hot (from the tropical habitat); Cham, a son of Noah; also (as a patronymic) his descendants or their country.

H2528.def: (Aramaic) or חֲמָה; (Aramaic), corresponding to H2534 (חֵמָה); anger.

H2529.def: or (shortened) חֵמָה; from the same root as H2346 (חוֹמָה); curdled milk or cheese.

H2530.def: a primitive root; to delight in.
H2530.kjv: beauty, greatly beloved, covet, delectable thing, (great) delight, desire, goodly, lust, (be) pleasant (thing), precious (thing)

H2533.def: from H2531 (חֶמֶד); pleasant; Chemdan, an Idumaean.

H2534.def: or (Daniel 11:44) חֵמָא; from H3179 (יָחַם); heat; figuratively, anger, poison (from its fever).
H2534.kjv: anger, bottles, hot displeasure, furious(-ly, -ry), heat, indignation, poison, rage, wrath(-ful). See H2529 (חֶמְאָה)

H2535.def: from H2525 (חָם); heat; by implication, the sun.

H2536.def: from H2535 (חַמָּה) and H410 (אֵל); anger of God; Chammuel, an Israelite.

H2537.def: or חֲמִיטַל; from H2524 (חָם) and H2919 (טַל); father-in-law of dew; Chamutal or Chamital, an Israelitess.

H2538.def: from H2550 (חָמַל); pitied; Chamul, an Israelite.

H2539.gloss: a Chamulite (collectively) or descendants of Chamul
H2539.def: patronymically from H2538 (חָמוּל); a Chamulite (collectively) or descendants of Chamul.

H2540.gloss: Chammon, the name of two places in Palestine
H2540.def: from H2552 (חָמַם); warm spring; Chammon, the name of two places in Palestine.

H2541.def: from H2556 (חָמֵץ); properly, violent; by implication, a robber.

H2542.def: from H2559 (חָמַק); a wrapping, i.e. drawers.

H2543.gloss: a male ass (from its dun red)
H2543.def: or (shortened) חֲמֹר; from H2560 (חָמַר); a male ass (from its dun red).

H2544.def: the same as H2543 (חֲמוֹר); donkey; Chamor, a Canaanite.

H2545.def: or (shortened) חֲמֹת; feminine of H2524 (חָם); a mother-in-law.

H2546.def: from an unused root probably meaning, to lie low; a lizard (as creeping).

H2547.def: feminine of H2546 (חֹמֶט); low; Chumtah, a place in Palestine.

H2548.def: from H2556 (חָמֵץ); seasoned, i.e. salt provender.

H2549.def: or חֲמִשִּׁי; ordinal from H2568 (חָמֵשׁ); fifth; also a fifth.

H2550.def: a primitive root; to commiserate; by implication, to spare.

H2552.def: a primitive root; to be hot (literally or figuratively).
H2552.kjv: enflame self, get (have) heat, be (wax) hot, (be, wax) warm (self, at)

H2554.def: a primitive root; to be violent; by implication, to maltreat.
H2554.kjv: make bare, shake off, violate, do violence, take away violently, wrong, imagine wrongfully

H2555.def: from H2554 (חָמַס); violence; by implication, wrong; by meton. unjust gain.
H2555.kjv: cruel(-ty), damage, false, injustice, oppressor, unrighteous, violence (against, done), violent (dealing), wrong

H2556.def: a primitive root; to be pungent; i.e. in taste (sour, i.e. literally fermented, or figuratively, harsh), in color (dazzling).

H2559.def: a primitive root; properly, to wrap; hence, to depart (i.e. turn about).

H2560.def: a primitive root; also  as denominative (from H2564 (חֵמָר)); properly, to boil up; hence, to ferment (with scum); to glow (with redness); to smear with pitch.

H2563.gloss: a bubbling up, i.e. of water, a wave
H2563.def: from H2560 (חָמַר); properly, a bubbling up, i.e. of water, a wave; of earth, mire or clay (cement); also a heap; hence, a chomer or dry measure.

H2564.def: from H2560 (חָמַר); bitumen (as rising to the surface).

H2566.def: from H2560 (חָמַר); red; Chamran, an Idumaean.

H2567.def: a denominative from H2568 (חָמֵשׁ); to tax a fifth.

H2568.def: masculine חֲמִשָּׁה; a primitive numeral; five.

H2570.def: from an unused root probably meaning, to be stout; the abdomen (as obese).

H2571.def: passive participle of the same as H2570 (חֹמֶשׁ); staunch, i.e. able-bodied soldiers.

H2573.def: from the same as H2346 (חוֹמָה); a skin bottle (as tied up).

H2574.def: from the same as H2346 (חוֹמָה); walled; Chamath, a place in Syria.

H2575.def: a variation for the first part of H2576 (חַמֹּת דֹּאר); hot springs; Chammath, a place in Palestine.

H2576.def: from the plural of H2535 (חַמָּה) and H1756 (דּוֹר); hot springs of Dor; Chammath-Dor, a place in Palestine.

H2577.gloss: a Chamathite or native of Chamath
H2577.def: patrial from H2574 (חֲמָת); a Chamathite or native of Chamath.

H2578.def: from H2574 (חֲמָת) and H6678 (צוֹבָא); Chamath of Tsobah; probably the same as H2574 (חֲמָת); Chamath-Tsobah.

H2579.def: from H2574 (חֲמָת) and H7237 (רַבָּה); Chamath of Rabbah; probably the same as H2574 (חֲמָת).; Chamath-Rabbah.

H2580.def: from H2603; graciousness, i.e., subjective (kindness, favor) or objective (beauty).

H2581.gloss: Chen, a figurative name for an Israelite
H2581.def: the same as H2580 (חֵן); grace; Chen, a figurative name for an Israelite.

H2582.def: probably from H2580 (חֵן) and H1908 (הֲדַד); favor of Hadad; Chenadad, an Israelite.

H2583.def: a primitive root (compare H2603 (חָנַן)); properly, to incline; by implication, to decline (of the slanting rays of evening); specifically, to pitch atent; gen. to encamp (for abode or siege).
H2583.kjv: abide (in tents), camp, dwell, encamp, grow to an end, lie, pitch (tent), rest in tent

H2584.def: from H2603 (חָנַן); favored; Channah, an Israelitess.

H2585.def: from H2596 (חָנַךְ); initiated; Chanok, an antediluvian patriach.

H2586.gloss: Chanun, the name of an Ammonite and of two Israelites
H2586.def: from H2603 (חָנַן); favored; Chanun, the name of an Ammonite and of two Israelites.

H2588.gloss: a vault or cell (with an arch)
H2588.def: from H2583 (חָנָה); properly, a vault or cell (with an arch); by implication, a prison.

H2589.def: from H2603 (חָנַן) (in the sense of prayer); supplication.

H2590.def: a primitive root; to spice; by implication, to embalm; also to ripen.

H2592.gloss: Channiel, the name of two Israelites
H2592.def: from H2603 (חָנַן) and H410 (אֵל); favor of God; Channiel, the name of two Israelites.

H2595.gloss: a lance (for thrusting, like pitching a tent)
H2595.def: from H2583 (חָנָה); a lance (for thrusting, like pitching a tent).

H2596.def: a primitive root; (compare H2614 (חָנַק)); properly, to narrow; figuratively, to initiate or discipline.

H2599.gloss: a Chanokite (collectively) or descendants of Chanok
H2599.def: patronymically from H2585 (חֲנוֹךְ); a Chanokite (collectively) or descendants of Chanok.

H2600.gloss: gratis, i.e. devoid of cost, reason or advantage
H2600.def: from H2580 (חֵן); gratis, i.e. devoid of cost, reason or advantage.
H2600.kjv: without a cause (cost, wages), causeless, to cost nothing, free(-ly), innocent, for nothing (nought, in vain

H2601.def: probably by orthographical variation for H2606 (חֲנַנְאֵל); Chanamel, an Israelite.

H2602.def: of uncertain derivation; perhaps the aphis or plantlouse.

H2603.gloss: to bend or stoop in kindness to an inferior
H2603.def: a primitive root (compare H2583 (חָנָה)); properly, to bend or stoop in kindness to an inferior; to favor, bestow; causatively to implore (i.e. move to favor by petition).
H2603.kjv: beseech, fair, (be, find, shew) favour(-able), be (deal, give, grant (gracious(-ly), intreat, (be) merciful, have (shew) mercy (on, upon), have pity upon, pray, make supplication, very

H2604.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H2603 (חָנַן); to favor or (causatively) to entreat.

H2605.gloss: Chanan, the name of seven Israelites
H2605.def: from H2603 (חָנַן); favor; Chanan, the name of seven Israelites.

H2606.def: from H2603 (חָנַן) and H410 (אֵל); God has favored; Chananel, probably an Israelite, from whom a tower of Jerusalem was named.

H2607.gloss: Chanani, the name of six Israelites
H2607.def: from H2603 (חָנַן); gracious; Chanani, the name of six Israelites.

H2608.gloss: Chananjah, the name of thirteen Israelites
H2608.def: or חֲנַנְיָהוּ; from H2603 (חָנַן) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has favored; Chananjah, the name of thirteen Israelites.

H2609.def: of Egyptian derivation; Chanes, a place in Egypt.

H2610.gloss: to soil, especially in a moral sense
H2610.def: a primitive root; to soil, especially in a moral sense.

H2611.def: from H2610 (חָנֵף); soiled (i.e. with sin), impious.

H2612.def: from H2610 (חָנֵף); moral filth, i.e. wickedness.

H2614.def: a primitive root (compare H2596 (חָנַךְ)); to be narrow; by implication, to throttle, or (reflex.) to choke oneself to death (by a rope).

H2615.def: probably from H2603 (חָנַן); favored; Channathon, a place in Palestine.

H2616.gloss: perhaps to bow (the neck only  in courtesy to an equal)
H2616.def: a primitive root; (compare H2603 (חָנַן)); (compare H1288 (בָרַךְ)); properly, perhaps to bow (the neck only  in courtesy to an equal), i.e. to be kind; also (by euphemistically, but rarely) to reprove.
H2616.kjv: shew self merciful, put to shame

H2617.def: from H2616; kindness; by implication (towards God) piety; rarely (by opposition) reproof.

H2618.def: the same as H2617 (חֵסֵד); favor; Chesed, an Israelite.

H2619.def: from H2617 (חֵסֵד) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has favored; Chasadjah, an Israelite.

H2620.def: a primitive root; (compare H982 (בָּטַח)); to flee for protection; figuratively, to confide in.

H2621.def: from H2620 (חָסָה); hopeful; Chosah, an Israelite; also a place in Palestine.

H2623.def: from H2616 (חָסַד); properly, kind, i.e. (religiously) pious (a saint).
H2623.kjv: godly (man), good, holy (one), merciful, saint, (un-) godly

H2624.gloss: the kind (maternal) bird, i.e. a stork
H2624.def: feminine of H2623 (חָסִיד); the kind (maternal) bird, i.e. a stork.

H2625.def: from H2628 (חָסַל); the ravager, i.e. a locust.

H2626.def: from H2630 (חָסַן); properly, firm, i.e. (by implication) mighty.

H2627.def: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to H2637 (חָסֵר); deficient.

H2628.def: a primitive root; to eat off.

H2629.def: a primitive root; to muzzle; by analogy, to stop the nose.

H2630.def: a primitive root; properly, to (be) compact; by implication, to hoard.

H2631.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H2630 (חָסַן); to hold in occupancy.

H2635.def: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to that of H2636 (חַסְפַּס); a clod.

H2636.def: reduplicated from an unused root meaning apparently to peel; a shred or scale.

H2637.def: a primitive root; to lack; by implication, to fail, want, lessen.
H2637.kjv: be abated, bereave, decrease, (cause to) fail, (have) lack, make lower, want

H2638.kjv: destitute, fail, lack, have need, void, want

H2641.def: from H2637 (חָסֵר); want; Chasrah, an Israelite.

H2643.def: from H2653 (חׇפַף) (in the moral sense of covered from soil); pure.

H2644.gloss: to cover, i.e. (in a sinister sense) to act covertly
H2644.def: an orthographical variation of H2645 (חָפָה); properly, to cover, i.e. (in a sinister sense) to act covertly.

H2645.def: a primitive root (compare H2644 (חָפָא), H2653 (חׇפַף)); to cover; by implication, to veil, to encase, protect.

H2647.def: the same as H2646 (חֻפָּה); Chuppah, an Israelite.

H2648.def: a primitive root; properly, to start up suddenly, i.e. (by implication) to hasten away, to fear.

H2650.def: plural of H2646 (חֻפָּה) (compare H2349 (חוּפָם)); Chuppim, an Israelite.

H2651.def: from an unused root of uncertain signification; a fist (only in the dual).

H2652.def: from H2651 (חֹפֶן); perhaps pugilist; Chophni, an Israelite.

H2653.def: a primitive root (compare H2645 (חָפָה), H3182 (יָחֵף)); to cover (in protection).

H2654.def: a primitive root; properly, to incline to; by implication (literally but rarely) to bend; figuratively, to be pleased with, desire.
H2654.kjv: any at all, (have, take) delight, desire, favour, like, move, be (well) pleased, have pleasure, will, would

H2655.kjv: delight in, desire, favour, please, have pleasure, whosoever would, willing, wish

H2656.def: from H2654 (חָפֵץ); pleasure; hence (abstractly) desire; concretely, a valuable thing; hence (by extension) a matter (as something in mind).
H2656.kjv: acceptable, delight(-some), desire, things desired, matter, pleasant(-ure), purpose, willingly

H2657.gloss: Cheptsi-bah, a fanciful name for Palestine
H2657.def: from H2656 (חֵפֶץ) with suffixes; my delight (is) in her; Cheptsi-bah, a fanciful name for Palestine.

H2658.def: a primitive root; properly, to pry into; by implication, to delve, to explore.

H2659.def: a primitive root (perhaps rather the same as H2658 (חָפַר) through the idea of detection); to blush; figuratively, to be ashamed, disappointed; causatively, to shame, reproach.
H2659.kjv: be ashamed, be confounded, be brought to confusion (unto shame), come (be put to) shame, bring reproach

H2660.def: from H2658 (חָפַר) or H2659 (חָפֵר); a pit of shame; Chepher, a place in Palestine; also the name of three Israelites.

H2661.gloss: a burrower, i.e. probably a rat
H2661.def: from H2658 (חָפַר); a hole; only in connection with H6512 (פֵּרָה), which ought rather to be joined as one word, thus חַפַרְפֵּרָה; by reduplication from H2658 (חָפַר); a burrower, i.e. probably a rat.

H2662.gloss: a Chephrite (collectively) or descendants of Chepher
H2662.def: patronymically from H2660 (חֵפֶר); a Chephrite (collectively) or descendants of Chepher.

H2663.def: dual of H2660 (חֵפֶר); double pit; Chapharajim, a place in Palestine.

H2664.def: a primitive root; to seek; causatively, to conceal oneself (i.e. let be sought), or mask.
H2664.kjv: change, (make) diligent (search), disquise self, hide, search (for, out)

H2665.def: from H2664 (חָפַשׂ); something covert, i.e. a trick.

H2666.def: a primitive root; to spread loose; figuratively, to manumit.

H2667.gloss: something spread loosely, i.e. a carpet
H2667.def: from H2666 (חָפַשׁ); something spread loosely, i.e. a carpet.

H2669.def: and חׇפְשִׁית; from H2666 (חָפַשׁ); (with H1004 (בַּיִת), a hospital); prostration by sickness.

H2670.def: from H2666 (חָפַשׁ); exempt (from bondage, tax or care).

H2671.def: from H2686 (חָצַץ); also by interchange for H6086 (עֵץ); properly, a piercer, i.e. an arrow; by implication, a wound; figuratively, (of God) thunderbolt; the shaft of aspear.
H2671.kjv: archer, arrow, dart, shaft, staff, wound

H2672.gloss: to cut or carve (wood, stone or other material)
H2672.def: or חָצֵב; a primitive root; to cut or carve (wood, stone or other material); by implication, to hew, split, square, quarry, engrave.
H2672.kjv: cut, dig, divide, grave, hew (out, -er), made, mason

H2673.gloss: to cut or split in two
H2673.def: a primitive root (compare H2086 (זֵד))); to cut or split in two; to halve.
H2673.kjv: divide, live out half, reach to the midst, participle

H2674.def: a collective form of H2691 (חָצֵר); village; Chatsor, the name (thus simply) of two places in Palestine and of one in Arabia.

H2675.gloss: new Chatsor, a place in Palestine
H2675.def: from H2674 (חָצוֹר) and a Aramaizing form of the feminine of H2319 (חָדָשׁ) (compare H2323 (חֲדָת)); new Chatsor, a place in Palestine.

H2676.def: from H2673 (חָצָה)lemma חָעָה ayin, corrected to חָצָה; the middle (of the night).

H2677.def: from H2673 (חָצָה)lemma חָעָה ayin, corrected to חָצָה; the half or middle.
H2677.kjv: half, middle, mid(-night), midst, part, two parts

H2678.def: or חֵצִי; prolongation from H2671 (חֵץ); an arrow.

H2679.def: from H2677 (חֵצִי) and the plural of H4496 (מְנוּחָה), with the article interposed; midst of the resting-places; Chatsi-ham-Menuchoth, an Israelite.

H2680.gloss: a Chatsi-ham-Menachtite or descendant of Chatsi-ham-Menuc
H2680.def: patronymically from H2679 (חֲצִי הַמְּנֻחוֹת); a Chatsi-ham-Menachtite or descendant of Chatsi-ham-Menuchoth.

H2681.def: a collateral form of H2691 (חָצֵר); a court or abode.

H2682.def: perhaps originally the same as H2681 (חָצִיר), from the greenness of a courtyard; grass; also a leek (collectively).

H2683.gloss: the bosom (as comprised between the arms)
H2683.def: from an unused root meaning to hold firmly; the bosom (as comprised between the arms).

H2684.gloss: the bosom (as comprised between the arms)
H2684.def: a collateral form of H2683 (חֵצֶן), and meaning the same; the bosom (as comprised between the arms).

H2685.def: (Aramaic) a primitive root; properly, to shear or cut close; figuratively, to be severe.

H2686.gloss: to chop into, pierce or sever
H2686.def: a primitive root (compare H2673 (חָצָה)lemma חָעָה ayin, corrected to חָצָה); also as denominative from H2671 (חֵץ); properly, to chop into, pierce or sever; hence, to curtail, to distribute (into ranks);  to shoot an arrow.
H2686.kjv: archer, bands, cut off in the midst

H2687.def: from H2687 (חָצָץ);  also like H2671 (חֵץ); properly, something cutting; hence, gravel (as grit); an arrow.

H2688.def: or חַצֲצֹן תָּמָר; from H2686 (חָצַץ) and H8558 (תָּמָר); division (i.e. perhaps row) of (the) palm-tree; Chatsetson-tamar, a place in Palestine.

H2689.gloss: a trumpet (from its sundered or quavering note)
H2689.def: by reduplication from H2690 (חָצַר); a trumpet (from its sundered or quavering note).

H2690.gloss: to trumpet, i.e. blow on that instrument
H2690.def: a primitive root; properly, to surround with a stockade, and thus separate from the open country; but used only in the reduplicated form חֲצֹצֵר; or (2 Chronicles 5:12) חֲצֹרֵר; as dem. from H2689 (חֲצֹצְרָה); to trumpet, i.e. blow on that instrument.

H2691.gloss: a yard (as inclosed by a fence)
H2691.def: (masculine and feminine); from H2690 (חָצַר) in its original sense; a yard (as inclosed by a fence); also a hamlet (as similarly surrounded with walls).

H2692.def: from H2691 (חָצֵר) and H146 (אַדָּר); (the) village of Addar; Chatsar-Addar, a place in Palestine.

H2693.def: from H2691 (חָצֵר) and a feminine of H1408 (גַּד); (the) village of (female) Fortune; Chatsar-Gaddah, a place in Palestine.

H2694.def: from H2691 (חָצֵר) and H8484 (תִּיכוֹן) with the article interposed; village of the middle; Chatsar-hat-Tikon, a place in Palestine.

H2695.def: by an orthographical variation for H2696 (חֶצְרוֹן); enclosure; Chetsro, an Israelite.

H2696.gloss: Chetsron, the name of a place in Palestine
H2696.def: from H2691 (חָצֵר); court-yard; Chetsron, the name of a place in Palestine; also of two Israelites.

H2697.gloss: a Chetsronite or (collectively) descendants of Chetsron
H2697.def: patronymically from H2696 (חֶצְרוֹן); a Chetsronite or (collectively) descendants of Chetsron.

H2698.def: feminine plural of H2691 (חָצֵר); yards; Chatseroth, a place in Palestine.

H2699.def: plural masculine of H2691 (חָצֵר); yards; Chatserim, a place in Palestine.

H2700.def: from H2691 (חָצֵר) and H4194 (מָוֶת); village of death; Chatsarmaveth, a place in Arabia.

H2701.def: from H2691 (חָצֵר) and H5484 (סוּסָה); village of cavalry; Chatsar-Susah, a place in Palestine.

H2702.def: from H2691 (חָצֵר) and the plural of H5483 (סוּס); village of horses; Chatsar-Susim, a place in Palestine.

H2703.def: from H2691 (חָצֵר) and a derivative of H5869 (עַיִן); village of springs; Chatsar-Enon, a place in Palestine.

H2704.def: from H2691 (חָצֵר) and the same as H5881 (עֵינָן); village of springs; Chatsar-Enan, a place in Palestine.

H2705.def: from H2691 (חָצֵר) and H7776 (שׁוּעָל); village of (the) fox; Chatsar-Shual, a place in Palestine.

H2706.def: from H2710 (חָקַק); an enactment; hence, an appointment (of time, space, quantity, labor or usage).
H2706.kjv: appointed, bound, commandment, convenient, custom, decree(-d), due, law, measure, necessary, ordinance(-nary), portion, set time, statute, task

H2707.def: a primitive root; to carve; by implication, to delineate; also to entrench.
H2707.kjv: carved work, portrayed, set a print

H2708.def: feminine of H2706 (חֹק), and meaning substantially the same; an enactment; hence, an appointment (of time, space, quantity, labor or usage).
H2708.kjv: appointed, custom, manner, ordinance, site, statute

H2709.def: from an unused root probably meaning to bend; crooked; Chakupha, one of the Nethinim.

H2710.gloss: to hack, i.e. engrave (Judges 5:14, to be a scribe simply)
H2710.def: a primitive root; properly, to hack, i.e. engrave (Judges 5:14, to be a scribe simply); by implication, to enact (laws being cut in stone or metal tablets in primitive times) or (gen.) prescribe.
H2710.kjv: appoint, decree, governor, grave, lawgiver, note, pourtray, print, set

H2711.def: from H2710 (חָקַק); an enactment, a resolution.

H2712.gloss: Chukkok or Chukok, a place in Palestine
H2712.def: or (fully) חוּקֹק; from H2710 (חָקַק); appointed; Chukkok or Chukok, a place in Palestine.

H2713.def: a primitive root; properly, to penetrate; hence, to examine intimately.
H2713.kjv: find out, (make) search (out), seek (out), sound, try

H2715.gloss: white or pure (from the cleansing or shining power of fire
H2715.def: or (fully) חוֹר; from H2787 (חָרַר); (compare H2751 (חֹרִי)); properly, white or pure (from the cleansing or shining power of fire; hence (figuratively) noble (in rank).

H2716.def: from an unused (and vulgar) root probably meaning to evacuate the bowels; excrement.

H2717.def: or חֲרֵב; a primitive root; to parch (through drought) i.e. (by analogy,) to desolate, destroy, kill.
H2717.kjv: decay, (be) desolate, destroy(-er), (be) dry (up), slay, surely, (lay, lie, make) waste

H2718.def: (Aramaic) a root corresponding to H2717 (חָרַב); to demolish.

H2719.def: from H2717 (חָרַב); drought; also a cutting instrument (from its destructive effect), as a knife, sword, or other sharp implement.
H2719.kjv: axe, dagger, knife, mattock, sword, tool

H2721.def: a collaterally form of H2719 (חֶרֶב); drought or desolation.
H2721.kjv: desolation, drought, dry, heat, utterly, waste

H2722.gloss: Choreb, a (generic) name for the Sinaitic mountains
H2722.def: from H2717 (חָרַב); desolate; Choreb, a (generic) name for the Sinaitic mountains.

H2723.def: feminine of H2721 (חֹרֶב); properly, drought, i.e. (by implication) a desolation.

H2726.gloss: Charbona or Charbonah, a eunuch of Xerxes
H2726.def: or חַרְבוֹנָה; of Persian origin; Charbona or Charbonah, a eunuch of Xerxes.

H2727.gloss: to leap suddenly, i.e. (by implication) to be dismayed
H2727.def: a primitive root; properly, to leap suddenly, i.e. (by implication) to be dismayed.

H2728.gloss: the leaping insect, i.e. a locust
H2728.def: from H2727 (חָרַג); the leaping insect, i.e. a locust.

H2729.def: a primitive root; to shudder with terror; hence, to fear; also to hasten (with anxiety).
H2729.kjv: be (make) afraid, be careful, discomfit, fray (away), quake, tremble

H2732.gloss: Charadah, a place in the Desert
H2732.def: the same as H2731 (חֲרָדָה); Charadah, a place in the Desert.

H2733.gloss: a Charodite, or inhabitant of Charod
H2733.def: patrial from a derivative of H2729 (חָרַד) (compare H5878 (עֵין חֲרֹד)); a Charodite, or inhabitant of Charod.

H2734.def: a primitive root (compare H2787 (חָרַר)); to glow or grow warm; figuratively (usually) to blaze up, of anger, zeal, jealousy.
H2734.kjv: be angry, burn, be displeased, earnestly, fret self, grieve, be (wax) hot, be incensed, kindle, very, be wroth. See H8474 (תַּחָרָה)

H2735.gloss: Chor-hag-Gidgad, a place in the Desert
H2735.def: from H2356 (חוֹר) and a collateral (masculine) form of H1412 (גֻּדְגֹּדָה), with the article interposed; hole of the cleft; Chor-hag-Gidgad, a place in the Desert.

H2736.def: ; from H2734 (חָרָה) and H3050 (יָהּ); fearing Jah; Charhajah, an Israelite.

H2737.gloss: pierced, i.e. a bead of pearl, gems or jewels (as strung)
H2737.def: from an unused root meaning to perforate; properly, pierced, i.e. a bead of pearl, gems or jewels (as strung).

H2738.gloss: pointed, i.e. a bramble or other thorny weed
H2738.def: or (shortened) חָרֻל; apparently, a passive participle of an unused root probably meaning to be prickly; properly, pointed, i.e. a bramble or other thorny weed.

H2739.def: from passive participle of H2763 (חָרַם) and H639 (אַף); snub-nosed; Charumaph, an Israelite.

H2740.def: or (shortened) חָרֹן; from H2734 (חָרָה); a burning of anger.

H2741.gloss: a Charuphite or inhabitant of Charuph (or Chariph)
H2741.def: a patrial from (probably) a collateral form of H2756 (חָרִיף); a Charuphite or inhabitant of Charuph (or Chariph).

H2742.def: or חָרֻץ; passive participle of H2782 (חָרַץ); properly, incised or (active) incisive; hence (as noun masculine or feminine) a trench (as dug), gold (as mined), a threshing-sledge (having sharp teeth); (figuratively) determination; also eager.
H2742.kjv: decision, diligent, (fine) gold, pointed things, sharp, threshing instrument, wall

H2743.def: the same as H2742 (חֲרוּץ); earnest; Charuts, an Israelite.

H2744.def: a fuller form of H2746 (חַרְחֻר); inflammation; Charchur, one of the Nethinim.

H2745.def: from the same as H2775 (חֶרֶס); perhaps shining; Charchas, an Israelite.

H2747.def: from a primitive root meaning to engrave; a chisel or graver; also a style forwriting.

H2748.gloss: a horoscopist (as drawing magical lines or circles)
H2748.def: from the same as H2747 (חֶרֶט); a horoscopist (as drawing magical lines or circles).

H2749.gloss: a horoscopist (as drawing magical lines or circles)
H2749.def: (Aramaic) the same as H2748 (חַרְטֹם); a horoscopist (as drawing magical lines or circles).

H2750.def: from H2734 (חָרָה); a burning (i.e. intense) anger.

H2751.def: from the same as H2353 (חוּר); white bread.

H2752.def: from H2356 (חוֹר); cave-dweller or troglodyte; a Chorite or aboriginal Idumaean.

H2753.gloss: Chori, the name of two men
H2753.def: or חוֹרִי; the same as H2752 (חֹרִי); Chori, the name of two men.

H2754.gloss: cut out (or hollow), i.e. (by implication) a pocket
H2754.def: or חָרִט; from the same as H2747 (חֶרֶט); properly, cut out (or hollow), i.e. (by implication) a pocket.

H2755.def: from the plural of H2716 (חֶרֶא) and the plural of H3123 (יוֹנָה); or perhaps rather the plural of a single word חֲרָאיוֹן, probably a kind of vegetable; excrements of doves {or a vegetable.

H2756.gloss: Chariph, the name of two Israelites
H2756.def: from H2778 (חָרַף); autumnal; Chariph, the name of two Israelites.

H2757.def: or חֲרִץ; from H2782 (חָרַץ); (compare H2742 (חֲרוּץ)); properly, incisure or (passively) incised; hence, a threshing-sledge (with sharp teeth); also a slice (as cut).

H2758.def: from H2790 (חָרַשׁ); ploughing or its season.

H2759.def: from H2790 (חָרַשׁ) in the sense of silence; quiet, i.e. sultry (as feminine noun, the sirocco or hot east wind).

H2760.gloss: to braid (i.e. to entangle or snare) or catch (game) in anet
H2760.def: a primitive root; to braid (i.e. to entangle or snare) or catch (game) in anet.

H2761.def: (Aramaic) a root probably allied to the equivalent of H2787 (חָרַר); to scorch.

H2762.def: from H2760 (חָרַךְ); properly, a net, i.e. (by analogy) lattice.

H2763.def: a primitive root; to seclude; specifically (by a ban) to devote to religious uses (especially destruction); physical and reflexive, to be blunt as to the nose.
H2763.kjv: make accursed, consecrate, (utterly) destroy, devote, forfeit, have a flat nose, utterly (slay, make away)

H2764.gloss: physical (as shutting in) a net (either literally or figu
H2764.def: or (Zechariah 14:11) חֶרֶם; from H2763 (חָרַם); physical (as shutting in) a net (either literally or figuratively); usually a doomed object; abstractly extermination.
H2764.kjv: (ac-) curse(-d, -d thing), dedicated thing, things which should have been utterly destroyed, (appointed to) utter destruction, devoted (thing), net

H2765.def: from H2763 (חָרַם); devoted; Chorem, a place in Palestine.

H2766.def: from H2763 (חָרַם); snub-nosed; Charim, an Israelite.

H2767.def: from H2763 (חָרַם); devoted; Chormah, a place in Palestine.

H2768.def: from H2763 (חָרַם); abrupt; Chermon, a mount of Palestine.

H2769.def: plural of H2768 (חֶרְמוֹן); Hermons, i.e. its peaks.

H2771.gloss: Charan, the name of a man and also of a place
H2771.def: from H2787 (חָרַר); parched; Charan, the name of a man and also of a place.

H2772.gloss: a Choronite or inhabitant of Choronaim
H2772.def: patrial from H2773 (חֹרֹנַיִם); a Choronite or inhabitant of Choronaim.

H2773.def: dual of a derivative from H2356 (חוֹר); double cave-town; Choronajim, a place in Moab.

H2774.def: of uncertain derivation; Charnepher, an Israelite.

H2775.def: or (with a directive enclitic) חַרְסָה; from an unused root meaning to scrape; also perhaps from the mediating idea of H2777 (חַרְסוּת); the itch; the sun.

H2776.def: the same as H2775 (חֶרֶס); shining; Cheres, a mountain in Palestine.

H2777.gloss: a potsherd, i.e. (by implication) a pottery
H2777.def: from H2775 (חֶרֶס) (apparently in the sense of a red tile used for scraping); a potsherd, i.e. (by implication) a pottery; the name of a gate at Jerusalem.

H2778.def: a primitive root; also  denominative (from H2779 (חֹרֶף)); to pull off, i.e. (by implication) to expose (as by stripping); specifically, to betroth (as if a surrender); figuratively, to carp at, i.e. defame; to spend the winter.
H2778.kjv: betroth, blaspheme, defy, jeopard, rail, reproach, upbraid

H2779.def: from H2778 (חָרַף); properly, the crop gathered, i.e. (by implication) the autumn (and winter) season; figuratively, ripeness of age.

H2780.def: from H2778 (חָרַף); reproachful; Chareph, an Israelite.

H2781.def: from H2778 (חָרַף); contumely, disgrace, the pudenda.

H2782.gloss: to point sharply, i.e. (literally) to wound
H2782.def: a primitive root; properly, to point sharply, i.e. (literally) to wound; figuratively, to be alert, to decide.
H2782.kjv: bestir self, decide, decree, determine, maim, move

H2783.gloss: the loin (as the seat of strength)
H2783.def: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to H2782 (חָרַץ) in the sense of vigor; the loin (as the seat of strength).

H2784.def: of uncertain derivation; a fetter; figuratively, a pain.

H2785.gloss: a sour grape (as sharp in taste)
H2785.def: from H2782 (חָרַץ); a sour grape (as sharp in taste).

H2786.def: a primitive root; to grate the teeth.

H2787.def: a primitive root; to glow, i.e. literally (to melt, burn, dry up) or figuratively (to show or incite passion).

H2789.def: a collateral form mediating between H2775 (חֶרֶס) and H2791 (חֶרֶשׁ); a piece of pottery.

H2790.gloss: to scratch, i.e. (by implication) to engrave, plough
H2790.def: a primitive root; to scratch, i.e. (by implication) to engrave, plough; hence (from the use of tools) to fabricate (of any material); figuratively, to devise (in a bad sense); hence (from the idea of secrecy) to be silent, to let alone; hence (by implication) to be deaf (as an accompaniment of dumbness).
H2790.kjv: altogether, cease, conceal, be deaf, devise, ear, graven, imagine, leave off speaking, hold peace, plow(-er, man), be quiet, rest, practise secretly, keep silence, be silent, speak not a word, be still, hold tongue, worker

H2791.def: from H2790 (חָרַשׁ); magical craft; also silence.

H2792.def: the same as H2791 (חֶרֶשׁ); Cheresh, a Levite.

H2793.gloss: a forest (perhaps as furnishing the material for fabric)
H2793.def: from H2790 (חָרַשׁ); a forest (perhaps as furnishing the material for fabric).

H2794.def: active participle of H2790 (חָרַשׁ); a fabricator or mechanic.

H2795.def: from H2790 (חָרַשׁ); deaf (whether literally or spiritual).

H2796.def: from H2790 (חָרַשׁ); a fabricator or any material.
H2796.kjv: artificer, ([phrase]) carpenter, craftsman, engraver, maker, mason, skilful, ([phrase]) smith, worker, workman, such as wrought

H2797.def: from H2792 (חֶרֶשׁ); magician; Charsha, one of the Nethinim.

H2798.gloss: mechanics, the name of a valley in Jerusalem
H2798.def: plural of H2796 (חָרָשׁ); mechanics, the name of a valley in Jerusalem.

H2800.def: the same as H2799 (חֲרֹשֶׁת); Charosheth, a place in Palestine.

H2802.def: from H2801 (חָרַת) (but equivalent to H2793 (חֹרֶשׁ)); forest; Chereth, a thicket in Palestine.

H2803.def: a primitive root; properly, to plait or interpenetrate, i.e. (literally) to weave or (generally) to fabricate; figuratively, to plot or contrive (usually in a malicious sense); hence (from the mental effort) to think, regard, value, compute.
H2803.kjv: (make) account (of), conceive, consider, count, cunning (man, work, workman), devise, esteem, find out, forecast, hold, imagine, impute, invent, be like, mean, purpose, reckon(-ing be made), regard, think

H2805.gloss: a belt or strap (as being interlaced)
H2805.def: from H2803 (חָשַׁב); a belt or strap (as being interlaced).

H2806.def: from H2803 (חָשַׁב) and H1777 (דִּין); considerate judge; Chasbaddanah, an Israelite.

H2807.def: from H2803 (חָשַׁב); estimation; Cashubah, an Israelite.

H2808.def: from H2803 (חָשַׁב); properly, contrivance; by implication, intelligence.

H2809.gloss: Cheshbon, a place East of the Jordan
H2809.def: the same as H2808 (חֶשְׁבּוֹן); Cheshbon, a place East of the Jordan.

H2810.def: from H2803 (חָשַׁב); a contrivance, i.e. actual (a warlike machine) or mental (a machination).

H2811.gloss: Chashabjah, the name of nine Israelites
H2811.def: or חֲשַׁבְיָהוּ; from H2803 (חָשַׁב) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has regarded; Chashabjah, the name of nine Israelites.

H2812.def: feminine of H2808 (חֶשְׁבּוֹן); inventiveness; Chashnah, an Israelite.

H2813.gloss: Chashabnejah, the name of two Israelites
H2813.def: from H2808 (חֶשְׁבּוֹן) and H3050 (יָהּ); thought of Jah; Chashabnejah, the name of two Israelites.

H2814.def: a primitive root; to hush or keep quiet.
H2814.kjv: hold peace, keep silence, be silent, (be) still

H2815.gloss: Chashshub, the name of two or three Israelites
H2815.def: from H2803 (חָשַׁב); intelligent; Chashshub, the name of two or three Israelites.

H2816.def: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to H2821 (חָשַׁךְ); the dark.

H2817.def: or חֲשֻׂפָא; from H2834 (חָשַׂף); nakedness; Chasupha, one of the Nethinim.

H2818.gloss: to be necessary (from the idea of convenience) or (transi
H2818.def: (Aramaic) a collateral root to one corresponding to H2363 (חוּשׁ) in the sense of readiness; to be necessary (from the idea of convenience) or (transitively) to need.

H2819.def: from a root corresponding to H2818 (חֲשַׁח); necessity.

H2820.def: a primitive root; also interchangeable  with H2821 (חָשַׁךְ); to restrain or (reflex.) refrain; by implication, to refuse, spare, preserve; to observe.
H2820.kjv: assuage, darken, forbear, hinder, hold back, keep (back), punish, refrain, reserve, spare, withhold

H2821.def: a primitive root; to be dark (as withholding light); transitively, to darken.
H2821.kjv: be black, be (make) dark, darken, cause darkness, be dim, hide

H2822.def: from H2821 (חָשַׁךְ); the dark; hence (literally) darkness; figuratively, misery, destruction, death, ignorance, sorrow, wickedness.

H2825.def: or חֲשֵׁיכָהxlit chăshêkâh corrected to chăshêykâh; from H2821 (חָשַׁךְ); darkness; figuratively, misery.

H2826.gloss: to make (intrans. be) unsteady, i.e. weak
H2826.def: a primitive root; to make (intrans. be) unsteady, i.e. weak.

H2827.def: (Aramaic) a root corresponding to H2826 (חָשַׁל); to weaken, i.e. crush.

H2828.gloss: Chashum, the name of two or three Israelites
H2828.def: from the same as H2831 (חַשְׁמַן); enriched; Chashum, the name of two or three Israelites.

H2829.def: the same as H2831 (חַשְׁמַן); opulent; Cheshmon, a place in Palestine.

H2830.gloss: probably bronze or polished spectrum metal
H2830.def: of uncertain derivation; probably bronze or polished spectrum metal.

H2831.def: from an unused root (probably meaning firm or capacious in resources); apparently; wealthy.

H2832.gloss: Chasmonah, a place in the Desert
H2832.def: feminine of H2831 (חַשְׁמַן); fertile; Chasmonah, a place in the Desert.

H2833.gloss: perhaps a pocket (as holding the Urim and Thummim)
H2833.def: from an unused root probably meaning to contain or sparkle; perhaps a pocket (as holding the Urim and Thummim), or rich (as containing gems), used only of the gorget of the highpriest.

H2834.def: a primitive root; to strip off, i.e. generally to make naked (for exertion or in disgrace), to drain away or bail up (a liquid).
H2834.kjv: make bare, clean, discover, draw out, take, uncover

H2835.def: from H2834 (חָשַׂף); properly, drawn off, i.e. separated; hence, a small company (as divided from the rest).

H2836.gloss: to cling, i.e. join, (figuratively) to love, delight in
H2836.def: a primitive root; also interchangeable for H2820 (חָשַׂךְ); to cling, i.e. join, (figuratively) to love, delight in; elliptically; to deliver.
H2836.kjv: have a delight, (have a) desire, fillet, long, set (in) love

H2838.def: or חָשׁוּק; past participle of H2836 (חָשַׁק); attached, i.e. a fence-rail or rod connecting the posts or pillars.

H2839.def: from H2836 (חָשַׁק); conjoined, i.e. a wheel-spoke or rod connecting the hub with the rim.

H2840.def: from an unused root meaning to bind together; combined, i.e. the nave or hub of awheel (as holding the spokes together).

H2841.gloss: a combination or gathering, i.e. of watery clouds
H2841.def: from the same as H2840 (חִשֻּׁר); properly, a combination or gathering, i.e. of watery clouds.

H2842.def: by variation for H7179 (קַשׁ); dry grass.

H2843.gloss: a Chushathite or descendant of Chushah
H2843.def: patronymically from H2364 (חוּשָׁה); a Chushathite or descendant of Chushah.

H2844.def: from H2865 (חָתַת); concretely, crushed; also afraid; abstractly, terror.

H2845.def: from H2865 (חָתַת); terror; Cheth, an aboriginal Canaanite.

H2846.def: a primitive root; to lay hold of; especially to pick up fire.

H2848.def: from H2853 (חָתַל); swathed, i.e. a bandage.

H2850.gloss: a Chittite, or descendant of Cheth
H2850.def: patronymically from H2845 (חֵת); a Chittite, or descendant of Cheth.

H2852.gloss: to cut off, i.e. (figuratively) to decree
H2852.def: a primitive root; properly, to cut off, i.e. (figuratively) to decree.

H2855.def: from H2853 (חָתַל); enswathed; Chethlon, a place in Palestine.

H2856.def: a primitive root; to close up; especially to seal.
H2856.kjv: make an end, mark, seal (up), stop

H2857.def: (Aramaic) a root corresponding to H2856 (חָתַם); to seal.

H2858.def: feminine active participle of H2856 (חָתַם); a seal.

H2859.gloss: to give (a daughter) away in marriage
H2859.def: a primitive root; to give (a daughter) away in marriage; hence (generally) to contract affinity by marriage.
H2859.kjv: join in affinity, father in law, make marriages, mother in law, son in law

H2860.gloss: a relative by marriage (especially through the bride)
H2860.def: from H2859 (חָתַן); a relative by marriage (especially through the bride); figuratively, a circumcised child (as a species of religious espousal).

H2863.def: from H2862 (חָתַף); properly, rapine; figuratively, robbery.

H2864.gloss: to force a passage, as by burglary
H2864.def: a primitive root; to force a passage, as by burglary; figuratively, with oars.

H2865.def: a primitive root; properly, to prostrate; hence, to break down, either (literally) by violence, or (figuratively) by confusion and fear.
H2865.kjv: abolish, affright, be (make) afraid, amaze, beat down, discourage, (cause to) dismay, go down, scare, terrify

H2867.def: the same as H2866 (חֲתַת); Chathath, an Israelite.

H2870.gloss: Tabeel, the name of a Syrian and of a Persian
H2870.def: from H2895 (טוֹב) and H410 (אֵל); pleasing (to) God; Tabeel, the name of a Syrian and of a Persian.

H2871.gloss: dyed, i.e. a turban (probably as of colored stuff)
H2871.def: passive participle of H2881 (טָבַל); properly, dyed, i.e. a turban (probably as of colored stuff).

H2872.def: from an unused root meaning to pile up; properly, accumulated; i.e. (by implication) a summit.

H2873.def: a primitive root; to slaughter (animals or men).

H2874.def: from H2873 (טָבַח); properly, something slaughtered; hence, a beast (or meat, as butchered); abstractly butchery (or concretely, a place of slaughter).

H2875.gloss: Tebach, the name of a Mesopotamian and of an Israelite
H2875.def: the same as H2874 (טֶבַח); massacre; Tebach, the name of a Mesopotamian and of an Israelite.

H2876.def: from H2873 (טָבַח); properly, a butcher; hence, a lifeguardsman (because he was acting as an executioner); also a cook (usually slaughtering the animal for food).

H2877.def: (Aramaic) the same as H2876 (טַבָּח); a lifeguardsman.

H2878.def: feminine of H2874 (טֶבַח) and meaning the same; properly, something slaughtered; hence, a beast (or meat, as butchered); abstractly butchery (or concretely, a place of slaughter).

H2879.def: feminine of H2876 (טַבָּח); a female cook.

H2880.def: from H2878 (טִבְחָה); slaughter; Tibchath, a place in Syria.

H2881.def: a primitive root; to dip, to immerse.

H2882.def: from H2881 (טָבַל) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has dipped; Tebaljah, an Israelite.

H2884.def: plural of H2885 (טַבַּעַת); rings; Tabbaoth, one of the Nethinim.

H2885.gloss: a seal (as sunk into the wax), i.e. signet (for sealing)
H2885.def: from H2883 (טָבַע); properly, a seal (as sunk into the wax), i.e. signet (for sealing); hence (generally) a ring of any kind.

H2886.def: from H2895 (טוֹב) and H7417 (רִמּוֹן); pleasing (to) Rimmon; Tabrimmon, a Syrian.

H2887.def: probably of foreign derivation; Tebeth, the tenth Hebrew month.

H2888.gloss: Tabbath, a place East of the Jordan
H2888.def: of uncertain derivation; Tabbath, a place East of the Jordan.

H2889.gloss: pure (in a physical, chemical, ceremonial or moral sense)
H2889.def: or טָהֹר; from H2891 (טָהֵר); pure (in a physical, chemical, ceremonial or moral sense).

H2891.gloss: to be pure (physical sound, clear, unadulterated
H2891.def: a primitive root; properly, to be bright; i.e. (by implication); to be pure (physical sound, clear, unadulterated; Levitically, uncontaminated; morally, innocent or holy).
H2891.kjv: be (make, make self, pronounce) clean, cleanse (self), purge, purify(-ier, self)

H2892.def: from H2891 (טָהֵר); literally brightness; ceremonially purification.

H2893.def: feminine of H2892 (טֹהַר); ceremonial purification; moral purity.

H2894.def: a primitive root; to sweep away.

H2895.def: a primitive root,; to be (transitively, do or make) good (or well) in the widest sense.
H2895.kjv: be (do) better, cheer, be (do, seem) good, (make) goodly, please, (be, do, go, play) well

H2896.def: from H2895; good (as an adjective) in the widest sense; used likewise as a noun.

H2897.gloss: Tob, a region apparently East of the Jordan
H2897.def: the same as H2896 (טוֹב); good; Tob, a region apparently East of the Jordan.

H2898.def: from H2895 (טוֹב); good (as a noun), in the widest sense, especially goodness (superlative concretely, the best), beauty, gladness, welfare.
H2898.kjv: fair, gladness, good(-ness, thing, -s), joy, go well with

H2899.def: from H2896 (טוֹב) and H138 (אֲדֹנִיָּה); pleasing (to) Adonijah; Tob-Adonijah, an Israelite.

H2900.gloss: Tobijah, the name of three Israelites and of one Samaritan
H2900.def: or טוֹבִיָּהוּ; from H2896 (טוֹב) and H3050 (יָהּ); goodness of Jehovah; Tobijah, the name of three Israelites and of one Samaritan.

H2902.def: a primitive root; to smear, especially with lime.

H2903.def: from an unused root meaning to go around or bind; a fillet for the forehead.

H2904.def: a primitive root; to pitch over or reel; hence (transitively) to cast down or out.
H2904.kjv: carry away, (utterly) cast (down, forth, out), send out

H2905.def: from an unused root meaning to range in a regular manner; a row; hence, a wall.

H2906.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H6697 (צוּר); a rock or hill.

H2907.gloss: to pounce as a bird of prey
H2907.def: a primitive root; to pounce as a bird of prey.

H2908.def: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to H2901 (טָוָה); hunger (as twisting).

H2909.gloss: to stretch a bow, as an archer
H2909.def: a primitive root; to stretch a bow, as an archer.

H2910.gloss: (in the plural only) the kidneys (as being covered)
