H2910.def: from H2909 (טָחָה) (or H2902 (טוּחַ)) in the sense of overlaying; (in the plural only) the kidneys (as being covered); hence (figuratively) the inmost thought.

H2911.def: from H2912 (טָחַן); a hand mill; hence, a millstone.

H2912.def: a primitive root; to grind meal; hence, to be aconcubine (that being their employment).

H2913.def: from H2912 (טָחַן); a hand mill; hence (figuratively) chewing.

H2914.gloss: a boil or ulcer (from the inflammation)
H2914.def: from an unused root meaning to burn; a boil or ulcer (from the inflammation), especially a tumorin the anus or pudenda (the piles).

H2915.def: from (the equiv. of) H2902 (טוּחַ); mortar or plaster.

H2916.def: from an unused root meaning apparently to be sticky (rather perb. a demonstrative); from H2894 (טוּא), through the idea of dirt to be swept away); mud or clay; figuratively, calamity.

H2917.def: (Aramaic) perhaps, by interchange, for a word corresponding to H2916 (טִיט); clay.

H2918.def: feminine of (an equivalent to) H2905 (טוּר); a wall; hence, a fortress or a hamlet.

H2920.def: (Aramaic) the same as H2919 (טַל); dew (as covering vegetation).

H2921.def: a primitive root; properly, to cover with pieces; i.e. (by implication) to spot or variegate (as tapestry).

H2922.def: apparently from H2921 (טָלָא) in the (orig.) sense of covering (for protection); (compare H2924 (טָלֶה)); a lamb.

H2923.def: from the plural of H2922 (טְלָא); lambs; Telaim, a place in Palestine.

H2924.def: by variation for H2922 (טְלָא); a lamb.

H2926.def: a primitive root; properly, to strew over, i.e. (by implication) to cover in or plate (with beams).

H2927.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H2926 (טָלַל); to cover with shade.

H2928.def: from an unused root meaning to break up or treat violently; oppression; Telem, the name of a place in Idumaea, also of a temple doorkeeper.

H2929.def: from the same as H2728 (חָרְגֹּל); oppressive; Talmon, a temple doorkeeper.

H2930.def: a primitive root; to be foul, especially in a ceremial or moral sense (contaminated).
H2930.kjv: defile (self), pollute (self), be (make, make self, pronounce) unclean, utterly

H2931.def: from H2930 (טָמֵא); foul in a religious sense.

H2933.gloss: to be impure in a religious sense
H2933.def: a collateral form of H2930 (טָמֵא); to be impure in a religious sense.

H2934.def: a primitive root; to hide (by covering over).

H2935.def: from an unused root probably meaning to weave; a basket (of interlaced osiers).

H2937.def: a primitive root; to wander; causatively to lead astray.

H2938.def: a primitive root; to taste; figuratively, to perceive.

H2939.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H2938 (טָעַם); to taste; causatively to feed.

H2940.def: from H2938 (טָעַם); properly, a taste, i.e. (figuratively) perception; by implication, intelligence; transitively, a mandate.
H2940.kjv: advice, behaviour, decree, discretion, judgment, reason, taste, understanding

H2941.def: (Aramaic) from H2939 (טְעַם); compare H2940 (טַעַם)); properly, a taste, i.e.  ajudicial sentence.
H2941.kjv: account, to be commanded, commandment, matter

H2942.def: (Aramaic) from H2939 (טְעַם), and equivalent to H2941 (טַעַם); properly, flavor; figuratively, judgment (both subjective and objective); hence, account (both subjectively and objectively).
H2942.kjv: chancellor, command, commandment, decree, regard, taste, wisdom

H2943.def: a primitive root; to load a beast.

H2945.gloss: a family (mostly used collectively in the singular)
H2945.def: from H2952 (טָפַף) (perhaps referring to the tripping gait of children); a family (mostly used collectively in the singular).

H2946.gloss: to flatten out or extend (as a tent)
H2946.def: a primitive root; or perhaps a denominative from H2947 (טֵפַח), from dandling on the palms; to flatten out or extend (as a tent); figuratively, to nurse achild (as promotive of growth);.

H2947.def: from H2946 (טָפַח); a spread of the hand, i.e. a palm-breadth (not 'span' of the fingers); architecturally, a corbel (as a supporting palm).

H2948.def: from H2946 (טָפַח) (the same as H2947 (טֵפַח)); a spread of the hand, i.e. a palm-breadth (not 'span' of the fingers); architecturally, a corbel (as a supporting palm).

H2950.def: a primitive root; properly, to stick on as apatch; figuratively, to impute falsely.

H2951.def: of foreign derivation; a military governor.

H2952.def: a primitive root; apparently; to trip (with short steps) coquettishly.

H2953.def: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to H6852 (צָפַר), and meaning the same as H6856 (צִפֹּרֶן); a finger-nail; also a hoof or claw.

H2954.def: a primitive root; properly, apparently to be thick; figuratively, to be stupid.

H2955.def: probably from H5197 (נָטַף); a dropping (of ointment); Taphath, an Israelitess.

H2956.def: a primitive root; to drive on; figuratively, to follow close.

H2958.def: a variation of H2962 (טֶרֶם); not yet.

H2961.def: from an unused root apparently meaning to be moist; properly, dripping; hence, fresh (i.e. recently made such).

H2962.def: from an unused root apparently meaning to interrupt or suspend; properly, non-occurrence; used adverbially, not yet or before.

H2963.gloss: to pluck off or pull to pieces
H2963.def: a primitive root; to pluck off or pull to pieces; causatively to supply with food (as in morsels).
H2963.kjv: catch, without doubt, feed, ravin, rend in pieces, surely, tear (in pieces)

H2964.def: from H2963 (טָרַף); something torn, i.e. a fragment, e.g. a fresh leaf, prey, food.

H2965.def: from H2963 (טָרַף); recently torn off, i.e. fresh.

H2966.gloss: prey, i.e. flocks devoured by animals
H2966.def: feminine (collectively) of H2964 (טֶרֶף); prey, i.e. flocks devoured by animals.
H2966.kjv: ravin, (that which was) torn (of beasts, in pieces)

H2967.gloss: a Tarpelite (collectively) or inhabitants of Tarpel
H2967.def: (Aramaic) from a name of foreign derivation; a Tarpelite (collectively) or inhabitants of Tarpel, a place in Assyria.

H2969.def: a primitive root; to be suitable.

H2970.gloss: Jaazanjah, the name of four Israelites
H2970.def: or יַאֲזַנְיָהוּ; from H238 (אָזַן) and H3050 (יָהּ); heard of Jah; Jaazanjah, the name of four Israelites.

H2971.gloss: Jair, the name of four Israelites
H2971.def: from H215 (אוֹר); enlightener; Jair, the name of four Israelites.

H2972.gloss: a Jairite or descendant of Jair
H2972.def: patronymically from H2971 (יָאִיר); a Jairite or descendant of Jair.

H2973.gloss: to be slack, i.e. (figuratively) to be foolish
H2973.def: a primitive root; properly, to be slack, i.e. (figuratively) to be foolish.

H2974.def: a primitive root (probably rather the same as H2973 (יָאַל) through the idea of mental weakness); properly, to yield, especially assent; hence (pos.) to undertake as an act of volition.
H2974.kjv: assay, begin, be content, please, take upon, willingly, would

H2975.gloss: a channel, e.g. a fosse, canal, shaft
H2975.def: of Egyptian origin; a channel, e.g. a fosse, canal, shaft; specifically the Nile, as the one river of Egypt, including its collateral trenches; also the Tigris, as the main river of Assyria.

H2976.def: a primitive root; to desist, i.e. (figuratively) to despond.
H2976.kjv: (cause to) despair, one that is desperate, be no hope

H2977.gloss: Joshijah, the name of two Israelites
H2977.def: or יֹאשִׁיָּהוּ; from the same root as H803 (אֲשׁוּיָה) and H3050 (יָהּ); founded of Jah; Joshijah, the name of two Israelites.

H2979.def: from the same as H871 (אֲתָרִים); stepping; Jeatherai, an Israelite.

H2981.gloss: produce, i.e. a crop or (figuratively) wealth
H2981.def: from H2986 (יָבַל); produce, i.e. a crop or (figuratively) wealth.

H2982.gloss: Jebus, the original name of Jerusalem
H2982.def: from H947 (בּוּס); trodden, i.e. threshing-place; Jebus, the original name of Jerusalem.

H2983.gloss: a Jebusite or inhabitant of Jebus
H2983.def: patrial from H2982 (יְבוּס); a Jebusite or inhabitant of Jebus.

H2984.def: from H977 (בָּחַר); choice; Jibchar, an Israelite.

H2985.gloss: Jabin, the name of two Canaanitish kings
H2985.def: from H995 (בִּין); intelligent; Jabin, the name of two Canaanitish kings.

H2986.def: a primitive root; properly, to flow; causatively, to bring (especially with pomp).

H2989.def: the same as H2988 (יָבָל); Jabal, an antediluvian.

H2991.def: from H1104 (בָּלַע) and H5971 (עַם); devouring people; Jibleam, a place in Palestine.

H2992.def: a primitive root of doubtful meaning; used only as a denominative from H2993 (יָבָם); to marry a (deceased) brother's widow.
H2992.kjv: perform the duty of a husband's brother, marry

H2993.def: from (the orig. of) H2992 (יָבַם); a brotherin-law.

H2994.def: feminine participle of H2992 (יָבַם); a sister-in-law.

H2995.gloss: Jabneel, the name of two places in Palestine
H2995.def: from H1129 (בָּנָה) and H410 (אֵל); built of God; Jabneel, the name of two places in Palestine.

H2996.def: from H1129 (בָּנָה); a building; Jabneh, a place in Palestine.

H2997.def: from H1129 (בָּנָה) and H3050 (יָהּ); built of Jah; Jibnejah, an Israelite.

H2998.def: from H1129 (בָּנָה) and H3050 (יָהּ); building of Jah; Jibnijah, an Israelite.

H2999.gloss: Jabbok, a river east of the Jordan
H2999.def: probably from H1238 (בָּקַק); pouring forth; Jabbok, a river east of the Jordan.

H3000.def: from H1288 (בָרַךְ) and H3050 (יָהּ); blessed of Jah; Jeberekjah, an Israelite.

H3001.gloss: to be ashamed, confused or disappointed
H3001.def: a primitive root; to be ashamed, confused or disappointed; also (as failing) to dry up (as water) or wither (as herbage).
H3001.kjv: be ashamed, clean, be confounded, (make) dry (up), (do) shame(-fully), utterly, wither (away)

H3003.gloss: Jobesh, the name of an Israelite and of a place in Palestine
H3003.def: the same as H3002 (יָבֵשׁ) (also יָבֵישׁ; often with the addition of H1568 (גִּלְעָד), i.e. Jabesh of Gilad); Jobesh, the name of an Israelite and of a place in Palestine.

H3005.def: from the same as H1314 (בֶּשֶׂם); fragrant; Jibsam, an Israelite.

H3006.def: a variation of H3004 (יַבָּשָׁה); dry ground.

H3008.gloss: Jigal, the name of three Israelites
H3008.def: from H1350 (גָּאַל); avenger; Jigal, the name of three Israelites.

H3009.def: a primitive root; to dig or plow.

H3011.gloss: Jogbehah, a place East of the Jordan
H3011.def: feminine from H1361 (גָּבַהּ); hillock; Jogbehah, a place East of the Jordan.

H3012.def: from H1431 (גָּדַל) and H3050 (יָהּ); magnified of Jah; Jigdaljah, an Israelite.

H3013.kjv: afflict, cause grief, grieve, sorrowful, vex

H3014.def: a primitive root (probably rather the same as H3013 (יָגָה) through the common idea of dissatisfaction); to push away.

H3017.def: probably from H1481 (גּוּר); a lodging; Jagur, a place in Palestine.

H3018.def: from H3021 (יָגַע); toil; hence, a work, produce, property (as the result of labor).

H3020.def: from H1540 (גָּלָה); exiled; Jogli, an Israelite.

H3021.def: a primitive root; properly, to gasp; hence, to be exhausted, to tire, to toil.

H3022.def: from H3021 (יָגַע); earnings (as the product of toil).

H3026.gloss: Jegar-Sahadutha, a cairn East of the Jordan
H3026.def: (Aramaic) from a word derived from an unused root (meaning to gather) and a derivation of a root corresponding to H7717 (שָׂהֵד); heap of the testimony; Jegar-Sahadutha, a cairn East of the Jordan.

H3027.def: a primitive word; in distinction from H3709 (כַּף), the closed one); used (as noun, adverb, etc.) in a great variety of applications, both literally and figuratively, both proximate and remote (as follows); a hand (the open one (indicating power, means, direction, etc.),.
H3027.kjv: (be) able, about, armholes, at, axletree, because of, beside, border, bounty, broad, (broken-) handed, by, charge, coast, consecrate, creditor, custody, debt, dominion, enough, fellowship, force, from, hand(-staves, -y work), he, himself, in, labour, large, ledge, (left-) handed, means, mine, ministry, near, of, order, ordinance, our, parts, pain, power, presumptuously, service, side, sore, state, stay, draw with strength, stroke, swear, terror, thee, by them, themselves, thine own, thou, through, throwing, thumb, times, to, under, us, wait on, (way-) side, where, wide, with (him, me, you), work, yield, yourselves

H3028.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H3027 (יָד); a hand (the open one (indicating power, means, direction, etc.).

H3030.def: of uncertain derivation; Jidalah, a place in Palestine.

H3031.def: from the same as H1706 (דְּבַשׁ); perhaps honeyed; Jidbash, an Israelite.

H3032.gloss: to handle, i.e. to throw, e.g. lots
H3032.def: a primitive root; (compare H3034 (יָדָה)); properly, to handle, i.e. to throw, e.g. lots.

H3033.def: from H3039 (יְדִיד); properly, affection; concretely, a darling object.

H3034.gloss: physically, to throw (a stone, an arrow) at or away
H3034.def: a primitive root; used only as denominative from H3027 (יָד); literally, to use (i.e. hold out) the hand; physically, to throw (a stone, an arrow) at or away; especially to revere or worship (with extended hands); intensively, to bemoan (by wringing the hands).

H3035.def: from H3034 (יָדָה); praised; Jiddo, an Israelite.

H3036.def: from H3034 (יָדָה); thankful; Jadon, an Israelite.

H3037.gloss: Jaddua, the name of two Israelites
H3037.def: from H3045 (יָדַע); knowing; Jaddua, the name of two Israelites.

H3038.def: or יְדֻתוּן; or יְדִיתוּן; probably from H3034 (יָדָה); laudatory; Jeduthun, an Israelite.

H3039.def: from the same as H1730 (דּוֹד); loved.

H3040.def: feminine of H3039 (יְדִיד); beloved; Jedidah, an Israelitess.

H3041.def: from H3039 (יְדִיד) and H3050 (יָהּ); beloved of Jah; Jedidejah, a name of Solomon.

H3042.gloss: Jedajah, the name of two Israelites
H3042.def: from H3034 (יָדָה) and H3050 (יָהּ); praised of Jah; Jedajah, the name of two Israelites.

H3043.gloss: Jediael, the name of three Israelites
H3043.def: from H3045 (יָדַע) and H410 (אֵל); knowing God; Jediael, the name of three Israelites.

H3044.def: from H1811 (דָּלַף); tearful; Jidlaph, a Mesopotamian.

H3045.gloss: to know (properly, to ascertain by seeing)
H3045.def: a primitive root; to know (properly, to ascertain by seeing); used in a great variety of senses, figuratively, literally, euphemistically and inferentially (including observation, care, recognition; and causatively, instruction, designation, punishment, etc.).
H3045.kjv: acknowledge, acquaintance(-ted with), advise, answer, appoint, assuredly, be aware, (un-) awares, can(-not), certainly, comprehend, consider, could they, cunning, declare, be diligent, (can, cause to) discern, discover, endued with, familiar friend, famous, feel, can have, be (ig-) norant, instruct, kinsfolk, kinsman, (cause to let, make) know, (come to give, have, take) knowledge, have (knowledge), (be, make, make to be, make self) known, be learned, lie by man, mark, perceive, privy to, prognosticator, regard, have respect, skilful, shew, can (man of) skill, be sure, of a surety, teach, (can) tell, understand, have (understanding), will be, wist, wit, wot

H3046.gloss: to know (properly, to ascertain by seeing)
H3046.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H3045 (יָדַע); to know (properly, to ascertain by seeing); used in a great variety of senses, figuratively, literally, euphemistically and inferentially (including observation, care, recognition; and causatively, instruction, designation, punishment, etc.).

H3047.def: from H3045 (יָדַע); knowing; Jada, an Israelite.

H3048.gloss: Jedajah, the name of two Israelites
H3048.def: from H3045 (יָדַע) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has known; Jedajah, the name of two Israelites.

H3049.def: from H3045 (יָדַע); properly, a knowing one; specifically, a conjurer; (by impl) a ghost.

H3050.def: contraction for H3068 (יְהֹוָה), and meaning the same; Jah, the sacred name.
H3050.kjv: Jah, the Lord, most vehement. Compare names in '-iah,' '-jah.'

H3051.def: a primitive root; to give (whether literal or figurative); generally, to put; imperatively (reflexive) come.
H3051.kjv: ascribe, bring, come on, give, go, set, take

H3052.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H3051 (יָהַב); to give (whether literal or figurative); generally, to put; imperatively (reflexive) come.
H3052.kjv: deliver, give, lay, prolong, pay, yield

H3053.gloss: what is given (by Providence), i.e. a lot
H3053.def: from H3051 (יָהַב); properly, what is given (by Providence), i.e. a lot.

H3054.def: denominative from a form corresponding to H3061 (יְהוּד)lemma יְהיּד yod, corrected to יְהוּד; to Judaize, i.e. become Jewish.

H3055.def: a briefer form of one corresponding to H3061 (יְהוּד)lemma יְהיּד yod, corrected to יְהוּד; Jehud, a place in Palestine.

H3056.def: perhaps from a form corresponding to H3061 (יְהוּד)lemma יְהיּד yod, corrected to יְהוּד; Judaistic; Jehdai, an Israelite.

H3057.def: feminine of H3064 (יְהוּדִי); Jehudijah, a Jewess.

H3058.gloss: Jehu, the name of five Israelites
H3058.def: from H3068 (יְהֹוָה) and H1931 (הוּא); Jehovah (is) He; Jehu, the name of five Israelites.

H3059.gloss: Jehoachaz, the name of three Israelites
H3059.def: from H3068 (יְהֹוָה) and H270 (אָחַז); Jehovah-seized; Jehoachaz, the name of three Israelites.

H3060.gloss: Jehoash, the name of two Israelite kings
H3060.def: from H3068 (יְהֹוָה) and (perhaps) H784 (אֵשׁ); Jehovah-fired; Jehoash, the name of two Israelite kings.

H3061.def: (Aramaic) contracted from a form corresponding to H3063 (יְהוּדָה); properly, Judah, hence, Judaea.

H3062.def: (Aramaic) patrial from H3061 (יְהוּד)lemma יְהיּד yod, corrected to יְהוּד; a Jehudaite (or Judaite), i.e. Jew.

H3063.gloss: Jehudah (or Judah), the name of five Israelites
H3063.def: from H3034 (יָדָה); celebrated; Jehudah (or Judah), the name of five Israelites; also of the tribe descended from the first, and of its territory.

H3064.def: patronymically from H3063 (יְהוּדָה); a Jehudite (i.e. Judaite or Jew), or descendant of Jehudah (i.e. Judah).

H3065.def: the same as H3064 (יְהוּדִי); Jehudi, an Israelite.

H3066.def: feminine of H3064 (יְהוּדִי); the Jewish (used adverbially) language.

H3067.def: the same as H3066 (יְהוּדִית); Jewess; Jehudith, a Canaanitess.

H3068.def: from H1961; (the) self-Existent or Eternal; Jeho-vah, Jewish national name of God.

H3069.def: a variation of H3068 (יְהֹוָה) (used after H136 (אֲדֹנָי), and pronounced by Jews as H430 (אֱלֹהִים), in order to prevent the repetition of the same sound, since they elsewhere pronounce H3068 (יְהֹוָה) as H136 (אֲדֹנָי)); YHWH.

H3070.gloss: Jehovah-Jireh, a symbolical name for Mount Moriah
H3070.def: from H3068 (יְהֹוָה) and H7200 (רָאָה); Jehovah will see (to it); Jehovah-Jireh, a symbolical name for Mount Moriah.

H3071.gloss: Jehovah-Nissi, a symbolical name of an altar in the Desert
H3071.def: from H3068 (יְהֹוָה) and H5251 (נֵס) with the prononimal suffix; Jehovah (is) my banner; Jehovah-Nissi, a symbolical name of an altar in the Desert.

H3072.def: from H3068 (יְהֹוָה) and H6664 (צֶדֶק) with pronominal suffix; Jehovah (is) our right; Jehovah-Tsidkenu, a symbolical epithet of the Messiah and of Jerusalem.

H3073.gloss: Jehovah-Shalom, a symbolical name of an altar in Palestine
H3073.def: from H3068 (יְהֹוָה) and H7965 (שָׁלוֹם); Jehovah (is) peace; Jehovah-Shalom, a symbolical name of an altar in Palestine.

H3074.gloss: Jehovah-Shammah, a symbolic title of Jerusalem
H3074.def: from H3068 (יְהֹוָה) and H8033 (שָׁם) with directive enclitic; Jehovah (is) thither; Jehovah-Shammah, a symbolic title of Jerusalem.

H3075.gloss: Jehozabad, the name of three Israelites
H3075.def: from H3068 (יְהֹוָה) and H2064 (זָבַד); Jehovah-endowed; Jehozabad, the name of three Israelites.

H3076.gloss: Jehochanan, the name of eight Israelites
H3076.def: from H3068 (יְהֹוָה) and H2603 (חָנַן); Jehovah-favored; Jehochanan, the name of eight Israelites.

H3077.gloss: Jehojada, the name of three Israelites
H3077.def: from H3068 (יְהֹוָה) and H3045 (יָדַע); Jehovah-known; Jehojada, the name of three Israelites.

H3078.def: from H3068 (יְהֹוָה) and H3559 (כּוּן); Jehovah will establish; Jehojakin, a Jewish king.

H3079.def: from H3068 (יְהֹוָה) abbreviated and H6965 (קוּם); Jehovah will raise; Jehojakim, a Jewish king.

H3080.gloss: Jehojarib, the name of two Israelites
H3080.def: from H3068 (יְהֹוָה) and H7378 (רִיב); Jehovah will contend; Jehojarib, the name of two Israelites.

H3081.def: from H3201 (יָכֹל); potent; Jehukal, an Israelite.

H3082.gloss: Jehonadab, the name of an Israelite and of an Arab
H3082.def: from H3068 (יְהֹוָה) and H5068 (נָדַב); Jehovah-largessed; Jehonadab, the name of an Israelite and of an Arab.

H3083.gloss: Jehonathan, the name of four Israelites
H3083.def: from H3068 (יְהֹוָה) and H5414 (נָתַן); Jehovah-given; Jehonathan, the name of four Israelites.

H3084.gloss: Jehoseph (i.e. Joseph), a son of Jacob
H3084.def: a fuller form of H3130 (יוֹסֵף); Jehoseph (i.e. Joseph), a son of Jacob.

H3085.def: from H3068 (יְהֹוָה) and H5710 (עָדָה); Jehovah-adorned; Jehoaddah, an Israelite.

H3086.def: or יְהוֹעַדָּן; from H3068 (יְהֹוָה) and H5727 (עָדַן); Jehovahpleased; Jehoaddin or Jehoaddan, an Israelitess.

H3087.def: from H3068 (יְהֹוָה) and H6663 (צָדַק); Jehovah-righted; Jehotsadak, an Israelite.

H3088.gloss: Jehoram, the name of a Syrian and of three Israelites
H3088.def: from H3068 (יְהֹוָה) and H7311 (רוּם); Jehovah-raised; Jehoram, the name of a Syrian and of three Israelites.

H3089.def: from H3068 (יְהֹוָה) and H7650 (שָׁבַע); Jehovah-sworn; Jehosheba, an Israelitess.

H3090.def: a form of H3089 (יְהוֹשֶׁבַע); Jehoshabath, an Israelitess.

H3091.def: from H3068 and H3467; Jehovah-saved; Jehoshua, the Jewish leader.

H3092.gloss: Jehoshaphat, the name of six Israelites
H3092.def: from H3068 (יְהֹוָה) and H8199 (שָׁפַט); Jehovah-judged; Jehoshaphat, the name of six Israelites; also of a valley near Jerusalem.

H3093.def: probably from the same as H2022 (הַר); elated; hence, arrogant.

H3094.gloss: Jehallelel, the name of two Israelites
H3094.def: from H1984 (הָלַל) and H410 (אֵל); praising God; Jehallelel, the name of two Israelites.

H3095.def: from H1986 (הָלַם) (in the sense of hardness); a precious stone, probably onyx.

H3096.gloss: Jahats or Jahtsah, a place East of the Jordan
H3096.def: or יַהְצָה; or (feminine) יַהְצָה; from an unused root meaning to stamp; perhaps threshing-floor; Jahats or Jahtsah, a place East of the Jordan.

H3097.gloss: Joab, the name of three Israelites
H3097.def: from H3068 (יְהֹוָה) and H1 (אָב); Jehovah-fathered; Joab, the name of three Israelites.

H3098.gloss: Joach, the name of four Israelites
H3098.def: from H3068 (יְהֹוָה) and H251 (אָח); Jehovahbrothered; Joach, the name of four Israelites.

H3099.gloss: Joachaz, the name of two Israelites
H3099.def: a form of H3059 (יְהוֹאָחָז); Joachaz, the name of two Israelites.

H3100.gloss: Joel, the name of twelve Israelites
H3100.def: from H3068 (יְהֹוָה) and H410 (אֵל); Jehovah (is his) God; Joel, the name of twelve Israelites.

H3101.gloss: Joash, the name of six Israelites
H3101.def: or יֹאָשׁ; (2 Chronicles 24:1), a form of H3060 (יְהוֹאָשׁ); Joash, the name of six Israelites.

H3102.def: perhaps a form of H3103 (יוֹבָב), but more probably by erroneous transcription for H3437 (יָשׁוּב); Job, an Israelite.

H3103.gloss: Jobab, the name of two Israelites and of three foreigners
H3103.def: from H2980 (יָבַב); howler; Jobab, the name of two Israelites and of three foreigners.

H3104.gloss: the blast of a horn (from its continuous sound)

H3116.def: a form of H3081 (יְהוּכַל); Jukal, an Israelite.

H3117.def: from an unused root meaning to be hot; a day (as the warm hours).

H3123.gloss: a dove (apparently from the warmth of their mating)
H3123.def: probably from the same as H3196 (יַיִן); a dove (apparently from the warmth of their mating).

H3124.def: the same as H3123 (יוֹנָה); Jonah, an Israelite.

H3125.gloss: a Jevanite, or descendant of Javan
H3125.def: patronymically from H3121 (יָוֵן); a Jevanite, or descendant of Javan.

H3126.def: active participle of H3243 (יָנַק); a sucker; hence, a twig (of a tree felled and sprouting).

H3128.gloss: dove of (the) silence (i.e. dumb Israel) of (i.e. among)

H3133.def: apparently the active participle of H3259 (יָעַד); appointer; Joed, an Israelite.

H3134.def: from H3068 (יְהֹוָה) and H5828 (עֵזֶר); Jehovah (is his) help; Joezer, an Israelite.

H3135.gloss: Joash, the name of two Israelites

H3136.def: a form of H3087 (יְהוֹצָדָק); Jotsadak, an Israelite.

H3137.def: a form of H3113 (יוֹיָקִים); Jokim, an Israelite.

H3138.def: active participle of H3384 (יָרָה); sprinkling; hence, a sprinkling (or autumnal showers).

H3140.def: from H3384 (יָרָה); rainy; Jorai, an Israelite.

H3142.def: from H7725 (שׁוּב) and H2617 (חֵסֵד); kindness will be returned; Jushab-Chesed, an Israelite.

H3144.def: probably a form of H3145 (יוֹשַׁוְיָה); Joshah, an Israelite.

H3145.def: from H3068 (יְהֹוָה) and H7737 (שָׁוָה); Jehovah-set; Joshavjah, an Israelite.

H3146.def: a form of H3092 (יְהוֹשָׁפָט); Joshaphat, an Israelite.

H3147.gloss: Jotham, the name of three Israelites

H3148.def: active participle of H3498 (יָתַר); properly, redundant; hence, over and above, as adjective, noun, adverb or conjunction.

H3149.def: from an unused root (meaning to sprinkle) and H410 (אֵל); sprinkled of God; Jezavel, an Israelite.

H3151.def: from the same as H2123 (זִיז); he will make prominent; Jaziz, an Israelite.

H3152.def: perhaps from an unused root (meaning to draw up); he will draw out; Jizliah, an Israelite.

H3153.def: or יְזַנְיָהוּ; probably for H2970 (יַאֲזַנְיָה); Jezanjah, an Israelite.

H3156.gloss: Jizrachjah, the name of two Israelites

H3161.def: a primitive root; to be (or become) one.

H3167.def: from H2372 (חָזָה) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah will behold; Jachzejah, an Israelite.

H3168.gloss: Jechezkel, the name of two Israelites

H3173.def: from H3161 (יָחַד); properly, united, i.e. sole; by implication, beloved; also lonely; (feminine) the life (as not to be replaced).

H3174.def: from H2421 (חָיָה) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah will live; Jechijah, an Israelite.

H3178.def: patronymically from H3177 (יַחְלְאֵל); a Jachleelite or descendant of Jachleel.

H3181.def: probably from H3179 (יָחַם); hot; Jachmai, an Israelite.

H3182.def: from an unused root meaning to take off the shoes; unsandalled.

H3184.def: patronymically from H3183 (יַחְצְאֵל); a Jachtseelite (collectively) or descendants of Jachtseel.

H3188.def: from H3187 (יָחַשׂ); a pedigree or family list (as growing spontaneously).

H3189.gloss: Jachath, the name of four Israelites
H3189.def: from H3161 (יָחַד); unity; Jachath, the name of four Israelites.

H3190.def: a primitive root; to be (causative) make well, literally (sound, beautiful) or figuratively (happy, successful, right).

H3196.def: from an unused root meaning to effervesce; wine (as fermented); by implication, intoxication.

H3202.def: (Aramaic) or יְכִיל; (Aramaic), to H3201 (יָכֹל); to be able, literally (can, could) or morally (may, might).

H3206.kjv: boy, child, fruit, son, young man (one)

H3212.kjv: again, away, bear, bring, carry (away), come (away), depart, flow, follow(-ing), get (away, hence, him), (cause to, made) go (away, -ing, -ne, one's way, out), grow, lead (forth), let down, march, prosper, pursue, cause to run, spread, take away (-journey), vanish, (cause to) walk(-ing), wax, be weak

H3213.gloss: to howl (with a wailing tone) or yell (with a boisterous
H3213.def: a primitive root; to howl (with a wailing tone) or yell (with a boisterous one).

H3216.def: a primitive root; to blurt or utter inconsiderately.

H3217.def: from an unused root apparently meaning to stick or scrape; scurf or tetter.

H3218.def: from an unused root meaning to lick up; a devourer; specifically, the young locust.

H3219.gloss: a travelling pouch (as if for gleanings)

H3221.gloss: a sea (as breaking in noisy surf) or large body of water
H3221.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H3220 (יָם); a sea (as breaking in noisy surf) or large body of water; specifically (with the article), the Mediterranean Sea; sometimes a large river, or an artifical basin; locally, the west, or (rarely) the south.

H3224.def: perhaps from the same as H3117 (יוֹם); properly, warm, i.e. affectionate; hence, dove (compare H3123 (יוֹנָה)); Jemimah, one of Job's daughters.

H3225.def: from H3231 (יָמַן); the right hand or side (leg, eye) of a person or other object (as the stronger and more dexterous); locally, the south.

H3226.gloss: Jamin, the name of three Israelites

H3228.gloss: a Jeminite (collectively) or descendants of Jamin
H3228.def: patronymically from H3226 (יָמִין); a Jeminite (collectively) or descendants of Jamin.

H3229.def: or יִמְלָה; from H4390 (מָלֵא); full; Jimla or Jimlah, an Israelite.

H3230.def: from H4427 (מָלַךְ); he will make king; Jamlek, an Israelite.

H3232.def: from H3231 (יָמַן); prosperity (as betokened by the right hand); Jimnah, the name of two Israelites; also (with the article) of the posterity of one of them.

H3234.def: from H4513 (מָנַע); he will restrain; Jimna, an Israelite.

H3235.def: a primitive root; to exchange; by implication, to change places.

H3236.def: probably from H3235 (יָמַר); interchange; Jimrah, an Israelite.

H3238.def: a primitive root; to rage or be violent; by implication, to suppress, to maltreat.
H3238.kjv: destroy, (thrust out by) oppress(-ing, -ion, -or), proud, vex, do violence

H3239.gloss: Janoach or Janochah, a place in Palestine
H3239.def: from H3240 (יָנַח); quiet; Janoach or Janochah, a place in Palestine.

H3240.def: a primitive root; to deposit; by implication, to allow to stay.
H3240.kjv: bestow, cast down, lay (down, up), leave (off), let alone (remain), pacify, place, put, set (down), suffer, withdraw, withhold. (The Hiphil forms with the dagesh are here referred to, in accordance with the older grammarians; but if any distinction of the kind is to be made, these should rather be referred to H5117 (נוּחַ), and the others here.)

H3241.def: from H5123 (נוּם); asleep; Janim, a place in Palestine.

H3242.def: from H3243 (יָנַק); a sucker or sapling.

H3243.def: a primitive root; to suck; causatively, to give milk.
H3243.kjv: milch, nurse(-ing mother), (give, make to) suck(-ing child, -ling)

H3244.def: or יַנְשׁוֹף; apparently from H5398 (נָשַׁף); (compare H5399 (נֶשֶׁף)); an unclean (acquatic) bird; probably the heron (perhaps from its blowing cry, or because the nightheron is meant )).

H3245.def: a primitive root; to set (literally or figuratively); intensively, to found; reflexively, to sit down together, i.e. settle, consult.
H3245.kjv: appoint, take counsel, establish, (lay the, lay for a) found(-ation), instruct, lay, ordain, set, sure

H3246.def: from H3245 (יָסַד); a foundation (figuratively, i.e. beginning).

H3247.def: from H3245 (יָסַד); a foundation (literally or figuratively).

H3252.def: from an unused root meaning to watch; observant; Jiskah, sister of Lot.

H3253.def: from H5564 (סָמַךְ) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah will sustain; Jismakjah, an Israelite.

H3254.def: a primitive root; to add or augment (often adverbial, to continue to do a thing).

H3255.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H3254 (יָסַף); to add or augment (often adverbial, to continue to do a thing).

H3256.def: a primitive root; to chastise, literally (with blows) or figuratively (with words); hence, to instruct.
H3256.kjv: bind, chasten, chastise, correct, instruct, punish, reform, reprove, sore, teach

H3258.def: from an unused root probably meaning to grieve; sorrowful; Jabets, the name of an Israelite, and also of a place in Palestine.

H3259.gloss: to fix upon (by agreement or appointment)

H3259.kjv: agree,(maxke an) appoint(-ment, a time), assemble (selves), betroth, gather (selves, together), meet (together), set (a time)

H3260.def: from H3259 (יָעַד); appointed; Jedi, an Israelite.

H3261.def: a primitive root; apparently; to brush aside.

H3262.gloss: Jeuel, the name of four Israelites
H3262.def: from H3261 (יָעָה) and H410 (אֵל); carried away of God; Jeuel, the name of four Israelites.

H3263.def: from H5779 (עוּץ); counsellor; Jeuts, an Israelite.

H3264.def: a variation of H3298 (יַעֲרֶשְׁיָה); a forest.

H3433.def: from H7725 (שׁוּב) and H3899 (לֶחֶם); returner of bread; Jashubi-Lechem, an Israelite.
H3433.kjv: Jashubi-lehem. (Prob. the text should be pointed יֹשְׁבֵי לֶחֶם and rendered '(they were) inhabitants of Lechem,' i.e. of Bethlehem (by contraction). Compare H3902 (לַחְמִי))

H3434.gloss: Jashobam, the name of two or three Israelites
H3434.def: from H7725 (שׁוּב) and H5971 (עַם); people will return; Jashobam, the name of two or three Israelites.

H3435.def: from an unused root corresponding to H7662 (שְׁבַק); he will leave; Jishbak, a son of Abraham.

H3436.def: from H3427 (יָשַׁב) and H7186 (קָשֶׁה); a hard seat; Joshbekashah, an Israelite.

H3437.gloss: Jashub, the name of two Israelites
H3437.def: or יָשִׁיב; from H7725 (שׁוּב); he will return; Jashub, the name of two Israelites.

H3438.def: from H7737 (שָׁוָה); he will level; Jishvah, an Israelite.

H3439.def: from the same as H3445 (יֶשַׁח) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah will empty; Jeshochajah, an Israelite.

H3440.gloss: Jishvi, the name of two Israelites
H3440.def: from H7737 (שָׁוָה); level; Jishvi, the name of two Israelites.

H3441.gloss: a Jishvite (collectively) or descendants of Jishvi
H3441.def: patronymically from H3440 (יִשְׁוִי); a Jishvite (collectively) or descendants of Jishvi.

H3442.def: for H3091 (יְהוֹשׁוּעַ); he will save; Jeshua, the name of ten Israelites, also of a place in Palestine.

H3443.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H3442 (יֵשׁוּעַ); Jeshua, the name of ten Israelites, also of a place in Palestine.

H3444.def: feminine passive participle of H3467; something saved, i.e., (abstractly) deliverance.

H3445.def: from an unused root meaning to gape (as the empty stomach); hunger.

H3446.def: from H7831 (שַׁחֲצוֹם); he will laugh; Jischak, the heir of Abraham.

H3448.def: by Aramaic אִישַׁי; from the same as H3426 (יֵשׁ); extant; Jishai, David's father.

H3449.gloss: Jishshijah, the name of five Israelites
H3449.def: or יִשִּׁיָּהוּ; from H5383 (נָשָׁה) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah will lend; Jishshijah, the name of five Israelites.

H3450.def: from H7760 (שׂוּם) and H410 (אֵל); God will place; Jesimael, an Israelite.

H3454.def: from H3453 (יָשִׁישׁ); aged; Jeshishai, an Israelite.

H3455.def: a primitive root; to place; intransitively, to be placed.

H3456.def: a primitive root; to lie waste.

H3457.def: from H3456 (יָשַׁם); desolate; Jishma, an Israelite.

H3458.def: from H8085 (שָׁמַע) and H410 (אֵל); God will hear; Jishmael, the name of Abraham's oldest son, and of five Israelites.

H3459.gloss: a Jishmaelite or descendant of Jishmael
H3459.def: patronymically from H3458 (יִשְׁמָעֵאל); a Jishmaelite or descendant of Jishmael.

H3460.gloss: Jishmajah, the name of two Israelites
H3460.def: or יִשְׁמַעְיָהוּlemma יְשְׁמַעְיָהוּ first vowel, corrected to יִשְׁמַעְיָהוּ; from H8085 (שָׁמַע) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah will hear; Jishmajah, the name of two Israelites.

H3461.def: from H8104 (שָׁמַר); preservative; Jishmerai, an Israelite.

H3462.def: a primitive root; properly, to be slack or languid, i.e. (by implication) sleep (figuratively, to die); also to grow old, stale or inveterate.

H3464.def: the same as H3463 (יָשֵׁן); Jashen, an Israelite.

H3466.def: feminine of H3465 (יָשָׁן); Jeshanah, a place in Palestine.

H3467.gloss: to be open, wide or free, i.e. (by implication) to be safe
H3467.def: a primitive root; properly, to be open, wide or free, i.e. (by implication) to be safe; causatively, to free or succor.
H3467.kjv: at all, avenging, defend, deliver(-er), help, preserve, rescue, be safe, bring (having) salvation, save(-iour), get victory

H3468.def: or יֵשַׁע; from H3467 (יָשַׁע); liberty, deliverance, prosperity.

H3469.gloss: Jishi, the name of four Israelites
H3469.def: from H3467 (יָשַׁע); saving; Jishi, the name of four Israelites.

H3470.gloss: Jeshajah, the name of seven Israelites
H3470.def: or יְשַׁעְיָהוּ; from H3467 (יָשַׁע) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has saved; Jeshajah, the name of seven Israelites.

H3471.gloss: a gem supposed to be jasper (from the resemblance in name)
H3471.def: from an unused root meaning to polish; a gem supposed to be jasper (from the resemblance in name).

H3472.def: perhaps from H8192 (שָׁפָה); he will scratch; Jishpah, an Israelite.

H3473.def: probably from the same as H8227 (שָׁפָן); he will hide; Jishpan, an Israelite.

H3474.def: a primitive root; to be straight or even; figuratively, to be (causatively, to make) right, pleasant, prosperous.
H3474.kjv: direct, fit, seem good (meet), please (will), be (esteem, go) right (on), bring (look, make, take the) straight (way), be upright(-ly)

H3475.def: from H3474 (יָשַׁר); the right; Jesher, an Israelite.

H3477.kjv: convenient, equity, Jasher, just, meet(-est), pleased well right(-eous), straight, (most) upright(-ly, -ness)

H3478.def: from H8280 and H410; he will rule as God; Jisrael, a symbolical name of Jacob; also of his posterity.

H3479.gloss: Jisrael, a symbolical name of Jacob
H3479.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H3478 (יִשְׂרָאֵל); Jisrael, a symbolical name of Jacob; also (typically) of his posterity.

H3480.def: by variation from H3477 (יָשָׁר) and H410 (אֵל) with directive enclitic; right towards God; Jesarelah, an Israelite.

H3481.gloss: a Jisreelite or descendant of Jisrael
H3481.def: patronymically from H3478 (יִשְׂרָאֵל); a Jisreelite or descendant of Jisrael.

H3482.gloss: a Jisreelitess or female descendant of Jisrael
H3482.def: feminine of H3481 (יִשְׂרְאֵלִי); a Jisreelitess or female descendant of Jisrael.

H3484.gloss: Jeshurun, a symbolic name for Israel
H3484.def: from H3474 (יָשַׁר); upright; Jeshurun, a symbolic name for Israel.

H3485.def: (strictly yis-saws-kawr'); from H5375 (נָשָׂא) and H7939 (שָׂכָר); he will bring a reward; Jissaskar, a son of Jacob.

H3486.def: from an unused root meaning to blanch; gray-haired, i.e. an aged man.

H3487.gloss: a sign of the object of a verb
H3487.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H853 (אֵת); a sign of the object of a verb.

H3488.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H3427 (יָשַׁב); to sit or dwell.

H3489.def: from an unused root meaning to pin through or fast; a peg.

H3490.def: from an unused root meaning to be lonely; a bereaved person.

H3491.gloss: what is left, i.e. (by implication) a gleaning
H3491.def: passive participle of H3498 (יָתַר); properly, what is left, i.e. (by implication) a gleaning.

H3492.def: from H3498 (יָתַר); redundant; Jattir, a place in Palestine.

H3493.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H3492 (יַתִּיר); preeminent; as an adverb, very.

H3494.def: probably from H8518 (תָּלָה); it will hang, i.e. be high; Jithlah, a place in Palestine.

H3495.def: from the same as H3490 (יָתוֹם); orphanage; Jithmah, an Israelite.

H3496.def: from an unused root meaning to endure, and H410 (אֵל); continued of God; Jathniel, an Israelite.

H3497.def: from the same as H8577 (תַּנִּין); extensive; Jithnan, a place in Palestine.

H3498.def: a primitive root; to jut over or exceed; by implication, to excel; (intransitively) to remain or be left; causatively, to leave, cause to abound, preserve.
H3498.kjv: excel, leave (a remnant), left behind, too much, make plenteous, preserve, (be, let) remain(-der, -ing, -nant), reserve, residue, rest

H3499.def: from H3498 (יָתַר); properly, an overhanging, i.e. (by implication) an excess, superiority, remainder; also a small rope (as hanging free).
H3499.kjv: abundant, cord, exceeding, excellancy(-ent), what they leave, that hath left, plentifully, remnant, residue, rest, string, with

H3500.def: the same as H3499 (יֶתֶר); Jether, the name of five or six Israelites and of one Midianite.

H3501.def: by variation for H3502 (יִתְרָה); Jithra, an Israelite (or Ishmaelite).

H3502.def: feminine of H3499 (יֶתֶר); properly, excellence, i.e. (by implication) wealth.

H3503.def: from H3499 (יֶתֶר) with pron. suffix; his excellence; Jethro, Moses' father-in-law.

H3505.gloss: a Jithrite or descendant of Jether
H3505.def: patronymically from H3500 (יֶתֶר); a Jithrite or descendant of Jether.

H3506.gloss: Jithran, the name of an Edomite and of an Israelite
H3506.def: from H3498 (יָתַר); excellent; Jithran, the name of an Edomite and of an Israelite.

H3507.def: from H3499 (יֶתֶר) and H5971 (עַם); excellence of people; Jithream, a son of David.

H3508.gloss: the lobe or flap of the liver (as if redundant or outhang
H3508.def: feminine active participle of H3498 (יָתַר); the lobe or flap of the liver (as if redundant or outhanging).

H3509.def: of uncertain derivation; Jetheth, an Edomite.

H3510.def: a primitive root; properly, to feel pain; by implication, to grieve; figuratively, to spoil.
H3510.kjv: grieving, mar, have pain, make sad (sore), (be) sorrowful

H3511.def: from H3510 (כָּאַב); suffering (physical or mental), adversity.

H3512.def: a primitive root; to despond; causatively, to deject.

H3513.def: or כָּבֵד; a primitive root; to be heavy, i.e. in a bad sense (burdensome, severe, dull) or in a good sense (numerous, rich, honorable; causatively, to make weighty (in the same two senses).
H3513.kjv: abounding with, more grievously afflict, boast, be chargeable, be dim, glorify, be (make) glorious (things), glory, (very) great, be grievous, harden, be (make) heavy, be heavier, lay heavily, (bring to, come to, do, get, be had in) honour (self), (be) honourable (man), lade, more be laid, make self many, nobles, prevail, promote (to honour), be rich, be (go) sore, stop

H3515.def: from H3513 (כָּבַד); heavy; figuratively in a good sense (numerous) or in a bad sense (severe, difficult, stupid).
H3515.kjv: (so) great, grievous, hard(-ened), (too) heavy(-ier), laden, much, slow, sore, thick

H3516.gloss: the liver (as the heaviest of the viscera)
H3516.def: the same as H3515 (כָּבֵד); the liver (as the heaviest of the viscera).

H3518.def: a primitive root; to expire or (causatively) to extinguish (fire, light, anger).

H3519.def: rarely כָּבֹד; from H3513 (כָּבַד); properly, weight, but only figuratively in a good sense, splendor or copiousness.

H3520.def: irregular feminine passive participle of H3513 (כָּבַד); weightiness, i.e. magnificence, wealth.

H3521.gloss: Cabul, the name of two places in Palestine
H3521.def: from the same as H3525 (כֶּבֶל) in the sense of limitation; sterile; Cabul, the name of two places in Palestine.

H3522.def: from an unused root meaning to heap up; hilly; Cabon, a place in Palestine.

H3523.def: from H3527 (כָּבַר) in the original sense of plaiting; a matrass (of intertwined materials).

H3524.gloss: vast, whether in extent (figuratively, of power, mighty
H3524.def: from H3527 (כָּבַר); vast, whether in extent (figuratively, of power, mighty; of time, aged), or in number, many.
H3524.kjv: feeble, mighty, most, much, strong, valiant

H3525.def: from an unused root meaning to twine or braid together; a fetter.

H3526.def: a primitive root; to trample; hence, to wash (properly, by stamping with the feet), whether literal (including the fulling process) or figurative.

H3527.def: a primitive root; properly, to plait together, i.e. (figuratively) to augment (especially in number or quantity, to accumulate).

H3528.gloss: extent of time, i.e. a great while
H3528.def: from H3527 (כָּבַר); properly, extent of time, i.e. a great while; hence, long ago, formerly, hitherto.

H3529.def: the same as H3528 (כְּבָר); length; Kebar, a river of Mesopotamia.

H3530.gloss: length, i.e. a measure (of uncertain dimension)
H3530.def: feminine of H3528 (כְּבָר); properly, length, i.e. a measure (of uncertain dimension).

H3531.def: from H3527 (כָּבַר) in its original sense; a sieve (as netted).

H3532.gloss: a ram (just old enough to butt)
H3532.def: from an unused root meaning to dominate; a ram (just old enough to butt).

H3533.def: a primitive root; to tread down; hence, negatively, to disregard; positively, to conquer, subjugate, violate.
H3533.kjv: bring into bondage, force, keep under, subdue, bring into subjection

H3534.def: from H3533 (כָּבַשׁ); a footstool (as trodden upon).

H3535.def: or כַּבְשָׂה; feminine of H3532 (כֶּבֶשׂ); a ewe.

H3536.def: from H3533 (כָּבַשׁ); a smelting furnace (as reducing metals).

H3537.def: from an unused root meaning to deepen; properly, a pail; but generally of earthenware; a jar  for domestic purposes.

H3538.def: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to H3576 (כָּזַב); false.

H3539.gloss: a sparkling gem, probably the ruby
H3539.def: from the same as H3537 (כַּד) in the sense of striking fire from a metal forged; a sparkling gem, probably the ruby.

H3540.def: of foreign origin; Kedorlaomer, an early Persian king.

H3541.gloss: like this, i.e. by implication, (of manner) thus (or so)
H3541.def: from the prefix k and H1931 (הוּא); properly, like this, i.e. by implication, (of manner) thus (or so); also (of place) here (or hither); or (of time) now.
H3541.kjv: also, here, + hitherto, like, on the other side, so (and much), such, on that manner, (on) this (manner, side, way, way and that way), + mean while, yonder

H3542.gloss: like this, i.e. by implication, (of manner) thus (or so)
H3542.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H3541 (כֹּה); properly, like this, i.e. by implication, (of manner) thus (or so); also (of place) here (or hither); or (of time) now.

H3543.def: a primitive root; to be weak, i.e. (figuratively) to despond (causatively, rebuke), or (of light, the eye) to grow dull.
H3543.kjv: darken, be dim, fail, faint, restrain, utterly

H3544.kjv: somewhat dark, darkish, wax dim, heaviness, smoking

H3545.def: feminine of H3544 (כֵּהֶה); properly, a weakening; figuratively, alleviation, i.e. cure.

H3546.def: (Aramaic) a root corresponding to and H3557 (כּוּל); to be able.

H3547.def: a primitive root, apparently meaning to mediate in religious services; but used only as denominative from H3548 (כֹּהֵן); to officiate as a priest; figuratively, to put on regalia.
H3547.kjv: deck, be (do the office of a, execute the, minister in the) priest('s office)

H3548.def: active participle of H3547; literally one officiating, a priest.

H3549.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H3548 (כֹּהֵן); one officiating, a priest; also (by courtesy) an acting priest (although a layman).

H3551.def: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to H3854 (לַהַג) in the sense of piercing; a window (as a perforation).

H3552.def: of foreign derivation; Kub, a country near Egypt.

H3553.def: from an unused root meaning to be high or rounded; a helmet (as arched).

H3554.def: a primitive root; properly, to prick or penetrate; hence, to blister (as smarting or eating into).

H3556.gloss: a star (as round or as shining)
H3556.def: probably from the same as H3522 (כַּבּוֹן) (in the sense of rolling) or H3554 (כָּוָה) (in the sense of blazing); a star (as round or as shining); figuratively, a prince.

H3557.def: a primitive root; properly, to keep in; hence, to measure; figuratively, to maintain (in various senses).
H3557.kjv: (be able to, can) abide, bear, comprehend, contain, feed, forbearing, guide, hold(-ing in), nourish(-er), be present, make provision, receive, sustain, provide sustenance (victuals)

H3558.def: from an unused root meaning to store away; a jewel (probably gold beads).

H3559.def: a primitive root; properly, to be erect (i.e. stand perpendicular); hence (causatively) to set up, in a great variety of applications, whether literal (establish, fix, prepare, apply), or figurative (appoint, render sure, proper or prosperous).
H3559.kjv: certain(-ty), confirm, direct, faithfulness, fashion, fasten, firm, be fitted, be fixed, frame, be meet, ordain, order, perfect, (make) preparation, prepare (self), provide, make provision, (be, make) ready, right, set (aright, fast, forth), be stable, (e-) stablish, stand, tarry, very deed

H3560.def: probably from H3559 (כּוּן); established; Kun, a place in Syria.

H3561.gloss: something prepared, i.e. a sacrificial wafer
H3561.def: from H3559 (כּוּן); something prepared, i.e. a sacrificial wafer.

H3562.gloss: Conanjah, the name of two Israelites
H3562.def: from H3559 (כּוּן) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has sustained; Conanjah, the name of two Israelites.

H3563.def: from an unused root meaning to hold together; a cup (as a container), often figuratively, a lot (as if a potion); also some unclean bird, probably an owl (perhaps from the cup-like cavity of its eye).

H3564.gloss: a pot or furnace (as if excavated)
H3564.def: from an unused root meaning properly, to dig through; a pot or furnace (as if excavated).

H3565.def: from H3564 (כּוּר) and H6227 (עָשָׁן); furnace of smoke; Cor-Ashan, a place in Palestine.

H3566.def: or (Ezra 1:1 (last time),2) כֹּרֶשׁ; from the Persians; Koresh (or Cyrus), the Persian king.

H3567.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H3566 (כּוֹרֶשׁ); Koresh (or Cyrus), the Persian king.

H3568.def: probably of foreign origin; Cush (or Ethiopia), the name of a son of Ham, and of his territory; also of an Israelite.

H3569.gloss: a Cushite, or descendant of Cush
H3569.def: patronymically from H3568 (כּוּשׁ); a Cushite, or descendant of Cush.

H3570.gloss: Cushi, the name of two Israelites
H3570.def: the same as H3569 (כּוּשִׁי); Cushi, the name of two Israelites.

H3571.def: feminine of H3569 (כּוּשִׁי); a Cushite woman.

H3572.def: perhaps from H3568 (כּוּשׁ); Cushan, a region of Arabia.

H3573.def: apparently from H3572 (כּוּשָׁן) and the dual of H7564 (רִשְׁעָה); Cushan of double wickedness; Cushan-Rishathajim, a Mesopotamian king.

H3574.def: from H3787 (כָּשֵׁר); prosperity; in plural freedom.

H3575.gloss: Cuth or Cuthah, a province of Assyria
H3575.def: or (feminine) כּוּתָה; of foreign origin; Cuth or Cuthah, a province of Assyria.

H3576.gloss: to lie (i.e. deceive), literally or figuratively
H3576.def: a primitive root; to lie (i.e. deceive), literally or figuratively.
H3576.kjv: fail, (be found a, make a) liar, lie, lying, be in vain

H3577.def: from H3576 (כָּזַב); falsehood; literally (untruth) or figuratively (idol).
H3577.kjv: deceitful, false, leasing, + liar, lie, lying

H3578.def: from H3576 (כָּזַב); fallacious; Cozeba, a place in Palestine.

H3579.def: from H3576 (כָּזַב); false; Cozbi, a Midianitess.

H3580.def: from H3576 (כָּזַב); falsified; Kezib, a place in Palestine.

H3581.def: or (Daniel 11:6) כּוֹחַ; from an unused root meaning to be firm; vigor, literally (force, in a good or a bad sense) or figuratively (capacity, means, produce); also (from its hardiness) a large lizard.
H3581.kjv: ability, able, chameleon, force, fruits, might, power(-ful), strength, substance, wealth

H3582.gloss: to secrete, by act or word
H3582.def: a primitive root; to secrete, by act or word; hence (intensively) to destroy.

H3583.def: a primitive root; to paint (with stibium).

H3584.def: a primitive root; to be untrue, in word (to lie, feign, disown) or deed (to disappoint, fail, cringe).
H3584.kjv: deceive, deny, dissemble, fail, deal falsely, be found liars, (be-) lie, lying, submit selves

H3585.gloss: literally a failure of flesh, i.e. emaciation
H3585.def: from H3584 (כָּחַשׁ); literally a failure of flesh, i.e. emaciation; figuratively, hypocrisy.

H3587.def: from H3554 (כָּוָה); a brand or scar.

H3588.gloss: (by implication) very widely used as a relative conjuncti
H3588.def: a primitive particle (the full form of the prepositional prefix) indicating causal relations of all kinds, antecedent or consequent; (by implication) very widely used as a relative conjunction or adverb (as below); often largely modified by other particles annexed.
H3588.kjv: and, + (forasmuch, inasmuch, where-) as, assured(-ly), + but, certainly, doubtless, + else, even, + except, for, how, (because, in, so, than) that, + nevertheless, now, rightly, seeing, since, surely, then, therefore, + (al-) though, + till, truly, + until, when, whether, while, whom, yea, yet

H3589.def: from a primitive root meaning to strike; a crushing; figuratively, calamity.

H3590.gloss: something struck off, i.e. a spark (as struck)
H3590.def: from the same as H3589 (כִּיד) (compare H3539 (כַּדְכֹּד)); properly, something struck off, i.e. a spark (as struck).

H3591.gloss: something to strike with, i.e. a dart
H3591.def: from the same as H3589 (כִּיד); (perhaps smaller than H2595 (חֲנִית)lemma חֲניִת second vowel, corrected to חֲנִית); properly, something to strike with, i.e. a dart.

H3592.def: the same as H3591 (כִּידוֹן); Kidon, a place in Palestine.

H3594.def: from H3559 (כּוּן); properly, a statue, i.e. idol; but used (by euphemism) forsome heathen deity (perhaps corresponding to Priapus or Baal-peor).

H3595.def: or כִּיֹּר; from the same as H3564 (כּוּר); properly, something round (as excavated or bored), i.e. a chafing-dish forcoals or a caldron forcooking; hence (from similarity of form) a washbowl; also (for the same reason) a pulpit or platform.

H3596.def: or כֵּלַי; from H3557 (כּוּל) in the sense of withholding; niggardly.

H3597.def: from an unused root meaning to clap or strike with noise; a club or sledge-hammer.

H3598.gloss: a cluster of stars, i.e. the Pleiades
H3598.def: from the same as H3558 (כּוּמָז); a cluster of stars, i.e. the Pleiades.

H3599.def: a form for H3563 (כּוֹס); a cup; also a bag formoney or weights.

H3600.gloss: a cooking range (consisting of two parallel stones
H3600.def: a form for H3564 (כּוּר) (only in the dual); a cooking range (consisting of two parallel stones, across which the boiler is set).

H3601.def: from H3787 (כָּשֵׁר); compare H6418 (פֶּלֶךְ); literally a director, i.e. the spindle or shank of adistaff, by which it is twirled.

H3602.gloss: just so, referring to the previous or following context
H3602.def: from H3541 (כֹּה); just so, referring to the previous or following context.
H3602.kjv: after that (this) manner, this matter, (even) so, in such a case, thus

H3603.def: from H3769 (כָּרַר); a circle, i.e. (by implication) a circumjacent tract or region, especially the Ghor or valley of the Jordan; also a (round) loaf; also a talent (or large [round] coin).

H3605.def: or (Jeremiah 33:8) כּוֹל; from H3634 (כָּלַל); properly, the whole; hence, all, any or every (in the singular only, but often in a plural sense).
H3605.kjv: (in) all (manner, (ye)), altogether, any (manner), enough, every (one, place, thing), howsoever, as many as, (no-) thing, ought, whatsoever, (the) whole, whoso(-ever)

H3606.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H3605 (כֹּל); properly, the whole; hence, all, any or every (in the singular only, but often in a plural sense).
H3606.kjv: all, any, + (forasmuch) as, + be-(for this) cause, every, + no (manner, -ne), + there (where) -fore, + though, what (where, who) -soever, (the) whole

H3607.gloss: to restrict, by act (hold back or in) or word (prohibit)
H3607.def: a primitive root; to restrict, by act (hold back or in) or word (prohibit).
H3607.kjv: finish, forbid, keep (back), refrain, restrain, retain, shut up, be stayed, withhold

H3609.def: apparently from H3607 (כָּלָא) and H1 (אָב); restraint of (his) father; Kilab, an Israelite.

H3610.def: dual of H3608 (כֶּלֶא) in the original sense of separation; two heterogeneities.

H3611.def: from an unused root means. to yelp, or else to attack; a dog; hence (by euphemism) a male prostitute.

H3612.gloss: Caleb, the name of three Israelites
H3612.def: perhaps a form of H3611 (כֶּלֶב), or else from the same root in the sense of forcible; Caleb, the name of three Israelites.

H3613.gloss: Caleb-Ephrathah, a place in Egypt (if the text is correct)
H3613.def: from H3612 (כָּלֵב) and H672 (אֶפְרָת); Caleb-Ephrathah, a place in Egypt (if the text is correct).

H3614.gloss: a Calebite or descendant of Caleb
H3614.def: probably by erroneous transcription for כָּלֵבִי; patronymically from H3612 (כָּלֵב); a Calebite or descendant of Caleb.

H3615.def: a primitive root; to end, whether intransitive (to cease, be finished, perish) or transitived (to complete, prepare, consume).
H3615.kjv: accomplish, cease, consume (away), determine, destroy (utterly), be (when... were) done, (be an) end (of), expire, (cause to) fail, faint, finish, fulfil, fully, have, leave (off), long, bring to pass, wholly reap, make clean riddance, spend, quite take away, waste

H3617.def: from H3615 (כָּלָה); a completion; adverb, completely; also destruction.
H3617.kjv: altogether, (be, utterly) consume(-d), consummation(-ption), was determined, (full, utter) end, riddance

H3618.def: from H3634 (כָּלַל); a bride (as if perfect); hence, a son's wife.

H3619.gloss: a bird-trap (as furnished with a clap-stick or treadle to
H3619.def: from the same as H3611 (כֶּלֶב); a bird-trap (as furnished with a clap-stick or treadle to spring it); hence, a basket (as resembling a wicker cage).

H3620.gloss: Kelub, the name of two Israelites
H3620.def: the same as H3619 (כְּלוּב)xlit kᵉlûb corrected to kᵉlûwb; Kelub, the name of two Israelites.

H3621.def: a form of H3612 (כָּלֵב); Kelubai, an Israelite.

H3622.def: from H3615 (כָּלָה); completed; Keluhai, an Israelite.

H3623.def: denominative passive participle from H3618 (כַּלָּה)lemma כַּלָה missing dagesh, corrected to כַּלָּה; bridehood (only in the plural).

H3624.def: from an unused root meaning to be complete; maturity.

H3625.def: the same as H3624 (כֶּלַח); Kelach, a place in Assyria.

H3626.def: from H3605 (כֹּל) and H2374 (חֹזֶה); every seer; Col-Chozeh, an Israelite.

H3627.def: from H3615 (כָּלָה); something prepared, i.e. any apparatus (as an implement, utensil, dress, vessel or weapon).
H3627.kjv: armour(-bearer), artillery, bag, carriage, furnish, furniture, instrument, jewel, that is made of, one from another, that which pertaineth, pot, psaltery, sack, stuff, thing, tool, vessel, ware, weapon, whatsoever

H3628.def: or כְּלוּא; from H3627 (כְּלִי) (compare H3608 (כֶּלֶא)); a prison.

H3629.def: feminine of H3627 (כְּלִי) (only in the plural); a kidney (as an essential organ); figuratively, the mind (as the interior self).

H3630.def: a form of H3631 (כִּלָּיוֹן); Kiljon, an Israelite.

H3632.def: from H3634 (כָּלַל); complete; as noun, the whole (specifically, a sacrifice entirely consumed); as adverb, fully.
H3632.kjv: all, every whit, flame, perfect(-ion), utterly, whole burnt offering (sacrifice), wholly

H3633.def: from H3557 (כּוּל); sustenance; Calcol, an Israelite.

H3636.def: from H3634 (כָּלַל); complete; Kelal, an Israelite.

H3637.def: a primitive root; properly, to wound; but only figuratively, to taunt or insult.
H3637.kjv: be (make) ashamed, blush, be confounded, be put to confusion, hurt, reproach, (do, put to) shame

H3638.gloss: Kilmad, a place apparently in the Assyrian empire
H3638.def: of foreign derivation; Kilmad, a place apparently in the Assyrian empire.

H3641.gloss: Calneh or Calno, a place in the Assyrian empire
H3641.def: or כַּלְנֵה; also כַּלְנוֹ; of foreign derivation; Calneh or Calno, a place in the Assyrian empire.

H3642.def: a primitive root; to pine after.

H3643.def: from H3642 (כָּמַהּ); pining; Kimham, an Israelite.

H3644.gloss: a form of the prefix 'k-', but used separately  as, thus, so
H3644.def: or כָּמוֹ; (compare H3651 (כֵּן)); a form of the prefix 'k-', but used separately  as, thus, so.
H3644.kjv: according to, (such) as (it were, well as), in comparison of, like (as, to, unto), thus, when, worth

H3645.gloss: Kemosh, the god of the Moabites
H3645.def: or (Jeremiah 48:7) כְּמִישׁ; from an unused root meaning to subdue; the powerful; Kemosh, the god of the Moabites.

H3646.def: from an unused root meaning to store up or preserve; 'cummin' (from its use as a condiment).

H3647.gloss: to store away, i.e. (figuratively) in the memory
H3647.def: a primitive root; to store away, i.e. (figuratively) in the memory.

H3648.def: a primitive root; properly, to intertwine or contract, i.e. (by implication) to shrivel (as with heat); figuratively, to be deeply affected with passion (love or pity).

H3649.gloss: an ascetic (as if shrunk with self-maceration)
H3649.def: from H3648 (כָּמַר); properly, an ascetic (as if shrunk with self-maceration), i.e. an idolatrous priest (only in plural).

H3650.gloss: obscuration (as if from shrinkage of light
H3650.def: redupl. from H3648 (כָּמַר); obscuration (as if from shrinkage of light, i.e. an eclipse (only in plural).

H3651.def: from H3559 (כּוּן); properly, set upright; hence (figuratively as adjective) just; but usually (as adverb or conjunction) rightly or so (in various applications to manner, time and relation; often with other particles).
H3651.kjv: after that (this, -ward, -wards), as... as, (for-) asmuch as yet, be (for which) cause, following, howbeit, in (the) like (manner, -wise), the more, right, (even) so, state, straightway, such (thing), surely, there (where) -fore, this, thus, true, well, you

H3653.gloss: a stand, i.e. pedestal or station
H3653.def: the same as H3651 (כֵּן), used as a noun; a stand, i.e. pedestal or station.
H3653.kjv: base, estate, foot, office, place, well

H3654.def: from H3661 (כָּנַן) in the sense of fastening; (from infixing its sting; used only in plural (and irregular in Exodus 8:17,18; Hebrews 13:14)); a gnat.

H3655.gloss: to address by an additional name
H3655.def: a primitive root; to address by an additional name; hence, to eulogize.

H3656.def: for H3641 (כַּלְנֶה); Canneh, a place in Assyria.

H3658.def: from a unused root meaning to twang; a harp.

H3659.def: for H3204 (יְכׇנְיָה); Conjah, an Israelite king.

H3660.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H3644 (כְּמוֹ); so or thus.

H3661.def: a primitive root; to set out, i.e. plant.

H3662.def: from H3661 (כָּנַן); planted; Kenani, an Israelite.

H3663.def: or כְּנַנְיָהוּ; from H3661 (כָּנַן) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has planted; Kenanjah, an Israelite.

H3664.def: a primitive root; to collect; hence, to enfold.

H3665.def: a primitive root; properly, to bend the knee; hence, to humiliate, vanquish.
H3665.kjv: bring down (low), into subjection, under, humble (self), subdue

H3666.def: from H3665 (כָּנַע) in the sense of folding (compare H3664 (כָּנַס)); a package.

H3667.def: from H3665 (כָּנַע); humiliated; Kenaan, a son a Ham; also the country inhabited by him.

H3668.gloss: Kenaanah, the name of two Israelites
H3668.def: feminine of H3667 (כְּנַעַן); Kenaanah, the name of two Israelites.

H3669.gloss: a Kenaanite or inhabitant of Kenaan
H3669.def: patrial from H3667 (כְּנַעַן); a Kenaanite or inhabitant of Kenaan; by implication, a pedlar (the Canaanites standing for their neighbors the Ishmaelites, who conducted mercantile caravans).

H3670.gloss: to project laterally, i.e. probably (reflexive) to withdraw
H3670.def: a primitive root; properly, to project laterally, i.e. probably (reflexive) to withdraw.

H3671.def: from H3670 (כָּנַף); an edge or extremity; specifically (of a bird or army) a wing, (of a garment or bedclothing) a flap, (of the earth) a quarter, (of a building) a pinnacle.
H3671.kjv: bird, border, corner, end, feather(-ed), flying, (one an-) other, overspreading, quarters, skirt, sort, uttermost part, wing(-ed)

H3672.gloss: Kinneroth or Kinnereth, a place in Palestine
H3672.def: or כִּנֶּרֶתlemma כִּנֶרֶת missing dagesh, corrected to כִּנֶּרֶת; respectively plural and singular feminine from the same as H3658 (כִּנּוֹר); perhaps harp-shaped; Kinneroth or Kinnereth, a place in Palestine.

H3674.gloss: a colleague (as having the same title)
H3674.def: from H3655 (כָּנָה); a colleague (as having the same title).

H3675.gloss: a colleague (as having the same title)
H3675.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H3674 (כְּנָת); a colleague (as having the same title).

H3676.def: apparently a contraction for H3678 (כִּסֵּא), but probably by erroneous transcription for H5251 (נֵס); a flag; also a sail; by implication, a flagstaff; generally a signal; figuratively, a token.

H3677.gloss: fulness or the full moon, i.e. its festival
H3677.def: or כֶּסֶה; apparently from H3680 (כָּסָה); properly, fulness or the full moon, i.e. its festival.

H3678.def: or כִּסֵּה; from H3680 (כָּסָה); properly, covered, i.e. a throne (as canopied).

H3679.gloss: a Kasdite, or descendant of Kesed
H3679.def: for H3778 (כַּשְׂדִּי); a Kasdite, or descendant of Kesed; by implication, a Chaldaean (as if so descended); also an astrologer (as if proverbial of that people.

H3680.gloss: to plump, i.e. fill up hollows
H3680.def: a primitive root; properly, to plump, i.e. fill up hollows; by implication, to cover (for clothing or secrecy).
H3680.kjv: clad self, close, clothe, conceal, cover (self), (flee to) hide, overwhelm. Compare H3780 (כָּשָׂה)

H3681.def: passive participle of H3680 (כָּסָה); properly, covered, i.e. (as noun) a covering.

H3682.def: from H3680 (כָּסָה); a cover (garment); figuratively, a veiling.

H3683.def: a primitive root; to cut off.

H3684.def: from H3688 (כָּסַל); properly, fat, i.e. (figuratively) stupid or silly.

H3685.def: the same as H3684 (כְּסִיל); any notable constellation; specifically Orion (as if a burly one).

H3686.def: the same as H3684 (כְּסִיל); Kesil, a place in Palestine.

H3688.def: a primitive root; properly, to be fat, i.e. (figuratively) silly.

H3689.def: from H3688 (כָּסַל); properly, fatness, i.e. by implication (literally) the loin (as the seat of the leaf fat) or (generally) the viscera; also (figuratively) silliness or (in a good sense) trust.

H3690.def: feminine of H3689 (כֶּסֶל); in a good sense, trust; in a bad one, silliness.

H3691.def: probably of foreign origin; Kisleu, the 9th Hebrew month.

H3692.def: from H3688 (כָּסַל); hopeful; Kislon, an Israelite.

H3693.def: from H3688 (כָּסַל); fertile; Kesalon, a place in Palestine.

H3694.def: feminine plural of passive participle of H3688 (כָּסַל); fattened; Kesulloth, a place in Palestine.

H3695.gloss: Casluchim, a people cognate to the Egyptians
H3695.def: a plural probably of foreign derivation; Casluchim, a people cognate to the Egyptians.

H3696.def: from the feminine plural of H3689 (כֶּסֶל) and H8396 (תָּבוֹר); flanks of Tabor; Kisloth-Tabor, a place in Palestine.

H3698.gloss: spelt (from its bristliness as if just shorn)
H3698.def: from H3697 (כָּסַם); spelt (from its bristliness as if just shorn).

H3700.gloss: to become pale, i.e. (by implication) to pine after
H3700.def: a primitive root; properly, to become pale, i.e. (by implication) to pine after; also to fear.

H3701.def: from H3700 (כָּסַף); silver (from its pale color); by implication, money.

H3702.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H3701 (כֶּסֶף); silver (from its pale color); by implication, money.

H3703.def: perhaps from H3701 (כֶּסֶף); silvery; Casiphja, a place in Babylon.

H3704.gloss: a cushion or pillow (as covering a seat or bed)
H3704.def: from H3680 (כָּסָה); a cushion or pillow (as covering a seat or bed).

H3706.gloss: thus (only in the formula 'and so forth')
H3706.def: (Aramaic) or כְּעֶת; (Aramaic), feminine of H3705 (כְּעַן); thus (only in the formula 'and so forth').

H3707.def: a primitive root; to trouble; by implication, to grieve, rage, be indignant.
H3707.kjv: be angry, be grieved, take indignation, provoke (to anger, unto wrath), have sorrow, vex, be wroth

H3708.def: or (in Job) כַּעַשׂ; from H3707 (כַּעַס); vexation.
H3708.kjv: anger, angry, grief, indignation, provocation, provoking, sore, sorrow, spite, wrath

H3709.gloss: the hollow hand or palm (so of the paw of an animal
H3709.def: from H3721 (כָּפַף); the hollow hand or palm (so of the paw of an animal, of the sole, and even of the bowl of a dish or sling, the handle of a bolt, the leaves of a palm-tree); figuratively, power.
H3709.kjv: branch, foot, hand((-ful), -dle, (-led)), hollow, middle, palm, paw, power, sole, spoon

H3711.gloss: to bend, i.e. (figuratively) to tame or subdue
H3711.def: a primitive root; properly, to bend, i.e. (figuratively) to tame or subdue.

H3712.def: feminine of H3709 (כַּף); a leaf of a palmtree.

H3713.gloss: a cover, i.e. (by implication) a tankard (or covered goblet)
H3713.def: from H3722 (כָּפַר); properly, a cover, i.e. (by implication) a tankard (or covered goblet); also white frost (as covering the ground).

H3714.def: from an unused root meaning to connect; a girder.

H3715.gloss: a village (as covered in by walls)
H3715.def: from H3722 (כָּפַר); a village (as covered in by walls); also a young lion (perhaps as covered with a mane).

H3716.def: feminine of H3715 (כְּפִיר); the village (always with the art.); Kephirah, a place in Palestine.

H3717.def: a primitive root; to fold together; figuratively, to repeat.

H3720.gloss: hunger (as making to stoop with emptiness and pain)
H3720.def: from H3719 (כָּפַן); hunger (as making to stoop with emptiness and pain).

H3722.def: a primitive root; to cover (specifically with bitumen); figuratively, to expiate or condone, to placate or cancel.
H3722.kjv: appease, make (an atonement, cleanse, disannul, forgive, be merciful, pacify, pardon, purge (away), put off, (make) reconcile(-liation)

H3723.def: from H3722 (כָּפַר); a village (as protected by walls).

H3724.gloss: a cover, i.e. (literally) a village (as covered in)
H3724.def: from H3722 (כָּפַר); properly, a cover, i.e. (literally) a village (as covered in); (specifically) bitumen (as used for coating), and the henna plant (as used for dyeing); figuratively, a redemption-price.
H3724.kjv: bribe, camphire, pitch, ransom, satisfaction, sum of money, village

H3726.def: from H3723 (כָּפָר) and H5984 (עַמּוֹנִי), with the article interposed; village of the Ammonite; Kefar-ha-Ammoni, a place in Palestine.

H3727.gloss: a lid (used only of the cover of the sacred Ark)
H3727.def: from H3722 (כָּפַר); a lid (used only of the cover of the sacred Ark).

H3728.def: a primitive root; to tread down; figuratively, to humiliate.

H3729.def: (Aramaic) a root of uncertain correspondence; to fetter.

H3730.def: or (Amos 9:1) כַּפְתּוֹר; probably from an unused root meaning to encircle; a chaplet; but used only in an architectonic sense, i.e. the capital of acolumn, or a wreath-like button or disk on the candelabrum.

H3731.def: or (Amos 9:7) כַּפְתּוֹר; apparently the same as H3730 (כַּפְתֹּר); Caphtor (i.e. a wreath-shaped island), the original seat of the Philistines.

H3732.gloss: a Caphtorite (collectively) or native of Caphtor
H3732.def: patrial from H3731 (כַּפְתֹּר); a Caphtorite (collectively) or native of Caphtor.

H3733.def: from H3769 (כָּרַר) in the sense of plumpness; a ram (as full-grown and fat), including a battering-ram (as butting); hence, a meadow (as for sheep); also a pad or camel's saddle (as puffed out).
H3733.kjv: captain, furniture, lamb, (large) pasture, ram. See also H1033 (בֵּית כַּר), H3746 (כָּרִי)

H3734.def: from the same as H3564 (כּוּר); properly, a deep round vessel, i.e. (specifically) a cor or measure for things dry.

H3735.def: (Aramaic) probably corresponding to H3738 (כָּרָה) in the sense of piercing(figuratively); to grieve.

H3736.def: from the same as H3525 (כֶּבֶל); to gird or clothe.

H3737.def: (Aramaic) from a verb corresponding to that of H3736 (כַּרְבֵּל); a mantle.

H3738.def: a primitive root; properly, to dig; figuratively, to plot; generally, to bore or open.

H3739.def: usually assigned as a primitive root, but probably only a special application of H3738 (כָּרָה) (through the common idea of planning implied in a bargain); to purchase.

H3742.def: of uncertain derivation; a cherub or imaginary figure.

H3743.def: the same as H3742 (כְּרוּב); Kerub, a place in Babylon.

H3745.def: (Aramaic) probably of Greek origin; to proclaim.

H3746.def: perhaps an abridged plural of H3733 (כַּר) in the sense of leader (of the flock); a life-guardsman.

H3747.def: from H3772 (כָּרַת); a cut; Kerith, a brook of Palestine.

H3748.gloss: a cutting (of the matrimonial bond), i.e. divorce
H3748.def: from H3772 (כָּרַת); a cutting (of the matrimonial bond), i.e. divorce.

H3749.def: expanded from the same as H3522 (כַּבּוֹן); a rim or top margin.

H3750.def: probably of foreign origin; the crocus.

H3751.def: of foreign derivation; Karkemish, a place in Syria.

H3752.def: of Persian origin; Karkas, a eunuch of Xerxes.

H3753.gloss: a dromedary (from its rapid motion as if dancing)
H3753.def: from H3769 (כָּרַר); a dromedary (from its rapid motion as if dancing).

H3754.def: from an unused root of uncertain meaning; a garden or vineyard.
H3754.kjv: vines, (increase of the) vineyard(-s), vintage. See also H1021 (בֵּית הַכֶּרֶם)

H3755.def: active participle of an imaginary denominative from H3754 (כֶּרֶם); a vinedresser.
H3755.kjv: vine dresser (as one or two words)

H3756.gloss: Karmi, the name of three Israelites
H3756.def: from H3754 (כֶּרֶם); gardener; Karmi, the name of three Israelites.

H3757.gloss: a Karmite or descendant of Karmi
H3757.def: patronymically from H3756 (כַּרְמִי); a Karmite or descendant of Karmi.

H3758.def: probably of foreign origin; carmine, a deep red.

H3759.gloss: a planted field (garden, orchard, vineyard or park)
H3759.def: from H3754 (כֶּרֶם); a planted field (garden, orchard, vineyard or park); by implication, garden produce.
H3759.kjv: full (green) ears (of corn), fruitful field (place), plentiful (field)

H3760.gloss: Karmel, the name of a hill and of a town in Palestine
H3760.def: the same as H3759 (כַּרְמֶל); Karmel, the name of a hill and of a town in Palestine.

H3761.gloss: a Karmelite or inhabitant of Karmel (the town)
H3761.def: patron from H3760 (כַּרְמֶל); a Karmelite or inhabitant of Karmel (the town).

H3762.gloss: a Karmelitess or female inhabitant of Karmel
H3762.def: feminine of H3761 (כַּרְמְלִי); a Karmelitess or female inhabitant of Karmel.

H3763.def: of uncertain derivation; Keran, an aboriginal Idumaean.

H3766.def: a primitive root; to bend the knee; by implication, to sink, to prostrate.
H3766.kjv: bow (down, self), bring down (low), cast down, couch, fall, feeble, kneeling, sink, smite (stoop) down, subdue, very

H3767.gloss: the leg (from the knee to the ankle) of men or locusts (o
H3767.def: from H3766 (כָּרַע); the leg (from the knee to the ankle) of men or locusts (only in the dual).

H3768.def: of foreign origin; byssus or fine vegetable wool.

H3769.def: a primitive root; to dance (i.e. whirl).

H3770.gloss: the paunch or belly (as swelling out)
H3770.def: by variation from H7164 (קָרַס); the paunch or belly (as swelling out).

H3771.def: of foreign origin; Karshena, a courtier of Xerxes.

H3772.def: a primitive root; to cut (off, down or asunder); by implication, to destroy or consume; specifically, to covenant (i.e. make an alliance or bargain, originally by cutting flesh and passing between the pieces).
H3772.kjv: be chewed, be con-(feder-) ate, covenant, cut (down, off), destroy, fail, feller, be freed, hew (down), make a league (covenant), lose, perish, utterly, want

H3773.gloss: something cut, i.e. a hewn timber
H3773.def: passive participle feminine of H3772 (כָּרַת); something cut, i.e. a hewn timber.

H3774.def: probably from H3772 (כָּרַת) in the sense of executioner; (compare H2876 (טַבָּח)) (only collectively in the singular as plural); a Kerethite or life-guardsman.

H3775.def: apparently by transposition for H3532 (כֶּבֶשׂ); a young sheep.

H3776.def: feminine of H3775 (כֶּשֶׂב); a young ewe.

H3777.def: from an unused root of uncertain meaning; Kesed, a relative of Abraham.

H3778.gloss: a Kasdite, or descendant of Kesed
H3778.def: (occasionally with enclitic) כַּשְׂדִּימָה; towards the Kasdites into Chaldea), patronymically from H3777 (כֶּשֶׂד) (only in the plural); a Kasdite, or descendant of Kesed; by implication, a Chaldaean (as if so descended); also an astrologer (as if proverbial of that people.

H3779.gloss: a Chaldaean or inhabitant of Chaldaea
H3779.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H3778 (כַּשְׂדִּי); a Chaldaean or inhabitant of Chaldaea; by implication, a Magian or professional astrologer.

H3780.gloss: to grow fat (i.e. be covered with flesh)
H3780.def: a primitive root; to grow fat (i.e. be covered with flesh).

H3781.def: from H3782 (כָּשַׁל); properly, a feller, i.e. an axe.

H3782.gloss: to totter or waver (through weakness of the legs
H3782.def: a primitive root; to totter or waver (through weakness of the legs, especially the ankle); by implication, to falter, stumble, faint or fall.
H3782.kjv: bereave (from the margin), cast down, be decayed, (cause to) fail, (cause, make to) fall (down, -ing), feeble, be (the) ruin(-ed, of), (be) overthrown, (cause to) stumble, utterly, be weak

H3783.def: from H3782 (כָּשַׁל); properly, a tottering, i.e. ruin.

H3784.gloss: to whisper aspell, i.e. to inchant or practise magic
H3784.def: a primitive root; properly, to whisper aspell, i.e. to inchant or practise magic.

H3787.def: a primitive root properly, to be straight or right; by implication, to be acceptable; also to succeed or prosper.

H3789.def: a primitive root; to grave, by implication, to write (describe, inscribe, prescribe, subscribe).

H3790.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H3789 (כָּתַב); to grave, by implication, to write (describe, inscribe, prescribe, subscribe).

H3791.gloss: something written, i.e. a writing, record or book
H3791.def: from H3789 (כָּתַב); something written, i.e. a writing, record or book.

H3792.gloss: something written, i.e. a writing, record or book
H3792.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H3791 (כָּתָב); something written, i.e. a writing, record or book.

H3793.gloss: a letter or other mark branded on the skin
H3793.def: from H3789 (כָּתַב); a letter or other mark branded on the skin.

H3794.def: or כִּתִּיִּי; patrial from an unused name denoting Cyprus (only in the plural); a Kittite or Cypriote; hence, an islander in general, i.e. the Greeks or Romans on the shores opposite Palestine.

H3796.def: from an unused root meaning to compact; a wall (as gathering inmates).

H3797.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H3796 (כֹּתֶל); a wall (as gathering inmates).

H3798.def: from H3796 (כֹּתֶל) and H376 (אִישׁ); wall of a man; Kithlish, a place in Palestine.

H3799.def: a primitive root; properly, to carve or engrave, i.e. (by implication) to inscribe indelibly.

H3800.def: from H3799 (כָּתַם); properly, something carved out, i.e. ore; hence, gold (pure as originally mined).

H3801.def: or כֻּתֹּנֶת; from an unused root meaning to cover (compare H3802 (כָּתֵף)); a shirt.

H3802.gloss: the shoulder (proper, i.e. upper end of the arm
H3802.def: from an unused root meaning to clothe; the shoulder (proper, i.e. upper end of the arm; as being the spot where the garments hang); figuratively, side-piece or lateral projection of anything.

H3803.def: a primitive root; to enclose; hence (in a friendly sense) to crown, (in a hostile one) to besiege; also to wait (as restraining oneself).
H3803.kjv: beset round, compass about, be crowned inclose round, suffer

H3804.def: from H3803 (כָּתַר); properly, a circlet, i.e. a diadem.

H3805.def: feminine active participle of H3803 (כָּתַר); the capital of a column.

H3806.def: a primitive root; to butt or pound.

H3807.def: a primitive root; to bruise or violently strike.
H3807.kjv: beat (down, to pieces), break in pieces, crushed, destroy, discomfit, smite, stamp. l

H3808.def: or לוֹא; or לֹה; (Deuteronomy 3:11), a primitive particle; not (the simple or abs. negation); by implication, no; often used with other particles.
H3808.kjv: before, or else, ere, except, ig(-norant), much, less, nay, neither, never, no((-ne), -r, (-thing)), (as though...,(can-), for) not (out of), of nought, otherwise, out of, surely, as truly as, of a truth, verily, for want, whether, without

H3809.def: (Aramaic) or לָה; (Aramaic) (Daniel 4:32), corresponding to H3808 (לֹא); not (the simple or abs. negation); by implication, no;.
H3809.kjv: or even, neither, no(-ne, -r), (can-) not, as nothing, without

H3810.def: or לוֹ דבַר; (Samuel 9:4,5), or לִדְבִר; (Joshua 13:26), (probably rather לֹדְבַר ); from H3808 (לֹא) and H1699 (דֹּבֶר); pastureless; Lo-Debar, a place in Palestine.
