H3811.def: a primitive root; to tire; (figuratively) to be (or make) disgusted.

H3812.def: from H3811 (לָאָה); weary; Leah, a wife of Jacob.

H3814.def: from H3813 (לָאַט) (or perhaps for active participle of H3874 (לוּט)); properly, muffled, i.e. silently.

H3815.def: from the prepositional prefix and H410 (אֵל); (belonging) to God; Lael an Israelite.

H3816.def: or לְאוֹם; from an unused root meaning to gather; a community.

H3817.def: plural of H3816 (לְאֹם); communities; Leum mim, an Arabian.

H3818.gloss: Lo-Ammi, the symbolic name of a son of Hosea
H3818.def: from H3808 (לֹא) and H5971 (עַם) with pronominal suffix; not my people; Lo-Ammi, the symbolic name of a son of Hosea.

H3819.gloss: Lo-Ruchamah, the symbolic name of a son of Hosea
H3819.def: from H3808 (לֹא) and H7355 (רָחַם); not pitied; Lo-Ruchamah, the symbolic name of a son of Hosea.

H3820.def: a form of H3824; the heart; also used (figuratively) very widely for the feelings, the will and even the intellect.

H3821.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H3820 (לֵב); the heart; also used (figuratively) very widely for the feelings, the will and even the intellect; likewise for the centre of anything.

H3822.def: plural of H3833 (לָבִיא); lionesses; Lebaoth, a place in Palestine.

H3823.def: a primitive root; properly, to be enclosed (as if with fat); by implication (as denominative from H3824 (לֵבָב));  to unheart;  also as denominative from H3834 (לָבִיבָה) i.e.; (in a good sense) transport (with love), or (in a bad sense) stultify; to make cakes.

H3824.gloss: the heart (as the most interior organ)
H3824.def: from H3823 (לָבַב); used also like H3820 (לֵב); the heart (as the most interior organ);.
H3824.kjv: bethink themselves, breast, comfortably, courage, ((faint), (tender-) heart(-ed), midst, mind, unawares, understanding

H3825.gloss: the heart (as the most interior organ)
H3825.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H3824 (לֵבָב); the heart (as the most interior organ);.

H3828.gloss: frankincense (from its whiteness or perhaps that of its s
H3828.def: or לְבֹנָה; from H3836 (לָבָן); frankincense (from its whiteness or perhaps that of its smoke).

H3829.def: the same as H3828 (לְבוֹנָה); Lebonah, a place in Palestine.

H3830.def: or לְבֻשׁ; from H3847 (לָבַשׁ); a garment (literally or figuratively); by implication (euphemistically) a wife.
H3830.kjv: apparel, clothed with, clothing, garment, raiment, vestment, vesture

H3831.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H3830 (לְבוּשׁ); a garment (literally or figuratively); by implication (euphemistically) a wife.

H3832.def: a primitive root; to overthrow; intransposed, to fall.

H3833.def: or (Ezekiel 19:2) לְבִיָּא; irregular masculine plural לְבָאִים; irregular feminine plural לְבָאוֹת; from an unused root meaning;  compare H738 (אֲרִי); to roar; a lion (properly, a lioness as the fiercer (although not a roarer;)).

H3834.gloss: a cake (either as fried or turned)
H3834.def: or rather לְבִבָה; from H3823 (לָבַב) in its original sense of fatness (or perhaps of folding); a cake (either as fried or turned).

H3835.def: a primitive root; also as denominative from H3843 (לְבֵנָה); to be (or become) white;  to make bricks.

H3837.def: the same as H3836 (לָבָן); Laban, a Mesopotamian; also a place in the Desert.

H3838.gloss: Lebana or Lebanah, one of the Nethinim
H3838.def: or לְבָנָה; the same as H3842 (לְבָנָה); Lebana or Lebanah, one of the Nethinim.

H3839.gloss: some sort of whitish tree, perhaps the storax
H3839.def: from H3835 (לָבַן); some sort of whitish tree, perhaps the storax.

H3840.def: from H3835 (לָבַן); properly, whiteness, i.e. (by implication) transparency.

H3841.gloss: Libnah, a place in the Desert and one in Palestine
H3841.def: the same as H3839 (לִבְנֶה); Libnah, a place in the Desert and one in Palestine.

H3842.def: from H3835 (לָבַן); properly, (the) white, i.e. the moon.

H3843.gloss: a brick (from the whiteness of the clay)
H3843.def: from H3835 (לָבַן); a brick (from the whiteness of the clay).

H3844.gloss: Lebanon, a mountain range in Palestine
H3844.def: from H3825 (לְבַב); (the) white mountain (from its snow); Lebanon, a mountain range in Palestine.

H3845.def: from H3835 (לָבַן); white; Libni, an Israelite.

H3846.gloss: a Libnite or descendants of Libni (collectively)
H3846.def: patronymically from H3845 (לִבְנִי); a Libnite or descendants of Libni (collectively).

H3847.def: or לָבֵשׁ; a primitive root; properly, wrap around, i.e. (by implication) to put on agarment or clothe (oneself, or another), literally or figuratively.
H3847.kjv: (in) apparel, arm, array (self), clothe (self), come upon, put (on, upon), wear

H3848.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H3847 (לָבַשׁ); properly, wrap around, i.e. (by implication) to put on agarment or clothe (oneself, or another), literally or figuratively.

H3849.def: from an unused root apparently meaning to deepen or hollow (like H3537 (כַּד)); a log or measure forliquids.

H3850.def: from an unused root of uncertain signification; Lod, a place in Palestine.

H3851.def: from an usused root meaning to gleam; a flash; figuratively, a sharply polished blade or point of aweapon.

H3852.def: or לַהֶבֶת; feminine of H3851 (לַהַב), and meaning the same; a flash; figuratively, a sharply polished blade or point of aweapon.

H3853.gloss: Lehabim, a son of Mizraim, and his descendants
H3853.def: plural of H3851 (לַהַב); flames; Lehabim, a son of Mizraim, and his descendants.

H3854.def: from an unused root meaning to be eager; intense mental application.

H3855.def: from an unused root meaning to glow (compare H3851 (לַהַב)) or else to be earnest (compare H3854 (לַהַג)); Lahad, an Israelite.

H3856.def: a primitive root meaning properly, to burn, i.e. (by implication); to be rabid (figuratively, insane); also (from the exhaustion of frenzy) to languish.

H3857.gloss: to lick, i.e. (by implication) to blaze
H3857.def: a primitive root; properly, to lick, i.e. (by implication) to blaze.
H3857.kjv: burn (up), set on fire, flaming, kindle

H3858.def: from H3857 (לָהַט); a blaze; also (from the idea of enwrapping) magic (as covert).

H3859.gloss: to burn in, i.e. (figuratively) to rankle
H3859.def: a primitive root; properly, to burn in, i.e. (figuratively) to rankle.

H3860.def: from the prepositional prefix meaning to or for and H2005 (הֵן); popularly for if; hence, therefore.
H3860.kjv: for them (by mistake for prepositional suffix)

H3861.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H3860 (לָהֵן); therefore; also except.

H3862.def: probably from an unused root meaning to gather; an assembly.

H3863.def: or לֻא; or לוּ; a conditional particle; if; by implication (interj. as a wish) would that!.
H3863.kjv: if (haply), peradventure, I pray thee, though, I would, would God (that)

H3864.gloss: a Libyan or inhabitant of interior Africa (only in plural)
H3864.def: or לֻבִּי; (Daniel 11:43), partrial from a name probably derived from an unused root meaning to thirst, i.e. a dry region; apparently; a Libyan or inhabitant of interior Africa (only in plural).

H3865.gloss: Lud, the name of two nations
H3865.def: probably of foreign derivation; Lud, the name of two nations.

H3866.gloss: a Ludite or inhabitants of Lud (only in plural)
H3866.def: or לוּדִיִּי; patrial from H3865 (לוּד); a Ludite or inhabitants of Lud (only in plural).

H3867.gloss: to twine, i.e. (by implication) to unite, to remain
H3867.def: a primitive root; properly, to twine, i.e. (by implication) to unite, to remain; also to borrow (as a form of obligation) or (caus.) to lend.
H3867.kjv: abide with, borrow(-er), cleave, join (self), lend(-er)

H3868.def: a primitive root; (compare H3867 (לָוָה), H3874 (לוּט) and H3885 (לוּן)); to turn aside , i.e. (literally) to depart, (figuratively) be perverse.

H3869.gloss: some kind of nuttree, perhaps the almond
H3869.def: probably of foreign origin; some kind of nuttree, perhaps the almond.

H3870.gloss: Luz, the name of two places in Palestine
H3870.def: probably from H3869 (לוּז) (as growing there); Luz, the name of two places in Palestine.

H3871.def: or לֻחַ; from a primitive root; probably meaning to glisten; a tablet (as polished), of stone, wood or metal.

H3872.gloss: Luchith, a place East of the Jordan
H3872.def: or לֻחוֹת; (Jeremiah 48:5), from the same as H3871 (לוּחַ); floored; Luchith, a place East of the Jordan.

H3873.def: active participle of H3907 (לָחַשׁ); (the) enchanter; Lochesh, an Israelite.

H3874.def: a primitive root; to wrap up.

H3876.def: the same as H3875 (לוֹט); Lot, Abraham's nephew.

H3877.def: from H3875 (לוֹט); covering; Lotan, an Idumaean.

H3878.def: from H3867 (לָוָה); attached; Levi, a son of Jacob.

H3879.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H3880 (לִוְיָה); something attached, i.e. a wreath.

H3880.def: from H3867 (לָוָה); something attached, i.e. a wreath.

H3881.gloss: a Levite or descendant of Levi
H3881.def: or לֵוִי; patronymically from H3878 (לֵוִי); a Levite or descendant of Levi.

H3882.def: from H3867 (לָוָה); a wreathed animal, i.e. a serpent (especially the crocodile or some other large sea-monster); figuratively, the constellation of the dragon; also as a symbol of Babylon.

H3883.def: from an unused root meaning to fold back; a spiral step.

H3884.def: or לוּלֵי; from H3863 (לוּא) and H3808 (לֹא); if not.
H3884.kjv: except, had not, if (...not), unless, were it not that

H3885.def: or לִין; a primitive root; to stop (usually over night); by implication, to stay permanently; hence (in a bad sense) to be obstinate (especially in words, to complain).
H3885.kjv: abide (all night), continue, dwell, endure, grudge, be left, lie all night, (cause to) lodge (all night, in, -ing, this night), (make to) murmur, remain, tarry (all night, that night)

H3886.def: a primitive root; to gulp; figuratively, to be rash.

H3887.gloss: to make mouths at, i.e. to scoff
H3887.def: a primitive root; properly, to make mouths at, i.e. to scoff; hence (from the effort to pronounce a foreign language) to interpret, or (generally) intercede.
H3887.kjv: ambassador, have in derision, interpreter, make a mock, mocker, scorn(-er, -ful), teacher

H3889.def: from H3888 (לוּשׁ); kneading; Lush, a place in Palestine.

H3890.def: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to H3867 (לָוָה); properly, adhesion, i.e. (as preposition) with.

H3892.def: from an unused root meaning to be new; fresh, i.e. unused or undried.

H3893.def: from the same as H3892 (לַח); freshness, i.e. vigor.

H3894.def: or לָחֻם; passive participle of H3898 (לָחַם); properly, eaten, i.e. food; also flesh, i.e. body.

H3895.def: from an unused root meaning to be soft; the cheek (from its fleshiness); hence, the jaw-bone.

H3896.def: a form of H3895 (לְחִי); Lechi, a place in Palestine.

H3898.def: a primitive root; to feed on; figuratively, to consume; by implication, to battle (as destruction).
H3898.kjv: devour, eat, ever, fight(-ing), overcome, prevail, (make) war(-ring)

H3899.def: from H3898 (לָחַם); See also H1036 (בֵּית לְעַפְרָה); food (for man or beast), especially bread, or grain (for making it).
H3899.kjv: (shew-) bread, eat, food, fruit, loaf, meat, victuals

H3900.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H3899 (לֶחֶם); (for man or beast), especially bread, or grain (for making it).

H3902.def: from H3899 (לֶחֶם); foodful; (or perhaps erroneous transcription) for H1022 (בֵּית הַלַּחְמִי); Lachmi, an Israelite; or rather probably a brief form.

H3903.gloss: Lachmam or Lachmas, a place in Palestine
H3903.def: probably by erroneous transcription for לַחְמָם; from H3899 (לֶחֶם); food-like; Lachmam or Lachmas, a place in Palestine.

H3904.def: (Aramaic) from an unused root of uncertain meaning; a concubine.

H3905.def: a primitive root; properly, to press, i.e. (figuratively) to distress.
H3905.kjv: afflict, crush, force, hold fast, oppress(-or), thrust self

H3907.def: a primitive root; to whisper; by implication, to mumble aspell (as a magician).

H3908.def: from H3907 (לָחַשׁ); properly, a whisper, i.e. by implication, (in a good sense) a private prayer, (in a bad one) an incantation; concretely, an amulet.

H3909.def: a form of H3814 (לָאט) or else participle from H3874 (לוּט); properly, covered, i.e. secret; by implication, incantation; also secrecy or (adverb) covertly.

H3910.gloss: a gum (from its sticky nature), probably ladanum
H3910.def: probably from H3874 (לוּט); a gum (from its sticky nature), probably ladanum.

H3911.gloss: a kind of lizard (from its covert habits)
H3911.def: from an unused root meaning to hide; a kind of lizard (from its covert habits).

H3912.def: masculine plural of passive participle of H3913 (לָטַשׁ); hammered (i.e. oppressed) ones; Letushim, an Arabian tribe.

H3913.gloss: to hammer out (an edge), i.e. to sharpen
H3913.def: a primitive root; properly, to hammer out (an edge), i.e. to sharpen.

H3914.def: a form of H3880 (לִוְיָה); a wreath.

H3915.gloss: a twist (away of the light), i.e. night
H3915.def: or (Isaiah 21:11) לֵיל; also לַיְלָה; from the same as H3883 (לוּל); properly, a twist (away of the light), i.e. night; figuratively, adversity.

H3916.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H3815 (לָאֵל); Lael an Israelite.

H3918.def: from H3888 (לוּשׁ) in the sense of crushing; a lion (from his destructive blows).

H3919.gloss: Laish, the name of two places in Palestine
H3919.def: the same as H3918 (לַיִשׁ); Laish, the name of two places in Palestine.

H3920.gloss: to catch (in a net, trap or pit)
H3920.def: a primitive root; to catch (in a net, trap or pit); generally, to capture or occupy; also to choose (by lot); figuratively, to cohere.
H3920.kjv: at all, catch (self), be frozen, be holden, stick together, take

H3921.gloss: something to capture with, i.e. a noose
H3921.def: from H3920 (לָכַד); something to capture with, i.e. a noose.

H3922.def: from H3212 (יָלַךְ); a journey; Lekah, a place in Palestine.

H3923.def: from an unused root of uncertain meaning; Lakish, a place in Palestine.

H3924.def: from the same as H3883 (לוּל); a loop.

H3925.def: a primitive root; properly, to goad, i.e. (by implication) to teach (the rod being an Oriental incentive).
H3925.kjv: (un-) accustomed, diligently, expert, instruct, learn, skilful, teach(-er, -ing)

H3926.def: a prolonged and separable form of the prepositional prefix; to or for.

H3927.gloss: Lemuel or Lemoel, a symbolic name of Solomon
H3927.def: or לְמוֹאֵל; from H3926 (לְמוֹ) and H410 (אֵל); (belonging) to God; Lemuel or Lemoel, a symbolic name of Solomon.

H3929.gloss: Lemek, the name of two antediluvian patriarchs
H3929.def: from an unused root of uncertain meaning; Lemek, the name of two antediluvian patriarchs.

H3932.def: a primitive root; to deride; by implication (as if imitating a foreigner) to speak unintelligibly.
H3932.kjv: have in derision, laugh (to scorn), mock (on), stammering

H3934.def: from H3932 (לָעַג); a buffoon; also a foreigner.

H3935.def: from an unused root of uncertain meaning; Ladah, an Israelite.

H3936.gloss: Ladan, the name of two Israelites
H3936.def: from the same as H3935 (לַעְדָּה); Ladan, the name of two Israelites.

H3937.gloss: to speak in a foreign tongue
H3937.def: a primitive root; to speak in a foreign tongue.

H3938.def: a primitive root; to swallow greedily; causatively, to feed.

H3939.gloss: wormwood (regarded as poisonous, and therefore accursed)
H3939.def: from an unused root supposed to mean to curse; wormwood (regarded as poisonous, and therefore accursed).

H3940.def: or לַפִּד; from an unused root probably meaning to shine; a flambeau, lamp or flame.

H3941.def: feminine plural of H3940 (לַפִּיד); Lappidoth, the husband of Deborah.

H3942.def: from the prepositional prefix (to or for) and H6440 (פָּנִים); anterior.

H3943.gloss: to bend, i.e. (by implication) to clasp
H3943.def: a primitive root; properly, to bend, i.e. (by implication) to clasp; also (reflexively) to turn around or aside.

H3946.def: from an unused root thought to mean to stop up by a barricade; perhaps fortification; Lakkum, a place in Palestine.

H3947.gloss: to take (in the widest variety of applications)
H3947.def: a primitive root; to take (in the widest variety of applications).
H3947.kjv: accept, bring, buy, carry away, drawn, fetch, get, infold, many, mingle, place, receive(-ing), reserve, seize, send for, take (away, -ing, up), use, win

H3948.def: from H3947 (לָקַח); properly, something received, i.e. (mentally) instruction (whether on the part of the teacher or hearer); also (in an active and sinister sense) inveiglement.

H3949.def: from H3947 (לָקַח); learned; Likchi, an Israelite.

H3950.gloss: to pick up, i.e. (generally) to gather
H3950.def: a primitive root; properly, to pick up, i.e. (generally) to gather; specifically, to glean.

H3952.def: a primitive root; to lick or lap.

H3953.def: a primitive root; to gather the after crop.

H3955.def: from an unused root of uncertain meaning; apparently juice, i.e.; (figuratively) vigor; also a sweet or fat cake.

H3956.def: or לָשֹׁן; also (in plural) feminine לְשֹׁנָה; from H3960 (לָשַׁן); the tongue (of man or animals), used literally (as the instrument of licking, eating, or speech), and figuratively (speech, an ingot, a fork of flame, a cove of water).
H3956.kjv: babbler, bay, evil speaker, language, talker, tongue, wedge

H3957.gloss: a room in a building (whether for storage
H3957.def: from an unused root of uncertain meaning; a room in a building (whether for storage, eating, or lodging).

H3958.def: from an unused root of uncertain meaning; a gem, perhaps the jacinth.

H3959.def: the same as H3958 (לֶשֶׁם); Leshem, a place in Palestine.

H3960.gloss: to wag the tongue, i.e. to calumniate
H3960.def: a primitive root; properly, to lick; but used only as a denominative from H3956 (לָשׁוֹן); to wag the tongue, i.e. to calumniate.

H3961.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H3956 (לָשׁוֹן); speech, i.e. a nation.

H3962.gloss: Lesha, a place probably East of the Jordan
H3962.def: from an unused root thought to mean to break through; a boiling spring; Lesha, a place probably East of the Jordan.

H3963.def: from an unused root of uncertain meaning; a measure for things dry.

H3966.gloss: vehemence, i.e. (with or without preposition) vehemently
H3966.def: from the same as H181 (אוּד); properly, vehemence, i.e. (with or without preposition) vehemently; by implication, wholly, speedily, etc. (often with other words as an intensive or superlative; especially when repeated).
H3966.kjv: diligently, especially, exceeding(-ly), far, fast, good, great(-ly), louder and louder, might(-ily, -y), (so) much, quickly, (so) sore, utterly, very (much, sore), well

H3967.def: or מֵאיָה; properly, a primitive numeral; a hundred; also as a multiplicative and a fraction.

H3968.def: the same as H3967 (מֵאָה); Meah, a tower in Jerusalem.

H3969.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H3967 (מֵאָה); properly, a primitive numeral; a hundred; also as a multiplicative and a fraction.

H3971.def: usually מוּם; as if passive participle from an unused root probably meaning; to stain; a blemish (physically or morally).

H3972.gloss: a speck or point, i.e. (by implication) something
H3972.def: apparently a form of H3971 (מאוּם); properly, a speck or point, i.e. (by implication) something; with negative, nothing.

H3974.def: or מָאֹר; also (in plural) feminine מְאוֹרָה; or מְאֹרָה; from H215 (אוֹר); properly, a luminous body or luminary, i.e. (abstractly) light (as an element); figuratively, brightness, i.e.cheerfulness; specifically, a chandelier.

H3975.def: feminine passive participle of H215 (אוֹר); something lighted, i.e. an aperture; by implication, a crevice or hole (of a serpent).

H3976.gloss: (only in the dual) a pair of scales
H3976.def: from H239 (אָזַן); (only in the dual) a pair of scales.

H3977.gloss: (only in the dual) a pair of scales
H3977.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H3976 (מֹאזֵן); (only in the dual) a pair of scales.

H3978.gloss: an eatable (includ. provender, flesh and fruit)
H3978.def: from H398 (אָכַל); an eatable (includ. provender, flesh and fruit).

H3979.gloss: something to eat with,i.e. a knife
H3979.def: from H398 (אָכַל); something to eat with,i.e. a knife.

H3980.def: from H398 (אָכַל); something eaten (by fire), i.e. fuel.

H3982.def: from H559 (אָמַר); something (authoritatively) said, i.e. an edict.

H3983.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H3982 (מַאֲמַר); something (authoritatively) said, i.e. an edict.

H3984.def: (Aramaic) probably from a root corresponding to H579 (אָנָה) in the sense of an inclosure by sides; a utensil.

H3988.def: a primitive root; to spurn; also (intransitively) to disappear.
H3988.kjv: abhor, cast away (off), contemn, despise, disdain, (become) loathe(some), melt away, refuse, reject, reprobate, utterly, vile person

H3989.def: from H644 (אָפָה); something baked, i.e. a batch.

H3990.def: from the same as H651 (אָפֵל); something opaque.

H3992.gloss: to be bitter or (causatively) to embitter, i.e. be painful
H3992.def: a primitive root; to be bitter or (causatively) to embitter, i.e. be painful.

H3993.kjv: lie in ambush, ambushment, lurking place, lying in wait

H3995.gloss: a separation, i.e. (concretely) a separate place
H3995.def: from H914 (בָּדַל); a separation, i.e. (concretely) a separate place.

H3996.gloss: an entrance (the place or the act)
H3996.def: from H935 (בּוֹא); (with or without H8121 (שֶׁמֶשׁ)); an entrance (the place or the act); specifically sunset or the west; also (adverb with preposition) towards.
H3996.kjv: by which came, as cometh, in coming, as men enter into, entering, entrance into, entry, where goeth, going down, westward. Compare H4126 (מוֹבָא)

H3999.def: from H2986 (יָבַל) in the sense of flowing; a deluge.

H4003.def: from the same as H950 (בּוּקָה); emptiness.

H4004.def: from H977 (בָּחַר); select, i.e. well fortified.

H4006.def: the same as H4005 (מִבְחָר); Mibchar, an Israelite.

H4007.def: or מֶבָּט; from H5027 (נָבַט); something expected, i.e. (abstractly) expectation.

H4008.def: from H981 (בָּטָא); a rash utterance (hasty vow).

H4009.def: from H982 (בָּטַח); properly, a refuge, i.e. (objective) security, or (subjective) assurance.

H4012.def: from H1129 (בָּנָה); built up; Mebunnai, an Israelite.

H4013.gloss: a fortification, castle, or fortified city
H4013.def: also (in plural) feminine (Daniel 11:l5) מִבְצָרָה; from H1219 (בָּצַר); a fortification, castle, or fortified city; figuratively, a defender.

H4014.def: the same as H4013 (מִבְצָר); Mibtsar, an Idumaean.

H4017.gloss: Mibsam, the name of an Ishmaelite and of an Israelite
H4017.def: from the same as H1314 (בֶּשֶׂם); fragrant; Mibsam, the name of an Ishmaelite and of an Israelite.

H4019.gloss: Magbish, an Israelite, or a place in Palestine
H4019.def: from the same as H1378 (גָּבִישׁ); stiffening; Magbish, an Israelite, or a place in Palestine.

H4021.def: from the same as H1389 (גִּבְעָה); a cap (as hemispherical).

H4022.def: from an unused root probably meaning to be eminent; properly, a distinguished thing; hence something valuable, as aproduct or fruit.

H4023.gloss: Megiddon or Megiddo, a place in Palestine
H4023.def: (Zechariah H12 (אַבְדָן)) or מְגִדּוֹ; from H1413 (גָּדַד); rendezvous; Megiddon or Megiddo, a place in Palestine.

H4024.def: or מִגְדֹּל; probably of Egyptian origin; Migdol, a place in Egypt.

H4025.def: from H4022 (מֶגֶד) and H410 (אֵל); preciousness of God; Magdiel, an Idumaean.

H4026.gloss: a tower (from its size or height)
H4026.def: also (in plural) feminine מִגְדָּלָה; from H1431 (גָּדַל); a tower (from its size or height); by analogy, a rostrum; figuratively, a (pyramidal) bed of flowers.
H4026.kjv: castle, flower, tower. Compare the names following

H4027.def: from H4026 (מִגְדָּל) and H410 (אֵל); tower of God; Migdal-El, a place in Palestine.

H4028.def: from H4026 (מִגְדָּל) and H1408 (גַּד); tower of Fortune; Migdal-Gad, a place in Palestine.

H4029.def: from H4026 (מִגְדָּל) and H5739 (עֵדֶר); tower of a flock; Migdal-Eder, a place in Palestine.

H4030.def: from the same as H4022 (מֶגֶד); preciousness, i.e. a gem.

H4031.def: from H1463 (גּוֹג); Magog, a son of Japheth; also a barbarous northern region.

H4032.def: or (Lamentations 2:22) מָגוּר; from H1481 (גּוּר) in the sense of fearing; a fright (objective or subjective).

H4033.def: or מָגֻר; from H1481 (גּוּר) in the sense of lodging; a temporary abode; by extension, a permanent residence.
H4033.kjv: dwelling, pilgrimage, where sojourn, be a stranger. Compare H4032 (מָגוֹר)

H4035.def: feminine of H4032 (מָגוֹר) or of H4033 (מָגוּר); a fright; also a granary.

H4036.gloss: Magor-mis-Sabib, a symbolic name of Pashur
H4036.def: from H4032 (מָגוֹר) and H5439 (סָבִיב) with the preposition inserted; affright from around; Magor-mis-Sabib, a symbolic name of Pashur.

H4037.gloss: a cutting implement, i.e. a blade
H4037.def: from H1504 (גָּזַר); a cutting implement, i.e. a blade.

H4038.def: from an unused root meaning to reap; a sickle.

H4041.def: from the same as H1571 (גַּם); properly, accumulation, i.e. impulse or direction.

H4042.def: a denominative from H4043 (מָגֵן); properly, to shield; encompass with; figuratively, to rescue, to hand safely over (i.e. surrender).

H4043.gloss: a shield (i.e. the small one or buckler)
H4043.def: also (in plural) feminine מְגִנָּה; from H1598 (גָּנַן); a shield (i.e. the small one or buckler); figuratively, a protector; also the scaly hide of the crocodile.
H4043.kjv: armed, buckler, defence, ruler, scale, shield

H4044.gloss: a covering (in a bad sense), i.e. blindness or obduracy
H4044.def: from H4042 (מָגַן); a covering (in a bad sense), i.e. blindness or obduracy.

H4046.def: from H5062 (נָגַף); a pestilence; by analogy, defeat.

H4047.def: apparently from H1479 (גּוּף) or H5062 (נָגַף) and H6211 (עָשׁ); exterminator of (the) moth; Magpiash, an Israelite.

H4048.def: a primitive root; to yield up; intensively, to precipitate.

H4051.def: from H4048 (מָגַר); precipice; Migron, a place in Palestine.

H4052.def: from H1639 (גָּרַע); a ledge or offset.

H4053.gloss: something thrown off (by the spade), i.e. a clod
H4053.def: from H1640 (גָּרַף); something thrown off (by the spade), i.e. a clod.

H4054.gloss: a suburb (i.e. open country whither flocks are driven fro
H4054.def: also (in plural) feminine (Ezekiel 27:28) מִגְרָשָׁה; from H1644 (גָּרַשׁ); a suburb (i.e. open country whither flocks are driven from pasture); hence, the area around abuilding, or the margin of the sea.

H4055.def: or מֵד; from H4058 (מָדַד); properly, extent, i.e. height; also a measure; by implication, a vesture (as measured); also a carpet.
H4055.kjv: armour, clothes, garment, judgment, measure, raiment, stature

H4057.gloss: a pasture (i.e. open field, whither cattle are driven)
H4057.def: from H1696 (דָבַר) in the sense of driving; a pasture (i.e. open field, whither cattle are driven); by implication, a desert; also speech (including its organs).

H4058.def: a primitive root; properly, to stretch; by implication, to measure (as if by stretching a line); figuratively, to be extended.

H4060.def: feminine of H4055 (מַד); properly, extension, i.e. height or breadth; also a measure (including its standard); hence a portion (as measured) or a vestment; specifically, tribute (as measured).
H4060.kjv: garment, measure(-ing, meteyard, piece, size, (great) stature, tribute, wide

H4061.def: (Aramaic) or מִנְדָּה; (Aramaic), corresponding to H4060 (מִדָּה); tribute in money.

H4062.def: perhaps from the equivalent of H1722 (דְּהַב); goldmaking, i.e. exactness.

H4063.def: from an unused root meaning to stretch; properly, extent, i.e. measure; by implication, a dress (as measured).

H4066.def: from H1777 (דִּין); a contest or quarrel.
H4066.kjv: brawling, contention(-ous), discord, strife. Compare H4079 (מִדְיָן), H4090 (מְדָן)

H4067.def: from the same as H4063 (מֶדֶו); extensiveness, i.e. height.

H4068.def: the same as H4067 (מָדוֹן); Madon, a place in Palestine.

H4069.def: or מַדֻּעַ; from H4100 (מָה) and the passive participle of H3045 (יָדַע); what (is) known?; i.e. (by implication) (adverbially) why?.

H4070.def: (Aramaic) or מְדֹר; (Aramaic), or מְדָר; (Aramaic), from H1753 (דּוּר); a dwelling.

H4071.def: or מְדֻרָה; from H1752 (דּוּר) in the sense of accumulation; a pile of fuel.

H4073.def: from H1765 (דָּחַף); a push, i.e. ruin.

H4074.gloss: Madai, a country of central Asia
H4074.def: of foreign derivation; Madai, a country of central Asia.

H4075.gloss: a Madian or native of Madai
H4075.def: patrial from H4074 (מָדַי); a Madian or native of Madai.

H4076.gloss: Madai, a country of central Asia
H4076.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H4074 (מָדַי); Madai, a country of central Asia.

H4077.gloss: a Madian or native of Madai
H4077.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H4075 (מָדַי); a Madian or native of Madai.

H4078.def: from H4100 (מָה) and H1767 (דַּי); what (is) enough, i.e. sufficiently.

H4079.def: a variation for H4066 (מָדוֹן); a contest or quarrel.

H4080.def: the same as H4079 (מִדְיָן); Midjan, a son of Abraham; also his country and (collectively) his descendants.

H4081.def: a variation for H4080 (מִדְיָן); Midjan, a son of Abraham; also his country and (collectively) his descendants.

H4082.def: from H1777 (דִּין); properly, a judgeship, i.e. jurisdiction; by implication, a district (as ruled by a judge); generally, a region.

H4083.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H4082 (מְדִינָה); properly, a judgeship, i.e. jurisdiction; by implication, a district (as ruled by a judge); generally, a region.

H4084.gloss: a Midjanite or descendant (native) of Midjan
H4084.def: patronymical or patrial from H4080 (מִדְיָן); a Midjanite or descendant (native) of Midjan.

H4086.def: from the same as H1828 (דֹּמֶן); dunghill; Madmen, a place in Palestine.

H4087.def: feminine from the same as H1828 (דֹּמֶן); a dunghill.

H4088.def: the same as H4087 (מַדְמֵנָה); Madmenah, a place in Palestine.

H4089.def: a variation for H4087 (מַדְמֵנָה); Madmannah, a place in Palestine.

H4090.def: a form of H4066 (מָדוֹן); a contest or quarrel.

H4091.def: the same as H4090 (מְדָן); Medan, a son of Abraham.

H4092.gloss: a Midjanite or descendant (native) of Midjan
H4092.def: a variation of H4084 (מִדְיָנִי); a Midjanite or descendant (native) of Midjan.

H4093.def: or מַדַּע; from H3045 (יָדַע); intelligence or consciousness.

H4095.def: from an unused root meaning to step; properly, a step; by implication, a steep or inaccessible place.

H4096.gloss: a treading, i.e. a place for stepping on
H4096.def: from H1869 (דָּרַךְ); a treading, i.e. a place for stepping on.

H4097.def: from H1875 (דָּרַשׁ); properly, an investigation, i.e. (by implication) a treatise or elaborate compilation.

H4098.def: from H1758 (דּוּשׁ); a threshing, i.e. (concretely and figuratively) down-trodden people.

H4099.def: of Persian origin; Medatha, the father of Haman.

H4100.def: or מַה; or מָ; or מַ; also מֶה; a primitive particle; properly, interrogative what? (including how? why? when?); but also exclamation, what! (including how!), or indefinitely what (including whatever, and even relatively, that which); often used with prefixes in various adverbial or conjunctive senses.
H4100.kjv: how (long, oft, (-soever)), (no-) thing, what (end, good, purpose, thing), whereby(-fore, -in, -to, -with), (for) why

H4101.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H4100 (מָה); properly, interrogative what? (including how? why? when?); but also exclamation, what! (including how!), or indefinitely what.
H4101.kjv: how great (mighty), that which, what(-soever), why

H4102.def: apparently a denominative from H4100 (מָה); properly, to question or hesitate, i.e. (by implication) to be reluctant.

H4103.kjv: destruction, discomfiture, trouble, tumult, vexation, vexed

H4104.def: of Persian origin; Mehuman, a eunuch of Xerxes.

H4105.gloss: Mehetabel, the name of an Edomitish man and woman
H4105.def: from H3190 (יָטַב) (augmented) and H410 (אֵל); bettered of God; Mehetabel, the name of an Edomitish man and woman.

H4106.def: or מָהִר; from H4116 (מָהַר); quick; hence, skilful.

H4107.gloss: to cut down or reduce, i.e. by implication, to adulterate
H4107.def: a primitive root; properly, to cut down or reduce, i.e. by implication, to adulterate.

H4108.def: from H1980 (הָלַךְ); a walking (plural collectively), i.e. access.

H4109.gloss: a walk, i.e. a passage or a distance
H4109.def: from H1980 (הָלַךְ); a walk, i.e. a passage or a distance.

H4111.def: from H4110 (מַהֲלָל) and H410 (אֵל); praise of God; Mahalalel, the name of an antediluvian patriarch and of an Israelite.

H4113.def: from an unused root of uncertain meaning; perhaps an abyss.

H4115.def: from H2015 (הָפַךְ); a wrench, i.e. the stocks.

H4116.gloss: to be liquid or flow easily, i.e. (by implication)
H4116.def: a primitive root; properly, to be liquid or flow easily, i.e. (by implication); to hurry (in a good or a bad sense); often used (with another verb) adverbially, promptly.
H4116.kjv: be carried headlong, fearful, (cause to make, in, make) haste(-n, -ily), (be) hasty, (fetch, make ready) quickly, rash, shortly, (be so) soon, make speed, speedily, straightway, suddenly, swift

H4117.gloss: to bargain (for a wife), i.e. to wed
H4117.def: a primitive root (perhaps rather the same as H4116 (מָהַר) through the idea of readiness in assent); to bargain (for a wife), i.e. to wed.

H4118.def: from H4116 (מָהַר); properly, hurrying; hence (adverbially) in ahurry.
H4118.kjv: hasteth, hastily, at once, quickly, soon, speedily, suddenly

H4119.def: from H4117 (מָהַר); a price (for a wife).

H4120.def: feminine of H4118 (מַהֵר); properly, a hurry; hence (adverbially) promptly.
H4120.kjv: hastily, quickly, shortly, soon, make (with) speed(-ily), swiftly

H4121.def: from H4116 (מָהַר); hasty; Maharai, an Israelite.

H4122.def: from H4118 (מַהֵר) and H7998 (שָׁלָל) and H2363 (חוּשׁ) and H957 (בַּז); hasting (is he (the enemy) to the) booty, swift (to the) prey; Maher-Shalal-Chash-Baz; the symbolical name of the son of Isaiah.

H4124.gloss: Moab, an incestuous son of Lot
H4124.def: from a prolonged form of the prepositional prefix m-and H1 (אָב); from (her (the mother's)) father; Moab, an incestuous son of Lot; also his territory and descendants.

H4125.gloss: a Moabite or Moabitess, i.e. a descendant from Moab
H4125.def: feminine מוֹאָבִיָּה; or מוֹאָבִיתxlit Môwâbîyth corrected to Môwʼâbîyth; patronymical from H4124 (מוֹאָב); a Moabite or Moabitess, i.e. a descendant from Moab.

H4126.def: by transp. for H3996 (מָבוֹא); an entrance.

H4127.def: a primitive root; to melt, i.e. literally (to soften, flow down, disappear), or figuratively (to fear, faint).
H4127.kjv: consume, dissolve, (be) faint(-hearted), melt (away), make soft

H4129.def: or rather מֹדָע; from H3045 (יָדַע); an acquaintance.

H4131.def: a primitive root; to waver; by implication, to slip, shake, fall.
H4131.kjv: be carried, cast, be out of course, be fallen in decay, exceedingly, fall(-ing down), be (re-) moved, be ready, shake, slide, slip

H4132.def: from H4131 (מוֹט); a wavering, i.e. fall; by implication, a pole (as shaking); hence, a yoke (as essentially a bent pole).

H4133.def: feminine of H4132 (מוֹט); a pole; by implication, an ox-bow; hence, a yoke (either literal or figurative).

H4134.gloss: to become thin, i.e. (figuratively) be impoverished
H4134.def: a primitive root; to become thin, i.e. (figuratively) be impoverished.

H4135.def: a primitive root; to cut short, i.e. curtail (specifically the prepuce, i.e. to circumcise); by implication, to blunt; figuratively, to destroy.
H4135.kjv: circumcise(-ing), selves), cut down (in pieces), destroy, must needs

H4136.def: or מוֹל; (Deuteronomy 1:1), or מוֹאל; (Nehemiah 12:38), or מֻל; (Numbers 22:5), from H4135 (מוּל); properly, abrupt, i.e. a precipice; by implication, the front; used only adverbially (with prepositional prefix) opposite.
H4136.kjv: (over) against, before, (fore-) front, from, (God-) ward, toward, with

H4137.def: from H3205 (יָלַד); birth; Moladah, a place in Palestine.

H4138.def: from H3205 (יָלַד); nativity (plural birth-place); by implication, lineage, native country; also offspring, family.

H4140.def: from H3205 (יָלַד); genitor; Molid, an Israelite.

H4141.gloss: a turn, i.e. circuit (of a building)
H4141.def: from H5437 (סָבַב); a turn, i.e. circuit (of a building).

H4142.def: or מֻסַבָּה; feminine of H4141 (מוּסָב); a reversal, i.e. the backside (of a gem), fold (of a double-leaved door), transmutation (of a name).
H4142.kjv: being changed, inclosed, be set, turning

H4145.def: feminine of H4143 (מוּסָד); a foundation; figuratively, an appointment.

H4146.def: or מֹסָדָה; feminine of H4144 (מוֹסָד); a foundation.

H4147.def: also (in plural) feminine מוֹסֵרָה; or מֹסְרָה; from H3256 (יָסַר); properly, chastisement, i.e. (by implication) a halter; figuratively, restraint.

H4148.def: from H3256 (יָסַר); properly, chastisement; figuratively, reproof, warning or instruction; also restraint.
H4148.kjv: bond, chastening(-eth), chastisement, check, correction, discipline, doctrine, instruction, rebuke

H4149.gloss: Moserah or Moseroth, a place in the Desert
H4149.def: or (plural) מֹסְרוֹת feminine of H4147 (מוֹסֵר); correction or corrections; Moserah or Moseroth, a place in the Desert.

H4150.gloss: an appointment, i.e. a fixed time or season
H4150.def: or מֹעֵד; or (feminine) מוֹעָדָה; (2 Chronicles 8:13), from H3259 (יָעַד); properly, an appointment, i.e. a fixed time or season; specifically, a festival; conventionally ayear; by implication, an assembly (as convened for a definite purpose); technically the congregation; by extension, the place of meeting; also a signal (as appointed beforehand).
H4150.kjv: appointed (sign, time), (place of, solemn) assembly, congregation, (set, solemn) feast, (appointed, due) season, solemn(-ity), synogogue, (set) time (appointed)

H4151.def: from H3259 (יָעַד); (as in H4150 (מוֹעֵד)); properly, an assembly  figuratively, a troop.

H4152.def: from H3259 (יָעַד); an appointed place, i.e. asylum.

H4153.def: from H4151 (מוֹעָד) and H3050 (יָהּ); assembly of Jah; Moadjah, an Israelite.

H4154.def: feminine passive participle of H4571 (מָעַד); properly, made to slip, i.e. dislocated.

H4155.def: from H5774 (עוּף); properly, covered, i.e. dark; abstractly, obscurity, i.e. distress.

H4158.gloss: Mophaath or Mephaath, a place in Palestine
H4158.def: (Jeremiah 48:21) or מֵיפַעַת; or מֵפַעַת; from H3313 (יָפַע); illuminative; Mophaath or Mephaath, a place in Palestine.

H4159.def: or מֹפֵת; from H3302 (יָפָה) in the sense of conspicuousness; a miracle; by implication, a token or omen.

H4160.def: a primitive root; to press, i.e. (figuratively) to oppress.

H4161.def: or מֹצָאxlit môtsâ corrected to môtsâʼ; from H3318 (יָצָא); a going forth, i.e. (the act) an egress, or (the place) an exit; hence, a source or product; specifically, dawn, the rising of the sun (the East), exportation, utterance, a gate, a fountain, a mine, a meadow (as producing grass).
H4161.kjv: brought out, bud, that which came out, east, going forth, goings out, that which (thing that) is gone out, outgoing, proceeded out, spring, vein, (water-) course (springs)

H4162.gloss: Motsa, the name of two Israelites
H4162.def: the same as H4161 (מוֹצָא); Motsa, the name of two Israelites.

H4163.def: feminine of H4161 (מוֹצָא); (marg.; compare H6675 (צוֹאָה)); a family descent; also a sewer.

H4164.def: or מוּצָק; from H3332 (יָצַק); narrowness; figuratively, distress.

H4165.gloss: fusion, i.e. literally, a casting (of metal)
H4165.def: from H5694 (עָגִיל); properly, fusion, i.e. literally, a casting (of metal); figuratively, a mass (of clay).

H4166.gloss: something poured out, i.e. a casting (of metal)
H4166.def: or מֻצָקָה; from H3332 (יָצַק); properly, something poured out, i.e. a casting (of metal); by implication, a tube (as cast).

H4167.def: a primitive root; to jeer, i.e. (intens.) blaspheme.

H4168.def: from H3344 (יָקַד); a fire or fuel; abstractly, a conflagration.

H4170.gloss: a noose (for catching animals) (literally or figuratively)
H4170.def: or מֹקֵשׁ; from H3369 (יָקֹשׁ); a noose (for catching animals) (literally or figuratively); by implication, a hook (for the nose).

H4171.def: a primitive root; to alter; by implication, to barter, to dispose of.

H4172.def: or מֹרָא; or מוֹרָהxlit môrâh corrected to môwrâh; (Psalm 9:20), from H3372 (יָרֵא); fear; by implication, a fearful thing or deed.
H4172.kjv: dread, (that ought to be) fear(-ed), terribleness, terror

H4173.def: or מֹרַג; from an unused root meaning to triturate; a threshing sledge.

H4174.def: from H3381 (יָרַד); a descent; as architecture, an ornamental appendage, perhaps a festoon.
H4174.kjv: going down, steep place, thin work

H4175.def: from H3384 (יָרָה); (see H3138 (יוֹרֶה)); an archer; also teacher or teaching; also the early rain.

H4176.def: or מֹרֶה; the same as H4175 (מוֹרֶה); Moreh, a Canaanite; also a hill (perhaps named from him).

H4177.def: from H4171 (מוּר) in the sense of shearing; a razor.

H4179.def: or מֹרִיָּה; from H7200 (רָאָה) and H3050 (יָהּ); seen of Jah; Morijah, a hill in Palestine.

H4180.def: from H3423 (יָרַשׁ); a possession; figuratively, delight.

H4182.def: from H3423 (יָרַשׁ) and H1661 (גַּת); possession of Gath; Moresheth-Gath, a place in Palestine.

H4183.gloss: a Morashtite or inhabitant of Moresheth-Gath
H4183.def: patrial from H4182 (מוֹרֶשֶׁת גַּת); a Morashtite or inhabitant of Moresheth-Gath.

H4185.def: a primitive root (perhaps rather the same as H4184 (מוּשׁ) through the idea of receding by contact); to withdraw (both literally and figuratively, whether intransitive or transitive).
H4185.kjv: cease, depart, go back, remove, take away

H4186.def: or מֹשָׁב; from H3427 (יָשַׁב); a seat; figuratively, a site; abstractly, a session; by extension an abode (the place or the time); by implication, population.
H4186.kjv: assembly, dwell in, dwelling(-place), wherein (that) dwelt (in), inhabited place, seat, sitting, situation, sojourning

H4187.def: or מֻשִּׁי; from H4184 (מוּשׁ); sensitive; Mushi, a Levite.

H4188.gloss: a Mushite (collectively) or descendants of Mushi
H4188.def: patronymical from H4187 (מוּשִׁי); a Mushite (collectively) or descendants of Mushi.

H4189.def: act participle feminine of H4900 (מָשַׁךְ); something drawing, i.e. (figuratively) a cord.

H4191.def: a primitive root; to die (literally or figuratively); causatively, to kill.
H4191.kjv: at all, crying, (be) dead (body, man, one), (put to, worthy of) death, destroy(-er), (cause to, be like to, must) die, kill, necro(-mancer), must needs, slay, surely, very suddenly, in (no) wise

H4192.gloss: 'To die for the son', probably the title of a popular song
H4192.def: (Psalm H48 (אֲבִירָם) or מוּת לַבֵּן; from H4191 (מוּת) and H1121 (בֵּן) with the preposition and article interposed; 'To die for the son', probably the title of a popular song.

H4194.def: from H4191 (מוּת); death (natural or violent); concretely, the dead, their place or state (hades); figuratively, pestilence, ruin.

H4195.def: from H3498 (יָתַר); literally gain; figuratively, superiority.

H4197.def: from an unused root meaning to mingle (water with wine); tempered wine.

H4198.def: from an unused root meaning to suck out; exhausted.

H4199.def: probably from an unused root meaning to faint with fear; terror; Mizzah, an Edomite.

H4200.def: probably from an unused root meaning to gather in; a granary.

H4201.def: or מְזֻזָה; from the same as H2123 (זִיז); a door-post (as prominent).

H4204.def: from H2114 (זוּר) in the sense of turning aside from truth; treachery, i.e. a plot.

H4205.def: or מָזֹר; from H2115 (זוּר) in the sense of binding up; a bandage, i.e. remedy; hence, a sore (as needing a compress).

H4206.def: or מֵזַח; from H2118 (זָחַח); a belt (as movable).

H4207.def: or (feminine) מִזְלָגָה; from an unused root meaning to draw up; a fork.

H4208.def: apparently from H5140 (נָזַל) in the sense of raining; a constellation, i.e. Zodiacal sign (perhaps as affecting the weather).

H4209.def: from H2161 (זָמַם); a plan, usually evil (machination), sometimes good (sagacity).
H4209.kjv: (wicked) device, discretion, intent, witty invention, lewdness, mischievous (device), thought, wickedly

H4210.def: from H2167 (זָמַר); properly, instrumental music; by implication, a poem set to notes.

H4212.def: from H2168 (זָמַר); a tweezer (only in the plural).

H4213.def: from the same as H2191 (זְעֵיר)xlit zeʻêyr corrected to zᵉʻêyr; fewness; by implication, as superl. diminutiveness.

H4214.gloss: a winnowing shovel (as scattering the chaff)
H4214.def: from H2219 (זָרָה); a winnowing shovel (as scattering the chaff).

H4215.gloss: a scatterer, i.e. the north wind (as dispersing clouds
H4215.def: apparently from H2219 (זָרָה); properly, a scatterer, i.e. the north wind (as dispersing clouds; only in plural).

H4216.gloss: some noted constellation (only in the plural)
H4216.def: apparently from H5144 (נָזַר) in the sense of distinction; some noted constellation (only in the plural), perhaps collectively, the zodiac.

H4217.def: from H2224 (זָרַח); sunrise, i.e. the east.

H4219.def: from H2236 (זָרַק); a bowl (as if for sprinkling).

H4220.def: from H4229 (מָחָה) in the sense of greasing; fat; figuratively, rich.

H4221.def: from the same as H4220 (מֵחַ); fat, i.e. marrow.

H4222.gloss: to rub or strike the hands together (in exultation)
H4222.def: a primitive root; to rub or strike the hands together (in exultation).

H4223.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H4222 (מָחָא); to strike in pieces; also to arrest; specifically to impale.

H4224.def: or מַחֲבֹא; from H2244 (חָבָא); a refuge.

H4225.gloss: a junction, i.e. seam or sewed piece
H4225.def: from H2266 (חָבַר); a junction, i.e. seam or sewed piece.

H4226.gloss: a joiner, i.e. brace or cramp
H4226.def: from H2266 (חָבַר); a joiner, i.e. brace or cramp.

H4227.def: from the same as H2281 (חָבֵת); a pan for baking in.

H4229.def: a primitive root; properly, to stroke or rub; by implication, to erase; also to smooth (as if with oil), i.e. grease or make fat; also to touch, i.e. reach to.
H4229.kjv: abolish, blot out, destroy, full of marrow, put out, reach unto, utterly, wipe (away, out)

H4230.gloss: an instrument for marking a circle, i.e. compasses
H4230.def: from H2328 (חוּג); an instrument for marking a circle, i.e. compasses.

H4231.gloss: a harbor (as shut in by the shore)
H4231.def: from an unused root meaning to enclose; a harbor (as shut in by the shore).

H4232.gloss: Mechujael or Mechijael, an antediluvian patriarch
H4232.def: or מְחִיּיָאֵל; from H4229 (מָחָה) and H410 (אֵל); smitten of God; Mechujael or Mechijael, an antediluvian patriarch.

H4233.gloss: a Machavite or inhabitant of some place named Machaveh
H4233.def: apparently a patrial, but from an unknown place (in the plural only for a singular); a Machavite or inhabitant of some place named Machaveh.

H4235.def: the same as H4234 (מָחוֹל); dancing; Machol, an Israelite.

H4238.def: feminine plural from H2372 (חָזָה); visions; Machazioth, an Israelite.

H4239.def: from H4229 (מָחָה); a stroke, i.e. battering-ram.

H4240.def: from H2330 (חוּד); junction; Mechida, one of the Nethinim.

H4241.def: from H2421 (חָיָה); preservation of life; hence, sustenance; also the live flesh, i.e. the quick.
H4241.kjv: preserve life, quick, recover selves, reviving, sustenance, victuals

H4242.def: from an unused root meaning to buy; price, payment, wages.

H4243.def: the same as H4242 (מְחִיר); price; Mechir, an Israelite.

H4244.gloss: Machlah, the name apparently of two Israelitesses
H4244.def: from H2470 (חָלָה); sickness; Machlah, the name apparently of two Israelitesses.

H4247.def: from H2490 (חָלַל); a cavern (as if excavated).

H4248.def: from H2470 (חָלָה); sick; Machlon, an Israelite.

H4249.gloss: Machli, the name of two Israelites
H4249.def: from H2470 (חָלָה); sick; Machli, the name of two Israelites.

H4250.gloss: a Machlite or (collectively) descendants of Machli
H4250.def: patronymical from H4249 (מַחְלִי); a Machlite or (collectively) descendants of Machli.

H4252.gloss: a (sacrificial) knife (as gliding through the flesh)
H4252.def: from H2498 (חָלַף); a (sacrificial) knife (as gliding through the flesh).

H4253.gloss: a ringlet of hair (as gliding over each other)
H4253.def: from H2498 (חָלַף); a ringlet of hair (as gliding over each other).

H4254.def: from H2502 (חָלַץ); a mantle (as easily drawn off).
H4254.kjv: changeable suit of apparel, change of raiment

H4255.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H4256 (מַחֲלֹקֶת); a section (of the Levites).

H4256.gloss: a section (of Levites, people or soldiers)
H4256.def: from H2505 (חָלַק); a section (of Levites, people or soldiers).
H4256.kjv: company, course, division, portion. See also H5555 (סֶלַע הַמַּחְלְקוֹת)

H4257.def: from H2470 (חָלָה); sickness; 'Machalath', probably the title (initial word) of a popular song.

H4258.gloss: Machalath, the name of an Ishmaelitess and of an Israelitess
H4258.def: the same as H4257 (מַחֲלַת); sickness; Machalath, the name of an Ishmaelitess and of an Israelitess.

H4259.gloss: a Mecholathite or inhabitant of Abel-Mecholah
H4259.def: patrial from H65 (אָבֵל מְחוֹלָה); a Mecholathite or inhabitant of Abel-Mecholah.

H4260.def: a denominative from H2529 (חֶמְאָה); something buttery (i.e. unctuous and pleasant), as (figuratively) flattery.

H4261.def: from H2530 (חָמַד); delightful; hence, a delight, i.e. object of affection or desire.

H4262.def: or מַחְמוּד; from H2530 (חָמַד); desired; hence, a valuable.

H4263.def: from H2550 (חָמַל); (by paronomasia with H4261 (מַחְמָד)) delight; properly, sympathy;.

H4264.def: from H2583 (חָנָה); an encampment (of travellers or troops); hence, an army, whether literal (of soldiers) or figurative (of dancers, angels, cattle, locusts, stars; or even the sacred courts).
H4264.kjv: army, band, battle, camp, company, drove, host, tents

H4265.def: from H4264 (מַחֲנֶה) and H1835 (דָּן); camp of Dan; Machaneh-Dan, a place in Palestine.

H4266.def: dual of H4264 (מַחֲנֶה); double camp; Machanajim, a place in Palestine.

H4268.def: or מַחְסֶה; from H2620 (חָסָה); a shelter (literally or figuratively).

H4270.def: or מַחְסֹר; from H2637 (חָסֵר); deficiency; hence, impoverishment.
H4270.kjv: lack, need, penury, poor, poverty, want

H4271.def: from H4268 (מַחֲסֶה) and H3050 (יָהּ); refuge of (i.e. in) Jah; Machsejah, an Israelite.

H4272.def: a primitive root; to dash asunder; by implication, to crush, smash or violently plunge; figuratively, to subdue or destroy.
H4272.kjv: dip, pierce (through), smite (through), strike through, wound

H4274.def: from H2672 (חָצַב); properly, a hewing; concretely, a quarry.

H4275.def: from H2673 (חָצָה)lemma חָעָה ayin, corrected to חָצָה; a halving.

H4276.def: from H2673 (חָצָה)lemma חָעָה ayin, corrected to חָצָה; a halving or the middle.

H4278.def: from H2713 (חָקַר); properly, scrutinized, i.e. (by implication) a recess.

H4279.def: probably from H309 (אָחַר); properly, deferred, i.e. the morrow; usually (adverbially) tomorrow; indefinitely, hereafter.

H4280.def: from the same as H2716 (חֶרֶא); a sink.

H4283.def: or מׇחֳרָתָם; (1 Samuel 30:17), feminine from the same as H4279 (מָחָר); the morrow or (adverbially) tomorrow.

H4284.def: or מַחֲשֶׁבֶת; from H2803 (חָשַׁב); a contrivance, i.e. (concretely) a texture, machine, or (abstractly) intention, plan (whether bad, a plot; or good, advice).
H4284.kjv: cunning (work), curious work, device(-sed), imagination, invented, means, purpose, thought

H4285.def: from H2821 (חָשַׁךְ); darkness; concretely, a dark place.

H4287.gloss: Machath, the name of two Israelites
H4287.def: probably from H4229 (מָחָה); erasure; Machath, the name of two Israelites.

H4288.def: from H2846 (חָתָה); properly, a dissolution; concretely, a ruin, or (abstractly) consternation.

H4289.def: the same as H4288 (מְחִתָּה) in the sense of removal; a pan for live coals.

H4290.def: from H2864 (חָתַר); a burglary; figuratively, unexpected examination.

H4291.def: (Aramaic) or מְטָה; (Aramaic), apparently corresponding to H4672 (מָצָא) in the intransitive sense of being found present; to arrive, extend or happen.

H4292.gloss: a broom (as removing dirt (compare English 'to dust'
H4292.def: apparently a denominative from H2916 (טִיט); a broom (as removing dirt (compare English 'to dust', i.e. remove dust)).

H4294.def: or (feminine) מַטָּה; from H5186 (נָטָה); a branch (as extending); figuratively, a tribe; also a rod, whether for chastising (figuratively, correction), ruling (a sceptre), throwing (a lance), or walking (a staff; figuratively, a support of life, e.g. bread).

H4295.def: from H5786 (עָוַר) with directive enclitic appended; downward, below or beneath; often adverbially with or without prefixes.
H4295.kjv: beneath, down(-ward), less, very low, under(-neath)

H4296.gloss: a bed (as extended) forsleeping or eating
H4296.def: from H5186 (נָטָה); a bed (as extended) forsleeping or eating; by analogy, a sofa, litter or bier.

H4297.def: from H5186 (נָטָה); a stretching, i.e. distortion (figuratively, iniquity).

H4300.def: from H2904 (טוּל) in the sense of hammering out; an iron bar (as forged).

H4301.def: or מַטְמֹן; or מַטְמֻן; from H2934 (טָמַן); a secret storehouse; hence, a secreted valuable (buried); generally money.

H4302.def: from H5193 (נָטַע); something planted, i.e. the place (a garden or vineyard), or the thing (a plant, figuratively or men); by implication, the act, planting.

H4303.def: or (feminine) מַטְעַמָּה; from H2938 (טָעַם); a delicacy.

H4304.def: from H2946 (טָפַח); a wide cloak (for a woman).

H4307.def: or מַטָּרָה; from H5201 (נָטַר); a jail (as a guard-house); also an aim (as being closely watched).

H4308.def: from H2956 (טָרַד); propulsive; Matred, an Edomitess.

H4309.def: from H4305 (מָטַר); rainy; Matri, an Israelite.

H4310.gloss: who? (occasionally, by a peculiar idiom, of things)
H4310.def: an interrogative pronoun of persons, as H4100 (מָה) is of things,; who? (occasionally, by a peculiar idiom, of things); also (indefinitely) whoever; often used in oblique construction with prefix or suffix.
H4310.kjv: any (man), he, him, O that! what, which, who(-m, -se, -soever), would to God

H4311.def: from H4325 (מַיִם) and H1679 (דֹּבֶא); water of quiet; Medeba, a place in Palestine.

H4312.def: from H3032 (יָדַד) in the sense of loving; affectionate; Medad, an Israelite.

H4313.def: from H4325 (מַיִם) and H3420 (יֵרָקוֹן) with the art. interposed; water of the yellowness; Me-haj-Jarkon, a place in Palestine.

H4314.def: from H4325 (מַיִם) and H2091 (זָהָב), water of gold; Me-Zahab, an Edomite.

H4316.gloss: Mica, the name of two Israelites
H4316.def: a variation for H4318 (מִיכָה); Mica, the name of two Israelites.

H4317.gloss: Mikael, the name of an archangel and of nine Israelites
H4317.def: from H4310 (מִי) and (the prefix derivative from) H3588 (כִּי) and H410 (אֵל); who (is) like God?; Mikael, the name of an archangel and of nine Israelites.

H4318.gloss: Micah, the name of seven Israelites
H4318.def: an abbreviated form of H4320 (מִיכָיָה); Micah, the name of seven Israelites.

H4319.def: a contr. for H4321 (מִיכָיְהוּ); Mikehu, an Israelite prophet.

H4320.gloss: Micajah, the name of two Israelites
H4320.def: from H4310 (מִי) and (the prefix derivative from) H3588 (כִּי) and H3050 (יָהּ); who (is) like Jah?; Micajah, the name of two Israelites.

H4321.gloss: Mikajah, the name of three Israelites
H4321.def: or מִכָיְהוּ; (Jeremiah 36:11), abbreviated form for H4322 (מִיכָיָהוּ); Mikajah, the name of three Israelites.

H4322.gloss: Mikajah, the name of an Israelite and an Israelitess
H4322.def: for H4320 (מִיכָיָה); Mikajah, the name of an Israelite and an Israelitess.

H4323.def: from H3201 (יָכֹל); properly, a container, i.e. a streamlet.

H4324.def: apparently the same as H4323 (מִיכָל); revulet; Mikal, Saul's daughter.

H4325.def: dual of a primitive noun; water; figuratively, juice; by euphemism, urine, semen.

H4326.gloss: Mijamin, the name of three Israelites
H4326.def: a form for H4509 (מִנְיָמִין); Mijamin, the name of three Israelites.

H4327.def: from an unused root meaning to portion out; a sort, i.e. species.

H4328.def: properly, feminine passive participle of H3245 (יָסַד); something founded, i.e. a foundation.

H4331.def: from H4185 (מוּשׁ); departure; Mesha, a place in Arabia; also an Israelite.

H4332.gloss: Mishael, the name of three Israelites
H4332.def: from H4310 (מִי) and H410 (אֵל) with the abbreviated form insep. relatively (see H834 (אֲשֶׁר)) interposed; who (is) what God (is) ?; Mishael, the name of three Israelites.

H4333.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H4332 (מִישָׁאֵל); Mishael, an Israelite.

H4334.def: or מִישֹׁר; from H3474 (יָשַׁר); a level, i.e. a plain (often used (with the article prefix) as a proper name of certain districts); figuratively, concord; also straightness, i.e. (figuratively) justice (sometimes adverbially, justly).
H4334.kjv: equity, even place, plain, right(-eously), (made) straight, uprightness

H4335.def: borrowed from H4336 (מֵישַׁךְ); Meshak, an Israelite.

H4336.def: (Aramaic) of foreign origin and doubtful significance; name of H4333 (מִישָׁאֵל); Meshak, the Babylonian.

H4337.def: from H3467 (יָשַׁע); safety; Mesha, an Israelite.

H4338.def: a variation for H4337 (מֵישָׁע); safety; Mesha, a Moabite.

H4339.def: from H3474 (יָשַׁר); evenness, i.e. (figuratively) prosperity or concord; also straightness, i.e. (figuratively) rectitude (only in plural with singular sense; often adverbially).
H4339.kjv: agreement, aright, that are equal, equity, (things that are) right(-eously, things), sweetly, upright(-ly, -ness)

H4340.def: from H3498 (יָתַר); (compare H3499 (יֶתֶר)); a cord (of a tent); or the string (of a bow).

H4341.def: sometimes מַכְאוֹב; also (feminine Isaiah 53:3) מַכְאֹבָה; from H3510 (כָּאַב); anguish or (figuratively) affliction.

H4343.gloss: Macbena, a place in Palestine settled by him
H4343.def: from the same as H3522 (כַּבּוֹן); knoll; Macbena, a place in Palestine settled by him.

H4344.gloss: a Macbannite or native of Macbena
H4344.def: patrial from H4343 (מַכְבֵּנָא); a Macbannite or native of Macbena.

H4345.def: from H3527 (כָּבַר) in the sense of covering (compare H3531 (כְּבָרָה)); a grate.

H4346.def: from H3527 (כָּבַר) in the sense of covering; (compare H4345 (מַכְבֵּר)); a cloth (as netted).

H4347.def: or (masculine) מַכֶּה; (plural only) from H5221 (נָכָה); a blow (in 2 Chronicles 2:10, of the flail); by implication,; a wound; figuratively, carnage, also pestilence.
H4347.kjv: beaten, blow, plague, slaughter, smote, sore, stripe, stroke, wound(-ed)

H4349.def: from H3559 (כּוּן); properly, a fixture, i.e. a basis; generally a place, especially as an abode.

H4350.def: or מְכֹנָה; feminine of H4349 (מָכוֹן); a pedestal, also a spot.

H4351.def: or מְכֹרָה; from the same as H3564 (כּוּר) in the sense of dipping; origin (as if a mine).

H4352.def: probably from H4134 (מוּךְ); pining; Maki, an Israelite.

H4353.def: from H4376 (מָכַר); salesman; Makir, an Israelite.

H4354.gloss: a Makirite or descendant of Makir
H4354.def: patronymical from H4353 (מָכִיר); a Makirite or descendant of Makir.

H4355.def: a primitive root; to tumble (in ruins); figuratively, to perish.

H4356.def: or מִכְלָה; from H3607 (כָּלָא); a pen (for flocks).

H4357.def: from H3615 (כָּלָה); completion (in plural concrete adverbial, wholly).

H4358.def: from H3634 (כָּלַל); perfection (i.e. concrete adverbial, splendidly).

H4360.gloss: something perfect, i.e. a splendid garment
H4360.def: from H3634 (כָּלַל); something perfect, i.e. a splendid garment.

H4362.def: from the same as H3646 (כַּמֹּן) in the sense of hiding; treasure (as hidden).

H4363.gloss: Mikmas or Mikmash, a place in Palestine
H4363.def: (Ezra 2:2 or מִכְמָשׁ; or מִכְמַשׁ; (Nehemiah 11:31), from H3647 (כָּמַס); hidden; Mikmas or Mikmash, a place in Palestine.

H4364.def: or מִכְמֹר; from H3648 (כָּמַר) in the sense of blackening by heat; a (hunter's) net (as dark from concealment).

H4365.def: or מִכְמֹרֶת; feminine of H4364 (מַכְמָר); a (fisher's) net.

H4366.def: apparently from an unused root meaning to hide; concealment; Mikmethath, a place in Palestine.

H4367.def: from H4100 (מָה) and H5068 (נָדַב) with a particle interposed; what (is) like (a) liberal (man) ?; Maknadbai, an Israelite.

H4368.def: the same as H4350 (מְכוֹנָה); a base; Mekonah, a place in Palestine.

H4369.def: the same as H4350 (מְכוֹנָה); a spot.

H4370.gloss: (only in dual) drawers (from concealing the private parts)
H4370.def: from H3647 (כָּמַס) in the sense of hiding; (only in dual) drawers (from concealing the private parts).

H4371.gloss: an assessment (as based upon a census)
H4371.def: probably from an unused root meaning to enumerate; an assessment (as based upon a census).

H4372.def: from H3680 (כָּסָה); a covering, i.e. weatherboarding.

H4373.def: feminine of H4371 (מֶכֶס); an enumeration; by implication, a valuation.

H4374.def: from H3680 (כָּסָה); a covering, i.e. garment; specifically, a coverlet (for a bed), an awning (from the sun); also the omentum (as covering the intestines).
H4374.kjv: clothing, to cover, that which covereth

H4375.def: from H3717 (כָּפַל); a fold; Makpelah, a place in Palestine.

H4376.def: a primitive root; to sell, literally (as merchandise, a daughter in marriage, into slavery), or figuratively (to surrender).

H4380.def: probably from the same as H3564 (כּוּר) in the sense of stabbing; a sword.

H4381.def: from H4376 (מָכַר); salesman; Mikri, an Israelite.

H4382.gloss: a Mekerathite, or inhabitant of Mekerah
H4382.def: patrial from an unused name (the same as H4380 (מְכֵרָה)) of a place in Palestine; a Mekerathite, or inhabitant of Mekerah.

H4383.def: or מִכְשֹׁל; masculine from H3782 (כָּשַׁל); a stumbling-block, literally or figuratively (obstacle, enticement (specifically an idol), scruple).
H4383.kjv: caused to fall, offence, (no-) thing offered, ruin, stumbling-block

H4384.def: feminine from H3782 (כָּשַׁל); a stumbling-block, but only figuratively (fall, enticement (idol)).

H4385.def: from H3789 (כָּתַב); a thing written, the characters, or a document (letter, copy, edict, poem).

H4387.def: from H3799 (כָּתַם); an engraving, i.e. (techn.) a poem.

H4388.def: from H3806 (כָּתַשׁ); a mortar; by analogy, a socket (of a tooth).

H4389.def: the same as H4388 (מַכְתֵּשׁ); dell; the Maktesh, a place in Jerusalem.

H4390.gloss: to fill or (intransitively) be full of
H4390.def: or מָלָא; (Esther 7:5), a primitive root; to fill or (intransitively) be full of, in a wide application (literally and figuratively).
H4390.kjv: accomplish, confirm, consecrate, be at an end, be expired, be fenced, fill, fulfil, (be, become, draw, give in, go) full(-ly, -ly set, tale), (over-) flow, fulness, furnish, gather (selves, together), presume, replenish, satisfy, set, space, take a (hand-) full, have wholly

H4392.def: from H4390 (מָלֵא); full (literally or figuratively) or filling (literally); also (concretely) fulness; adverbially, fully.
H4392.kjv: she that was with child, fill(-ed, -ed with), full(-ly), multitude, as is worth

H4393.def: rarely מְלוֹא; or מְלוֹ; (Ezekiel [41:8), from H4390 (מָלֵא); fulness (literally or figuratively).
H4393.kjv: all along, all that is (there-) in, fill, (that whereof...was) full, fulness, (hand-) full, multitude

H4394.def: from H4390 (מָלֵא); a fulfilling (only in plural), i.e. (literally) a setting (of gems), or (technically) consecration (also concretely, a dedicatory sacrifice).

H4395.def: feminine of H4392 (מָלֵא); something fulfilled, i.e. abundance (of produce).

H4396.def: feminine of H4394 (מִלֻּא); a filling, i.e. setting (of gems).

H4397.def: from an unused root meaning to despatch as a deputy; a messenger; specifically, of God, i.e. an angel (also a prophet, priest or teacher).

H4399.def: from the same as H4397 (מֲלְאָךְ); properly, deputyship, i.e. ministry; generally, employment (never servile) or work (abstractly or concretely); also property (as the result of labor).
H4399.kjv: business, cattle, industrious, occupation, (-pied), officer, thing (made), use, (manner of) work((-man), -manship)

H4400.def: from the same as H4397 (מֲלְאָךְ); a message.

H4401.def: from the same as H4397 (מֲלְאָךְ); ministrative; Malaki, a prophet.

H4402.gloss: fulness, i.e. (concretely) a plump socket (of the eye)
H4402.def: from H4390 (מָלֵא); fulness, i.e. (concretely) a plump socket (of the eye).

H4403.def: or מַלְבֻּשׁ; from H3847 (לָבַשׁ); a garment, or (collectively) clothing.

H4405.def: from H4448 (מָלַל) (plural masculine as if from מִלֶּה; a word; collectively, a discourse; figuratively, a topic.
H4405.kjv: answer, by-word, matter, any thing (what) to say, to speak(-ing), speak, talking, word

H4406.gloss: a word, command, discourse, or subject
H4406.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H4405 (מִלָּה); a word, command, discourse, or subject.

H4407.gloss: a rampart (as filled in), i.e. the citadel
H4407.def: or מִלֹּא; (2 Kings 12:20), from H4390 (מָלֵא); a rampart (as filled in), i.e. the citadel.

H4409.gloss: Malluk, the name of five Israelites
H4409.def: or מַלּוּכִי; (Nehemiah 12:14), from H4427 (מָלַךְ); remnant; Malluk, the name of five Israelites.

H4410.def: feminine passive participle of H4427 (מָלַךְ); something ruled, i.e. a realm.

H4411.gloss: a lodgment, i.e. caravanserai or encampment
H4411.def: from H3885 (לוּן); a lodgment, i.e. caravanserai or encampment.

H4412.def: feminine from H3885 (לוּן); a hut, a hammock.

H4413.def: apparently from H4448 (מָלַל); I have talked (i.e. loquacious); Mallothi, an Israelite.

H4414.gloss: to rub to pieces or pulverize
H4414.def: a primitive root; also as denominative from H4417 (מֶלַח); properly, to rub to pieces or pulverize; intransitively, to disappear as dust; to salt whether internally (to season with salt) or externally (to rub with salt).
H4414.kjv: at all, salt, season, temper together, vanish away

H4415.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H4414 (מָלַח); to eat salt, i.e. (generally) subsist.

H4417.def: from H4414 (מָלַח); properly, powder, i.e. (specifically) salt (as easily pulverized and dissolved).

H4418.def: from H4414 (מָלַח) in its original sense; a rag or old garment.

H4419.def: from H4414 (מָלַח) in its second. sense; a sailor (as following 'the salt').

H4420.def: from H4414 (מָלַח) (in its denominative sense); understood as land (H776 (אֶרֶץ)); properly, salted (i.e. land), i.e. a desert.

H4421.def: from H3898 (לָחַם) (in the sense of fighting); a battle (i.e. the engagement); generally, war (i.e. warfare).

H4422.def: a primitive root; properly, to be smooth, i.e. (by implication) to escape (as if by slipperiness); causatively, to release or rescue; specifically, to bring forth young, emit sparks.
H4422.kjv: deliver (self), escape, lay, leap out, let alone, let go, preserve, save, speedily, surely

H4423.def: from H4422 (מָלַט),; cement (from its plastic smoothness).

H4424.def: from H4423 (מֶלֶט) and H3050 (יָהּ); (whom) Jah has delivered; Melatjah, a Gibeonite.

H4425.gloss: a head of grain (as cut off)
H4425.def: from H4449 (מְלַל) (in the sense of cropping (compare H4135 (מוּל))); a head of grain (as cut off).

H4426.def: from H3887 (לוּץ); an aphorism; also a satire.

H4427.def: a primitive root; to reign; inceptively, to ascend the throne; causatively, to induct into royalty; hence (by implication) to take counsel.
H4427.kjv: consult, indeed, be (make, set a, set up) king, be (make) queen, (begin to, make to) reign(-ing), rule, surely

H4429.gloss: Melek, the name of two Israelites
H4429.def: the same as H4428 (מֶלֶךְ); king; Melek, the name of two Israelites.

H4431.def: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to H4427 (מָלַךְ) in the sense of consultation; advice.

H4432.gloss: Molek (i.e. king), the chief deity of the Ammonites
H4432.def: from H4427 (מָלַךְ); Molek (i.e. king), the chief deity of the Ammonites.

H4435.gloss: Milcah, the name of a Hebrewess and of an Israelite
H4435.def: a form of H4436 (מַלְכָּה); queen; Milcah, the name of a Hebrewess and of an Israelite.

H4437.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H4438 (מַלְכוּת); dominion (abstractly or concretely).

H4438.def: or מַלְכֻת; or (in plural) מַלְכֻיָּה; from H4427 (מָלַךְ); a rule; concretely, a dominion.

H4439.def: from H4428 (מֶלֶךְ) and H410 (אֵל); king of (i.e. appointed by) God; Malkiel, an Israelite.

H4440.gloss: a Malkielite or descendant of Malkiel
H4440.def: patronymical from H4439 (מַלְכִּיאֵל); a Malkielite or descendant of Malkiel.

H4441.gloss: Malkijah, the name of ten Israelites
H4441.def: or מַלְכִּיָּהוּlemma מַלְכִּיָהוּ missing dagesh, corrected to מַלְכִּיָּהוּ; (Jeremiah [38:6), from H4428 (מֶלֶךְ) and H3050 (יָהּ); king of (i.e. appointed by) Jah; Malkijah, the name of ten Israelites.

H4442.gloss: Malki-Tsedek, an early king in Palestine
H4442.def: from H4428 (מֶלֶךְ) and H6664 (צֶדֶק); king of right; Malki-Tsedek, an early king in Palestine.

H4443.def: from H4428 (מֶלֶךְ) and H7311 (רוּם); king of a high one (i.e. of exaltation); Malkiram, an Israelite.

H4444.def: from H4428 (מֶלֶךְ) and H7769 (שׁוּעַ); king of wealth; Malkishua, an Israelite.

H4445.gloss: Malcam or Milcom, the national idol of the Ammonites
H4445.def: or מִלְכּוֹם; from H4428 (מֶלֶךְ) for H4432 (מֹלֶךְ); Malcam or Milcom, the national idol of the Ammonites.

H4447.def: feminine active participle of H4427 (מָלַךְ); queen; Moleketh, an Israelitess.

H4448.def: a primitive root; to speak (mostly poetical) or say.

H4450.def: from H4448 (מָלַל); talkative; Milalai, an Israelite.

H4451.def: from H3925 (לָמַד); a goad for oxen.

H4452.def: a primitive root; to be smooth, i.e. (figuratively) pleasant.

H4453.gloss: the butler or other officer in the Babylonian court
H4453.def: of Persian derivation; the butler or other officer in the Babylonian court.

H4454.def: a primitive root; to crack a joint; by implication, to wring the neck of afowl (without separating it).

H4455.gloss: transitively (in dual) the jaws (as taking food)
H4455.def: from H3947 (לָקַח); transitively (in dual) the jaws (as taking food); intransitively, spoil (and captives) (as taken).

H4456.def: from H3953 (לָקַשׁ); (compare H3954 (לֶקֶשׁ)); the spring rain; figuratively, eloquence.

H4457.def: or מַלְקָח; from H3947 (לָקַח); (only in dual) tweezers.

H4458.gloss: a wardrobe (i.e. room where clothing is spread)
H4458.def: from an unused root meaning to spread out; a wardrobe (i.e. room where clothing is spread).

H4459.def: transp. for H4973 (מְתַלְּעָה); a grinder, i.e. back tooth.

H4460.def: from H4048 (מָגַר) (in the sense of depositing); a granary.

H4462.gloss: Memucan or Momucan, a Persian satrap
H4462.def: or (transp.) מוֹמֻכָן; (Esther 1:16), of Persian derivation; Memucan or Momucan, a Persian satrap.

H4463.def: from H4191 (מוּת); a mortal disease; concretely, a corpse.

H4464.gloss: a mongrel, i.e. born of aJewish father and aheathen mother
H4464.def: from an unused root meaning to alienate; a mongrel, i.e. born of aJewish father and aheathen mother.

H4465.def: from H4376 (מָכַר); merchandise; abstractly, a selling.
H4465.kjv: ought, (that which cometh of) sale, that which...sold, ware

H4467.def: from H4427 (מָלַךְ); dominion, i.e. (abstractly) the estate (rule) or (concretely) the country (realm).

H4468.def: a form of H4467 (מַמְלָכָה) and equiv. to it; dominion, i.e. (abstractly) the estate (rule) or (concretely) the country (realm).

H4469.def: from H4537 (מָסַךְ); mixture, i.e. (specifically) wine mixed (with water or spices).

H4470.def: from an unused root meaning to grieve; sorrow.

H4471.def: from H4754 (מָרָא)(in the sense of vigor); lusty; Mamre, an Amorite.

H4472.def: from H4843 (מָרַר); a bitterness, i.e. (figuratively) calamity.

H4473.def: from H4886 (מָשַׁח), in the sense of expansion; outspread (i.e. with outstretched wings).

H4474.def: from H4910 (מָשַׁל); a ruler or (abstractly) rule.

H4475.def: feminine of H4474 (מִמְשָׁל); rule; also (concretely in plural) a realm or a ruler.

H4476.def: from the same as H4943 (מֶשֶׁק); a possession.

H4477.def: from H4985 (מָתַק); something sweet (literally or figuratively).

H4478.def: from H4100 (מָה); literally a whatness (so to speak), i.e. manna (so called from the question about it).

H4479.def: (Aramaic) from H4101 (מָה); who or what (properly, interrogatively, hence, also indefinitely and relatively).

H4480.def: or מִנִּי; or מִנֵּי; (constructive plural) (Isaiah 30:11); for H4482 (מֵן); properly, a part of; hence (prepositionally), from or out of in many senses.
H4480.kjv: above, after, among, at, because of, by (reason of), from (among), in, neither, nor, (out) of, over, since, then, through, whether, with

H4481.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H4480 (מִן); properly, a part of; hence (prepositionally), from or out of.
H4481.kjv: according, after, because, before, by, for, from, him, more than, (out) of, part, since, these, to, upon, when

H4482.gloss: a musical chord (as parted into strings)
H4482.def: from an unused root meaning to apportion; a part; hence,; a musical chord (as parted into strings).
H4482.kjv: in (the same) (Psalm 68:23), stringed instrument (Psalm 150:4), whereby (Psalm 45:8 (defective plural))

H4483.def: (Aramaic) or מְנָה; (Aramaic), corresponding to H4487 (מָנָה); to count, appoint.

H4486.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H4093 (מַדָּע); wisdom or intelligence.

H4487.def: a primitive root; properly, to weigh out; by implication, to allot or constitute officially; also to enumerate or enroll.
H4487.kjv: appoint, count, number, prepare, set, tell

H4488.gloss: a fixed weight or measured amount
H4488.def: from H4487 (מָנָה); properly, a fixed weight or measured amount, i.e. (techn.) a maneh or mina.

H4489.def: from H4487 (מָנָה); properly, something weighed out, i.e. (figuratively) a portion of time, i.e. an instance.

H4490.gloss: something weighed out, i.e. (generally) a division
H4490.def: from H4487 (מָנָה); properly, something weighed out, i.e. (generally) a division; specifically (of food) a ration; also a lot.
H4490.kjv: such things as belonged, part, portion

H4491.def: from H5090 (נָהַג); the driving (of a chariot).

H4492.gloss: a channel or fissure, i.e. (by implication) a cavern
H4492.def: from H5102 (נָהַר); properly, a channel or fissure, i.e. (by implication) a cavern.

H4493.gloss: a nodding or toss (of the head in derision)
H4493.def: from H5110 (נוּד); a nodding or toss (of the head in derision).

H4494.def: from H5117 (נוּחַ); quiet, i.e. (concretely) a settled spot, or (figuratively) a home.

H4495.def: the same as H4494 (מָנוֹחַ); rest; Manoach, an Israelite.

H4496.def: or מְנֻחָה; feminine of H4495 (מָנוֹחַ); repose or (adverbially) peacefully; figuratively, consolation (specifically, matrimony); hence (concretely) an abode.
H4496.kjv: comfortable, ease, quiet, rest(-ing place), still

H4497.def: from H5125 (נוּן); a continuator, i.e. heir.

H4498.def: from H5127 (נוּס); a retreat (literally or figuratively); abstractly, a fleeing.
H4498.kjv: apace, escape, way to flee, flight, refuge

H4499.def: or מְנֻסָה; feminine of H4498 (מָנוֹס); retreat.

H4500.gloss: a yoke (properly, for plowing), i.e. the frame of aloom
H4500.def: from H5214 (נִיר); a yoke (properly, for plowing), i.e. the frame of aloom.

H4501.def: or מְנֹרָה; feminine of H4500 (מָנוֹר) (in the original sense of H5216 (נִיר)); a chandelier.

H4503.def: from an unused root meaning to apportion, i.e. bestow; a donation; euphemistically, tribute; specifically a sacrificial offering (usually bloodless and voluntary).

H4504.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H4503 (מִנְחָה); a sacrificial offering.

H4505.def: from H5162 (נָחַם); comforter; Menachem, an Israelite.

H4506.gloss: Manachath, the name of an Edomite and of a place in Moab
H4506.def: from H5117 (נוּחַ); rest; Manachath, the name of an Edomite and of a place in Moab.

H4507.gloss: the Apportioner, i.e. Fate (as an idol)
H4507.def: from H4487 (מָנָה); the Apportioner, i.e. Fate (as an idol).

H4508.def: of foreign derivation; Minni, an Armenian province.

H4509.gloss: Minjamin, the name of two Israelites
H4509.def: from H4480 (מִן) and H3225 (יָמִין); from (the) right hand; Minjamin, the name of two Israelites.

H4511.gloss: Minnith, a place East of the Jordan
H4511.def: from the same as H4482 (מֵן); enumeration; Minnith, a place East of the Jordan.

H4512.def: from H5239 (נָלָה); completion, i.e. (in produce) wealth.

H4513.gloss: to debar (negatively or positively) from benefit or injury
H4513.def: a primitive root; to debar (negatively or positively) from benefit or injury.

H4514.def: or מַנְעֻל; from H5274 (נָעַל); a bolt.

H4517.gloss: a sistrum (so called from its rattling sound)
H4517.def: from H5128 (נוּעַ); a sistrum (so called from its rattling sound).

H4518.def: from H5352 (נָקָה); a sacrificial basin (for holding blood).

H4519.def: from H5382 (נָשָׁה); causing to forget; Menashsheh, a grandson of Jacob, also the tribe descended from him, and its territory.

H4520.gloss: a Menashshite or descendant of Menashsheh
H4520.def: from H4519 (מְנַשֶּׁה); a Menashshite or descendant of Menashsheh.

H4521.gloss: an allotment (by courtesy, law or providence)
H4521.def: from H4487 (מָנָה); an allotment (by courtesy, law or providence).

H4522.def: or מִס; from H4549 (מָסַס); properly, a burden (as causing to faint), i.e. a tax in the form of forced labor.

H4524.def: plural masculine מְסִבִּים; or feminine מְסִבּוֹת; from H5437 (סָבַב); a divan (as enclosing the room); abstractly (adverbial) around.
H4524.kjv: that compass about, (place) round about, at table

H4525.def: from H5462 (סָגַר); a fastener, i.e. (of a person) a smith, (of a thing) a prison.

H4526.gloss: something enclosing, i.e. a margin (of a region, of a panel)
H4526.def: from H5462 (סָגַר); something enclosing, i.e. a margin (of a region, of a panel); concretely, a stronghold.

H4528.gloss: a colonnade or internal portico (from its rows of pillars)
H4528.def: from the same as H5468 (סֶדֶר); a colonnade or internal portico (from its rows of pillars).

H4529.kjv: make to consume away, (make to) melt, water

H4530.def: from H4549 (מָסַס) (in the sense of flowing); abundance, i.e. (adverbially) liberally.

H4531.gloss: a testing, of men (judicial) or of God (querulous)
H4531.def: from H5254 (נָסָה); a testing, of men (judicial) or of God (querulous).

H4532.gloss: Massah, a place in the Desert
H4532.def: the same as H4531 (מַסָּה); Massah, a place in the Desert.

H4533.def: apparently from an unused root meaning to cover; a veil.

H4535.gloss: a cordon, (adverbially) or (as a) military barrier
H4535.def: from H5255 (נָסַח) in the sense of staving off; a cordon, (adverbially) or (as a) military barrier.

H4537.def: a primitive root; to mix, especially wine (with spices).

H4538.gloss: a mixture, i.e. of wine with spices
H4538.def: from H4537 (מָסַךְ); a mixture, i.e. of wine with spices.

H4539.def: from H5526 (סָכַךְ); a cover, i.e. veil.

H4540.def: from H5526 (סָכַךְ); a covering, i.e. garniture.

H4541.def: from H5258 (נָסַךְ); properly, a pouring over, i.e. fusion of metal (especially a cast image); by implication, a libation, i.e. league; concretely a coverlet (as if poured out).

H4543.def: by transp. from H3664 (כָּנַס); a magazine.

H4545.def: from H5259 (נָסַךְ) in the sense of spreading out; something expanded, i.e. the warp in aloom (as stretched out to receive the woof).

H4546.gloss: a thoroughfare (as turnpiked), literally or figuratively
H4546.def: from H5549 (סָלַל); a thoroughfare (as turnpiked), literally or figuratively; specifically a viaduct, a staircase.

H4548.gloss: a peg (as bristling from the surface)
H4548.def: or מִסְמֵר; also (feminine) מַסְמְרָה; or מִסְמְרָה; or even מַשְׂמְרָה; (Ecclesiastes 12:11), from H5568 (סָמַר); a peg (as bristling from the surface).
