H4549.def: a primitive root; to liquefy; figuratively, to waste (with disease), to faint (with fatigue, fear or grief).
H4549.kjv: discourage, faint, be loosed, melt (away), refuse, utterly

H4550.def: from H5265 (נָסַע); a departure (from striking the tents), i.e. march (not necessarily a single day's travel); by implication, a station (or point of departure).

H4551.def: from H5265 (נָסַע) in the sense of projecting; a missile (spear or arrow); also a quarry (whence stones are, as it were, ejected).

H4554.def: from an unused root meaning to collect; fodder.

H4555.def: from H5596 (סָפַח); a veil (as spread out).

H4556.def: from H5596 (סָפַח); scruf (as spreading over the surface).

H4557.def: from H5608 (סָפַר); a number, definite (arithmetical) or indefinite (large, innumerable; small, a few); also (abstractly) narration.
H4557.kjv: abundance, account, all, few, (in-) finite, (certain) number(-ed), tale, telling, time

H4558.def: the same as H4457 (מֶלְקָח); number; Mispar, an Israelite.

H4559.def: feminine of H4437 (מַלְכוּ); enumeration; Mispereth, an Israelite.

H4560.def: a primitive root; to sunder, i.e. (transitively) set apart, or (reflex.) apostatize.

H4564.gloss: a hider, i.e. (abstractly) a hiding, i.e. aversion
H4564.def: from H5641 (סָתַר); properly, a hider, i.e. (abstractly) a hiding, i.e. aversion.

H4565.def: from H5641 (סָתַר); properly, a concealer, i.e. a covert.

H4568.def: from H5666 (עָבָה); properly, compact (part of soil), i.e. loam.

H4569.gloss: a crossing-place (of a river, a ford
H4569.def: or feminine מַעֲבָרָה; from H5674 (עָבַר); a crossing-place (of a river, a ford; of a mountain, a pass); abstractly, a transit, i.e. (figuratively) overwhelming.

H4570.def: or feminine מַעְגָּלָה; from the same as H5696 (עָגֹל); a track (literally or figuratively); also a rampart (as circular).

H4572.def: from H5710 (עָדָה); ornamental; Maadai, an Israelite.

H4573.def: from H5710 (עָדָה) and H3050 (יָהּ); ornament of Jah; Maadjah, an Israelite.

H4574.def: or (feminine) מַעֲדַנָּה; from H5727 (עָדַן); a delicacy or (abstractly) pleasure (adverbially, cheerfully).

H4575.def: by transitive from H6029 (עָנַד); a bond, i.e. group.

H4577.def: (Aramaic) or מְעָא; (Aramaic), corresponding to H4578 (מֵעֶה)xlit mêʻâh corrected to mêʻeh; only in plural the bowels.

H4578.gloss: used only in plural the intestines
H4578.def: from an unused root probably meaning to be soft; used only in plural the intestines, or (collectively) the abdomen, figuratively, sympathy; by implication, a vest; by extension the stomach, the uterus (or of men, the seat of generation), the heart (figuratively).

H4579.def: feminine of H4578 (מֵעֶה)xlit mêʻâh corrected to mêʻeh; the belly, i.e. (figuratively) interior.

H4580.def: from H5746 (עוּג); also with H3934 (לָעֵג) a table-buffoon, i.e.; a cake of bread; parasite.

H4581.def: (also מָעוּז ); or מָעֹז (also מָעֻז; from H5810 (עָזַז); a fortified place; figuratively, a defence.

H4582.def: from H4600 (מָעַךְ); oppressed; Maok, a Philistine.

H4583.def: or מָעִין; (1 Chronicles 4:41), from the same as H5772 (עוֹנָה); an abode, of God (the Tabernacle or the Temple), men (their home) or animals (their lair); hence, a retreat (asylum).

H4584.gloss: Maon, the name of an Israelite and of a place in Palestine
H4584.def: the same as H4583 (מָעוֹן); a residence; Maon, the name of an Israelite and of a place in Palestine.
H4584.kjv: Maon, Maonites. Compare H1010 (בֵּית בַּעַל מְעוֹן), H4586 (מְעוּנִי)lemma מְעוּנָי third vowel, corrected to מְעוּנִי

H4585.def: or מְעֹנָה; feminine of H4583 (מָעוֹן), and meaning the same; an abode, of God (the Tabernacle or the Temple), men (their home) or animals (their lair); hence, a retreat (asylum).

H4586.gloss: a Meunite, or inhabitant of Maon (only in plural)
H4586.def: or מְעִינִי; probably patrial from H4584 (מָעוֹן); a Meunite, or inhabitant of Maon (only in plural).

H4587.def: plural of H4585 (מְעוֹנָה); habitative; Meonothai, an Israelite.

H4588.def: from H5774 (עוּף) in the sense of covering with shade (compare H4155 (מוּעָף)); darkness.

H4589.def: from H5783 (עוּר); nakedness, i.e. (in plural) the pudenda.

H4590.gloss: Maazjah, the name of two Israelites
H4590.def: or מַעַזְיָהוּ; probably from H5756 (עוּז) (in the sense of protection) and H3050 (יָהּ); rescue of Jah; Maazjah, the name of two Israelites.

H4591.def: a primitive root; properly, to pare off, i.e. lessen; intransitively, to be (or causatively, to make) small or few (or figuratively, ineffective).
H4591.kjv: suffer to decrease, diminish, (be, borrow a, give, make) few (in number, -ness), gather least (little), be (seem) little, (give the) less, be minished, bring to nothing

H4592.gloss: a little or few (often adverbial or compar.)
H4592.def: or מְעָט; from H4591 (מָעַט); a little or few (often adverbial or compar.).
H4592.kjv: almost (some, very) few(-er, -est), lightly, little (while), (very) small (matter, thing), some, soon, very

H4593.gloss: thinned (as to the edge), i.e. sharp
H4593.def: passive adjective of H4591 (מָעַט); thinned (as to the edge), i.e. sharp.

H4596.gloss: a pile of rubbish (as contorted), i.e. a ruin
H4596.def: from H5753 (עָוָה); (compare H5856 (עִי)); a pile of rubbish (as contorted), i.e. a ruin.

H4597.def: probably from H4578 (מֵעֶה)xlit mêʻâh corrected to mêʻeh; sympathetic; Maai, an Israelite.

H4598.gloss: a robe (i.e. upper and outer garment)
H4598.def: from H4603 (מָעַל) in the sense of covering; a robe (i.e. upper and outer garment).

H4599.def: or מַעְיְנוֹ; (Psalm 114:8), or (feminine) מַעְיָנָה; from H5869 (עַיִן) (as a denominative in the sense of a spring); a fountain (also collectively), figuratively, a source (of satisfaction).

H4600.gloss: to press, i.e. to pierce, emasculate, handle
H4600.def: a primitive root; to press, i.e. to pierce, emasculate, handle.

H4601.def: or מַעֲכָת; (Joshua 13:13), from H4600 (מָעַךְ); depression; Maakah (or Maakath), the name of a place in Syria, also of a Mesopotamian, of three Israelites, and of four Israelitesses and one Syrian woman.
H4601.kjv: Maachah, Maachathites. See also H1038 (בֵּית מַעֲכָה)

H4602.gloss: a Maakathite, or inhabitant of Maakah
H4602.def: patrial from H4601 (מַעֲכָה); a Maakathite, or inhabitant of Maakah.

H4603.def: a primitive root; properly, to cover up; used only figuratively, to act covertly, i.e. treacherously.

H4604.kjv: falsehood, grievously, sore, transgression, trespass, very

H4605.def: from H5927 (עָלָה); properly, the upper part, used only adverbially with prefix upward, above, overhead, from the top, etc..
H4605.kjv: above, exceeding(-ly), forward, on (very) high, over, up(-on, -ward), very

H4606.gloss: (only in plural as singular) the setting (of the sun)
H4606.def: (Aramaic) from H5954 (עֲלַל); (only in plural as singular) the setting (of the sun).

H4607.def: from H5927 (עָלָה); a raising (of the hands).

H4608.gloss: an elevation, i.e. (concretely) acclivity or platform
H4608.def: from H5927 (עָלָה); an elevation, i.e. (concretely) acclivity or platform; abstractly (the relation or state) a rise or (figuratively) priority.
H4608.kjv: ascent, before, chiefest, cliff, that goeth up, going up, hill, mounting up, stairs

H4609.def: feminine of H4608 (מַעֲלֶה); elevation, i.e. the act (literally, a journey to a higher place, figuratively, a thought arising), or (concretely) the condition (literally, a step or grademark, figuratively, a superiority of station); specifically a climactic progression (in certain Psalms).
H4609.kjv: things that come up, (high) degree, deal, go up, stair, step, story

H4610.gloss: Steep of Scorpions, a place in the Desert
H4610.def: from H4608 (מַעֲלֶה) and (the plural of) H6137 (עַקְרָב); Steep of Scorpions, a place in the Desert.
H4610.kjv: Maaleh-accrabim, the ascent (going up) of Akrabbim

H4611.def: from H5953 (עָלַל); an act (good or bad).

H4616.def: from H6030 (עָנָה); properly, heed, i.e. purpose; used only adverbially, on account of (as a motive or an aim), teleologically, in order that.
H4616.kjv: because of, to the end (intent) that, for (to,... 's sake), lest, that, to

H4617.def: from H6030 (עָנָה); a reply (favorable or contradictory).

H4618.def: from H6031 (עָנָה), in the sense of depression or tilling; a furrow.

H4619.def: from H6095 (עָצָה); closure; Maats, an Israelite.

H4621.def: from an unused root meaning to hew; an axe.

H4624.def: from an unused root meaning to repress; a parapet.

H4625.def: from H6140 (עָקַשׁ); a crook (in a road).

H4626.def: from H6168 (עָרָה); a nude place, i.e. (literally) the pudenda, or (figuratively) a vacant space.

H4627.def: from H6148 (עָרַב), in the sense of trading; traffic; by implication, mercantile goods.

H4628.gloss: the west (as a region of the evening sun)
H4628.def: or (feminine) מַעֲרָבָה; from H6150 (עָרַב), in the sense of shading; the west (as a region of the evening sun).

H4629.gloss: a nude place, i.e. a common
H4629.def: from H6168 (עָרָה); a nude place, i.e. a common.

H4630.def: feminine of H4629 (מַעֲרֶה); an open spot.

H4632.def: the same as H4631 (מְעָרָה); cave; Mearah, a place in Palestine.

H4633.def: from H6186 (עָרַךְ); an arrangement, i.e. (figuratively) mental disposition.

H4634.def: feminine of H4633 (מַעֲרָךְ); an arrangement; concretely, a pile; specifically a military array.
H4634.kjv: army, fight, be set in order, ordered place, rank, row

H4635.gloss: an arrangement, i.e. (concretely) a pile (of loaves)
H4635.def: from H6186 (עָרַךְ); an arrangement, i.e. (concretely) a pile (of loaves).

H4636.def: from H6191 (עָרַם), in the sense of stripping; bare.

H4638.def: a form of H4630 (מַעֲרָה); waste; Maarath, a place in Palestine.

H4639.def: from H6213 (עָשָׂה); an action (good or bad); generally, a transaction; abstractly, activity; by implication, a product (specifically, a poem) or (generally) property.
H4639.kjv: act, art, bakemeat, business, deed, do(-ing), labor, thing made, ware of making, occupation, thing offered, operation, possession, well, (handy-, needle-, net-) work(ing, -manship), wrought

H4640.def: from H6213 (עָשָׂה); operative; Maasai, an Israelite.

H4641.gloss: Maasejah, the name of sixteen Israelites
H4641.def: or מַעֲשֵׂיָהוּ; from H4639 (מַעֲשֶׂה) and H3050 (יָהּ); work of Jah; Maasejah, the name of sixteen Israelites.

H4643.def: or מַעֲשַׂר; and (in plural) feminine מַעַשְׂרָה; from H6240 (עָשָׂר); a tenth; especially a tithe.

H4644.gloss: Moph, the capital of Lower Egypt
H4644.def: of Egyptian origin; Moph, the capital of Lower Egypt.

H4645.def: from H6293 (פָּגַע); an object of attack.

H4646.gloss: a breathing out (of life), i.e. expiring
H4646.def: from H5301 (נָפַח); a breathing out (of life), i.e. expiring.

H4647.def: from H5301 (נָפַח); the bellows (i.e. blower) of aforge.

H4648.gloss: Mephibosheth, the name of two Israelites
H4648.def: or מְפִבֹשֶׁת; probably from H6284 (פָּאָה) and H1322 (בֹּשֶׁת); dispeller of shame (i.e. of Baal); Mephibosheth, the name of two Israelites.

H4649.def: a plural apparently from H5130 (נוּף); wavings; Muppim, an Israelite.

H4650.def: from H6327 (פּוּץ); a breaker, i.e. mallet.

H4651.def: from H5307 (נָפַל); a falling off, i.e. chaff; also something pendulous, i.e. a flap.

H4654.def: or מַפֵּלָה; from H5307 (נָפַל); something fallen, i.e. a ruin.

H4656.def: from H6426 (פָּלַץ); a terror, i.e. an idol.

H4657.def: from an unused root meaning to balance; a poising.

H4658.def: from H5307 (נָפַל); fall, i.e. decadence; concretely, a ruin; specifically a carcase.

H4659.def: or (feminine) מִפְעָלָה; from H6466 (פָּעַל); a performance.

H4660.def: from H5310 (נָפַץ); a smiting to pieces.

H4661.gloss: a smiter, i.e. a war club
H4661.def: from H5310 (נָפַץ); a smiter, i.e. a war club.

H4662.def: from H6485 (פָּקַד); an appointment, i.e. mandate; concretely, a designated spot; specifically, a census.

H4663.gloss: Miphkad, the name of a gate in Jerusalem
H4663.def: the same as H4662 (מִפְקָד); assignment; Miphkad, the name of a gate in Jerusalem.

H4664.gloss: a break (in the shore), i.e. a haven
H4664.def: from H6555 (פָּרַץ)lemma פּרַץ missing vowel, corrected to פָּרַץ; a break (in the shore), i.e. a haven.

H4665.gloss: a fracture, i.e. joint (vertebrae) of the neck
H4665.def: from H6561 (פָּרַק); properly, a fracture, i.e. joint (vertebrae) of the neck.

H4667.gloss: a stride, i.e. (by euphemism) the crotch
H4667.def: from H6585 (פָּשַׂע); a stride, i.e. (by euphemism) the crotch.

H4668.def: from H6605 (פָּתַח); an opener, i.e. a key.

H4669.def: from H6605 (פָּתַח); an aperture, i.e. (figuratively) utterance.

H4670.def: from the same as H6620 (פֶּתֶן); a stretcher, i.e. a sill.

H4671.def: or מוֹץ; (Zephaniah 2:2), from H4160 (מוּץ); chaff (as pressed out, i.e. winnowed or (rather) threshed loose).

H4672.gloss: to come forth to, i.e. appear or exist
H4672.def: a primitive root; properly, to come forth to, i.e. appear or exist; transitively, to attain, i.e. find or acquire; figuratively, to occur, meet or be present.
H4672.kjv: be able, befall, being, catch, certainly, (cause to) come (on, to, to hand), deliver, be enough (cause to) find(-ing, occasion, out), get (hold upon), have (here), be here, hit, be left, light (up-) on, meet (with), occasion serve, (be) present, ready, speed, suffice, take hold on

H4673.def: from H5324 (נָצַב); a fixed spot; figuratively, an office, a military post.

H4674.def: from H5324 (נָצַב); a station, i.e. military post.

H4675.def: or מִצָּבָה; feminine of H4673 (מַצָּב); a military guard.

H4676.gloss: something stationed, i.e. a column or (memorial stone)
H4676.def: feminine (causatively) participle of H5324 (נָצַב); something stationed, i.e. a column or (memorial stone); by analogy, an idol.

H4677.def: apparently from H4672 (מָצָא) and H3050 (יָהּ); found of Jah; Metsobajah, a place in Palestine.

H4678.gloss: something stationary, i.e. a monumental stone
H4678.def: from H5324 (נָצַב); something stationary, i.e. a monumental stone; also the stock of atree.

H4679.gloss: a fastness (as a covert of ambush)
H4679.def: or מְצָד; or (feminine) מְצָדָה; from H6679 (צוּד); a fastness (as a covert of ambush).

H4680.def: a primitive root; to suck out; by implication, to drain, to squeeze out.

H4681.def: active participle feminine of H4680 (מָצָה); drained; Motsah, a place in Palestine.

H4682.def: from H4711 (מָצַץ) in the sense of greedily devouring for sweetness; properly, sweetness; concretely, sweet (i.e. not soured or bittered with yeast); specifically, an unfermented cake or loaf, or (elliptically) the festival of Passover (because no leaven was then used).

H4684.gloss: a whinnying (through impatience for battle or lust)
H4684.def: from H6670 (צָהַל); a whinnying (through impatience for battle or lust).

H4685.gloss: a net (for capturing animals or fishes)
H4685.def: or (feminine) מְצוֹדָה; or מצֹדָה; from H6679 (צוּד); also (by interchange for H4679 (מְצַד)); a net (for capturing animals or fishes);  afastness or (beseiging) tower.

H4686.def: or (feminine) מְצוּדָה; or מְצֻדָה; for H4685 (מָצוֹד); a net, or (abstractly) capture; also a fastness.
H4686.kjv: castle, defense, fort(-ress), (strong) hold, be hunted, net, snare, strong place

H4687.gloss: a command, whether human or divine (collectively, the Law)
H4687.def: from H6680 (צָוָה); a command, whether human or divine (collectively, the Law).

H4688.gloss: a deep place (of water or mud)
H4688.def: or מְצֹלָה; also מְצוּלָה; or מְצֻלָה; from the same as H6683 (צוּלָה); a deep place (of water or mud).

H4689.def: from H6693 (צוּק); a narrow place, i.e. (abstractly and figuratively) confinement or disability.

H4690.gloss: something narrow, i.e. a column or hilltop
H4690.def: or מָצֻק; from H6693 (צוּק); something narrow, i.e. a column or hilltop.

H4691.def: or מְצֻקָה; feminine of H4690 (מָצוּק); narrowness, i.e. (figuratively) trouble.

H4692.def: or מָצוּר; from H6696 (צוּר); something hemming in, i.e. (objectively) a mound (of besiegers), (abstractly) a siege, (figuratively) distress; or (subjectively) a fastness.
H4692.kjv: besieged, bulwark, defence, fenced, fortress, siege, strong (hold), tower

H4693.def: the same as H4692 (מָצוֹר) in the sense of a limit; Egypt (as the border of Palestine).

H4694.def: or מְצֻרָה; feminine of H4692 (מָצוֹר); a hemming in, i.e. (objectively) a mound (of siege), or (subjectively) a rampart (of protection), (abstractly) fortification.

H4696.def: from an unused root meaning to be clear, i.e. conspicuous; the forehead (as open and prominent).

H4697.gloss: a shinpiece of armor (as prominent), only plural
H4697.def: from the same as H4696 (מֵצַח); a shinpiece of armor (as prominent), only plural.

H4698.def: from H6750 (צָלַל); a tinkler, i.e. a bell.

H4700.def: from H6750 (צָלַל); (only dual) double tinklers, i.e. cymbals.

H4701.gloss: a tiara, i.e. official turban (of a king or high priest)
H4701.def: from H6801 (צָנַף); a tiara, i.e. official turban (of a king or high priest).

H4703.def: from H6805 (צָעַד); a step; figuratively, companionship.

H4704.def: feminine of H4705 (מִצְעָר); properly, littleness; concretely, diminutive.

H4705.def: from H6819 (צָעַר); petty (in size or number); adverbially, a short (time).

H4706.def: the same as H4705 (מִצְעָר); Mitsar, a peak of Lebanon.

H4707.def: from H6822 (צָפָה); an observatory, especially formilitary purposes.

H4708.gloss: Mitspeh, the name of five places in Palestine
H4708.def: the same as H4707 (מִצְפֶּה); Mitspeh, the name of five places in Palestine.

H4709.gloss: Mitspah, the name of two places in Palestine
H4709.def: feminine of H4708 (מִצְפֶּה); Mitspah, the name of two places in Palestine.
H4709.kjv: Mitspah. (This seems rather to be only an orthographic variation of H4708 (מִצְפֶּה) when 'in pause'.)

H4710.gloss: a secret (place or thing, perhaps, treasure)
H4710.def: from H6845 (צָפַן); a secret (place or thing, perhaps, treasure).

H4712.def: from H6896 (קֵבָה); something tight, i.e. (figuratively) trouble.

H4713.gloss: a Mitsrite, or inhabitant of Mitsrajim
H4713.def: from H4714 (מִצְרַיִם); a Mitsrite, or inhabitant of Mitsrajim.

H4714.gloss: Mitsrajim, i.e. Upper and Lower Egypt
H4714.def: dual of H4693 (מָצוֹר); Mitsrajim, i.e. Upper and Lower Egypt.

H4716.def: from H4743 (מָקַק); properly, a melting, i.e. putridity.

H4717.gloss: a perforatrix, i.e. a hammer (as piercing)
H4717.def: from H5344 (נָקַב); properly, a perforatrix, i.e. a hammer (as piercing).

H4718.gloss: a perforator, i.e. a hammer (as piercing)
H4718.def: from H5344 (נָקַב); properly, a perforator, i.e. a hammer (as piercing); also (intransitively) a perforation, i.e. a quarry.

H4719.def: from the same as H5348 (נָקֹד) in the denominative sense of herding (compare H5349 (נֹקֵד)); fold; Makkedah, a place in Palestine.

H4720.def: or מִקְּדָשׁ; (Exodus 15:17), from H6942 (קָדַשׁ); a consecrated thing or place, especially, a palace, sanctuary (whether of Jehovah or of idols) or asylum.
H4720.kjv: chapel, hallowed part, holy place, sanctuary

H4721.def: or (feminine) מַקְהֵלָה; from H6950 (קָהַל); an assembly.

H4722.gloss: Makheloth, a place in the Desert
H4722.def: plural of H4721 (מַקְהֵל) (feminine); assemblies; Makheloth, a place in the Desert.

H4723.def: or מִקְוֵה; (1 Kings 10:28), or מִקְוֵאlemma מִּקְוֵא extra dagesh, corrected to מִקְוֵא; (2 Chronicles 1:16), from H6960 (קָוָה); something waited for, i.e. confidence (objective or subjective); also a collection, i.e. (of water) a pond, or (of men and horses) a caravan or drove.
H4723.kjv: abiding, gathering together, hope, linen yarn, plenty (of water), pool

H4724.gloss: a collection, i.e. (of water) a reservoir
H4724.def: feminine of H4723 (מִקְוֶה); a collection, i.e. (of water) a reservoir.

H4725.def: or מָקֹם; also (feminine) מְקוֹמָה; or מְקֹמָה; from H6965 (קוּם); properly, a standing, i.e. a spot; but used widely of a locality (general or specific); also (figuratively) of a condition (of body or mind).
H4725.kjv: country, home, open, place, room, space, whither(-soever)

H4726.def: or מָקֹר; from H6979 (קוּר); properly, something dug, i.e. a (general) source (of water, even when naturally flowing; also of tears, blood (by euphemism, of the female pudenda); figuratively, of happiness, wisdom, progeny).

H4728.def: from H3947 (לָקַח); something received, i.e. merchandise (purchased).

H4729.gloss: something to fume (incense) on i.e. a hearth place
H4729.def: from H6999 (קָטַר); something to fume (incense) on i.e. a hearth place.

H4730.gloss: something to fume (incense) in, i.e. a coal-pan
H4730.def: feminine of H4729 (מִקְטָר); something to fume (incense) in, i.e. a coal-pan.

H4731.def: or (feminine) מַקְּלָה; from an unused root meaning apparently to germinate; a shoot, i.e. stick (with leaves on, or for walking, striking, guiding, divining).

H4732.gloss: Mikloth, a place in the Desert
H4732.def: (or perhaps mik-kel-ohth') plural of (feminine) H4731 (מַקֵּל); rods; Mikloth, a place in the Desert.

H4733.def: from H7038 (קָלַט) in the sense of taking in; an asylum (as a receptacle).

H4734.def: from H7049 (קָלַע); a sculpture (probably in bas-relief).

H4735.gloss: something bought, i.e. property, but only livestock
H4735.def: from H7069 (קָנָה); something bought, i.e. property, but only livestock; abstractly, acquisition.
H4735.kjv: cattle, flock, herd, possession, purchase, substance

H4736.def: feminine of H4735 (מִקְנֶה); properly, a buying, i.e. acquisition; concretely, a piece of property (land or living); also the sum paid.
H4736.kjv: (he that is) bought, possession, piece, purchase

H4737.def: from H4735 (מִקְנֶה) and H3050 (יָהּ); possession of Jah; Miknejah, an Israelite.

H4739.def: from H7112 (קָצַץ); end; Makats, a place in Palestine.

H4740.def: or מַקְצֹעַ; or (feminine) מַקְצֹעָה; from H7106 (קָצַע) in the denominative sense of bending; an angle or recess.

H4741.gloss: a scraper, i.e. a carving chisel
H4741.def: from H7106 (קָצַע); a scraper, i.e. a carving chisel.

H4742.def: from H7106 (קָצַע) in the denominative sense of bending; an angle.

H4743.def: ' a primitive root; to melt; figuratively, to flow, dwindle, vanish.
H4743.kjv: consume away, be corrupt, dissolve, pine away

H4744.def: from H7121 (קָרָא); something called out, i.e. a public meeting (the act, the persons, or the place); also a rehearsal.

H4745.gloss: something met with, i.e. an accident or fortune
H4745.def: from H7136 (קָרָה); something met with, i.e. an accident or fortune.
H4745.kjv: something befallen, befalleth, chance, event, hap(-peneth)

H4746.gloss: something meeting, i.e. a frame (of timbers)
H4746.def: from H7136 (קָרָה); properly, something meeting, i.e. a frame (of timbers).

H4747.def: from the same as H7119 (קַר); a cooling off.

H4748.gloss: something turned (rounded), i.e. a curl (of tresses)
H4748.def: from H7185 (קָשָׁה) in the sense of knotting up round and hard; something turned (rounded), i.e. a curl (of tresses).

H4749.gloss: rounded work, i.e. moulded by hammering (repousse)
H4749.def: feminine of H4748 (מִקְשֶׁה); rounded work, i.e. moulded by hammering (repousse).
H4749.kjv: beaten (out of one piece, work), upright, whole piece

H4750.gloss: literally a cucumbered field, i.e. a cucumber patch
H4750.def: denominative from H7180 (קִשֻּׁא); literally a cucumbered field, i.e. a cucumber patch.

H4751.def: or (feminine) מָרָה; from H4843 (מָרַר); bitter (literally or figuratively); also (as noun) bitterness, or (adverbially) bitterly.
H4751.kjv: angry, bitter(-ly, -ness), chafed, discontented, great, heavy

H4752.def: from H4843 (מָרַר) in its original sense of distillation; a drop.

H4753.gloss: myrrh (as distilling in drops, and also as bitter)
H4753.def: or מוֹר; from H4843 (מָרַר); myrrh (as distilling in drops, and also as bitter).

H4754.def: a primitive root; to rebel; hence (through the idea of maltreating) to whip, i.e. lash (self with wings, as the ostrich in running).

H4755.gloss: Mara, a symbolic name of Naomi
H4755.def: for H4751 (מַר) feminine; bitter; Mara, a symbolic name of Naomi.

H4756.def: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to H4754 (מָרָא) in the sense of domineering; a master.

H4757.def: of foreign derivation; Merodak-Baladan, a Babylonian king.

H4758.def: from H7200 (רָאָה); a view (the act of seeing); also an appearance (the thing seen), whether (real) a shape (especially if handsome, comeliness; often plural the looks), or (mental) a vision.
H4758.kjv: apparently, appearance(-reth), as soon as beautiful(-ly), countenance, fair, favoured, form, goodly, to look (up) on (to), look(-eth), pattern, to see, seem, sight, visage, vision

H4759.def: feminine of H4758 (מַרְאֶה); a vision; also (causatively) a mirror.

H4760.def: apparently feminine passive causative participle of H7200 (רָאָה); something conspicuous, i.e. the craw of abird (from its prominence).

H4761.def: denominative from H7218 (רֹאשׁ); properly, headship, i.e. (plural for collective) dominion.

H4762.def: or מַרֵשָׁה; formed like H4761 (מַרְאָשָׁה); summit; Mareshah, the name of two Israelites and of a place in Palestine.

H4763.def: formed like H4761 (מַרְאָשָׁה); properly, a headpiece, i.e. (plural for adverbial) at (or as) the head-rest (or pillow).

H4764.def: from H7231 (רָבַב); increase; Merab, a daughter of Saul.

H4766.def: from H7235 (רָבָה); properly, increasing; as noun, greatness, or (adverbially) greatly.

H4767.def: from H7235 (רָבָה); abundance, i.e. a great quantity.

H4768.def: from H7235 (רָבָה); a multitude; also offspring; specifically interest (on capital).

H4769.gloss: a reclining place, i.e. fold (for flocks)
H4769.def: from H7257 (רָבַץ); a reclining place, i.e. fold (for flocks).
H4769.kjv: couching place, place to lie down

H4770.def: from an unused root meaning to tie up; a stall (for cattle).

H4772.def: denominative from H7272 (רֶגֶל); (plural for collective) a footpiece, i.e. (adverbially) at the foot, or (direct.) the foot itself.

H4776.def: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to H4775 (מָרַד); rebellion.

H4778.def: the same as H4777 (מֶרֶד); Mered, an Israelite.

H4779.def: (Aramaic) from the same as H4776 (מְרַד); rebellious.

H4781.def: of foreign derivation; Merodak, a Babylonian idol.

H4782.def: of foreign derivation; Mordecai, an Israelite.

H4784.def: a primitive root; to be (causatively, make) bitter (or unpleasant); (figuratively) to rebel (or resist; causatively, to provoke).
H4784.kjv: bitter, change, be disobedient, disobey, grievously, provocation, provoke(-ing), (be) rebel (against, -lious)

H4785.gloss: Marah, a place in the Desert
H4785.def: the same as H4751 (מַר) feminine; bitter; Marah, a place in the Desert.

H4788.def: from H7300 (רוּד) in the sense of maltreatment; an outcast; (abstractly) destitution.

H4789.def: of uncertain derivation; Meroz, a place in Palestine.

H4791.def: from H7311 (רוּם); altitude, i.e. concretely (an elevated place), abstractly (elevation, figuratively (elation), or adverbially (aloft).
H4791.kjv: (far) above, dignity, haughty, height, (most, on) high (one, place), loftily, upward

H4792.def: formed like H4791 (מָרוֹם); height; Merom, a lake in Palestine.

H4793.def: from H7323 (רוּץ); a run (the trial of speed).

H4794.gloss: a race (the act), whether the manner or the progress
H4794.def: or מְרֻצָה; feminine of H4793 (מֵרוֹץ); a race (the act), whether the manner or the progress.

H4795.def: from H4838 (מָרַק); properly, rubbed; but used abstractly, a rubbing (with perfumery).

H4796.def: plural of H4751 (מַר) feminine; bitter springs; Maroth, a place in Palestine.

H4797.gloss: a cry, i.e. (of job), a revel
H4797.def: from an unused root meaning to scream; a cry, i.e. (of job), a revel.

H4798.gloss: a cry, i.e. (of grief) a lamentation
H4798.def: formed like H4797 (מִרְזַח); a cry, i.e. (of grief) a lamentation.

H4799.gloss: to soften by rubbing or pressure
H4799.def: a primitive root; properly, to soften by rubbing or pressure; hence (medicinally) to apply as an emollient.

H4800.def: from H7337 (רָחַב); enlargement, either literally (an open space, usually in a good sense), or figuratively (liberty).

H4801.def: ; from H7368 (רָחַק); remoteness, i.e. (concretely) a distant place; often (adverbially) from afar.
H4801.kjv: (a-, dwell in, very) far (country, off). See also H1023 (בֵּית הַמֶּרְחָק)

H4803.def: a primitive root; to polish; by implication, to make bald (the head), to gall (the shoulder); also, to sharpen.
H4803.kjv: bright, furbish, (have his) hair (be) fallen off, peeled, pluck off (hair)

H4804.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H4803 (מָרַט); to pull off.

H4805.def: from H4784 (מָרָה); bitterness, i.e. (figuratively) rebellion; concretely, bitter, or rebellious.

H4806.def: from H4754 (מָרָא) in the sense of grossness, through the idea of domineering (compare H4756 (מָרֵא)); stall-fed; often (as noun) a beeve.

H4807.gloss: quarreller of Baal, Merib-Baal, an epithet of Gideon
H4807.def: from H7378 (רִיב) and H1168 (בַּעַל); quarreller of Baal, Merib-Baal, an epithet of Gideon.

H4809.gloss: Meribah, the name of two places in the Desert
H4809.def: the same as H4808 (מְרִיבָה); Meribah, the name of two places in the Desert.

H4810.def: from H4805 (מְרִי) and H1168 (בַּעַל); rebellion of (i.e. against) Baal; Meri-Baal, an epithet of Gideon.

H4811.def: from H4784 (מָרָה); rebellion; Merajah, an Israelite.

H4812.gloss: Merajoth, the name of two Israelites
H4812.def: plural of H4811 (מְרָיָה); rebellious; Merajoth, the name of two Israelites.

H4813.gloss: Mirjam, the name of two Israelitesses
H4813.def: from H4805 (מְרִי); rebelliously; Mirjam, the name of two Israelitesses.

H4816.def: perhaps from H7401 (רָכַךְ); softness, i.e. (figuratively) fear.

H4817.def: from H7392 (רָכַב); a chariot; also a seat (in a vehicle).

H4820.def: from H7411 (רָמָה) in the sense of deceiving; fraud.
H4820.kjv: craft, deceit(-ful, -fully), false, feigned, guile, subtilly, treachery

H4821.def: the same as H4820 (מִרְמָה); Mirmah, an Israelite.

H4822.gloss: Meremoth, the name of two Israelites
H4822.def: plural from H7311 (רוּם); heights; Meremoth, the name of two Israelites.

H4823.def: from H7429 (רָמַס); abasement (the act or the thing).

H4824.def: patrial from an unused noun; a Meronothite, or inhabitant of some (otherwise unknown) Meronoth..

H4825.def: of foreign derivation; Meres, a Persian.

H4826.def: of foreign derivation; Marsena, a Persian.

H4827.def: from H7489 (רָעַע); used as (abstract) noun, wickedness.

H4828.def: from H7462 (רָעָה) in the sense of companionship; a friend.

H4829.def: from H7462 (רָעָה) in the sense of feeding; pasture (the place or the act); also the haunt of wild animals.

H4830.def: from H7462 (רָעָה) in the sense of feeding; pasturage; concretely, a flock.

H4831.def: from H7477 (רָעַל); perhaps, earthquake; Maralah, a place in Palestine.

H4832.def: from H7495 (רָפָא); properly, curative, i.e. literally (concretely) a medicine, or (abstractly) a cure; figuratively (concretely) deliverance, or (abstractly) placidity.

H4834.gloss: to press, i.e. (figuratively) to be pungent or vehement
H4834.def: a primitive root; properly, to press, i.e. (figuratively) to be pungent or vehement; to irritate.

H4838.def: a primitive root; to polish; by implication, to sharpen; also to rinse.

H4839.def: from H4838 (מָרַק); soup (as if a rinsing).

H4841.def: feminine of H4840 (מֶרְקָח); abstractly, a seasoning (with spicery); concretely, an unguentkettle (for preparing spiced oil).

H4842.def: from H7543 (רָקַח); an aromatic unguent; also an unguent-pot.
H4842.kjv: prepared by the apothecaries' art, compound, ointment

H4843.gloss: to be (causatively, make) bitter (literally or figuratively)
H4843.def: a primitive root; properly, to trickle (see H4752 (מַר)); but used only as a denominative from H4751 (מַר); to be (causatively, make) bitter (literally or figuratively).
H4843.kjv: (be, be in, deal, have, make) bitter(-ly, -ness), be moved with choler, (be, have sorely, it) grieved(-eth), provoke, vex

H4844.def: or מְרוֹר; from H4843 (מָרַר); a bitter herb.

H4846.def: or מְרוֹרָה; from H4843 (מָרַר); properly, bitterness; concretely, a bitter thing; specifically bile; also venom (of a serpent).

H4847.def: from H4843 (מָרַר); bitter; Merari, an Israelite.

H4848.gloss: a Merarite (collectively), or decendants of Merari
H4848.def: from H4847 (מְרָרִי); a Merarite (collectively), or decendants of Merari.

H4849.def: from H7561 (רָשַׁע); a female wicked doer.

H4850.def: dual of H4751 (מַר) feminine; double bitterness; Merathajim, an epithet of Babylon.

H4851.gloss: Mash, a son of Aram, and the people descended from him
H4851.def: of foreign derivation; Mash, a son of Aram, and the people descended from him.

H4852.def: of foreign derivation; Mesha, a place in Arabia.

H4853.def: from H5375 (נָשָׂא); a burden; specifically, tribute, or (abstractly) porterage; figuratively, an utterance, chiefly adoom, especially singing; mental, desire.
H4853.kjv: burden, carry away, prophecy, they set, song, tribute

H4854.def: the same as H4853 (מַשָּׂא); burden; Massa, a son of Ishmael.

H4855.def: from H5383 (נָשָׁה); a loan; by implication, interest on adebt.

H4856.def: from H5375 (נָשָׂא); partiality (as a lifting up).

H4857.gloss: a trough for cattle to drink from
H4857.def: from H7579 (שָׁאַב); a trough for cattle to drink from.

H4858.gloss: a conflagration (from the rising of smoke)
H4858.def: from H5375 (נָשָׂא); a conflagration (from the rising of smoke).

H4861.def: from H7592 (שָׁאַל); request; Mishal, a place in Palestine.

H4863.gloss: a kneading-trough (in which the dough rises)
H4863.def: from H7604 (שָׁאַר) in the original sense of swelling; a kneading-trough (in which the dough rises).

H4864.gloss: (abstractly) a raising (as of the hands in prayer)
H4864.def: from H5375 (נָשָׂא); properly, (abstractly) a raising (as of the hands in prayer), or rising (of flame); figuratively, an utterance; concretely, a beacon (as raised); a present (as taken), mess, or tribute; figuratively, a reproach (as a burden).
H4864.kjv: burden, collection, sign of fire, (great) flame, gift, lifting up, mess, oblation, reward

H4865.def: from H7660 (שָׁבַץ); a brocade; by analogy, a (reticulated) setting of agem.

H4866.gloss: the orifice of the womb (from which the fetus breaks forth)
H4866.def: from H7665 (שָׁבַר); the orifice of the womb (from which the fetus breaks forth).

H4867.def: from H7665 (שָׁבַר); a breaker (of the sea).

H4869.gloss: defence, high fort (tower), refuge, Misgab, a place in Moab
H4869.def: from H7682 (שָׂגַב); properly, a cliff (or other lofty or inaccessible place); abstractly, altitude; figuratively, a refuge; defence, high fort (tower), refuge, Misgab, a place in Moab.

H4871.def: a primitive root; to pull out (literally or figuratively).

H4872.def: from H4871; drawing out (of the water), i.e., rescued; Mosheh, the Israelite lawgiver.

H4873.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H4872 (מֹשֶׁה); Mosheh, the Israelite lawgiver.

H4875.gloss: (a) ruin, abstractly (the act) or concretely (the wreck)
H4875.def: or מְשֹׁאָה; from the same as H7722 (שׁוֹא); (a) ruin, abstractly (the act) or concretely (the wreck).

H4877.def: from H7725 (שׁוּב); returned; Meshobab, an Israelite.

H4879.def: from an unused root meaning to stray; mistake.

H4880.def: or מִשּׁוֹט; from H7751 (שׁוּט); an oar.

H4881.def: or מְשֻׂכָה; from H7753 (שׂוּךְ); a hedge.

H4882.def: from an unused root meaning to plunder; spoilation.

H4883.def: from an unused root meaning to rasp; a saw.

H4884.def: from an unused root meaning apparently to divide; a measure (for liquids).

H4885.def: from H7797 (שׂוּשׂ); delight, concretely (the cause or object) or abstractly (the feeling).

H4886.gloss: to rub with oil, i.e. to anoint
H4886.def: a primitive root; to rub with oil, i.e. to anoint; by implication, to consecrate; also to paint.

H4887.def: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to H4886 (מָשַׁח); oil.

H4888.def: or מׇשְׁחָה; from H4886 (מָשַׁח); unction (the act); by implication, a consecratory gift.

H4889.def: from H7843 (שָׁחַת); destructive, i.e. (as noun) destruction, literally (specifically a snare) or figuratively (corruption).

H4891.def: from H7836 (שָׁחַר) in the sense of day breaking; dawn.

H4894.def: or מִשְׁטַח; from H7849 (שָׁטַח); a spreading-place.

H4895.def: from the same as H7850 (שֹׁטֵט); enmity.

H4897.def: from H4871 (מָשָׁה); silk (as drawn from the cocoon).

H4898.def: from an equiv. to H7804 (שְׁזַב) and H410 (אֵל); delivered of God; Meshezabel, an Israelite.

H4899.def: from H4886; anointed; usually a consecrated person (as a king, priest, or saint); specifically, the Messiah.

H4900.def: a primitive root; to draw, used in a great variety of applications (including to sow, to sound, to prolong, to develop, to march, to remove, to delay, to be tall, etc.).
H4900.kjv: draw (along, out), continue, defer, extend, forbear, give, handle, make (pro-, sound) long, sow, scatter, stretch out

H4901.def: from H4900 (מָשַׁךְ); a sowing; also a possession.

H4902.gloss: Meshek, a son of Japheth, and the people descended from him
H4902.def: the same in form as H4901 (מֶשֶׁךְ), but probably of foreign derivation; Meshek, a son of Japheth, and the people descended from him.

H4904.def: from H7901 (שָׁכַב); a bed (figuratively, a bier); abstractly, sleep; by euphemism, carnal intercourse.

H4905.def: from H7919 (שָׂכַל); instructive, i.e. a didactic poem.

H4906.gloss: a figure (carved on stone, the wall, or any object)
H4906.def: from the same as H7906 (שֵׂכוּ); a figure (carved on stone, the wall, or any object); figuratively, imagination.

H4908.def: from H7931 (שָׁכַן); a residence (including a shepherd's hut, the lair of animals, figuratively, the grave; also the Temple); specifically, the Tabernacle (properly, its wooden walls).

H4909.def: from H7936 (שָׂכַר); wages or a reward.

H4910.kjv: (have, make to have) dominion, governor, indeed, reign, (bear, cause to, have) rule(-ing, -r), have power

H4911.def: denominative from H4912 (מָשָׁל); to liken, i.e. (transitively) to use figurative language (an allegory, adage, song or the like); intransitively, to resemble.
H4911.kjv: be(-come) like, compare, use (as a) proverb, speak (in proverbs), utter

H4912.gloss: a pithy maxim, usually of metaphorical nature
H4912.def: apparently from H4910 (מָשַׁל) in some original sense of superiority in mental action; properly, a pithy maxim, usually of metaphorical nature; hence, a simile (as an adage, poem, discourse).

H4913.def: for H4861 (מִשְׁאָל); Mashal, a place in Palestine.

H4915.def: (1) from H4910 (מָשַׁל); (2) from H4911 (מָשַׁל); empire; a parallel.

H4916.def: or מִשְׁלֹחַ; also מִשְׁלָח; from H7971 (שָׁלַח); a sending out, i.e. (abstractly) presentation (favorable), or seizure (unfavorable); also (concretely) a place of dismissal, or a business to be discharged.
H4916.kjv: to lay, to put, sending (forth), to set

H4917.def: feminine of H4916 (מִשְׁלוֹחַ); a mission, i.e. (abstractly and favorable) release, or (concretely and unfavorable) an army.

H4918.gloss: Meshullam, the name of seventeen Israelites
H4918.def: from H7999 (שָׁלַם); allied; Meshullam, the name of seventeen Israelites.

H4919.def: plural from H7999 (שָׁלַם); reconciliations; Meshillemoth, an Israelite.

H4920.def: or מְשֶׁלֶמְיָהוּ; from H7999 (שָׁלַם) and H3050 (יָהּ); ally of Jah; Meshelemjah, an Israelite.

H4921.def: from H7999 (שָׁלַם); reconciliation; Meshillemith, an Israelite.

H4922.def: feminine of H4918 (מְשֻׁלָּם); Meshullemeth, an Israelitess.

H4923.def: from H8074 (שָׁמֵם); a waste or amazement.

H4924.def: from H8080 (שָׁמַן); fat, i.e. (literally and abstractly) fatness; but usually (figuratively and concretely) a rich dish, a fertile field, a robust man.

H4925.def: from H8080 (שָׁמַן); fatness; Mashmannah, an Israelite.

H4927.gloss: Mishma, the name of a son of Ishmael, and of an Israelite
H4927.def: the same as H4926 (מִשְׁמָע); Mishma, the name of a son of Ishmael, and of an Israelite.

H4928.def: feminine of H4926 (מִשְׁמָע); audience, i.e. the royal court; also obedience, i.e. (concretely) a subject.

H4929.gloss: a guard (the man, the post or the prison)
H4929.def: from H8104 (שָׁמַר); a guard (the man, the post or the prison); a deposit (figuratively); also (as observed) a usage (abstractly), or an example (concretely).
H4929.kjv: diligence, guard, office, prison, ward, watch

H4931.def: feminine of H4929 (מִשְׁמָר); watch, i.e. the act (custody), or (concretely) the sentry, the post; objectively preservation, or (concretely) safe; figuratively observance, i.e. (abstractly) duty or (objectively) a usage or party.
H4931.kjv: charge, keep, or to be kept, office, ordinace, safeguard, ward, watch

H4932.def: from H8138 (שָׁנָה); properly, a repetition, i.e. a duplicate (copy of a document), or a double (in amount); by implication, a second (in order, rank, age, quality or location).
H4932.kjv: college, copy, double, fatlings, next, second (order), twice as much

H4934.gloss: a hollow, i.e. a narrow passage
H4934.def: from the same as H8168 (שֹׁעַל); a hollow, i.e. a narrow passage.

H4936.def: apparently from H8159 (שָׁעָה); inspection; Misham, an Israelite.

H4937.def: or מִשְׁעָן; from H8172 (שָׁעַן); a support (concretely), i.e. (figuratively) a protector or sustenance.

H4938.def: or מִשְׁעֶנֶת; feminine of H4937 (מִשְׁעֵן); support (abstractly), i.e. (figuratively) sustenance or (concretely) a walking-stick.

H4940.gloss: a family, i.e. circle of relatives
H4940.def: from H8192 (שָׁפָה) (compare H8198 (שִׁפְחָה)); a family, i.e. circle of relatives; figuratively, a class (of persons), a species (of animals) or sort (of things); by extension a tribe or people.

H4941.gloss: a verdict (favorable or unfavorable) pronounced judicially
H4941.def: from H8199 (שָׁפַט); properly, a verdict (favorable or unfavorable) pronounced judicially, especially a sentence or formal decree (human or (participant's) divine law, individual or collective), including the act, the place, the suit, the crime, and the penalty; abstractly, justice, including a participant's right or privilege (statutory or customary), or even a style.
H4941.kjv: adversary, ceremony, charge, crime, custom, desert, determination, discretion, disposing, due, fashion, form, to be judged, judgment, just(-ice, -ly), (manner of) law(-ful), manner, measure, (due) order, ordinance, right, sentence, usest, worthy, wrong

H4942.def: from H8192 (שָׁפָה); a stall for cattle (only dual).

H4943.def: from an unused root meaning to hold; possession.

H4944.def: from H8264 (שָׁקַק); a traversing, i.e. rapid motion.

H4945.gloss: causing to drink, i.e. a butler
H4945.def: from H8248 (שָׁקָה); properly, causing to drink, i.e. a butler; by implication (intransitively), drink (itself); figuratively, a well-watered region.
H4945.kjv: butler(-ship), cupbearer, drink(-ing), fat pasture, watered

H4947.def: from H8259 (שָׁקַף) in its original sense of overhanging; a lintel.

H4948.def: from H8254 (שָׁקַל); weight (numerically estimated); hence, weighing (the act).

H4949.gloss: a weight, i.e. a plummet (with line attached)
H4949.def: or מִשְׁקֹלֶת; feminine of H4948 (מִשְׁקָל) or H4947 (מַשְׁקוֹף); a weight, i.e. a plummet (with line attached).

H4950.gloss: a settling place (of water), i.e. a pond
H4950.def: from H8257 (שָׁקַע); a settling place (of water), i.e. a pond.

H4952.def: from H8281 (שָׁרָה) in the sense of loosening; maceration, i.e. steeped juice.

H4953.def: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to H8319 (שָׁרַק); a (musical) pipe (from its whistling sound).

H4954.gloss: a Mishraite, or inhabitant (collectively) of Mishra
H4954.def: patrial from an unused noun from an unused root; probably meaning to stretch out; extension; a Mishraite, or inhabitant (collectively) of Mishra.

H4955.def: from H8313 (שָׂרַף); combustion, i.e. cremation (of a corpse), or calcination (of lime).

H4956.def: from the plural of H4955 (מִשְׂרָפָה) and H4325 (מַיִם); burnings of water; Misrephoth-Majim, a place in Palestine.

H4957.def: a form for H7796 (שׂוֹרֵק) used denominatively; vineyard; Masrekah, a place in Idumaea.

H4958.def: apparently from an unused root meaning to perforate, i.e. hollow out; a pan.

H4959.def: a primitive root; to feel of; by implication, to grope.

H4960.def: from H8354 (שָׁתָה); drink, by implication, drinking (the act); also (by implication) a banquet or (generally) feast.

H4962.def: from the same as H4970 (מָתַי); properly, an adult (as of full length); by implication, a man (only in the plural).

H4963.def: denominative from H8401 (תֶּבֶן); straw in the heap.

H4964.def: from an unused root meaning to curb; a bit.

H4965.def: from H4964 (מֶתֶג) and H520 (אַמָּה) with the art. interposed; bit of the metropolis; Metheg-ha-Ammah, an epithet of Gath.

H4967.def: from H4962 (מַת) and H410 (אֵל), with the relative interposed; man who (is) of God; Methusael, an antediluvian patriarch.

H4968.def: from H4962 (מַת) and H7973 (שֶׁלַח); man of a dart; Methushelach, an antediluvian patriarch.

H4969.def: a primitive root; to stretch out.

H4970.def: from an unused root meaning to extend; properly, extent (of time); but used only adverbially (especially with other particle prefixes), when (either relative or interrogative).

H4971.def: or מַתְכֻנֶת; from H8505 (תָּכַן) in the transferred sense of measuring; proportion (in size, number or ingredients).

H4972.def: from H4100 (מָה) and H8513 (תְּלָאָה); what a trouble!.

H4973.def: contr. from H3216 (יָלַע); properly, a biter, i.e. a tooth.

H4975.gloss: the waist or small of the back
H4975.def: from an unused root meaning to be slender; properly, the waist or small of the back; only in plural the loins.

H4977.gloss: Mattan, the name of a priest of Baal, and of an Israelite
H4977.def: the same as H4976 (מַתָּן); Mattan, the name of a priest of Baal, and of an Israelite.

H4978.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H4979 (מַתָּנָה); a present; specifically (in a good sense), a sacrificial offering, (in a bad sense) a bribe.

H4979.def: feminine of H4976 (מַתָּן); a present; specifically (in a good sense), a sacrificial offering, (in a bad sense) a bribe.

H4980.gloss: Mattanah, a place in the Desert
H4980.def: the same as H4979 (מַתָּנָה); Mattanah, a place in the Desert.

H4981.gloss: a Mithnite, or inhabitant of Methen
H4981.def: probably patrial from an unused noun meaning slenderness; a Mithnite, or inhabitant of Methen.

H4982.gloss: Mattenai, the name of three Israelites
H4982.def: from H4976 (מַתָּן); liberal; Mattenai, the name of three Israelites.

H4983.gloss: Mattanjah, the name of ten Israelites
H4983.def: or מַתַּנְיָהוּ; from H4976 (מַתָּן) and H3050 (יָהּ); gift of Jah; Mattanjah, the name of ten Israelites.

H4984.def: from H5375 (נָשָׂא); (used as abstractly) supreme exaltation.

H4985.def: a primitive root; to suck, by implication, to relish, or (intransitively) be sweet.

H4988.def: from H4985 (מָתַק); a dainty, i.e. (generally) food.

H4989.gloss: Mithkah, a place in the Desert
H4989.def: feminine of H4987 (מֹתֶק); sweetness; Mithkah, a place in the Desert.

H4990.gloss: Mithredath, the name of two Persians
H4990.def: of Persian origin; Mithredath, the name of two Persians.

H4991.def: feminine of H4976 (מַתָּן) abbreviated form; a present.

H4992.def: for H4993 (מַתִּתְיָה); gift of Jah; Mattattah, an Israelite.

H4993.gloss: Mattithjah, the name of four Israelites
H4993.def: or מַתִּתְיָהוּ; from H4991 (מַתָּת) and H3050 (יָהּ); gift of Jah; Mattithjah, the name of four Israelites.

H4994.def: a primitive particle of incitement and entreaty, which may usually be rendered; 'I pray', 'now', or 'then'; added mostly to verbs (in the Imperative or Future), or to interjections, occasionally to an adverb or conjunction.
H4994.kjv: I beseech (pray) thee (you), go to, now, oh

H4995.def: apparently from H5106 (נוּא) in the sense of harshness from refusal; properly, tough, i.e. uncooked (flesh).

H4996.gloss: No (i.e. Thebes), the capital of Upper Egypt
H4996.def: of Egyptian origin; No (i.e. Thebes), the capital of Upper Egypt.

H4997.def: or נאוֹדlemma נֹאוד vowel, corrected to נאוֹדxlit nôʼwd corrected to nʼôwd; also (feminine) נֹאדָה; from an unused root of uncertain signification; a (skin or leather) bag (for fluids).

H4998.def: a primitive root; properly, to be at home, i.e. (by implication) to be pleasant (or suitable), i.e. beautiful.

H4999.def: from H4998 (נָאָה); a home; figuratively, a pasture.

H5000.def: from H4998 (נָאָה) or H5116 (נָוֶה); suitable, or beautiful.

H5001.gloss: to whisper, i.e. (by implication) to utter as aoracle
H5001.def: a primitive root; properly, to whisper, i.e. (by implication) to utter as aoracle.

H5003.def: a primitive root; to commit adultery; figuratively, to apostatize.
H5003.kjv: adulterer(-ess), commit(-ing) adultery, woman that breaketh wedlock

H5006.def: a primitive root; in Ecclesiastes 12:5, by interchange for H5132 (נוּץ), to bloom; to scorn;.
H5006.kjv: abhor, (give occasion to) blaspheme, contemn, despise, flourish, great, provoke

H5011.def: the same as H5108 (נוֹב); fruit; Nob, a place in Palestine.

H5012.def: a primitive root; to prophesy, i.e. speak (or sing) by inspiration (in prediction or simple discourse).

H5013.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H5012 (נָבָא); to prophesy, i.e. speak (or sing) by inspiration (in prediction or simple discourse) to prophesy, i.e. speak (or sing) by inspiration (in prediction or simple discourse).

H5014.def: a primitive root; to pierce; to be hollow, or (figuratively) foolish.

H5015.def: probably of foreign derivation; Nebo, the name of a Babylonian deity, also of a mountain in Moab, and of a place in Palestine.

H5016.def: from H5012 (נָבָא); a prediction (spoken or written).

H5018.def: of foreign origin; Nebuzaradan, a Babylonian general.

H5019.def: or נְבֻּכַדְנֶאצַּר; (2 Kings 24:1,10), or נְבוּכַדְנֶצַּר; (Esther 2:6; Daniel 1:18), or נְבוּכַדְרֶאצַּר; or נְבוּכַדְרֶאצּוֹר; (Ezra 2:1; Jeremiah 49:28), or foreign derivation; Nebukadnetstsar (or -retstsar, or -retstsor), king of Babylon.

H5020.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H5019 (נְבוּכַדְנֶאצַּר); Nebukadnetstsar (or -retstsar, or -retstsor), king of Babylon.

H5021.def: of foreign derivation; Nebushazban, Nebuchadnezzar's chief eunuch.

H5022.def: feminine plural from the same as H5011 (נֹב); fruits; Naboth, an Israelite.

H5024.def: a primitive root; to bark (as a dog).

H5025.def: from H5024 (נָבַח); a bark; Nobach, the name of an Israelite, and of a place East of the Jordan.

H5026.gloss: Nibchaz, a deity of the Avites
H5026.def: of foreign origin; Nibchaz, a deity of the Avites.

H5027.gloss: to scan, i.e. look intently at
H5027.def: a primitive root; to scan, i.e. look intently at; by implication, to regard with pleasure, favor or care.
H5027.kjv: (cause to) behold, consider, look (down), regard, have respect, see

H5028.gloss: Nebat, the father of Jeroboam I
H5028.def: from H5027 (נָבַט); regard; Nebat, the father of Jeroboam I.

H5030.def: from H5012 (נָבָא); a prophet or (generally) inspired man.

H5031.def: feminine of H5030 (נָבִיא); a prophetess or (generally) inspired woman; by implication, a poetess; by association a prophet's wife.

H5032.gloss: Nebajoth, a son of Ismael, and the country settled by him
H5032.def: or נְבָיֹת; feminine plural from H5107 (נוּב); fruitfulnesses; Nebajoth, a son of Ismael, and the country settled by him.

H5033.def: from an unused root meaning to burst forth; a fountain.

H5034.def: a primitive root; to wilt; generally, to fall away, fail, faint; figuratively, to be foolish or (morally) wicked; causatively, to despise, disgrace.
H5034.kjv: disgrace, dishounour, lightly esteem, fade (away, -ing), fall (down, -ling, off), do foolishly, come to nought, surely, make vile, wither

H5035.gloss: a skin-bag for liquids (from collapsing when empty)
H5035.def: or נֵבֶל; from H5034 (נָבֵל); a skin-bag for liquids (from collapsing when empty); hence, a vase (as similar in shape when full); also a lyre (as having a body of like form).

H5037.def: the same as H5036 (נָבָל); dolt; Nabal, an Israelite.

H5038.def: from H5034 (נָבֵל); a flabby thing, i.e. a carcase or carrion (human or bestial, often collectively); figuratively, an idol.
H5038.kjv: (dead) body, (dead) carcase, dead of itself, which died, (beast) that (which) dieth of itself

H5039.def: feminine of H5036 (נָבָל); foolishness, i.e. (morally) wickedness; concretely, a crime; by extension, punishment.

H5040.def: from H5036 (נָבָל); properly, disgrace, i.e. the (female) pudenda.

H5041.def: apparently from H5036 (נָבָל) and H3909 (לָט); foolish secrecy; Neballat, a place in Palestine.

H5042.def: a primitive root; to gush forth; figuratively, to utter (good or bad words); specifically, to emit (a foul odor).
H5042.kjv: belch out, flowing, pour out, send forth, utter (abundantly)

H5043.def: (Aramaic) from an unused root meaning to shine; a light; plural (collectively) a chandelier.

H5044.def: of uncertain derivation; Nibshan, a place in Palestine.

H5045.def: from an unused root meaning to be parched; the south (from its drought); specifically, the Negeb or southern district of Judah, occasionally, Egypt (as south to Palestine).

H5046.gloss: to front, i.e. stand boldly out opposite
H5046.def: a primitive root; properly, to front, i.e. stand boldly out opposite; by implication (causatively), to manifest; figuratively, to announce (always by word of mouth to one present); specifically, to expose, predict, explain, praise.
H5046.kjv: bewray, certainly, certify, declare(-ing), denounce, expound, fully, messenger, plainly, profess, rehearse, report, shew (forth), speak, surely, tell, utter

H5047.gloss: to flow (through the idea of clearing the way)
H5047.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H5046 (נָגַד); to flow (through the idea of clearing the way).

H5048.def: from H5046 (נָגַד); a front, i.e. part opposite; specifically a counterpart, or mate; usually (adverbial, especially with preposition) over against or before.
H5048.kjv: about, (over) against, aloof, far (off), from, over, presence, other side, sight, to view

H5050.def: a primitive root; to glitter; causatively, to illuminate.

H5052.def: the same as H5051 (נֹגַהּ); Nogah, a son of David.

H5055.def: a primitive root; to butt with the horns; figuratively, to war against.

H5057.def: or נָגִד; from H5046 (נָגַד); a commander (as occupying the front), civil, military or religious; generally (abstractly, plural), honorable themes.
H5057.kjv: captain, chief, excellent thing, (chief) governor, leader, noble, prince, (chief) ruler

H5058.def: or נְגִינַת; (Psalm 61:title), from H5059 (נָגַן); properly, instrumental music; by implication, a stringed instrument; by extension, a poem set to music; specifically, an epigram.

H5059.gloss: to thrum, i.e. beat atune with the fingers
H5059.def: a primitive root; properly, to thrum, i.e. beat atune with the fingers; expectation. to play on astringed instrument; hence (generally), to make music.
H5059.kjv: player on instruments, sing to the stringed instruments, melody, ministrel, play(-er, -ing)

H5060.gloss: to touch, i.e. lay the hand upon (for any purpose
H5060.def: a primitive root; properly, to touch, i.e. lay the hand upon (for any purpose; euphemistically, to lie with a woman); by implication, to reach (figuratively, to arrive, acquire); violently, to strike (punish, defeat, destroy, etc.).
H5060.kjv: beat, (be able to) bring (down), cast, come (nigh), draw near (nigh), get up, happen, join, near, plague, reach (up), smite, strike, touch

H5061.def: from H5060 (נָגַע); a blow (figuratively, infliction); also (by implication) a spot (concretely, a leprous person or dress).
H5061.kjv: plague, sore, stricken, stripe, stroke, wound

H5062.gloss: to push, gore, defeat, stub (the toe), inflict (a disease)
H5062.def: a primitive root; to push, gore, defeat, stub (the toe), inflict (a disease).
H5062.kjv: beat, dash, hurt, plague, slay, smite (down), strike, stumble, surely, put to the worse

H5063.def: from H5062 (נָגַף); a trip (of the foot); figuratively, an infliction (of disease).

H5064.def: a primitive root; to flow; figuratively, to stretch out; causatively, to pour out or down; figuratively, to deliver over.
H5064.kjv: fall, flow away, pour down (out), run, shed, spilt, trickle down

H5065.gloss: to drive (an animal, a workman, a debtor, an army)
H5065.def: a primitive root; to drive (an animal, a workman, a debtor, an army); by implication, to tax, harass, tyrannize.
H5065.kjv: distress, driver, exact(-or), oppress(-or), raiser of taxes, taskmaster

H5066.gloss: to be or come (causatively, bring) near (for any purpose)
H5066.def: a primitive root; to be or come (causatively, bring) near (for any purpose); euphemistically, to lie with a woman; as an enemy, to attack; religious to worship; causatively, to present; figuratively, to adduce an argument; by reversal, to stand back.
H5066.kjv: (make to) approach (nigh), bring (forth, hither, near), (cause to) come (hither, near, nigh), give place, go hard (up), (be, draw, go) near (nigh), offer, overtake, present, put, stand

H5067.def: from H5110 (נוּד) in the sense of piling up; a mound, i.e. wave.

H5068.def: a primitive root; to impel; hence, to volunteer (as a soldier), to present spontaneously.
H5068.kjv: offer freely, be (give, make, offer self) willing(-ly)

H5069.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H5068 (נָדַב); be (or give) liberal(-ly).

H5070.gloss: Nadab, the name of four Israelites
H5070.def: from H5068 (נָדַב); liberal; Nadab, the name of four Israelites.

H5071.def: from H5068 (נָדַב); properly (abstractly) spontaneity, or (adjectively) spontaneous; also (concretely) a spontaneous or (by inference, in plural) abundant gift.
H5071.kjv: free(-will) offering, freely, plentiful, voluntary(-ily, offering), willing(-ly), offering)

H5072.def: from H5068 (נָדַב) and H3050 (יָהּ); largess of Jah; Nedabjah, an Israelite.

H5073.def: (Aramaic) from a root meaning to stick; a layer (of building materials).

H5074.gloss: to wave to and fro (rarely to flap up and down)
H5074.def: a primitive root; properly, to wave to and fro (rarely to flap up and down); figuratively, to rove, flee, or (causatively) to drive away.
H5074.kjv: chase (away), could not, depart, flee (apace, away), (re-) move, thrust away, wander (abroad, -er, -ing)

H5076.def: passive participle of H5074 (נָדַד); properly, tossed; abstractly, a rolling (on the bed).

H5077.def: or נָדָא; (2 Kings 17:21), a primitive root; properly, to toss; figuratively, to exclude, i.e. banish, postpone, prohibit.
H5077.kjv: cast out, drive, put far away

H5078.def: from H5077 (נָדָה) in the sense of freely flinging money; a bounty (for prostitution).

H5079.def: from H5074 (נָדַד); properly, rejection; by implication, impurity, especially personal (menstruation) or moral (idolatry, incest).
H5079.kjv: far, filthiness, flowers, menstruous (woman), put apart, removed (woman), separation, set apart, unclean(-ness, thing, with filthiness)

H5080.def: a primitive root; to push off; used in a great variety of applications, literally and figuratively (to expel, mislead, strike, inflict, etc.).
H5080.kjv: banish, bring, cast down (out), chase, compel, draw away, drive (away, out, quite), fetch a stroke, force, go away, outcast, thrust away (out), withdraw

H5081.def: from H5068 (נָדַב); properly, voluntary, i.e. generous; hence, magnanimous; as noun, a grandee (sometimes a tyrant).

H5082.def: feminine of H5081 (נָדִיב); properly, nobility, i.e. reputation.

H5083.def: probably from an unused root meaning to give; a present (for prostitution).

H5084.def: of uncertain derivation; a sheath (of a sword).

H5085.def: (Aramaic) from the same as H5084 (נָדָן); a sheath; figuratively, the body (as the receptacle of the soul).

H5086.def: a primitive root; to shove asunder, i.e. disperse.
H5086.kjv: drive (away, to and fro), thrust down, shaken, tossed to and fro

H5087.gloss: to promise (pos., to do or give something to God)
H5087.def: a primitive root; to promise (pos., to do or give something to God).

H5088.def: or נֵדֶר; from H5087 (נָדַר); a promise (to God); also (concretely) a thing promised.

H5089.def: from an unused root meaning to lament; lamentation.

H5090.def: a primitive root; to drive forth (a person, an animal or chariot), i.e. lead, carry away; reflexively, to proceed (i.e. impel or guide oneself); also (from the panting induced by effort), to sigh.
H5090.kjv: acquaint, bring (away), carry away, drive (away), lead (away, forth), (be) guide, lead (away, forth)

H5091.def: a primitive root; to groan, i.e. bewail; hence (through the idea of crying aloud), to assemble (as if on proclamation).

H5094.def: (Aramaic) or נְהִירוּ; (Aramaic), from the same as H5105 (נְהָרָה); illumination, i.e. (figuratively) wisdom.

H5095.gloss: to run with asparkle, i.e. flow
H5095.def: a primitive root; properly, to run with asparkle, i.e. flow; hence (transitively), to conduct, and (by inference) to protect, sustain.

H5096.gloss: Nahalal or Nahalol, a place in Palestine
H5096.def: or נַהֲלֹל; the same as H5097 (נַהֲלֹל); Nahalal or Nahalol, a place in Palestine.

H5101.gloss: to bray (as an ass), scream (from hunger)
H5101.def: a primitive root; to bray (as an ass), scream (from hunger).

H5102.def: a primitive root; to sparkle, i.e. (figuratively) be cheerful; hence (from the sheen of a running stream) to flow, i.e. (figuratively) assemble.

H5103.def: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to H5102 (נָהַר); a river, especially the Euphrates.

H5104.def: from H5102 (נָהַר); a stream (including the sea; expectation the Nile, Euphrates, etc.); figuratively, prosperity.

H5105.def: from H5102 (נָהַר) in its original sense; daylight.

H5106.gloss: to refuse, forbid, dissuade, or neutralize
H5106.def: a primitive root; to refuse, forbid, dissuade, or neutralize.
H5106.kjv: break, disallow, discourage, make of none effect

H5107.def: a primitive root; to germinate, i.e. (figuratively) to (causatively, make) flourish; also (of words), to utter.

H5108.def: or נֵיב; from H5107 (נוּב); produce, literally or figuratively.

H5109.def: from H5108 (נוֹב); fruitful; Nobai, an Israelite.

H5110.def: a primitive root; to nod, i.e. waver; figuratively, to wander, flee, disappear; also (from shaking the head in sympathy), to console, deplore, or (from tossing the head in scorn) taunt.
H5110.kjv: bemoan, flee, get, mourn, make to move, take pity, remove, shake, skip for joy, be sorry, vagabond, way, wandering

H5113.def: the same as H5112 (נוֹד)lemma נוֹדּ extra dagesh, corrected to נוֹד; vagrancy; Nod, the land of Cain.

H5114.def: from H5068 (נָדַב); noble; Nodab, an Arab tribe.

H5115.def: a primitive root; (compare H5116 (נָוֶה)); to rest (as at home); causatively (through the implied idea of beauty ), to celebrate (with praises).
H5115.kjv: keept at home, prepare an habitation

H5116.def: or (feminine) נָוָה; from H5115 (נָוָה); (adjectively) at home; hence (by implication of satisfaction) lovely; also (noun) a home, of God (temple), men (residence), flocks (pasture), or wild animals (den).
H5116.kjv: comely, dwelling (place), fold, habitation, pleasant place, sheepcote, stable, tarried

H5117.def: a primitive root; to rest, i.e. settle down; used in a great variety of applications, literal and figurative, intransitive, transitive and causative (to dwell, stay, let fall, place, let alone, withdraw, give comfort, etc.).
H5117.kjv: cease, be confederate, lay, let down, (be) quiet, remain, (cause to, be at, give, have, make to) rest, set down. Compare H3241 (יָנִים)

H5119.def: feminine of H5118 (נוּחַ); quietude; Nochah, an Israelite.

H5121.def: from H5115 (נָוָה); residence; Navith, a place in Palestine.

H5122.def: (Aramaic) or נְוָלִי; (Aramaic), from an unused root probably meaning to be foul; a sink.

H5123.def: a primitive root; to slumber (from drowsiness).

H5125.gloss: to resprout, i.e. propagate by shoots
H5125.def: a primitive root; to resprout, i.e. propagate by shoots; figuratively, to be perpetual.

H5126.gloss: Nun or Non, the father of Joshua
H5126.def: or נוֹן; (1 Chronicles 7:27), from H5125 (נוּן); perpetuity,; Nun or Non, the father of Joshua.

H5127.gloss: to flit, i.e. vanish away (subside, escape
H5127.def: a primitive root; to flit, i.e. vanish away (subside, escape; causatively, chase, impel, deliver).
H5127.kjv: abate, away, be displayed, (make to) flee (away, -ing), put to flight, hide, lift up a standard

H5128.def: a primitive root; to waver, in a great variety of applications, literally and figuratively (as subjoined).
H5128.kjv: continually, fugitive, make, to (go) up and down, be gone away, (be) move(-able, -d), be promoted, reel, remove, scatter, set, shake, sift, stagger, to and fro, be vagabond, wag, (make) wander (up and down)

H5129.gloss: Noadjah, the name of an Israelite, and a false prophetess
H5129.def: from H3259 (יָעַד) and H3050 (יָהּ); convened of Jah; Noadjah, the name of an Israelite, and a false prophetess.

H5130.gloss: to quiver (i.e. vibrate up and down, or rock to and fro)
H5130.def: a primitive root; to quiver (i.e. vibrate up and down, or rock to and fro); used in a great variety of applications (including sprinkling, beckoning, rubbing, bastinadoing, sawing, waving, etc.).
H5130.kjv: lift up, move, offer, perfume, send, shake, sift, strike, wave

H5132.def: a primitive root; properly, to flash; hence, to blossom (from the brilliancy of color); also, to fly away (from the quickness of motion).

H5133.def: or נֹצָה; feminine active participle of H5327 (נָצָה) in the sense of flying; a pinion (or wing feather); often (collectively) plumage.

H5135.def: (Aramaic) from an unused root (corresponding to that of H5216 (נִיר)) meaning to shine; fire.

H5136.def: a primitive root; to be sick, i.e. (figuratively) distressed.

H5137.gloss: to spirt, i.e. besprinkle (especially in expiation)
H5137.def: a primitive root; to spirt, i.e. besprinkle (especially in expiation).

H5138.def: from H2102 (זוּד); something boiled, i.e. soup.

H5139.gloss: separate, i.e. consecrated (as prince, a Nazirite)
H5139.def: or נָזִר; from H5144 (נָזַר); separate, i.e. consecrated (as prince, a Nazirite); hence (figuratively from the latter) an unpruned vine (like an unshorn Nazirite).
H5139.kjv: Nazarite (by a false alliteration with Nazareth), separate(-d), vine undressed

H5140.gloss: to drip, or shed by trickling
H5140.def: a primitive root; to drip, or shed by trickling.
H5140.kjv: distil, drop, flood, (cause to) flow(-ing), gush out, melt, pour (down), running water, stream

H5141.def: from an unused root of uncertain meaning; a nose-ring.

H5142.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to the root of H5143 (נֵזֶק); to suffer (causatively, inflict) loss.

H5143.def: from an unused root meaning to injure; loss.

H5144.def: a primitive root; to hold aloof, i.e. (intransitivey) abstain (from food and drink, from impurity, and even from divine worship (i.e. apostatize)); specifically, to set apart (to sacred purposes), i.e. devote.

H5145.def: or נֵזֶר; from H5144 (נָזַר); properly, something set apart, i.e. (abstractly) dedication (of a priet or Nazirite); hence (concretely) unshorn locks; also (by implication) a chaplet (especially of royalty).

H5146.gloss: Noach, the patriarch of the flood
H5146.def: the same as H5118 (נוּחַ); rest; Noach, the patriarch of the flood.

H5147.def: from H2247 (חָבָה); occult; Nachbi, an Israelite.

H5148.def: a primitive root; to guide; by implication, to transport (into exile, or as colonists).
H5148.kjv: bestow, bring, govern, guide, lead (forth), put, straiten

H5149.def: from H5162 (נָחַם); comforted; Nechum, an Israelite.

H5150.def: or נִחֻם; from H5162 (נָחַם); properly, consoled; abstractly, solace.

H5151.def: from H5162 (נָחַם); comfortable; Nachum, an Israelite prophet.

H5152.gloss: Nochor, the name of the grandfather and a brother of Abraham
H5152.def: from the same as H5170 (נַחַר); snorer; Nochor, the name of the grandfather and a brother of Abraham.

H5153.def: apparently passive participle of H5172 (נָחַשׁ) (perhaps in the sense of ringing), i.e. bell-metal; or from the red color of the throat of a serpent (H5175 (נָחָשׁ), as denominative) when hissing); coppery, i.e. (figuratively) hard.

H5154.def: or נְחֻשָׁה; feminine of H5153 (נָחוּשׁ); copper.

H5155.def: probably denominative from H2485 (חָלִיל); a flute.

H5156.def: from the same as H5170 (נַחַר); a nostril.

H5157.gloss: to inherit (as a (figurative) mode of descent)
H5157.def: a primitive root; to inherit (as a (figurative) mode of descent), or (generally) to occupy; causatively, to bequeath, or (generally) distribute, instate.
H5157.kjv: divide, have (inheritance), take as a heritage, (cause to, give to, make to) inherit, (distribute for, divide (for, for an, by), give for, have, leave for, take (for)) inheritance, (have in, cause to, be made to) possess(-ion)

H5158.gloss: a stream, especially a winter torrent
H5158.def: or (feminine) נַחְלָה; (Psalm 124:4), or נַחֲלָה; (Ezekiel 47:19; Ezekiel 48:28), from H5157 (נָחַל) in its original sense; a stream, especially a winter torrent; (by implication) a (narrow) valley (in which a brook runs); also a shaft (of a mine).

H5159.def: from H5157 (נָחַל) (in its usual sense); properly, something inherited, i.e. (abstractly) occupancy, or (concretely) an heirloom; generally an estate, patrimony or portion.
H5159.kjv: heritage, to inherit, inheritance, possession. Compare H5158 (נַחַל)

H5160.gloss: Nachaliel, a place in the Desert
H5160.def: from H5158 (נַחַל) and H410 (אֵל); valley of God; Nachaliel, a place in the Desert.

H5161.gloss: a Nechelamite, or descendant of Nechlam
H5161.def: apparently a patronymic from an unused name (apparently passive participle of H2492 (חָלַם)); dreamed; a Nechelamite, or descendant of Nechlam.

H5162.def: a primitive root; properly, to sigh, i.e. breathe strongly; by implication, to be sorry, i.e. (in a favorable sense) to pity, console or (reflexively) rue; or (unfavorably) to avenge (oneself).

H5163.def: from H5162 (נָחַם); consolation; Nacham, an Israelite.

H5166.gloss: Nechemjah, the name of three Israelites
H5166.def: from H5162 (נָחַם) and H3050 (יָהּ); consolation of Jah; Nechemjah, the name of three Israelites.

H5167.def: from H5162 (נָחַם); consolatory; Nachamani, an Israelite.

H5169.def: a primitive root; to be urgent.

H5170.def: and (feminine) נַחֲרָה; from an unused root meaning to snort or snore; a snorting.

H5171.def: or נַחְרַי; from the same as H5170 (נַחַר); snorer; Nacharai or Nachrai, an Israelite.

H5172.gloss: to hiss, i.e. whisper a (magic) spell
H5172.def: a primitive root; properly, to hiss, i.e. whisper a (magic) spell; generally, to prognosticate.
H5172.kjv: certainly, divine, enchanter, (use) enchantment, learn by experience, indeed, diligently observe

H5173.def: from H5172 (נָחַשׁ); an incantation or augury.

H5175.def: from H5172 (נָחַשׁ); a snake (from its hiss).

H5176.gloss: Nachash, the name of two persons apparently non-Israelite
H5176.def: the same as H5175 (נָחָשׁ); Nachash, the name of two persons apparently non-Israelite.

H5177.def: from H5172 (נָחַשׁ); enchanter; Nachshon, an Israelite.

H5178.def: for H5154 (נְחוּשָׁה); copper, hence, something made of that metal, i.e. coin, a fetter; figuratively, base (as compared with gold or silver).
H5178.kjv: brasen, brass, chain, copper, fetter (of brass), filthiness, steel

H5179.def: from H5178 (נְחֹשֶׁת); copper; Nechushta, an Israelitess.

H5180.def: from H5178 (נְחֹשֶׁת); something made of copper, i.e. the copper serpent of the Desert.

H5181.def: a primitive root; to sink, i.e. descend; causatively, to press or lead down.
H5181.kjv: be broken, (cause to) come down, enter, go down, press sore, settle, stick fast

H5182.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H5181 (נָחַת); to descend; causatively, to bring away, deposit, depose.
H5182.kjv: carry, come down, depose, lay up, place

H5183.def: from H5182 (נְחַת); also (intransitively; perhaps from H5117 (נוּחַ)); a descent, i.e. imposition, unfavorable (punishment) or favorable (food); restfulness.
H5183.kjv: lighting down, quiet(-ness), to rest, be set on

H5184.gloss: Nachath, the name of an Edomite and of two Israelites
H5184.def: the same as H5183 (נַחַת); quiet; Nachath, the name of an Edomite and of two Israelites.

H5186.def: a primitive root; to stretch or spread out; by implication, to bend away (including moral deflection); used in a great variety of application.
H5186.kjv: afternoon, apply, bow (down, -ing), carry aside, decline, deliver, extend, go down, be gone, incline, intend, lay, let down, offer, outstretched, overthrown, pervert, pitch, prolong, put away, shew, spread (out), stretch (forth, out), take (aside), turn (aside, away), wrest, cause to yield

H5188.gloss: a pendant for the ears (especially of pearls)
H5188.def: from H5197 (נָטַף); a pendant for the ears (especially of pearls).

H5189.def: from H5203 (נָטַשׁ); a tendril (as an offshoot).

H5190.def: a primitive root; to lift; by implication, to impose.

H5193.def: a primitive root; properly, to strike in, i.e. fix; specifically, to plant (literally or figuratively).

H5194.def: from H5193 (נָטַע); a plant; collectively, a plantation; abstractly, a planting.

H5196.def: plural of H5194 (נֶטַע); Netaim, a place in Palestine.

H5197.def: a primitive root; to ooze, i.e. distil gradually; by implication, to fall in drops; figuratively, to speak by inspiration.

H5198.def: from H5197 (נָטַף); a drop; specifically, an aromatic gum (probably stacte).

H5199.def: from H5197 (נָטַף); distillation; Netophah, a place in Palestine.

H5200.gloss: a Netophathite, or inhabitant of Netophah
H5200.def: patronymic from H5199 (נְטֹפָה); a Netophathite, or inhabitant of Netophah.

H5201.def: a primitive root; to guard; figuratively, to cherish (anger).

H5203.def: a primitive root; properly, to pound, i.e. smite; by implication (as if beating out, and thus expanding) to disperse; also, to thrust off, down, out or upon (inclusively, reject, let alone, permit, remit, etc.).
H5203.kjv: cast off, drawn, let fall, forsake, join (battle), leave (off), lie still, loose, spread (self) abroad, stretch out, suffer

H5204.def: a doubtful word; apparently from H5091 (נָהָה); lamentation.

H5205.def: from H5110 (נוּד); motion (of the lips in speech).

H5206.def: feminine of H5205 (נִיד); removal, i.e. exile.

H5207.def: or נִיחֹחַ; from H5117 (נוּחַ); properly, restful, i.e. pleasant; abstractly, delight.

H5208.def: (Aramaic) or נִיחֹחַ; (shorter) (Aramaic), corresponding to H5207 (נִיחוֹחַ); pleasure.

H5210.def: of foreign origin; Nineveh, the capital of Assyria.

H5212.gloss: Nisan, the first month of the Jewish sacred year
H5212.def: probably of foreign origin; Nisan, the first month of the Jewish sacred year.

H5214.def: a root probably identical with that of H5216 (נִיר), through the idea of the gleam of a fresh furrow; to till the soil.

H5215.def: or נִר; from H5214 (נִיר); properly, plowing, i.e. (concretely) freshly plowed land.

H5216.gloss: a lamp (i.e. the burner) or light (literally or figurativ
H5216.def: or נִר; also נֵיר; or נֵר; or (feminine) נֵרָה; from a primitive root (see H5214 (נִיר); H5135 (נוּר)) properly, meaning to glisten; a lamp (i.e. the burner) or light (literally or figuratively).

H5217.def: a primitive root; to smite, i.e. drive away.

H5218.def: or נָכָא; from H5217 (נָכָא); smitten, i.e. (figuratively) afflicted.

H5219.def: from H5218 (נָכֵא); properly, a smiting, i.e. (concretely) an aromatic gum (perhaps styrax) (as powdered).

H5220.def: from an unused root meaning to propagate; offspring.

H5221.gloss: to strike (lightly or severely, literally or figuratively)
H5221.def: a primitive root; to strike (lightly or severely, literally or figuratively).
H5221.kjv: beat, cast forth, clap, give (wounds), go forward, indeed, kill, make (slaughter), murderer, punish, slaughter, slay(-er, -ing), smite(-r, -ing), strike, be stricken, (give) stripes, surely, wound

H5222.def: from H5221 (נָכָה); a smiter, i.e. (figuratively) traducer.

H5224.def: probably of Egyptian origin; Neko, an Egyptian king.

H5225.def: from H3559 (כּוּן); prepared; Nakon, probably an Israelite.

H5226.def: from an unused root meaning to be straightforward; properly, the fore part; used adverbially, opposite.

H5227.def: from the same as H5226 (נֵכַח); properly, the front part; used adverbially (especially with preposition), opposite, in front of, forward, in behalf of.

H5228.def: from the same as H5226 (נֵכַח); straightforward, i.e. (figuratively), equitable, correct, or (abstractly), integrity.

H5229.def: feminine of H5228 (נָכֹחַ); properly, straightforwardness, i.e. (figuratively) integrity, or (concretely) a truth.

H5230.def: a primitive root; to defraud, i.e. act treacherously.

H5233.def: from an unused root meaning to accumulate; treasure.

H5234.gloss: to scrutinize, i.e. look intently at
H5234.def: a primitive root; properly, to scrutinize, i.e. look intently at; hence (with recognition implied), to acknowledge, be acquainted with, care for, respect, revere, or (with suspicion implied), to disregard, ignore, be strange toward, reject, resign, dissimulate (as if ignorant or disowning).
H5234.kjv: acknowledge, could, deliver, discern, dissemble, estrange, feign self to be another, know, take knowledge (notice), perceive, regard, (have) respect, behave (make) self strange(-ly)

H5235.def: or נֹכֶר; from H5234 (נָכַר); something strange, i.e. unexpected calamity.

H5236.def: ' from H5234 (נָכַר); foreign, or (concretely) a foreigner, or (abstractly) heathendom.

H5237.def: from H5235 (נֶכֶר) (second form); strange, in a variety of degrees and applications (foreign, non-relative, adulterous, different, wonderful).

H5238.def: probably for H5219 (נְכֹאת); spicery, i.e. (generally) valuables.

H5239.def: apparently a primitive root; to complete.

H5241.gloss: Nemuel, the name of two Israelites
H5241.def: apparently for H3223 (יְמוּאֵל); Nemuel, the name of two Israelites.

H5242.gloss: a Nemuelite, or descendant of Nemuel
H5242.def: from H5241 (נְמוּאֵל); a Nemuelite, or descendant of Nemuel.

H5243.def: a primitive root; to become clipped or (specifically) circumcised.

H5244.gloss: an ant (probably from its almost bisected form)
H5244.def: feminine from H5243 (נָמַל); an ant (probably from its almost bisected form).

H5245.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H5246 (נָמֵר); a leopard (from its stripes).

H5246.def: from an unused root meaning properly, to filtrate, i.e. be limpid (comp H5247 (נִמְרָה) and H5249 (נִמְרִים)); and thus to spot or stain as if by dripping; a leopard (from its stripes).

H5247.gloss: Nimrah, a place East of the Jordan
H5247.def: from the same as H5246 (נָמֵר); clear water; Nimrah, a place East of the Jordan.
H5247.kjv: Nimrah. See also H1039 (בֵּית נִמְרָה), H5249 (נִמְרִים)

H5248.def: or נִמְרֹד; probably of foreign origin; Nimrod, a son of Cush.

H5249.gloss: Nimrim, a place East of the Jordan
H5249.def: plural of a masculine corresponding to H5247 (נִמְרָה); clear waters; Nimrim, a place East of the Jordan.

H5250.def: probably from H4871 (מָשָׁה); extricated; Nimshi, the (grand-) father of Jehu.

H5251.def: from H5264 (נָסַס); a flag; also a sail; by implication, a flagstaff; generally a signal; figuratively, a token.

H5252.gloss: an environment, i.e. circumstance or turn of affairs
H5252.def: feminine participle passive of H5437 (סָבַב); properly, an environment, i.e. circumstance or turn of affairs.

H5253.kjv: departing away, remove, take (hold), turn away

H5254.def: a primitive root; to test; by implication, to attempt.

H5255.def: a primitive root; to tear away.

H5256.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H5255 (נָסַח); to tear away.

H5257.gloss: something poured out, i.e. a libation
