H5257.def: from H5258 (נָסַךְ); properly, something poured out, i.e. a libation; also a molten image; by implication, a prince (as anointed).

H5258.gloss: to pour out, especially a libation, or to cast (metal)
H5258.def: a primitive root; to pour out, especially a libation, or to cast (metal); by analogy, to anoint aking.
H5258.kjv: cover, melt, offer, (cause to) pour (out), set (up)

H5259.def: a primitive root (probably identical with H5258 (נָסַךְ) through the idea of fusion); to interweave, i.e. (figuratively) to overspread.

H5260.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H5258 (נָסַךְ); to pour out a libation.

H5262.def: or נֵסֶךְ; from H5258 (נָסַךְ); a libation; also a cast idol.

H5263.def: a primitive root; to wane, i.e. be sick.

H5264.def: a primitive root; to gleam from afar, i.e. to be conspicuous as a signal; or rather perhaps a denominative from H5251 (נֵס) (and identical with H5263 (נָסַס), through the idea of a flag as fluttering in the wind); to raise a beacon.

H5265.gloss: to pull up, especially the tent-pins, i.e. start on ajourney
H5265.def: a primitive root; properly, to pull up, especially the tent-pins, i.e. start on ajourney.
H5265.kjv: cause to blow, bring, get, (make to) go (away, forth, forward, onward, out), (take) journey, march, remove, set aside (forward), still, be on his (go their) way

H5266.def: a primitive root; to go up.

H5267.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H5266 (נָסַק); to go up.

H5268.def: of foreign origin; Nisrok, a Babylonian idol.

H5269.def: from H5128 (נוּעַ); motion; Neah, a place in Palestine.

H5270.def: from H5128 (נוּעַ); movement; Noah, an Israelitess.

H5271.gloss: (only in plural collectively or emphatic form) youth
H5271.def: or נָעֻר; and (feminine) נְעֻרָה; properly, passive participle from H5288 (נַעַר) as denominative; (only in plural collectively or emphatic form) youth, the state (juvenility) or the persons (young people).

H5272.def: from H5128 (נוּעַ) and H410 (אֵל); moved of God; Neiel, a place in Palestine.

H5273.gloss: delightful (objective or subjective, literal or figurative)
H5273.def: from H5276 (נָעֵם); delightful (objective or subjective, literal or figurative).

H5274.gloss: to fasten up, i.e. with abar or cord
H5274.def: a primitive root; also denominative from H5275 (נַעַל); properly, to fasten up, i.e. with abar or cord; hence, to sandal, i.e. furnish with slippers.
H5274.kjv: bolt, inclose, lock, shoe, shut up

H5275.def: or (feminine) נַעֲלָה; from H5274 (נָעַל); properly, a sandal tongue; by extension a sandal or slipper (sometimes as a symbol of occupancy, a refusal to marry, or of something valueless).

H5276.def: a primitive root; to be agreeable (literally or figuratively).
H5276.kjv: pass in beauty, be delight, be pleasant, be sweet

H5277.def: from H5276 (נָעֵם); pleasure; Naam, an Israelite.

H5278.gloss: agreeableness, i.e. delight, suitableness, splendor or grace
H5278.def: from H5276 (נָעֵם); agreeableness, i.e. delight, suitableness, splendor or grace.

H5279.def: feminine of H5277 (נַעַם); pleasantness; Naamah, the name of an antediluvian woman, of an Ammonitess, and of a place in Palestine.

H5280.gloss: a Naamanite, or descendant of Naaman (collectively)
H5280.def: patronymic from H5283 (נַעֲמָן); a Naamanite, or descendant of Naaman (collectively).

H5281.def: from H5278 (נֹעַם); pleasant; Noomi, an Israelitess.

H5283.gloss: Naaman, the name of an Israelite and of a Damascene
H5283.def: the same as H5282 (נַעֲמָן); Naaman, the name of an Israelite and of a Damascene.

H5284.gloss: a Naamathite, or inhabitant of Naamah
H5284.def: patrial from a place corresponding in name (but not identical) with H5279 (נַעֲמָה); a Naamathite, or inhabitant of Naamah.

H5285.def: from an unused root meaning to prick; probably a brier; by implication, a thicket of thorny bushes.

H5287.def: a primitive root (probably identical with H5286 (נָעַר), through the idea of the rustling of mane, which usually accompanies the lion's roar); to tumble about.
H5287.kjv: shake (off, out, self), overthrow, toss up and down

H5288.def: from H5287 (נָעַר); (concretely) a boy (as active), from the age of infancy to adolescence; by implication, a servant; also (by interch. of sex), a girl (of similar latitude in age).
H5288.kjv: babe, boy, child, damsel (from the margin), lad, servant, young (man)

H5289.def: from H5287 (נָעַר) in its derivative sense of tossing about; a wanderer.

H5291.def: feminine of H5288 (נַעַר); a girl (from infancy to adolescence).

H5292.def: the same as H5291 (נַעֲרָה); Naarah, the name of an Israelitess, and of a place in Palestine.

H5293.def: from H5288 (נַעַר); youthful; Naarai, an Israelite.

H5294.gloss: Nearjah, the name of two Israelites
H5294.def: from H5288 (נַעַר) and H3050 (יָהּ); servant of Jah; Nearjah, the name of two Israelites.

H5295.def: from H5288 (נַעַר); juvenile; Naaran, a place in Palestine.

H5296.gloss: something shaken out, i.e. tow (as the refuse of flax)
H5296.def: from H5287 (נָעַר); something shaken out, i.e. tow (as the refuse of flax).

H5297.gloss: Noph, the capital of Upper Egypt
H5297.def: a variation of H4644 (מֹף); Noph, the capital of Upper Egypt.

H5298.gloss: Nepheg, the name of two Israelites
H5298.def: from an unused root probably meaning to spring forth; a sprout; Nepheg, the name of two Israelites.

H5299.def: from H5130 (נוּף) in the sense of lifting; a height; also a sieve.

H5301.def: a primitive root; to puff, in various applications (literally, to inflate, blow hard, scatter, kindle, expire; figuratively, to disesteem).
H5301.kjv: blow, breath, give up, cause to lose (life), seething, snuff

H5302.def: from H5301 (נָפַח); a gust; Nophach, a place in Moab.

H5303.gloss: a feller, i.e. a bully or tyrant
H5303.def: or נְפִל; from H5307 (נָפַל); properly, a feller, i.e. a bully or tyrant.

H5304.def: plural from an unused root meaning to scatter; expansions; Nephisim, a Temple-servant.

H5305.gloss: Naphish, a son of Ishmael, and his posterity
H5305.def: from H5314 (נָפַשׁ); refreshed; Naphish, a son of Ishmael, and his posterity.

H5306.def: from an unused root meaning to glisten; shining; a gem, probably the garnet.

H5307.def: a primitive root; to fall, in a great variety of applications (intransitive or causative, literal or figurative).
H5307.kjv: be accepted, cast (down, self, (lots), out), cease, die, divide (by lot), (let) fail, (cause to, let, make, ready to) fall (away, down, -en, -ing), fell(-ing), fugitive, have (inheritance), inferior, be judged (by mistake for H6419 (פָּלַל)), lay (along), (cause to) lie down, light (down), be (hast) lost, lying, overthrow, overwhelm, perish, present(-ed, -ing), (make to) rot, slay, smite out, surely, throw down

H5308.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H5307 (נָפַל); to fall, in a great variety of applications (intransitive or causative, literal or figurative).

H5309.def: or נֵפֶל; from H5307 (נָפַל); something fallen, i.e. an abortion.

H5310.gloss: to dash to pieces, or scatter
H5310.def: a primitive root; to dash to pieces, or scatter.
H5310.kjv: be beaten in sunder, break (in pieces), broken, dash (in pieces), cause to be discharged, dispersed, be overspread, scatter

H5312.def: (Aramaic) a primitive root; to issue; causatively, to bring out.

H5313.def: (Aramaic) from H5312 (נְפַק); an outgo, i.e. expense.

H5314.def: a primitive root; to breathe; passively, to be breathed upon , i.e. (figuratively) refreshed (as if by a current of air).

H5315.def: from H5314; properly, a breathing creature, i.e., animal or (abstractly) vitality.

H5317.gloss: a dripping i.e. of honey (from the comb)
H5317.def: from H5130 (נוּף) in the sense of shaking to pieces; a dripping i.e. of honey (from the comb).

H5318.def: from H6605 (פָּתַח); opened, i.e. a spring; Nephtoach, a place in Palestine.

H5319.def: from H6617 (פָּתַל); properly, wrestled; but used (in the plural) transitively, a struggle.

H5320.def: plural of foreign origin,; Naphtuchim, an Egyptian tribe.

H5321.def: from H6617 (פָּתַל); my wrestling; Naphtali, a son of Jacob, with the tribe descended from him, and its territory.

H5322.def: from H5340 (נָצַץ); a flower (from its brilliancy); also a hawk (from it flashing speed).

H5323.def: a primitive root; to go away.

H5324.def: a primitive root; to station, in various applications (literally or figuratively).
H5324.kjv: appointed, deputy, erect, establish, Huzzah (by mistake for a proper name), lay, officer, pillar, present, rear up, set (over, up), settle, sharpen, establish, (make to) stand(-ing, still, up, upright), best state

H5325.def: passive participle of H5324 (נָצַב); fixed, i.e. a handle.

H5326.def: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to H5324 (נָצַב); fixedness, i.e. firmness.

H5327.def: a primitive root; properly, to go forth, i.e. (by implication) to be expelled, and (consequently) desolate; causatively, to lay waste; also (specifically), to quarrel.

H5329.def: a primitive root;  also as denominative from H5331 (נֶצַח); properly, to glitter from afar, i.e. to be eminent (as a superintendent, especially of the Temple services and its music); to be permanent.
H5329.kjv: excel, chief musician (singer), oversee(-r), set forward

H5330.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H5329 (נָצַח); to become chief.

H5331.def: or נֵצַח; from H5329 (נָצַח); properly, a goal, i.e. the bright object at adistance travelled towards; hence (figuratively), splendor, or (subjectively) truthfulness, or (objectively) confidence; but usually (adverbially), continually (i.e. to the most distant point of view).
H5331.kjv: alway(-s), constantly, end, (n-) ever(more), perpetual, strength, victory

H5332.gloss: juice of the grape (as blood red)
H5332.def: probably identical with H5331 (נֶצַח), through the idea of brilliancy of color; juice of the grape (as blood red).

H5333.def: or נְצִב; from H5324 (נָצַב); something stationary, i.e. a prefect, a military post, a statue.

H5334.def: the same as H5333 (נְצִיב); station; Netsib, a place in Palestine.

H5335.def: from H5329 (נָצַח); conspicuous; Netsiach, a Temple-servant.

H5336.def: from H5341 (נָצַר); properly, conservative; but used passively, delivered.

H5337.gloss: to snatch away, whether in a good or a bad sense
H5337.def: a primitive root; to snatch away, whether in a good or a bad sense.
H5337.kjv: at all, defend, deliver (self), escape, without fail, part, pluck, preserve, recover, rescue, rid, save, spoil, strip, surely, take (out)

H5340.def: a primitive root; to glare, i.e. be bright-colored.

H5341.def: a primitive root; to guard, in a good sense (to protect, maintain, obey, etc.) or a bad one (to conceal, etc.).
H5341.kjv: besieged, hidden thing, keep(-er, -ing), monument, observe, preserve(-r), subtil, watcher(-man)

H5342.def: from H5341 (נָצַר) in the sense of greenness as a striking color; a shoot; figuratively, a descendant.

H5343.def: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to H5352 (נָקָה); clean.

H5344.def: a primitive root; to puncture, literally (to perforate, with more or less violence) or figuratively (to specify, designate, libel).
H5344.kjv: appoint, blaspheme, bore, curse, express, with holes, name, pierce, strike through

H5346.def: the same as H5345 (נֶקֶב); dell; Nekeb, a place in Palestine.

H5347.def: from H5344 (נָקַב); female (from the sexual form).

H5348.def: from an unused root meaning to mark (by puncturing or branding); spotted.

H5349.def: active participle from the same as H5348 (נָקֹד); a spotter (of sheep or cattle), i.e. the owner or tender (who thus marks them).

H5350.def: from the same as H5348 (נָקֹד); a crumb (as broken to spots); also a biscuit (as pricked).

H5352.gloss: to be (or make) clean (literally or figuratively)
H5352.def: a primitive root; to be (or make) clean (literally or figuratively); by implication (in an adverse sense) to be bare, i.e. extirpated.
H5352.kjv: acquit at all, altogether, be blameless, cleanse, (be) clear(-ing), cut off, be desolate, be free, be (hold) guiltless, be (hold) innocent, by no means, be quit, be (leave) unpunished, utterly, wholly

H5353.def: feminine of H5348 (נָקֹד) (in the figurative sense of marked); distinction; Nekoda, a Temple-servant.

H5355.def: or נָקִיא; (Joel 4:19; Jonah [1:14), from H5352 (נָקָה); innocent.
H5355.kjv: blameless, clean, clear, exempted, free, guiltless, innocent, quit

H5356.def: or נִקָּיֹן; from H5352 (נָקָה); clearness (literally or figuratively).

H5357.def: from an unused root meaning to bore; a cleft.

H5358.gloss: to grudge, i.e. avenge or punish
H5358.def: a primitive root; to grudge, i.e. avenge or punish.
H5358.kjv: avenge(-r, self), punish, revenge (self), surely, take vengeance

H5360.gloss: avengement, whether the act of the passion
H5360.def: feminine of H5359 (נָקָם); avengement, whether the act of the passion.

H5361.def: a primitive root; to feel aversion.

H5362.gloss: to strike with more or less violence (beat, fell, corrode)
H5362.def: a primitive root; to strike with more or less violence (beat, fell, corrode); by implication (of attack) to knock together, i.e. surround or circulate.
H5362.kjv: compass (about, -ing), cut down, destroy, go round (about), inclose, round

H5364.def: from H5362 (נָקַף); probably a rope (as encircling).

H5365.def: a primitive root; to bore (penetrate, quarry).
H5365.kjv: dig, pick out, pierce, put (thrust) out

H5366.def: from H5365 (נָקַר), a fissure; to bore (penetrate, quarry).

H5367.gloss: to entrap (with a noose), literally or figuratively
H5367.def: a primitive root; to entrap (with a noose), literally or figuratively.

H5368.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H5367 (נָקַשׁ); used in the sense of H5362 (נָקַף); to knock.

H5369.def: the same as H5216 (נִיר); lamp; Ner, an Israelite.

H5370.def: of foreign origin; Nergal, a Cuthite deity.

H5371.gloss: Nergal-Sharetser, the name of two Babylonians
H5371.def: from H5370 (נֵרְגַּל) and H8272 (שַׁרְאֶצֶר); Nergal-Sharetser, the name of two Babylonians.

H5372.def: from an unused root meaning to roll to pieces; a slanderer.

H5373.def: of foreign origin; nard, an aromatic.

H5374.def: or נֵרִיָּהוּ; from H5216 (נִיר) and H3050 (יָהּ); light of Jah; Nerijah, an Israelite.

H5375.def: or נָסָה; (Psalm 4:6 (H7 (אֲבַד))), a primitive root; to lift, in a great variety of applications, literal and figurative, absolute and relative.
H5375.kjv: accept, advance, arise, (able to, (armor), suffer to) bear(-er, up), bring (forth), burn, carry (away), cast, contain, desire, ease, exact, exalt (self), extol, fetch, forgive, furnish, further, give, go on, help, high, hold up, honorable (man), lade, lay, lift (self) up, lofty, marry, magnify, needs, obtain, pardon, raise (up), receive, regard, respect, set (up), spare, stir up, swear, take (away, up), utterly, wear, yield

H5377.def: a primitive root; to lead astray, i.e. (mentally) to delude, or (morally) to seduce.

H5378.def: a primitive root (perhaps identical with H5377 (נָשָׁא), through the idea of imposition); to lend on interest; by implication, to dun fordebt.

H5379.def: passive participle feminine of H5375 (נָשָׂא); something taken, i.e. a present.

H5380.def: a primitive root; to blow; by implication, to disperse.

H5381.def: a primitive root; to reach (literally or figuratively).
H5381.kjv: ability, be able, attain (unto), (be able to, can) get, lay at, put, reach, remove, wax rich, surely, (over-) take (hold of, on, upon)

H5382.def: a primitive root; to forget; figuratively, to neglect; causatively, to remit, remove.

H5383.gloss: to lend or (by reciprocity) borrow on security or interest
H5383.def: a primitive root (rather identical with H5382 (נָשָׁה), in the sense of H5378 (נָשָׁא)); to lend or (by reciprocity) borrow on security or interest.
H5383.kjv: creditor, exact, extortioner, lend, usurer, lend on (taker on) usury

H5384.gloss: rheumatic or crippled (from the incident to Jacob)
H5384.def: from H5382 (נָשָׁה), in the sense of failure; rheumatic or crippled (from the incident to Jacob).

H5385.def: or rather, נְשֻׂאָה; feminine. passive participle of H5375 (נָשָׂא); something borne, i.e. a load.

H5387.gloss: an exalted one, i.e. a king or sheik
H5387.def: or נָשִׂא; from H5375 (נָשָׂא); properly, an exalted one, i.e. a king or sheik; also a rising mist.
H5387.kjv: captain, chief, cloud, governor, prince, ruler, vapour

H5389.def: (Aramaic) irregular plural feminine of H606 (אֱנָשׁ); a man.

H5391.gloss: to strike with a sting (as a serpent)
H5391.def: a primitive root; to strike with a sting (as a serpent); figuratively, to oppress with interest on a loan.

H5392.def: from H5391 (נָשַׁךְ); interest on a debt.

H5394.gloss: to pluck off, i.e. divest, eject or drop
H5394.def: a primitive root; to pluck off, i.e. divest, eject or drop.
H5394.kjv: cast (out), drive, loose, put off (out), slip

H5395.def: a primitive root; properly, to blow away, i.e. destroy.

H5397.def: from H5395 (נָשַׁם); a puff, i.e. wind, angry or vital breath, divine inspiration, intellect. or (concretely) an animal.

H5398.gloss: to breeze, i.e. blow up fresh (as the wind)
H5398.def: a primitive root; to breeze, i.e. blow up fresh (as the wind).

H5399.def: from H5398 (נָשַׁף); properly, a breeze, i.e. (by implication) dusk (when the evening breeze prevails).
H5399.kjv: dark, dawning of the day (morning), night, twilight

H5400.def: a primitive root; to catch fire.

H5401.def: a primitive root (identical with H5400 (נָשַׂק), through the idea of fastening up; compare H2388 (חָזַק), H2836 (חָשַׁק)); to kiss, literally or figuratively (touch); also (as a mode of attachment), to equip with weapons.

H5402.def: or נֵשֶׁק; from H5401 (נָשַׁק); military equipment, i.e. (collectively) arms (offensive or defensive), or (concretely) an arsenal.
H5402.kjv: armed men, armour(-y), battle, harness, weapon

H5404.gloss: the eagle (or other large bird of prey)
H5404.def: from an unused root meaning to lacerate; the eagle (or other large bird of prey).

H5405.gloss: to eliminate, i.e. (intransitively) to dry up
H5405.def: a primitive root; properly, to eliminate, i.e. (intransitively) to dry up.

H5454.def: or סַבְתָּה; probably of foreign derivation; Sabta or Sabtah, the name of a son of Cush, and the country occupied by his posterity.

H5566.def: or סֵמֶל; from an unused root meaning to resemble; a likeness.

H5568.gloss: to be erect, i.e. bristle as hair

H5570.def: from an unused root meaning to prick; thorny; Senaah, a place in Palestine.

H5571.def: of foreign origin; Sanballat, a Persian satrap of Samaria.

H5580.def: from the same as H5483 (סוּס); a moth (from the agility of the fly).

H5587.def: or שָׂעִף; from H5586 (סָעַף); divided (in mind), i.e. (abstractly) a sentiment.

H5588.def: from H5586 (סָעַף); divided (in mind), i.e. (concretely) a skeptic.

H5597.def: from H5596 (סָפַח); the mange (as making the hair fall off).

H5601.def: from H5608 (סָפַר); a gem (perhaps used for scratching other substances), probably the sapphire.

H5605.def: a primitive root; properly, to snatch away, i.e. terminate; but used only as denominative from H5592 (סַף) (in the sense of a vestibule),; to wait at the threshold.

H5606.gloss: to clap the hands (in token of compact
H5606.def: or שָׂפַק; (1 Kings 20:10; Job 27:23; Isaiah 2:6), a primitive root; to clap the hands (in token of compact, derision, grief, indignation, or punishment); by implication of satisfaction, to be enough; by implication of excess, to vomit.

H5607.def: or שֶׂפֶק; (Job 20:22; Job 36:18), from H5606 (סָפַק); chastisement; also satiety.

H5608.gloss: to score with a mark as a tally or record
H5608.def: a primitive root; properly, to score with a mark as a tally or record, i.e. (by implication) to inscribe, and also to enumerate; intensively, to recount, i.e. celebrate.
H5608.kjv: commune, (ac-) count; declare, number, penknife, reckon, scribe, shew forth, speak, talk, tell (out), writer

H5609.def: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to H5608 (סָפַר); a book.

H5611.def: the same as H5610 (סְפָר); Sephar, a place in Arabia.

H5612.def: or (feminine) סִפְרָה; (Psalm 56:8 (H9 (אֲבֵדָה))), from H5608 (סָפַר); properly, writing (the art or a document); by implication, a book.
H5612.kjv: bill, book, evidence, learn(-ed) (-ing), letter, register, scroll

H5613.def: (Aramaic) from the same as H5609 (סְפַר); a scribe (secular or sacred).

H5614.def: of foreign derivation; Sepharad, a region of Assyria.

H5616.gloss: a Sepharvite or inhabitant of Sepharvain
H5616.def: patrial from H5617 (סְפַרְוַיִם); a Sepharvite or inhabitant of Sepharvain.

H5618.def: feminine active participle of H5608 (סָפַר); a scribe (properly, female); Sophereth, a temple servant.

H5619.def: a primitive root; properly, to be weighty; but used only in the sense of lapidation or its contrary (as if a delapidation).

H5621.def: from an unused root meaning to sting; a thistle.

H5623.def: of foreign derivation; Sargon, an Assyrian king.

H5624.def: from a primitive root meaning to tremble; trembling; Sered, an Israelite.

H5625.gloss: a Seredite (collectively) or descendants of Sered
H5625.def: patron from H5624 (סֶרֶד); a Seredite (collectively) or descendants of Sered.

H5626.def: from H5493 (סוּר); departure; Sirah, a cistern so-called.

H5627.def: from H5493 (סוּר); apostasy, crime; figuratively, remission.
H5627.kjv: continual, rebellion, revolt(-ed), turn away, wrong

H5628.def: a primitive root; to extend (even to excess).
H5628.kjv: exceeding, hand, spread, stretch self, banish

H5630.def: for H8302 (שִׁרְיוֹן); a coat of mail.

H5631.def: or סָרִס; from an unused root meaning to castrate; a eunuch; by implication, valet (especially of the female apartments), and thus, a minister of state.

H5633.def: from an unused root of uncertain meaning; an axle; figuratively, a peer.

H5635.def: a primitive root; to cremate, i.e. to be (near) of kin (such being privileged to kindle the pyre).

H5636.gloss: a nettle (as stinging like a burn)
H5636.def: from H5635 (סָרַף); a nettle (as stinging like a burn).

H5637.gloss: to turn away, i.e. (morally) be refractory
H5637.def: a primitive root; to turn away, i.e. (morally) be refractory.
H5637.kjv: away, backsliding, rebellious, revolter(-ing), slide back, stubborn, withdrew

H5638.def: from an unused root meaning to hide; winter (as the dark season).

H5639.def: from H5641 (סָתַר); hidden; Sethur, an Israelite.

H5640.def: or שָׂתַם; (Numbers 24:15), a primitive root; to stop up; by implication, to repair; figuratively, to keep secret.
H5640.kjv: closed up, hidden, secret, shut out (up), stop

H5641.gloss: to hide (by covering), literally or figuratively
H5641.def: a primitive root; to hide (by covering), literally or figuratively.
H5641.kjv: be absent, keep close, conceal, hide (self), (keep) secret, surely

H5642.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H5641 (סָתַר); to conceal; figuratively, to demolish.

H5643.gloss: a cover (in a good or a bad
H5643.def: or (feminine) סִתְרָה; (Deuteronomy [32:38), from H5641 (סָתַר); a cover (in a good or a bad, a literal or a figurative sense).
H5643.kjv: backbiting, covering, covert, disguise(-th), hiding place, privily, protection, secret(-ly, place)

H5644.def: from H5643 (סֵתֶר); protective; Sithri, an Israelite,.

H5645.gloss: an envelope, i.e. darkness (or density, 2 Chronicles 4:17)
H5645.def: (masculine and feminine); from H5743 (עוּב); properly, an envelope, i.e. darkness (or density, 2 Chronicles 4:17); specifically, a (scud) cloud; also a copse.
H5645.kjv: clay, (thick) cloud, thick, thicket. Compare H5672 (עֲבִי)

H5646.def: or עֹב; from an unused root meaning to cover; properly, equivalent to H5645 (עָב); but used only as an architectural term,; an architrave (as shading the pillars).

H5647.def: a primitive root; to work (in any sense); by implication, to serve, till, (causatively) enslave, etc..
H5647.kjv: be, keep in bondage, be bondmen, bond-service, compel, do, dress, ear, execute, husbandman, keep, labour(-ing man, bring to pass, (cause to, make to) serve(-ing, self), (be, become) servant(-s), do (use) service, till(-er), transgress (from margin), (set a) work, be wrought, worshipper,

H5648.gloss: to do, make, prepare, keep, etc
H5648.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H5647 (עָבַד); to do, make, prepare, keep, etc..
H5648.kjv: cut, do, execute, go on, make, move, work

H5651.gloss: Ebed, the name of two Israelites
H5651.def: the same as H5650 (עֶבֶד); Ebed, the name of two Israelites.

H5653.gloss: Abda, the name of two Israelites
H5653.def: from H5647 (עָבַד); work; Abda, the name of two Israelites.

H5654.gloss: Obed-Edom, the name of five Israelites
H5654.def: from the active participle of H5647 (עָבַד) and H123 (אֱדֹם); worker of Edom; Obed-Edom, the name of five Israelites.

H5655.def: from H5647 (עָבַד) and H410 (אֵל); serving God; Abdeel, an Israelite.

H5656.def: or עֲבוֹדָה; from H5647 (עָבַד); work of any kind.
H5656.kjv: act, bondage, bondservant, effect, labour, ministering(-try), office, service(-ile, -itude), tillage, use, work, wrought

H5657.def: passive participle of H5647 (עָבַד); something wrought, i.e. (concretely) service.

H5658.def: from H5647 (עָבַד); servitude; Abdon, the name of a place in Palestine and of four Israelites.

H5660.gloss: Abdi, the name of two Israelites
H5660.def: from H5647 (עָבַד); serviceable; Abdi, the name of two Israelites.

H5661.def: from H5650 (עֶבֶד) and H410 (אֵל); servant of God; Abdiel, an Israelite.

H5662.gloss: Obadjah, the name of thirteen Israelites
H5662.def: or עֹבַדְיָהוּ; active participle of H5647 (עָבַד) and H3050 (יָהּ); serving Jah; Obadjah, the name of thirteen Israelites.

H5663.def: from H5650 (עֶבֶד) and H4428 (מֶלֶךְ); servant of a king; Ebed-Melek, a eunuch of Zedekeah.

H5664.gloss: Abed-Nego, the Babylonian name of one of Daniel's companions
H5664.def: the same as H5665 (עֲבֵד נְגוֹא); Abed-Nego, the Babylonian name of one of Daniel's companions.

H5665.def: (Aramaic) of foreign origin; Abed-Nego, the name of Azariah.

H5666.def: a primitive root; to be dense.

H5667.def: or עֲבֹט; from H5670 (עָבַט); a pawn.

H5668.def: or עָבֻר; passive participle of H5674 (עָבַר); properly, crossed, i.e. (abstractly) transit; used only adverbially, on account of, in order that.
H5668.kjv: because of, for (...'s sake), (intent) that, to

H5669.def: the same as H5668 (עָבוּר); passed, i.e. kept over; used only of stored grain.

H5670.def: a primitive root; to pawn; causatively, to lend (on security); figuratively, to entangle.
H5670.kjv: borrow, break (ranks), fetch (a pledge), lend, surely

H5671.def: from H5670 (עָבַט); something pledged, i.e. (collectively) pawned goods.

H5672.def: or עֳבִי]; from H5666 (עָבָה); density, i.e. depth or width.

H5674.def: a primitive root; to cross over; used very widely of any transition (literal or figurative; transitive, intransitive, intensive, causative); specifically, to cover (in copulation).
H5674.kjv: alienate, alter, at all, beyond, bring (over, through), carry over, (over-) come (on, over), conduct (over), convey over, current, deliver, do away, enter, escape, fail, gender, get over, (make) go (away, beyond, by, forth, his way, in, on, over, through), have away (more), lay, meddle, overrun, make partition, (cause to, give, make to, over) pass(-age, along, away, beyond, by, -enger, on, out, over, through), (cause to, make) proclaim(-amation), perish, provoke to anger, put away, rage, raiser of taxes, remove, send over, set apart, shave, cause to (make) sound, speedily, sweet smelling, take (away), (make to) transgress(-or), translate, turn away, (way-) faring man, be wrath

H5675.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H5676 (עֵבֶר); properly, a region across; but used only adverbially (with or without a preposition) on the opposite side (especially of the Jordan; ususally meaning the east).

H5676.def: from H5674 (עָבַר); properly, a region across; but used only adverbially (with or without a preposition) on the opposite side (especially of the Jordan; ususally meaning the east).
H5676.kjv: against, beyond, by, from, over, passage, quarter, (other, this) side, straight

H5677.gloss: Eber, the name of two patriarchs and four Israelites
H5677.def: the same as H5676 (עֵבֶר); Eber, the name of two patriarchs and four Israelites.

H5678.def: feminine of H5676 (עֵבֶר); an outburst of passion.

H5680.gloss: an Eberite (i.e. Hebrew) or descendant of Eber
H5680.def: patronymic from H5677 (עֵבֵר); an Eberite (i.e. Hebrew) or descendant of Eber.

H5681.def: the same as H5680 (עִבְרִי); Ibri, an Israelite.

H5682.def: plural of H5676 (עֵבֶר); regions beyond; Abarim, a place in Palestine.

H5683.def: from H5676 (עֵבֶר); transitional; Ebron, a place in Palestine.
H5683.kjv: Hebron. Perhaps a clerical error for H5658 (עַבְדוֹן)

H5684.def: feminine of H5683 (עֶבְרֹן); Ebronah, place in the Desert.

H5685.def: a primitive root; to dry up.

H5686.def: a primitive root; to interlace, i.e. (figuratively) to pervert.

H5687.def: or עָבוֹת; from H5686 (עָבַת); intwined, i.e. dense.

H5688.gloss: something intwined, i.e. a string, wreath or foliage
H5688.def: or עֲבוֹת; or (feminine) עֲבֹתָה; the same as H5687 (עָבֹת); something intwined, i.e. a string, wreath or foliage.
H5688.kjv: band, cord, rope, thick bough (branch), wreathen (chain)

H5689.gloss: to breathe after, i.e. to love (sensually)
H5689.def: a primitive root; to breathe after, i.e. to love (sensually).

H5690.def: from H5689 (עֲגַב); love (concretely), i.e. amative words.

H5693.def: passive part (but with active sense) of an unused root meaning to twitter; probably the swallow.

H5694.gloss: something round, i.e. a ring (for the ears)
H5694.def: from the same as H5696 (עָגֹל); something round, i.e. a ring (for the ears).

H5695.def: from the same as H5696 (עָגֹל); a (male) calf (as frisking round), especially one nearly grown (i.e. a steer).

H5696.def: or עָגוֹל; from an unused root meaning to revolve,; circular.

H5697.gloss: a (female) calf, especially one nearly grown (i.e. a heifer)
H5697.def: feminine of H5695 (עֵגֶל); a (female) calf, especially one nearly grown (i.e. a heifer).

H5698.def: the same as H5697 (עֶגְלָה); Eglah, a wife of David.

H5699.gloss: something revolving, i.e. a wheeled vehicle
H5699.def: from the same as H5696 (עָגֹל); something revolving, i.e. a wheeled vehicle.

H5700.def: from H5695 (עֵגֶל); vituline; Eglon, the name of a place in Palestine and of a Moabitish king.

H5701.def: a primitive root; to be sad.

H5702.def: a primitive root; to debar, i.e. from marriage.

H5703.def: from H5710 (עָדָה); properly, a (peremptory) terminus, i.e. (by implication) duration, in the sense of advance or perpetuity (substantially as a noun, either with or without a preposition).
H5703.kjv: eternity, ever(-lasting, -more), old, perpetually, world without end

H5704.def: properly, the same as H5703 (עַד) (used as a preposition, adverb or conjunction; especially with a preposition); as far (or long, or much) as, whether of space (even unto) or time (during, while, until) or degree (equally with).
H5704.kjv: against, and, as, at, before, by (that), even (to), for(-asmuch as), (hither-) to, how long, into, as long (much) as, (so) that, till, toward, until, when, while, (as) yet

H5705.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H5704 (עַד); as far (or long, or much) as, whether of space (even unto) or time (during, while, until) or degree (equally with).
H5705.kjv: and, at, for, (hither-) to, on till, (un-) to, until, within

H5706.def: the same as H5703 (עַד) in the sense of the aim of an attack; booty.

H5707.def: contracted from H5749 (עוּד); concretely, a witness; abstractly, testimony; specifically, a recorder, i.e. prince.

H5708.def: from an unused root meaning to set a period (compare H5710 (עָדָה), H5749 (עוּד)); the menstrual flux (as periodical); by implication (in plural) soiling.

H5709.gloss: to advance, i.e. pass on or continue
H5709.def: (Aramaic) or עֲדָה; (Aramaic), corresponding to H5710 (עָדָה); to advance, i.e. pass on or continue; causatively, to remove; specifically, to bedeck (i.e. bring an ornament upon).

H5710.gloss: to advance, i.e. pass on or continue
H5710.def: a primitive root; to advance, i.e. pass on or continue; causatively, to remove; specifically, to bedeck (i.e. bring an ornament upon).
H5710.kjv: adorn, deck (self), pass by, take away

H5711.gloss: Adah, the name of two women
H5711.def: from H5710 (עָדָה); ornament; Adah, the name of two women.

H5712.def: feminine of H5707 (עֵד) in the original sense of fixture; a stated assemblage (specifically, a concourse, or generally, a family or crowd).
H5712.kjv: assembly, company, congregation, multitude, people, swarm. Compare H5713 (עֵדָה)

H5713.def: feminine of H5707 (עֵד) in its techn. sense; testimony.

H5714.gloss: Iddo (or Iddi), the name of five Israelites
H5714.def: or עִדּוֹא; or עִדִּיא; from H5710 (עָדָה); timely; Iddo (or Iddi), the name of five Israelites.

H5716.def: from H5710 (עָדָה) in the sense of trappings; finery; generally an outfit; specifically, a headstall.

H5717.gloss: Adiel, the name of three Israelites
H5717.def: from H5716 (עֲדִי) and H410 (אֵל); ornament of God; Adiel, the name of three Israelites.

H5718.gloss: Adajah, the name of eight Israelites
H5718.def: or עֲדָיָהוּ; from H5710 (עָדָה) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has adorned; Adajah, the name of eight Israelites.

H5720.gloss: Adin, the name of two Israelites
H5720.def: the same as H5719 (עָדִין); Adin, the name of two Israelites.

H5721.def: from H5719 (עָדִין); effeminacy; Adina, an Israelite.

H5722.def: probably from H5719 (עָדִין) in the original sense of slender (i.e. a spear); his spear.

H5723.def: dual of a feminine of H5706 (עַד); double prey; Adithajim, a place in Palestine.

H5724.def: probably from an unused root of uncertain meaning; Adlai, an Israelite.

H5725.def: probably from the passive participle of the same as H5724 (עַדְלַי); Adullam, a place in Palestine.

H5726.gloss: an Adullamite or native of Adullam
H5726.def: patrial from H5725 (עֲדֻלָּם); an Adullamite or native of Adullam.

H5727.def: a primitive root; to be soft or pleasant; figuratively and reflexively, to live voluptuously.

H5728.def: or עֲדֶנָּה; from H5704 (עַד) and H2004 (הֵן); till now.

H5729.def: from H5727 (עָדַן); pleasure; Eden, a place in Mesopotamia.

H5730.kjv: delicate, delight, pleasure. See also H1040 (בֵּית עֵדֶן)

H5731.gloss: Eden, the region of Adam's home
H5731.def: the same as H5730 (עֵדֶן) (masculine); Eden, the region of Adam's home.

H5732.def: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to that of H5708 (עֵד); a set time; technically, a year.

H5733.gloss: Adna, the name of two Israelites
H5733.def: from H5727 (עָדַן); pleasure; Adna, the name of two Israelites.

H5734.gloss: Adnah, the name of two Israelites
H5734.def: from H5727 (עָדַן); pleasure; Adnah, the name of two Israelites.

H5735.def: from H5712 (עֵדָה); festival; Adadah, a place in Palestine.

H5736.def: a primitive root; to be (causatively, have) redundant.
H5736.kjv: be more, odd number, be (have) over (and above), overplus, remain

H5737.gloss: to arrange as a battle, a vineyard (to hoe)
H5737.def: a primitive root; to arrange as a battle, a vineyard (to hoe); hence, to muster and so to miss (or find wanting).

H5738.def: from H5737 (עֲדַר); an arrangement (i.e. drove); Eder, an Israelite.

H5739.def: from H5737 (עֲדַר); an arrangement, i.e. muster (of animals).

H5740.def: the same as H5739 (עֵדֶר); Eder, the name of an Israelite and of two places in Palestine.

H5741.def: from H5739 (עֵדֶר) and H410 (אֵל); flock of God; Adriel, an Israelite.

H5742.def: from an unused root of uncertain meaning; a lentil.

H5743.gloss: to be dense or dark, i.e. to becloud
H5743.def: a primitive root; to be dense or dark, i.e. to becloud.

H5744.gloss: Obed, the name of five Israelites
H5744.def: active participle of H5647 (עָבַד); serving; Obed, the name of five Israelites.

H5745.def: of foreign derivation; Obal, a son of Joktan.

H5746.gloss: to bake (round cakes on the hearth)
H5746.def: a primitive root; properly, to gyrate; but used only as a denominative from H5692 (עֻגָּה),; to bake (round cakes on the hearth).

H5747.def: probably from H5746 (עוּג); round; Og, a king of Bashan.

H5748.def: or עֻגָּב; from H5689 (עֲגַב) in the original sense of breathing; a reed-instrument of music.

H5749.def: a primitive root; to duplicate or repeat; by implication, to protest, testify (as by reiteration); intensively, to encompass, restore (as a sort of reduplication).
H5749.kjv: admonish, charge, earnestly, lift up, protest, call (take) to record, relieve, rob, solemnly, stand upright, testify, give warning, (bear, call to, give, take to) witness

H5750.def: or עֹד; from H5749 (עוּד); properly, iteration or continuance; used only adverbially (with or without preposition), again, repeatedly, still, more.
H5750.kjv: again, all life long, at all, besides, but, else, further(-more), henceforth, (any) longer, (any) more(-over), once, since, (be) still, when, (good, the) while (having being), (as, because, whether, while) yet (within)

H5751.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H5750 (עוֹד); properly, iteration or continuance; used only adverbially (with or without preposition), again, repeatedly, still, more.

H5752.gloss: Oded, the name of two Israelites
H5752.def: or עֹדֵד; from H5749 (עוּד); reiteration; Oded, the name of two Israelites.

H5753.def: a primitive root; to crook, literally or figuratively.
H5753.kjv: do amiss, bow down, make crooked, commit iniquity, pervert, (do) perverse(-ly), trouble, turn, do wickedly, do wrong

H5755.gloss: Ivvah or Avva, a region of Assyria
H5755.def: or עַוָּא; (2 Kings 17:24), for H5754 (עַוָּה); Ivvah or Avva, a region of Assyria.

H5756.def: a primitive root; to be strong; causatively, to stregthen, i.e. (figuratively) to save (by flight).

H5757.gloss: an Avvite or native of Avvah (only plural)
H5757.def: patrial from H5755 (עִוָּה); an Avvite or native of Avvah (only plural).

H5758.def: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to H5753 (עָוָה); perverseness.

H5761.def: plural of H5757 (עַוִּי); Avvim (as inhabited by Avvites), a place in Palestine (with the article prefix).

H5762.gloss: Avvith (or Avvoth), a place in Palestine
H5762.def: or perhaps (עַיּוֹת (as if plural of H5857 (עַי)) (עַיוּת; from H5753 (עָוָה); ruin; Avvith (or Avvoth), a place in Palestine.

H5763.def: a primitive root; to suckle, i.e. give milk.

H5766.def: or עָוֶל; and (feminine) עַוְלָה; or עוֹלָה; or עֹלָה; from H5765 (עֲוַל); (moral) evil.

H5768.def: or עֹלָל; from H5763 (עוּל); a suckling.

H5769.def: from H5956; properly, concealed, i.e., the vanishing point; generally, time out of mind.

H5770.def: denominative from H5869 (עַיִן); to watch (with jealosy).

H5771.def: or עָווֹן; (2 Kings 7:9; Psalm 51:5 (H7 (אֲבַד))), from H5753 (עָוָה); perversity, i.e. (moral) evil.
H5771.kjv: fault, iniquity, mischeif, punishment (of iniquity), sin

H5772.def: from an unused root apparently meaning to dwell together; sexual (cohabitation).

H5774.def: a primitive root; to cover (with wings or obscurity); hence (as denominative from H5775 (עוֹף)); to fly; also (by implication of dimness) to faint (from the darkness of swooning).
H5774.kjv: brandish, be (wax) faint, flee away, fly (away), set, shine forth, weary

H5775.def: from H5774 (עוּף); a bird (as covered with feathers, or rather as covering with wings), often collectively.

H5776.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H5775 (עוֹף); a bird (as covered with feathers, or rather as covering with wings), often collectively.

H5777.def: or עֹפֶרֶת; feminine participle active of H6080 (עָפַר); lead (from its dusty color).

H5778.def: from H5775 (עוֹף); birdlike; Ephai, an Israelite.

H5780.def: apparently from H5779 (עוּץ); consultation; Uts, a son of Aram, also a Seirite, and the regions settled by them..

H5782.def: a primitive root (rather identical with through the idea of opening the eyes); to wake (literally or figuratively).
H5782.kjv: (a-) wake(-n, up), lift up (self), master, raise (up), stir up (self)

H5785.def: from H5783 (עוּר); skin (as naked); by implication, hide, leather.

H5786.def: a primitive root (rather denominatively from H5785 (עוֹר) through the idea of a film over the eyes); to blind.
H5786.kjv: blind, put out. See also H5895 (עַיִר)

H5787.def: intensive from H5786 (עָוַר); blind (literally or figuratively).

H5790.def: for H5789 (עוּשׁ); to hasten, i.e. succor.

H5791.kjv: bow self, (make) crooked., falsifying, overthrow, deal perversely, pervert, subvert, turn upside down

H5793.gloss: Uthai, the name of two Israelites
H5793.def: from H5790 (עוּת); succoring; Uthai, the name of two Israelites.

H5794.kjv: fierce, greedy, mighty, power, roughly, strong

H5795.def: from H5810 (עָזַז); a she-goat (as strong), but masculine in plural (which also is used elliptically for goat's hair).

H5796.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H5795 (עֵז); a she-goat (as strong), but masculine in plural (which also is used elliptically for goat's hair).

H5797.def: or (fully) עוֹז; from H5810 (עָזַז); strength in various applications (force, security, majesty, praise).
H5797.kjv: boldness, loud, might, power, strength, strong

H5798.gloss: Uzza or Uzzah, the name of five Israelites
H5798.def: or עֻזָּה; feminine of H5797 (עֹז); strength; Uzza or Uzzah, the name of five Israelites.

H5799.def: from H5795 (עֵז) and H235 (אָזַל); goat of departure; the scapegoat.

H5800.gloss: to loosen, i.e. relinquish, permit, etc
H5800.def: a primitive root; to loosen, i.e. relinquish, permit, etc..
H5800.kjv: commit self, fail, forsake, fortify, help, leave (destitute, off), refuse, surely

H5801.gloss: trade, i.e. the place (mart) or the payment (revenue)
H5801.def: from H5800 (עָזַב) in the sense of letting go (for a price, i.e. selling); trade, i.e. the place (mart) or the payment (revenue).

H5802.def: from H5794 (עַז) and the root of H950 (בּוּקָה); stern depopulator; Azbuk, an Israelite.

H5803.def: from H5794 (עַז) and H1409 (גָּד); stern troop; Azgad, an Israelite.

H5804.def: feminine of H5794 (עַז); strong; Azzah, a place in Palestine.

H5805.def: feminine passive participle of H5800 (עָזַב); desertion (of inhabitants).

H5806.gloss: Azubah, the name of two Israelitesses
H5806.def: the same as H5805 (עֲזוּבָה); Azubah, the name of two Israelitesses.

H5808.def: from H5810 (עָזַז); forcible; collectively and concretely, an army.

H5809.gloss: Azzur, the name of three Israelites
H5809.def: or עַזֻּר; from H5826 (עָזַר); helpful; Azzur, the name of three Israelites.

H5810.def: a primitive root; to be stout (literally or figuratively).
H5810.kjv: harden, impudent, prevail, strengthen (self), be strong

H5811.def: from H5810 (עָזַז); strong; Azaz, an Israelite.

H5812.gloss: Azazjah, the name of three Israelites
H5812.def: from H5810 (עָזַז) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has strengthened; Azazjah, the name of three Israelites.

H5813.gloss: Uzzi, the name of six Israelites
H5813.def: from H5810 (עָזַז); forceful; Uzzi, the name of six Israelites.

H5814.def: perhaps for H5818 (עֻזִּיָּה); Uzzija, an Israelite.

H5815.def: from H5756 (עוּז) and H410 (אֵל); strengthened of God; Aziel, an Israelite.

H5816.gloss: Uzziel, the name of six Israelites
H5816.def: from H5797 (עֹז) and H410 (אֵל); strength of God; Uzziel, the name of six Israelites.

H5817.gloss: an Uzzielite (collectively) or descendants of Uzziel
H5817.def: patronymically from H5816 (עֻזִּיאֵל); an Uzzielite (collectively) or descendants of Uzziel.

H5818.gloss: Uzzijah, the name of five Israelites
H5818.def: or עֻזִּיָּהוּ; from H5797 (עֹז) and H3050 (יָהּ); strength of Jah; Uzzijah, the name of five Israelites.

H5819.def: from H5756 (עוּז); strengthfulness; Aziza, an Israelite.

H5820.def: from H5794 (עַז) and H4194 (מָוֶת); strong one of death; Azmaveth, the name of three Israelites and of a place in Palestine.

H5821.def: from H5794 (עַז); strong one; Azzan, an Israelite.

H5822.def: probably feminine of H5797 (עֹז); probably the sea-eagle (from its strength).

H5823.def: a primitive root; to grub over.

H5824.def: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to H5823 (עָזַק); a signet-ring (as engraved).

H5825.def: from H5823 (עָזַק); tilled; Azekah, a place in Palestine.

H5826.gloss: to surround, i.e. protect or aid
H5826.def: a primitive root; to surround, i.e. protect or aid.

H5827.gloss: Ezer, the name of two Israelites
H5827.def: from H5826 (עָזַר); help; Ezer, the name of two Israelites.

H5829.gloss: Ezer, the name of four Israelites
H5829.def: the same as H5828 (עֵזֶר); Ezer, the name of four Israelites.

H5830.def: a variation of H5833 (עֶזְרָה); Ezra, an Israelite.

H5831.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H5830 (עֶזְרָא); Ezra, an Israelite.

H5832.gloss: Azarel, the name of five Israelites
H5832.def: from H5826 (עָזַר) and H410 (אֵל); God has helped; Azarel, the name of five Israelites.

H5833.def: or עֶזְרָת; (Psalm 60:11 (13); Psalm 108:12 (13)), feminine of H5828 (עֵזֶר); aid.

H5834.def: the same as H5833 (עֶזְרָה); Ezrah, an Israelite.

H5835.def: from H5826 (עָזַר) in its original meaning of surrounding; an inclosure; also a border.

H5836.def: from H5828 (עֵזֶר); helpful; Ezri, an Israelite.

H5837.gloss: Azriel, the name of three Israelites
H5837.def: from H5828 (עֵזֶר) and H410 (אֵל); help of God; Azriel, the name of three Israelites.

H5838.gloss: Azarjah, the name of nineteen Israelites
H5838.def: or עֲזַרְיָהוּ; from H5826 (עָזַר) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has helped; Azarjah, the name of nineteen Israelites.

H5839.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H5838 (עֲזַרְיָה); Azarjah, one of Daniel's companions.

H5840.gloss: Azrikam, the name of four Israelites
H5840.def: from H5828 (עֵזֶר) and active participle of H6965 (קוּם); help of an enemy; Azrikam, the name of four Israelites.

H5841.gloss: an Azzathite or inhabitant of Azzah
H5841.def: patrial from H5804 (עַזָּה); an Azzathite or inhabitant of Azzah.

H5842.def: from H5860 (עִיט) (contracted) in the sense of swooping, i.e. side-long stroke; a stylus or marking stick.

H5844.gloss: to wrap, i.e. cover, veil, cloth, or roll
H5844.def: a primitive root; to wrap, i.e. cover, veil, cloth, or roll.
H5844.kjv: array self, be clad, (put a) cover (-ing, self), fill, put on, surely, turn aside

H5845.def: from an unused root meaning apparently to contain; a receptacle (for milk, i.e. pail; figuratively, breast).

H5846.def: from an unused root meaning to sneeze; sneezing.

H5848.gloss: to shroud, i.e. clothe (whether transitive or reflex.)
H5848.def: a primitive root; to shroud, i.e. clothe (whether transitive or reflex.); hence (from the idea of darkness) to languish.
H5848.kjv: cover (over), fail, faint, feebler, hide self, be overwhelmed, swoon

H5849.def: a primitive root; to encircle (for attack or protection); especially to crown (literally or figuratively).

H5851.def: the same as H5850 (עֲטָרָה); Atarah, an Israelitess.

H5852.gloss: Ataroth, the name (thus simply) of two places in Palestine
H5852.def: or עֲטָרֹת; plural of H5850 (עֲטָרָה); Ataroth, the name (thus simply) of two places in Palestine.

H5853.def: from the same as H5852 (עֲטָרוֹת) and H146 (אַדָּר); crowns of Addar; Atroth-Addar, a place in Palestine.

H5854.def: from the same as H5852 (עֲטָרוֹת) and H1004 (בַּיִת) and H3097 (יוֹאָב); crowns of the house of Joab; Atroth-beth-Joab, a place in Palestine.

H5855.def: from the same as H5852 (עֲטָרוֹת) and a name otherwise unused (being from the same as H8226 (שָׂפַן)) meaning hidden; crowns of Shophan; Atroth-Shophan, a place in Palestine.

H5856.def: from H5753 (עָוָה); a ruin (as if overturned).

H5857.gloss: Ai, Aja or Ajath, a place in Palestine
H5857.def: or (feminine) עַיָּא; (Nehemiah 11:31), or עַיָּת; (Isaiah 10:28), for H5856 (עִי); Ai, Aja or Ajath, a place in Palestine.

H5858.def: perhaps from an unused root probably meaning to be bald; bare; Ebal, a mountain of Palestine.

H5859.def: from H5856 (עִי); ruin; Ijon, a place in Palestine.

H5860.gloss: to swoop down upon (literally or figuratively)
H5860.def: a primitive root; to swoop down upon (literally or figuratively).

H5861.gloss: a hawk or other bird of prey
H5861.def: from H5860 (עִיט); a hawk or other bird of prey.

H5862.def: from H5861 (עַיִט); hawk-ground; Etam, a place in Palestine.

H5863.def: from the plural of H5856 (עִי) and the plural of the active participle of H5674 (עָבַר) with the article interposed; ruins of the passers; Ije-ha-Abarim, a place near Palestine.

H5864.gloss: Ijim, a place in the Desert
H5864.def: plural of H5856 (עִי); ruins; Ijim, a place in the Desert..

H5865.def: for H5769 (עוֹלָם); concealed, i.e. the vanishing point; generally, time out of mind (past or future), i.e. (practically) eternity; frequentatively, adverbial (especially with prepositional prefix) always.

H5866.def: from H5927 (עָלָה); elevated; Ilai, an Israelite.

H5867.gloss: Elam, a son of Shem and his descendants, with their country
H5867.def: or עוֹלָם; (Ezra 10:2; Jeremiah 49:36), probably from H5956 (עָלַם); hidden, i.e. distant; Elam, a son of Shem and his descendants, with their country; also of six Israelites.

H5868.def: of doubtful origin and authenticity; probably meaning strength.

H5869.def: probably a primitive word; an eye (literally or figuratively); by analogy, a fountain (as the eye of the landscape).
H5869.kjv: affliction, outward appearance, before, think best, colour, conceit, be content, countenance, displease, eye((-brow), (-d), -sight), face, favour, fountain, furrow (from the margin), him, humble, knowledge, look, (well), me, open(-ly), (not) please, presence, regard, resemblance, sight, thee, them, think, us, well, you(-rselves)

H5871.gloss: Ajin, the name (thus simply) of two places in Palestine
H5871.def: the same as H5869 (עַיִן); fountain; Ajin, the name (thus simply) of two places in Palestine.

H5872.def: from H5869 (עַיִן) and H1423 (גְּדִי); fountain of a kid; En-Gedi, a place in Palestine.

H5873.def: from H5869 (עַיִן) and the plural of H1588 (גַּן); fountain of gardens; En-Gannim, a place in Palestine.

H5874.def: or עֵין דּוֹר; or עֵין־דֹּר; from H5869 (עַיִן) and H1755 (דּוֹר); fountain of dwelling; En-Dor, a place in Palestine.

H5875.def: from H5869 (עַיִן) and the active participle of H7121 (קָרָא); fountain of One calling; En-hak-Kore, a place near Palestine.

H5876.def: from H5869 (עַיִן) and the feminine of a derivative from H2300 (חָדַד); fountain of sharpness; En-Chaddah, a place in Palestine.

H5877.def: from H5869 (עַיִן) and the same as H2674 (חָצוֹר); fountain of a village; En-Chatsor, a place in Palestine.

H5878.def: from H5869 (עַיִן) and a derivative of H2729 (חָרַד); fountain of trembling; En-Charod, a place in Palestine.

H5879.gloss: Enajim or Enam, a place in Palestine
H5879.def: or עֵינָם; dual of H5869 (עַיִן); double fountain; Enajim or Enam, a place in Palestine.

H5880.def: from H5869 (עַיִן) and H4941 (מִשְׁפָּט); fountain of judgment; En-Mishpat, a place near Palestine.

H5881.def: from H5869 (עַיִן); having eyes; Enan, an Israelite.

H5882.def: עַיִן and the dual of H5695 (עֵגֶל); fountain of two calves; En-Eglajim, a place in Palestine.

H5883.def: from H5869 (עַיִן) and the active participle of H7270 (רָגַל); fountain of a traveller; En-Rogel, a place near Jerusalem.

H5884.def: from H5869 (עַיִן) and H7416 (רִמּוֹן); fountain of a pomegranate; En-Rimmon, a place in Palestine.

H5885.def: from H5869 (עַיִן) and H8121 (שֶׁמֶשׁ); fountain of the sun; En-Shemesh, a place in Palestine.

H5886.def: from H5869 (עַיִן) and the plural of H8565 (תַּן); fountain of jackals; En-Tannim, a pool near Jerusalem.

H5887.def: from H5869 (עַיִן) and H8598 (תַּפּוּחַ); fountain of an apple-tree; En-Tappuach, a place in Palestine.

H5890.def: feminine from H5774 (עוּף); obscurity (as if from covering).

H5891.def: the same as H5890 (עֵיפָה); Ephah, the name of a son of Midian, and of the region settled by him; also of an Israelite and of an Israelitess.

H5892.gloss: a city (a place guarded by waking or a watch) in the wide
H5892.def: or (in the plural) עָר; or עָיַר; (Judges 10:4), from H5782 (עוּר); a city (a place guarded by waking or a watch) in the widest sense (even of a mere encampment or post).
H5892.kjv: Ai (from margin), city, court (from margin), town

H5893.def: the same as H5892 (עִיר); Ir, an Israelite.

H5894.gloss: a watcher, i.e. an angel (as guardian)
H5894.def: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to H5782 (עוּר); a watcher, i.e. an angel (as guardian).

H5895.gloss: a young ass (as just broken to a load)
H5895.def: from H5782 (עוּר) in the sense of raising (i.e. bearing a burden); properly, a young ass (as just broken to a load); hence an ass-colt.

H5896.gloss: Ira, the name of three Israelites
H5896.def: from H5782 (עוּר); wakefulness; Ira, the name of three Israelites.

H5897.def: from the same as H6166 (עֲרָד); fugitive; Irad, an antediluvian.

H5898.def: from H5892 (עִיר) and H4417 (מֶלַח) with the article of substance interp.; city of (the) salt; Irham-Melach, a place near Palestine.

H5899.def: from H5892 (עִיר) and the plural of H8558 (תָּמָר) with the article interpolated; city of the palmtrees; Ir-hat-Temarim, a place in Palestine.

H5900.def: from H5892 (עִיר); a citizen; Iru, an Israelite.

H5901.def: from H5892 (עִיר); urbane; Iri, an Israelite.

H5902.def: from H5892 (עִיר); city-wise; Iram, an Idumaean.

H5904.def: from H5892 (עִיר) and H5175 (נָחָשׁ); city of a serpent; Ir-Nachash, a place in Palestine.

H5905.def: from H5892 (עִיר) and H8121 (שֶׁמֶשׁ); city of the sun; Ir-Shemesh, a place in Palestine.

H5906.gloss: the constellation of the Great Bear (perhaps from its mig
H5906.def: or עָשׁ; from H5789 (עוּשׁ); the constellation of the Great Bear (perhaps from its migration through the heavens).

H5907.gloss: Akbor, the name of an Idumaean and of two Israelites
H5907.def: probably for H5909 (עַכְבָּר); Akbor, the name of an Idumaean and of two Israelites.

H5908.def: probably from an unused root in the literal sense of entangling; a spider (as weaving a network).

H5909.def: probably from the same as H5908 (עַכָּבִישׁ) in the secondary sense of attacking; a mouse (as nibbling).

H5910.gloss: Akko (from its situation on a bay)
H5910.def: apparently from an unused root meaning to hem in; Akko (from its situation on a bay).

H5911.gloss: Akor, the name of a place in Palestine
H5911.def: from H5916 (עָכַר); troubled; Akor, the name of a place in Palestine.

H5912.def: from an unused root meaning to trouble; troublesome; Akan, an Israelite.

H5913.def: a primitive root; properly, to tie, specifically, with fetters; but used only as denominative from H5914 (עֶכֶס); to put on anklets.

H5914.def: from H5913 (עָכַס); a fetter; hence, an anklet.

H5915.def: feminine of H5914 (עֶכֶס); anklet; Aksah, an Israelitess.

H5916.def: a primitive root; properly, to roil water; figuratively, to disturb or affict.

H5917.def: from H5916 (עָכַר); troublesome; Akar, an Israelite.

H5918.def: from H5916 (עָכַר); muddler; Okran, an Israelite.

H5919.def: probably from an unused root meaning to coil; an asp (from lurking coiled up).

H5920.def: from H5927 (עָלָה); properly, the top; specifically, the highest (i.e. God); also (adverb) aloft, to Jehovah.

H5921.def: properly, the same as H5920 (עַל) used as a preposition (in the singular or plural often with prefix, or as conjunction with a particle following); above, over, upon, or against (yet always in this last relation with a downward aspect) in a great variety of applications.
H5921.kjv: above, according to(-ly), after, (as) against, among, and, as, at, because of, beside (the rest of), between, beyond the time, both and, by (reason of), had the charge of, concerning for, in (that), (forth, out) of, (from) (off), (up-) on, over, than, through(-out), to, touching, with

H5922.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H5921 (עַל); above, over, upon, or against (yet always in this last relation with a downward aspect) in a great variety of applications.
H5922.kjv: about, against, concerning, for, (there-) fore, from, in, more, of, (there-, up-) on, (in-) to, why with

H5923.gloss: a yoke (as imposed on the neck), literally or figuratively
H5923.def: or עוֹל; from H5953 (עָלַל); a yoke (as imposed on the neck), literally or figuratively.

H5925.def: feminine of H5923 (עֹל); burden; Ulla, an Israelite.

H5926.def: from an unused root meaning to stutter; stuttering.

H5927.gloss: to ascend, intransitively (be high) or actively (mount)
H5927.def: a primitive root; to ascend, intransitively (be high) or actively (mount); used in a great variety of senses, primary and secondary, literal and figurative.
H5927.kjv: arise (up), (cause to) ascend up, at once, break (the day) (up), bring (up), (cause to) burn, carry up, cast up, shew, climb (up), (cause to, make to) come (up), cut off, dawn, depart, exalt, excel, fall, fetch up, get up, (make to) go (away, up); grow (over) increase, lay, leap, levy, lift (self) up, light, (make) up, mention, mount up, offer, make to pay, perfect, prefer, put (on), raise, recover, restore, (make to) rise (up), scale, set (up), shoot forth (up), (begin to) spring (up), stir up, take away (up), work

H5929.gloss: a leaf (as coming up on a tree)
H5929.def: from H5927 (עָלָה); a leaf (as coming up on a tree); collectively, foliage.

H5930.gloss: a step or (collectively, stairs, as ascending)
H5930.def: or עוֹלָה; feminine active participle of H5927 (עָלָה); a step or (collectively, stairs, as ascending); usually a holocaust (as going up in smoke).
H5930.kjv: ascent, burnt offering (sacrifice), go up to. See also H5766 (עֶוֶל)

H5931.def: (Aramaic) feminine from a root corresponding to H5927 (עָלָה); a pretext (as arising artificially).

H5933.def: or עַליָה; the same as H5932 (עַלְוָה); Alvah or Aljah, an Idumaean.

H5934.def: passive participle of H5956 (עָלַם) in the denominative sense of H5958 (עֶלֶם); (only in plural as abstract) adolescence; figuratively, vigor.

H5935.def: or עַלְיָן; from H5927 (עָלָה); lofty; Alvan or Aljan, an Idumaean.

H5936.def: feminine passive participle of an unused root meaning to suck; the leech.

H5937.gloss: to jump for joy, i.e. exult
H5937.def: a primitive root; to jump for joy, i.e. exult.

H5939.def: feminine from an unused root meaning to cover; dusk.

H5941.def: from H5927 (עָלָה); lofty; Eli, an Israelite highpriest.

H5944.def: feminine from H5927 (עָלָה); something lofty, i.e. a stair-way; also a second-story room (or even one on the roof); figuratively, the sky.
H5944.kjv: ascent, (upper) chamber, going up, loft, parlour

H5945.def: from H5927 (עָלָה); an elevation, i.e. (adj.) lofty (compar.); as title, the Supreme.

H5948.gloss: probably a crucible (as working over the metal)
H5948.def: from H5953 (עָלַל) in the sense of completing; probably a crucible (as working over the metal).

H5949.def: or עֲלִלָה; from H5953 (עָלַל) in the sense of effecting; an exploit (of God), or a performance (of man, often in a bad sense); by implication, an opportunity.
H5949.kjv: act(-ion), deed, doing, invention, occasion, work

H5953.def: a primitive root; to effect thoroughly; specifically, to glean (also figuratively); by implication (in a bad sense) to overdo, i.e. maltreat, be saucy to, pain, impose (also literal).
H5953.kjv: abuse, affect, child, defile, do, glean, mock, practise, thoroughly, work (wonderfully)

H5954.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H5953 (עָלַל) (in the sense of thrusting oneself in),; to enter; causatively, to introduce.
H5954.kjv: bring in, come in, go in

H5955.def: feminine active participle of H5953 (עָלַל); only in plural gleanings; by extension gleaning-time.

H5956.gloss: to veil from sight, i.e. conceal (literally or figuratively)
H5956.def: a primitive root; to veil from sight, i.e. conceal (literally or figuratively).
H5956.kjv: any ways, blind, dissembler, hide (self), secret (thing)

H5957.gloss: remote time, i.e. the future or past indefinitely
H5957.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H5769 (עוֹלָם); remote time, i.e. the future or past indefinitely; often adverb, forever.

H5958.gloss: something kept out of sight, i.e. a lad
H5958.def: from H5956 (עָלַם); (compare H5959 (עַלְמָה)); properly, something kept out of sight, i.e. a lad.

H5959.def: feminine of H5958 (עֶלֶם); a lass (as veiled or private).

H5960.def: from H5956 (עָלַם); hidden; See also H5963 (עַלְמֹן דִּבְלָתָיְמָה).; Almon, a place in Palestine.

H5961.gloss: girls, i.e. the soprano or female voice, perhaps falsetto
H5961.def: plural of H5959 (עַלְמָה); properly, girls, i.e. the soprano or female voice, perhaps falsetto.

H5962.gloss: an Elamite or inhabitant of Elam
H5962.def: (Aramaic) patrial from a name corresponding to H5867 (עֵילָם) contracted; an Elamite or inhabitant of Elam.

H5963.def: from the same as H5960 (עַלְמוֹן) and the dual of H1960 (הֻיְּדָה) (compare H1015 (בֵּית דִּבְלָתַיִם)) with enclitic of direction; Almon towards Diblathajim; Almon-Diblathajemah, a place in Moab.

H5964.def: from H5956 (עָלַם); a covering; Alemeth, the name of a place in Palestine and of two Israelites.

H5965.gloss: to leap for joy, i.e. exult, wave joyously
H5965.def: a primitive root; to leap for joy, i.e. exult, wave joyously.

H5966.def: a primitive root; to sip up.

H5968.def: a primitive root; to veil or cover; figuratively, to be languid.

H5969.def: from H5968 (עָלַף); an envelope, i.e. (figuratively) mourning.

H5970.gloss: to jump for joy, i.e. exult
H5970.def: a primitive root; to jump for joy, i.e. exult.

H5971.def: from H6004; a people (as a congregated unit); specifically, a tribe (as those of Israel).

H5972.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H5971 (עַם); a people (as a congregated unit); specifically, a tribe (as those of Israel); hence (collectively) troops or attendants; figuratively, a flock.

H5973.def: from H6004 (עָמַם); adverb or preposition, with (i.e. in conjunction with), in varied applications; specifically, equally with; often with prepositional prefix (and then usually unrepresented in English).
H5973.kjv: accompanying, against, and, as (long as), before, beside, by (reason of), for all, from (among, between), in, like, more than, of, (un-) to, with(-al)

H5974.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H5973 (עִם); adverb or preposition, with (i.e. in conjunction with), in varied applications; specifically, equally with; often with prepositional prefix (and then usually unrepresented in English).

H5975.def: a primitive root; to stand, in various relations (literal and figurative, intransitive and transitive).
H5975.kjv: abide (behind), appoint, arise, cease, confirm, continue, dwell, be employed, endure, establish, leave, make, ordain, be (over), place, (be) present (self), raise up, remain, repair, serve, set (forth, over, -tle, up), (make to, make to be at a, with-) stand (by, fast, firm, still, up), (be at a) stay (up), tarry

H5977.def: from H5975 (עָמַד); a spot (as being fixed).

H5978.kjv: against, by, from, me, mine, of, that I take, unto, upon, with(-in.)

H5979.def: from H5975 (עָמַד); a station, i.e. domicile.

H5980.def: from H6004 (עָמַם); conjunction, i.e. society; mostly adverb or preposition (with prepositional prefix), near, beside, along with.
H5980.kjv: (over) against, at, beside, hard by, in points

H5981.def: the same as H5980 (עֻמָּה); association; Ummah, a place in Palestine.

H5982.def: or עַמֻּד; from H5975 (עָמַד); a column (as standing); also a stand, i.e. platform.

H5983.def: from H5971 (עַם); tribal, i.e. inbred; Ammon, a son of Lot; also his posterity and their country.

H5984.def: patronymically from H5983 (עַמּוֹן); an Ammonite or (the adjective) Ammonitish.

H5986.def: from H6006 (עָמַס); burdensome; Amos, an Israelite prophet.

H5987.def: from H6009 (עָמַק); deep; Amok, an Israelite.

H5988.gloss: Ammiel, the name of three or four Israelites
H5988.def: from H5971 (עַם) and H410 (אֵל); people of God; Ammiel, the name of three or four Israelites.

H5989.gloss: Ammihud, the name of three Israelites
H5989.def: from H5971 (עַם) and H1935 (הוֹד); people of splendor; Ammihud, the name of three Israelites.

H5990.def: from H5971 (עַם) and H2064 (זָבַד); people of endowment; Ammizabad, an Israelite.

H5991.def: from H5971 (עַם) and H2353 (חוּר); people of nobility; Ammichur, a Syrian prince.

H5992.gloss: Amminadab, the name of four Israelites
H5992.def: from H5971 (עַם) and H5068 (נָדַב); people of liberality; Amminadab, the name of four Israelites.

H5993.def: from H5971 (עַם) and H5081 (נָדִיב); my people (is) liberal; Ammi-Nadib, probably an Israelite.

H5994.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H6012 (עָמֵק); profound, i.e. unsearchable.

H5995.def: from H6014 (עָמַר); a bunch of grain.

H5996.def: from H5971 (עַם) and H7706 (שַׁדַּי); people of (the) Almighty; Ammishaddai, an Israelite.

H5997.def: from a primitive root meaning to associate; companionship; hence (concretely) a comrade or kindred man.

H5998.gloss: to toil, i.e. work severely and with irksomeness
H5998.def: a primitive root; to toil, i.e. work severely and with irksomeness.

H5999.def: from H5998 (עָמַל); toil, i.e. wearing effort; hence, worry, wheth. of body or mind.
H5999.kjv: grievance(-vousness), iniquity, labour, mischief, miserable(-sery), pain(-ful), perverseness, sorrow, toil, travail, trouble, wearisome, wickedness

H6000.def: the same as H5999 (עָמָל); Amal, an Israelite.

H6001.def: from H5998 (עָמַל); toiling; concretely, a laborer; figuratively, sorrowful.
H6001.kjv: that laboureth, that is a misery, had taken (labour), wicked, workman

H6002.def: probably of foreign origin; Amalek, a descendant of Esau; also his posterity and their country.

H6003.gloss: an Amalekite (or collectively the Amalekites) or descenda
H6003.def: patronymically from H6002 (עֲמָלֵק); an Amalekite (or collectively the Amalekites) or descendants of Amalek.

H6004.def: a primitive root; to associate; by implication, to overshadow (by huddling together).

H6005.gloss: Immanuel, a type name of Isaiah's son
H6005.def: from H5973 (עִם) and with a pronominal suffix inserted; with us (is) God; Immanuel, a type name of Isaiah's son.

H6006.gloss: to load, i.e. impose aburden (or figuratively, infliction)
H6006.def: or עָמַשׂ; a primitive root; to load, i.e. impose aburden (or figuratively, infliction).
H6006.kjv: be borne, (heavy) burden (self), lade, load, put

H6007.def: from H6006 (עָמַס) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has loaded; Amasjah, an Israelite.

H6008.def: from H5971 (עַם) and H5703 (עַד); people of time; Amad, a place in Palestine.

H6009.gloss: to be (causatively, make) deep (literally or figuratively)
H6009.def: a primitive root; to be (causatively, make) deep (literally or figuratively).
H6009.kjv: (be, have, make, seek) deep(-ly), depth, be profound

H6010.def: from H6009 (עָמַק); a vale (i.e. broad depression).
H6010.kjv: dale, vale, valley (often used as a part of proper names). See also H1025 (בֵּית הָעֵמֶק)

H6014.def: a primitive root; properly, apparently to heap; figuratively, to chastise (as if piling blows); specifically (as denominative from H6016 (עֹמֶר)); to gather grain.

H6016.def: from H6014 (עָמַר); properly, a heap, i.e. a sheaf; also an omer, as a dry measure.

H6017.def: from H6014 (עָמַר); a (ruined) heap; Amorah, a place in Palestine.

H6018.def: from H6014 (עָמַר); heaping; Omri, an Israelite.

H6019.gloss: Amram, the name of two Israelites
H6019.def: probably from H5971 (עַם) and H7311 (רוּם); high people; Amram, the name of two Israelites.

H6020.gloss: an Amramite or descendant of Amram
H6020.def: from H6019 (עַמְרָם); an Amramite or descendant of Amram.

H6021.gloss: Amasa, the name of two Israelites
H6021.def: from H6006 (עָמַס); burden; Amasa, the name of two Israelites.

H6022.gloss: Amasai, the name of three Israelites
H6022.def: from H6006 (עָמַס); burdensome; Amasai, the name of three Israelites.

H6023.def: probably from H6006 (עָמַס); burdensome; Amashsay, an Israelite.

H6024.def: from the same as H6025 (עֵנָב); fruit; Anab, a place in Palestine.

H6025.def: from an unused root probably meaning to bear fruit; a grape.

H6026.def: a primitive root; to be soft or pliable, i.e. (figuratively) effeminate or luxurious.

H6029.def: a primitive root; to lace fast.

H6030.gloss: to eye or (generally) to heed, i.e. pay attention
H6030.def: a primitive root; properly, to eye or (generally) to heed, i.e. pay attention; by implication, to respond; by extension to begin to speak; specifically to sing, shout, testify, announce.
H6030.kjv: give account, afflict (by mistake for H6031 (עָנָה)), (cause to, give) answer, bring low (by mistake for H6031 (עָנָה)), cry, hear, Leannoth, lift up, say, scholar, (give a) shout, sing (together by course), speak, testify, utter, (bear) witness. See also H1042 (בֵּית עֲנוֹת), H1043 (בֵּית עֲנָת)

H6031.def: a primitive root (possibly rather identical with H6030 (עָנָה) through the idea of looking down or browbeating); to depress literally or figuratively, transitive or intransitive (in various applications, as follows).
H6031.kjv: abase self, afflict(-ion, self), answer (by mistake for H6030 (עָנָה)), chasten self, deal hardly with, defile, exercise, force, gentleness, humble (self), hurt, ravish, sing (by mistake for H6030 (עָנָה)), speak (by mistake for H6030 (עָנָה)), submit self, weaken, in any wise

H6032.gloss: to eye or (generally) to heed, i.e. pay attention
H6032.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H6030 (עָנָה); properly, to eye or (generally) to heed, i.e. pay attention; by implication, to respond; by extension to begin to speak; specifically to sing, shout, testify, announce.

H6033.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H6031 (עָנָה); to depress literally or figuratively, transitive or intransitive (in various applications, as follows).

H6034.gloss: Anah, the name of two Edomites and one Edomitess
H6034.def: probably from H6030 (עָנָה); an answer; Anah, the name of two Edomites and one Edomitess.

H6035.def: or (by intermixture with H6041 (עָנִי)) עָנָיו; from H6031 (עָנָה); depressed (figuratively), in mind (gentle) or circumstances (needy, especially saintly).
H6035.kjv: humble, lowly, meek, poor. Compare H6041 (עָנִי)

H6036.def: passive participle from the same as H6025 (עֵנָב); borne (as fruit); Anub, an Israelite.

H6037.def: feminine of H6035 (עָנָו); mildness (royal); also (concretely) oppressed.

H6038.def: from H6035 (עָנָו); condescension, human and subjective (modesty), or divine and objective (clemency).

H6041.def: from H6031 (עָנָה); (practically the same as H6035 (עָנָו), although the margin constantly disputes this, making H6035 (עָנָו) subjective and objective); depressed, in mind or circumstances.

H6042.gloss: Unni, the name of two Israelites
H6042.def: from H6031 (עָנָה); afflicted; Unni, the name of two Israelites.

H6043.gloss: Anajah, the name of two Israelites
H6043.def: from H6030 (עָנָה); Jah has answered; Anajah, the name of two Israelites.

H6044.def: for plural of H5869 (עַיִן); fountains; Anim, a place in Palestine.

H6045.gloss: ado, i.e. (generally) employment or (specifically) an affair
H6045.def: from H6031 (עָנָה); ado, i.e. (generally) employment or (specifically) an affair.

H6046.def: from the dual of H5869 (עַיִן); two fountains; Anem, a place in Palestine.

H6047.def: as if plural of some Egyptian word; Anamim, a son of Mizraim and his descendants, with their country.

H6048.def: of foreign origin; Anammelek, an Assyrian deity.

H6049.gloss: figuratively, to act covertly, i.e. practise magic
H6049.def: a primitive root; to cover; used only as a denominative from H6051 (עָנָן), to cloud over; figuratively, to act covertly, i.e. practise magic.
H6049.kjv: bring, enchanter, Meonemin, observe(-r of) times, soothsayer, sorcerer

H6050.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H6051 (עָנָן); a cloud (as covering the sky), i.e. the nimbus or thunder-cloud.

H6051.def: from H6049 (עָנַן); a cloud (as covering the sky), i.e. the nimbus or thunder-cloud.

H6052.def: the same as H6051 (עָנָן); cloud; Anan, an Israelite.

H6054.def: from H6051 (עָנָן); cloudy; Anani, an Israelite.

H6055.def: from H6049 (עָנַן) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has covered; Ananjah, the name of an Israelite and of a place in Palestine.

H6056.def: (Aramaic) or עֶנֶף; (Aramaic), corresponding to H6057 (עָנָף); a twig (as covering the limbs).

H6057.def: from an unused root meaning to cover; a twig (as covering the limbs).

H6058.def: from the same as H6057 (עָנָף); branching.

H6059.gloss: to collar, i.e. adorn with anecklace
H6059.def: a primitive root; properly, to choke; used only as denominative from H6060 (עָנָק),; to collar, i.e. adorn with anecklace; figuratively, to fit out with supplies.
H6059.kjv: compass about as a chain, furnish, liberally

H6060.def: from H6059 (עָנַק); a necklace (as if strangling).

H6061.def: the same as H6060 (עָנָק); Anak, a Canaanite.

H6062.gloss: an Anakite or descendant of Anak
H6062.def: patronymically from H6061 (עָנָק); an Anakite or descendant of Anak.

H6063.gloss: Aner, a Amorite, also a place in Palestine
H6063.def: probably for H5288 (נַעַר); Aner, a Amorite, also a place in Palestine.

H6064.def: a primitive root; properly, to urge; by implication, to inflict apenalty, specifically, to fine.

H6067.def: from H6030 (עָנָה); answer; Anath, an Israelite.

H6068.gloss: Anathoth, the name of two Israelites, also of a place in Pal
H6068.def: plural of H6067 (עֲנָת); Anathoth, the name of two Israelites, also of a place in Pal.

H6069.gloss: a Antothite or inhabitant of Anathoth
H6069.def: or עַנְּתוֹתִי; patrial from H6068 (עֲנָתוֹת); a Antothite or inhabitant of Anathoth.

H6070.def: from the same as H6068 (עֲנָתוֹת) and H3050 (יָהּ); answers of Jah; Anthothijah, an Israelite.

H6071.gloss: must or fresh grape-juice (as just trodden out)
H6071.def: from H6072 (עָסַס); must or fresh grape-juice (as just trodden out).

H6072.def: a primitive root; to squeeze out juice; figuratively, to trample.

H6073.def: from an unused root meaning to cover; a bough (as covering the tree).

H6074.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H6073 (עֳפֶא); a twig; bough, i.e. (collectively) foliage.

H6075.def: a primitive root; to swell; figuratively, be elated.

H6076.def: from H6075 (עָפַל); a tumor; also a mound, i.e. fortress.

H6077.def: the same as H6076 (עֹפֶל); Ophel, a ridge in Jerusalem.

H6078.gloss: an Ophnite (collectively) or inhabitants of Ophen
H6078.def: from an unused noun (denoting a place in Palestine; from an unused root of uncertain meaning); an Ophnite (collectively) or inhabitants of Ophen.

H6079.def: from H5774 (עוּף); an eyelash (as fluttering); figuratively, morning ray.

H6080.def: ; a primitive root; meaning either to be gray or perhaps rather to pulverize; used only as denominative from H6083 (עָפָר),; to be dust.

H6081.gloss: Epher, the name of an Arabian and of two Israelites
H6081.def: probably a variation of H6082 (עֹפֶר); gazelle; Epher, the name of an Arabian and of two Israelites.

H6082.def: from H6080 (עָפַר); a fawn (from the dusty color).

H6083.def: from H6080 (עָפַר); dust (as powdered or gray); hence, clay, earth, mud.
H6083.kjv: ashes, dust, earth, ground, morter, powder, rubbish

H6084.def: feminine of H6082 (עֹפֶר); female fawn; Ophrah, the name of an Israelite and of two places in Palestine.

H6085.def: from the same as H6081 (עֵפֶר); fawn-like; Ephron, the name of a Canaanite and of two places in Palestine.

H6086.def: from H6095 (עָצָה); a tree (from its firmness); hence, wood (plural sticks).
H6086.kjv: carpenter, gallows, helve, pine, plank, staff, stalk, stick, stock, timber, tree, wood

H6087.gloss: to carve, i.e. fabricate or fashion
H6087.def: a primitive root; properly, to carve, i.e. fabricate or fashion; hence (in a bad sense) to worry, pain or anger.
H6087.kjv: displease, grieve, hurt, make, be sorry, vex, worship, wrest

H6089.def: from H6087 (עָצַב); an earthen vessel; usually (painful) toil; also a pang (whether of body or mind).

H6090.def: a variation of H6089 (עֶצֶב); an idol (as fashioned); also pain (bodily or mental).

H6093.def: from H6087 (עָצַב); worrisomeness, i.e. labor or pain.

H6094.def: from H6087 (עָצַב); a idol; also, a pain or wound.

H6095.gloss: to fasten (or make firm), i.e. to close (the eyes)
H6095.def: a primitive root; properly, to fasten (or make firm), i.e. to close (the eyes).

H6096.gloss: the spine (as giving firmness to the body)
H6096.def: from H6095 (עָצָה); the spine (as giving firmness to the body).

H6098.def: from H3289 (יָעַץ); advice; by implication, plan; also prudence.

H6099.def: or עָצֻם; passive participle of H6105 (עָצַם); powerful (specifically, a paw); by implication, numerous.

H6100.gloss: Etsjon-Geber, a place on the Red Sea
H6100.def: from H6096 (עָצֶה) and H1397 (גֶּבֶר); backbone-like of a man; Etsjon-Geber, a place on the Red Sea.

H6101.gloss: to lean idly, i.e. to be indolent or slack
H6101.def: a primitive root; to lean idly, i.e. to be indolent or slack.

H6105.gloss: to bind fast, i.e. close (the eyes)
H6105.def: a primitive root; also denominatively (from H6106 (עֶצֶם)); to bind fast, i.e. close (the eyes); intransitively, to be (causatively, make) powerful or numerous; to crunch the bones.
H6105.kjv: break the bones, close, be great, be increased, be (wax) mighty(-ier), be more, shut, be(-come, make) strong(-er)

H6106.def: from H6105 (עָצַם); a bone (as strong); by extension, the body; figuratively, the substance, i.e. (as pron.) selfsame.
H6106.kjv: body, bone, life, (self-) same, strength, very

H6107.def: the same as H6106 (עֶצֶם); bone; Etsem, a place in Palestine.

H6109.def: feminine of H6108 (עֹצֶם); powerfulness; by extension, numerousness.

H6110.def: feminine of H6099 (עָצוּם); a bulwark, i.e. (figuratively) argument.

H6111.def: or עַצְמֹן; from H6107 (עֶצֶם); bone-like; Atsmon, a place near Palestine.

H6112.def: from an unused root meaning to be sharp or strong; a spear.

H6113.def: a primitive root; to inclose; by analogy, to hold back; also to maintain, rule, assemble.
H6113.kjv: be able, close up, detain, fast, keep (self close, still), prevail, recover, refrain, reign, restrain, retain, shut (up), slack, stay, stop, withhold (self)

H6116.gloss: an assembly, especially on afestival or holiday
H6116.def: or עֲצֶרֶת; from H6113 (עָצָר); an assembly, especially on afestival or holiday.

H6117.def: a primitive root; properly, to swell out or up; used only as denominative from H6119 (עָקֵב),; to seize by the heel; figuratively, to circumvent (as if tripping up the heels); also to restrain (as if holding by the heel).
H6117.kjv: take by the heel, stay, supplant, utterly

H6118.def: from H6117 (עָקַב) in the sense of H6119 (עָקֵב); a heel, i.e. (figuratively) the last of anything (used adverbially, for ever); also result, i.e. compensation; and so (adverb with preposition or relatively) on account of.
H6118.kjv: because, by, end, for, if, reward

H6119.def: or (feminine) עִקְּבָה; from H6117 (עָקַב); a heel (as protuberant); hence, a track; figuratively, the rear (of an army).
H6119.kjv: heel, (horse-) hoof, last, lier in wait (by mistake for H6120 (עָקֵב)), (foot-) step

H6120.def: from H6117 (עָקַב) in its denominative sense; a lier in wait.

H6121.def: from H6117 (עָקַב); in the original sense, a knoll (as swelling up); in the denominative sense; (transitive) fraudulent or (intransitive) tracked.

H6122.def: feminine of an unused form from H6117 (עָקַב) meaning a trick; trickery.

H6123.def: a primitive root; to tie with thongs.

H6126.gloss: Akkub, the name of five Israelites
H6126.def: from H6117 (עָקַב); insidious; Akkub, the name of five Israelites.

H6130.def: from an unused root meaning to twist; tortuous; Akan, an Idummaean.

H6131.gloss: to pluck up (especially by the roots)
H6131.def: a primitive root; to pluck up (especially by the roots); specifically, to hamstring; figuratively, to exterminate.
H6131.kjv: dig down, hough, pluck up, root up

H6132.gloss: to pluck up (especially by the roots)
