H6132.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H6131 (עָקַר); to pluck up (especially by the roots); specifically, to hamstring; figuratively, to exterminate.

H6133.def: from H6131 (עָקַר); figuratively, a transplanted person, i.e. naturalized citizen.

H6134.def: the same as H6133 (עֵקֶר); Eker, an Israelite.

H6135.gloss: sterile (as if extirpated in the generative organs)
H6135.def: from H6131 (עָקַר); sterile (as if extirpated in the generative organs).

H6137.def: of uncertain derivation; a scorpion; figuratively, a scourge or knotted whip.

H6138.def: from H6131 (עָקַר); eradication; Ekron, a place in Palestine.

H6139.gloss: an Ekronite or inhabitant of Ekron
H6139.def: or עֶקְרֹנִי; patrial from H6138 (עֶקְרוֹן); an Ekronite or inhabitant of Ekron.

H6140.def: a primitive root; to knot or distort; figuratively, to pervert (act or declare perverse).

H6142.def: the same as H6141 (עִקֵּשׁ); perverse; Ikkesh, an Israelite.

H6144.def: the same as H5892 (עִיר); a city; Ar, a place in Moab.

H6145.def: from H5782 (עוּר); a foe (as watchful for mischief).

H6146.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H6145 (עָר); a foe (as watchful for mischief).

H6147.gloss: Er, the name of two Israelites
H6147.def: from H5782 (עוּר); watchful; Er, the name of two Israelites.

H6148.def: a primitive root; to braid, i.e. intermix; technically, to traffic (as if by barter); also or give to be security (as a kind of exchange).
H6148.kjv: engage, (inter-) meddle (with), mingle (self), mortgage, occupy, give pledges, be(-come, put in) surety, undertake

H6149.def: a primitive root (rather identical with H6148 (עָרַב) through the idea of close association); to be agreeable.
H6149.kjv: be pleasant(-ing), take pleasure in, be sweet

H6150.def: a primitive root (rather identical with H6148 (עָרַב) through the idea of covering with a texture); to grow dusky at sundown.

H6152.gloss: Arab (i.e. Arabia), a country East of Palestine
H6152.def: or עֲרַב; from H6150 (עָרַב) in the figurative sense of sterility; Arab (i.e. Arabia), a country East of Palestine.

H6154.gloss: the web (or transverse threads of cloth)
H6154.def: or עֶרֶב; (1 Kings 10:15), (with the article [prefix), from H6148 (עָרַב); the web (or transverse threads of cloth); also a mixture, (or mongrel race).

H6155.gloss: a willow (from the use of osiers as wattles)
H6155.def: from H6148 (עָרַב); a willow (from the use of osiers as wattles).

H6157.def: from H6148 (עָרַב); a mosquito (from its swarming).

H6158.def: or עוֹרֵב; from H6150 (עָרַב); a raven (from its dusky hue).

H6159.def: or עוֹרֵב; the same as H6158 (עֹרֵב); Oreb, the name of a Midianite and of the cliff near the Jordan.

H6160.def: from H6150 (עָרַב) (in the sense of sterility); a desert; especially (with the article prefix) the (generally) sterile valley of the Jordan and its continuation to the Red Sea.
H6160.kjv: Arabah, champaign, desert, evening, heaven, plain, wilderness. See also H1026 (בֵּית הָעֲרָבָה)

H6161.def: feminine passive participle of H6048 (עֲנַמֶּלֶךְ) in the sense of a bargain or exchange; something given as security, i.e. (literally) a token (of safety) or (metaphorically) a bondsman.

H6162.def: from H6148 (עָרַב) (in the sense of exchange); a pawn (given as security).

H6163.gloss: an Arabian or inhabitant of Arab (i.e. Arabia)
H6163.def: or עַרְבִי; patrial from H6152 (עֲרָב); an Arabian or inhabitant of Arab (i.e. Arabia).

H6164.gloss: an Arbathite or inhabitant of (Beth-) Arabah
H6164.def: patrial from H1026 (בֵּית הָעֲרָבָה); an Arbathite or inhabitant of (Beth-) Arabah.

H6165.def: a primitive root; to long for.

H6166.def: from an unused root meaning to sequester itself; fugitive; Arad, the name of a place near Palestine, also of a Canaanite and an Israelite.

H6168.def: a primitive root; to be (causatively, make) bare; hence, to empty, pour out, demolish.
H6168.kjv: leave destitute, discover, empty, make naked, pour (out), rase, spread self, uncover

H6169.def: feminine from H6168 (עָרָה); a naked (i.e. level) plot.

H6170.gloss: something piled up (as if (figuratively) raised by mental
H6170.def: or עֲרֻגָה; feminine passive participle of H6165 (עָרַג); something piled up (as if (figuratively) raised by mental aspiration), i.e. a paterre.

H6171.def: from the same as H6166 (עֲרָד); an onager (from his lonesome habits).

H6172.def: from H6168 (עָרָה); nudity, literally (especially the pudenda) or figuratively (disgrace, blemish).

H6173.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H6172 (עֶרְוָה); nakedness, i.e. (figuratively) impoverishment.

H6174.def: or עָרֹם; from H6191 (עָרַם) (in its original sense); nude, either partially or totally.

H6175.def: passive participle of H6191 (עָרַם); cunning (usually in a bad sense).

H6176.gloss: a juniper (from its nudity of situation)
H6176.def: or עַרְעָר; from H6209 (עָרַר) reduplicated; a juniper (from its nudity of situation).

H6177.gloss: Aroer, the name of three places in or near Palestine
H6177.def: or עֲרֹעֵר; or עַרְעוֹר; the same as H6176 (עֲרוֹעֵר); nudity of situation; Aroer, the name of three places in or near Palestine.

H6178.gloss: feared, i.e. (concretely) a horrible place or chasm
H6178.def: passive participle of H6206 (עָרַץ); feared, i.e. (concretely) a horrible place or chasm.

H6179.def: from H5782 (עוּר); watchful; Eri, an Israelite.

H6180.gloss: a Erite (collectively) or descendants of Eri
H6180.def: patronymically of H6179 (עֵרִי); a Erite (collectively) or descendants of Eri.

H6182.def: from an unused root meaning to comminute; meal.

H6183.gloss: the sky (as dropping at the horizon)
H6183.def: from H6201 (עָרַף); the sky (as dropping at the horizon).

H6184.def: from H6206 (עָרַץ); fearful, i.e. powerful or tyrannical.
H6184.kjv: mighty, oppressor, in great power, strong, terrible, violent

H6185.def: from H6209 (עָרַר); bare, i.e. destitute (of children).

H6186.def: a primitive root; to set in a row, i.e. arrange, put in order (in a very wide variety of applications).
H6186.kjv: put (set) (the battle, self) in array, compare, direct, equal, esteem, estimate, expert (in war), furnish, handle, join (battle), ordain, (lay, put, reckon up, set) (in) order, prepare, tax, value

H6187.def: from H6186 (עָרַךְ); a pile, equipment, estimate.
H6187.kjv: equal, estimation, (things that are set in) order, price, proportion, set at, suit, taxation, valuest

H6188.gloss: to expose or remove the prepuce
H6188.def: a primitive root; properly, to strip; but used as denominative from H6189 (עָרֵל); to expose or remove the prepuce, whether literal (to go naked) or figurative (to refrain from using).
H6188.kjv: count uncircumcised, foreskin to be uncovered

H6189.gloss: uncircumcised (i.e. still having the prepuce uncurtailed)
H6189.def: from H6188 (עָרֵל); properly, exposed, i.e. projecting loose (as to the prepuce); used only technically,; uncircumcised (i.e. still having the prepuce uncurtailed).

H6191.def: a primitive root; properly, to be (or make) bare; but used only in the derivative sense (through the idea perhaps of smoothness) to be cunning (usually in a bad sense).
H6191.kjv: very, beware, take crafty (counsel), be prudent, deal subtilly

H6192.def: a primitive root; to pile up.

H6194.def: (Jeremiah 50:26) or (feminine) עֲרֵמָה; from H6192 (עָרַם); a heap; specifically, a sheaf.

H6195.def: feminine of H6193 (עֹרֶם); trickery; or (in a good sense) discretion.

H6196.gloss: the plane tree (from its smooth and shed bark)
H6196.def: probably from H6191 (עָרַם); the plane tree (from its smooth and shed bark).

H6197.def: probably from H5782 (עוּר); watchful; Eran, an Israelite.

H6198.gloss: an Eranite or descendant (collectively) of Eran
H6198.def: patronymically from H6197 (עֵרָן); an Eranite or descendant (collectively) of Eran.

H6200.gloss: an Aroerite or inhabitant of Aroer
H6200.def: patronymically from H6177 (עֲרוֹעֵר); an Aroerite or inhabitant of Aroer.

H6201.def: a primitive root; to droop; hence, to drip.

H6202.def: a primitive root (identical with through the idea of sloping); properly, to bend downward; but used only as a denominative from H6203 (עֹרֶף),; to break the neck; hence (figuratively) to destroy.
H6202.kjv: that is beheaded, break down, break (cut off, strike off) neck

H6203.gloss: the nape or back of the neck (as declining)
H6203.def: from H6202 (עָרַף); the nape or back of the neck (as declining); hence, the back generally (whether literal or figurative).

H6204.def: feminine of H6203 (עֹרֶף); mane; Orpah, a Moabites.

H6205.def: probably from H6201 (עָרַף); gloom (as of a lowering sky).

H6206.def: a primitive root; to awe or (intransitive) to dread; hence, to harass.
H6206.kjv: be affrighted (afraid, dread, feared, terrified), break, dread, fear, oppress, prevail, shake terribly

H6207.def: a primitive root; to gnaw, i.e. (figuratively) eat (by hyberbole); also (participle) a pain.

H6208.gloss: an Arkite or inhabitant of Erek
H6208.def: patrial from an unused name meaning a tush; an Arkite or inhabitant of Erek.

H6209.def: a primitive root; to bare; figuratively, to demolish.
H6209.kjv: make bare, break, raise up (perhaps by clerical error for raze), utterly

H6210.def: from an unused root meaning perhaps to arch; a couch (properly, with a canopy).

H6212.def: from an unused root meaning to glisten (or be green); grass (or any tender shoot).

H6213.def: a primitive root; to do or make, in the broadest sense and widest application.

H6214.gloss: Asahel, the name of four Israelites
H6214.def: from H6213 (עָשָׂה) and H410 (אֵל); God has made; Asahel, the name of four Israelites.

H6215.gloss: Esav, a son of Isaac, including his posterity
H6215.def: apparently a form of the passive participle of H6213 (עָשָׂה) in the original sense of handling; rough (i.e. sensibly felt); Esav, a son of Isaac, including his posterity.

H6216.def: from H6231 (עָשַׁק); oppressive (as noun, a tyrant).

H6217.gloss: used in plural masculine as abstractly, tyranny
H6217.def: or עָשֻׁק; passive participle of H6231 (עָשַׁק); used in plural masculine as abstractly, tyranny.

H6218.def: or עָשֹׂר; from H6235 (עֶשֶׂר); ten; by abbreviated form ten strings, and so a decachord.

H6220.def: for H6219 (עָשׁוֹת); bright; Ashvath, an Israelite.

H6221.def: from H6213 (עָשָׂה) and H410 (אֵל); made of God; Asiel, an Israelite.

H6222.gloss: Asajah, the name of three or four Israelites
H6222.def: from H6213 (עָשָׂה) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has made; Asajah, the name of three or four Israelites.

H6223.def: from H6238 (עָשַׁר); rich, whether literal or figurative (noble).

H6224.def: from H6235 (עֶשֶׂר); tenth; by abbreviation, tenth month or (feminine) part.

H6225.gloss: to smoke, whether literal or figurative
H6225.def: a primitive root; to smoke, whether literal or figurative.

H6227.gloss: smoke, literally or figuratively (vapor, dust, anger)
H6227.def: from H6225 (עָשַׁן); smoke, literally or figuratively (vapor, dust, anger).

H6228.def: the same as H6227 (עָשָׁן); Ashan, a place in Palestine.

H6229.def: a primitive root (identical with H6231 (עָשַׁק)); to press upon, i.e. quarrel.

H6231.gloss: to press upon, i.e. oppress, defraud, violate, overflow
H6231.def: a primitive root (compare H6229 (עָשַׂק)); to press upon, i.e. oppress, defraud, violate, overflow.
H6231.kjv: get deceitfully, deceive, defraud, drink up, (use) oppress(-ion), -or), do violence (wrong)

H6232.def: from H6231 (עָשַׁק); oppression; Eshek, an Israelite.

H6233.def: from H6231 (עָשַׁק); injury, fraud, (subjectively) distress, (concretely) unjust gain.

H6235.gloss: ten (as an accumulation to the extent of the digits)
H6235.def: masculine of term עֲשָׂרָה; from H6237 (עָשַׂר); ten (as an accumulation to the extent of the digits).

H6236.def: (Aramaic) masculine עֲשְׂרָה (Aramaic); corresponding to H6235 (עֶשֶׂר); ten.

H6237.gloss: to tithe, i.e. to take or give atenth
H6237.def: a primitive root (identical with H6238 (עָשַׁר)); to accumulate; but used only as denominative from H6235 (עֶשֶׂר); to tithe, i.e. to take or give atenth.
H6237.kjv: surely, give (take) the tenth, (have, take) tithe(-ing, -s), truly

H6238.def: a primitive root; properly, to accumulate; chiefly (specifically) to grow (causatively, make) rich.
H6238.kjv: be(-come, en-, make, make self, wax) rich, make (1 Kings 22:48 marg). See H6240 (עָשָׂר)

H6240.def: for H6235 (עֶשֶׂר); ten (only in combination), i.e. -teen; also (ordinal) -teenth.
H6240.kjv: (eigh-, fif-, four-, nine-, seven-, six-, thir-) teen(-th), eleven(-th), sixscore thousand, twelve(-th)

H6241.def: or עִשָּׂרֹן; from H6235 (עֶשֶׂר); (fractional) a tenth part.

H6243.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H6242 (עֶשְׂרִים); twenty; also (ordinal) twentieth.

H6244.def: a primitive root; probably to shrink, i.e. fail.

H6245.gloss: probably to be sleek, i.e. glossy
H6245.def: a primitive root; probably to be sleek, i.e. glossy; hence (through the idea of polishing) to excogitate (as if forming in the mind).

H6249.def: apparently masculine plural construction of H6247 (עֶשֶׁת) in the sense of an afterthought (used only in connection with H6240 (עָשָׂר) in lieu of H259 (אֶחָד)); eleven or (ordinal) eleventh.

H6252.def: or עַשְׁתָּרֹת; plural of H6251 (עַשְׁתְּרָה); Ashtaroth, the name of a Sidonian deity, and of a place East of the Jordan.
H6252.kjv: Asharoth, Astaroth. See also H1045 (בֵּית עַשְׁתָּרוֹת), H6253 (עַשְׁתֹּרֶת), H6255 (עַשְׁתְּרֹת קַרְנַיִם)

H6253.gloss: Ashtoreth, the Phoenician goddess of love (and increase)
H6253.def: probably for H6251 (עַשְׁתְּרָה); Ashtoreth, the Phoenician goddess of love (and increase).

H6254.gloss: an Ashterathite or inhabitant of Ashtaroth
H6254.def: patrial from H6252 (עַשְׁתָּרוֹת); an Ashterathite or inhabitant of Ashtaroth.

H6255.gloss: Ashteroth-Karnaim, a place East of the Jordan
H6255.def: from H6252 (עַשְׁתָּרוֹת) and the dual of H7161 (קֶרֶן); Ashtaroth of (the) double horns (a symbol of the deity); Ashteroth-Karnaim, a place East of the Jordan.

H6256.gloss: time, especially (adverb with preposition) now, when, etc
H6256.def: from H5703 (עַד); time, especially (adverb with preposition) now, when, etc..
H6256.kjv: after, (al-) ways, certain, continually, evening, long, (due) season, so (long) as, (even-, evening-, noon-) tide, (meal-), what) time, when

H6257.kjv: make fit, be ready to become

H6258.gloss: at this time, whether adverb, conjunction or expletive
H6258.def: from H6256 (עֵת); at this time, whether adverb, conjunction or expletive.
H6258.kjv: henceforth, now, straightway, this time, whereas

H6260.def: or עַתֻּד; from H6257 (עָתַד); prepared, i.e. full grown; spoken only (in plural) of he-goats, or (figuratively) leaders of the people.

H6262.gloss: Attai, the name of three Israelites
H6262.def: for H6261 (עִתִּי); Attai, the name of three Israelites.

H6264.def: from H6257 (עָתַד); prepared; by implication, skilful; feminine plural the future; also treasure.
H6264.kjv: things that shall come, ready, treasures

H6265.def: from H5790 (עוּת) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has helped; Athajah, an Israelite.

H6266.def: from H6275 (עָתַק); properly, antique, i.e. venerable or splendid.

H6267.def: from H6275 (עָתַק); removed, i.e. weaned; also antique.

H6269.def: from an unused root meaning to sojourn; lodging; Athak, a place in Palestine.

H6270.def: from an unused root meaning to compress; constringent; Athlai, an Israelite.

H6271.gloss: Athaljah, the name of an Israelitess and two Israelites
H6271.def: or עֲתַלְיָהוּ; from the same as H6270 (עַתְלַי) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has constrained; Athaljah, the name of an Israelitess and two Israelites.

H6272.gloss: probably to glow, i.e. (figuratively) be desolated
H6272.def: a primitive root; probably to glow, i.e. (figuratively) be desolated.

H6273.def: from an unused root meaning to force; forcible; Othni, an Israelite.

H6274.def: from the same as H6273 (עׇתְנִי) and H410 (אֵל); force of God; Othniel, an Israelite.

H6275.def: a primitive root; to remove (intransitive or transitive) figuratively, to grow old; specifically, to transcribe.
H6275.kjv: copy out, leave off, become (wax) old, remove

H6277.def: from H6275 (עָתַק) in the sense of license; impudent.

H6278.def: from H6256 (עֵת) and H7011 (קַיָּם); time of a judge; Eth-Katsin, a place in Palestine.

H6279.def: a primitive root (rather denominative from H6281 (עֶתֶר)); to burn incense in worship, i.e. intercede (reciprocally, listen to prayer).

H6280.def: a primitive root; to be (causatively, make) abundant.

H6281.def: from H6280 (עָתַר); abundance; Ether, a place in Palestine.

H6282.gloss: incense (as increasing to a volume of smoke)
H6282.def: from H6280 (עָתַר); also compare H6279 (עָתַר); incense (as increasing to a volume of smoke); hence  a worshipper.

H6284.def: a primitive root; to puff, i.e. blow away.

H6285.def: feminine of H6311 (פֹּה); properly, mouth in a figurative sense, i.e. direction, region, extremity.

H6286.def: a primitive root; also denominative from H6288 (פְּאֹרָה),; to gleam, i.e. (causatively) embellish; figuratively, to boast; also to explain (i.e. make clear) oneself; to shake a tree.
H6286.kjv: beautify, boast self, go over the boughs, glorify (self), glory, vaunt self

H6287.def: from H6286 (פָּאַר); an embellishment, i.e. fancy head-dress.

H6288.def: or פֹּרָאה; or פֻּארָה; from H6286 (פָּאַר); properly, ornamentation, i.e. (plural) foliage (including the limbs) as bright green.

H6289.def: from H6286 (פָּאַר); properly, illuminated, i.e. a glow; as noun, a flush (of anxiety).

H6290.def: from H6286 (פָּאַר); ornamental; Paran, a desert of Arabia.

H6291.def: from an unused root meaning to be torpid, i.e.; crude; an unripe fig.

H6292.def: or פִּגֻּל; from an unused root meaning to stink; properly, fetid, i.e. (figuratively) unclean (ceremonially).

H6293.def: a primitive root; to impinge, by accident or violence, or (figuratively) by importunity.
H6293.kjv: come (betwixt), cause to entreat, fall (upon), make intercession, intercessor, intreat, lay, light (upon), meet (together), pray, reach, run

H6295.def: from H6294 (פֶּגַע) and H410 (אֵל); accident of God; Pagiel, an Israelite.

H6296.def: a primitive root; to relax, i.e. become exhausted.

H6297.gloss: a carcase (as limp), whether of man or beast
H6297.def: from H6296 (פָּגַר); a carcase (as limp), whether of man or beast; figuratively, an idolatrous image.

H6298.gloss: to come in contact with, whether by accident or violence
H6298.def: a primitive root; to come in contact with, whether by accident or violence; figuratively, to concur.

H6299.def: a primitive root; to sever, i.e. ransom; gener. to release, preserve.
H6299.kjv: at all, deliver, by any means, ransom, (that are to be, let be) redeem(-ed), rescue, surely

H6300.def: from H6299 (פָּדָה) and H410 (אֵל); God has ransomed; Pedahel, an Israelite.

H6301.def: from H6299 (פָּדָה) and H6697 (צוּר); a rock (i.e. God) has ransomed; Pedahtsur, an Israelite.

H6302.gloss: as abstractly (in plural masculine) a ransom
H6302.def: passive participle of H6299 (פָּדָה). ransomed (and so occurring under H6299 (פָּדָה)); as abstractly (in plural masculine) a ransom.

H6303.def: from H6299 (פָּדָה); ransom; Padon, one of the Nethinim..

H6304.def: or פְּדֻת; from H6929 (קֵדְמָה)lemma קדְמָה missing vowel, corrected to קֵדְמָה; distinction; also deliverance.

H6305.gloss: Pedajah, the name of six Israelites
H6305.def: or פְּדָיָהוּ; from H6299 (פָּדָה) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has ransomed; Pedajah, the name of six Israelites.

H6306.def: or פִּדְיֹם; also פִּדְיוֹן; or פִּדְיֹן; from H6299 (פָּדָה); a ransom.

H6307.gloss: Paddan or Paddan-Aram, a region of Syria
H6307.def: from an unused root meaning to extend; a plateau; or פַּדַּן אֲרָם; from the same and H758 (אֲרָם); the table-land of Aram; Paddan or Paddan-Aram, a region of Syria.

H6309.def: from an unused root meaning to be greasy; suet.

H6310.def: from H6284; the mouth (as the means of blowing), whether literal or figurative.

H6311.gloss: this place (French ici), i.e. here or hence
H6311.def: or פֹּא; (Job 38:11), or פּוֹ; probably from a primitive inseparable particle 'p' (of demonstrative force) and H1931 (הוּא); this place (French ici), i.e. here or hence.
H6311.kjv: here, hither, the one (other, this, that) side

H6312.gloss: Puah or Puvvah, the name of two Israelites
H6312.def: or פֻּוָּה; from H6284 (פָּאָה); a blast; Puah or Puvvah, the name of two Israelites.

H6313.def: a primitive root; to be sluggish.
H6313.kjv: cease, be feeble, faint, be slacked

H6315.gloss: to puff, i.e. blow with the breath or air
H6315.def: a primitive root; to puff, i.e. blow with the breath or air; hence, to fan (as a breeze), to utter, to kindle (a fire), to scoff.
H6315.kjv: blow (upon), break, puff, bring into a snare, speak, utter

H6316.def: of foreign origin; Put, a son of Ham, also the name of his descendants or their region, and of a Persian tribe.

H6317.def: from an unused root (probably meaning to disparage) and H410 (אֵל); contempt of God; Putiel, an Israelite.

H6318.def: of Egyptian derivation; Potiphar, an Egyptian.

H6319.def: of Egyptian derivation; Poti-Phera, an Egyptian.

H6320.def: from an unused root meaning to paint; dye (specifically, stibium for the eyes).

H6321.def: from an unused root meaning to be thick; a bean (as plump).

H6322.gloss: Pul, the name of an Assyrian king and of an Ethiopian tribe
H6322.def: of foreign origin; Pul, the name of an Assyrian king and of an Ethiopian tribe.

H6323.def: a primitive root meaning to turn, i.e.; be perplexed.

H6324.gloss: a Punite (collectively) or descendants of an unknown Pun
H6324.def: patronymically from an unused name meaning a turn; a Punite (collectively) or descendants of an unknown Pun.

H6325.gloss: Punon, a place in the Desert
H6325.def: from H6323 (פּוּן); perplexity; Punon, a place in the Desert.

H6326.def: from an unused root meaning to glitter; brilliancy; Puah, an Israelitess.

H6327.def: a primitive root; to dash in pieces, literally or figuratively (especially to disperse).
H6327.kjv: break (dash, shake) in (to) pieces, cast (abroad), disperse (selves), drive, retire, scatter (abroad), spread abroad

H6329.def: a primitive root (identical with H6328 (פּוּק) through the idea of dropping out; compare H5312 (נְפַק)); to issue, i.e. furnish; causatively, to secure; figuratively, to succeed.
H6329.kjv: afford, draw out, further, get, obtain

H6331.kjv: break, bring to nought, utterly take

H6332.gloss: a lot (as by means of a broken piece)
H6332.def: also (plural) פּוּרִים; or פֻּרִים; from H6331 (פּוּר); a lot (as by means of a broken piece).

H6333.def: from H6331 (פּוּר); a wine-press (as crushing the grapes).

H6334.def: of Persian origin; Poratha, a son of Haman.

H6335.def: a primitive root; to spread; figuratively, act proudly.
H6335.kjv: grow up, be grown fat, spread selves, be scattered

H6336.gloss: a Puthite (collectively) or descendants of an unknown Puth
H6336.def: patronymically from an unused name meaning a hinge; a Puthite (collectively) or descendants of an unknown Puth.

H6337.def: from H6338 (פָּזַז); pure (gold); hence, gold itself (as refined).

H6339.def: a primitive root (identical with H6338 (פָּזַז)); to solidify (as if by refining); also to spring (as if separating the limbs).

H6340.gloss: to scatter, whether in enmity or bounty
H6340.def: a primitive root; to scatter, whether in enmity or bounty.

H6341.def: from H6351 (פָּחַח); a (metallic) sheet (as pounded thin); also a spring net (as spread out like a lamina).

H6342.gloss: to be startled (by a sudden alarm)
H6342.def: a primitive root; to be startled (by a sudden alarm); hence, to fear in general.
H6342.kjv: be afraid, stand in awe, (be in) fear, make to shake

H6343.def: from H6342 (פָּחַד); a (sudden) alarm (properly, the object feared, by implication, the feeling).

H6344.gloss: a testicle (as a cause of shame akin to fear)
H6344.def: the same as H6343 (פַּחַד); a testicle (as a cause of shame akin to fear).

H6346.gloss: a prefect (of a city or small district)
H6346.def: of foreign origin; a prefect (of a city or small district).

H6347.gloss: a prefect (of a city or small district)
H6347.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H6346 (פֶּחָה); a prefect (of a city or small district).

H6348.gloss: to bubble up or froth (as boiling water)
H6348.def: a primitive root; to bubble up or froth (as boiling water), i.e. (figuratively) to be unimportant.

H6349.def: from H6348 (פָּחַז); ebullition, i.e. froth (figuratively, lust).

H6351.def: a primitive root; to batter out; but used only as denominative from H6341 (פַּח),; to spread a net.

H6352.gloss: a coal, whether charred or live
H6352.def: perhaps from an unused root probably meaning to be black; a coal, whether charred or live.

H6353.def: (Aramaic) from an unused root probably meaning to fashion; a potter.

H6354.def: probably from an unused root apparently meaning to dig; a pit, especially forcatching animals.

H6355.def: from H6354 (פַּחַת) and H4124 (מוֹאָב); pit of Moab; Pachath-Moab, an Israelite.

H6356.gloss: a hole (by mildew in a garment)
H6356.def: from the same as H6354 (פַּחַת); a hole (by mildew in a garment).

H6357.def: of foreign derivation; a gem, probably the topaz.

H6358.def: passive participle of H6362 (פָּטַר); opened, i.e. (as noun) a bud.

H6360.def: intensively from an unused root meaning to pound; a hammer.

H6361.gloss: a gown (as if hammered out wide)
H6361.def: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to that of H6360 (פַּטִּישׁ); a gown (as if hammered out wide).

H6362.def: a primitive root; to cleave or burst through, i.e. (causatively) to emit, whether literal or figurative (gape).
H6362.kjv: dismiss, free, let (shoot) out, slip away

H6363.def: or פִּטְרָה; from H6362 (פָּטַר); a fissure, i.e. (concretely) firstling (as opening the matrix).

H6364.def: of Egyptian origin; Pi-Beseth, a place in Egypt.

H6365.def: from an unused root probably meaning to pierce; (figuratively) misfortune.

H6366.def: or פִּיָּה; feminine of H6310 (פֶּה); an edge.

H6367.def: from H6310 (פֶּה) and the feminine plural of a noun (from the same root as H2356 (חוֹר)), with the article interpolated; mouth of the gorges; Pi-ha-Chiroth, a place in Egypt.

H6368.gloss: a powder (as easily puffed away), i.e. ashes or dust
H6368.def: from H6315 (פּוּחַ); a powder (as easily puffed away), i.e. ashes or dust.

H6369.def: apparently from H6310 (פֶּה) and H3605 (כֹּל); mouth of all; Picol, a Philistine.

H6370.def: or פִּלֶגֶשׁ; of uncertain derivation; a concubine; also (masculine) a paramour.

H6371.def: probably from an unused root meaning to be plump; obesity.

H6372.gloss: Pinechas, the name of three Israelites
H6372.def: apparently from H6310 (פֶּה) and a variation of H5175 (נָחָשׁ); mouth of a serpent; Pinechas, the name of three Israelites.

H6373.def: probably the same as H6325 (פּוּנֹן); Pinon, an Idumaean.

H6374.def: for H6366 (פֵּיָה); an edge or tooth.

H6376.def: from H6335 (פּוּשׁ); dispersive; Pishon, a river of Eden.

H6377.def: probably from the same as H6596 (פֹּת); expansive; Pithon, an Israelite.

H6378.gloss: a flask (from which a liquid may flow)
H6378.def: from H6379 (פָּכָה); a flask (from which a liquid may flow).

H6380.gloss: Pokereth-Tsebajim, one of the 'servants of Solomon'
H6380.def: from the active participle (of the same form as the first word) feminine of an unused root (meaning to entrap) and plural of H6643 (צְבִי); trap of gazelles; Pokereth-Tsebajim, one of the 'servants of Solomon'.

H6381.def: a primitive root; properly, perhaps to separate, i.e. distinguish (literally or figuratively); by implication, to be (causatively, make) great, difficult, wonderful.
H6381.kjv: accomplish, (arise...too, be too) hard, hidden, things too high, (be, do, do a, shew) marvelous(-ly, -els, things, work), miracles, perform, separate, make singular, (be, great, make) wonderful(-ers, -ly, things, works), wondrous (things, works, -ly)

H6384.gloss: a Palluite (collectively) or descendants of Pallu
H6384.def: patronymically from H6396 (פַּלּוּא); a Palluite (collectively) or descendants of Pallu.

H6385.def: a primitive root; to split (literally or figuratively).

H6386.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H6385 (פָּלַג); to split (literally or figuratively).

H6388.gloss: a rill (i.e. small channel of water, as in irrigation)
H6388.def: from H6385 (פָּלַג); a rill (i.e. small channel of water, as in irrigation).

H6389.def: the same as H6388 (פֶּלֶג); earthquake; Peleg, a son of Shem.

H6390.def: from H6385 (פָּלַג); a runlet, i.e. gully.

H6393.gloss: a cleaver, i.e. iron armature (of a chariot)
H6393.def: from an unused root meaning to divide; a cleaver, i.e. iron armature (of a chariot).

H6394.def: of uncertain derivation; Pildash, a relative of Abraham.

H6395.def: a primitive root; to distinguish (literally or figuratively).
H6395.kjv: put a difference, show marvellous, separate, set apart, sever, make wonderfully

H6396.def: from H6395 (פָּלָה); distinguished; Pallu, an Israelite.

H6397.gloss: a Pelonite or inhabitant of an unknown Palon
H6397.def: patronymically from an unused name (from H6395 (פָּלָה)) meaning separate; a Pelonite or inhabitant of an unknown Palon.

H6398.gloss: to slice, i.e. break open or pierce
H6398.def: a primitive root; to slice, i.e. break open or pierce.
H6398.kjv: bring forth, cleave, cut, shred, strike through

H6399.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H6398 (פָּלַח); to serve or worship.

H6401.def: from H6400 (פֶּלַח); slicing; Pilcha, an Israelite.

H6403.def: a primitive root; to slip out, i.e. escape; causatively, to deliver.
H6403.kjv: calve, carry away safe, deliver, (cause to) escape

H6404.gloss: Pelet, the name of two Israelites
H6404.def: from H6403 (פָּלַט); escape; Pelet, the name of two Israelites.

H6406.gloss: Palti, the name of two Israelites
H6406.def: from H6403 (פָּלַט); delivered; Palti, the name of two Israelites.

H6407.gloss: a Paltite or descendant of Palti
H6407.def: patronymically from H6406 (פַּלְטִי); a Paltite or descendant of Palti.

H6409.gloss: Paltiel, the name of two Israelites
H6409.def: from the same as H6404 (פֶּלֶט) and H410 (אֵל); deliverance of God; Paltiel, the name of two Israelites.

H6410.gloss: Pelatjah, the name of four Israelites
H6410.def: or פְּלַטְיָהוּ; from H6403 (פָּלַט) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has delivered; Pelatjah, the name of four Israelites.

H6411.gloss: Pelajah, the name of three Israelites
H6411.def: or פְּלָאיָה; from H6381 (פָּלָא) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has distinguished; Pelajah, the name of three Israelites.

H6412.def: or פָּלֵיט; or פָּלֵט; from H6403 (פָּלַט); a refugee.

H6413.def: or פְּלֵטָה; feminine of H6412 (פָּלִיט); deliverance; concretely, an escaped portion.

H6418.def: from an unused root meaning to be round; a circuit (i.e. district); also a spindle (as whirled); hence, a crutch.

H6419.def: a primitive root; to judge (officially or mentally); by extension, to intercede, pray.

H6420.def: from H6419 (פָּלַל); judge; Palal, an Israelite.

H6421.def: from H6419 (פָּלַל) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has judged; Pelaljah, an Israelite.

H6422.def: probably for H6423 (פְּלֹנִי); a certain one, i.e. so-and-so.

H6423.gloss: such a one, i.e. a specified person
H6423.def: from H6395 (פָּלָה); such a one, i.e. a specified person.

H6424.gloss: to roll flat, i.e. prepare (a road)
H6424.def: a primitive root; properly, to roll flat, i.e. prepare (a road); also to revolve, i.e. weigh (mentally).

H6426.gloss: perhaps to rend, i.e. (by implication) to quiver
H6426.def: a primitive root; properly, perhaps to rend, i.e. (by implication) to quiver.

H6428.def: a primitive root; to roll (in dust).

H6429.def: from H6428 (פָּלַשׁ); rolling, i.e. migratory; Pelesheth, a region of Syria.

H6430.gloss: a Pelishtite or inhabitant of Pelesheth
H6430.def: patrial from H6429 (פְּלֶשֶׁת); a Pelishtite or inhabitant of Pelesheth.

H6431.gloss: Peleth, the name of two Israelites
H6431.def: from an unused root meaning to flee; swiftness; Peleth, the name of two Israelites.

H6432.def: from the same form as H6431 (פֶּלֶת); a courier (collectively) or official messenger.

H6433.def: (Aramaic) probably for H6310 (פֶּה); the mouth (literally or figuratively).

H6434.gloss: an angle (of a street or wall)
H6434.def: from an unused root meaning to turn; an angle (of a street or wall).

H6435.def: from H6437 (פָּנָה); properly, removal; used only (in the construction) adverb as conjunction, lest.

H6437.def: a primitive root; to turn; by implication, to face, i.e. appear, look, etc..
H6437.kjv: appear, at (even-) tide, behold, cast out, come on, corner, dawning, empty, go away, lie, look, mark, pass away, prepare, regard, (have) respect (to), (re-) turn (aside, away, back, face, self), right (early)

H6438.def: feminine of H6434 (פֵּן); an angle; by implication, a pinnacle; figuratively, a chieftain.

H6439.gloss: Penuel or Peniel, a place East of Jordan
H6439.def: or (more properly,) פְּנִיאֵל; from H6437 (פָּנָה) and H410 (אֵל); face of God; Penuel or Peniel, a place East of Jordan; also (as Penuel) the name of two Israelites.

H6440.def: plural (but always as singular) of an unused noun; the face (as the part that turns).

H6441.def: from H6440 (פָּנִים) with directive enclitic; faceward, i.e. indoors.

H6443.def: or פָּנִי; from the same as H6434 (פֵּן); probably a pearl (as round).

H6444.def: probably feminine from H6443 (פָּנִין) contr.; Peninnah, an Israelitess.

H6446.gloss: a long and sleeved tunic (perhaps simply a wide one
H6446.def: from H6461 (פָּסַס); properly, the palm (of the hand) or sole (of the foot) (compare H6447 (פַּס)); by implication (plural); a long and sleeved tunic (perhaps simply a wide one; from the original sense of the root, i.e. of many breadths).

H6447.gloss: the palm (of the hand, as being spread out)
H6447.def: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to H6461 (פָּסַס); the palm (of the hand, as being spread out).

H6448.def: a primitive root; to cut up, i.e. (figuratively) contemplate.

H6449.gloss: Pisgah, a Mountain East of Jordan
H6449.def: from H6448 (פָּסַג); a cleft; Pisgah, a Mountain East of Jordan.

H6450.def: from H6446 (פַּס) and the plural of H1818 (דָּם); palm (i.e. dell) of bloodshed; Pas-Dammim, a place in Palestine.

H6452.gloss: to hop, i.e. (figuratively) skip over (or spare)
H6452.def: a primitive root; to hop, i.e. (figuratively) skip over (or spare); by implication, to hesitate; also (literally) to limp, to dance.
H6452.kjv: halt, become lame, leap, pass over

H6453.def: from H6452 (פָּסַח); a pretermission, i.e. exemption; used only techically of the Jewish Passover (the festival or the victim).

H6454.gloss: Paseach, the name of two Israelites
H6454.def: from H6452 (פָּסַח); limping; Paseach, the name of two Israelites.

H6457.def: from an unused root meaning to divide; divider; Pasak, an Israelite.

H6458.gloss: to carve, whether wood or stone
H6458.def: a primitive root; to carve, whether wood or stone.

H6460.def: (Aramaic) or פְּסַנְתֵּרִין; a transliteration of the Greek,; psalterion; a lyre.

H6461.def: a primitive root; probably to disperse, i.e. (intransitive) disappear.

H6462.def: perhaps from H6461 (פָּסַס); dispersion; Pispah, an Israelite.

H6464.gloss: Pau or Pai, a place in Edom
H6464.def: or פָּעִי; from H6463 (פָּעָה); screaming; Pau or Pai, a place in Edom.

H6465.gloss: Peor, a mountain East of Jordan
H6465.def: from H6473 (פָּעַר); a gap; also H1187 (בַּעַל פְּעוֹר)); Peor, a mountain East of Jordan; Baal Peor,  (for a deity worshipped there.

H6466.gloss: to do or make (systematically and habitually)
H6466.def: a primitive root; to do or make (systematically and habitually), especially to practise.

H6467.def: from H6466 (פָּעַל); an act or work (concretely).
H6467.kjv: act, deed, do, getting, maker, work

H6468.def: feminine passive participle of H6466 (פָּעַל); (abstractly) work.

H6469.def: from H6468 (פְּעֻלָּה); laborious; Peullethai, an Israelite.

H6470.def: a primitive root; to tap, i.e. beat regularly; hence (generally) to impel or agitate.

H6471.def: or (feminine) פַּעֲמָה; from H6470 (פָּעַם); a stroke, literally or figuratively (in various applications, as follow).
H6471.kjv: anvil, corner, foot(-step), going, (hundred-) fold, now, (this) once, order, rank, step, thrice, (often-), second, this, two) time(-s), twice, wheel

H6473.gloss: to yawn, i.e. open wide (literally or figuratively)
H6473.def: a primitive root; to yawn, i.e. open wide (literally or figuratively).

H6474.def: from H6473 (פָּעַר); yawning; Paarai, an Israelite.

H6475.gloss: to rend, i.e. open (especially the mouth)
H6475.def: a primitive root; to rend, i.e. open (especially the mouth).

H6476.def: a primitive root; to break out (in joyful sound).
H6476.kjv: break (forth, forth into joy), make a loud noise

H6480.def: a primitive root; to rend (by earthquake).

H6481.def: a primitive root; to split, i.e. wound.

H6483.def: from an unused root meaning to dissever; dispersive; Pitstsets, a priest.

H6484.gloss: to peck at, i.e. (figuratively) stun or dull
H6484.def: a primitive root; to peck at, i.e. (figuratively) stun or dull.

H6485.gloss: to visit (with friendly or hostile intent)
H6485.def: a primitive root; to visit (with friendly or hostile intent); by analogy, to oversee, muster, charge, care for, miss, deposit, etc..
H6485.kjv: appoint, at all, avenge, bestow, (appoint to have the, give a) charge, commit, count, deliver to keep, be empty, enjoin, go see, hurt, do judgment, lack, lay up, look, make, by any means, miss, number, officer, (make) overseer, have (the) oversight, punish, reckon, (call to) remember(-brance), set (over), sum, surely, visit, want

H6486.def: feminine passive participle of H6485 (פָּקַד); visitation (in many senses, chiefly official).
H6486.kjv: account, (that have the) charge, custody, that which...laid up, numbers, office(-r), ordering, oversight, prison, reckoning, visitation

H6487.kjv: that which was delivered (to keep), store

H6489.gloss: Pekod, a symbolic name for Babylon
H6489.def: from H6485 (פָּקַד); punishment; Pekod, a symbolic name for Babylon.

H6490.def: or פִּקֻּד; from H6485 (פָּקַד); properly, appointed, i.e. a mandate (of God; plural only, collectively, for the Law).

H6491.gloss: to open (the senses, especially the eyes)
H6491.def: a primitive root; to open (the senses, especially the eyes); figuratively, to be observant.

H6492.def: from H6491 (פָּקַח); watch; Pekach, an Israelite king.

H6494.def: from H6491 (פָּקַח) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has observed; Pekachjah, an Israelite king.

H6495.def: from H6491 (פָּקַח) redoubled; opening (of a dungeon), i.e. jail-delivery (figuratively, salvation for sin).

H6496.def: from H6485 (פָּקַד); a superintendent (civil, military or religious).
H6496.kjv: which had the charge, governor, office, overseer, (that) was set

H6497.def: from an unused root meaning to burst; only used as an architectural term of an ornament similar to H6498 (פַּקֻּעָה),; a semi-globe.

H6498.gloss: the wild cucumber (from splitting open to shed its seeds)
H6498.def: from the same as H6497 (פֶּקַע); the wild cucumber (from splitting open to shed its seeds).

H6499.gloss: a bullock (apparently as breaking forth in wild strength
H6499.def: or פָּר; from H6565 (פָּרַר); a bullock (apparently as breaking forth in wild strength, or perhaps as dividing the hoof).

H6500.def: a primitive root; to bear fruit.

H6501.def: or פֶּרֶה; (Jeremiah 2:24), from H6500 (פָּרָא) in the secondary sense of running wild; the onager.

H6502.def: from H6501 (פֶּרֶא); wildly; Piram, a Canaanite.

H6503.gloss: Parbar or Parvar, a quarter of Jerusalem
H6503.def: or פַּרְוָר; of foreign origin; Parbar or Parvar, a quarter of Jerusalem.

H6504.gloss: to break through, i.e. spread or separate (oneself)
H6504.def: a primitive root; to break through, i.e. spread or separate (oneself).
H6504.kjv: disperse, divide, be out of joint, part, scatter (abroad), separate (self), sever self, stretch, sunder

H6505.gloss: a mule (perhaps from his lonely habits)
H6505.def: from H6504 (פָּרַד); a mule (perhaps from his lonely habits).

H6507.def: feminine passive participle of H6504 (פָּרַד); something separated, i.e. a kernel.

H6509.def: a primitive root; to bear fruit (literally or figuratively).
H6509.kjv: bear, bring forth (fruit), (be, cause to be, make) fruitful, grow, increase

H6511.def: the same as H6510 (פָּרָה); Parah, a place in Palestine.

H6512.def: from H6331 (פּוּר); a hole (as broken, i.e. dug).

H6513.def: for H6288 (פְּאֹרָה); foliage; Purah, an Israelite.

H6514.gloss: Peruda or Perida, one of 'Solomon's servants'
H6514.def: or פְּרִידָא; from H6504 (פָּרַד); dispersion; Peruda or Perida, one of 'Solomon's servants'.

H6515.def: passive participle of H6524 (פָּרַח); blossomed; Paruach, an Israelite.

H6516.def: of foreign origin; Parvajim, an Oriental region.

H6517.def: passive participle of H6565 (פָּרַר) in the sense of spreading out (compare H6524 (פָּרַח)); a skillet (as flat or deep).

H6518.def: from an unused root meaning to separate, i.e.; decide; a chieftain.

H6519.def: from the same as H6518 (פָּרָז); an open country.

H6520.def: from the same as H6518 (פָּרָז); magistracy, i.e. leadership (also concretely, chieftains).

H6521.def: or פְּרוֹזִי; from H6519 (פְּרָזָה); a rustic.

H6522.gloss: a Perizzite, one of the Canaanitish tribes
H6522.def: for H6521 (פְּרָזִי); inhabitant of the open country; a Perizzite, one of the Canaanitish tribes.

H6524.gloss: to break forth as a bud, i.e. bloom
H6524.def: a primitive root; to break forth as a bud, i.e. bloom; generally, to spread; specifically, to fly (as extending the wings); figuratively, to flourish.
H6524.kjv: abroad, abundantly, blossom, break forth (out), bud, flourish, make fly, grow, spread, spring (up)

H6525.def: from H6524 (פָּרַח); a calyx (natural or artificial); generally, bloom.

H6526.def: from H6524 (פָּרַח); progeny, i.e. a brood.

H6527.gloss: to scatter words, i.e. prate (or hum)
H6527.def: a primitive root; to scatter words, i.e. prate (or hum).

H6528.def: from H6527 (פָּרַט); a stray or single berry.

H6530.def: from H6555 (פָּרַץ)lemma פּרַץ missing vowel, corrected to פָּרַץ; violent, i.e. a tyrant.

H6531.def: from an unused root meaning to break apart; fracture, i.e. severity.

H6532.def: feminine active participle of the same as H6531 (פֶּרֶךְ); a separatrix, i.e. (the sacred) screen.

H6534.def: of Persian origin; Parmashta, a son of Haman.

H6535.def: of uncertain derivation; Parnak, an Israelite.

H6536.def: a primitive root; to break in pieces, i.e. (usually without violence) to split, distribute.
H6536.kjv: deal, divide, have hoofs, part, tear

H6537.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H6536 (פָּרַס); to split up.

H6538.def: from H6536 (פָּרַס); a claw; also a kind of eagle.

H6539.def: of foreign origin; Paras (i.e. Persia), an Eastern country, including its inhabitants.

H6540.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H6539 (פָּרַס); Paras (i.e. Persia), an Eastern country, including its inhabitants.

H6541.def: feminine of H6538 (פֶּרֶס); a claw or split hoof.

H6542.gloss: a Parsite (i.e. Persian), or inhabitant of Peres
H6542.def: patrial from H6539 (פָּרַס); a Parsite (i.e. Persian), or inhabitant of Peres.

H6543.gloss: a Parsite (i.e. Persian), or inhabitant of Peres
H6543.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H6542 (פַּרְסִי); a Parsite (i.e. Persian), or inhabitant of Peres.

H6544.def: a primitive root; to loosen; by implication, to expose, dismiss; figuratively, absolve, begin.
H6544.kjv: avenge, avoid, bare, go back, let, (make) naked, set at nought, perish, refuse, uncover

H6546.def: feminine of H6545 (פֶּרַע) (in the sense of beginning); leadership (plural concretely, leaders).

H6547.gloss: Paroh, a general title of Egyptian kings
H6547.def: of Egyptian derivation; Paroh, a general title of Egyptian kings.

H6548.def: of Egyptian derivation; Paroh-Chophra, an Egyptian king.

H6549.def: or פַּרְעֹה נְכוֹ; of Egyptian derivation; Paroh-Nekoh (or -Neko), an Egyptian king.

H6550.def: probably from H6544 (פָּרַע) and H6211 (עָשׁ); a flea (as the isolated insect).

H6551.gloss: Parosh, the name of our Israelite
H6551.def: the same as H6550 (פַּרְעֹשׁ); Parosh, the name of our Israelite.

H6552.def: from H6546 (פַּרְעָה); chieftaincy; Pirathon, a place in Palestine.

H6553.gloss: a Pirathonite or inhabitant of Pirathon
H6553.def: or פִּרְעָתֹנִי; patrial from H6552 (פִּרְעָתוֹן); a Pirathonite or inhabitant of Pirathon.

H6554.def: probably from H6565 (פָּרַר) in the sense of rushing; rapid; Parpar, a river of Syria.

H6555.def: a primitive root; to break out (in many applications, direct and indirect, literal and figurative).
H6555.kjv: abroad, (make a) breach, break (away, down, -er, forth, in, up), burst out, come (spread) abroad, compel, disperse, grow, increase, open, press, scatter, urge

H6556.def: from H6555 (פָּרַץ)lemma פּרַץ missing vowel, corrected to פָּרַץ; a break (literally or figuratively).

H6557.gloss: Perets, the name of two Israelites
H6557.def: the same as H6556 (פֶּרֶץ); Perets, the name of two Israelites.

H6558.gloss: a Partsite (collectively) or descendants of Perets
H6558.def: patronymically from H6557 (פֶּרֶץ); a Partsite (collectively) or descendants of Perets.

H6559.def: plural of H6556 (פֶּרֶץ); breaks; Peratsim, a mountain in Palestine.

H6560.def: from H6556 (פֶּרֶץ) and H5798 (עֻזָּא); break of Uzza; Perets-Uzza, a place in Palestine.

H6561.def: a primitive root; to break off or crunch; figuratively, to deliver.
H6561.kjv: break (off), deliver, redeem, rend (in pieces), tear in pieces

H6563.def: from H6561 (פָּרַק); rapine; also a fork (in roads).

H6564.def: from H6561 (פָּרַק); soup (as full of crumbed meat).

H6565.def: a primitive root; to break up (usually figuratively), i.e. to violate, frustrate.
H6565.kjv: any ways, break (asunder), cast off, cause to cease, clean, defeat, disannul, disappoint, dissolve, divide, make of none effect, fail, frustrate, bring (come) to nought, utterly, make void

H6566.def: a primitive root; to break apart, disperse, etc..
H6566.kjv: break, chop in pieces, lay open, scatter, spread (abroad, forth, selves, out), stretch (forth, out)

H6567.def: a primitive root; to separate, literally (to disperse) or figuratively (to specify); also (by implication) to wound.

H6570.def: the same as H6569 (פֶּרֶשׁ); Peresh, an Israelite.

H6571.gloss: a steed (as stretched out to a vehicle
H6571.def: from H6567 (פָּרָשׁ); (compare H5483 (סוּס)); a steed (as stretched out to a vehicle, not single nor for mounting ); also (by implication) a driver (in a chariot), i.e. (collectively) cavalry.

H6572.def: or פַּתְשֶׁגֶן; of foreign origin; a transcript.

H6574.def: perhaps by compounding H6567 (פָּרָשׁ) and H6504 (פָּרַד) (in the sense of straddling) (compare H6576 (פַּרְשֵׁז)); the crotch (or anus).

H6576.def: a root apparently formed by compounding H6567 (פָּרָשׁ) and that of H6518 (פָּרָז) (compare H6574 (פַּרְשְׁדֹן)); to expand.

H6577.def: of Persian origin; Parshandatha, a son of Haman.

H6578.gloss: Perath (i.e. Euphrates), a river of the East
H6578.def: from an unused root meaning to break forth; rushing; Perath (i.e. Euphrates), a river of the East.

H6580.gloss: stupidity (as a result of grossness or of degeneracy)
H6580.def: probably from an unused root meaning to disintegrate; stupidity (as a result of grossness or of degeneracy).

H6582.def: a primitive root; to tear in pieces.

H6583.gloss: Pashchur, the name of four Israelites
H6583.def: probably from H6582 (פָּשַׁח); liberation; Pashchur, the name of four Israelites.

H6584.gloss: to spread out (i.e. deploy in hostile array)
H6584.def: a primitive root; to spread out (i.e. deploy in hostile array); by analogy, to strip (i.e. unclothe, plunder, flay, etc.).
H6584.kjv: fall upon, flay, invade, make an invasion, pull off, put off, make a road, run upon, rush, set, spoil, spread selves (abroad), strip (off, self)

H6585.gloss: to stride (from spreading the legs), i.e. rush upon
H6585.def: a primitive root; to stride (from spreading the legs), i.e. rush upon.

H6586.def: a primitive root (identical with through the idea of expansion); to break away (from just authority), i.e. trespass, apostatize, quarrel.

H6588.def: from H6586 (פָּשַׁע); a revolt (national, moral or religious).

H6589.gloss: to dispart (the feet or lips), i.e. become licentious
H6589.def: a primitive root; to dispart (the feet or lips), i.e. become licentious.

H6593.def: from the same as H6580 (פַּשׁ) as in the sense of comminuting; linen (i.e. the thread, as carded).

H6594.def: feminine of H6593 (פִּשְׁתֶּה); flax; by implication, a wick.

H6596.gloss: a hole, i.e. hinge or the female pudenda
H6596.def: or פֹּתָה; (Ezekiel 13:19), from an unused root meaning to open; a hole, i.e. hinge or the female pudenda.

H6600.gloss: a word, answer, letter or decree
H6600.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H6599 (פִּתְגָּם); a word, answer, letter or decree.

H6601.gloss: to open, i.e. be (causatively, make) roomy
H6601.def: a primitive root; to open, i.e. be (causatively, make) roomy; usually figuratively (in a mental or moral sense) to be (causatively, make) simple or (in a sinister way) delude.
H6601.kjv: allure, deceive, enlarge, entice, flatter, persuade, silly (one)

H6602.def: from H6601 (פָּתָה) and H410 (אֵל); enlarged of God; Pethuel, an Israelite.

H6603.gloss: sculpture (in low or high relief or even intaglio)
H6603.def: or פִּתֻּחַ ; passive participle of H6605 (פָּתַח); sculpture (in low or high relief or even intaglio).

H6604.def: of foreign origin; Pethor, a place in Mesopotamia.

H6605.def: a primitive root; to open wide (literally or figuratively); specifically, to loosen, begin, plough, carve.
H6605.kjv: appear, break forth, draw (out), let go free, (en-) grave(-n), loose (self), (be, be set) open(-ing), put off, ungird, unstop, have vent

H6607.gloss: an opening (literally), i.e. door (gate) or entrance way
H6607.def: from H6605 (פָּתַח); an opening (literally), i.e. door (gate) or entrance way.
H6607.kjv: door, entering (in), entrance (-ry), gate, opening, place

H6609.gloss: something opened, i.e. a drawn sword
H6609.def: from H6605 (פָּתַח); something opened, i.e. a drawn sword.

H6611.gloss: Pethachjah, the name of four Israelites
H6611.def: from H6605 (פָּתַח) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has opened; Pethachjah, the name of four Israelites.

H6612.def: or פֶּתִי; or פְּתָאִי; from H6601 (פָּתָה); silly (i.e. seducible).

H6613.def: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to H6601 (פָּתָה); open, i.e. (as noun) width.

H6614.def: of uncertain derivation; probably a figured mantle forholidays.

H6616.kjv: bound, bracelet, lace, line, ribband, thread, wire

H6617.def: a primitive root; to twine, i.e. (literally) to struggle or (figuratively) be (morally) tortuous.
H6617.kjv: (shew self) froward, shew self unsavoury, wrestle

H6619.def: of Egyptian derivation; Pithom, a place in Egypt.

H6620.def: from an unused root meaning to twist; an asp (from its contortions).

H6621.def: from an unused root meaning to open (the eyes); (compare H6597 (פִּתְאוֹם)); a wink, i.e. moment(used only (with or without preposition) adverbially, quickly or unexpectedly.

H6622.gloss: to open up, i.e. (figuratively) interpret (a dream)
H6622.def: a primitive root; to open up, i.e. (figuratively) interpret (a dream).

H6623.def: or פִּתְרֹן; from H6622 (פָּתַר); interpretation (of a dream).

H6624.def: of Egyptian derivation; Pathros, a part of Egypt.

H6625.gloss: a Pathrusite, or inhabitant of Pathros
H6625.def: patrial from H6624 (פַּתְרוֹס); a Pathrusite, or inhabitant of Pathros.

H6626.def: a primitive root; to open, i.e. break.

H6628.def: from an unused root meaning to be slender; the lotus tree.

H6629.gloss: a collective name for a flock (of sheep or goats)
H6629.def: or צאוֹן; (Psalm 144:13), from an unused root meaning to migrate; a collective name for a flock (of sheep or goats); also figuratively (of men).

H6630.def: from the same as H6629 (צֹאן) used denominatively; sheep pasture; Zaanan, a place in Palestine.

H6631.def: from H3318 (יָצָא); issue, i.e. produce, children.

H6632.gloss: a palanquin or canopy (as a fixture)
H6632.def: from an unused root meaning to establish; a palanquin or canopy (as a fixture); also a species of lizard (probably as clinging fast).

H6633.def: a primitive root; to mass (an army or servants).
H6633.kjv: assemble, fight, perform, muster, wait upon, war

H6634.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H6623 (פִּתְרוֹן) in the figurative sense of summoning one's wishes; to please.

H6635.def: or (feminine) צְבָאָה; from H6633 (צָבָא); a mass of persons (or figuratively, things), especially reg. organized forwar (an army); by implication, a campaign, literally or figuratively (specifically, hardship, worship).
H6635.kjv: appointed time, ([phrase]) army, ([phrase]) battle, company, host, service, soldiers, waiting upon, war(-fare)

H6636.gloss: Tseboim or Tsebijim, a place in Palestine
H6636.def: or (more correctly) צְבִיִּים; or צְבִיִּם; plural of H6643 (צְבִי); gazelles; Tseboim or Tsebijim, a place in Palestine.

H6637.def: feminine active participle of the same as H6632 (צָב); the canopier (with the article); Tsobebah, an Israelitess.

H6638.def: a primitive root; to amass, i.e. grow turgid; specifically, to array an army against.

H6640.def: (Aramaic) from H6634 (צְבָא); properly, will; concretely, an affair (as a matter of determination).

H6641.def: passive participle of the same as H6648 (צֶבַע); dyed (in stripes), i.e. the hyena.

H6642.def: a primitive root; to grasp, i.e. hand out.

H6643.def: from H6638 (צָבָה) in the sense of prominence; splendor (as conspicuous); also a gazelle (as beautiful).

H6646.def: feminine of H6643 (צְבִי); a female gazelle.

H6647.def: (Aramaic) a root corresponding to that of H6648 (צֶבַע); to dip.

H6648.def: from an unused root meaning to dip (into coloring fluid); a dye.

H6649.def: from the same as H6648 (צֶבַע); variegated; Tsibon, an Idumaean.

H6650.def: plural of H6641 (צָבוּעַ); hyenas; Tseboim, a place in Palestine.

H6653.def: from an unused root apparently meaning to grip; a lock of stalks.

H6654.def: contr. from an unused root meaning to sidle off; a side; figuratively, an adversary.

H6655.gloss: used adverbially (with preposition) at or upon the side of
H6655.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H6654 (צַד); used adverbially (with preposition) at or upon the side of.

H6656.def: (Aramaic) from an unused root corresponding to H6658 (צָדָה) in the sense of intentness; a (sinister) design.

H6657.def: from the same as H6654 (צַד); a siding; Tsedad, a place near Palestine.

H6658.def: a primitive root; to chase; by implication, to desolate.

H6659.gloss: Tsadok, the name of eight or nine Israelites
H6659.def: from H6663 (צָדַק); just; Tsadok, the name of eight or nine Israelites.

H6661.gloss: Tsiddim (with the article), a place in Palestine
H6661.def: plural of H6654 (צַד); sides; Tsiddim (with the article), a place in Palestine.

H6663.def: a primitive root; to be (causatively, make) right (in a moral or forensic sense).
H6663.kjv: cleanse, clear self, (be, do) just(-ice, -ify, -ify self), (be turn to) righteous(-ness)

H6664.def: from H6663; the right (natural, moral or legal); also (abstractly) equity or (figuratively) prosperity.

H6666.def: from H6663 (צָדַק); rightness (abstractly), subjectively (rectitude), objectively (justice), morally (virtue) or figuratively (prosperity).

H6667.gloss: Tsidkijah, the name of six Israelites
H6667.def: or צִדְקִיָּהוּ; from H6664 (צֶדֶק) and H3050 (יָהּ); right of Jah; Tsidkijah, the name of six Israelites.

H6668.gloss: to glitter, i.e. be golden in color
H6668.def: a primitive root; to glitter, i.e. be golden in color.

H6670.def: a primitive root; to gleam, i.e. (figuratively) be cheerful; by transference to sound clear (of various animal or human expressions).
H6670.kjv: bellow, cry aloud (out), lift up, neigh, rejoice, make to shine, shout

H6671.def: a primitive root; to glisten; used only as denominative from H3323 (יִצְהָר),; to press out oil.

H6672.def: from H6671 (צָהַר); a light (i.e. window); dual double light, i.e. noon.

H6673.def: or צָו; from H6680 (צָוָה); an injunction.

H6674.def: or צֹא; from an unused root meaning to issue; soiled (as if excrementitious).

H6675.def: or צֹאָה ; feminine of H6674 (צוֹא); excrement; generally, dirt; figuratively, pollution.

H6676.gloss: the back of the neck (as that on which burdens are bound)
H6676.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H6677 (צַוָּאר); the back of the neck (as that on which burdens are bound).

H6677.gloss: the back of the neck (as that on which burdens are bound)
H6677.def: or צַוָּר; (Nehemiah 3:5), or צַוָּרֹןlemma צַוָּרן missing vowel, corrected to צַוָּרֹן; (Song of Solomon 4:9), or (feminine) צַוָּארָה; (Micah 2:3), intensively from H6696 (צוּר) in the sense of binding; the back of the neck (as that on which burdens are bound).

H6678.gloss: Zoba or Zobah, a region of Syria
H6678.def: or צוֹבָה; or צֹבָה; from an unused root meaning to station; a station; Zoba or Zobah, a region of Syria.

H6679.def: a primitive root; also denominative from H6718 (צַיִד); to lie alongside (i.e. in wait); by implication, to catch an animal (figuratively, men); to victual (for a journey).

H6680.def: a primitive root; (intensively) to constitute, enjoin.
H6680.kjv: appoint, (for-) bid, (give a) charge, (give a, give in, send with) command(-er, -ment), send a messenger, put, (set) in order

H6683.def: from an unused root meaning to sink; an abyss (of the sea).

H6684.gloss: to cover over (the mouth), i.e. to fast
H6684.def: a primitive root; to cover over (the mouth), i.e. to fast.

H6685.def: or צֹם; from H6684 (צוּם); a fast.

H6686.def: from H6819 (צָעַר); small; Tsuar, an Israelite.

H6688.def: from H6687 (צוּף); comb of honey (from dripping).

H6689.def: or צוֹפַי; or צִיף; from H6688 (צוּף); honey-comb; Tsuph or Tsophai or Tsiph, the name of an Israelite and of a place in Palestine.

H6690.def: from an unused root meaning to expand, breadth; Tsophach, an Israelite.

H6691.def: from H6852 (צָפַר); departing; Tsophar, a friend of Job.

H6692.def: a primitive root; to twinkle, i.e. glance; by analogy, to blossom (figuratively, flourish).

H6693.def: a primitive root; to compress, i.e. (figuratively) oppress, distress.
H6693.kjv: constrain, distress, lie sore, (op-) press(-or), straiten

H6694.gloss: to pour out, i.e. (figuratively) smelt, utter
H6694.def: a primitive root (identical with through the idea of narrowness (of orifice)); to pour out, i.e. (figuratively) smelt, utter.

H6695.def: or (feminine) צוּקָה; from H6693 (צוּק); a strait, i.e. (figuratively) distress.

H6696.def: a primitive root; to cramp, i.e. confine (in many applications, literally and figuratively, formative or hostile).
H6696.kjv: adversary, assault, beset, besiege, bind (up), cast, distress, fashion, fortify, inclose, lay siege, put up in bags

H6697.gloss: a cliff (or sharp rock, as compressed)
H6697.def: or צֻר; from H6696 (צוּר); properly, a cliff (or sharp rock, as compressed); generally, a rock or boulder; figuratively, a refuge; also an edge (as precipitous).
H6697.kjv: edge, (mighty) God (one), rock, sharp, stone, strength, strong. See also H1049 (בֵּית צוּר)

H6698.gloss: Tsur, the name of a Midianite and of an Israelite
H6698.def: the same as H6697 (צוּר); rock; Tsur, the name of a Midianite and of an Israelite.

H6699.def: feminine of H6697 (צוּר); a rock (Job 28:10); also a form (as if pressed out).

H6700.def: from H6697 (צוּר) and H410 (אֵל); rock of God; Tsuriel, an Israelite.

H6701.def: from H6697 (צוּר) and H7706 (שַׁדַּי); rock of (the) Almighty; Tsurishaddai, an Israelite.

H6703.def: from H6705 (צָחַח); dazzling, i.e. sunny, bright, (figuratively) evident.

H6704.def: from an unused root meaning to glow; parched.

H6705.gloss: to glare, i.e. be dazzling white
H6705.def: a primitive root; to glare, i.e. be dazzling white.

H6706.gloss: glaring, i.e. exposed to the bright sun
H6706.def: from H6705 (צָחַח); glaring, i.e. exposed to the bright sun.

H6707.gloss: a parched region, i.e. the desert
H6707.def: feminine of H6706 (צְחִיחַ); a parched region, i.e. the desert.

H6708.gloss: bare spot, i.e. in the glaring sun
H6708.def: from H6706 (צְחִיחַ); bare spot, i.e. in the glaring sun.

H6709.def: from an unused root meaning to putrefy; stench.

H6710.def: from H6705 (צָחַח); a dry place, i.e. desert.

H6711.gloss: to laugh outright (in merriment or scorn)
H6711.def: a primitive root; to laugh outright (in merriment or scorn); by implication, to sport.

H6712.def: from H6711 (צָחַק); laughter (in pleasure or derision).

H6713.def: from an unused root meaning to dazzle; sheen, i.e. whiteness.

H6714.gloss: Tsochar, the name of a Hittite and of an Israelite
H6714.def: from the same as H6713 (צַחַר); whiteness; Tsochar, the name of a Hittite and of an Israelite.

H6715.def: from the same as H6713 (צַחַר); white.

H6716.def: from H6680 (צָוָה); a ship (as a fixture).

H6717.def: from the same as H6678 (צוֹבָא); station; Tsiba, an Israelite.

H6718.def: from a form of H6679 (צוּד) and meaning the same; the chase; also game (thus taken); (generally) lunch (especially for a journey).
H6718.kjv: catcheth, food, hunter, (that which he took in) hunting, venison, victuals

H6719.def: from the same as H6718 (צַיִד); a huntsman.

H6720.def: or צֵדָה; feminine of H6718 (צַיִד); food.

H6721.def: or צִידֹן; from H6679 (צוּד) in the sense of catching fish; fishery; Tsidon, the name of a son of Canaan, and of a place in Palestine.

H6722.gloss: a Tsidonian or inhabitant of Tsidon
H6722.def: patrial from H6721 (צִידוֹן); a Tsidonian or inhabitant of Tsidon.

H6723.def: from an unused root meaning to parch; aridity; concretely, a desert.
H6723.kjv: barren, drought, dry (land, place), solitary place, wilderness

H6724.def: from the same as H6723 (צִיָּה); a desert.

H6725.def: from the same as H6723 (צִיָּה) in the sense of conspicuousness (compare H5329 (נָצַח)); a monumental or guiding pillar.

H6726.gloss: Tsijon (as a permanent capital), a mountain of Jerusalem
H6726.def: the same (regularly) as H6725 (צִיּוּן)lemma צִיוּן missing dagesh, corrected to צִיּוּן; Tsijon (as a permanent capital), a mountain of Jerusalem.

H6727.gloss: Tsicha, the name of two Nethinim
H6727.def: or צִחָא; as if feminine of H6704 (צִחֶה); drought; Tsicha, the name of two Nethinim.

H6728.gloss: a desert-dweller, i.e. nomad or wild beast
H6728.def: from the same as H6723 (צִיָּה); a desert-dweller, i.e. nomad or wild beast.
H6728.kjv: wild beast of the desert, that dwell in (inhabiting) the wilderness

H6729.def: from an unused root meaning to confine; the pillory.

H6730.def: from H6819 (צָעַר); small; Tsior, a place in Palestine.

H6731.def: or צִץ; from H6692 (צוּץ); properly, glistening, i.e. a burnished plate; also a flower (as bright-colored); a wing (as gleaming in the air).

H6732.def: the same as H6731 (צִיץ); bloom; Tsits, a place in Palestine.

H6734.def: feminine of H6731 (צִיץ); a floral or wing-like projection, i.e. a forelock of hair, a tassel.

H6735.def: from H6696 (צוּר); a hinge (as pressed in turning); also a throe (as a phys. or mental pressure); also a herald or erranddoer (as constrained by the principal).
H6735.kjv: ambassador, hinge, messenger, pain, pang, sorrow. Compare H6736 (צִיר)

H6736.def: the same as H6735 (צִיר); a form (of beauty; as if pressed out, i.e. carved); hence, an (idolatrous) image.

H6737.gloss: to make an errand, i.e. betake oneself
H6737.def: a denominative from H6735 (צִיר) in the sense of ambassador; to make an errand, i.e. betake oneself.

H6738.def: from H6751 (צָלַל); shade, whether literal or figurative.

H6739.def: (Aramaic) probably corresponding to H6760 (צָלַע) in the sense of bowing; pray.

H6741.def: feminine of H6738 (צֵל); Tsillah, an antediluvian woman.

H6742.def: from H6749 (צָלַל) in the sense of rolling; a (round or flattened) cake.

H6743.def: or צָלֵחַ; a primitive root; to push forward, in various senses (literal or figurative, transitive or intransitive).
H6743.kjv: break out, come (mightily), go over, be good, be meet, be profitable, (cause to, effect, make to, send) prosper(-ity, -ous, -ously)

H6744.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H6743 (צָלַח); to advance (transitive or intransitive).

H6745.gloss: something protracted or flattened out, i.e. a platter
H6745.def: from H6743 (צָלַח); something protracted or flattened out, i.e. a platter.

H6746.gloss: something prolonged or tall, i.e. a vial or salt-cellar
H6746.def: from H6743 (צָלַח); something prolonged or tall, i.e. a vial or salt-cellar.

H6747.gloss: something advanced or deep, i.e. a bowl
H6747.def: from H6743 (צָלַח); something advanced or deep, i.e. a bowl; figuratively, the bosom.

H6749.gloss: to tumble down, i.e. settle by awaving motion
H6749.def: a primitive root; properly, to tumble down, i.e. settle by awaving motion.

H6750.def: a primitive root (identical with through the idea of vibration); to tinkle, i.e. rattle together (as the ears in reddening with shame, or the teeth in chattering with fear).

H6751.gloss: to shade, as twilight or an opaque object
H6751.def: a primitive root (identical with through the idea of hovering over (compare H6754 (צֶלֶם))); to shade, as twilight or an opaque object.

H6753.def: from H6752 (צֵלֶל) and the active participle of H6437 (פָּנָה); shade-facing; Tselelponi, an Israelitess.

H6754.def: from an unused root meaning to shade; a phantom, i.e. (figuratively) illusion, resemblance; hence, a representative figure, especially an idol.

H6755.def: (Aramaic) or צְלֶם; (Aramaic), corresponding to H6754 (צֶלֶם); an idolatrous figure.

H6756.def: from H6754 (צֶלֶם); shady; Tsalmon, the name of a place in Palestine and of an Israelite.

H6757.gloss: shade of death, i.e. the grave (figuratively, calamity)
H6757.def: from H6738 (צֵל) and H4194 (מָוֶת); shade of death, i.e. the grave (figuratively, calamity).

H6758.gloss: Tsalmonah, a place in the Desert
H6758.def: feminine of H6757 (צַלְמָוֶת); shadiness; Tsalmonah, a place in the Desert.

H6759.def: from H6738 (צֵל) and H4513 (מָנַע); shade has been denied; Tsalmunna, a Midianite.

H6760.def: a primitive root; probably to curve; used only as denominative from H6763 (צֵלָע),; to limp (as if one-sided).

H6761.def: from H6760 (צָלַע); a limping or full (figuratively).

H6762.def: the same as H6761 (צֶלַע); Tsela, a place in Palestine.

H6763.def: or (feminine) צַלְעָה; from H6760 (צָלַע); a rib (as curved), literally (of the body) or figuratively (of a door, i.e. leaf); hence, a side, literally (of a person) or figuratively (of an object or the sky, i.e. quarter); architecturally, a (especially floor or ceiling) timber or plank (single or collective, i.e. a flooring).
H6763.kjv: beam, board, chamber, corner, leaf, plank, rib, side (chamber)

H6764.def: from an unused root of unknown meaning; Tsalaph, an Israelite.

H6765.def: from the same as H6764 (צָלָף) and H259 (אֶחָד); Tselophchad, an Israelite.

H6766.def: from H6738 (צֵל) and H6703 (צַח); clear shade; Tseltsach, a place in Palestine.

H6767.def: from H6750 (צָלַל) reduplicated; a clatter, i.e. (abstractly) whirring (of wings); (concretely) a cricket; also a harpoon (as rattling), a cymbal (as clanging).

H6768.def: from an unused root meaning to split; fissure; Tselek, an Israelite.

H6769.gloss: Tsillethai, the name of two Israelites
H6769.def: from the feminine of H6738 (צֵל); shady; Tsillethai, the name of two Israelites.

H6770.def: a primitive root; to thirst (literally or figuratively).

H6773.def: feminine of H6772 (צָמָא); thirst (figuratively, of libidinousnes).

H6774.def: from H6771 (צָמֵא); a thirsty place, i.e. desert.

H6775.def: a primitive root; to link, i.e. gird; figuratively, to serve, (mentally) contrive.

H6776.def: a yoke or team (i.e. pair); hence, an acre (i.e. day's task for a yoke of cattle to plough).
H6776.kjv: acre, couple, together, two (donkeys), yoke (of oxen)

H6777.def: from an unused root meaning to fasten on; a veil.

H6778.def: from H6784 (צָמַק); a cake of dried grapes.

H6779.def: a primitive root; to sprout (transitive or intransitive, literal or figurative).
H6779.kjv: bear, bring forth, (cause to, make to) bud (forth), (cause to, make to) grow (again, up), (cause to) spring (forth, up)

H6780.gloss: a sprout (usually concrete), literal or figurative
H6780.def: from H6779 (צָמַח); a sprout (usually concrete), literal or figurative.
H6780.kjv: branch, bud, that which (where) grew (upon), spring(-ing)

H6781.def: or צָמִד; from H6775 (צָמַד); a bracelet or arm-clasp; generally, a lid.

H6782.def: from the same as H6777 (צַמָּה); a noose (as fastening); figuratively, destruction.

H6783.def: or צְמִתֻת; from H6789 (צָמַת); excision, i.e. destruction; used only (adverbially) with prepositional prefix to extinction, i.e. perpetually.

H6784.def: a primitive root; to dry up.

H6785.def: from an unused root probably meaning to be shaggy; wool.

H6786.gloss: a Tsemarite or branch of the Canaanites
H6786.def: patrial from an unused name of a place in Palestine; a Tsemarite or branch of the Canaanites.

H6787.def: dual of H6785 (צֶמֶר); double fleece; Tsemarajim, a place in Palestine.

H6788.def: from the same as H6785 (צֶמֶר); fleeciness, i.e. foliage.

H6789.def: a primitive root; to extirpate (literally or figuratively).

H6790.gloss: Tsin, a part of the Desert
H6790.def: from an unused root meaning to prick; a crag; Tsin, a part of the Desert.

H6791.def: from an unused root meaning to be prickly; a thorn; hence, a cactus-hedge.

H6792.def: or צֹנֶה; for H6629 (צֹאן); a flock.

H6793.def: feminine of H6791 (צֵן); a hook (as pointed); also a (large) shield (as if guarding by prickliness); also cold (as piercing).

H6794.def: from an unused root perhaps meaning to be hollow; a culvert.

H6795.def: a primitive root; to alight; (transitive) to cause to descend, i.e. drive down.

H6796.def: or צָנִן; from the same as H6791 (צֵן); a thorn.

H6797.gloss: a head-dress (i.e. piece of cloth wrapped around)
H6797.def: or צָנוֹף; or (feminine) צָנִיפָה; from H6801 (צָנַף); a head-dress (i.e. piece of cloth wrapped around).

H6798.def: a primitive root; to blast or shrink.

H6799.def: probably for H6630 (צַאֲנָן); Tsenan, a place near Palestine.

H6801.gloss: to wrap, i.e. roll or dress
H6801.def: a primitive root; to wrap, i.e. roll or dress.

H6803.gloss: a vase (probably a vial tapering at the top)
H6803.def: from the same as H6791 (צֵן); a vase (probably a vial tapering at the top).

H6804.def: probably from the same as H6794 (צִנּוּר); a tube.

H6805.def: a primitive root; to pace, i.e. step regularly; (upward) to mount; (along) to march; (down and causatively) to hurl.

H6806.def: from H6804 (צַנְתָּרָה); a pace or regular step.

H6807.def: feminine of H6806 (צַעַד); a march; (concretely) an (ornamental) ankle-chain.

H6808.gloss: to tip over (for the purpose of spilling or pouring out)
H6808.def: a primitive root; to tip over (for the purpose of spilling or pouring out), i.e. (figuratively) depopulate; by implication, to imprison or conquer; (reflexive) to lie down (for coitus).

H6809.def: from an unused root meaning to wrap over; a veil.

H6810.def: or צָעוֹר; from H6819 (צָעַר); little; (in number) few; (in age) young, (in value) ignoble.

H6811.def: the same as H6810 (צָעִיר); Tsair, a place in Idumaea.

H6812.def: feminine of H6810 (צָעִיר); smallness (of age), i.e. juvenility.

H6813.gloss: to load up (beasts), i.e. to migrate
H6813.def: a primitive root; to load up (beasts), i.e. to migrate.

H6814.def: of Egyptian derivation; Tsoan, a place in Egypt.

H6815.gloss: Tsaanannim or Tsaanajim, a place in Palestine
H6815.def: or (dual) צַעֲנַיִם; plural from H6813 (צָעַן); removals; Tsaanannim or Tsaanajim, a place in Palestine.

H6816.def: from an unused root meaning to bestrew with carvings; sculpture.

H6817.def: a primitive root; to shriek; (by implication) to proclaim (an assembly).
H6817.kjv: at all, call together, cry (out), gather (selves) (together)

H6819.def: a primitive root; to be small, i.e. (figuratively) ignoble.
H6819.kjv: be brought low, little one, be small

H6820.gloss: Tsoar, a place East of the Jordan
H6820.def: from H6819 (צָעַר); little; Tsoar, a place East of the Jordan.

H6822.gloss: to lean forward, i.e. to peer into the distance
H6822.def: a primitive root; properly, to lean forward, i.e. to peer into the distance; by implication, to observe, await.
H6822.kjv: behold, espy, look up (well), wait for, (keep the) watch(-man)

H6823.def: a primitive root (probably identical with H6822 (צָפָה) through the idea of expansion in outlook, transferring to action); to sheet over (especially with metal).

H6825.def: or צְפִי; from H6822 (צָפָה); observant; Tsepho or Tsephi, an Idumaean.

H6827.def: probably for H6837 (צִפְיוֹן); Tsephon, an Israelite.

H6828.def: or צָפֹן; from H6845 (צָפַן); properly, hidden, i.e. dark; used only of the north as aquarter (gloomy and unknown).

H6829.def: the same as H6828 (צָפוֹן); boreal; Tsaphon, a place in Palestine.

H6831.gloss: a Tsephonite, or (collectively) descendants of Tsephon
H6831.def: patronymically from H6827 (צְפוֹן); a Tsephonite, or (collectively) descendants of Tsephon.

H6832.def: from the same as H6848 (צֶפַע); excrement (as protruded).

H6833.def: or צִפֹּר; from H6852 (צָפַר); a little bird (as hopping).

H6834.def: the same as H6833 (צִפּוֹר); Tsippor, a Moabite.

H6835.def: from an unused root meaning to expand; a saucer (as flat).

H6837.def: from H6822 (צָפָה); watch-tower; Tsiphjon, an Israelite.

H6838.def: from the same as H6835 (צַפַּחַת); a flat thin cake.

H6839.gloss: Tsophim, a place East of the Jordan
H6839.def: plural of active participle of H6822 (צָפָה); watchers; Tsophim, a place East of the Jordan.

H6842.def: from H6852 (צָפַר); a male goat (as prancing).

H6843.def: feminine formed like H6842 (צָפִיר); a crown (as encircling the head); also a turn of affairs (i.e. mishap).

H6845.def: a primitive root; to hide (by covering over); by implication, to hoard or reserve; figuratively to deny; specifically (favorably) to protect, (unfavorably) to lurk.
H6845.kjv: esteem, hide(-den one, self), lay up, lurk (be set) privily, (keep) secret(-ly, place)

H6846.gloss: Tsephanjah, the name of four Israelites
H6846.def: or צְפַנְיָהוּ; from H6845 (צָפַן) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has secreted; Tsephanjah, the name of four Israelites.

H6847.def: of Egyptian derivation; Tsophnath-Paneach, Joseph's Egyptian name.

H6848.gloss: a viper (as thrusting out the tongue, i.e. hissing)
H6848.def: from an unused root meaning to extrude; a viper (as thrusting out the tongue, i.e. hissing).

H6849.def: feminine from the same as H6848 (צֶפַע); an outcast thing.

H6850.gloss: to coo or chirp (as a bird)
H6850.def: a primitive root; to coo or chirp (as a bird).

H6851.gloss: a willow (as growing in overflowed places)
H6851.def: from H6687 (צוּף); a willow (as growing in overflowed places).

H6852.def: a primitive root; to skip about, i.e. return.

H6854.def: from H6852 (צָפַר) and a word elsewhere unused meaning a swamp; a marsh-leaper, i.e. frog.

H6855.def: feminine of H6833 (צִפּוֹר); bird; Tsipporah, Moses' wife.

H6856.def: from H6852 (צָפַר) (in the denominative sense (from H6833 (צִפּוֹר)) of scratching); properly, a claw, i.e. (human) nail; also the point of astyle (or pen, tipped with adamant).

H6857.def: from H6822 (צָפָה); watch-tower; Tsephath, a place in Palestine.

H6858.def: from an unused root meaning to encircle; a capital of a column.

H6859.def: the same as H6857 (צְפַת); Tsephathah, a place in Palestine.

H6860.gloss: Tsiklag or Tsikelag, a place in Palestine
H6860.def: or צִיקלַג; (1 Chronicles 12:1,20), of uncertain derivation; Tsiklag or Tsikelag, a place in Palestine.

H6861.gloss: a sack (as tied at the mouth)
H6861.def: from an unused root meaning to wind; a sack (as tied at the mouth).

H6862.def: or צָר; from H6887 (צָרַר); compare as in H6864 (צֹר); narrow; (as a noun) a tight place (usually figuratively, i.e. trouble); also a pebble ; (transitive) an opponent (as crowding).
H6862.kjv: adversary, afflicted(-tion), anguish, close, distress, enemy, flint, foe, narrow, small, sorrow, strait, tribulation, trouble

H6863.def: from H6887 (צָרַר); rock; Tser, a place in Palestine.

H6864.gloss: a stone (as if pressed hard or to a point)
H6864.def: from H6696 (צוּר); a stone (as if pressed hard or to a point); (by implication, of use) a knife.

H6865.def: or צוֹר; the same as H6864 (צֹר); a rock; Tsor, a place in Palestine.

H6867.def: from H6686 (צוּעָר); conflagration (of fire or disease).

H6868.def: or צְרֵדָתָה; apparently from an unused root meaning to pierce; puncture; Tseredah, a place in Palestine.

H6869.def: feminine of H6862 (צַר); tightness (i.e. figuratively, trouble); transitively, a female rival:.
H6869.kjv: adversary, adversity, affliction, anguish, distress, tribulation, trouble

H6870.def: feminine passive participle from the same as H6875 (צְרִי); wounded; Tserujah, an Israelitess.

H6871.def: feminine passive participle of H6879 (צָרַע); leprous; Tseruah, an Israelitess.

H6872.def: or (shorter) צְרֹר; from H6887 (צָרַר); a parcel (as packed up); also a kernel or particle (as if a package).
H6872.kjv: bag, bendeth, bundle, least grain, small stone

H6873.gloss: to be clear (in tone, i.e. shrill), i.e. to whoop
H6873.def: a primitive root; to be clear (in tone, i.e. shrill), i.e. to whoop.

H6874.def: the same as H6875 (צְרִי); Tseri, an Israelite.

H6875.def: or צֳרִי; from an unused root meaning to crack (as by pressure), hence, to leak; distillation, i.e. balsam.

H6876.gloss: a Tsorite or inhabitant of Tsor (i.e. Syrian)
H6876.def: patrial from H6865 (צֹר); a Tsorite or inhabitant of Tsor (i.e. Syrian).

H6877.def: from H6873 (צָרַח) in the sense of clearness of vision; a citadel.

H6878.def: from an unused root meaning to need; need.

H6879.def: a primitive root; to scourge, i.e. (intransitive and figurative) to be stricken with leprosy.

H6881.def: apparently another form for H6880 (צִרְעָה); Tsorah, a place in Palestine.

H6882.gloss: a Tsorite or Tsorathite, i.e. inhabitants of Tsorah
H6882.def: or צׇרְעָתִי; patrial from H6881 (צׇרְעָה); a Tsorite or Tsorathite, i.e. inhabitants of Tsorah.

H6884.gloss: to fuse (metal), i.e. refine (literally or figuratively)
H6884.def: a primitive root; to fuse (metal), i.e. refine (literally or figuratively).
H6884.kjv: cast, (re-) fine(-er), founder, goldsmith, melt, pure, purge away, try

H6885.def: from H6884 (צָרַף); refiner; Tsorephi (with the article), an Israelite.

H6886.def: from H6884 (צָרַף); refinement; Tsarephath, a place in Palestine.

H6887.def: a primitive root; to cramp, literally or figuratively, transitive or intransitive.
H6887.kjv: adversary, (be in) afflict(-ion), beseige, bind (up), (be in, bring) distress, enemy, narrower, oppress, pangs, shut up, be in a strait (trouble), vex

H6888.def: apparently by erroneous transcription for H6868 (צְרֵדָה); Tsererah for Tseredah.

H6889.def: perhaps from H6671 (צָהַר); splendor; Tsereth, an Israelite.

H6890.def: from the same as H6889 (צֶרֶת) and H7837 (שַׁחַר) with the article interposed; splendor of the dawn; Tsereth-hash-Shachar, a place in Palestine.

H6891.def: perhaps for H6868 (צְרֵדָה); Tsarethan, a place in Palestine.

H6893.def: from H6958 (קוֹא); probably the pelican (from vomiting).

H6894.gloss: a hollow, i.e. vessel used as a (dry) measure
H6894.def: from H6895 (קָבַב); a hollow, i.e. vessel used as a (dry) measure.

H6895.def: a primitive root; to scoop out, i.e. (figuratively) to malign or execrate (i.e. stab with words).

H6896.gloss: the paunch (as a cavity) or first stomach of ruminants
H6896.def: from H6895 (קָבַב); the paunch (as a cavity) or first stomach of ruminants.

H6897.def: from H6895 (קָבַב); the abdomen (as a cavity).
