H6898.def: from H6895 (קָבַב); a pavilion (as a domed cavity).

H6900.def: or קְבֻרָה; feminine passive participle of H6912 (קָבַר); sepulture; (concretely) a sepulchre.

H6901.gloss: to admit, i.e. take (literally or figuratively)
H6901.def: a primitive root; to admit, i.e. take (literally or figuratively).

H6903.def: (Aramaic) or קֳבֵל; (Aramaic), (corresponding to H6905 (קָבָל); (adverbially) in front of; usually (with other particles) on account of, so as, since, hence.
H6903.kjv: according to, as, because, before, for this cause, forasmuch as, by this means, over against, by reason of, that, therefore, though, wherefore

H6904.def: from H6901 (קָבַל) in the sense of confronting (as standing opposite in order to receive); a battering-ram.

H6905.gloss: the presence, i.e. (adverbially) in front of
H6905.def: from H6901 (קָבַל) in the sense of opposite (see H6904 (קֹבֶל)); the presence, i.e. (adverbially) in front of.

H6906.def: a primitive root; to cover, i.e. (figuratively) defraud.

H6907.gloss: a goblet (as deep like a cover)
H6907.def: from H6906 (קָבַע); a goblet (as deep like a cover).

H6908.def: a primitive root; to grasp, i.e. collect.
H6908.kjv: assemble (selves), gather (bring) (together, selves together, up), heap, resort, surely, take up

H6909.def: from H6908 (קָבַץ) and H410 (אֵל); God has gathered; Kabtseel, a place in Palestine.

H6910.def: feminine passive participle of H6908 (קָבַץ); a hoard.

H6911.def: dual from H6908 (קָבַץ); a double heap; Kibtsajim, a place in Palestine.

H6913.def: or (feminine) קִבְרָה; from H6912 (קָבַר); a sepulchre.

H6914.gloss: Kibroth-hat-Taavh, a place in the Desert
H6914.def: from the feminine plural of H6913 (קֶבֶר) and H8378 (תַּאֲוָה) with the article interposed; graves of the longing; Kibroth-hat-Taavh, a place in the Desert.

H6915.def: a primitive root; to shrivel up, i.e. contract or bend the body (or neck) in deference.

H6916.def: from H6915 (קָדַד); cassia bark (as in shrivelled rolls).

H6917.def: passive participle of H6923 (קָדַם); a pristine hero.

H6918.def: from H6942; sacred (ceremonially or morally); (as noun) God (by eminence), an angel, a saint.

H6919.def: a primitive root to inflame; to inflame.

H6920.def: from H6919 (קָדַח); inflammation, i.e. febrile disease.

H6921.def: or קָדִם; from H6923 (קָדַם); the fore or front part; hence (by orientation) the East (often adverbially, eastward, for brevity the east wind).

H6922.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H6918 (קָדוֹשׁ).; sacred (ceremonially or morally); (as noun) God (by eminence), an angel, a saint, a sanctuary.

H6923.def: a primitive root; to project (one self), i.e. precede; hence, to anticipate, hasten, meet (usually for help).

H6924.def: or קֵדְמָה; from H6923 (קָדַם); the front, of place (absolutely, the fore part, relatively the East) or time (antiquity); often used adverbially (before, anciently, eastward).
H6924.kjv: aforetime, ancient (time), before, east (end, part, side, -ward), eternal, ever(-lasting), forward, old, past. Compare H6926 (קִדְמָה)

H6925.def: (Aramaic) or קְדָם; (Aramaic) (Daniel 7:13), corresponding to H6924 (קֶדֶם); before.
H6925.kjv: before, from, I (thought), me, of, it pleased, presence

H6926.gloss: the forward part (or relatively) East (often adverbially
H6926.def: feminine of H6924 (קֶדֶם); the forward part (or relatively) East (often adverbially, on the east or in front).

H6927.def: from H6923 (קָדַם); priority (in time); also used adverbially (before).

H6929.def: from H6923 (קָדַם); precedence; Kedemah, a son of Ishmael.

H6931.def: or קַדְמֹנִי; from H6930 (קַדְמוֹן); (of time) anterior or (of place) oriental.
H6931.kjv: ancient, they that went before, east, (thing of) old

H6932.gloss: Kedemoth, a place in eastern Palestine
H6932.def: from H6923 (קָדַם); beginnings; Kedemoth, a place in eastern Palestine.

H6933.def: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to H6923 (קָדַם); first.

H6934.gloss: Kadmiel, the name of three Israelites
H6934.def: from H6924 (קֶדֶם) and H410 (אֵל); presence of God; Kadmiel, the name of three Israelites.

H6935.gloss: Kadmonite (collectively), the name of a tribe in Palestine
H6935.def: the same as H6931 (קַדְמוֹנִי); ancient, i.e. aboriginal; Kadmonite (collectively), the name of a tribe in Palestine.

H6936.gloss: the crown of the head (as the part most bowed)
H6936.def: from H6915 (קָדַד); the crown of the head (as the part most bowed).
H6936.kjv: crown (of the head), pate, scalp, top of the head

H6937.def: a primitive root; to be ashy, i.e. darkcolored; by implication, to mourn (in sackcloth or sordid garments).
H6937.kjv: be black(-ish), be (make) dark(-en), heavily, (cause to) mourn

H6938.def: from H6937 (קָדַר); dusky (of the skin or the tent); Kedar, a son of Ishmael; also (collectively) Bedouin (as his descendants or representatives).

H6939.def: from H6937 (קָדַר); dusky place; Kidron, a brook near Jerusalem.

H6941.def: adverb from H6937 (קָדַר); blackish ones (i.e. in sackcloth); used adverbially, in mourning weeds.

H6942.def: a primitive root; to be (causatively, make, pronounce or observe as) clean (ceremonially or morally).
H6942.kjv: appoint, bid, consecrate, dedicate, defile, hallow, (be, keep) holy(-er, place), keep, prepare, proclaim, purify, sanctify(-ied one, self), wholly

H6943.gloss: Kedesh, the name of four places in Palestine
H6943.def: from H6942 (קָדַשׁ); a sanctum; Kedesh, the name of four places in Palestine.

H6944.def: from H6942 (קָדַשׁ); a sacred place or thing; rarely abstract, sanctity.
H6944.kjv: consecrated (thing), dedicated (thing), hallowed (thing), holiness, (most) holy (day, portion, thing), saint, sanctuary

H6945.def: from H6942 (קָדַשׁ); a (quasi) sacred person, i.e. (technically) a (male) devotee (by prostitution) to licentious idolatry.

H6946.gloss: Kadesh, a place in the Desert
H6946.def: the same as H6945 (קָדֵשׁ); sanctuary; Kadesh, a place in the Desert.

H6947.gloss: Kadesh-Barnea, a place in the Desert
H6947.def: from the same as H6946 (קָדֵשׁ) and an otherwise unused word (apparently compounded of a correspondent to H1251 (בַּר) and a derivative of H5128 (נוּעַ)) meaning desert of a fugitive; Kadesh of (the) Wilderness of Wandering; Kadesh-Barnea, a place in the Desert.

H6948.def: feminine of H6945 (קָדֵשׁ); a female devotee (i.e. prostitute).

H6949.def: a primitive root; to be dull.
H6949.kjv: be set on edge, be blunt

H6953.def: feminine of active participle from H6950 (קָהַל); a (female) assembler (i.e. lecturer); abstractly, preaching (used as a 'nom de plume', Koheleth).

H6954.gloss: Kehelathah, a place in the Desert
H6954.def: from H6950 (קָהַל); convocation; Kehelathah, a place in the Desert.

H6955.def: from an unused root meaning to ally oneself; allied; Kehath, an Israelite.

H6956.gloss: a Kohathite (collectively) or descendants of Kehath
H6956.def: patronymically from H6955 (קְהָת); a Kohathite (collectively) or descendants of Kehath.

H6957.def: or קָו; from H6960 (קָוָה) (compare H6961 (קָוֶה)); a cord (as connecting), especially formeasuring; figuratively, a rule; also a rim, a musical string or accord.
H6957.kjv: line. Compare H6978 (קַו־קַו)lemma קַו־קַי yod, corrected to קַו־קַו

H6958.def: or קָיָה; (Jeremiah 25:27), a primitive root; to vomit.

H6959.def: a form collateral to H3553 (כּוֹבַע); a helmet.

H6960.gloss: to bind together (perhaps by twisting), i.e. collect
H6960.def: a primitive root; to bind together (perhaps by twisting), i.e. collect; (figuratively) to expect.
H6960.kjv: gather (together), look, patiently, tarry, wait (for, on, upon)

H6961.def: from H6960 (קָוָה); a (measuring) cord (as if for binding).

H6962.def: a primitive root; properly, to cut off, i.e. (figuratively) detest.

H6963.def: or קֹל; from an unused root meaning to call aloud; a voice or sound.
H6963.kjv: aloud, bleating, crackling, cry (out), fame, lightness, lowing, noise, hold peace, (pro-) claim, proclamation, sing, sound, spark, thunder(-ing), voice, yell

H6964.gloss: Kolajah, the name of two Israelites
H6964.def: from H6963 (קוֹל) and H3050 (יָהּ); voice of Jah; Kolajah, the name of two Israelites.

H6965.def: a primitive root; to rise (in various applications, literal, figurative, intensive and causative).
H6965.kjv: abide, accomplish, be clearer, confirm, continue, decree, be dim, endure, enemy, enjoin, get up, make good, help, hold, (help to) lift up (again), make, but newly, ordain, perform, pitch, raise (up), rear (up), remain, (a-) rise (up) (again, against), rouse up, set (up), (e-) stablish, (make to) stand (up), stir up, strengthen, succeed, (as-, make) sure(-ly), (be) up(-hold, -rising)

H6966.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H6965 (קוּם); to rise (in various applications, literal, figurative, intensive and causative).
H6966.kjv: appoint, establish, make, raise up self, (a-) rise (up), (make to) stand, set (up)

H6969.gloss: to strike a musical note, i.e. chant or wail (at a funeral)
H6969.def: a primitive root; to strike a musical note, i.e. chant or wail (at a funeral).

H6970.def: probably from H6972 (קוּץ) in the original sense of cutting off; curtailment; Koa, a region of Babylon.

H6971.def: or קֹף; of foreign origin,; a monkey.

H6972.def: a primitive root; to clip off; used only as denominative from H7019 (קַיִץ); to spend the harvest season.

H6973.gloss: to be (causatively, make) disgusted or anxious
H6973.def: a primitive root (identical with through the idea of severing oneself from (compare H6962 (קוּט))); to be (causatively, make) disgusted or anxious.
H6973.kjv: abhor, be distressed, be grieved, loathe, vex, be weary

H6974.def: a primitive root (identical with through the idea of abruptness in starting up from sleep (compare H3364 (יָקַץ))); to awake (literally or figuratively).

H6975.def: or קֹץ; from H6972 (קוּץ) (in the sense of pricking); a thorn.

H6976.gloss: Kots, the name of two Israelites
H6976.def: the same as H6975 (קוֹץ); Kots, the name of two Israelites.

H6977.def: feminine passive participle of H6972 (קוּץ) in its original sense; a forelock (as shorn).

H6978.def: from H6957 (קַו) (in the sense of a fastening); stalwart.

H6979.def: a primitive root; also denominative from H7023 (קִיר); to trench; by implication, to throw forth;  to wall up, whether literal (to build a wall) or figurative (to estop).
H6979.kjv: break down, cast out, destroy, dig

H6980.gloss: (only plural) trenches, i.e. a web (as if so formed)
H6980.def: from H6979 (קוּר); (only plural) trenches, i.e. a web (as if so formed).

H6981.gloss: Kore, the name of two Israelites
H6981.def: or קֹרֵא; (1 Chronicles 26:1), active participle of H7121 (קָרָא); crier; Kore, the name of two Israelites.

H6982.gloss: a rafter (forming trenches as it were)
H6982.def: or קֹרָה; from H6979 (קוּר); a rafter (forming trenches as it were); by implication, a roof.

H6983.def: a primitive root; to bend; used only as denominative for H3369 (יָקֹשׁ),; to set a trap.

H6984.def: from the passive participle of H6983 (קוֹשׁ) and H3050 (יָהּ); entrapped of Jah; Kushajah, an Israelite.

H6985.def: from H6990 (קָטַט) in the sense of abbreviation; a little, i.e. (adverbially) merely.

H6986.def: from an unused root meaning to cut off; ruin.

H6987.def: from the same as H6986 (קֶטֶב); extermination.

H6989.def: feminine passive participle of H6999 (קָטַר); perfumed; Keturah, a wife of Abraham.

H6990.def: a primitive root; to clip off, i.e. (figuratively) destroy.

H6991.gloss: to cut off, i.e. (figuratively) put to death
H6991.def: a primitive root; properly, to cut off, i.e. (figuratively) put to death.

H6994.def: a primitive root (rather denominative from H6996 (קָטָן)); to diminish, i.e. be (causatively, make) diminutive or (figuratively) of no account.
H6994.kjv: be a (make) small (thing), be not worthy

H6995.gloss: a pettiness, i.e. the little finger
H6995.def: from H6994 (קָטֹן); a pettiness, i.e. the little finger.

H6996.def: or קָטֹן; from H6962 (קוּט); abbreviated, i.e. diminutive, literally (in quantity, size or number) or figuratively (in age or importance).
H6996.kjv: least, less(-er), little (one), small(-est, one, quantity, thing), young(-er, -est)

H6997.def: the same as H6996 (קָטָן); small; Katan, an Israelite.

H6998.def: a primitive root; to strip off.

H6999.def: a primitive root (identical with through the idea of fumigation in a close place and perhaps thus driving out the occupants); to smoke, i.e. turn into fragrance by fire (especially as an act of worship).
H6999.kjv: burn (incense, sacrifice) (upon), (altar for) incense, kindle, offer (incense, a sacrifice)

H7001.gloss: a knot (as tied up), i.e. (figuratively) a riddle
H7001.def: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to H7000 (קָטַר); a knot (as tied up), i.e. (figuratively) a riddle; also a vertebra (as if a knot).

H7003.def: from H6999 (קָטַר); fumigative; Kitron, a place in Palestine.

H7005.def: from H6996 (קָטָן); littleness; Kattath, a place in Palestine.

H7008.def: or קִיטֹר; from H6999 (קָטַר); a fume, i.e. cloud.

H7009.def: from H6965 (קוּם); an opponent (as rising against one), i.e. (collectively) enemies.

H7010.def: (Aramaic) from H6966 (קוּם); an edict (as arising in law).

H7013.def: from H6969 (קוּן) in the original sense of fixity; a lance (as striking fast).

H7014.def: the same as H7013 (קַיִן) (with a play upon the affinity to H7069 (קָנָה)); Kajin, the name of the first child, also of a place in Palestine, and of an Oriental tribe.

H7015.gloss: a dirge (as accompanied by beating the breasts or on inst
H7015.def: from H6969 (קוּן); a dirge (as accompanied by beating the breasts or on instruments).

H7016.def: the same as H7015 (קִינָה); Kinah, a place in Palestine.

H7017.gloss: a Kenite or member of the tribe of Kajin
H7017.def: or קִינִי; (1 Chronicles 2:55), patronymic from H7014 (קַיִן); a Kenite or member of the tribe of Kajin.

H7018.def: from the same as H7064 (קֵן); fixed; Kenan, an antediluvian.

H7019.def: from H6972 (קוּץ); harvest (as the crop), whether the product (grain or fruit) or the (dry) season.

H7021.def: perhaps from H7006 (קָיָה); the gourd (as nauseous).

H7023.gloss: a wall (as built in a trench)
H7023.def: or קִר; (Isaiah 22:5), or (feminine) קִירָה; from H6979 (קוּר); a wall (as built in a trench).

H7024.def: the same as H7023 (קִיר); fortress; Kir, a place in Assyrian; also one in Moab.

H7025.gloss: Kir-Cheres or Kir-Chareseth, a place in Moab
H7025.def: or (feminine of the latter word) קִיר חֲרֶשֶׂת; from H7023 (קִיר) and H2789 (חֶרֶשׂ); fortress of earthenware; Kir-Cheres or Kir-Chareseth, a place in Moab.

H7026.def: or קֵרֹס; from the same as H7166 (קַרְסֹל); ankled; Keros, one of the Nethinim.

H7027.gloss: Kish, the name of five Israelites
H7027.def: from H6983 (קוֹשׁ); a bow; Kish, the name of five Israelites.

H7028.def: from H6983 (קוֹשׁ); winding; Kishon, a river of Palestine.

H7029.def: from H6983 (קוֹשׁ); bowed; Kishi, an Israelite.

H7031.def: contracted from H7043 (קָלַל); light; (by implication) rapid (also adverbial).

H7032.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H6963 (קוֹל); a voice or sound.

H7033.gloss: to toast, i.e. scorch partially or slowly
H7033.def: a primitive root (rather identical with H7034 (קָלָה) through the idea of shrinkage by heat); to toast, i.e. scorch partially or slowly.

H7034.gloss: to be light (as implied in rapid motion)
H7034.def: a primitive root; to be light (as implied in rapid motion), but figuratively, only (be (causatively, hold) in contempt).
H7034.kjv: base, contemn, despise, lightly esteem, set light, seem vile

H7036.def: from H7034 (קָלָה); disgrace; (by implication) the pudenda.

H7037.def: apparently but a form for H6747 (צַלַּחַת); a kettle.

H7039.def: or קָלִיא; from H7033 (קָלָה); roasted ears of grain.

H7040.def: from H7043 (קָלַל); frivolous; Kallai, an Israelite.

H7041.def: from H7034 (קָלָה); insignificance; Kelajah, an Israelite.

H7042.gloss: Kelita, the name of three Israelites
H7042.def: from H7038 (קָלַט); maiming; Kelita, the name of three Israelites.

H7043.def: a primitive root; to be (causatively, make) light, literally (swift, small, sharp, etc.) or figuratively (easy, trifling, vile, etc.).
H7043.kjv: abate, make bright, bring into contempt, (ac-) curse, despise, (be) ease(-y, -ier), (be a, make, make somewhat, move, seem a, set) light(-en, -er, -ly, -ly afflict, -ly esteem, thing), slight(-ly), be swift(-er), (be, be more, make, re-) vile, whet

H7046.def: a primitive root; to disparage, i.e. ridicule.

H7049.def: a primitive root; to sling; also to carve (as if a circular motion, or into light forms).

H7050.def: from H7049 (קָלַע); a sling; also a (door) screen (as if slung across), or the valve (of the door) itself.

H7053.def: from an unused root meaning to prick; a prong, i.e. hay-fork.

H7054.gloss: something that rises, i.e. a stalk of grain
H7054.def: feminine of active participle of H6965 (קוּם); something that rises, i.e. a stalk of grain.

H7055.def: from H6965 (קוּם) and H410 (אֵל); raised of God; Kemuel, the name of a relative of Abraham, and of two Israelites.

H7056.gloss: Kamon, a place East of the Jordan
H7056.def: from H6965 (קוּם); an elevation; Kamon, a place East of the Jordan.

H7057.def: or קִימוֹשׁ; from an unused root meaning to sting; a prickly plant.

H7058.def: from an unused root probably meaning to grind; flour.

H7059.def: a primitive root; to pluck, i.e. destroy.

H7061.def: a primitive root; to grasp with the hand.

H7062.def: from H7061 (קָמַץ); a grasp, i.e. handful.

H7063.def: from the same as H7057 (קִמּוֹשׁ); a prickly plant.

H7064.gloss: a nest (as fixed), sometimes including the nestlings
H7064.def: contracted from H7077 (קָנַן); a nest (as fixed), sometimes including the nestlings; figuratively, a chamber or dwelling.

H7065.def: a primitive root; to be (causatively, make) zealous, i.e. (in a bad sense) jealous or envious.
H7065.kjv: (be) envy(-ious), be (move to, provoke to) jealous(-y), very, (be) zeal(-ous)

H7069.def: a primitive root; to erect, i.e. create; by extension, to procure, especially by purchase (causatively, sell); by implication to own.
H7069.kjv: attain, buy(-er), teach to keep cattle, get, provoke to jealousy, possess(-or), purchase, recover, redeem, surely, verily

H7070.def: from H7069 (קָנָה); a reed (as erect); by resemblance a rod (especially for measuring), shaft, tube, stem, the radius (of the arm), beam (of a steelyard).
H7070.kjv: balance, bone, branch, calamus, cane, reed, spearman, stalk

H7071.gloss: Kanah, the name of a stream and of a place in Palestine
H7071.def: feminine of H7070 (קָנֶה); reediness; Kanah, the name of a stream and of a place in Palestine.

H7073.gloss: Kenaz, the name of an Edomite and of two Israelites
H7073.def: probably from an unused root meaning to hunt; hunter; Kenaz, the name of an Edomite and of two Israelites.

H7074.gloss: a Kenizzite or descendant of Kenaz
H7074.def: patronymic from H7073 (קְנַז),; a Kenizzite or descendant of Kenaz.

H7075.def: from H7069 (קָנָה); creation, i.e. (concretely) creatures; also acquisition, purchase, wealth.
H7075.kjv: getting, goods, with money, riches, substance

H7076.def: from an unused root (meaning to erect); cinnamon bark (as in upright rolls).

H7077.gloss: to nestle, i.e. build or occupy as anest
H7077.def: a primitive root; to erect; but used only as denominative from H7064 (קֵן); to nestle, i.e. build or occupy as anest.

H7078.def: from an unused root probably meaning to wrench; perversion.

H7079.gloss: Kenath, a place East of the Jordan
H7079.def: from H7069 (קָנָה); possession; Kenath, a place East of the Jordan.

H7080.gloss: to distribute, i.e. determine by lot or magical scroll
H7080.def: a primitive root; properly, to distribute, i.e. determine by lot or magical scroll; by implication, to divine.

H7081.def: from H7080 (קָסַם); a lot; also divination (including its fee), oracle.

H7082.def: a primitive root; to lop off.

H7083.def: from the same as H3563 (כּוֹס) (or as H7185 (קָשָׁה)); properly, a cup, i.e. an ink-stand.

H7084.def: perhaps from H7049 (קָלַע) in the sense of enclosing; citadel; Keilah, a place in Palestine.

H7085.def: from the same as H6970 (קוֹעַ); an incision or gash.

H7086.def: probably from H7167 (קָרַע); a bowl (as cut out hollow).

H7087.def: a primitive root; to shrink, i.e. thicken (as unracked wine, curdled milk, clouded sky, frozen water).

H7088.def: a primitive root; to contract, i.e. roll together.

H7090.def: or קִפֹּדlemma קִכֹּד kaf, corrected to קִפֹּד; from H7088 (קָפַד); a species of bird, perhaps the bittern (from its contracted form).

H7091.def: from an unused root meaning to contract, i.e.; spring forward; an arrow-snake (as darting on its prey).

H7092.def: a primitive root; to draw together, i.e. close; by implication, to leap (by contracting the limbs); specifically, to die (from gathering up the feet).
H7092.kjv: shut (up), skip, stop, take out of the way

H7093.def: contracted from H7112 (קָצַץ); an extremity; adverbially (with prepositional prefix) after.

H7094.def: a primitive root; to clip, or (generally) chop.

H7095.def: from H7094 (קָצַב); shape (as if cut out); base (as if there cut off).

H7096.def: a primitive root; to cut off; (figuratively) to destroy; (partially) to scrape off.

H7097.def: or (negative only) קֵצֶה; from H7096 (קָצָה); (used in a great variety of applications and idioms; compare H7093 (קֵץ)); an extremity.
H7097.kjv: after, border, brim, brink, edge, end, (in-) finite, frontier, outmost coast, quarter, shore, (out-) side, some, ut(-ter-) most (part)

H7098.def: feminine of H7097 (קָצֶה); (used like H7097 (קָצֶה)); a termination.

H7099.def: and (feminine) קִצְוָה; from H7096 (קָצָה); (used like H7097 (קָצֶה), but with less variety); a limit.

H7100.def: from an unused root apparently meaning to incise; fennelflower (from its pungency).

H7101.gloss: a magistrate (as deciding) or other leader
H7101.def: from H7096 (קָצָה) in the sense of determining; a magistrate (as deciding) or other leader.
H7101.kjv: captain, guide, prince, ruler. Compare H6278 (עֵת קָצִין)

H7102.def: from H7106 (קָצַע); cassia (as peeled; plural the bark).

H7103.def: the same as H7102 (קְצִיעָה); Ketsiah, a daughter of Job.

H7104.def: from H7112 (קָצַץ); abrupt; Keziz, a valley in Palestine.

H7105.def: from H7114 (קָצַר); severed, i.e. harvest (as reaped), the crop, the time, the reaper, or figuratively; also a limb (of a tree, or simply foliage).

H7106.def: a primitive root; to strip off, i.e. (partially) scrape; by implication, to segregate (as an angle).

H7107.gloss: to crack off, i.e. (figuratively) burst out in rage
H7107.def: a primitive root; to crack off, i.e. (figuratively) burst out in rage.
H7107.kjv: (be) anger(-ry), displease, fret self, (provoke to) wrath (come), be wroth

H7108.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H7107 (קָצַף); to become enraged.

H7110.def: from H7107 (קָצַף); a splinter (as chipped off); figuratively, rage or strife.

H7112.def: a primitive root; to chop off (literally or figuratively).
H7112.kjv: cut (asunder, in pieces, in sunder, off), utmost

H7113.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H7112 (קָצַץ); to chop off (literally or figuratively).

H7114.def: a primitive root; to dock off, i.e. curtail (transitive or intransitive, literal or figurative); especially to harvest (grass or grain).
H7114.kjv: at all, cut down, much discouraged, grieve, harvestman, lothe, mourn, reap(-er), (be, wax) short(-en, -er), straiten, trouble, vex

H7115.def: from H7114 (קָצַר); shortness (of spirit), i.e. impatience.

H7116.gloss: short (whether in size, number, life, strength or temper)
H7116.def: from H7114 (קָצַר); short (whether in size, number, life, strength or temper).

H7117.def: from H7096 (קָצָה); a termination (literally or figuratively); also (by implication) a portion; adverbially (with prepositional prefix) after.

H7118.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H7117 (קְצָת); a termination (literally or figuratively); also (by implication) a portion; adverbially (with prepositional prefix) after.

H7119.def: contracted from an unused root meaning to chill; cool; figuratively, quiet.

H7120.def: from the same as H7119 (קַר); cold.

H7121.def: a primitive root (rather identical with H7122 (קָרָא) through the idea of accosting a person met); to call out to (i.e. properly, address by name, but used in a wide variety of applications).
H7121.kjv: bewray (self), that are bidden, call (for, forth, self, upon), cry (unto), (be) famous, guest, invite, mention, (give) name, preach, (make) proclaim(-ation), pronounce, publish, read, renowned, say

H7122.gloss: to encounter, whether accidentally or in a hostile manner
H7122.def: a primitive root; to encounter, whether accidentally or in a hostile manner.
H7122.kjv: befall, (by) chance, (cause to) come (upon), fall out, happen, meet

H7123.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H7121 (קָרָא); to call out to (i.e. properly, address by name, but used in a wide variety of applications).

H7124.gloss: a caller, i.e. partridge (from its cry)
H7124.def: properly, active participle of H7121 (קָרָא); a caller, i.e. partridge (from its cry).

H7125.def: from H7122 (קָרָא); an encountering, accidental, friendly or hostile (also adverbially, opposite).
H7125.kjv: against (he come), help, meet, seek, to, in the way

H7126.gloss: to approach (causatively, bring near) for whatever purpose
H7126.def: a primitive root; to approach (causatively, bring near) for whatever purpose.
H7126.kjv: (cause to) approach, (cause to) bring (forth, near), (cause to) come (near, nigh), (cause to) draw near (nigh), go (near), be at hand, join, be near, offer, present, produce, make ready, stand, take

H7127.gloss: to approach (causatively, bring near) for whatever purpose
H7127.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H7126 (קָרַב); to approach (causatively, bring near) for whatever purpose.

H7130.def: from H7126 (קָרַב); properly, the nearest part, i.e. the center, whether literal, figurative or adverbial (especially with preposition).
H7130.kjv: among, before, bowels, unto charge, eat (up), heart, him, in, inward (-ly, part, -s, thought), midst, out of, purtenance, therein, through, within self

H7133.gloss: something brought near the altar, i.e. a sacrificial present
H7133.def: or קֻרְבָּן; from H7126 (קָרַב); something brought near the altar, i.e. a sacrificial present.

H7134.def: perhaps from H6923 (קָדַם) in the sense of striking upon; an axe.

H7136.def: a primitive root; to light upon (chiefly by accident); causatively, to bring about; specifically, to impose timbers (for roof or floor).
H7136.kjv: appoint, lay (make) beams, befall, bring, come (to pass unto), floor, (hap) was, happen (unto), meet, send good speed

H7137.def: from H7136 (קָרָה); an (unfortunate) occurrence, i.e. some accidental (ceremonial) disqualification.

H7138.def: or קָרֹב; from H7126 (קָרַב); near (in place, kindred or time).
H7138.kjv: allied, approach, at hand, any of kin, kinsfold(-sman), (that is) near (of kin), neighbour, (that is) next, (them that come) nigh (at hand), more ready, short(-ly)

H7140.def: or קֹרַח; from H7139 (קָרַח); ice (as if bald, i.e. smooth); hence, hail; by resemblance, rock crystal.

H7141.gloss: Korach, the name of two Edomites and three Israelites
H7141.def: from H7139 (קָרַח); ice; Korach, the name of two Edomites and three Israelites.

H7142.gloss: bald (on the back of the head)
H7142.def: from H7139 (קָרַח); bald (on the back of the head).

H7143.def: from H7139 (קָרַח); bald; Kareach, an Israelite.

H7145.gloss: a Korchite (collectively) or descendants of Korach
H7145.def: patronymic from H7141 (קֹרַח); a Korchite (collectively) or descendants of Korach.
H7145.kjv: Korahite, Korathite, sons of Kore, Korhite

H7146.gloss: a bald spot (on the back of the head)
H7146.def: from H7139 (קָרַח); a bald spot (on the back of the head); figuratively, a threadbare spot (on the back side of the cloth).

H7149.def: (Aramaic) or קִרְיָה; (Aramaic), corresponding to H7151 (קִרְיָה); building; a city.

H7151.def: from H7136 (קָרָה) in the sense of flooring, i.e.; building; a city.

H7152.gloss: Kerioth, the name of two places in Palestine
H7152.def: plural of H7151 (קִרְיָה); buildings; Kerioth, the name of two places in Palestine.

H7153.gloss: Kirjath-Arba or Kirjath-ha-Arba, a place in Palestine
H7153.def: or (with the article interposed) קִרְיַת הָאַרְבַּע; (Nehemiah 11:25), from H7151 (קִרְיָה) and H704 (אַרְבַּע) or H702 (אַרְבַּע); city of Arba, or city of the four (giants); Kirjath-Arba or Kirjath-ha-Arba, a place in Palestine.

H7154.def: from H7151 (קִרְיָה) and H1168 (בַּעַל); city of Baal; Kirjath-Baal, a place in Palestine.

H7155.def: from H7151 (קִרְיָה) and the feminine plural of H2351 (חוּץ); city of streets; Kirjath-Chutsoth, a place in Moab.

H7156.gloss: Kirjathaim, the name of two placed in Palestine
H7156.def: dual of H7151 (קִרְיָה); double city; Kirjathaim, the name of two placed in Palestine.

H7157.gloss: Kirjath-Jearim or Kirjath-Arim, a place in Palestine
H7157.def: or (Jeremiah 26:20) with the article interposed; or (Joshua 18:28) simply the former part of the word; or קִרְיַת עָרִים; from H7151 (קִרְיָה) and the plural of H3293 (יַעַר) or H5892 (עִיר); city of forests, or city of towns; Kirjath-Jearim or Kirjath-Arim, a place in Palestine.

H7158.gloss: Kirjath-Sannah or Kirjath-Sepher, a place in Palestine
H7158.def: or קִרְיַת סֵפֶר; from H7151 (קִרְיָה) and a simpler feminine from the same as H5577 (סַנְסִן), or (for the latter name) H5612 (סֵפֶר); city of branches, or of a book; Kirjath-Sannah or Kirjath-Sepher, a place in Palestine.

H7160.def: a primitive root; to push or gore; used only as denominative from H7161 (קֶרֶן),; to shoot out horns; figuratively, rays.

H7161.def: from H7160 (קָרַן); a horn (as projecting); by implication, a flask, cornet; by resemblance. an elephant's tooth (i.e. ivory), a corner (of the altar), a peak (of a mountain), a ray (of light); figuratively, power.

H7162.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H7161 (קֶרֶן); a horn (literally or for sound).

H7163.def: from H7161 (קֶרֶן) and H6320 (פּוּךְ); horn of cosmetic; Keren-hap-Puk, one of Job's daughters.

H7164.def: a primitive root; properly, to protrude; used only as denominative from H7165 (קֶרֶס) (for alliteration with H7167 (קָרַע)),; to hunch, i.e. be hump-backed.

H7165.gloss: a knob or belaying-pin (from its swelling form)
H7165.def: from H7164 (קָרַס); a knob or belaying-pin (from its swelling form).

H7166.gloss: an ankle (as a protuberance or joint)
H7166.def: from H7164 (קָרַס); an ankle (as a protuberance or joint).

H7167.def: a primitive root; to rend, literally or figuratively (revile, paint the eyes, as if enlarging them).

H7169.def: a primitive root; to pinch, i.e. (partially) to bite the lips, blink the eyes (as a gesture of malice), or (fully) to squeeze off (a piece of clay in order to mould a vessel from it).

H7170.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H7171 (קֶרֶץ) in the sense of a bit (to 'eat the morsels of' any one, i.e.; chew him up (figuratively) by slander.

H7171.def: from H7169 (קָרַץ); extirpation (as if by constriction).

H7172.gloss: floor (as if a pavement of pieces or tesseroe)
H7172.def: from H7167 (קָרַע); floor (as if a pavement of pieces or tesseroe), of abuilding or the sea.

H7173.gloss: Karka (with the article prefix), a place in Palestine
H7173.def: the same as H7172 (קַרְקַע); ground-floor; Karka (with the article prefix), a place in Palestine.

H7174.gloss: Karkor, a place East of the Jordan
H7174.def: from H6979 (קוּר); foundation; Karkor, a place East of the Jordan.

H7175.def: from an unused root meaning to split off; a slab or plank; by implication, a deck of aship.

H7176.def: from H7136 (קָרָה) in the sense of building; a city.

H7177.def: from H7176 (קֶרֶת); city; Kartah, a place in Palestine.

H7178.def: from H7176 (קֶרֶת); city-plot; Kartan, a place in Palestine.

H7180.gloss: a cucumber (from the difficulty of digestion)
H7180.def: from an unused root (meaning to be hard); a cucumber (from the difficulty of digestion).

H7181.gloss: to prick up the ears, i.e. hearken
H7181.def: a primitive root; to prick up the ears, i.e. hearken.
H7181.kjv: attend, (cause to) hear(-ken), give heed, incline, mark (well), regard

H7182.kjv: diligently, hearing, much heed, that regarded

H7184.def: or קַשְׂוָה; from an unused root meaning to be round; a jug (from its shape).

H7185.gloss: to be dense, i.e. tough or severe (in various applications)
H7185.def: a primitive root; properly, to be dense, i.e. tough or severe (in various applications).
H7185.kjv: be cruel, be fiercer, make grievous, be ((ask a), be in, have, seem, would) hard(-en, (labour), -ly, thing), be sore, (be, make) stiff(-en, (-necked))

H7186.kjv: churlish, cruel, grievous, hard((-hearted), thing), heavy, impudent, obstinate, prevailed, rough(-ly), sore, sorrowful, stiff(necked), stubborn, in trouble

H7187.def: (Aramaic) or קשֹׁט; (Aramaic), corresponding to H7189 (קֹשֶׁט); fidelity.

H7188.def: a primitive root; to be (causatively, make) unfeeling.

H7189.def: or קֹשְׁטְ; from an unused root meaning to balance; equity (as evenly weighed), i.e. reality.

H7191.def: from H7190 (קְשִׁי); hard ground; Kishjon, a place in Palestine.

H7192.gloss: an ingot (as definitely estimated and stamped for a coin)
H7192.def: from an unused root (probably meaning to weigh out); an ingot (as definitely estimated and stamped for a coin).

H7193.def: by reduplication from an unused root meaning to shale off as bark; a scale (of a fish); hence a coat of mail (as composed of or covered with jointed plates of metal).

H7194.def: a primitive root; to tie, physically (gird, confine, compact) or mentally (in love, league).
H7194.kjv: bind (up), (make a) conspire(-acy, -ator), join together, knit, stronger, work (treason)

H7197.gloss: to forage for straw, stubble or wood
H7197.def: a primitive root; to become sapless through drought; used only as denominative from H7179 (קַשׁ); to forage for straw, stubble or wood; figuratively, to assemble.

H7198.def: from H7185 (קָשָׁה) in the original sense (of H6983 (קוֹשׁ)) of bending; a bow, forshooting (hence, figuratively, strength) or the iris.

H7199.def: intensive (as denominative) from H7198 (קֶשֶׁת); a bowman.

H7200.def: a primitive root; to see, literally or figuratively (in numerous applications, direct and implied, transitive, intransitive and causative).
H7200.kjv: advise self, appear, approve, behold, certainly, consider, discern, (make to) enjoy, have experience, gaze, take heed, indeed, joyfully, lo, look (on, one another, one on another, one upon another, out, up, upon), mark, meet, be near, perceive, present, provide, regard, (have) respect, (fore-, cause to, let) see(-r, -m, one another), shew (self), sight of others, (e-) spy, stare, surely, think, view, visions

H7201.gloss: a bird of prey (probably the vulture, from its sharp sight)
H7201.def: from H7200 (רָאָה); a bird of prey (probably the vulture, from its sharp sight).

H7203.def: active participle of H7200 (רָאָה); a seer (as often rendered); but also (abstractly) a vision.

H7204.def: for H7203 (רֹאֶה); prophet; Roeh, an Israelite.

H7205.def: from the imperative of H7200 (רָאָה) and H1121 (בֵּן); see ye a son; Reuben, a son of Jacob.

H7206.gloss: a Reubenite or descendant of Reuben
H7206.def: patronymic from H7205 (רְאוּבֵן); a Reubenite or descendant of Reuben.

H7208.def: feminine passive participle of H7213 (רָאַם); raised; Reumah, a Syrian woman.

H7210.def: from H7200 (רָאָה); sight, whether abstractly (vision) or concretely (a spectacle).

H7211.gloss: Reajah, the name of three Israelites
H7211.def: from H7200 (רָאָה) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has seen; Reajah, the name of three Israelites.

H7214.def: or רְאֵיםlemma רְאיֵם second vowel, corrected to רְאֵים; or רֵים; or רֵם; from H7213 (רָאַם); a wild bull (from its conspicuousness).

H7215.gloss: something high in value, i.e. perhaps coral
H7215.def: from H7213 (רָאַם); something high in value, i.e. perhaps coral.

H7216.gloss: Ramoth, the name of two places in Palestine
H7216.def: or רָאמֹתxlit Râmôth corrected to Râʼmôth; plural of H7215 (רָאמָה); heights; Ramoth, the name of two places in Palestine.

H7217.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H7218 (רֹאשׁ); the head; figuratively, the sum.

H7218.def: from an unused root apparently meaning to shake; the head (as most easily shaken), whether literal or figurative (in many applications, of place, time, rank, itc.).
H7218.kjv: band, beginning, captain, chapiter, chief(-est place, man, things), company, end, every (man), excellent, first, forefront, (be-)head, height, (on) high(-est part, (priest)), lead, poor, principal, ruler, sum, top

H7219.def: or רוֹשׁ; (Deuteronomy 32:32), apparently the same as H7218 (רֹאשׁ); a poisonous plant, probably the poppy (from its conspicuous head); generally poison (even of serpents).

H7220.gloss: Rosh, the name of an Israelite and of a foreign nation
H7220.def: probably the same as H7218 (רֹאשׁ); Rosh, the name of an Israelite and of a foreign nation.

H7221.def: from the same as H7218 (רֹאשׁ); a beginning.

H7223.gloss: first, in place, time or rank (as adjective or noun)
H7223.def: or רִאשֹׁן; from H7221 (רִאשָׁה); first, in place, time or rank (as adjective or noun).
H7223.kjv: ancestor, (that were) before(-time), beginning, eldest, first, fore(-father) (-most), former (thing), of old time, past

H7225.def: from the same as H7218; the first, in place, time, order or rank.

H7226.def: from H7218 (רֹאשׁ); a pillow (being for the head).

H7227.gloss: abundant (in quantity, size, age, number, rank, quality)
H7227.def: by contracted from H7231 (רָבַב); abundant (in quantity, size, age, number, rank, quality).
H7227.kjv: (in) abound(-undance, -ant, -antly), captain, elder, enough, exceedingly, full, great(-ly, man, one), increase, long (enough, (time)), (do, have) many(-ifold, things, a time), (ship-)master, mighty, more, (too, very) much, multiply(-tude), officer, often(-times), plenteous, populous, prince, process (of time), suffice(-lent)

H7228.def: by contraction from H7232 (רָבַב); (or perhaps the same as H7227 (רַב)); an archer.

H7229.kjv: captain, chief, great, lord, master, stout

H7230.kjv: abundance(-antly), all, common (sort), excellent, great(-ly, -ness, number), huge, be increased, long, many, more in number, most, much, multitude, plenty(-ifully), very (age)

H7231.gloss: to cast together , i.e. increase, especially in number
H7231.def: a primitive root; (compare H7241 (רָבִיב)); also as denominative from H7233 (רְבָבָה); properly, to cast together , i.e. increase, especially in number; to multiply by the myriad.
H7231.kjv: increase, be many(-ifold), be more, multiply, ten thousands

H7232.def: a primitive root (rather identical with H7231 (רָבַב) through the idea of projection); to shoot an arrow.

H7233.def: from H7231 (רָבַב); abundance (in number), i.e. (specifically) a myriad (whether definite or indefinite).

H7235.def: a primitive root; to increase (in whatever respect).
H7235.kjv: (bring in) abundance (-antly), archer (by mistake for H7232 (רָבַב)), be in authority, bring up, continue, enlarge, excel, exceeding(-ly), be full of, (be, make) great(-er, -ly, -ness), grow up, heap, increase, be long, (be, give, have, make, use) many (a time), (any, be, give, give the, have) more (in number), (ask, be, be so, gather, over, take, yield) much (greater, more), (make to) multiply, nourish, plenty(-eous), process (of time), sore, store, thoroughly, very

H7236.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H7235 (רָבָה); to increase (in whatever respect).

H7237.gloss: Rabbah, the name of two places in Palestine, East and West
H7237.def: feminine of H7227 (רַב); great; Rabbah, the name of two places in Palestine, East and West.

H7238.def: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to H7235 (רָבָה); increase (of dignity).

H7239.gloss: a myriad, i.e. indefinitely, large number
H7239.def: from H7231 (רָבַב); or רִבּוֹא from H7231 (רָבַב); a myriad, i.e. indefinitely, large number.
H7239.kjv: great things, ten ((eight) -een, (for) -ty, sixscore, threescore, twenty, (twen) -ty) thousand

H7240.gloss: a myriad, i.e. indefinitely, large number
H7240.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H7239 (רִבּוֹ); a myriad, i.e. indefinitely, large number.

H7241.gloss: a rain (as an accumulation of drops)
H7241.def: from H7231 (רָבַב); a rain (as an accumulation of drops).

H7242.gloss: a collar (as spread around the neck)
H7242.def: from H7234 (רָבַד); a collar (as spread around the neck).

H7243.def: or רְבִעִי; from H7251 (רָבַע); fourth; also (fractionally) a fourth.

H7244.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H7243 (רְבִיעִי); fourth; also (fractionally) a fourth.

H7245.def: from H7231 (רָבַב); multitude; Rabbith, a place in Palestine.

H7246.def: a primitive root; to soak (bread in oil).

H7247.def: from an unused root meaning to be fruitful; fertile; Riblah, a place in Syria.

H7248.def: from H7227 (רַב) and a foreign word for a Magian; chief Magian; Rab-Mag, a Babylonian official.

H7249.def: from H7227 (רַב) and a foreign word for a eunuch; chief chamberlain; Rab-Saris, a Babylonian official.

H7250.gloss: to squat or lie out flat, i.e. (specifically) in copulation
H7250.def: a primitive root; to squat or lie out flat, i.e. (specifically) in copulation.

H7251.def: a primitive root (rather identical with H7250 (רָבַע) through the idea of sprawling 'at all fours' (or possibly the reverse is the order of deriv.); compare H702 (אַרְבַּע)); properly, to be four (sided); used only as denominative of H7253 (רֶבַע); to be quadrate.

H7253.def: from H7251 (רָבַע); a fourth (part or side).

H7254.def: the same as H7253 (רֶבַע); Reba, a Midianite.

H7256.gloss: a descendant of the fourth generation
H7256.def: from H7251 (רָבַע); a descendant of the fourth generation, i.e. great great grandchild.

H7257.gloss: to crouch (on all four legs folded, like a recumbent animal)
H7257.def: a primitive root; to crouch (on all four legs folded, like a recumbent animal); be implication, to recline, repose, brood, lurk, imbed.
H7257.kjv: crouch (down), fall down, make a fold, lay, (cause to, make to) lie (down), make to rest, sit

H7258.gloss: a couch or place of repose
H7258.def: from H7257 (רָבַץ); a couch or place of repose.
H7258.kjv: where each lay, lie down in, resting place

H7259.def: from an unused root probably meaning to clog by tying up the fetlock; fettering (by beauty); Ribkah, the wife of Isaac.

H7260.def: (Aramaic) from H7229 (רַב); huge (in size); domineering (in character).

H7262.def: from H7227 (רַב) and H8248 (שָׁקָה); chief butler; Rabshakeh, a Babylonian official.

H7263.def: from an unused root meaning to pile together; a lump of clay.

H7264.def: a primitive root; to quiver (with any violent emotion, especially anger or fear).
H7264.kjv: be afraid, stand in awe, disquiet, fall out, fret, move, provoke, quake, rage, shake, tremble, trouble, be wroth

H7265.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H7264 (רָגַז); to quiver (with any violent emotion, especially anger or fear).

H7267.def: from H7264 (רָגַז); commotion, restlessness (of a horse), crash (of thunder), disquiet, anger.

H7270.def: a primitive root;  also as denominative from H7272 (רֶגֶל); to walk along; but only in specifically, applications, to reconnoiter, to be atale-bearer (i.e. slander); to lead about.
H7270.kjv: backbite, search, slander, (e-) spy (out), teach to go, view

H7271.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H7272 (רֶגֶל); a foot, a step; by euphemistically the pudenda.

H7272.def: from H7270 (רָגַל); a foot (as used in walking); by implication, a step; by euphemistically the pudenda.
H7272.kjv: be able to endure, according as, after, coming, follow, (broken-)foot(-ed, -stool), great toe, haunt, journey, leg, piss, possession, time

H7274.gloss: Rogelim, a place East of the Jordan
H7274.def: plural of active participle of H7270 (רָגַל); fullers (as tramping the cloth in washing); Rogelim, a place East of the Jordan.

H7275.gloss: to cast together (stones), i.e. to lapidate
H7275.def: a primitive root (compare H7263 (רֶגֶב), H7321 (רוּעַ), H7551 (רָקַם)); to cast together (stones), i.e. to lapidate.

H7276.def: from H7275 (רָגַם); stoneheap; Regem, an Israelite.

H7277.gloss: a pile (of stones), i.e. (figuratively) a throng
H7277.def: feminine of the same as H7276 (רֶגֶם); a pile (of stones), i.e. (figuratively) a throng.

H7278.def: from H7276 (רֶגֶם) and H4428 (מֶלֶךְ); king's heap; Regem-Melek, an Israelite.

H7279.def: a primitive root; to grumble, i.e. rebel.

H7280.gloss: to toss violently and suddenly (the sea with waves
H7280.def: a primitive root; properly, to toss violently and suddenly (the sea with waves, the skin with boils); figuratively (in a favorable manner) to settle, i.e. quiet; specifically, to wink (from the motion of the eye-lids).
H7280.kjv: break, divide, find ease, be a moment, (cause, give, make to) rest, make suddenly

H7281.gloss: a wink (of the eyes), i.e. a very short space of time
H7281.def: from H7280 (רָגַע).; a wink (of the eyes), i.e. a very short space of time.

H7283.def: a primitive root; to be tumultuous.

H7284.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H7283 (רָגַשׁ); to gather tumultuously.

H7285.def: or (feminine) רִגְשָׁה; from H7283 (רָגַשׁ); a tumultuous crowd.

H7286.def: a primitive root; to tread in pieces, i.e. (figuratively) to conquer, or (specifically) to overlay.

H7287.def: a primitive root; to tread down, i.e. subjugate; specifically, to crumble off.
H7287.kjv: (come to, make to) have dominion, prevail against, reign, (bear, make to) rule,(-r, over), take

H7288.def: intensive from H7287 (רָדָה); domineering; Raddai, an Israelite.

H7289.def: from H7286 (רָדַד) in the sense of spreading; a veil (as expanded).

H7290.gloss: to stun, i.e. stupefy (with sleep or death)
H7290.def: a primitive root; to stun, i.e. stupefy (with sleep or death).
H7290.kjv: (be fast a-, be in a deep, cast into a dead, that) sleep(-er, -eth)

H7291.gloss: to run after (usually with hostile intent
H7291.def: a primitive root; to run after (usually with hostile intent; figuratively (of time) gone by).
H7291.kjv: chase, put to flight, follow (after, on), hunt, (be under) persecute(-ion, -or), pursue(-r)

H7292.def: a primitive root; to urge severely, i.e. (figuratively) importune, embolden, capture, act insolently.
H7292.kjv: overcome, behave self proudly, make sure, strengthen

H7294.gloss: Rahab (i.e. boaster), an epithet of Egypt
H7294.def: the same as H7293 (רַהַב); Rahab (i.e. boaster), an epithet of Egypt.

H7298.def: from an unused root apparently meaning to hollow out; a channel or watering-box; by resemblance a ringlet of hair (as forming parallel lines).

H7299.def: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to H7200 (רָאָה); aspect.

H7300.gloss: to tramp about, i.e. ramble (free or disconsolate)
H7300.def: a primitive root; to tramp about, i.e. ramble (free or disconsolate).
H7300.kjv: have the dominion, be lord, mourn, rule

H7301.gloss: to slake the thirst (occasionally of other appetites)
H7301.def: a primitive root; to slake the thirst (occasionally of other appetites).
H7301.kjv: bathe, make drunk, (take the) fill, satiate, (abundantly) satisfy, soak, water (abundantly)

H7303.def: from an unused root probably meaning to cry out; outcry; Rohagah, an Israelite.

H7304.def: a primitive root (identical with H7306 (רוּחַ)); properly, to breathe freely, i.e. revive; by implication, to have ample room.

H7305.def: from H7304 (רָוַח); room, literally (an interval) or figuratively (deliverance).

H7306.def: a primitive root; properly, to blow, i.e. breathe; only (literally) to smell or (by implication, perceive (figuratively, to anticipate, enjoy).
H7306.kjv: accept, smell, touch, make of quick understanding

H7307.def: from H7306; wind; by resemblance breath, i.e., a sensible (or even violent) exhalation; figuratively, life, anger, unsubstantiality.

H7308.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H7307 (רוּחַ); wind; by resemblance breath, i.e. a sensible (or even violent) exhalation; figuratively, life, anger, unsubstantiality; by extension, a region of the sky; by resemblance spirit, but only of a rational being (including its expression and functions).

H7311.def: a primitive root; to be high actively, to rise or raise (in various applications, literally or figuratively).
H7311.kjv: bring up, exalt (self), extol, give, go up, haughty, heave (up), (be, lift up on, make on, set up on, too) high(-er, one), hold up, levy, lift(-er) up, (be) lofty, (a-) loud, mount up, offer (up), presumptuously, (be) promote(-ion), proud, set up, tall(-er), take (away, off, up), breed worms

H7312.def: or רֻם; from H7311 (רוּם); (literally) elevation or (figuratively) elation.

H7313.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H7311 (רוּם); to be high actively, to rise or raise (in various applications, literally or figuratively).

H7316.def: from H7311 (רוּם); height; Rumah, a place in Palestine.

H7317.def: feminine of H7315 (רוֹם); elation, i.e. (adverbially) proudly.

H7318.def: from H7426 (רָמַם); exaltation, i.e. (figuratively and specifically) praise.

H7319.def: feminine active participle of H7426 (רָמַם); exaltation, i.e. praise.

H7320.def: (or Romam from H7311 (רוּם) and H5828 (עֵזֶר); I have raised up a help; Romamti-Ezer, an Israelite.

H7321.def: a primitive root; to mar (especially by breaking); figuratively, to split the ears (with sound), i.e. shout (for alarm or joy).
H7321.kjv: blow an alarm, cry (alarm, aloud, out), destroy, make a joyful noise, smart, shout (for joy), sound an alarm, triumph

H7322.def: a primitive root; properly, to triturate (in a mortar), i.e. (figuratively) to agitate (by concussion).

H7323.gloss: to run (for whatever reason, especially to rush)
H7323.def: a primitive root; to run (for whatever reason, especially to rush).
H7323.kjv: break down, divide speedily, footman, guard, bring hastily, (make) run (away, through), post

H7324.gloss: to pour out (literally or figuratively), i.e. empty
H7324.def: a primitive root; to pour out (literally or figuratively), i.e. empty.
H7324.kjv: arm, cast out, draw (out), (make) empty, pour forth (out)

H7325.def: a primitive root; to slaver (with spittle), i.e. (by analogy) to emit afluid (ulcerous or natural).

H7326.def: a primitive root; to be destitute.

H7327.def: probably for H7468 (רְעוּת); friend; Ruth, a Moabitess.

H7328.def: (Aramaic) from an unused root probably meaning; to attenuate, i.e. (figuratively) hide; a mystery.

H7329.def: a primitive root; to emaciate, i.e. make (become) thin (literally or figuratively).

H7331.def: from H7336 (רָזַן); prince; Rezon, a Syrian.

H7335.def: a primitive root; to twinkle the eye (in mockery).

H7336.gloss: probably to be heavy, i.e. (figuratively) honorable
H7336.def: a primitive root; probably to be heavy, i.e. (figuratively) honorable.

H7337.def: a primitive root; to broaden (intransitive or transitive, literal or figurative).
H7337.kjv: be an en-(make) large(-ing), make room, make (open) wide

H7339.gloss: a width, i.e. (concretely) avenue or area
H7339.def: or רְחוֹב; from H7337 (רָחַב); a width, i.e. (concretely) avenue or area.
H7339.kjv: broad place (way), street. See also H1050 (בֵּית רְחוֹב)

H7340.def: or רְחוֹב; the same as H7339 (רְחֹב); Rechob, the name of a place in Syria, also of a Syrian and an Israelite.

H7342.def: from H7337 (רָחַב); roomy, in any (or every) direction, literally or figuratively.
H7342.kjv: broad, large, at liberty, proud, wide

H7343.def: the same as H7342 (רָחָב); proud; Rachab, a Canaanitess.

H7344.gloss: Rechoboth, a place in Assyria and one in Palestine
H7344.def: or רְחֹבֹת; plural of H7339 (רְחֹב); streets; Rechoboth, a place in Assyria and one in Palestine.

H7345.def: or רְחַבְיָהוּ; from H7337 (רָחַב) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has enlarged; Rechabjah, an Israelite.

H7346.def: from H7337 (רָחַב) and H5971 (עַם); a people has enlarged; Rechabam, an Israelite king.

H7347.def: from an unused root meaning to pulverize; a mill-stone.

H7348.gloss: Rechum, the name of a Persian and of three Israelites
H7348.def: a form of H7349 (רַחוּם); Rechum, the name of a Persian and of three Israelites.

H7350.gloss: remote, literally or figuratively, of place or time
H7350.def: or רָחֹק; from H7368 (רָחַק); remote, literally or figuratively, of place or time; specifically, precious; often used adverbially (with preposition).
H7350.kjv: (a-) far (abroad, off), long ago, of old, space, great while to come

H7351.def: from the same as H7298 (רַהַט); a panel (as resembling a trough).

H7352.gloss: remote, literally or figuratively, of place or time
H7352.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H7350 (רָחוֹק); remote, literally or figuratively, of place or time; specifically, precious; often used adverbially (with preposition).

H7353.gloss: a ewe (the females being the predominant element of a flo
H7353.def: from an unused root meaning to journey; a ewe (the females being the predominant element of a flock) (as a good traveller).

H7354.def: the same as H7353 (רָחֵל); Rachel, a wife of Jacob.

H7355.def: a primitive root; to fondle; by implication, to love, especially to compassionate.
H7355.kjv: have compassion (on, upon), love, (find, have, obtain, shew) mercy(-iful, on, upon), (have) pity, Ruhamah, surely

H7356.def: from H7355 (רָחַם); compassion (in the plural); by extension, the womb (as cherishing the fetus); by implication, a maiden.
H7356.kjv: bowels, compassion, damsel, tender love, (great, tender) mercy, pity, womb

H7357.def: the same as H7356 (רַחַם); pity; Racham, an Israelite.

H7360.gloss: a kind of vulture (supposed to be tender towards its young)
H7360.def: or (feminine) רָחָמָה; from H7355 (רָחַם); a kind of vulture (supposed to be tender towards its young).

H7363.def: a primitive root; to brood; by implication, to be relaxed.

H7364.gloss: to lave (the whole or a part of a thing)
H7364.def: a primitive root; to lave (the whole or a part of a thing).

H7365.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H7364 (רָחַץ) (probably through the accessory idea of ministering as a servant at the bath); to attend upon.

H7367.def: feminine of H7366 (רַחַץ); a bathing place.

H7368.def: a primitive root; to widen (in any direction), i.e. (intransitively) recede or (transitively) remove (literally or figuratively, of place or relation).
H7368.kjv: (a-, be, cast, drive, get, go, keep (self), put, remove, be too, (wander), withdraw) far (away, off), loose, refrain, very, (be) a good way (off)

H7371.gloss: a winnowing-fork (as blowing the chaff away)
H7371.def: from H7306 (רוּחַ); a winnowing-fork (as blowing the chaff away).

H7372.def: a primitive root; to be moist.

H7374.def: from an unused root meaning to tremble; terror.

H7375.def: a root compounded from H7373 (רָטֹב) and H2954 (טָפַשׁ); to be rejuvenated.

H7376.def: a primitive root; to dash down.

H7377.def: from H7301 (רָוָה); irrigation, i.e. a shower.

H7378.def: or רוּב; a primitive root; properly, to toss, i.e. grapple; mostly figuratively, to wrangle, i.e. hold a controversy; (by implication) to defend.
H7378.kjv: adversary, chide, complain, contend, debate, ever, lay wait, plead, rebuke, strive, thoroughly

H7379.def: or רִב; from H7378 (רִיב); a contest (personal or legal).
H7379.kjv: adversary, cause, chiding, contend(-tion), controversy, multitude (from the margin), pleading, strife, strive(-ing), suit

H7380.def: from H7378 (רִיב); contentious; Ribai, an Israelite.

H7382.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H7381 (רֵיחַ); odor (as if blown).

H7383.def: or רִפָה; from H7322 (רוּף); (only plural), grits (as pounded).

H7384.gloss: Riphath, a grandson of Japheth and his descendants
H7384.def: or (probably by orthographical error) דִּיפַת; of foreign origin; Riphath, a grandson of Japheth and his descendants.

H7385.def: from H7324 (רוּק); emptiness; figuratively, a worthless thing; adverbially, in vain.
H7385.kjv: empty, to no purpose, (in) vain (thing), vanity

H7386.def: or (shorter) רֵק; from H7324 (רוּק); empty; figuratively, worthless.

H7387.def: from H7386 (רֵיק); emptily; figuratively (objective) ineffectually, (subjective) undeservedly.
H7387.kjv: without cause, empty, in vain, void

H7388.def: from H7325 (רוּר); saliva; by resemblance, broth.

H7389.def: or רֵאשׁ; or רִישׁ; from H7326 (רוּשׁ); poverty.

H7390.def: from H7401 (רָכַךְ); tender (literally or figuratively); by implication, weak.

H7392.gloss: to ride (on an animal or in a vehicle)
H7392.def: a primitive root; to ride (on an animal or in a vehicle); causatively, to place upon (for riding or generally), to despatch.
H7392.kjv: bring (on (horse-) back), carry, get (oneself) up, on (horse-) back, put, (cause to, make to) ride (in a chariot, on, -r), set

H7393.kjv: chariot, (upper) millstone, multitude (from the margin), wagon

H7394.gloss: Rekab, the name of two Arabs and of two Israelites
H7394.def: from H7392 (רָכַב); rider; Rekab, the name of two Arabs and of two Israelites.

H7395.kjv: chariot man, driver of a chariot, horseman

H7397.def: probably feminine from H7401 (רָכַךְ); softness; Rekah, a place in Palestine.

H7398.def: from passive participle of H7392 (רָכַב); a vehicle (as ridden on).

H7399.def: or רְכֻשׁ; from passive participle of H7408 (רָכַשׁ); property (as gathered).

H7400.def: from H7402 (רָכַל); a scandal-monger (as travelling about).

H7401.def: a primitive root; to soften (intransitively or transitively), used figuratively.
H7401.kjv: (be) faint(-hearted), mollify, (be, make) soft(-er), be tender

H7402.def: a primitive root; to travel for trading.

H7403.def: from H7402 (רָכַל); merchant; Rakal, a place in Palestine.

H7404.def: feminine passive participle of H7402 (רָכַל); trade (as peddled).

H7406.gloss: a mountain ridge (as of tied summits)
H7406.def: from H7405 (רָכַס); a mountain ridge (as of tied summits).

H7407.def: from H7405 (רָכַס); a snare (as of tied meshes).

H7408.def: a primitive root; to lay up, i.e. collect.

H7409.gloss: a relay of animals on a post-route (as stored up for that
H7409.def: from H7408 (רָכַשׁ); a relay of animals on a post-route (as stored up for that purpose); by implication, a courser.

H7410.gloss: Ram, the name of an Arabian and of an Israelite
H7410.def: active participle of H7311 (רוּם); high; Ram, the name of an Arabian and of an Israelite.

H7411.def: a primitive root; to hurl; specifically, to shoot; figuratively, to delude or betray (as if causing to fall).
H7411.kjv: beguile, betray, (bow-) man, carry, deceive, throw

H7412.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H7411 (רָמָה); to throw, set, (figuratively) assess.

H7413.gloss: a height (as a seat of idolatry)
H7413.def: feminine active participle of H7311 (רוּם); a height (as a seat of idolatry).

H7414.gloss: Ramah, the name of four places in Palestine
H7414.def: the same as H7413 (רָמָה); Ramah, the name of four places in Palestine.

H7415.gloss: a maggot (as rapidly bred), literally or figuratively
H7415.def: from H7426 (רָמַם) in the sense of breeding (compare H7311 (רוּם)); a maggot (as rapidly bred), literally or figuratively.

H7416.def: or רִמֹּן; from H7426 (רָמַם); a pomegranate, the tree (from its upright growth) or the fruit (also an artificial ornament).

H7417.def: or (shorter) (רִמֹּן; or רִמּוֹנוֹ; (1 Chronicles 6:62 (H77 (אֶבֶץ))), the same as H7416 (רִמּוֹן); in Joshua 19:13: הַמְּתֹאָר is mistaken for part of a name; article with the passive participle of H8388 (תָּאַר); the (one) marked off, i.e. which pertains).; Rimmon, the name of a Syrian deity, also of five places in Palestine.

H7418.gloss: Ramoth-Negeb or Ramath-Negeb, a place in Palestine
H7418.def: or רָמַת נֶגֶב; from the plural or construct form of H7413 (רָמָה) and H5045 (נֶגֶב); heights (or height) of the South; Ramoth-Negeb or Ramath-Negeb, a place in Palestine.
H7418.kjv: south Ramoth, Ramath of the south

H7420.def: from an unused root meaning to hurl; a lance (as thrown); especially the iron point.

H7421.def: for H761 (אֲרַמִּי); a Ramite, i.e. Aramaean.

H7422.def: from H7311 (רוּם) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has raised; Ramjah, an Israelite.

H7423.kjv: deceit(-ful, -fully), false, guile, idle, slack, slothful

H7424.def: of foreign origin; a brood mare.

H7425.def: from an unused root and H3050 (יָהּ) (perhaps meaning to deck); Jah has bedecked; Remaljah, an Israelite.

H7426.def: a primitive root; to rise (literally or figuratively).
H7426.kjv: exalt, get (oneself) up, lift up (self), mount up

H7427.def: from the active participle of H7426 (רָמַם); exaltation.

H7428.gloss: Rimmon-Perets, a place in the Desert
H7428.def: from H7416 (רִמּוֹן) and H6556 (פֶּרֶץ); pomegranate of the breach; Rimmon-Perets, a place in the Desert.

H7429.gloss: to tread upon (as a potter, in walking or abusively)
H7429.def: a primitive root; to tread upon (as a potter, in walking or abusively).
H7429.kjv: oppressor, stamp upon, trample (under feet), tread (down, upon)

H7430.gloss: to glide swiftly, i.e. to crawl or move with short steps
H7430.def: a primitive root; properly, to glide swiftly, i.e. to crawl or move with short steps; by analogy to swarm.

H7431.gloss: a reptile or any other rapidly moving animal
H7431.def: from H7430 (רָמַשׂ); a reptile or any other rapidly moving animal.

H7432.def: from H7411 (רָמָה); height; Remeth, a place in Palestine.

H7433.gloss: Ramoth-Gilad, a place East of the Jordan
H7433.def: or רָמוֹת גִּלעָד; (2 Chronicles 22:5), from the plural of H7413 (רָמָה) and H1568 (גִּלְעָד); heights of Gilad; Ramoth-Gilad, a place East of the Jordan.
H7433.kjv: Ramoth-gilead, Ramoth in Gilead. See also H7216 (רָאמוֹת)

H7434.def: from H7413 (רָמָה) and H4707 (מִצְפֶּה) with the article interpolated; height of the watch-tower; Ramath-ham-Mitspeh, a place in Palestine.

H7435.gloss: a Ramathite or inhabitant of Ramah
H7435.def: patronymic of H7414 (רָמָה); a Ramathite or inhabitant of Ramah.

H7436.def: from the dual of H7413 (רָמָה) and the plural of the active participle of H6822 (צָפָה); double height of watchers; Ramathajim-Tsophim, a place in Palestine.

H7437.def: from H7413 (רָמָה) and H3895 (לְחִי); height of a jaw-bone; Ramath-Lechi, a place in Palestine.

H7440.gloss: a creaking (or shrill sound), i.e. shout (of joy or grief)
H7440.def: from H7442 (רָנַן); properly, a creaking (or shrill sound), i.e. shout (of joy or grief).
H7440.kjv: cry, gladness, joy, proclamation, rejoicing, shouting, sing(-ing), triumph

H7441.def: the same as H7440 (רִנָּה); Rinnah, an Israelite.

H7442.gloss: to creak (or emit a stridulous sound)
H7442.def: a primitive root; properly, to creak (or emit a stridulous sound), i.e. to shout (usually for joy).
H7442.kjv: aloud for joy, cry out, be joyful (greatly, make to) rejoice, (cause to) shout (for joy), (cause to) sing (aloud, for joy, out), triumph

H7443.def: from H7442 (רָנַן); an ostrich (from its wail).

H7446.gloss: Rissah, a place in the Desert
H7446.def: from H7450 (רָסַס); a ruin (as dripping to pieces); Rissah, a place in the Desert.

H7447.gloss: dripping to pieces, i.e. a ruin
H7447.def: from H7450 (רָסַס); properly, dripping to pieces, i.e. a ruin; also a dew-drop.

H7448.def: from an unused root meaning to curb; a halter (as restraining); by implication, the jaw.

H7449.def: the same as H7448 (רֶסֶן); Resen, a place in Assyrian.

H7450.def: a primitive root; to comminute; used only as denominative from H7447 (רָסִיס),; to moisten (with drops).

H7451.gloss: bad or (as noun) evil (natural or moral)
H7451.def: from H7489 (רָעַע); bad or (as noun) evil (natural or moral).
H7451.kjv: adversity, affliction, bad, calamity, displease(-ure), distress, evil((-favouredness), man, thing), exceedingly, great, grief(-vous), harm, heavy, hurt(-ful), ill (favoured), mark, mischief(-vous), misery, naught(-ty), noisome, not please, sad(-ly), sore, sorrow, trouble, vex, wicked(-ly, -ness, one), worse(-st), wretchedness, wrong. (Incl. feminine raaah; as adjective or noun.)

H7452.gloss: a crash (of thunder), noise (of war), shout (of joy)
H7452.def: from H7321 (רוּעַ); a crash (of thunder), noise (of war), shout (of joy).

H7453.def: or רֵיעַ; from H7462 (רָעָה); an associate (more or less close).
H7453.kjv: brother, companion, fellow, friend, husband, lover, neighbour, (an-) other

H7454.def: from H7462 (רָעָה); a thought (as association of ideas).

H7455.def: from H7489 (רָעַע); badness (as marring), physically or morally.
H7455.kjv: be so bad, badness, (be so) evil, naughtiness, sadness, sorrow, wickedness

H7456.kjv: (suffer to) famish, (be, have, suffer, suffer to) hunger(-ry)

H7457.def: from H7456 (רָעֵב); hungry (more or less intensely).

H7458.def: from H7456 (רָעֵב); hunger (more or less extensive).

H7460.def: a primitive root; to shudder (more or less violently).

H7461.def: or (feminine) רְעָדָהxlit rᵉâdâh corrected to rᵉʻâdâh; from H7460 (רָעַד); a shudder.

H7462.def: a primitive root; to tend a flock; i.e. pasture it; intransitively, to graze (literally or figuratively); generally to rule; by extension, to associate with (as a friend).
H7462.kjv: break, companion, keep company with, devour, eat up, evil entreat, feed, use as a friend, make friendship with, herdman, keep (sheep) (-er), pastor, shearing house, shepherd, wander, waste

H7464.def: feminine of H7453 (רֵעַ); a female associate.

H7466.def: for H7471 (רְעִי) in the sense of H7453 (רֵעַ); friend; Reu, a postdiluvian patriarch.

H7467.def: from the same as H7466 (רְעוּ) and H410 (אֵל); friend of God; Reuel, the name of Moses' father-in-law, also of an Edomite and an Israelite.

H7468.def: from H7462 (רָעָה) in the sense of H7453 (רֵעַ); a female associate; generally an additional one.

H7469.gloss: a feeding upon, i.e. grasping after
H7469.def: probably from H7462 (רָעָה); a feeding upon, i.e. grasping after.

H7472.def: from H7453 (רֵעַ); social; Rei, an Israelite.

H7473.def: from active participle of H7462 (רָעָה); pastoral; as noun, a shepherd.

H7474.def: feminine of H7453 (רֵעַ); a female associate.

H7475.def: from H7462 (רָעָה) in the sense of H7469 (רְעוּת); desire.

H7476.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H7475 (רַעְיוֹן); a grasp. i.e. (figuratively) mental conception.

H7477.def: a primitive root; to reel, i.e. (figuratively) to brandish.

H7479.def: feminine of H7478 (רַעַל); a long veil (as fluttering).

H7480.def: from H7477 (רָעַל) and H3050 (יָהּ); made to tremble (i.e. fearful) of Jah; Reelajah, an Israelite.

H7481.gloss: to tumble, i.e. be violently agitated
H7481.def: a primitive root; to tumble, i.e. be violently agitated; specifically, to crash (of thunder); figuratively, to irritate (with anger).
H7481.kjv: make to fret, roar, thunder, trouble

H7482.def: from H7481 (רָעַם); a peal of thunder.

H7483.gloss: the mane of a horse (as quivering in the wind)
H7483.def: feminine of H7482 (רַעַם); the mane of a horse (as quivering in the wind).

H7484.def: the same as H7483 (רַעְמָה); Ramah, the name of a grandson of Ham, and of a place (perhaps founded by him).

H7485.def: from H7481 (רָעַם) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has shaken; Raamjah, an Israelite.

H7486.gloss: Rameses or Raamses, a place in Egypt
H7486.def: or רַעַמְסֵס; of Egyptian origin; Rameses or Raamses, a place in Egypt.

H7487.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H7488 (רַעֲנָן); green, i.e. (figuratively) prosperous.

H7488.def: from an unused root meaning to be green; verdant; by analogy, new; figuratively, prosperous.

H7489.gloss: to spoil (literally, by breaking to pieces)
H7489.def: a primitive root; properly, to spoil (literally, by breaking to pieces); figuratively, to make (or be) good fornothing, i.e. bad (physically, socially or morally).
H7489.kjv: afflict, associate selves (by mistake for H7462 (רָעָה)), break (down, in pieces), displease, (be, bring, do) evil (doer, entreat, man), show self friendly (by mistake for H7462 (רָעָה)), do harm, (do) hurt, (behave self, deal) ill, indeed, do mischief, punish, still, vex, (do) wicked (doer, -ly), be (deal, do) worse

H7490.gloss: to spoil (literally, by breaking to pieces)
H7490.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H7489 (רָעַע); properly, to spoil (literally, by breaking to pieces); figuratively, to make (or be) good fornothing, i.e. bad (physically, socially or morally).

H7492.def: a primitive root; to break in pieces; figuratively, harass.

H7493.gloss: to undulate (as the earth, the sky, etc
H7493.def: a primitive root; to undulate (as the earth, the sky, etc.; also a field of grain), particularly through fear; specifically, to spring (as a locust).
H7493.kjv: make afraid, (re-) move, quake, (make to) shake, (make to) tremble

H7494.kjv: commotion, confused noise, earthquake, fierceness, quaking, rattling, rushing, shaking

H7495.gloss: to mend (by stitching), i.e. (figuratively) to cure
H7495.def: or רָפָה; a primitive root; properly, to mend (by stitching), i.e. (figuratively) to cure.
H7495.kjv: cure, (cause to) heal, physician, repair, thoroughly, make whole. See H7503 (רָפָה)

H7496.def: from H7495 (רָפָא) in the sense of H7503 (רָפָה); properly, lax, i.e. (figuratively) a ghost (as dead; in plural only).

H7497.def: or רָפָה; from H7495 (רָפָא) in the sense of invigorating; a giant.
H7497.kjv: giant, Rapha, Rephaim(-s). See also H1051 (בֵּית רָפָא)

H7498.gloss: Rapha or Raphah, the name of two Israelites
H7498.def: or רָפָה; probably the same as H7497 (רָפָא); giant; Rapha or Raphah, the name of two Israelites.

H7499.def: feminine passive participle of H7495 (רָפָא); a medicament.

H7501.def: from H7495 (רָפָא) and H410 (אֵל); God has cured; Rephael, an Israelite.

H7502.def: a primitive root; to spread (a bed); by implication, to refresh.

H7503.gloss: to slacken (in many applications, literal or figurative)
H7503.def: a primitive root; to slacken (in many applications, literal or figurative).
H7503.kjv: abate, cease, consume, draw (toward evening), fail, (be) faint, be (wax) feeble, forsake, idle, leave, let alone (go, down), (be) slack, stay, be still, be slothful, (be) weak(-en). See H7495 (רָפָא)

H7504.def: from H7503 (רָפָה); slack (in body or mind).
H7504.kjv: weak. raphah, Raphah. See H7497 (רָפָא), H7498 (רָפָא). riphah. See H7383 (רִיפָה)

H7505.def: passive participle of H7495 (רָפָא); cured; Raphu, an Israelite.

H7506.def: from an unused root apparently meaning to sustain; support; Rephach, an Israelite.

H7507.def: from H7502 (רָפַד); a railing (as spread along).

H7508.gloss: Rephidim, a place in the Desert
H7508.def: plural of the masculine of the same as H7507 (רְפִידָה); ballusters; Rephidim, a place in the Desert.

H7509.gloss: Rephajah, the name of five Israelites
H7509.def: from H7495 (רָפָא) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has cured; Rephajah, the name of five Israelites.

H7511.def: a primitive root; to trample, i.e. prostrate.

H7512.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H7511 (רָפַס); to trample, i.e. prostrate.

H7513.gloss: a raft (as flat on the water)
H7513.def: from H7511 (רָפַס); a raft (as flat on the water).

H7515.def: a primitive root; to trample, i.e. roil water.

H7517.gloss: a stall for cattle (from their resting there)
H7517.def: probably from H7503 (רָפָה); a stall for cattle (from their resting there).

H7519.def: a primitive root; to run; also to delight in.

H7520.gloss: probably to look askant, i.e. (figuratively) be jealous
H7520.def: a primitive root; probably to look askant, i.e. (figuratively) be jealous.

H7521.def: a primitive root; to be pleased with; specifically, to satisfy adebt.
H7521.kjv: (be) accept(-able), accomplish, set affection, approve, consent with, delight (self), enjoy, (be, have a) favour(-able), like, observe, pardon, (be, have, take) please(-ure), reconcile self

H7522.def: or רָצֹן; from H7521 (רָצָה); delight (especially as shown).
H7522.kjv: (be) acceptable(-ance, -ed), delight, desire, favour, (good) pleasure, (own, self, voluntary) will, as...(what) would

H7523.def: a primitive root; properly, to dash in pieces, i.e. kill (a human being), especially to murder.
H7523.kjv: put to death, kill, (man-) slay(-er), murder(-er)

H7524.def: from H7523 (רָצַח); a crushing; specifically, a murder-cry.

H7525.def: from H7521 (רָצָה); delight; Ritsjah, an Israelite.

H7526.gloss: Retsin, the name of a Syrian and of an Israelite
H7526.def: probably for H7522 (רָצוֹן); Retsin, the name of a Syrian and of an Israelite.

H7528.gloss: to tessellate, i.e. embroider (as if with bright stones)
H7528.def: a denominative from H7529 (רֶצֶף); to tessellate, i.e. embroider (as if with bright stones).

H7529.def: for H7565 (רֶשֶׁף); a red-hot stone (for baking).

H7530.def: the same as H7529 (רֶצֶף); Retseph, a place in Assyrian.

H7531.def: feminine of H7529 (רֶצֶף); a hot stone; also a tessellated pavement.

H7532.def: the same as H7531 (רִצְפָּה); Ritspah, an Israelitess.

H7533.gloss: to crack in pieces, literally or figuratively
H7533.def: a primitive root; to crack in pieces, literally or figuratively.
H7533.kjv: break, bruise, crush, discourage, oppress, struggle together

H7534.def: from H7556 (רָקַק) in its original sense; emaciated (as if flattened out).

H7535.def: the same as H7534 (רַק) as a noun; properly, leanness, i.e. (figuratively) limitation; only adverbial, merely, or conjunctional, although.
H7535.kjv: but, even, except, howbeit howsoever, at the least, nevertheless, nothing but, notwithstanding, only, save, so (that), surely, yet (so), in any wise

H7537.def: a primitive root; to decay (as by worm-eating).

H7540.gloss: to stamp, i.e. to spring about (wildly or for joy)
H7540.def: a primitive root; properly, to stamp, i.e. to spring about (wildly or for joy).

H7541.gloss: thinness, i.e. the side of the head
H7541.def: feminine of H7534 (רַק); properly, thinness, i.e. the side of the head.

H7542.def: from H7534 (רַק); thinness; Rakkon, a place in Palestine.

H7544.def: from H7543 (רָקַח); properly, perfumery, i.e. (by implication) spicery (for flavor).

H7548.def: feminine of H7547 (רַקֻּחַ); a female perfumer.

H7549.def: from H7554 (רָקַע); properly, an expanse, i.e. the firmament or (apparently) visible arch of the sky.

H7550.def: from, H7556 (רָקַק) in its original sense; a thin cake.

H7551.def: a primitive root; to variegate color, i.e. embroider; by implication, to fabricate.

H7552.def: from H7551 (רָקַם); versi-color; Rekem, the name of a place in Palestine, also of a Midianite and an Israelite.

H7553.def: from H7551 (רָקַם); variegation of color; specifically, embroidery.
H7553.kjv: broidered (work), divers colours, (raiment of) needlework (on both sides)

H7554.gloss: to pound the earth (as a sign of passion)
H7554.def: a primitive root; to pound the earth (as a sign of passion); by analogy to expand (by hammering); by implication, to overlay (with thin sheets of metal).
H7554.kjv: beat, make broad, spread abroad (forth, over, out, into plates), stamp, stretch

H7555.def: from H7554 (רָקַע); beaten out, i.e. a (metallic) plate.

H7557.def: from H7556 (רָקַק) in its original sense of diffusing; a beach (as expanded shingle); Rakkath, a place in Palestine.

H7558.def: from an unused root meaning to have leave; a permit.

H7561.gloss: to be (causatively, do or declare) wrong
H7561.def: a primitive root; to be (causatively, do or declare) wrong; by implication, to disturb, violate.
H7561.kjv: condemn, make trouble, vex, be (commit, deal, depart, do) wicked(-ly, -ness)

H7563.def: from H7561; morally wrong; concretely, an (actively) bad person.

H7565.def: from H8313 (שָׂרַף); a live coal; by analogy lightning; figuratively, an arrow, (as flashing through the air); specifically, fever.
H7565.kjv: arrow, (burning) coal, burning heat, spark, hot thunderbolt

H7566.def: the same as H7565 (רֶשֶׁף); Resheph, an Israelite.

H7568.def: from H3423 (יָרַשׁ); a net (as catching animals).

H7573.gloss: to yoke up (to the pole of a vehicle)
H7573.def: a primitive root; to yoke up (to the pole of a vehicle).

H7574.gloss: the Spanish broom (from its pole-like stems)
H7574.def: or רֹתֶם; from H7573 (רָתַם); the Spanish broom (from its pole-like stems).

H7575.gloss: Rithmah, a place in the Desert
H7575.def: feminine of H7574 (רֶתֶם); Rithmah, a place in the Desert.

H7577.def: feminine passive participle of H7576 (רָתַק); something fastened, i.e. a chain.

H7579.def: a primitive root; to bale up water.

H7580.def: a primitive root; to rumble or moan.

H7581.def: from H7580 (שָׁאַג); a rumbling or moan.

H7582.def: a primitive root; to rush; by implication, to desolate.

H7583.def: a primitive root (identical with through the idea of whirling to giddiness); to stun, i.e. (intransitively) be astonished.

H7585.gloss: Hades or the world of the dead (as if a subterranean retr
H7585.def: or שְׁאֹל; from H7592 (שָׁאַל); Hades or the world of the dead (as if a subterranean retreat), including its accessories and inmates.

H7586.gloss: Shaul, the name of an Edomite and two Israelites
H7586.def: passive participle of H7592 (שָׁאַל); asked; Shaul, the name of an Edomite and two Israelites.

H7587.gloss: a Shaulite or descendant of Shaul
H7587.def: patronymic from H7856 (שִׂטְנָה); a Shaulite or descendant of Shaul.

H7588.def: from H7582 (שָׁאָה); uproar (as of rushing); by implication, destruction.

H7589.def: from an unused root meaning to push aside; contempt.

H7590.def: for active part of H7750 (שׂוּט) (compare H7589 (שְׁאָט)); one contemning.

H7592.def: or שָׁאֵל; a primitive root; to inquire; by implication, to request; by extension, to demand.
H7592.kjv: ask (counsel, on), beg, borrow, lay to charge, consult, demand, desire, earnestly, enquire, greet, obtain leave, lend, pray, request, require, salute, straitly, surely, wish

H7593.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H7592 (שָׁאַל); to inquire; by implication, to request; by extension, to demand.

H7594.def: from H7592 (שָׁאַל); request; Sheal, an Israelite.

H7595.gloss: a question (at law), i.e. judicial decision or mandate
H7595.def: (Aramaic) from H7593 (שְׁאֵל); properly, a question (at law), i.e. judicial decision or mandate.

H7596.def: or שֵׁלָה; (1 Samuel 1:17), from H7592 (שָׁאַל); a petition; by implication, a loan.

H7597.def: or שַׁלְתִּיאֵל; from H7592 (שָׁאַל) and H410 (אֵל); I have asked God; Shealtiel, an Israelite.

H7598.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H7597 (שְׁאַלְתִּיאֵל); Shealtiel, an Israelite.

H7599.def: a primitive root; to loll, i.e. be peaceful.
H7599.kjv: be at ease, be quiet, rest. See also H1052 (בֵּית שְׁאָן)

H7600.def: from H7599 (שָׁאַן); secure; in a bad sense, haughty.
H7600.kjv: that is at ease, quiet, tumult. Compare H7946 (שַׁלְאֲנָן)

H7602.def: a primitive root; to inhale eagerly; figuratively, to cover; by implication, to be angry; also to hasten.
H7602.kjv: desire (earnestly), devour, haste, pant, snuff up, swallow up

H7603.gloss: barm or yeast-cake (as swelling by fermentation)
H7603.def: from H7604 (שָׁאַר); barm or yeast-cake (as swelling by fermentation).

H7604.gloss: to swell up, i.e. be (causatively, make) redundant
H7604.def: a primitive root; properly, to swell up, i.e. be (causatively, make) redundant.
H7604.kjv: leave, (be) left, let, remain, remnant, reserve, the rest

H7607.gloss: flesh (as swelling out), as living or forfood
H7607.def: from H7604 (שָׁאַר); flesh (as swelling out), as living or forfood; generally food of any kind; figuratively, kindred by blood.
H7607.kjv: body, flesh, food, (near) kin(-sman, -swoman), near (nigh) (of kin)

H7608.def: feminine of H7607 (שְׁאֵר); female kindred by blood.

H7609.def: the same as H7608 (שַׁאֲרָה); Sheerah, an Israelitess.

H7610.gloss: Shear-Jashub, the symbolic name of one of Isaiah's sons
H7610.def: from H7605 (שְׁאָר) and H7725 (שׁוּב); a remnant will return; Shear-Jashub, the symbolic name of one of Isaiah's sons.

H7611.gloss: a remainder or residual (surviving, final) portion
H7611.def: from H7604 (שָׁאַר); a remainder or residual (surviving, final) portion.
H7611.kjv: that had escaped, be left, posterity, remain(-der), remnant, residue, rest
