H7613.def: from H5375 (נָשָׂא); an elevation or leprous scab; figuratively, elation or cheerfulness; exaltation in rank or character.
H7613.kjv: be accepted, dignity, excellency, highness, raise up self, rising

H7614.def: of foreign origin; Sheba, the name of three early progenitors of tribes and of an Ethiopian district.

H7615.gloss: a Shebaite or descendant of Sheba
H7615.def: patronymic from H7614 (שְׁבָא); a Shebaite or descendant of Sheba.

H7616.def: from an unused root meaning to break up; a fragment, i.e. ruin.

H7617.def: a primitive root; to transport into captivity.
H7617.kjv: (bring away, carry, carry away, lead, lead away, take) captive(-s), drive (take) away

H7618.gloss: a gem (from its sparkle), probably the agate
H7618.def: from an unused root (probably identical with that of H7617 (שָׁבָה) through the idea of subdivision into flashes or streamers (compare H7632 (שָׁבִיב)) meaning to flame; a gem (from its sparkle), probably the agate.

H7619.gloss: Shebuel or Shubael, the name of two Israelites
H7619.def: or שׁוּבָאֵל; from H7617 (שָׁבָה) (abbreviated form) or H7725 (שׁוּב) and H410 (אֵל); captive (or returned) of God; Shebuel or Shubael, the name of two Israelites.

H7620.gloss: literally, sevened, i.e. a week (specifically, of years)
H7620.def: or שָׁבֻעַ; also (feminine) שְׁבֻעָה; properly, passive participle of H7650 (שָׁבַע) as a denominative of H7651 (שֶׁבַע); literally, sevened, i.e. a week (specifically, of years).

H7621.def: feminine passive participle of H7650 (שָׁבַע); properly, something sworn, i.e. an oath.

H7622.def: or שְׁבִית; from H7617 (שָׁבָה); exile, concretely, prisoners; figuratively, a former state of prosperity.

H7623.gloss: to address in aloud tone, i.e. (specifically) loud
H7623.def: a primitive root; properly, to address in aloud tone, i.e. (specifically) loud; figuratively, to pacify (as if by words).
H7623.kjv: commend, glory, keep in, praise, still, triumph

H7624.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H7623 (שָׁבַח); to adulate, i.e. adore.

H7626.def: from an unused root probably meaning to branch off; a scion, i.e. (literally) a stick (for punishing, writing, fighting, ruling, walking, etc.) or (figuratively) a clan.
H7626.kjv: correction, dart, rod, sceptre, staff, tribe

H7627.def: of foreign origin; Shebat, a Jewish month.

H7628.def: from H7618 (שְׁבוּ); exiled; captured; as noun, exile (abstractly or concretely and collectively); by extension, booty.
H7628.kjv: captive(-ity), prisoners, take away, that was taken

H7629.def: from H7617 (שָׁבָה); captor; Shobi, an Ammonite.

H7631.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H7632 (שָׁבִיב); flame (as split into tongues).

H7632.def: from the same as H7616 (שָׁבָב); flame (as split into tongues).

H7633.def: feminine of H7628 (שְׁבִי); exile (abstractly or concretely and collectively).

H7634.def: feminine of the same as H7629 (שֹׁבִי); captivation; Shobjah, an Israelite.

H7635.gloss: a track or passage-way (as if flowing along)
H7635.def: from the same as H7640 (שֹׁבֶל); a track or passage-way (as if flowing along).

H7636.def: from an unused root meaning to interweave; a netting for the hair.

H7637.def: or שְׁבִעִי; ordinal from H7657 (שִׁבְעִים); seventh.

H7638.gloss: a netting (ornament to the capital of a column)
H7638.def: from an unused root meaning to intwine; a netting (ornament to the capital of a column).

H7639.def: feminine of H7638 (שָׂבָךְ); a net-work, i.e. (in hunting) a snare, (in architecture) a ballustrade; also a reticulated ornament to apillar.

H7640.gloss: a lady's train (as trailing after her)
H7640.def: from an unused root meaning to flow; a lady's train (as trailing after her).

H7641.def: or (feminine) שִׁבֹּלֶת; from the same as H7640 (שֹׁבֶל); a stream (as flowing); also an ear of grain (as growing out); by analogy, a branch.
H7641.kjv: branch, channel, ear (of corn), (water-)flood, Shibboleth. Compare H5451 (סִבֹּלֶת)

H7642.gloss: a snail (as if floating in its own slime)
H7642.def: from the same as H7640 (שֹׁבֶל); a snail (as if floating in its own slime).

H7643.gloss: Sebam or Sibmah, a place in Moab
H7643.def: or (feminine) שִׂבְמָה; probably from H1313 (בָּשָׂם); spice; Sebam or Sibmah, a place in Moab.

H7644.def: or שֶׁבְנָה; from an unused root meaning to grow; growth; Shebna or Shebnah, an Israelite.

H7645.gloss: Shebanjah, the name of three or four Israelites
H7645.def: or שְׁבַנְיָהוּ; from the same as H7644 (שֶׁבְנָא) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has grown (i.e. prospered); Shebanjah, the name of three or four Israelites.

H7646.def: or שָׂבֵעַ; a primitive root; to sate, i.e. fill to satisfaction (literally or figuratively).
H7646.kjv: have enough, fill (full, self, with), be (to the) full (of), have plenty of, be satiate, satisfy (with), suffice, be weary of

H7648.def: from H7646 (שָׂבַע); satisfaction (of food or (figuratively) joy).

H7649.gloss: satiated (in a pleasant or disagreeable sense)
H7649.def: from H7646 (שָׂבַע); satiated (in a pleasant or disagreeable sense).

H7650.def: a primitive root; properly to be complete, but used only as a denominative from H7651 (שֶׁבַע); to seven oneself, i.e. swear (as if by repeating a declaration seven times).
H7650.kjv: adjure, charge (by an oath, with an oath), feed to the full (by mistake for H7646 (שָׂבַע)), take an oath, straitly, (cause to, make to) swear

H7651.def: or (masculine) (שִׁבְעָה); from H7650 (שָׁבַע); a primitive cardinal number; seven (as the sacred full one); also (adverbially) seven times; by implication, a week; by extension, an indefinite number.

H7652.def: the same as H7651 (שֶׁבַע); seven; Sheba, the name of a place in Palestine, and of two Israelites.

H7654.kjv: (to have) enough, till...be full, (un-) satiable, satisfy, sufficiently

H7655.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H7651 (שֶׁבַע); seven (as the sacred full one); also (adverbially) seven times; by implication, a week; by extension, an indefinite number.

H7656.def: masculine of H7651 (שֶׁבַע); seven(-th); Shebah, a well in Palestine.

H7658.def: prolonged for the masculine of H7651 (שֶׁבַע); seven.

H7660.def: a primitive root; to interweave (colored) threads in squares; by implication (of reticulation) to inchase gems in gold.

H7662.gloss: to quit, i.e. allow to remain
H7662.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to the root of H7733 (שׁוֹבֵק); to quit, i.e. allow to remain.

H7663.def: erroneously שָׁבַר; (Nehemiah 2:13,15), a primitive root; to scrutinize; by implication (of watching) to expect (with hope and patience).

H7665.def: a primitive root; to burst (literally or figuratively).
H7665.kjv: break (down, off, in pieces, up), broken (-hearted), bring to the birth, crush, destroy, hurt, quench, quite, tear, view (by mistake for H7663 (שָׂבַר))

H7666.def: denominative from H7668 (שֶׁבֶר); to deal in grain.

H7667.def: or שֵׁבֶר; from H7665 (שָׁבַר); a fracture, figuratively, ruin; specifically, a solution (of a dream).
H7667.kjv: affliction, breach, breaking, broken(-footed, -handed), bruise, crashing, destruction, hurt, interpretation, vexation

H7668.def: the same as H7667 (שֶׁבֶר); grain (as if broken into kernels).

H7669.def: the same as H7667 (שֶׁבֶר); Sheber, an Israelite.

H7670.def: from H7665 (שָׁבַר); rupture, i.e. a pang; figuratively, ruin.

H7671.def: plural of H7667 (שֶׁבֶר); ruins; Shebarim, a place in Palestine.

H7672.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H7660 (שָׁבַץ); to entangle, i.e. perplex.

H7673.gloss: to repose, i.e. desist from exertion
H7673.def: a primitive root; to repose, i.e. desist from exertion; used in many implied relations (causative, figurative or specific).
H7673.kjv: (cause to, let, make to) cease, celebrate, cause (make) to fail, keep (sabbath), suffer to be lacking, leave, put away (down), (make to) rest, rid, still, take away

H7674.kjv: cease, sit still, loss of time

H7675.def: infinitive of H3427 (יָשַׁב); properly, session; but used also concretely, an abode or locality.

H7676.def: intensive from H7673 (שָׁבַת); intermission, i.e (specifically) the Sabbath.

H7677.def: from H7676 (שַׁבָּת); a sabbatism or special holiday.

H7678.gloss: Shabbethai, the name of three Israelites
H7678.def: from H7676 (שַׁבָּת); restful; Shabbethai, the name of three Israelites.

H7679.gloss: to grow, i.e. (causatively) to enlarge, (figuratively) laud
H7679.def: ; a primitive root; to grow, i.e. (causatively) to enlarge, (figuratively) laud.

H7681.def: probably from H7686 (שָׁגָה); erring; Shage, an Israelite.

H7682.gloss: to be (causatively, make) lofty, especially inaccessible
H7682.def: a primitive root; to be (causatively, make) lofty, especially inaccessible; by implication, safe, strong; used literally and figuratively.
H7682.kjv: defend, exalt, be excellent, (be, set on) high, lofty, be safe, set up (on high), be too strong

H7683.def: a primitive root; to stray, i.e. (figuratively) sin (with more or less apology).
H7683.kjv: also for that, deceived, err, go astray, sin ignorantly

H7684.def: from H7683 (שָׁגַג); a mistake or inadvertent transgression.

H7685.def: a primitive root; to enlarge (especially upward, also figuratively).

H7686.def: a primitive root; to stray (causatively, mislead), usually (figuratively) to mistake, especially (morally) to transgress; by extension (through the idea of intoxication) to reel, (figuratively) be enraptured.
H7686.kjv: (cause to) go astray, deceive, err, be ravished, sin through ignorance, (let, make to) wander

H7687.gloss: Segub, the name of two Israelites
H7687.def: from H7682 (שָׂגַב); aloft; Segub, the name of two Israelites.

H7688.gloss: to peep, i.e. glance sharply at
H7688.def: a primitive root; to peep, i.e. glance sharply at.

H7690.gloss: large (in size, quantity or number, also adverbial)
H7690.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H7689 (שַׂגִּיא); large (in size, quantity or number, also adverbial).
H7690.kjv: exceeding, great(-ly); many, much, sore, very

H7692.gloss: aberration, i.e. (technically) a dithyramb or rambling poem
H7692.def: or שִׁגָּיֹנָה; from H7686 (שָׁגָה); properly, aberration, i.e. (technically) a dithyramb or rambling poem.

H7693.def: a primitive root; to copulate with.

H7696.def: a primitive root; to rave through insanity.

H7698.def: from an unused root probably meaning to eject; the fetus (as finally expelled).

H7699.gloss: the breast of a woman or animal (as bulging)
H7699.def: or שֹׁד; probably from H7736 (שׁוּד) (in its original sense) contracted; the breast of a woman or animal (as bulging).

H7701.def: or שׁוֹד; (Job 5:21), from H7736 (שׁוּד); violence, ravage.
H7701.kjv: desolation, destruction, oppression, robbery, spoil(-ed, -er, -ing), wasting

H7702.def: a primitive root; to abrade, i.e. harrow afield.

H7703.def: a primitive root; properly, to be burly, i.e. (figuratively) powerful (passively, impregnable); by implication, to ravage.
H7703.kjv: dead, destroy(-er), oppress, robber, spoil(-er), utterly, (lay) waste

H7704.def: or שָׂדַי; from an unused root meaning to spread out; a field (as flat).
H7704.kjv: country, field, ground, land, soil, wild

H7705.gloss: a wife (as mistress of the house)
H7705.def: from H7703 (שָׁדַד); a wife (as mistress of the house).

H7707.def: from the same as H7704 (שָׂדֶה) and H217 (אוּר); spreader of light; Shedejur, an Israelite.

H7708.def: plural from the same as H7704 (שָׂדֶה); flats; Siddim, a valley in Palestine.

H7709.def: apparently from H7704 (שָׂדֶה); a cultivated field.

H7713.gloss: a row, i.e. rank (of soldiers), story (of rooms)
H7713.def: from an unused root meaning to regulate; a row, i.e. rank (of soldiers), story (of rooms).

H7714.gloss: Shadrak, the Babylonian name of one of Daniel's companions
H7714.def: probably of foreign origin; Shadrak, the Babylonian name of one of Daniel's companions.

H7715.gloss: Shadrak, the Babylonian name of one of Daniel's companions
H7715.def: (Aramaic) the same as H7714 (שַׁדְרַךְ); Shadrak, the Babylonian name of one of Daniel's companions.

H7716.gloss: a member of a flock, i.e. a sheep or goat
H7716.def: or שֵׂי; probably from H7582 (שָׁאָה) through the idea of pushing out to graze; a member of a flock, i.e. a sheep or goat.
H7716.kjv: (lesser, small) cattle, ewe, goat, lamb, sheep. Compare H2089 (זֶה)

H7717.def: from an unused root meaning to testify; a witness.

H7718.gloss: a gem, probably the beryl (from its pale green color)
H7718.def: from an unused root probably mean to blanch; a gem, probably the beryl (from its pale green color).

H7719.def: the same as H7718 (שֹׁהַם); Shoham, an Israelite.

H7720.gloss: a round pendant for the neck
H7720.def: from the same as H5469 (סַהַר); a round pendant for the neck.
H7720.kjv: ornament, round tire like the moon

H7721.def: from an unused root (akin to H5375 (נָשָׂא) and H7722 (שׁוֹא)) meaning to rise; a rising.

H7722.def: or (feminine) שׁוֹאָה; or שֹׁאָה; from an unused root meaning to rush over; a tempest; by implication, devastation.

H7723.def: or שַׁו; from the same as H7722 (שׁוֹא) in the sense of desolating; evil (as destructive), literally (ruin) or morally (especially guile); figuratively idolatry (as false, subjective), uselessness (as deceptive, objective; also adverbially, in vain).

H7724.def: from the same as H7723 (שָׁוְא); false; Sheva, an Israelite.

H7725.def: a primitive root; to turn back (hence, away) transitively or intransitively, literally or figuratively (not necessarily with the idea of return to the starting point); generally to retreat; often adverbial, again.
H7725.kjv: ((break, build, circumcise, dig, do anything, do evil, feed, lay down, lie down, lodge, make, rejoice, send, take, weep)) again, (cause to) answer (again), in any case (wise), at all, averse, bring (again, back, home again), call (to mind), carry again (back), cease, certainly, come again (back), consider, continually, convert, deliver (again), deny, draw back, fetch home again, fro, get (oneself) (back) again, give (again), go again (back, home), (go) out, hinder, let, (see) more, needs, be past, pay, pervert, pull in again, put (again, up again), recall, recompense, recover, refresh, relieve, render (again), requite, rescue, restore, retrieve, (cause to, make to) return, reverse, reward, say nay, send back, set again, slide back, still, surely, take back (off), (cause to, make to) turn (again, self again, away, back, back again, backward, from, off), withdraw

H7727.gloss: Shobab, the name of two Israelites
H7727.def: the same as H7726 (שׁוֹבָב); rebellious; Shobab, the name of two Israelites.

H7728.def: from H7725 (שׁוּב); apostate, i.e. heathenish or (actually) heathen.

H7730.def: for H5441 (סֹבֶךְ); a thicket, i.e. interlaced branches.

H7731.def: perhaps for H7730 (שׂוֹבֶךְ); Shobak, a Syrian.

H7732.gloss: Shobal, the name of an Edomite and two Israelites
H7732.def: from the same as H7640 (שֹׁבֶל); overflowing; Shobal, the name of an Edomite and two Israelites.

H7733.def: active participle from a primitive root meaning to leave (compare H7662 (שְׁבַק)); forsaking; Shobek, an Israelite.

H7735.def: a primitive root; to hedge in.

H7736.def: a primitive root; properly, to swell up, i.e. figuratively (by implication of insolence) to devastate.

H7737.def: a primitive root; properly, to level, i.e. equalize; figuratively, to resemble; by implication, to adjust (i.e. counterbalance, be suitable, compose, place, yield, etc.).
H7737.kjv: avail, behave, bring forth, compare, countervail, (be, make) equal, lay, be (make, a-) like, make plain, profit, reckon

H7740.def: from H7737 (שָׁוָה); plain; Shaveh, a place in Palestine.

H7741.gloss: Shaveh-Kirjathajim, a place East of the Jordan
H7741.def: from the same as H7740 (שָׁוֵה) and the dual of H7151 (קִרְיָה); plain of a double city; Shaveh-Kirjathajim, a place East of the Jordan.

H7742.def: a primitive root; to muse pensively.

H7743.def: a primitive root; to sink, literally or figuratively.

H7744.def: from H7743 (שׁוּחַ); dell; Shuach, a son of Abraham.

H7746.def: the same as H7745 (שׁוּחָה); Shuchah, an Israelite.

H7747.gloss: a Shuchite or descendant of Shuach
H7747.def: patronymic from H7744 (שׁוּחַ); a Shuchite or descendant of Shuach.

H7748.def: from H7743 (שׁוּחַ); humbly; Shucham, an Israelite.

H7750.def: or (by permutation) סוּט; a primitive root; to detrude, i.e. (intransitively and figuratively) become derelict (wrongly practise; namely, idolatry).

H7751.def: a primitive root; properly, to push forth; (but used only figuratively) to lash, i.e. (the sea with oars) to row; by implication, to travel.
H7751.kjv: go (about, through, to and fro), mariner, rower, run to and fro

H7752.def: from H7751 (שׁוּט); a lash (literally or figuratively).

H7753.def: a primitive root; to entwine, i.e. shut in (for formation, protection or restraint).

H7754.def: or (feminine) שׂוֹכָה; from H7753 (שׂוּךְ); a branch (as interleaved).

H7755.gloss: Sokoh or Soko, the name of two places in Palestine
H7755.def: or שֹׂכֹה; or שׂוֹכוֹ; from H7753 (שׂוּךְ); Sokoh or Soko, the name of two places in Palestine.

H7756.gloss: a Sukathite or descendant of an unknown Israelite named S
H7756.def: probably patronymic from a name corresponding to H7754 (שׂוֹךְ) (feminine); a Sukathite or descendant of an unknown Israelite named Sukah.

H7757.def: from an unused root meaning to hang down; a skirt; by implication, a bottom edge.

H7758.def: or שֵׁילָל; (Micah 1:8), from H7997 (שָׁלַל); nude (especially bare-foot); by implication, captive.

H7759.def: from H7999 (שָׁלַם); peaceful (with the article always prefixed, making it a pet name); the Shulammith, an epithet of Solomon's queen.

H7760.gloss: to put (used in a great variety of applications
H7760.def: or שִׂים; a primitive root; to put (used in a great variety of applications, literal, figurative, inferentially, and elliptically).
H7760.kjv: any wise, appoint, bring, call (a name), care, cast in, change, charge, commit, consider, convey, determine, disguise, dispose, do, get, give, heap up, hold, impute, lay (down, up), leave, look, make (out), mark, name, on, ordain, order, paint, place, preserve, purpose, put (on), regard, rehearse, reward, (cause to) set (on, up), shew, stedfastly, take, tell, tread down, (over-)turn, wholly, work

H7761.gloss: to put (used in a great variety of applications
H7761.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H7760 (שׂוּם); to put (used in a great variety of applications, literal, figurative, inferentially, and elliptically).
H7761.kjv: command, give, lay, make, name, regard, set

H7762.def: from an unused root meaning to exhale; garlic (from its rank odor).

H7763.gloss: Shomer, the name of two Israelites
H7763.def: or שֹׁמֵר; active participle of H8104 (שָׁמַר); keeper; Shomer, the name of two Israelites.

H7764.def: from an unused root meaning to rest; quiet; Shuni, an Israelite.

H7765.gloss: a Shunite (collectively) or descendants of Shuni
H7765.def: patronymic from H7764 (שׁוּנִי); a Shunite (collectively) or descendants of Shuni.

H7766.def: probably from the same as H7764 (שׁוּנִי); quietly; Shunem, a place in Pal.

H7767.gloss: a Shunammitess, or female inhabitant of Shunem
H7767.def: patrial from H7766 (שׁוּנֵם); a Shunammitess, or female inhabitant of Shunem.

H7768.def: a primitive root; properly, to be free; but used only causatively and reflexively, to halloo (for help, i.e. freedom from some trouble).

H7770.def: the same as H7769 (שׁוּעַ); Shua, a Canaanite.

H7771.def: from H7768 (שָׁוַע) in the original sense of freedom; a noble, i.e. liberal, opulent; also (as noun in the derived sense) a halloo.

H7772.def: the same as H7771 (שׁוֹעַ); rich; Shoa, an Oriental people.

H7774.def: from H7768 (שָׁוַע); wealth; Shua, an Israelitess.

H7776.def: or שֻׁעָל; from the same as H8168 (שֹׁעַל); a jackal (as a burrower).

H7777.gloss: Shual, the name of an Israelite and of a place in Palestine
H7777.def: the same as H7776 (שׁוּעָל); Shual, the name of an Israelite and of a place in Palestine.

H7778.def: or שֹׁעֵר active participle of H8176 (שָׁעַר) (as denominative from H8179 (שַׁעַר)); a janitor.

H7779.def: a primitive root; properly, to gape, i.e. snap at; figuratively, to overwhelm.

H7780.def: from H8210 (שָׁפַךְ); poured; Shophak, a Syrian.

H7781.gloss: a Shuphamite (collectively) or descendants of Shephupham
H7781.def: patronymic from H8197 (שְׁפוּפָם); a Shuphamite (collectively) or descendants of Shephupham.

H7782.gloss: a cornet (as giving a clear sound) or curved horn
H7782.def: or שֹׁפָר; from H8231 (שָׁפַר) in the original sense of incising; a cornet (as giving a clear sound) or curved horn.

H7783.gloss: to run after or over, i.e. overflow
H7783.def: a primitive root; to run after or over, i.e. overflow.

H7784.def: from H7783 (שׁוּק); a street (as run over).

H7785.def: from H7783 (שׁוּק); the (lower) leg (as a runner).

H7786.def: a primitive root; properly, to vanquish; by implication, to rule (causatively, crown).
H7786.kjv: make princes, have power, reign. See H5493 (סוּר)

H7787.def: a primitive root (identical with H7786 (שׂוּר) through the idea of reducing to pieces; compare H4883 (מַשּׂוֹר)); to saw.

H7788.gloss: to turn, i.e. travel about (as a harlot or a merchant)
H7788.def: a primitive root; properly, to turn, i.e. travel about (as a harlot or a merchant).

H7789.def: a primitive root (identical with through the idea of going round for inspection); to spy out, i.e. (generally) survey, (for evil) lurk for, (for good) care for.
H7789.kjv: behold, lay wait, look, observe, perceive, regard, see

H7790.def: from H7889 (שִׁימוֹן); a foe (as lying in wait).

H7791.def: from H7788 (שׁוּר); a wall (as going about).

H7792.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H7791 (שׁוּר); a wall (as going about).

H7793.gloss: Shur, a region of the Desert
H7793.def: the same as H7791 (שׁוּר); Shur, a region of the Desert.

H7794.def: from H7788 (שׁוּר); a bullock (as a traveller).
H7794.kjv: bull(-ock), cow, ox, wall (by mistake for H7791 (שׁוּר))

H7795.gloss: a ring, i.e. (by analogy) a row (adverbially)
H7795.def: from H7786 (שׂוּר) in the primitive sense of H5493 (סוּר); properly, a ring, i.e. (by analogy) a row (adverbially).

H7796.def: the same as H8321 (שֹׂרֵק); a vine; Sorek, a valley in Palestine.

H7797.def: or שִׂישׂ; a primitive root; to be bright, i.e. cheerful.
H7797.kjv: be glad, greatly, joy, make mirth, rejoice

H7798.def: from H7797 (שׂוּשׂ); joyful; Shavsha, an Israelite.

H7799.def: or שׁוֹשָׁן; or שֹׁשָׁן; and (feminine) שׁוֹשַׁנָּה; from H7797 (שׂוּשׂ); a lily (from its whiteness), as aflower of architectural ornament; also a (straight) trumpet (from the tubular shape).

H7800.def: the same as H7799 (שׁוּשַׁן); Shushan, a place in Persia.

H7801.gloss: a Shushankite (collectively) or inhabitants of some unkno
H7801.def: (Aramaic) of foreign origin; a Shushankite (collectively) or inhabitants of some unknown place in Assyrian.

H7802.def: or (plural of former) שׁוֹשַׁנִּים עֵדוּתlemma שׁוֹשַׁנִּיס עֵדוּת samekh, corrected to שׁוֹשַׁנִּים עֵדוּת; from H7799 (שׁוּשַׁן) and H5715 (עֵדוּת); lily (or trumpet) of assemblage; Shushan-Eduth or Shoshannim-Eduth, the title of a popular song.

H7803.gloss: Shuthelach, the name of two Israelites
H7803.def: probably from H7582 (שָׁאָה) and the same as H8520 (תֶּלַח); crash of breakage; Shuthelach, the name of two Israelites.

H7804.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H5800 (עָזַב); to leave, i.e. (causatively) free.

H7805.def: a primitive root; to tan (by sunburning); figuratively (as if by a piercing ray) to scan.

H7806.def: a primitive root; to twist (a thread of straw).

H7809.def: a primitive root; to donate, i.e. bribe.

H7810.def: from H7809 (שָׁחַד); a donation (venal or redemptive).

H7811.def: a primitive root; to swim; causatively, to inundate.

H7812.def: a primitive root; to depress, i.e. prostrate (especially reflexive, in homage to royalty or God).
H7812.kjv: bow (self) down, crouch, fall down (flat), humbly beseech, do (make) obeisance, do reverence, make to stoop, worship

H7814.def: or שְׂחֹק; from H7832 (שָׂחַק); laughter (in merriment or defiance).
H7814.kjv: derision, laughter(-ed to scorn, -ing), mocked, sport

H7815.def: from H7835 (שָׁחַר); dinginess, i.e. perhaps soot.

H7817.gloss: to sink or depress (reflexive or causative)
H7817.def: a primitive root; to sink or depress (reflexive or causative).
H7817.kjv: bend, bow (down), bring (cast) down, couch, humble self, be (bring) low, stoop

H7818.def: a primitive root; to tread out, i.e. squeeze (grapes).

H7819.def: a primitive root; to slaughter (in sacrifice or massacre).
H7819.kjv: kill, offer, shoot out, slay, slaughter

H7820.def: a primitive root (identical with H7819 (שָׁחַט) through the idea of striking); to hammer out.

H7822.def: from an unused root probably meaning to burn; inflammation, i.e. an ulcer.

H7823.def: or סָחִישׁ; from an unused root apparently meaning to sprout; aftergrowth.

H7824.def: from the same as H7828 (שַׁחַף); a board (as chipped thin).

H7825.def: from H7812 (שָׁחָה); a pit-fall (literally or figuratively).

H7826.def: from an unused root probably meaning to roar; a lion (from his characteristic roar).

H7827.gloss: a scale or shell, i.e. the aromatic mussel
H7827.def: apparently from the same as H7826 (שַׁחַל) through some obscure idea, perhaps that of peeling off by concussion of sound; a scale or shell, i.e. the aromatic mussel..

H7828.def: from an unused root meaning to peel, i.e. emaciate; the gull (as thin).

H7829.def: from the same as H7828 (שַׁחַף); emaciation.

H7830.def: from an unused root apparently meaning to strut; haughtiness (as evinced by the attitude).

H7831.def: from the same as H7830 (שַׁחַץ); proudly; Shachatsom, a place in Palestine.

H7832.def: a primitive root; to laugh (in pleasure or detraction); by implication, to play.
H7832.kjv: deride, have in derision, laugh, make merry, mock(-er), play, rejoice, (laugh to) scorn, be in (make) sport

H7833.def: a primitive root; to comminate (by trituration or attrition).

H7834.def: from H7833 (שָׁחַק); a powder (as beaten small); by analogy, a thin vapor; by extension, the firmament.

H7835.gloss: to be dim or dark (in color)
H7835.def: a primitive root (identical with H7836 (שָׁחַר) through the idea of the duskiness of early dawn); to be dim or dark (in color).

H7836.def: a primitive root; properly, to dawn, i.e. (figuratively) be (up) early at any task (with the implication of earnestness); by extension, to search for (with painstaking).
H7836.kjv: (do something) betimes, enquire early, rise (seek) betimes, seek diligently) early, in the morning)

H7837.def: from H7836 (שָׁחַר); dawn (literal, figurative or adverbial).
H7837.kjv: day(-spring), early, light, morning, whence riseth

H7838.def: or שָׁחוֹר; from H7835 (שָׁחַר); properly, dusky, but also (absol.) jetty.

H7839.def: from H7836 (שָׁחַר); a dawning, i.e. (figuratively) juvenescence.

H7841.def: from H7836 (שָׁחַר) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has sought; Shecharjah, an Israelite.

H7842.def: dual of H7837 (שַׁחַר); double dawn; Shacharajim, an Israelite.

H7843.def: a primitive root; to decay, i.e. (causatively) ruin (literally or figuratively).
H7843.kjv: batter, cast off, corrupt(-er, thing), destroy(-er, -uction), lose, mar, perish, spill, spoiler, utterly, waste(-r)

H7844.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H7843 (שָׁחַת); to decay, i.e. (causatively) ruin (literally or figuratively).

H7845.def: from H7743 (שׁוּחַ); a pit (especially as a trap); figuratively, destruction.

H7846.gloss: a departure from right, i.e. sin
H7846.def: or סֵט; from H7750 (שׂוּט); a departure from right, i.e. sin.

H7847.def: a primitive root; to deviate from duty.

H7848.def: feminine of a derivative (only in the plural שִׁטִּים; meaning the sticks of wood) from the same as H7850 (שֹׁטֵט); the acacia (from its scourging thorns).
H7848.kjv: shittah, shittim. See also H1029 (בֵּית הַשִּׁטָּה)

H7849.kjv: all abroad, enlarge, spread, stretch out

H7850.def: active participle of an otherwise unused root meaning (properly, to pierce; but only as a denominative from H7752 (שׁוֹט)); to flog; a goad.

H7851.gloss: Shittim, a place East of the Jordan
H7851.def: the same as the plural of H7848 (שִׁטָּה); acacia trees; Shittim, a place East of the Jordan.

H7852.def: a primitive root; properly, to lurk for, i.e. persecute.

H7853.def: a primitive root; to attack, (figuratively) accuse.

H7854.def: from H7853 (שָׂטַן); an opponent; especially (with the article prefixed) Satan, the arch-enemy of good.

H7856.gloss: Sitnah, the name of a well in Pal
H7856.def: the same as H7855 (שִׂטְנָה); Sitnah, the name of a well in Pal.

H7857.def: a primitive root; to gush; by implication, to inundate, cleanse; by analogy, to gallop, conquer.
H7857.kjv: drown, (over-) flow(-whelm, rinse, run, rush, (throughly) wash (away)

H7858.def: or שֵׁטֶף; from H7857 (שָׁטַף); a deluge (literally or figuratively).

H7860.def: active participle of an otherwise unused root probably meaning to write; properly, a scribe, i.e. (by analogy or implication) an official superintendent or magistrate.

H7861.def: from the same as H7860 (שֹׁטֵר); magisterial; Shitrai, an Israelite.

H7862.def: probably from H7737 (שָׁוָה); a gift (as available).

H7863.def: from the same as H7721 (שׂוֹא) by permutation; elevation.

H7865.gloss: Sion, the summit of Mount Hermon
H7865.def: from H7863 (שִׂיא); peak; Sion, the summit of Mount Hermon.

H7866.def: from the same as H7722 (שׁוֹא); ruin; Shijon, a place in Palestine.

H7867.gloss: to become aged, i.e. (by implication) to grow gray
H7867.def: a primitive root; properly, to become aged, i.e. (by implication) to grow gray.

H7868.gloss: to become aged, i.e. (by implication) to grow gray
H7868.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H7867 (שִׂיב); properly, to become aged, i.e. (by implication) to grow gray.

H7870.def: by permutation from H7725 (שׁוּב); a return (of property).

H7873.def: from H7734 (שׂוּג); a withdrawal (into a private place).

H7874.def: a primitive root probably meaning to boil up (compare H7736 (שׁוּד)); used only as denominative from H7875 (שִׂיד); to plaster.

H7875.def: from H7874 (שִׂיד)lemma שׂיד missing vowel, corrected to שִׂיד; lime (as boiling when slacked).

H7876.def: a primitive root; to keep in memory.
H7876.kjv: be unmindful. (Render Deuteronomy 32:18, 'A Rock bore thee, thou must recollect; and (yet) thou hast forgotten,' etc.)

H7877.def: of unknown derivation; Shiza, an Israelite.

H7878.def: a primitive root; to ponder, i.e. (by implication) converse (with oneself, and hence, aloud) or (transitively) utter.
H7878.kjv: commune, complain, declare, meditate, muse, pray, speak, talk (with)

H7879.def: from H7878 (שִׂיחַ); a contemplation; by implication, an utterance.
H7879.kjv: babbling, communication, complaint, meditation, prayer, talk

H7880.gloss: a shoot (as if uttered or put forth)
H7880.def: from H7878 (שִׂיחַ); a shoot (as if uttered or put forth), i.e. (generally) shrubbery.

H7881.def: feminine of H7879 (שִׂיחַ); reflection; be extension, devotion.

H7883.def: or שִׁחוֹר; or שִׁחֹר; probably from H7835 (שָׁחַר); dark, i.e. turbid; Shichor, a stream of Egypt.

H7884.def: from the same as H7883 (שִׁיחוֹר) and H3835 (לָבַן); darkish whiteness; Shichor-Libnath, a stream of Palestine.

H7885.def: from H7751 (שׁוּט); also compare H7752 (שׁוֹט); an oar; a scourge (figuratively).

H7886.gloss: Shiloh, an epithet of the Messiah
H7886.def: from H7951 (שָׁלָה); tranquil; Shiloh, an epithet of the Messiah.

H7887.def: or שִׁלֹה; or שִׁילוֹ; or שִׁלוֹ; from the same as H7886 (שִׁילֹה); Shiloh, a place in Palestine.

H7888.gloss: a Shilonite or inhabitant of Shiloh
H7888.def: or שִׁילֹנִי; or שִׁלֹנִי; from H7887 (שִׁילֹה); a Shilonite or inhabitant of Shiloh.

H7889.def: apparently for H3452 (יְשִׁימוֹן); desert; Shimon, an Israelite.

H7890.def: from an unused root meaning to urinate; urine.

H7891.def: or (the original form) שׁוּר; (1 Samuel 18:6), a primitive root (rather identical with H7788 (שׁוּר) through the idea of strolling minstrelsy); to sing.
H7891.kjv: behold (by mistake for H7789 (שׁוּר)), sing(-er, -ing man, -ing woman)

H7892.def: or feminine שִׁירָה; from H7891 (שִׁיר); a song; abstractly, singing.

H7893.def: from an unused root meaning to bleach, i.e. whiten;  See H8336 (שֵׁשׁ).; white, i.e. marble..

H7894.def: from the same as H7893 (שַׁיִשׁ); whiteness; Shisha, an Israelite.

H7895.def: or שׁוּשַׁק; of Egyptian derivation; Shishak, an Egyptian king.

H7896.gloss: to place (in a very wide application)
H7896.def: a primitive root; to place (in a very wide application).
H7896.kjv: apply, appoint, array, bring, consider, lay (up), let alone, look, make, mark, put (on), regard, set, shew, be stayed, take

H7897.def: from H7896 (שִׁית); a dress (as put on).

H7898.def: from H7896 (שִׁית); scrub or trash, i.e. wild growth of weeds or briers (as if put on the field).

H7899.def: from H5526 (סָכַךְ) in the sense of H7753 (שׂוּךְ); a brier (as of a hedge).

H7900.def: from H5526 (סָכַךְ) in the sense of H7753 (שׂוּךְ); a booth (as interlaced).

H7901.def: a primitive root; to lie down (for rest, sexual connection, decease or any other purpose).
H7901.kjv: at all, cast down, (lover-)lay (self) (down), (make to) lie (down, down to sleep, still with), lodge, ravish, take rest, sleep, stay

H7902.gloss: a lying down (of dew, or for the sexual act)
H7902.def: from H7901 (שָׁכַב); a lying down (of dew, or for the sexual act).

H7904.def: a primitive root; to roam (through lust).
H7904.kjv: in the morning (by mistake for H7925 (שָׁכַם))

H7905.gloss: a dart (as pointed like a thorn)
H7905.def: feminine of H7900 (שֹׂךְ) in the sense of H7899 (שֵׂךְ); a dart (as pointed like a thorn).

H7906.def: from an unused root apparently meaning to surmount; an observatory (with the article); Seku, a place in Palestine.

H7907.def: from the same as H7906 (שֵׂכוּ); observant, i.e. (concretely) the mind.

H7910.gloss: intoxicated, as astate or a habit
H7910.def: or שִׁכֹּר; from H7937 (שָׁכַר); intoxicated, as astate or a habit.

H7911.def: or שָׁכֵחַ; a primitive root; to mislay, i.e. to be oblivious of, from want of memory or attention.

H7912.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H7911 (שָׁכַח) through the idea of disclosure of a covered or forgotten thing; to discover (literally or figuratively).

H7914.def: feminine from the same as H7906 (שֵׂכוּ); a conspicuous object.

H7915.def: intensive perhaps from the same as H7906 (שֵׂכוּ) in the sense of H7753 (שׂוּךְ); a knife (as pointed or edged).

H7916.gloss: a man at wages  by the day or year
H7916.def: from H7936 (שָׂכַר); a man at wages  by the day or year.

H7918.def: a primitive root; to weave (i.e. lay) a trap; figuratively, (through the idea of secreting) to allay (passions; physically, abate a flood).
H7918.kjv: appease, assuage, make to cease, pacify, set

H7919.def: a primitive root; to be (causatively, make or act) circumspect and hence, intelligent.
H7919.kjv: consider, expert, instruct, prosper, (deal) prudent(-ly), (give) skill(-ful), have good success, teach, (have, make to) understand(-ing), wisdom, (be, behave self, consider, make) wise(-ly), guide wittingly

H7920.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H7919 (שָׂכַל); to be (causatively, make or act) circumspect and hence, intelligent.

H7921.def: a primitive root; properly, to miscarry, i.e. suffer abortion; by analogy, to bereave (literally or figuratively).
H7921.kjv: bereave (of children), barren, cast calf (fruit, young), be (make) childless, deprive, destroy, expect, lose children, miscarry, rob of children, spoil

H7922.def: or שֵׂכֶל; from H7919 (שָׂכַל); intelligence; by implication, success.
H7922.kjv: discretion, knowledge, policy, prudence, sense, understanding, wisdom, wise

H7923.def: plural from H7921 (שָׁכֹל); childlessness (by continued bereavements).
H7923.kjv: to have after loss of others

H7925.def: a primitive root; properly, to incline (the shoulder to a burden); but used only as denominative from H7926 (שְׁכֶם); literally, to load up (on the back of man or beast), i.e. to start early in the morning.
H7925.kjv: (arise, be up, get (oneself) up, rise up) early (betimes), morning

H7926.gloss: the neck (between the shoulders) as the place of burdens
H7926.def: from H7925 (שָׁכַם); the neck (between the shoulders) as the place of burdens; figuratively, the spur of ahill.

H7927.def: the same as H7926 (שְׁכֶם); ridge; Shekem, a place in Palestine.

H7928.gloss: Shekem, the name of a Hivite and two Israelites
H7928.def: for H7926 (שְׁכֶם); Shekem, the name of a Hivite and two Israelites.

H7930.gloss: a Shikmite (collectively), or descendants of Shekem
H7930.def: patronymic from H7928 (שֶׁכֶם); a Shikmite (collectively), or descendants of Shekem.

H7931.gloss: to reside or permanently stay (literally or figuratively)
H7931.def: a primitive root (apparently akin (by transmission) to H7901 (שָׁכַב) through the idea of lodging; compare H5531 (סִכְלוּת), H7925 (שָׁכַם)); to reside or permanently stay (literally or figuratively).
H7931.kjv: abide, continue, (cause to, make to) dwell(-er), have habitation, inhabit, lay, place, (cause to) remain, rest, set (up)

H7932.gloss: to reside or permanently stay (literally or figuratively)
H7932.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H7931 (שָׁכַן); to reside or permanently stay (literally or figuratively).

H7934.def: from H7931 (שָׁכַן); a resident; by extension, a fellow-citizen.

H7935.gloss: Shekanjah, the name of nine Israelites
H7935.def: or (prolonged) שְׁכַנְיָהוּ; from H7931 (שָׁכַן) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has dwelt; Shekanjah, the name of nine Israelites.

H7936.def: or (by permutation) סָכַר; (Ezra 4:5), a primitive root (apparently akin (by prosthesis) to H3739 (כָּרָה) through the idea of temporary purchase; compare H7937 (שָׁכַר)); to hire.
H7936.kjv: earn wages, hire (out self), reward, surely

H7937.def: a primitive root; to become tipsy; in a qualified sense, to satiate with astimulating drink or (figuratively) influence.
H7937.kjv: (be filled with) drink (abundantly), (be, make) drunk(-en), be merry. (Superlative of H8248 (שָׁקָה).)

H7939.def: from H7936 (שָׂכַר); payment of contract; concretely, salary, fare, maintenance; by implication, compensation, benefit.

H7940.gloss: Sakar, the name of two Israelites
H7940.def: the same as H7939 (שָׂכָר); recompense; Sakar, the name of two Israelites.

H7941.gloss: an intoxicant, i.e. intensely alcoholic liquor
H7941.def: from H7937 (שָׁכַר); an intoxicant, i.e. intensely alcoholic liquor.

H7942.gloss: drunkenness, Shikkeron, a place in Palestine
H7942.def: for H7943 (שִׁכָּרוֹן); drunkenness, Shikkeron, a place in Palestine.

H7944.def: from H7952 (שָׁלָה) abbreviated form; a fault.

H7945.def: for the rel. H834 (אֲשֶׁר); used with prepositional prefix, and often followed by some pronominal affix; on account of, whatsoever, whichsoever.

H7947.def: a primitive root; to space off; intensive (evenly) to make equidistant.

H7948.def: from H7947 (שָׁלַב); a spacer or raised interval, i.e. the stile in aframe or panel.

H7949.gloss: to be snow-white (with the linen clothing of the slain)
H7949.def: a primitive root; properly, meaning to be white; used only as denominative from H7950 (שֶׁלֶג); to be snow-white (with the linen clothing of the slain).

H7950.def: from H7949 (שָׁלַג); snow (probably from its whiteness).

H7951.gloss: to be tranquil, i.e. secure or successful
H7951.def: or שָׁלַו; (Job 3:26), a primitive root; to be tranquil, i.e. secure or successful.
H7951.kjv: be happy, prosper, be in safety

H7952.def: a primitive root (probably identical with H7953 (שָׁלָה) through the idea of educing); to mislead.

H7953.gloss: to draw out or off, i.e. remove (the soul by death)
H7953.def: a primitive root (rather cognate (by contraction) to the base of H5394 (נָשַׁל), H7997 (שָׁלַל) and their congeners through the idea of extracting); to draw out or off, i.e. remove (the soul by death).

H7954.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H7951 (שָׁלָה); to be secure.

H7955.def: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to H7952 (שָׁלָה); a wrong.

H7956.def: the same as H7596 (שְׁאֵלָה) (shortened); request; Shelah, the name of a postdiluvian patriarch and of an Israelite.

H7957.def: from the same as H3851 (לַהַב) with sibilant prefix; a flare of fire.

H7958.gloss: the quail collectively (as slow in flight from its weight)
H7958.def: or שְׂלָיו; by orthographical variation from H7951 (שָׁלָה) through the idea of sluggishness; the quail collectively (as slow in flight from its weight).

H7960.def: (Aramaic) or שָׁלוּת; (Aramaic), from the same as H7955 (שָׁלָה); a fault.

H7961.def: or שָׁלֵיו; feminine שְׁלֵוָה; from H7951 (שָׁלָה); tranquil; (in a bad sense) careless; abstractly, security.
H7961.kjv: (being) at ease, peaceable, (in) prosper(-ity), quiet(-ness), wealthy

H7964.def: or שִׁלֻּחַ; from H7971 (שָׁלַח); (only in plural) a dismissal, i.e. (of a wife) divorce (especially the document); also (of a daughter) dower.

H7965.def: from H7999; safe, i.e., (figuratively) well, happy, friendly; also (abstractly) welfare.

H7966.gloss: a requital, i.e. (secure) retribution, (venal) a fee
H7966.def: or שִׁלֻּם; from H7999 (שָׁלַם); a requital, i.e. (secure) retribution, (venal) a fee.

H7967.gloss: Shallum, the name of fourteen Israelites
H7967.def: or (shorter) שַׁלֻּם; the same as H7966 (שִׁלּוּם); Shallum, the name of fourteen Israelites.

H7968.def: probably for H7967 (שַׁלּוּם); Shallun, an Israelite.

H7969.def: or שָׁלֹשׁ; masculine שְׁלוֹשָׁה; or שְׁלֹשָׁה; a primitive number; three; occasionally (ordinal) third, or (multiple) thrice.
H7969.kjv: fork, often(-times), third, thir(-teen, -teenth), three, thrice. Compare H7991 (שָׁלִישׁ)

H7970.def: or שְׁלֹשִׁים; multiple of H7969 (שָׁלוֹשׁ); thirty; or (ordinal) thirtieth.

H7971.def: a primitive root; to send away, for, or out (in a great variety of applications).
H7971.kjv: any wise, appoint, bring (on the way), cast (away, out), conduct, earnestly, forsake, give (up), grow long, lay, leave, let depart (down, go, loose), push away, put (away, forth, in, out), reach forth, send (away, forth, out), set, shoot (forth, out), sow, spread, stretch forth (out)

H7972.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H7971 (שָׁלַח); to send away, for, or out (in a great variety of applications).

H7973.gloss: a missile of attack, i.e. spear
H7973.def: from H7971 (שָׁלַח); a missile of attack, i.e. spear; also (figuratively) a shoot of growth; i.e. branch.
H7973.kjv: dart, plant, put off, sword, weapon

H7974.def: the same as H7973 (שֶׁלַח); Shelach, a postdiluvian patriarch.
H7974.kjv: Salah, Shelah. Compare H7975 (שִׁלֹחַ)lemma שִׁלֹּחַ extra dagesh, corrected to שִׁלֹחַ

H7975.def: or (in imitation of H7974 (שֶׁלַח)) שֶׁלַח; (Nehemiah 3:15), from H7971 (שָׁלַח); rill; Shiloach, a fountain of Jerusalem.

H7977.def: from H7973 (שֶׁלַח); missive, i.e. armed; Shilchi, an Israelite.

H7978.def: plural of H7973 (שֶׁלַח); javelins or sprouts; Shilchim, a place in Palestine.

H7979.def: from H7971 (שָׁלַח); a table (as spread out); by implication, a meal.

H7980.def: a primitive root; to dominate, i.e. govern; by implication, to permit.
H7980.kjv: (bear, have) rule, have dominion, give (have) power

H7981.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H7980 (שָׁלַט); to dominate, i.e. govern; by implication, to permit.
H7981.kjv: have the mastery, have power, bear rule, be (make) ruler

H7982.def: from H7980 (שָׁלַט); probably a shield (as controlling, i.e. protecting the person).

H7984.def: (Aramaic) or שִׁלְטֹןlemma שִׁלְטן missing vowel, corrected to שִׁלְטֹן; corresponding to H7983 (שִׁלְטוֹן); a potentate.

H7988.gloss: a fetus or babe (as extruded in birth)
H7988.def: feminine from H7953 (שָׁלָה); a fetus or babe (as extruded in birth).

H7989.def: from H7980 (שָׁלַט); potent; concretely, a prince or warrior.
H7989.kjv: governor, mighty, that hath power, ruler

H7990.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H7989 (שַׁלִּיט); mighty; abstractly, permission; concretely, a premier.

H7991.def: or שָׁלוֹשׁ; (1 Chronicles 11:11; 1 Chronicles 12:18), or שָׁלֹשׁ; (2 Samuel 23:13), from H7969 (שָׁלוֹשׁ); a triple, i.e. (as a musical instrument) a triangle (or perhaps rather threestringed lute); also (as an indefinite, great quantity) a three-fold measure (perhaps a treble ephah); also (as an officer) a general of the third rank (upward, i.e. the highest).
H7991.kjv: captain, instrument of musick, (great) lord, (great) measure, prince, three (from the margin)

H7992.def: ordinal from H7969 (שָׁלוֹשׁ); third; feminine athird (part); by extension, a third (day, year or time); specifically, a third-story cell).

H7993.gloss: to throw out, down or away (literally or figuratively)
H7993.def: a primitive root; to throw out, down or away (literally or figuratively).
H7993.kjv: adventure, cast (away, down, forth, off, out), hurl, pluck, throw

H7994.def: from H7993 (שָׁלַךְ); bird of prey, usually thought to be the pelican (from casting itself into the sea).

H7996.def: the same as H7995 (שַׁלֶּכֶת); Shalleketh, a gate in Jerusalem.

H7997.def: a primitive root; to drop or strip; by implication, to plunder.
H7997.kjv: let fall, make self a prey, of purpose, (make a, (take)) spoil

H7999.gloss: to be safe (in mind, body or estate)
H7999.def: a primitive root; to be safe (in mind, body or estate); figuratively, to be (causatively, make) completed; by implication, to be friendly; by extension, to reciprocate (in various applications).
H7999.kjv: make amends, (make an) end, finish, full, give again, make good, (re-) pay (again), (make) (to) (be at) peace(-able), that is perfect, perform, (make) prosper(-ous), recompense, render, requite, make restitution, restore, reward, surely

H8000.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H7999 (שָׁלַם); to complete, to restore.

H8002.gloss: requital, i.e. a (voluntary) sacrifice in thanks
H8002.def: from H7999 (שָׁלַם); properly, requital, i.e. a (voluntary) sacrifice in thanks.

H8003.def: from H7999 (שָׁלַם); complete (literally or figuratively); especially friendly.
H8003.kjv: full, just, made ready, peaceable, perfect(-ed), quiet, Shalem (by mistake for a name), whole

H8004.gloss: Shalem, an early name of Jerusalem
H8004.def: the same as H8003 (שָׁלֵם); peaceful; Shalem, an early name of Jerusalem.

H8006.def: the same as H8005 (שִׁלֵּם); Shillem, an Israelite.

H8007.gloss: Salma, the name of two Israelites
H8007.def: probably for H8008 (שַׂלְמָה); clothing; Salma, the name of two Israelites.

H8009.def: the same as H8008 (שַׂלְמָה); clothing; Salmah, an Israelite.

H8010.def: from H7965 (שָׁלוֹם); peaceful; Shelomah, David's successor.

H8012.def: from H8008 (שַׂלְמָה); investiture; Salmon, an Israelite.

H8013.gloss: Shelomoth, the name of two Israelites
H8013.def: feminine plural of H7965 (שָׁלוֹם); pacifications; Shelomoth, the name of two Israelites.
H8013.kjv: Shelomith (from the margin), Shelomoth. Compare H8019 (שְׁלֹמִית)

H8014.def: from H8008 (שַׂלְמָה); clothed; Salmai, an Israelite.

H8015.def: from H7965 (שָׁלוֹם); peaceable; Shelomi, an Israelite.

H8016.gloss: a Shilemite (collectively) or descendants of Shillem
H8016.def: patronymically from H8006 (שִׁלֵּם); a Shilemite (collectively) or descendants of Shillem.

H8017.def: from H7965 (שָׁלוֹם) and H410 (אֵל); peace of God; Shelumiel, an Israelite.

H8018.gloss: Shelemjah, the name of nine Israelites
H8018.def: or שֶׁלֶמְיָהוּ; from H8002 (שֶׁלֶם) and H3050 (יָהּ); thankoffering of Jah; Shelemjah, the name of nine Israelites.

H8019.def: or שׁלוֹמִית; (Ezra 8:10), from H7965 (שָׁלוֹם); peaceableness; Shelomith, the name of five Israelites and three Israelitesses.

H8020.gloss: Shalman, a king apparently of Assyria
H8020.def: of foreign derivation; Shalman, a king apparently of Assyria.

H8022.def: of foreign derivation; Shalmaneser, an Assyrian king.

H8023.def: the same as H7888 (שִׁילוֹנִי); Shiloni, an Israelite.

H8024.gloss: a Shelanite (collectively), or descendants of Shelah
H8024.def: from H7956 (שֵׁלָה); a Shelanite (collectively), or descendants of Shelah.

H8025.gloss: to pull out, up or off
H8025.def: a primitive root; to pull out, up or off.

H8026.def: from H8025 (שָׁלַף); extract; Sheleph, a son of Jokthan.

H8027.def: a primitive root perhaps originally to intensify, i.e. treble; but apparently used only as denominative from H7969 (שָׁלוֹשׁ),; to be (causatively, make) triplicate (by restoration, in portions, strands, days or years).
H8027.kjv: do the third time, (divide into, stay) three (days, -fold, parts, years old)

H8028.def: from H8027 (שָׁלַשׁ); triplet; Shelesh, an Israelite.

H8029.gloss: a descendant of the third degree, i.e. great grandchild
H8029.def: from H8027 (שָׁלַשׁ); a descendant of the third degree, i.e. great grandchild.

H8030.def: feminine from the same as H8028 (שֶׁלֶשׁ); triplication; Shilshah, an Israelite.

H8031.def: feminine from H8027 (שָׁלַשׁ); trebled land; Shalishah, a place in Palestine.

H8032.gloss: trebly, i.e. (in time) day before yesterday
H8032.def: or שִׁלְשֹׁם; from the same as H8028 (שֶׁלֶשׁ); trebly, i.e. (in time) day before yesterday.
H8032.kjv: before (that time, -time), excellent things (from the margin), heretofore, three days, time past

H8033.def: a primitive particle (rather from the relative pronoun, H834 (אֲשֶׁר)); there (transferring to time) then; often thither, or thence.
H8033.kjv: in it, thence, there (-in, of, out), thither, whither

H8034.def: a primitive word (perhaps rather from H7760 through the idea of definite and conspicuous position); an appellation.

H8035.gloss: Shem, a son of Noah (often includ. his posterity)
H8035.def: the same as H8034 (שֵׁם); name; Shem, a son of Noah (often includ. his posterity).

H8036.gloss: an appellation, as amark or memorial of individuality
H8036.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H8034 (שֵׁם); an appellation, as amark or memorial of individuality; by implication honor, authority, character.

H8037.def: from H8074 (שָׁמֵם); desolation; Shamma, an Israelite.

H8038.def: apparently from H8034 (שֵׁם) and H83 (אֵבֶר); name of pinion, i.e. illustrious; Shemeber, a king of Zeboim.

H8039.def: perhaps for H8093 (שִׁמְעָה); Shimah, an Israelite.

H8040.def: or שְׂמֹאל; a primitive word (rather perhaps from the same as H8071 (שִׂמְלָה) (by insertion of the aleph) through the idea of wrapping up); properly, dark (as enveloped), i.e. the north; hence (by orientation), the left hand.

H8041.gloss: to use the left hand or pass in that direction)
H8041.def: a primitive root (denominative from H8040 (שְׂמֹאול)); to use the left hand or pass in that direction).

H8042.def: from H8040 (שְׂמֹאול); situated on the left side.

H8043.def: for H8039 (שִׁמְאָה) (compare H38 (אֲבִיָּם)); Shimam, an Israelite.

H8044.def: of uncertain derivation; Shamgar, an Israelite judge.

H8045.kjv: destory(-uction), bring to nought, overthrow, perish, pluck down, utterly

H8047.def: from H8074 (שָׁמֵם); ruin; by implication, consternation.

H8048.gloss: Shammah, the name of an Edomite and four Israelites
H8048.def: the same as H8047 (שַׁמָּה); Shammah, the name of an Edomite and four Israelites.

H8049.def: for H8048 (שַׁמָּה); desolation; Shamhuth, an Israelite.

H8050.gloss: Shemuel, the name of three Israelites
H8050.def: from the passive participle of H8085 (שָׁמַע) and H410 (אֵל); heard of God; Shemuel, the name of three Israelites.

H8051.gloss: Shammua, the name of four Israelites
H8051.def: from H8074 (שָׁמֵם); renowned; Shammua, the name of four Israelites.

H8052.def: feminine passive participle of H8074 (שָׁמֵם); something heard, i.e. an announcement.
H8052.kjv: bruit, doctrine, fame, mentioned, news, report, rumor, tidings

H8053.def: passive participle of H8103 (שִׁמְצָה); observed; Shamur, an Israelite.

H8054.def: plural of H8047 (שַׁמָּה); ruins; Shammoth, an Israelite.

H8055.def: a primitive root; probably to brighten up, i.e. (figuratively) be (causatively, make) blithe or gleesome.
H8055.kjv: cheer up, be (make) glad, (have, make) joy(-ful), be (make) merry, (cause to, make to) rejoice, very

H8057.def: from H8056 (שָׂמֵחַ); blithesomeness or glee, (religious or festival).
H8057.kjv: exceeding(-ly), gladness, joy(-fulness), mirth, pleasure, rejoice(-ing)

H8058.def: a primitive root; to fling down; incipiently to jostle; figuratively, to let alone, desist, remit.
H8058.kjv: discontinue, overthrow, release, let rest, shake, stumble, throw down

H8059.gloss: remission (of debt) or suspension of labor)
H8059.def: from H8058 (שָׁמַט); remission (of debt) or suspension of labor).

H8060.gloss: Shammai, the name of three Israelites
H8060.def: from H8073 (שַׁמְלַי); destructive; Shammai, the name of three Israelites.

H8061.def: apparently from H8034 (שֵׁם) and H3045 (יָדַע); name of knowing; Shemida, an Israelite.

H8062.gloss: a Shemidaite (collectively) or descendants of Shemida
H8062.def: patronymically from H8061 (שְׁמִידָע); a Shemidaite (collectively) or descendants of Shemida.

H8063.gloss: a run (as sustaining the Oriental sitter)
H8063.def: from H5564 (סָמַךְ); a run (as sustaining the Oriental sitter).

H8064.def: from an unused root meaning to be lofty; the sky (as aloft; the dual perhaps alluding to the visible arch in which the clouds move, as well as to the higher ether where the celestial bodies revolve).

H8065.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H8064 (שָׁמַיִם); the sky (as aloft; the dual perhaps alluding to the visible arch in which the clouds move, as well as to the higher ether where the celestial bodies revolve).

H8067.def: feminine of H8066 (שְׁמִינִי); probably an eight-stringed lyre.

H8068.def: from H8104 (שָׁמַר) in the original sense of pricking; a thorn; also (from its keenness for scratching) a gem, probably the diamond.

H8069.gloss: Shamir, the name of two places in Palestine
H8069.def: the same as H8068 (שָׁמִיר); Shamir, the name of two places in Palestine.

H8070.gloss: Shemiramoth, the name of two Israelites
H8070.def: or שְׁמָרִימוֹת; probably from H8034 (שֵׁם) and plural of H7413 (רָמָה); name of heights; Shemiramoth, the name of two Israelites.

H8071.def: perhaps by permutation for the feminine of H5566 (סֶמֶל) (through the idea of a cover assuming the shape of the object beneath); a dress, especially a mantle.
H8071.kjv: apparel, cloth(-es, -ing), garment, raiment. Compare H8008 (שַׂלְמָה)

H8072.def: probably for the same as H8071 (שִׂמְלָה); Samlah, an Edomite.

H8073.def: for H8014 (שַׂלְמַי); Shamlai, one of the Nethinim.

H8074.def: a primitive root; to stun (or intransitively, grow numb), i.e. devastate or (figuratively) stupefy (both usually in a passive sense).
H8074.kjv: make amazed, be astonied, (be an) astonish(-ment), (be, bring into, unto, lay, lie, make) desolate(-ion, places), be destitute, destroy (self), (lay, lie, make) waste, wonder

H8075.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H8074 (שָׁמֵם); to stun (or intransitively, grow numb), i.e. devastate or (figuratively) stupefy (both usually in a passive sense).

H8077.def: or שִׁמָמָה; feminine of H8076 (שָׁמֵם); devastation; figuratively, astonishment.

H8079.gloss: a lizard (from the superstition of its noxiousness)
H8079.def: probably from H8074 (שָׁמֵם) (in the sense of poisoning); a lizard (from the superstition of its noxiousness).

H8080.def: a primitive root; to shine, i.e. (by analogy) be (causatively, make) oily or gross.

H8081.def: from H8080 (שָׁמַן); grease, especially liquid (as from the olive, often perfumed); figuratively, richness.
H8081.kjv: anointing, fat (things), fruitful, oil(-ed), ointment, olive, pine

H8082.def: from H8080 (שָׁמַן); greasy, i.e. gross; figuratively, rich.

H8083.def: or שְׁמוֹנֶה; feminine שְׁמֹנָה; or שְׁמוֹנָה; apparently from H8082 (שָׁמֵן) through the idea of plumpness; a cardinal number, eight (as if a surplus above the 'perfect' seven); also (as ordinal) eighth.

H8084.def: or שְׁמוֹנִים; multiple from H8083 (שְׁמֹנֶה); eighty, also eightieth.

H8085.def: a primitive root; to hear intelligently (often with implication of attention, obedience, etc.).

H8086.gloss: to hear intelligently (often with implication of attention
H8086.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H8085 (שָׁמַע); to hear intelligently (often with implication of attention, obedience, etc.; causatively, to tell, etc.).

H8087.def: for the same as H8088 (שֵׁמַע); Shema, the name of a place in Palestine and of four Israelites.

H8088.gloss: something heard, i.e. a sound, rumor, announcement
H8088.def: from H8085 (שָׁמַע); something heard, i.e. a sound, rumor, announcement; abstractly, audience.
H8088.kjv: bruit, fame, hear(-ing), loud, report, speech, tidings

H8090.def: for H8087 (שֶׁמַע); Shema, a place in Palestine.

H8091.def: from H8085 (שָׁמַע); obedient; Shama, an Israelite.

H8092.gloss: Shima, the name of four Israelites
H8092.def: for H8093 (שִׁמְעָה); Shima, the name of four Israelites.

H8093.def: feminine of H8088 (שֵׁמַע); annunciation; Shimah, an Israelite.

H8095.def: from H8085 (שָׁמַע); hearing; Shimon, one of Jacob's sons, also the tribe descended from him.

H8096.gloss: Shimi, the name of twenty Israelites
H8096.def: from H8088 (שֵׁמַע); famous; Shimi, the name of twenty Israelites.
H8096.kjv: Shimeah (from the margin), Shimei, Shimhi, Shimi

H8097.gloss: a Shimite (collectively) or descendants of Shimi
H8097.def: patronymically from H8096 (שִׁמְעִי); a Shimite (collectively) or descendants of Shimi.

H8098.gloss: Shemajah, the name of twenty-five Israelites
H8098.def: or שְׁמַעְיָהוּ; from H8085 (שָׁמַע) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has heard; Shemajah, the name of twenty-five Israelites.

H8099.gloss: a Shimonite (collectively) or descendants of Shimon
H8099.def: patronymically from H8095 (שִׁמְעוֹן); a Shimonite (collectively) or descendants of Shimon.

H8100.def: feminine of H8088 (שֵׁמַע); annunciation; Shimath, an Ammonitess.

H8101.gloss: a Shimathite (collectively) or descendants of Shimah
H8101.def: patronymically from H8093 (שִׁמְעָה); a Shimathite (collectively) or descendants of Shimah.

H8102.def: from an unused root meaning to emit a sound; an inkling.

H8103.def: feminine of H8102 (שֶׁמֶץ); scornful whispering (of hostile spectators).

H8104.def: a primitive root; properly, to hedge about (as with thorns), i.e., guard; generally, to protect, attend to, etc.

H8105.def: from H8104 (שָׁמַר); something preserved, i.e. the settlings (plural only) of wine.

H8106.gloss: Shemer, the name of three Israelites
H8106.def: the same as H8105 (שֶׁמֶר); Shemer, the name of three Israelites.

H8108.def: feminine of an unused noun from H8104 (שָׁמַר) meaning a guard; watchfulness.

H8109.def: feminine of passive participle of H8104 (שָׁמַר); something guarded, i.e. an eye-lid.

H8110.def: from H8105 (שֶׁמֶר) in its original sense; guardianship; Shimron, the name of an Israelite and of a place in Palestine.

H8111.def: from the active participle of H8104 (שָׁמַר); watch-station; Shomeron, a place in Palestine.

H8112.def: from H8110 (שִׁמְרוֹן) and a derivative of H4754 (מָרָא); guard of lashing; Shimron-Meron, a place in Palestine.

H8113.gloss: Shimri, the name of four Israelites
H8113.def: from H8105 (שֶׁמֶר) in its original sense; watchful; Shimri, the name of four Israelites.

H8114.gloss: Shemarjah, the name of four Israelites
H8114.def: or שְׁמַרְיָהוּ; from H8104 (שָׁמַר) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has guarded; Shemarjah, the name of four Israelites.

H8115.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H8111 (שֹׁמְרוֹן); Shomrain, a place in Palestine.

H8116.def: feminine of H8113 (שִׁמְרִי); female guard; Shimrith, a Moabitess.

H8117.gloss: a Shimronite (collectively) or descendants of Shimron
H8117.def: patronymically from H8110 (שִׁמְרוֹן); a Shimronite (collectively) or descendants of Shimron.

H8118.gloss: a Shomeronite (collectively) or inhabitants of Shomeron
H8118.def: patrial from H8111 (שֹׁמְרוֹן); a Shomeronite (collectively) or inhabitants of Shomeron.

H8119.def: from H8104 (שָׁמַר); guardship; Shimrath, an Israelite.

H8120.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to the root of H8121 (שֶׁמֶשׁ) through the idea of activity implied in day-light; to serve.

H8121.def: from an unused root meaning to be brilliant; the sun; by implication, the east; figuratively, a ray, i.e. (architectural) a notched battlement.
H8121.kjv: east side(-ward), sun (rising), west(-ward), window. See also H1053 (בֵּית שֶׁמֶשׁ)

H8123.def: from H8121 (שֶׁמֶשׁ); sunlight; Shimshon, an Israelite.

H8124.def: (Aramaic) from H8122 (שֶׁמֶשׁ); sunny; Shimshai, a Samaritan.

H8125.def: apparently from H8121 (שֶׁמֶשׁ); sunlike; Shamsherai, an Israelite.

H8126.gloss: a Shumathite (collectively) or descendants of Shumah
H8126.def: patronymically from an unused name from H7762 (שׁוּם) probably meaning garlic-smell; a Shumathite (collectively) or descendants of Shumah.

H8127.def: from H8150 (שָׁנַן); compare  H8143 (שֶׁנְהַבִּים); a tooth (as sharp); specifically  ivory; figuratively, a cliff.

H8129.def: the same as H8127 (שֵׁן); crag; Shen, a place in Palestine.

H8134.def: probably from H8132 (שָׁנָא) and H1 (אָב); a father has turned; Shinab, a Canaanite.

H8137.def: apparently of Babylonian origin; Shenatstsar, an Israelite.

H8138.gloss: to fold, i.e. duplicate (literally or figuratively)
H8138.def: a primitive root; to fold, i.e. duplicate (literally or figuratively); by implication, to transmute (transitive or intransitive).
H8138.kjv: do (speak, strike) again, alter, double, (be given to) change, disguise, (be) diverse, pervert, prefer, repeat, return, do the second time

H8140.gloss: a year (as a revolution of time)
H8140.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H8141 (שָׁנֶה); a year (as a revolution of time).

H8141.gloss: a year (as a revolution of time)
H8141.def: (in plural or (feminine) שָׁנָה; from H8138 (שָׁנָה); a year (as a revolution of time).

H8143.gloss: probably, tooth of elephants, i.e. ivory tusk
H8143.def: from H8127 (שֵׁן) and the plural apparently of a foreign word; probably, tooth of elephants, i.e. ivory tusk.

H8144.def: of uncertain derivation; crimson, properly, the insect or its color, also stuff dyed with it.

H8145.def: from H8138 (שָׁנָה); properly, double, i.e. second; also adverbially, again.

H8147.def: dual of H8145 (שֵׁנִי); feminine שְׁתַּיִם; two; also (as ordinal) twofold.
H8147.kjv: both, couple, double, second, twain, twelfth, twelve, twenty (sixscore) thousand, twice, two

H8148.def: from H8150 (שָׁנַן); something pointed, i.e. a gibe.

H8149.gloss: Shenir or Senir, a summit of Lebanon
H8149.def: or שְׂנִיר; from an unused root meaning to be pointed; peak; Shenir or Senir, a summit of Lebanon.

H8150.def: a primitive root; to point (transitive or intransitive); intensively, to pierce; figuratively, to inculcate.

H8151.def: a primitive root; to compress (with a belt).

H8152.def: probably of foreign derivation; Shinar, a plain in Babylonia.

H8154.def: or שָׁשָׂה; (Isaiah 10:13), a primitive root; to plunder.

H8156.def: a primitive root; to split or tear; figuratively, to upbraid.

H8158.gloss: to cut in pieces, i.e. slaughter
H8158.def: a primitive root; to cut in pieces, i.e. slaughter.

H8159.gloss: to gaze at or about (properly, for help)
H8159.def: a primitive root; to gaze at or about (properly, for help); by implication, to inspect, consider, compassionate, be nonplussed (as looking around in amazement) or bewildered.
H8159.kjv: depart, be dim, be dismayed, look (away), regard, have respect, spare, turn

H8160.def: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to H8159 (שָׁעָה); properly, a look, i.e. a moment.

H8161.def: feminine from an unused root meaning to stamp; a clatter (of hoofs).

H8162.def: probably of foreign derivation; linsey-woolsey, i.e. cloth of linen and wool carded and spun together.
H8162.kjv: garment of divers sorts, linen and wollen

H8163.def: or שָׂעִר; from H8175 (שָׂעַר); shaggy; as noun, a he-goat; by analogy, a faun.
H8163.kjv: devil, goat, hairy, kid, rough, satyr

H8164.def: formed the same as H8163 (שָׂעִיר); a shower (as tempestuous).

H8165.def: formed like H8163 (שָׂעִיר); rough; Seir, a mountain of Idumaea and its aboriginal occupants, also one in Palestine.

H8167.def: formed as H8166 (שְׂעִירָה); roughness; Seirah, a place in Palestine.

H8168.def: from an unused root meaning to hollow out; the palm; by extension, a handful.

H8169.gloss: Shaalbim or Shaalabbin, a place in Palestine
H8169.def: or שַׁעֲלַבִּין; plural from H7776 (שׁוּעָל); fox-holes; Shaalbim or Shaalabbin, a place in Palestine.

H8170.gloss: a Shaalbonite or inhabitant of Shaalbin
H8170.def: patrial from H8169 (שַׁעַלְבִים); a Shaalbonite or inhabitant of Shaalbin.

H8171.def: plural of H7776 (שׁוּעָל); foxes; Shaalim, a place in Palestine.

H8172.def: a primitive root; to support one's self.
H8172.kjv: lean, lie, rely, rest (on, self), stay

H8173.gloss: (in a good acceptation) to look upon (with complacency)
H8173.def: a primitive root; (in a good acceptation) to look upon (with complacency), i.e. fondle, please or amuse (self); (in a bad one) to look about (in dismay), i.e. stare.
H8173.kjv: cry (out) (by confusion with H7768 (שָׁוַע)), dandle, delight (self), play, shut

H8174.gloss: Shaaph, the name of two Israelites
H8174.def: from H5586 (סָעַף); fluctuation; Shaaph, the name of two Israelites.

H8175.def: a primitive root; to storm; by implication, to shiver, i.e. fear.
H8175.kjv: be (horribly) afraid, fear, hurl as a storm, be tempestuous, come like (take away as with) a whirlwind

H8176.def: a primitive root; to split or open, i.e. (literally, but only as denominative from H8179 (שַׁעַר)); compare see H7778 (שׁוֹעֵר); to act as gatekeeper; (figuratively) to estimate.

H8178.def: from H8175 (שָׂעַר); a tempest; also a terror.
H8178.kjv: affrighted, horribly, sore, storm. See H8181 (שֵׂעָר)

H8179.gloss: an opening, i.e. door or gate
H8179.def: from H8176 (שָׁעַר) in its original sense; an opening, i.e. door or gate.

H8180.def: from H8176 (שָׁעַר); a measure (as a section).

H8181.def: or שַׂעַר; (Isaiah 7:20), from H8175 (שָׂעַר) in the sense of dishevelling; hair (as if tossed or bristling).

H8182.def: from H8176 (שָׁעַר); harsh or horrid, i.e. offensive.

H8184.def: or שְׂעוֹרָה (feminine meaning the plant); and (masculine meaning the grain); also שְׂעֹר; or שְׂעוֹר; from H8175 (שָׂעַר) in the sense of roughness; barley (as villose).

H8186.def: or שַׁעֲרִירִיָּה; or שַׁעֲרֻרִת; feminine from H8176 (שָׁעַר) in the sense of H8175 (שָׂעַר); something fearful.

H8187.def: from H8176 (שָׁעַר) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has stormed; Shearjah, an Israelite.

H8188.def: masculine plural of H8184 (שְׂעֹרָה); barley grains; Seorim, an Israelite.

H8189.def: dual of H8179 (שַׁעַר); double gates; Shaarajim, a place in Palestine.

H8190.def: of Persian derivation; Shaashgaz, a eunuch of Xerxes.

H8192.def: a primitive root; to abrade, i.e. bare.

H8193.def: or (in dual and plural) שֶׂפֶת; probably from H5595 (סָפָה) or H8192 (שָׁפָה) through the idea of termination (compare H5490 (סוֹף)); the lip (as a natural boundary); by implication, language; by analogy, a margin (of a vessel, water, cloth, etc.).
H8193.kjv: band, bank, binding, border, brim, brink, edge, language, lip, prating, (sea-)shore, side, speech, talk, (vain) words

H8194.gloss: a cheese (as strained from the whey)
H8194.def: from H8192 (שָׁפָה) in the sense of clarifying; a cheese (as strained from the whey).

H8195.def: or שְׁפִי; from H8192 (שָׁפָה); baldness (compare H8205 (שְׁפִי)); Shepho or Shephi, an Idumaean.

H8196.def: or שְׁפוּט; from H8199 (שָׁפַט); a judicial sentence, i.e. punishment.

H8197.def: or שְׁפוּפָן; from the same as H8207 (שְׁפִיפֹן); serpent-like; Shephupham or Shephuphan, an Israelite.

H8198.gloss: a female slave (as a member of the household)
H8198.def: feminine from an unused root meaning to spread out (as a family; see H4940 (מִשְׁפָּחָה)); a female slave (as a member of the household).

H8199.gloss: to judge, i.e. pronounce sentence (for or against)
H8199.def: a primitive root; to judge, i.e. pronounce sentence (for or against); by implication, to vindicate or punish; by extenssion, to govern; passively, to litigate (literally or figuratively).
H8199.kjv: avenge, that condemn, contend, defend, execute (judgment), (be a) judge(-ment), needs, plead, reason, rule

H8201.def: from H8199 (שָׁפַט); a sentence, i.e. infliction.

H8202.gloss: Shaphat, the name of four Israelites
H8202.def: from H8199 (שָׁפַט); judge; Shaphat, the name of four Israelites.

H8203.gloss: Shephatjah, the name of ten Israelites
H8203.def: or שְׁפַטְיָהוּ; from H8199 (שָׁפַט) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has judged; Shephatjah, the name of ten Israelites.

H8204.def: from H8199 (שָׁפַט); judge-like; Shiphtan, an Israelite.

H8205.def: from H8192 (שָׁפָה); bareness; concretely, a bare hill or plain.

H8206.def: plural of an unused noun from the same as H8207 (שְׁפִיפֹן) and meaning the same; serpents; Shuppim, an Israelite.

H8207.def: from an unused root meaning the same as H7779 (שׁוּף); a kind of serpent (as snapping), probably the cerastes or horned adder.

H8208.def: from H8231 (שָׁפַר); beautiful; Shaphir, a place in Palestine.

H8209.def: (Aramaic) intensive of a form corresponding to H8208 (שָׁפִיר); beautiful.

H8210.gloss: to spill forth (blood, a libation, liquid metal
H8210.def: a primitive root; to spill forth (blood, a libation, liquid metal; or even a solid, i.e. to mound up); also (figuratively) to expend (life, soul, complaint, money, etc.); intensively, to sprawl out.
H8210.kjv: cast (up), gush out, pour (out), shed(-der, out), slip

H8211.gloss: an emptying place, e.g. an ash-heap
H8211.def: from H8210 (שָׁפַךְ); an emptying place, e.g. an ash-heap.

H8212.gloss: a pipe (for pouring forth, e.g. wine), i.e. the penis
H8212.def: feminine of a derivative from H8210 (שָׁפַךְ); a pipe (for pouring forth, e.g. wine), i.e. the penis.

H8213.def: a primitive root; to depress or sink (expectation figuratively, to humiliate, intransitive or transitive).
H8213.kjv: abase, bring (cast, put) down, debase, humble (self), be (bring, lay, make, put) low(-er)

H8214.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H8213 (שָׁפֵל); to depress or sink (expectation figuratively, to humiliate, intransitive or transitive).

H8217.def: from H8213 (שָׁפֵל); depressed, literally or figuratively.

H8219.def: from H8213 (שָׁפֵל); Lowland, i.e. (with the article) the maritime slope of Palestine.

H8221.gloss: Shepham, a place in or near Palestine
H8221.def: probably from H8192 (שָׁפָה); bare spot; Shepham, a place in or near Palestine.

H8222.def: from H8193 (שָׂפָה); the beard (as a lippiece).

H8223.def: formed like H8221 (שְׁפָם); baldly; Shapham, an Israelite.

H8224.def: feminine plural of H8221 (שְׁפָם); Siphmoth, a place in Palestine.

H8225.gloss: a Shiphmite or inhabitant of Shepham
H8225.def: patrial from H8221 (שְׁפָם); a Shiphmite or inhabitant of Shepham.

H8226.def: a primitive root; to conceal (as a valuable).

H8227.gloss: a species of rockrabbit (from its hiding)
H8227.def: from H8226 (שָׂפַן); a species of rockrabbit (from its hiding), i.e. probably the hyrax.

H8228.def: from an unused root meaning to abound; resources.

H8230.def: from H8228 (שֶׁפַע); copious; Shiphi, an Israelite.

H8231.gloss: to glisten, i.e. (figuratively) be (causatively, make) fair
H8231.def: a primitive root; to glisten, i.e. (figuratively) be (causatively, make) fair.

H8232.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H8231 (שָׁפַר); to be beautiful.

H8234.gloss: Shepher, a place in the Desert
H8234.def: the same as H8233 (שֶׁפֶר); Shepher, a place in the Desert.

H8236.def: the same as H8235 (שִׁפְרָה); Shiphrah, an Israelitess.

H8237.gloss: splendid, i.e. a tapestry or canopy
H8237.def: from H8231 (שָׁפַר); splendid, i.e. a tapestry or canopy.

H8238.def: (Aramaic) from H8231 (שָׁפַר); the dawn (as brilliant with aurora).

H8239.def: a primitive root; to locate, i.e. (generally) hang on or (figuratively) establish, reduce.

H8240.def: from H8239 (שָׁפַת); a (double) stall (for cattle); also a (two-pronged) hook (for flaying animals on).

H8241.def: from H7857 (שָׁטַף) (for alliteration with H7110 (קֶצֶף)); an outburst (of anger).

H8242.gloss: a mesh (as allowing a liquid to run through)
H8242.def: from H8264 (שָׁקַק); properly, a mesh (as allowing a liquid to run through), i.e. coarse loose cloth or sacking (used in mourning and for bagging); hence, a bag (for grain, etc.).

H8245.def: a primitive root; to be alert, i.e. sleepless; hence to be on the lookout (whether for good or ill).

H8246.def: a denominative from H8247 (שָׁקֵד); to be (intensively, make) almond-shaped.
H8246.kjv: make like (unto, after the fashion of) almonds

H8247.def: from H8245 (שָׁקַד); the almond (tree or nut; as being the earliest in bloom).

H8248.def: a primitive root; to quaff, i.e. (causatively) to irrigate or furnish apotion to.
H8248.kjv: cause to (give, give to, let, make to) drink, drown, moisten, water. See H7937 (שָׁכַר), H8354 (שָׁתָה)

H8250.def: from H8248 (שָׁקָה); a beverage; moisture, i.e. (figuratively) refreshment.

H8251.def: or שִׁקֻּץ; from H8262 (שָׁקַץ); disgusting, i.e. filthy; especially idolatrous or (concretely) an idol.

H8252.def: a primitive root; to repose (usually figurative).
H8252.kjv: appease, idleness, (at, be at, be in, give) quiet(-ness), (be at, be in, give, have, take) rest, settle, be still

H8254.gloss: to suspend or poise (especially in trade)
H8254.def: a primitive root; to suspend or poise (especially in trade).

H8255.def: from H8254 (שָׁקַל); probably a weight; used as a commercial standard.

H8256.def: or (feminine) שִׁקְמָה; of uncertain derivation; a sycamore (usually the tree).

H8257.def: (abbreviated Amos 8:8); a primitive root; to subside; by implication, to be overflowed, cease; causatively, to abate, subdue.
H8257.kjv: make deep, let down, drown, quench, sink

H8259.def: a primitive root; properly, to lean out (of a window), i.e. (by implication) peep or gaze (passively, be a spectacle).

H8260.gloss: a loophole (for looking out), to admit light and air
H8260.def: from H8259 (שָׁקַף); a loophole (for looking out), to admit light and air.

H8261.gloss: an embrasure or opening  with bevelled jam
H8261.def: passive participle of H8259 (שָׁקַף); (compare H8260 (שֶׁקֶף)); an embrasure or opening  with bevelled jam.

H8262.gloss: to be filthy, i.e. (intensively) to loathe, pollute
H8262.def: a primitive root; to be filthy, i.e. (intensively) to loathe, pollute.
H8262.kjv: abhor, make abominable, have in abomination, detest, utterly

H8263.def: from H8262 (שָׁקַץ); filth, i.e. (figuratively and specifically) an idolatrous object.

H8264.gloss: to course (like a beast of prey)
H8264.def: a primitive root; to course (like a beast of prey); by implication, to seek greedily.
H8264.kjv: have appetite, justle one against another, long, range, run (to and fro)

H8265.def: a primitive root; to ogle, i.e. blink coquettishly.

H8266.gloss: to cheat, i.e. be untrue (usually in words)
H8266.def: a primitive root; to cheat, i.e. be untrue (usually in words).

H8267.def: from H8266 (שָׁקַר); an untruth; by implication, a sham (often adverbial).
H8267.kjv: without a cause, deceit(-ful), false(-hood, -ly), feignedly, liar, lie, lying, vain (thing), wrongfully

H8269.gloss: a head person (of any rank or class)
H8269.def: from H8323 (שָׂרַר); a head person (of any rank or class).
H8269.kjv: captain (that had rule), chief (captain), general, governor, keeper, lord,(-task-)master, prince(-ipal), ruler, steward

H8270.def: from H8324 (שָׁרַר); (compare H8306 (שָׁרִיר)); a string (as twisted ), i.e. (specifically) the umbilical cord (also figuratively, as the centre of strength).

H8271.def: (Aramaic) a root corresponding to that of H8293 (שֵׁרוּת); to free, separate; figuratively, to unravel, commence; by implication (of unloading beasts) to reside.

H8272.gloss: Sharetser, the name of an Assyrian and an Israelite
H8272.def: of foreign derivation; Sharetser, the name of an Assyrian and an Israelite.

H8273.gloss: quivering glow (of the air), expectation. the mirage
H8273.def: from an unused root meaning to glare; quivering glow (of the air), expectation. the mirage.

H8274.gloss: Sherebjah, the name of two Israelites
H8274.def: from H8273 (שָׁרָב) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has brought heat; Sherebjah, the name of two Israelites.

H8275.def: for H7626 (שֵׁבֶט); a rod of empire.

H8277.def: a primitive root; (compare H8279 (שֶׂרֶד)); properly, to puncture, i.e. (figuratively through the idea of slipping out) to escape or survive.

H8278.def: from H8277 (שָׂרַד); stitching (as pierced with a needle).

H8279.def: from H8277 (שָׂרַד); a (carpenter's) scribing-awl (for pricking or scratching measurements).

H8282.def: feminine of H8269 (שַׂר); a mistress, i.e. female noble.

H8283.def: the same as H8282 (שָׂרָה); Sarah, Abraham's wife.

H8284.def: probably feminine of H7791 (שׁוּר); a fortification (literally or figuratively).

H8285.def: from H8324 (שָׁרַר) in its original sense of pressing; a wrist-band (as compact or clasping).

H8286.def: from H8276 (שָׂרַג); tendril; Serug, a postdiluvian patriarch.

H8287.def: probably from H8281 (שָׁרָה) (in the sense of dwelling (compare H8271 (שְׁרֵא)) and H2580 (חֵן); abode of pleasure; Sharuchen, a place in Palestine.

H8288.def: from H8308 (שָׂרַךְ); a thong (as laced or tied).

H8289.gloss: plain, Sharon, the name of a place in Palestine
H8289.def: probably abridged from H3474 (יָשַׁר); plain, Sharon, the name of a place in Palestine.

H8290.gloss: a Sharonite or inhabitant of Sharon
H8290.def: patrial from H8289 (שָׁרוֹן); a Sharonite or inhabitant of Sharon.

H8291.def: passive participle from the same as H8321 (שֹׂרֵק); a grapevine.

H8292.def: or (by permutation) שְׁרִיקָה; feminine passive participle of H8319 (שָׁרַק); a whistling (in scorn); by analogy, a piping.

H8294.def: by permutation for H5629 (סֶרַח); superfluity; Serach, an Israelitess.

H8296.def: and שָׂרֶטֶת; from H8295 (שָׂרַט); an incision.

H8297.def: from H8269 (שַׂר); dominative; Sarai, the wife of Abraham.

H8298.def: probably from H8324 (שָׁרַר); hostile; Sharay, an Israelite.

H8301.def: the same as H8300 (שָׂרִיד); Sarid, a place in Palestine.

H8302.def: or שִׁרְיֹן; and שִׁרְיָן; also (feminine) שִׁרְיָה; and שִׁרְיֹנָה; from H8281 (שָׁרָה) in the original sense of turning; a corslet (as if twisted).
H8302.kjv: breastplate, coat of mail, habergeon, harness. See H5630 (סִרְיֹן)

H8303.gloss: Shirjon or Sirjon, a peak of the Lebanon
H8303.def: and שִׂרְיֹן; the same as H8304 (שְׂרָיָה) (i.e. sheeted with snow); Shirjon or Sirjon, a peak of the Lebanon.

H8304.gloss: Serajah, the name of nine Israelites
H8304.def: or שְׂרָיָהוּ; from H8280 (שָׂרָה) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has prevailed; Serajah, the name of nine Israelites.

H8305.def: from the same as H8321 (שֹׂרֵק) in the original sense of piercing; hetchelling (or combing flax), i.e. (concretely) tow (by extension, linen cloth).

H8306.def: from H8324 (שָׁרַר) in the original sense as in H8270 (שֹׁר) (compare H8326 (שֹׁרֶר)); a cord, i.e. (by analogy) sinew.

H8307.def: from H8324 (שָׁרַר) in the sense of twisted, i.e. firm; obstinacy.

H8309.def: probably by an orthographical error for H7709 (שְׁדֵמָה); a common.

H8310.def: of foreign derivation; Sarsekim, a Babylonian general.

H8311.gloss: to prolong, i.e. (reflex) be deformed by excess of members
H8311.def: a primitive root; to prolong, i.e. (reflex) be deformed by excess of members.
H8311.kjv: stretch out self, (have any) superfluous thing

H8313.def: a primitive root; to be (causatively, set) on fire.
H8313.kjv: (cause to, make a) burn((-ing), up) kindle, utterly

H8314.def: from H8313 (שָׂרַף); burning, i.e. (figuratively) poisonous (serpent); specifically, a saraph or symbolical creature (from their copper color).

H8315.def: the same as H8314 (שָׂרָף); Saraph, an Israelite.

H8317.gloss: to wriggle, i.e. (by implication) swarm or abound
H8317.def: a primitive root; to wriggle, i.e. (by implication) swarm or abound.
H8317.kjv: breed (bring forth, increase) abundantly (in abundance), creep, move
