H8318.gloss: a swarm, i.e. active mass of minute animals
H8318.def: from H8317 (שָׁרַץ); a swarm, i.e. active mass of minute animals.

H8319.def: a primitive root; properly, to be shrill, i.e. to whistle or hiss (as a call or in scorn).

H8320.gloss: bright red (as piercing to the sight), i.e. bay
H8320.def: from H8319 (שָׁרַק); bright red (as piercing to the sight), i.e. bay.

H8321.def: or שׂוֹרֵק; and (feminine) שֹׂרֵקָה; from H8319 (שָׁרַק) in the sense of redness (compare H8320 (שָׂרֻק)); a vine stock (properly, one yielding purple grapes, the richest variety).

H8323.def: a primitive root; to have (transitively, exercise; reflexively, get) dominion.
H8323.kjv: altogether, make self a prince, (bear) rule

H8324.gloss: to be hostile (only active participle an opponent)
H8324.def: a primitive root; to be hostile (only active participle an opponent).

H8325.def: from H8324 (שָׁרַר); hostile; Sharar, an Israelite.

H8326.gloss: the umbilical cord, i.e. (by extension) a bodice
H8326.def: from H8324 (שָׁרַר) in the sense of twisting (compare H8270 (שֹׁר)); the umbilical cord, i.e. (by extension) a bodice.

H8327.def: a primitive root; to root, i.e. strike into the soil, or (by implication) to pluck from it.

H8328.def: from H8327 (שָׁרַשׁ); a root (literally or figuratively).

H8329.def: the same as H8328 (שֶׁרֶשׁ); Sheresh, an Israelite.

H8330.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H8328 (שֶׁרֶשׁ); a root (literally or figuratively).

H8331.def: from H8327 (שָׁרַשׁ); a chain (as rooted, i.e. linked).

H8332.def: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to H8327 (שָׁרַשׁ); eradication, i.e. (figuratively) exile.

H8333.def: from H8327 (שָׁרַשׁ) (compare H8331 (שַׁרְשָׁה)); a chain; (architectural) probably a garland.

H8334.gloss: to attend as a menial or worshipper
H8334.def: a primitive root; to attend as a menial or worshipper; figuratively, to contribute to.

H8335.def: infinitive of H8334 (שָׁרַת); service (in the Temple).

H8336.gloss: bleached stuff, i.e. white linen or (by analogy) marble
H8336.def: or (for alliteration with H4897 (מֶשִׁי)) שְׁשִׁי; for H7893 (שַׁיִשׁ); bleached stuff, i.e. white linen or (by analogy) marble.

H8337.gloss: six (as an overplus  beyond five or the fingers of the hand)
H8337.def: masculine שִׁשָּׁה; a primitive number; compare H7797 (שׂוּשׂ); six (as an overplus  beyond five or the fingers of the hand); as ord. sixth.

H8338.def: a primitive root; apparently,; to annihilate.
H8338.kjv: leave by the sixth part (by confusion with H8341 (שָׁשָׁה))

H8339.def: of foreign derivation; Sheshbatstsar, Zerubbabel's Persian name.

H8340.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H8339 (שֵׁשְׁבַּצַּר); Sheshbatstsar, Zerubbabel's Persian name.

H8341.gloss: to sixth or divide into sixths
H8341.def: a denominative from H8337 (שֵׁשׁ); to sixth or divide into sixths.

H8342.def: or שָׂשֹׂן; from H7797 (שׂוּשׂ); cheerfulness; specifically, welcome.

H8343.def: perhaps from H8336 (שֵׁשׁ); whitish; Shashai, an Israelite.

H8344.def: probably for H8343 (שָׁשַׁי); Sheshai, a Canaanite.

H8345.def: from H8337 (שֵׁשׁ); sixth, ord. or (feminine) fractional.

H8347.gloss: Sheshak, a symbolic name of Babylon
H8347.def: of foreign derivation; Sheshak, a symbolic name of Babylon.

H8348.def: perhaps for H7799 (שׁוּשַׁן); lily; Sheshan, an Israelite.

H8349.def: probably from the base of H7785 (שׁוֹק); pedestrian; Shashak, an Israelite.

H8350.def: perhaps from the base of H8324 (שָׁרַר) in the sense of that of H8320 (שָׂרֻק); red ochre (from its piercing color).

H8352.def: from H7896 (שִׁית); put, i.e. substituted; Sheth, third son of Adam.

H8353.def: (Aramaic) or שִׁת; (Aramaic), corresponding to H8337 (שֵׁשׁ); six.

H8354.def: a primitive root; to imbibe (literally or figuratively).
H8354.kjv: assuredly, banquet, certainly, drink(-er, -ing), drunk (-ard), surely. (Prop. intensive of H8248 (שָׁקָה).)

H8355.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H8354 (שָׁתָה); to imbibe (literally or figuratively).

H8356.gloss: a basis, i.e. (figuratively) political or moral support
H8356.def: from H7896 (שִׁית); a basis, i.e. (figuratively) political or moral support.

H8357.def: from H7896 (שִׁית); the seat (of the person).

H8359.gloss: a fixture, i.e. the warp in weaving
H8359.def: from H7896 (שִׁית); a fixture, i.e. the warp in weaving.

H8363.gloss: a sprig (as if transplanted), i.e. sucker
H8363.def: from H8362 (שָׁתַל); a sprig (as if transplanted), i.e. sucker.

H8364.gloss: a Shuthalchite (collectively) or descendants of Shuthelach
H8364.def: patronymically from H7803 (שׁוּתֶלַח); a Shuthalchite (collectively) or descendants of Shuthelach.

H8366.def: a primitive root; (causatively) to make water, i.e. urinate.

H8368.def: a primitive root; to break out (as an eruption).

H8369.def: of foreign derivation; Shethar, a Persian satrap.

H8370.def: of foreign derivation; Shethar-Bozenai, a Persian officer.

H8371.def: a primitive root; to place, i.e. array; reflex. to lie.

H8372.def: and (feminine) תָּאָה; (Ezekiel 40:12), from (the base of) H8376 (תָּאָה); a room (as circumscribed).

H8374.def: a primitive root (probably identical with H8373 (תָּאַב) through the idea of puffing disdainfully at; compare H340 (אָיַב)); to loathe (morally).

H8376.def: a primitive root; to mark off, i.e. (intensively) designate.

H8377.gloss: a species of antelope (probably from the white stripe on
H8377.def: and תּוֹא; (the original form), from H8376 (תָּאָה); a species of antelope (probably from the white stripe on the cheek).

H8378.def: from H183 (אָוָה) (abbreviated); a longing; by implication, a delight (subjectively, satisfaction, objectively, a charm).
H8378.kjv: dainty, desire, exceedingly, greedily, lust(ing), pleasant. See also H6914 (קִבְרוֹת הַתַּאֲוָה)

H8379.def: from H8376 (תָּאָה); a limit, i.e. full extent.

H8380.gloss: a twin (in plural only), literally or figuratively
H8380.def: or תָּאֹם; from H8382 (תָּאַם); a twin (in plural only), literally or figuratively.

H8382.def: a primitive root; to be complete; but used only as denominative from H8380 (תָּאוֹם),; to be (causatively, make) twinned, i.e. (figuratively) duplicate or (architectural) jointed.

H8384.def: or (in the singular, feminine) תְּאֵנָה; perhaps of foreign derivation; the fig (tree or fruit).

H8385.def: or תֹּאֲנָה; from H579 (אָנָה); an opportunity or (subjectively) purpose.

H8387.def: from H8385 (תַּאֲנָה) and H7887 (שִׁילֹה); approach of Shiloh; Taanath-Shiloh, a place in Palestine.

H8388.def: a primitive root; to delineate; reflex. to extend.
H8388.kjv: be drawn, mark out, (Rimmon-) methoar (by union with H7417 (רִמּוֹן))

H8389.def: from H8388 (תָּאַר); outline, i.e. figure or appearance.
H8389.kjv: beautiful, comely, countenance, fair, favoured, form, goodly, resemble, visage

H8390.def: perhaps from H772 (אֲרַע); Taarea, an Israelite.

H8391.gloss: a species of cedar (from its erectness)
H8391.def: from H833 (אָשַׁר); a species of cedar (from its erectness).

H8392.def: perhaps of foreign derivation; a box.

H8393.def: from H935 (בּוֹא); income, i.e. produce (literally or figuratively).

H8394.def: and (feminine) תְּבוּנָה; or תּוֹבֻנָה; from H995 (בִּין); intelligence; by implication, an argument; by extension, caprice.

H8395.def: from H947 (בּוּס); a treading down, i.e. ruin.

H8396.gloss: Tabor, a mountain in Palestine, also a city adjacent
H8396.def: from a root corresponding to H8406 (תְּבַר); broken region; Tabor, a mountain in Palestine, also a city adjacent.

H8397.def: apparently from H1101 (בָּלַל); mixture, i.e. unnatural bestiality.

H8398.gloss: the earth (as moist and therefore inhabited)
H8398.def: from H2986 (יָבַל); the earth (as moist and therefore inhabited); by extension, the globe; by implication, its inhabitants; specifically, a particular land, as Babylonia, Palestine.

H8400.def: from H1101 (בָּלַל) in the original sense of flowing; a cataract (in the eye).

H8401.def: probably from H1129 (בָּנָה); properly, material, i.e. (specifically) refuse haum or stalks of grain (as chopped in threshing and used for fodder).

H8402.def: from H8401 (תֶּבֶן); strawy; Tibni, an Israelite.

H8403.def: from H1129 (בָּנָה); structure; by implication, a model, resemblance.

H8404.gloss: Taberah, a place in the Desert
H8404.def: from H1197 (בָּעַר); burning; Taberah, a place in the Desert.

H8405.def: from the same as H948 (בּוּץ); whiteness; Tebets, a place in Palestine.

H8406.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H7665 (שָׁבַר); to be fragile (figuratively).

H8407.gloss: Tiglath-Pileser or Tilgath-pilneser, an Assyryrian king
H8407.def: or תִּגְלַת פְּלֶסֶר; or תִּלְגַּת פִּלְנְאֶסֶר or תִּלְגַּת פִּלְנֶסֶר; of foreign derivation; Tiglath-Pileser or Tilgath-pilneser, an Assyryrian king.

H8410.def: apparently from H1725 (דָּהַר); enduring; a species of hard-wood or lasting tree (perhaps oak).

H8411.def: (Aramaic) from H1753 (דּוּר) in the original sense of enduring; permanence, i.e. (adverb) constantly.

H8412.def: or תַּמֹּר; (1 Kings 9:18), apparently from H8558 (תָּמָר); palm-city; Tadmor, a place near Palestine.

H8413.def: perhaps from H1763 (דְּחַל); fearfulness; Tidal, a Canaanite.

H8414.def: from an unused root meaning to lie waste; a desolation (of surface), i.e. desert; figuratively, a worthless thing; adverbially, in vain.
H8414.kjv: confusion, empty place, without form, nothing, (thing of) nought, vain, vanity, waste, wilderness

H8415.gloss: an abyss (as a surging mass of water)
H8415.def: or תְּהֹם; (usually feminine) from H1949 (הוּם); an abyss (as a surging mass of water), especially the deep (the main sea or the subterranean watersupply).

H8416.def: from H1984 (הָלַל); laudation; specifically (concretely) a hymn.

H8417.def: feminine of an unused noun (apparently from H1984 (הָלַל)) meaning bluster; braggadocio, i.e. (by implication) fatuity.

H8419.def: from H2015 (הָפַךְ); a perversity or fraud.

H8420.def: from H8427 (תָּוָה); a mark; by implication, a signature.

H8421.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H7725 (שׁוּב), to come back; specifically (transitive and ellip.) to reply.

H8422.gloss: Tubal, a postdiluvian patriarch and his posterity
H8422.def: or תֻּבַל; probably of foreign derivation; Tubal, a postdiluvian patriarch and his posterity.

H8423.def: apparently from H2986 (יָבַל) (compare H2981 (יְבוּל)) and H7014 (קַיִן); offspring of Cain; Tubal-Kajin, an antidiluvian patriarch.

H8424.def: from H3013 (יָגָה); depression (of spirits); concretely a grief.

H8425.gloss: Togarmah, a son of Gomer and his posterity
H8425.def: or תֹּגַרְמָה; probably of foreign derivation; Togarmah, a son of Gomer and his posterity.

H8426.def: from H3034 (יָדָה); properly, an extension of the hand, i.e. (by implication) avowal, or (usually) adoration; specifically, a choir of worshippers.

H8427.gloss: to mark out, i.e. (primitive) scratch or (definite) imprint
H8427.def: a primitive root; to mark out, i.e. (primitive) scratch or (definite) imprint.

H8428.def: a primitive root (or perhaps identical with H8427 (תָּוָה) through a similar idea from scraping to pieces); to grieve.

H8429.gloss: to amaze, i.e. (reflex. by implication) take alarm
H8429.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H8539 (תָּמַהּ) or perhaps to H7582 (שָׁאָה) through the idea of sweeping to ruin (compare H8428 (תָּוָה)); to amaze, i.e. (reflex. by implication) take alarm.

H8430.def: from an unused root meaning to depress; humble; Toach, an Israelite.

H8432.gloss: a bisection, i.e. (by implication) the centre
H8432.def: from an unused root meaning to sever; a bisection, i.e. (by implication) the centre.
H8432.kjv: among(-st), between, half, (there-, where-), in(-to), middle, mid(-night), midst (among), out (of), through, with(-in)

H8433.def: and תּוֹכַחַת; from H3198 (יָכַח); chastisement; figuratively (by words) correction, refutation, proof (even in defence).
H8433.kjv: argument, chastened, correction, reasoning, rebuke, reproof, be (often) reproved

H8434.def: from H3205 (יָלַד); posterity; Tolad, a place in Palestine.

H8435.def: or תֹּלְדָה; from H3205 (יָלַד); (plural only) descent, i.e. family; (figuratively) history.

H8436.def: from H8524 (תָּלַל); suspension; Tulon, an Israelite.

H8437.gloss: causing to howl, i.e. an oppressor
H8437.def: from H3213 (יָלַל); causing to howl, i.e. an oppressor.

H8438.def: and (feminine) תּוֹלֵעָה; or תּוֹלַעַת; or תֹּלַעַת; from H3216 (יָלַע); a maggot (as voracious); specifically (often with ellipsis of H8144 (שָׁנִי)); the crimson-grub, but used only (in this connection) of the colorfrom it, and cloths dyed therewith.

H8439.gloss: Tola, the name of two Israelites
H8439.def: the same as H8438 (תּוֹלָע); worm; Tola, the name of two Israelites.

H8440.gloss: a Tolaite (collectively) or descendants of Tola
H8440.def: patronymically from H8439 (תּוֹלָע); a Tolaite (collectively) or descendants of Tola.

H8441.gloss: something disgusting (morally), i.e. (as noun) an abhorrence
H8441.def: or תֹּעֵבַה; feminine active participle of H8581 (תַּעָב); properly, something disgusting (morally), i.e. (as noun) an abhorrence; especially idolatry or (concretely) an idol.

H8442.def: feminine active participle of H8582 (תָּעָה); mistake, i.e. (morally) impiety, or (political) injury.

H8443.def: from H3286 (יָעַף); (only in plural collective) weariness, i.e. (by implication) toil (treasure so obtained) or speed.

H8444.def: or תֹּצָאָה; from H3318 (יָצָא); (only in plural collective) exit, i.e. (geographical) boundary, or (figuratively) deliverance, (actively) source.

H8445.def: from the same as H3349 (יִקָּהָה); obedience; Tokahath, an Israelite.

H8446.def: a primitive root; to meander (causatively, guide) about, especially fortrade or reconnoitring.
H8446.kjv: chap(-man), sent to descry, be excellent, merchant(-man), search (out), seek, (e-) spy (out)

H8447.gloss: a succession, i.e. a string or (abstractly) order
H8447.def: or תֹּר; from H8446 (תּוּר); a succession, i.e. a string or (abstractly) order.

H8448.gloss: a manner (as a sort of turn)
H8448.def: probably the same as H8447 (תּוֹר); a manner (as a sort of turn).

H8449.gloss: a ring-dove, often (figuratively) as a term of endearment
H8449.def: or תֹּר; probably the same as H8447 (תּוֹר); a ring-dove, often (figuratively) as a term of endearment.

H8450.def: (Aramaic) corresponding (by permutation) to H7794 (שׁוֹר); a bull.

H8451.def: from H3384; a precept or statute, especially the Decalogue or Pentateuch.

H8452.def: probably feminine of H8448 (תּוֹר); a custom.

H8453.def: or תֹּשָׁב; (1 Kings 17:1), from H3427 (יָשַׁב); a dweller (but not outlandish (H5237 (נׇכְרִי))); especially (as distinguished from a native citizen (active participle of H3427 (יָשַׁב)) and a temporary inmate (H1616 (גֵּר)) or mere lodger (H3885 (לוּן))); resident alien.

H8454.def: or תֻּשִׁיָּה; from an unused root probably meaning to substantiate; support or (by implication) ability, i.e. (direct) help, (in purpose) an undertaking, (intellectual) understanding.
H8454.kjv: enterprise, that which (thing as it) is, substance, (sound) wisdom, working

H8455.def: from an unused root meaning to smite; a club.

H8456.def: a primitive root; to lop off.

H8457.def: or תַּזְנֻת; from H2181 (זָנָה); harlotry, i.e. (figuratively) idolatry.

H8458.def: or תַּחְבּוּלָה; from H2254 (חָבַל) as denominative from H2256 (חֶבֶל); (only in plural) properly, steerage (as a management of ropes), i.e. (figuratively) guidance or (by implication) a plan.

H8459.def: from an unused root meaning to depress; abasement; Tochu, an Israelite.

H8460.def: (Aramaic) or תּחֹת; (Aramaic), corresponding to H8478 (תַּחַת); beneath.

H8461.def: probably for H2453 (חַכְמוֹנִי); sagacious; Tachkemoni, an Israelite.

H8462.def: from H2490 (חָלַל) in the sense of opening; a commencement; rel. original (adverb, -ly).

H8463.def: or תַּחֲלֻא; from H2456 (חָלָא); a malady.

H8464.gloss: a species of unclean bird (from its violence)
H8464.def: from H2554 (חָמַס); a species of unclean bird (from its violence), perhaps an owl.

H8465.gloss: Tachan, the name of two Israelites
H8465.def: probably from H2583 (חָנָה); station; Tachan, the name of two Israelites.

H8466.def: from H2583 (חָנָה); (only plural collectively) an encampment.

H8468.def: the same as H8467 (תְּחִנָּה); Techinnah, an Israelite.

H8469.def: or (feminine) תַּחֲנוּנָה; from H2603 (חָנַן); earnest prayer.

H8470.gloss: a Tachanite (collectively) or descendants of Tachan
H8470.def: patronymically from H8465 (תַּחַן); a Tachanite (collectively) or descendants of Tachan.

H8471.gloss: Tachpanches, Techaphneches or Tachpenes, a place in Egypt
H8471.def: or תְּחַפְנְחֵס; (Ezekiel 30:18), or תַּחְפְּנֵס; (Jeremiah 2:16), of Egyptian derivation; Tachpanches, Techaphneches or Tachpenes, a place in Egypt.

H8472.def: of Egyptian derivation; Tachpenes, an Egyptian woman.

H8473.gloss: a linen corslet (as white or hollow)
H8473.def: from H2734 (חָרָה) in the original sense of H2352 (חוּר) or H2353 (חוּר); a linen corslet (as white or hollow).

H8474.def: a facitious root from H2734 (חָרָה) through the idea of the heat of jealousy; to vie with a rival.

H8476.gloss: a (clean) animal with fur, probably a species of antelope
H8476.def: probably of foreign derivation; a (clean) animal with fur, probably a species of antelope.

H8477.def: the same as H8476 (תַּחַשׁ); Tachash, a relative of Abraham.

H8478.def: from the same as H8430 (תּוֹחַ); the bottom (as depressed); only adverbially, below (often with prepositional prefix underneath), in lieu of, etc..
H8478.kjv: as, beneath, flat, in(-stead), (same) place (where...is), room, for...sake, stead of, under, unto, when...was mine, whereas, (where-) fore, with

H8479.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H8478 (תַּחַת); the bottom (as depressed); only adverbially, below (often with prepositional prefix underneath), in lieu of, etc..

H8480.def: the same as H8478 (תַּחַת); Tachath, the name of a place in the Desert, also of three Israelites.

H8482.def: from H8478 (תַּחַת); lowermost; as noun (feminine plural) the depths (figuratively, a pit, the womb).

H8483.def: apparently from the plural masculine of H8482 (תַּחְתִּי) or H8478 (תַּחַת) and H2320 (חֹדֶשׁ); lower (ones) monthly; Tachtim-Chodshi, a place in Palestine.

H8485.gloss: Tema, a son of Ishmael, and the region settled by him
H8485.def: or תֵּמָא; probably of foreign derivation; Tema, a son of Ishmael, and the region settled by him.

H8486.gloss: the south (as being on the right hand of a person facing
H8486.def: or תֵּמָן; denominative from H3225 (יָמִין); the south (as being on the right hand of a person facing the east).

H8487.def: or תֵּמָן; the same as H8486 (תֵּימָן); Teman, the name of two Edomites, and of the region and descendant of one of them.

H8488.def: probably for H8489 (תֵּימָנִי); Temeni, an Israelite.

H8489.gloss: a Temanite or descendant of Teman
H8489.def: patronymically from H8487 (תֵּימָן); a Temanite or descendant of Teman.

H8490.def: or תִּמָרָה; from the same as H8558 (תָּמָר); a column, i.e. cloud.

H8491.gloss: a Titsite or descendant or inhabitant of an unknown Tits
H8491.def: patrial or patronymically from an unused noun of uncertain meaning; a Titsite or descendant or inhabitant of an unknown Tits.

H8492.gloss: must or fresh grape-juice (as just squeezed out)
H8492.def: or תִּירֹשׁ; from H3423 (יָרַשׁ) in the sense of expulsion; must or fresh grape-juice (as just squeezed out); by implication (rarely) fermented wine.

H8493.def: probably from H3372 (יָרֵא); fearful, Tirja, an Israelite.

H8494.def: probably of foreign derivation; Tiras, a son of Japheth.

H8495.gloss: a buck or he-goat (as given to butting)
H8495.def: from an unused root meaning to butt; a buck or he-goat (as given to butting).

H8496.def: or תּוֹך; (Psalm 72:14), from the same base as H8432 (תָּוֶךְ) (in the sense of cutting to pieces); oppression.

H8497.def: a primitive root; to strew, i.e. encamp.

H8498.def: feminine passive participle of H8505 (תָּכַן); adjustment, i.e. structure; by implication, equipage.

H8499.gloss: something arranged or fixed, i.e. a place
H8499.def: from H3559 (כּוּן); or probably identical with H8498 (תְּכוּנָה); something arranged or fixed, i.e. a place.

H8500.def: or תּוּכִּי; probably of foreign derivation; some imported creature, probably a peacock.

H8501.def: from an unused root meaning; to dissever, i.e. crush.

H8503.def: from H3615 (כָּלָה); completion; by implication, an extremity.

H8504.def: probably for H7827 (שְׁחֶלֶת); the cerulean mussel, i.e. the color (violet) obtained therefrom or stuff dyed therewith.

H8505.gloss: to balance, i.e. measure out (by weight or dimension)
H8505.def: a primitive root; to balance, i.e. measure out (by weight or dimension); figuratively, arrange, equalize, through the idea of levelling (ment. estimate, test).
H8505.kjv: bear up, direct, be (un-)equal, mete, ponder, tell, weigh

H8507.def: the same as H8506 (תֹּכֶן); Token, a place in Palestine.

H8509.def: apparently from an unused root meaning to encompass; a wrapper or robe.

H8510.def: by contraction from H8524 (תָּלַל); a mound.

H8511.def: a primitive root; to suspend; figuratively (through hesitation) to be uncertain; by implication (of mental dependence) to habituate.

H8512.def: from H8510 (תֵּל) and H24 (אָבִיב); mound of green growth; Tel-Abib, a place in Chaldaea.

H8515.def: or תְּלַשַּׂר; of foreign derivation; Telassar, a region of Assyria.

H8518.def: a primitive root; to suspend (especially to gibbet).

H8519.def: or תּלֻנָּה; from H3885 (לוּן) in the sense of obstinacy; a grumbling.

H8520.def: probably from an unused root meaning to dissever; breach; Telach, an Israelite.

H8521.def: from H8510 (תֵּל) and the feminine of H2798 (חֲרָשִׁים); mound of workmanship; Tel-Charsha, a place in Babylonia.

H8522.def: probably from H8518 (תָּלָה); a quiver (as slung).

H8523.def: (Aramaic) or תַּלְתִּי; (Aramaic), ordinal from H8532 (תְּלָת); third.

H8524.def: a primitive root; to pile up, i.e. elevate.

H8525.def: from an unused root meaning to accumulate; a bank or terrace.

H8526.gloss: Talmai, the name of a Canaanite and a Syrian
H8526.def: from H8525 (תֶּלֶם); ridged; Talmai, the name of a Canaanite and a Syrian.

H8528.def: from H8510 (תֵּל) and H4417 (מֶלַח); mound of salt; Tel-Melach, a place in Babylonia.

H8529.gloss: to crimson, i.e. dye that color
H8529.def: a denominative from H8438 (תּוֹלָע); to crimson, i.e. dye that color.

H8530.def: feminine from an unused root meaning to tower; something tall, i.e. (plural collective) slenderness.

H8532.def: (Aramaic) masculine תְּלָתָה; (Aramaic), or תְּלָתָא; (Aramaic), corresponding to H7969 (שָׁלוֹשׁ); three or third.

H8533.def: (Aramaic) multiple of H8532 (תְּלָת); ten times three.

H8534.def: by reduplication, from H8524 (תָּלַל) through the idea of vibration; a trailing bough (as pendulous).

H8535.def: from H8552 (תָּמַם); complete; usually (morally) pious; specifically, gentle, dear.
H8535.kjv: coupled together, perfect, plain, undefiled, upright

H8537.def: from H8552 (תָּמַם); completeness; figuratively, prosperity; usually (morally) innocence.
H8537.kjv: full, integrity, perfect(-ion), simplicity, upright(-ly, -ness), at a venture. See H8550 (תֻּמִּים)

H8539.def: a primitive root; to be in consternation.
H8539.kjv: be amazed, be astonished, marvel(-lously), wonder

H8540.def: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to H8539 (תָּמַהּ); a miracle.

H8542.def: of uncertain derivation; Tammuz, a Phoenician deity.

H8543.gloss: ago, i.e. a (short or long) time since
H8543.def: or תְּמֹל; probably for H865 (אֶתְמוֹל); sometimes with  H8032 (שִׁלְשׁוֹם); properly, ago, i.e. a (short or long) time since; especially yesterday, or  day before yesterday.
H8543.kjv: before (-time), these (three) days, heretofore, time past, yesterday

H8544.def: or תְּמֻנָה; from H4327 (מִין); something portioned (i.e. fashioned) out, as ashape, i.e. (indefinitely) phantom, or (specifically) embodiment, or (figuratively) manifestation (of favor).

H8547.def: of uncertain derivation; Temach, one of the Nethinim.

H8548.def: from an unused root meaning to stretch; properly, continuance (as indefinite extension); but used only (attributively as adjective) constant (or adverbially, constantly); ellipt. the regular (daily) sacrifice.

H8549.def: from H8552 (תָּמַם); entire (literally, figuratively or morally); also (as noun) integrity, truth.
H8549.kjv: without blemish, complete, full, perfect, sincerely (-ity), sound, without spot, undefiled, upright(-ly), whole

H8550.def: plural of H8537 (תֹּם); perfections, i.e. (techn.) one of the epithets of the objects in the high-priest's breastplate as an emblem of complete Truth.

H8551.def: a primitive root; to sustain; by implication, to obtain, keep fast; figuratively, to help, follow close.

H8552.def: a primitive root; to complete, in a good or a bad sense, literal, or figurative, transitive or intransitive.
H8552.kjv: accomplish, cease, be clean (pass-) ed, consume, have done, (come to an, have an, make an) end, fail, come to the full, be all gone, be all here, be (make) perfect, be spent, sum, be (shew self) upright, be wasted, whole

H8553.gloss: Timnah, the name of two places in Palestine
H8553.def: from H4487 (מָנָה); a portion assigned; Timnah, the name of two places in Palestine.

H8554.gloss: a Timnite or inhabitant of Timnah
H8554.def: patrial from H8553 (תִּמְנָה); a Timnite or inhabitant of Timnah.

H8555.gloss: Timna, the name of two Edomites
H8555.def: from H4513 (מָנַע); restraint; Timna, the name of two Edomites.

H8556.def: or תִּמְנַת סֶרַח; from H8553 (תִּמְנָה) and H2775 (חֶרֶס); portion of (the) sun; Timnath-Cheres, a place in Palestine.

H8558.def: from an unused root meaning to be erect; a palm tree.

H8559.gloss: Tamar, the name of three women and a place
H8559.def: the same as H8558 (תָּמָר); Tamar, the name of three women and a place.

H8560.def: from the same root as H8558 (תָּמָר); a palm trunk.

H8561.def: (plural or (feminine) תִּמֹּרָה; (singular and plural), from the same root as H8558 (תָּמָר); (architectural) a palm-like pilaster (i.e. umbellate).

H8562.gloss: a scouring, i.e. soap or perfumery forthe bath
H8562.def: or תַּמְרֻק; or תַּמְרִיק; from H4838 (מָרַק); properly, a scouring, i.e. soap or perfumery forthe bath; figuratively, a detergent.

H8564.gloss: an erection, i.e. pillar (probably for a guide-board)
H8564.def: from the same root as H8558 (תָּמָר); an erection, i.e. pillar (probably for a guide-board).

H8565.def: from an unused root probably meaning to elongate; a monster (as preternaturally formed), i.e. a sea-serpent (or other huge marine animal); also a jackal (or other hideous land animal).

H8566.def: a primitive root; to present (a mercenary inducement), i.e. bargain with (a harlot).

H8567.def: a primitive root (identical with through the idea of attributing honor); to ascribe (praise), i.e. celebrate, commemorate.

H8568.def: probably feminine of H8565 (תַּן); a female jackal.

H8569.def: from H5106 (נוּא); alienation; by implication, enmity.

H8571.def: perhaps from the same as H594 (אֲנָךְ) through the idea of protraction; a pinnacle, i.e. extremity.

H8573.def: from H5130 (נוּף); a brandishing (in threat); by implication, tumult; specifically, the official undulation of sacrificial offerings.

H8575.def: or תַּנְחֻם; and (feminine) תַּנְחוּמָה; from H5162 (נָחַם); compassion, solace.

H8577.gloss: a marine or land monster, i.e. sea-serpent or jackal
H8577.def: or תַּנִּים; (Ezekiel 29:3), intensive from the same as H8565 (תַּן); a marine or land monster, i.e. sea-serpent or jackal.

H8580.def: from H5395 (נָשַׁם); properly, a hard breather, i.e. the name of two unclean creatures, a lizard and abird (both perhaps from changing color through their irascibility), probably the tree-toad and the water-hen.

H8581.def: a primitive root; to loathe, i.e. (morally) detest.
H8581.kjv: (make to be) abhor(-red), (be, commit more, do) abominable(-y), utterly

H8582.gloss: to vacillate, i.e. reel or stray (literally or figuratively)
H8582.def: a primitive root; to vacillate, i.e. reel or stray (literally or figuratively); also causative of both.
H8582.kjv: (cause to) go astray, deceive, dissemble, (cause to, make to) err, pant, seduce, (make to) stagger, (cause to) wander, be out of the way

H8583.gloss: Tou or Toi, a Syrian king
H8583.def: or תֹּעִי; from H8582 (תָּעָה); error; Tou or Toi, a Syrian king.

H8584.def: from H5749 (עוּד); attestation, i.e. a precept, usage.

H8585.gloss: a channel (into which water is raised for irrigation)
H8585.def: from H5927 (עָלָה); a channel (into which water is raised for irrigation); also a bandage or plaster (as placed upon a wound).
H8585.kjv: conduit, cured, healing, little river, trench, watercourse

H8586.gloss: caprice (as a fit coming on), i.e. vexation
H8586.def: from H5953 (עָלַל); caprice (as a fit coming on), i.e. vexation; concretely a tyrant.

H8588.def: or תַּעֲנֻג; and (feminine) תַּעֲנֻגָה; from H6026 (עָנַג); luxury.

H8589.def: from H6031 (עָנָה); affliction (of self), i.e. fasting.

H8590.gloss: Taanak or Tanak, a place in Palestine
H8590.def: or תַּעְנָךְ; of uncertain derivation; Taanak or Tanak, a place in Palestine.

H8591.def: a primitive root; to cheat; by analogy, to maltreat.

H8593.gloss: a knife or razor (as making bare)
H8593.def: from H6168 (עָרָה); a knife or razor (as making bare); also a scabbard (as being bare, i.e. empty).

H8594.def: from H6148 (עָרַב); suretyship, i.e. (concretely) a pledge.

H8597.def: or תִּפְאֶרֶת; from H6286 (פָּאַר); ornament (abstractly or concretely, literally or figuratively).
H8597.kjv: beauty(-iful), bravery, comely, fair, glory(-ious), honour, majesty

H8598.def: from H5301 (נָפַח); an apple (from its fragrance), i.e. the fruit or the tree (probably includ. others of the pome order, as the quince, the orange, etc.).

H8599.def: the same as H8598 (תַּפּוּחַ); Tappuach, the name of two places in Palestine, also of an Israelite.

H8601.def: from H644 (אָפָה); cookery, i.e. (concretely) a cake.

H8602.def: from an unused root meaning to smear; plaster (as gummy) or slime; (figuratively) frivolity.

H8603.gloss: Tophel, a place near the Desert
H8603.def: from the same as H8602 (תָּפֵל); quagmire; Tophel, a place near the Desert.

H8604.def: from the same as H8602 (תָּפֵל); frivolity.

H8605.def: from H6419 (פָּלַל); intercession, supplication; by implication, a hymn.

H8607.def: from H6452 (פָּסַח); ford; Tiphsach, a place in Mesopotamia.

H8608.gloss: to drum, i.e. play (as) on the tambourine
H8608.def: a primitive root; to drum, i.e. play (as) on the tambourine.

H8610.def: a primitive root; to manipulate, i.e. seize; chiefly to capture, wield, specifically, to overlay; figuratively, to use unwarrantably.
H8610.kjv: catch, handle, (lay, take) hold (on, over), stop, surely, surprise, take

H8611.def: from the base of H8608 (תָּפַף); a smiting, i.e. (figuratively) contempt.

H8612.def: the same as H8611 (תֹּפֶת); Topheth, a place near Jerusalem.

H8613.def: probably a form of H8612 (תֹּפֶת); Tophteh, a place of cremation.

H8614.def: (Aramaic) perhaps from H8199 (שָׁפַט); judicial, i.e. a lawyer.

H8615.def: from H6960 (קָוָה); (compare H6961 (קָוֶה)); literally a cord (as an attachment); figuratively, expectancy.
H8615.kjv: expectation(-ted), hope, live, thing that I long for

H8616.gloss: Tikvah, the name of two Israelites
H8616.def: the same as H8615 (תִּקְוָה); Tikvah, the name of two Israelites.

H8619.def: from H8628 (תָּקַע) (in the musical sense); a trumpet.

H8620.def: a form of H8619 (תָּקוֹעַ); Tekoa, a place in Palestine.

H8621.gloss: a Tekoite or inhabitant of Tekoah
H8621.def: or תְּקֹעִי; patronymically from H8620 (תְּקוֹעַ); a Tekoite or inhabitant of Tekoah.

H8622.gloss: a revolution, i.e. (of the sun) course, (of time) lapse
H8622.def: or תְּקֻפָה; from H5362 (נָקַף); a revolution, i.e. (of the sun) course, (of time) lapse.

H8626.gloss: to equalize, i.e. straighten (intransitive or transitive)
H8626.def: a primitive root; to equalize, i.e. straighten (intransitive or transitive); figuratively, to compose.

H8627.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H8626 (תָּקַן); to straighten up, i.e. confirm.

H8628.def: a primitive root; to clatter, i.e. slap (the hands together), clang (an instrument); by analogy, to drive (a nail or tent-pin, a dart, etc.); by implication, to become bondsman by handclasping).
H8628.kjv: blow (a trumpet), cast, clap, fasten, pitch (tent), smite, sound, strike, suretiship, thrust

H8629.def: from H8628 (תָּקַע); a blast of a trumpet.

H8631.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H8630 (תָּקַף); to become (causatively, make) mighty or (figuratively) obstinate.

H8634.def: probably for H8653 (תַּרְעֵלָה); a reeling; Taralah, a place in Palestine.

H8636.def: from H7235 (רָבָה); multiplication, i.e. percentage or bonus in addition to principal.

H8637.def: a denominative from H7270 (רָגַל); to cause to walk.

H8638.def: a denominative from H7275 (רָגַם) in the sense of throwing over; to transfer, i.e. translate.

H8639.def: from H7290 (רָדַם); a lethargy or (by implication) trance.

H8640.def: of foreign derivation; Tirhakah, a king of Kush.

H8641.def: or תְּרֻמָה; (Deuteronomy 12:11), from H7311 (רוּם); a present (as offered up), especially in sacrifice or as tribute.

H8642.def: formed as H8641 (תְּרוּמָה); a sacrificial offering.

H8643.gloss: clamor, i.e. acclamation of joy or a battle-cry
H8643.def: from H7321 (רוּעַ); clamor, i.e. acclamation of joy or a battle-cry; especially clangorof trumpets, as an alarum.
H8643.kjv: alarm, blow(-ing) (of, the) (trumpets), joy, jubile, loud noise, rejoicing, shout(-ing), (high, joyful) sound(-ing)

H8644.def: from H7322 (רוּף) in the sense of its congener H7495 (רָפָא); a remedy.

H8645.gloss: a species of tree (apparently from its slenderness)
H8645.def: probably from H7329 (רָזָה); a species of tree (apparently from its slenderness), perhaps the cypress.

H8646.def: of uncertain derivation; Terach, the father of Abraham; also a place in the Desert.

H8647.def: of uncertain derivation; Tirchanah, an Israelite.

H8648.def: (Aramaic) feminine תַּרְתֵּין; corresponding to H8147 (שְׁנַיִם); two.

H8649.def: and תַּרְמוּת; or תַּרְמִית; from H7411 (רָמָה); fraud.

H8650.gloss: a pole (as a mast or flagstaff)
H8650.def: probably for H766 (אֹרֶן); a pole (as a mast or flagstaff).

H8651.def: (Aramaic) corresponding to H8179 (שַׁעַר); a door; by implication, a palace.

H8654.gloss: a Tirathite or inhabitant of an unknown Tirah
H8654.def: patrial from an unused name meaning gate; a Tirathite or inhabitant of an unknown Tirah.

H8655.gloss: Teraphim (singular or plural) a family idol
H8655.def: plural from H7495 (רָפָא); a healer; Teraphim (singular or plural) a family idol.

H8656.def: from H7521 (רָצָה); delightsomeness; Tirtsah, a place in Palestine; also an Israelitess.

H8657.def: of foreign derivation; Teresh, a eunuch of Xerxes.

H8658.def: probably of foreign derivation (compare H8659 (תַּרְשִׁישׁ)); a gem, perhaps the topaz.

H8659.def: probably the same as H8658 (תַּרְשִׁישׁ) (as the region of the stone, or the reverse); Tarshish, a place on the Mediterranean, hence, the ephithet of a merchant vessel (as if for or from that port); also the name of a Persian and of an Israelite.

H8660.gloss: Tirshatha, the title of a Persian deputy or governor
H8660.def: of foreign derivation; Tirshatha, the title of a Persian deputy or governor.

H8661.def: of foreign derivation; Tartan, an Assyrian.

H8662.gloss: Tartak, a deity of the Avvites
H8662.def: of foreign derivation; Tartak, a deity of the Avvites.

H8663.def: from H7722 (שׁוֹא); a crashing or loud clamor.

H8664.gloss: a Tishbite or inhabitant of Tishbeh (in Gilead)
H8664.def: patrial from an unused name meaning recourse; a Tishbite or inhabitant of Tishbeh (in Gilead).

H8666.def: or תְּשֻׁבָה; from H7725 (שׁוּב); a recurrence (of time or place); a reply (as returned).

H8667.def: from H7760 (שׂוּם); a deposit, i.e. pledging.

H8668.def: or תְּשֻׁעָה; from H7768 (שָׁוַע) in the sense of H3467 (יָשַׁע); rescue (literal or figurative, persons, national or spiritual).

H8669.def: from H7783 (שׁוּק) in the original sense of stretching out after; a longing.

H8670.def: from H7788 (שׁוּר) in the sense of arrival; a gift.

H8672.def: or (masculine) תִּשְׁעָה; perhaps from H8159 (שָׁעָה) through the idea of a turn to the next or full number ten; nine or (ordinal) ninth.

H8674.def: of foreign derivation; Tattenai, a Persian.
